Description: Unleashing disruption in various business domains including real estate, construction, architectural design, and BPO.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: DQventures
Description:
DQventures is the only incubator that's dedicated to helping experienced professionals make the transition from corporate employee to successful entrepreneur.

A team of successful builders and investors in 100+ companies, we've felt the best and worst of entrepreneurship. Now we're committed to helping as many good people as possible to enjoy the former and avoid the latter. 

We get our hands dirty, working alongside our founders to reduce the risk of failure, improve the odds of success, and create the proof and momentum they need to transition to entrepreneurship with confidence. 

That means validating their ideas and assumptions, helping them win their first paying customers, and building their "minimum viable business" before they quit their job.

Our commitment, in doing the above, is to always doing what’s in the founder’s best interest, telling it like it is, and building real businesses rather than chasing unicorns.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Heartcore Capital
Description:
Heartcore Capital is an early stage venture capital fund with offices in Copenhagen, Stockholm, Berlin and Paris.  Since 2007, we have backed some of Europe’s biggest category-defining companies, such as Tink, Neo4j, Boozt, Peakon, Seriously and TravelPerk. So far, we have invested in over 100 founding teams from 13 different countries. And we're looking for more. 

Get in touch with us at contact@heartcore.com and subscribe to our newsletter —> http://heartcore.substack.com
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Sutton Capital
Description:
Sutton Capital uses a thesis driven strategy to back the world's best founders and fund managers.  Our leadership team supports technology teams with capital, experience, and resources so they can drive the next trillion dollar markets.  We leverage our networks to exponentially grow a deep focus on tech.  Our unique relationships with top tier investors give us access to exciting & proprietary opportunities. 

Sutton Capital’s educational program is an immersive, training experience designed for aspiring professionals looking to break into private equity, investment banking, and venture capital. The program combines hands-on learning with rigorous financial modeling, personalized 1-on-1 coaching, and exclusive networking opportunities with top-tier investors and deal professionals across the alternative investment landscape.

Participants work on live case studies and deal simulations that mirror real transactions, allowing them to build practical skills in due diligence, valuation, and capital structuring. Each participant receives tailored mentorship from industry veterans who provide strategic career guidance and actionable feedback. In addition, the program provides direct access to a curated network of active institutional investment professionals and firms through invite-only events, summits, and deal forums, offering unmatched exposure and relationship-building in the investment community.

Whether you’re transitioning into the industry or deepening your expertise, Sutton Capital’s program delivers the tools, relationships, and credibility needed to confidently pursue a career in high finance.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals
Location: New York , San Fransisco, Hong Kong, Israel, London, India

Name: Transition VC
Description:
Transition VC is India’s first Energy Transition-focused VC fund. We are on a mission to address the Climate Crisis and are committed to accelerating India’s goal of reaching Net Zero.

Thesis-driven and focused on the Energy Transition sector, the Fund aims to support early-stage startups in areas such as New Energy, E-Mobility, Green Hydrogen, Energy Storage, Net Zero Energy Buildings, and Climate-tech solutions focused on decarbonization.

For corporate and industry collaborations, or if you're a startup looking for support, contact us at info@transitionventurecapital.com.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Unshackled Ventures
Description: Unshackled Ventures is the first and only early-stage venture capital fund focused on retaining foreign talent in the U.S. By investing in immigrants and helping them to secure visas, the firm has tapped into undiscovered super-talent in helping foreign-born founders turn their innovative ideas into the next great American company.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: JetBlue Ventures
Description:
JetBlue Ventures is now SKY VC. 

Please find our new page at https://www.linkedin.com/company/sky-vc
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Foundry
Description:
Based in Boulder, Colorado, Foundry is one of the largest networks of entrepreneurs and early-stage investors in the country. Founded in 2007, our firm manages more than $3.0Bn for our limited partners and has made more than 320 investments and more than 70 exits. 

Foundry is a unique offering in the venture capital market with a symbiotic network that propels innovation. This network comprises over 75 portfolio companies and more than 40 partner funds generating a trusted community spanning founders, CEOs, partner fund managers, limited partners, and other executives within the Foundry ecosystem. Empowering this portfolio of companies and VC funds to connect, share, and learn from each other is the objective, and we are proud to support this enterprise.

Six partners and fifteen strong, we are honored to be B-Corp certified as well as founders and supporters of a number of charitable organizations. For more information please visit www.foundry.vc.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: BEENEXT
Description: BEENEXT is a venture capital firm investing in early stage technology startups from India, Southeast Asia, Japan, and USA.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: TCG (The Chernin Group)
Description:
Founded by Peter Chernin, Jesse Jacobs, and Mike Kerns, The Chernin Group (TCG) is a preeminent growth equity firm investing in sports, media, and passion-driven businesses with offices in Los Angeles, Menlo Park, and New York. The TCG portfolio includes Collectors, Classic Football Shirts, Epic Gardening, Food52, Headspace, Meateater, Oura, Surfline, Unrivaled Sports and more.
 
We partner with exceptional founders and management teams who have created disruptive brands to grow and optimize their businesses. With decades of operational expertise and strong connections across media, sports, and technology, we work every day to help our portfolio companies realize their full potential.
 
At TCG, we follow our curiosity, live with conviction, and find a little levity in our days. We don’t take small bets – we’re all in.
 
To learn more, visit: https://tcg.co/
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Qiming Venture Partners
Description:
Qiming Venture Partners was founded in 2006. 

Currently, Qiming Venture Partners manages eleven US Dollar funds and seven RMB funds with $9.5 billion in capital raised. Since our establishment, we have invested in outstanding companies in the Technology and Healthcare industries at the early and growth stages.

Since our debut, we have backed over 580 fast-growing and innovative companies. Over 210 of our portfolio companies have achieved exits through IPOs at the NYSE, NASDAQ, HKEX, Shanghai Stock Exchange, or Shenzhen Stock Exchange, or through M&A or other means. There are also over 80 portfolio companies that have achieved unicorn or super unicorn status. 

Many of our portfolio companies are today's most influential firms in their respective sectors, including Xiaomi (SEHK:1810), Meituan (SEHK:3690), Bilibili (NASDAQ:BILI, SEHK:9626), Zhihu (NYSE:ZH, SEHK:2390), Roborock (SHSE:688169), UBTech (SEHK:9880), WeRide (NASDAQ:WRD), HyperStrong (SHSE:688411), Insta360 (SHSE:688775), Unisound (SEHK:9678), Gan & Lee Pharmaceuticals (SHSE:603087), Tigermed (SZSE:300347, SEHK:3347), Zai Lab (NASDAQ:ZLAB, SEHK:9688), CanSino Biologics (SEHK:6185, SHSE:688185), Schrödinger (NASDAQ:SDGR), APT Medical (SHSE:688617), Sanyou Medical (SHSE:688085), AmoyDx (SZSE:300685), Berry Genomics (SZSE:000710), SinocellTech (SHSE:688520), Yuanxin Technology, Insilico Medicine, Medilink Therapeutics, LaNova Medicines, zai, StepFun, among many others.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: True Beauty Ventures
Description:
True Beauty Ventures was founded on the premise that in beauty, true experience and true expertise matter.  We are industry specialists dedicated to scaling emerging brands exclusively in beauty and wellness. 

We occupy what we believe is a very underserved area of the beauty market.  With over 20 years of institutional beauty investment experience, we provide much needed capital to emerging and early growth stage beauty brands. 

Our point of differentiation is driven by our dedicated sector focus, domain expertise and knowledge built over two decades, our extensive industry network and relationships that contribute to all aspects of the investor value chain, our combination of investing + operating experience, and the reputation, past successes, and trust we have built in this industry.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Praxis
Description: A venture-building ecosystem advancing redemptive entrepreneurship, supporting founders, funders, and innovators motivated by their faith to address the major issues of our time.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: SKKY Partners
Description: SKKY Partners, a private equity firm co-founded by Kim Kardashian and Jay Sammons that focuses on both control and minority investments in high-growth, market-leading consumer and media companies.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: VentureFriends
Description: We are entrepreneurial investors who love to support founders and help create disruptive startups and eventually sustainable businesses.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: HUMAN CAPITAL
Description:
Human Capital is a multi-stage venture capital firm. We build and invest in companies that define the world’s most critical industries.

We partner with founders to assemble teams that create exceptional businesses.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: PeakBridge
Description:
PeakBridge is a global VC bridging the gap between bold innovation and real-world needs, to transform the future of food. 

We invest in visionary pioneers, from early stage to Series A-B, with scalable, protectable climate and health-focused technologies. At their core: a deep commitment to disrupting our food system while driving positive impact.  
 
Our team is spread across seven countries and includes pioneers of FoodTech investment and decades of deep Agri-Food operational and financial experience. Together, we create exceptional value for bold FoodTech entrepreneurs and investors.   

A member of the Edmond de Rothschild Private Equity partnership, we collaborate with leading food corporates, investors, knowledge institutes, and FoodTech hubs worldwide.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Praetura Ventures
Description:
Praetura are a venture capital firm in the North West, who invest in early-stage businesses and provide 'more than money' support.

We have developed a reputation for being a supportive and proactive investor who injects more than just capital. We can evidence the value from our differentiated approach from both investment returns and testament from our portfolio companies.

Our partnered entrepreneurs embrace the shoulder to shoulder Praetura approach and utilise our experience and resource to maximise their businesses’ potential.

Your capital is at risk.

Praetura Ventures Limited is authorised and regulated by the Financial Conduct Authority (FRN 817345).
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Draper Associates
Description:
Draper Associates is an early-stage venture capital firm, funding the future first.

Founded in 1985 by Tim Draper, we’ve been the first believers in companies like Tesla, SpaceX, Robinhood, Baidu, Twitch, Cruise, and Coinbase—long before they became household names.

We invest from pre-seed to Series A and remain industry-agnostic and opportunistic, while gravitating toward transformative ideas in AI, robotics, biotech, Biocures, robotics, defense, crypto, space, and deep tech. We're especially excited by the wild, the weird, and the unconventional—world-changing ideas that seem impossible today but will be inevitable tomorrow.

The firm’s partners are Tim Draper and Andy Tang. 

Our mission is simple:

Fund the people crazy enough to change the world.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: ChileGlobal Ventures
Description: ChileGlobal Ventures es la consolidación de todas las iniciativas que Fundación Chile ha creado para potenciar el crecimiento de startups que impactarán el desarrollo de Chile, Latinoamérica y el mundo, cubriendo el espectro completo de madurez de los negocios y ofreciendo así una propuesta de valor única para el apoyo de emprendimientos dinámicos.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Alif
Description:
We partner with Muslim founders working on big ideas in emerging tech.

We do this in three ways: with capital, community, and connections.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Folklore Ventures
Description:
Folklore Ventures is an Australian venture capital firm that is committed to supporting Australia and New Zealand’s most ambitious founders. 

Folklore invests early and for the long-term as a first cheque to forever investor that believes in the power of founder vision and the potential of teams, right from the start. Folklore looks for founders who are obsessed with delivering a product the world needs with software at its core.

If you are looking to bring your vision to life with the backing of a team and community who have lived through the ups and downs of the startup journey, we’d love to hear from you - reach out to any of our investment team.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Alma Angels
Description:
Alma Angels is a diverse and active community with a bold mission: Generate $1 trillion in women-led wealth by 2050. Since 2020, we have brought together and trained over 500 angel investors who have invested into 200+ women (co)founders building tech or IP-rich ventures with global ambitions. These companies have gone on to raise more than £300m to date. 

Alma Angels is committed to training 10,000 angels and backing 10,000 women founders by 2035.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Verizon Ventures
Description:
Verizon Ventures is the primary mechanism to find, fund and further the 5G future as the network America relies on. We invest in promising entrepreneurial companies who are tackling some of today’s biggest technological challenges for Verizon's consumer, business, network and media customers. 

Verizon Ventures connects entrepreneurs with Verizon’s trusted network of strategic and financial resources to help advance their businesses. 

Follow us on Twitter @VerizonVentures.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Paladin Capital Group
Description:
Paladin Capital Group is a leading global investor that supports and grows the world’s most innovative companies through venture investment, expansion, and growth capital. We are headquartered in Washington, DC, with offices in London, Luxembourg, New York City, and Silicon Valley. We seek out diverse investment opportunities across the US and worldwide.

Paladin is a leader in investing in technologies, products, and services focused on dual use in both commercial and governmental markets with a strong value-add culture.

Paladin Cyber Fund: Our most recent fund focuses on Digital Infrastructure Resilience, investing globally in advanced technologies and solutions which enable, monitor, manage, and defend critical infrastructure that is dependent on cyber space. The Fund is actively investing and has closed eleven investments.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Finch Capital
Description: Finch Capital is a growth investor that partners with ambitious teams in Business & Financial technology. Founded in 2013, Finch manages over €450m in AUM and backs Technology companies in 7 primary sectors: Accounting & Tax, Legal, Regulatory & Compliance, HR & Payroll, Business Process, Payments, Insurance and Banking & Wealth. Finch has backed over 50 companies including AccountsIQ, Fourthline, Grab, Goodlord, In3, NomuPay, Twinco and Zopa.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: PE FORUM
Description: Since 2017, PE FORUM is a leading platform for the global private equity community. We bring together investors, fund managers, and industry leaders through the power of relationships.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: pi Ventures
Description: pi Ventures is an early stage venture fund based out of India. The fund will focus on backing product & technology companies in the areas of Artificial Intelligence, Machine Intelligence & IoT , as we rapidly see hardware and software products coming together using artificial and machine intelligence to create disruptive ventures across multiple sectors.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Bowmark Capital
Description:
Bowmark Capital is a leading private equity investment firm specialising in technology, data and services companies. 

Established in 1997, Bowmark manages funds of over £2 billion and has made more than 50 investments. Bowmark’s focus is on four core areas of the technology sector: data and insight, managed IT services, software, and technology-enabled business services. 

The firm invests up to £300 million per transaction through majority or significant minority stakes in companies with compelling growth prospects, that are seeking a supportive, value-added partner to help them realise their ambitions. 

With our strategic support and capital, we work in partnership with management teams to accelerate growth and build exceptional businesses. 

Bowmark Capital LLP is authorised and regulated by the Financial Conduct Authority.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: OIF Ventures
Description:
We're OIF Ventures, an Australian venture capital firm, championing exceptional founders to build the iconic technology businesses of the future.

Founded by some of Australia’s leading entrepreneurs, business builders and investors with significant investment, operational and strategic experience, we always seek to add material value to the founders and teams we partner with.

We've backed some of Australia’s most iconic technology companies including Go1, Instaclustr, Assignar, Enboarder, Kasada, XM Cyber, Circle In, Clear Dynamics and more.

If you will it, it is no dream.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Montefiore Investment
Description: Created in 2005, Montefiore Investment is the reference Private Equity firm dedicated to service SMEs and mid-market companies. With a team of 70 employees, and relying on its sector expertise and know-how, the company successfully supports companies in their growth and development projects. Montefiore Investment has demonstrated its ability to transform SMEs and midcap companies into true European champions. Its performance has enabled it to establish itself as a key player in mid-market private equity. Based in Paris and Milan, Montefiore Investment currently manages €5 billion of equity and invests ticket sizes ranging from €20 million to €200 million in order to finance sustainable and profitable growth for its portfolio companies. Since 2021, Montefiore has also been a shareholder and strategic partner of Starquest, a management company dedicated to investments in innovative companies with a strong environmental impact (GreenTech).
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Wadi Makkah | وادي مكة للتقنية
Description: Wadi Makkah is an Investment joint stock Company fully owned by Umm Al Qura University (UQU), established under the Royal Decree No. M/32 dated 11 Jumada Al-Awwal 1433, to invest in tangible and intellectual assets and in knowledge-based production to practice its diversified activities on commercial basis
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Tenzing
Description:
At Tenzing, we're not just investors; we're partners on a mission. As a leading private equity firm specialising in high-growth UK and European SMEs valued up to £300 million, we're passionate about collaborating with niche market leaders and visionary challenger businesses. Our goal? To empower these companies to transform themselves and disrupt their markets.

Our namesake, Tenzing Norgay, the legendary Nepalese mountaineer who guided Sir Edmund Hillary on the historic first ascent of Mount Everest, symbolizes our unwavering commitment to guiding our portfolio businesses to the summit of their ambitions, time and time again. Just as Tenzing guided Hillary through uncharted territories, we stand by your side as you navigate the complex landscape of business growth.

What Sets Us Apart:

* Passion for Partnership: We thrive on partnering with high-energy, high-performance management teams. We're not passive bystanders; we're active collaborators who roll up our sleeves alongside you to drive growth and create lasting value.
* Shared Wisdom: Our journey has been marked by invaluable experiences, and we're eager to share those insights with you. Whether it's navigating financial challenges or seizing market opportunities, we're here to support, inspire, and guide you every step of the way.
* Real-World Expertise: Our team isn't just well-versed in finance; we've walked in your shoes. We understand the unique demands and pressures faced by management teams, and we bring real-world expertise to the table.

If you're a high-energy, high-performance management team with big dreams and the determination to reach them, we invite you to embark on this journey with us. Together, we can scale new heights. Let's connect, collaborate, and make your vision a reality.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: SP Ventures
Description:
SP Ventures is a leading early stage investment fund for Ag, Food and Climate Tech in Latin America, with over 10 years of track-record & experience. 

We partner with visionary founders who share our passion for transforming food and agriculture. Together we design & build a new, more sustainable and climate-friendly, resilient food system. 

Our portfolio includes investments in cutting-edge technologies in AgFintech, Marketplaces, eSupply Chain Tech, Logtech, Biologicals, AgEdTech and Carbon Market innovations, among others. Our primary focus is to unlock the potential of agfood technologies in Latin America, converging the region into a hub for both food production and disruptive technologies. We want to be valued partners for our portfolio companies, offering access to market, talent, strategic-knowledge and diversified capital to help them achieve their goals.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Motier Ventures
Description:
Motier Ventures is the Family Office managing the investments in Tech start-ups made by the owners of the Galeries Lafayette Group.

We are a value-added business angel. At scale.

We provide agile and patient capital, investing up to €300k as Business Angel in your early days and following with up to €1m on next rounds.

We focus on Future of Commerce, FinTech, CreativeTech, Consumer & Gaming, Infra & Tooling and Future of Work, with Blockchains and AI as transversal expertises.

We bring for your business 130 years of entrepreneurial experience and an access to a wide ecosystem: our portfolio companies, the Groupe Galeries Lafayette (Les Galeries Lafayette, La Redoute, Louis Pion, Royal Quartz Paris, Mauboussin, Eataly, Citynove, and the Lafayette Anticipations foundation), as well as a corporate network that spans across various industries.

If you are aiming at changing the game in your industry, we would be happy to connect.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: African Impact Initiative
Description:
The African Impact Initiative is an organization dedicated to impacting the African continent through its early innovators. We believe that the best way to predict the future of Africa is to create it 

Our vision is a reality where it’s never too early for any young African to make a difference in their community
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: S3 Ventures
Description: Founded in 2005, S3 Ventures is the largest and longest-serving venture capital firm born in Texas and investing nationwide. We empower visionary founders with the patient capital and true resources required to grow extraordinary, high-impact companies in Business Software and Healthcare Technology. With over $1B in assets under management, we lead Seed, Series A, and Series B rounds—with initial investments ranging from $500K to $15M and the capacity to invest $25M over the life of a company. Our 75+ investments have raised over $3.5B in financing and resulted in 35+ exits—collectively valued at over $3B. Since our inception, we have been backed by a single philanthropic family with a multi-billion-dollar foundation.  With this sole-LP structure, we are undistracted by fundraising and unencumbered by many of the constraints faced by traditional VC firms—better aligning us with the needs of  founders.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Sycamore Partners
Description: Sycamore Partners is a private equity firm based in New York specializing in retail and consumer investments. The firm has approximately $10 billion in aggregate committed capital. Our strategy is to partner with management teams to improve the operating profitability and strategic value of their businesses.  We provide flexible capital structured for each investment to position companies to succeed.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: PT1
Description:
PT1 is a European venture capital platform investing in early-stage tech that’s upgrading the physical world in three core clusters: 
\ Electrification & energy transition
\ Built world AI & automation
\ Climate & infrastructure resilience

With initial tickets ranging from €300k to €4M, we back the boldest founders across the UK and Europe who are redefining how we build, power and sustain our world. At PT1 we don’t just fund startups - we actively support to add value where it matters most. Combining deep domain expertise with data-driven insights, we leverage our AI-enabled deal flow engine to identify and accelerate future category winners. 

Championed by our network of 100+ industry experts – from unicorn founders to corporates and industrial veterans – we provide startups with collective wisdom, hands-on guidance, strategic acceleration sprints and the backing needed to scale.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Klass Capital
Description:
Our History
We have been acquiring and providing growth capital to mission-critical enterprise software businesses for over 10 years. Klass is backed by a large U.S. institutional investor and high net worth individuals.

Investment Approach
We acquire and provide growth equity to high quality and mission-critical software businesses with great people. Technology is important but the best software companies are built on the relationships and knowledge of long-tenured and experienced teams that have deep roots in their industries. Beyond that, Klass is looking for mid-sized companies with attractive opportunities for incremental growth.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Mantis Venture Capital
Description: Mantis VC is an early stage technology investment firm supporting the most innovative companies across enterprise software, AI / ML, cloud and data infrastructure, healthtech, cybersecurity, gaming and other emerging technologies.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: New York Angels
Description:
New York Angels is a member-led organization committed to finding, funding and mentoring great young companies from pitch through successful exit. Our 120+ members are entrepreneurs, CEOs, venture capitalists and business leaders who have founded, funded and built world-class companies. We come from a wide array of industry backgrounds and together create an extensive network of entrepreneurial support. We mentor and coach the entrepreneurs in whom we invest, serve on their boards, provide contacts and assist with team building, strategic planning and fundraising.

The mission of New York Angels is to foster an engaged and smart New York City angel investment environment in an effort to enhance the opportunities for entrepreneurs to be financed and succeed through exit. We provide opportunities for our members to obtain outstanding financial returns by investing in early-stage companies and accelerating them to market leadership. We lead and participate in investments ranging from $100,000–$2,000,000, and have a large network of angel groups and venture capital firms with whom we syndicate to do rounds up to $3 million.

New York Angels has been the leading seed investment organization in NYC since 2004, with members investing over $112 million into more than 270 exciting startup companies. Through their participation in New York Angels, members were the first investors in such startups as Pinterest and Comixology, and portfolio companies have been acquired by Google, Intel, CBS, Living Social and others.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: RTP Global
Description: A global, early-stage venture capital firm, backing ambitious founders who are reshaping the world with technology. Over the last two decades, we have partnered with over 150+ founders across the world, including Datadog, DeliveryHero, Qonto, Datarobot, Miro, Picsart, Cred and SumUp.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Mainsail Partners
Description:
Mainsail Partners is a growth equity firm that invests in bootstrapped B2B software companies to help them realize their full potential. Our team is purpose-built to include experienced investors and software operators who help founders build great teams, develop industry-leading products, design data-driven and scalable infrastructure, and grow market share. Mainsail’s hands-on support and best practices are delivered with a collaborative approach that respects founder-led cultures and helps build on each company’s commitment to its people and customers.
 
With offices in Austin and San Francisco, Mainsail Partners has raised nearly $4 billion in committed capital and partnered with 100+ companies over the last 22 years. For more information, visit www.mainsailpartners.com.

Don’t miss the latest Mainsail News & SaaS Growth Insights: Subscribe at: https://mainsailpartners.com/subscribe/.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Vestbee
Description: Vestbee is one of the leading platforms empowering startup founders, VC funds, angels, accelerators and corporates with the right community, infrastructure, and tools to succeed.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Altamont Capital Partners
Description: Founded in 2010, Altamont Capital Partners ("Altamont") is a private equity firm focused on transforming and scaling lower-middle market companies through significant business-building and value-creation resources. Altamont makes long-term, control investments in sectors where we have deep experience and specialized knowledge, and partners with management teams to execute proven and repeatable platform-building playbooks. Since inception, Altamont has invested in over 45 companies operating across the Industrials, Business Services, Financial Services, and Franchising & Multi-Unit sectors. Altamont currently manages over $4 billion of capital and is headquartered in Palo Alto, California, with additional offices in San Francisco and Austin, Texas.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Plural
Description: Plural is an early-stage investment fund that backs the most ambitious founders on a mission to change the world through technology. It launched in June 2022 with the aim to give serious founders in Europe investors with company-building experience to match their ambition. Plural’s mission is to have GDP-level impact on Europe, address systemic risks and reduce the opportunity gap worldwide through the companies it backs.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Portal Capital Riesgo
Description:
Portal Capital-Riesgo.es actualidad y directorio de empresas en los sectores de capital riesgo, private equity, venture capital, M&A, Corporate Finance, Financiación Alternativa, Wealth & Asset Management, family offices y business angels en España. El sector del capital riesgo en España desde las perspectiva de todos sus operadores: inversores y asesores. Directorio de empresas vinculadas al sector de capital riesgo, actualidad, noticias y artículos
El sector del capital riesgo en España desde las perspectiva de todos los operadores del sector: inversores y asesores.

Directorio de empresas vinculadas al sector de capital riesgo, actualidad, noticias y artículos.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Paris Business Angels
Description:
Avec près de 200 membres investisseurs actifs, Paris Business Angels (PBA) est un leader en France du financement des start-ups en phase d'amorçage.

Réseau généraliste, PBA accompagne chaque année de nouvelles sociétés innovantes basées en France sur des tours de financement de 400K€ jusqu'à 4M€ (fonds propres), seul ou en co-investissement.

Les membres de PBA apportent aux entrepreneurs un financement mais également une expertise et leurs réseaux personnels.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: 468 Capital
Description: 468 Capital is a technology investment firm focused on supporting entrepreneurs with global ambitions. Founded in 2020, the firm invests in category defining businesses. The team at 468 Capital has a history of building, operating, and investing in successful technology companies. With offices in Berlin and San Francisco, 468 Capital provides strategic and financial support to entrepreneurs looking to grow their businesses internationally.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Zero One Hundred Conferences
Description:
Our events are designed to create an intimate setting with limited capacity ensuring a high level of seniority, a balanced LP:GP ratio, and more dedicated time for meaningful networking.
The result is an engaging family-and-friends atmosphere—perfect for in-depth, in-person meetings that increase the likelihood of building lasting relationships.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Arlington Capital Partners
Description: Arlington Capital Partners is a Washington, D.C.-area private investment firm specializing in government regulated industries. The firm partners with founders and management teams to build strategically important businesses in the aerospace and defense, government services and technology, and healthcare sectors. Since its inception in 1999, Arlington has invested in approximately 200 companies, raised over $14 billion in committed capital, and is currently investing out of its $6 billion Fund VII.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Flight Fund
Description:
Backed by top entrepreneurs, we invest in talented founders leading inevitable missions that will bring about a better future, with a focus on blockchain, biotech, health & wellbeing, commerce, technology and space.

Founded by Steven Bartlett, the Fund supports entrepreneurs with an unparalleled ecosystem with a clear and unique mission to bring together the most successful entrepreneurs in the world under one Fund and combine their expertise, experience and capital to support the next generation of great entrepreneurs.

The Fund's portfolio includes SpaceX, ZOE, Huel, Whoop, Until and more.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Further Ventures
Description:
Further Ventures builds and invests in companies powering financial markets of the future.

Further's unique global platform bridges next-generation financial infrastructure in emerging economies with capital markets globally. Our companies enable institutional partners to securely transfer and store their assets, trade structured products, secure decentralized networks, tokenize funds, settle derivative transactions in a trustless manner, and much more.

Founders from San Francisco to Hong Kong choose Further as their institutional co-founder of choice. We make concentrated capital commitments, work proactively with regulators, and bring our collective expertise to build category-leading companies.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Norvestor
Description: Norvestor Advisory is a leading private equity company focusing on mid-market buyouts in the Nordic region. The team has worked together since 1991, making it one of the most experienced private equity teams in the Nordics, having executed 99 investments with >600 add-on acquisitions, in addition to executing 67 exits, including 16 IPOs. The Norvestor Funds seek to invest in growth companies in the Nordic mid-market that have the potential to achieve a leading Nordic or international position, typically through organic growth, acquisitions across fragmented industries or by geographic expansion.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Buenavista Equity Partners (formerly GED Capital)
Description: Buenavista Equity Partners is an independent asset manager founded in 1996 that operates in the middle-market segment. It currently manages more than €1.3 billion through different Private Equity, Infrastructure and Venture Capital vehicles.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: BeyondSeed
Description: The BeyondSeed platform supports early-stage, growth-driven companies through mentorship, structured growth engines, connections, and capital as they scale their business from Seed to Series A. The platform ensures that Founders get the resources they need to scale effectively and that our members get early access to a diversified portfolio of startups.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Elevar Equity
Description:
Our mission is to fuel the economic resilience and vibrancy of underserved customers and households, and the communities they live in. Having spent a significant time with our customer segment, we have a deep understanding of their aspirations, priorities, and challenges, as well as their incomes, spends, and borrowings. Combined with an uncompromising analysis, we translate this understanding into concrete investment insights that are the basis of our investing in “deep in the weeds”, solution-oriented entrepreneurs. We call this human centered capital.

Elevar’s investments have democratized access to products and services that are essential for household growth. Our companies have reached over 50 million households and catalyzed billions of dollars of capital in ~50 companies.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Aqua-Spark
Description: Aqua-Spark is the world’s largest investment fund dedicated to sustainable aquaculture. Through our investments across the global aquaculture value chain, we enable the innovative and sustainable farming of aquatic organisms such as fish, crustaceans, molluscs, and algae (including seaweed) in ponds, lakes, rivers, the ocean, and in land-based tanks. Aqua-Spark is building a portfolio of 50-60 mature companies that work synergistically to transform the aquaculture industry into one that is healthy, sustainable and affordable, while simultaneously providing competitive returns to our global community of 350+ investors.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: SET Ventures
Description:
The energy transition is more than a linear shift, but a fundamental transformation from hardwired, centralised systems to a digital energy economy that will redefine how we live, work and move.

This is about more than sustainability; it’s about building a system that is hyperlocal, automated and resilient to secure Europe’s energy future. 

To achieve this, we believe the digital energy economy demands entirely new categories of companies. We back the pioneers who turn these beliefs into reality, propelling early growth into European scale.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Episode 1 Ventures
Description:
Episode 1, the backer of successful companies like Carwow, CloudNC, Raft, Robin AI, TouchSurgery, Zoopla, Omnipresent and Attest, is a VC firm investing in B2B software startups at Pre-Seed and Seed.

Episode 1 invests £500k to £3m into extraordinary teams with real insight into markets that are emerging or evolving. As an early stage fund, we invest in the best opportunities, but are particularly interested in how emerging “deep tech” technologies are disrupting industry, and how technology is reinventing markets.

We are the company builders focussed on helping you raise a successful Series A.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Mercy Corps Ventures
Description:
Mercy Corps Ventures invests in and catalyzes venture-led solutions to increase the resilience of underserved individuals and communities.
Founded in 2015 as the impact investing arm of global development agency, Mercy Corps, we’ve supported 60 early-stage ventures to scale and raise over $753 million in follow-on capital. 45% of our portfolio has at least 1 female co-founder, and centers around climate adaptation and resilience-building solutions in adaptive agriculture and food systems, inclusive fintech, and climate-smart technologies, so that those living in frontier markets can withstand disruption and plan for the future.

Through capital and support, piloting new approaches, action-oriented insights, and rigorously managing impact, we catalyze the ecosystem toward smarter, more impactful investments.

𝗟𝗘𝗔𝗥𝗡 𝗠𝗢𝗥𝗘  |  www.mercycorpsventures.com
𝗦𝗨𝗕𝗦𝗖𝗥𝗜𝗕𝗘  |  bit.ly/newsletterMCV 
𝗙𝗢𝗟𝗟𝗢𝗪  @MCSocialVenture
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Capnamic
Description:
Capnamic is a venture capital firm based in Cologne, Berlin and Munich with a focus on early-stage investments in outstanding teams in the German-speaking regions.

We back aspiring entrepreneurs as they embark on their journeys. No matter if it’s pre-product, MVP stage or first revenues: we’re the early-stage venture capital firm that provides not just financial backing but the network, experience and guidance to turn outstanding teams into category leaders.

The firm’s general partners are Jörg Binnenbrücker, Olaf Jacobi, Christian Knott and Christian Siegele.

For more details: 
www.capnamic.com
twitter.com/capnamic
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Jelawang Capital
Description:
Jelawang Capital is a subsidiary of Khazanah Nasional Berhad and it is Malaysia's National Fund-of-Funds, an initiative under Dana Impak.

Jelawang Capital aims to develop Malaysia's venture capital ecosystem via investments and partnerships with fund managers.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: HearstLab
Description: HearstLab is a mission-focused corporate venture fund dedicated to closing the gender gap in VC by investing in early-stage women-led technology startups. In addition to strategic capital and hands-on support, HearstLab provides access to a global network of women executives. Hearst’s ecosystem of 360+ businesses includes iconic consumer media brands like Cosmopolitan, ESPN, and A+E, as well as a range of B2B software and data companies across healthcare, finance, and transportation industries including Fitch Ratings.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Esas Holding
Description: Esas was established in 2000 by first and second generation members of the Sabancı family, led by the late Şevket Sabancı. As a multi-asset investment firm, Esas invests in various asset classes globally, including private equity, real estate, venture capital, and liquid assets with offices in Istanbul, London and Frankfurt. Esas portfolio spans diverse sectors, including aviation, food, logistics, healthcare, retail, and leisure.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Maki.vc
Description:
Maki.vc is a pre-seed & seed-stage VC firm dedicated to partnering with founders who never conform to category standards. 

From inception to series A and beyond, we partner with deep tech and brand driven companies obsessed in challenging category norms.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: VBI Real Estate
Description:
A VBI Real Estate é uma gestora de recursos que, em 2024, passou a ser parte da plataforma de Real Estate do Patria Investimentos no Brasil. Com a aquisição da VBI e a incorporação dos fundos HG, a vertical de Real Estate do Patria no Brasil passou a atuar com R$ 21 bilhões em ativos sob gestão, sob a liderança do executivo Rodrigo Abbud.

A VBI, gestora focada em investimentos nos principais segmentos do mercado imobiliário brasileiro, opera no país desde 2006. Em sua trajetória, tem mais de 100 investimentos realizados ao longo dos anos em 18 estados brasileiros.

Sua base de cotistas é diversificada e inclui investidores com diferentes perfis de investimento (local e estrangeiro, institucional e pessoa física).
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Springboard Enterprises
Description:
Springboard accelerates the growth of entrepreneurial companies led by women through access to essential resources and a global community of experts. We are a leading network of influencers, investors, and innovators dedicated to building high-growth companies led by women who are transforming industries.

The measure of our success is in the results. Since we started in 2000, 850+ Springboard portfolio companies have created more than $36.4B in value, executed over 225 exits to strategic acquirers, and achieved 26 IPOs.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Flare Capital Partners
Description: Flare Capital Partners is the leading healthcare technology venture capital firm advancing innovation-driven companies to improve positive health outcomes, broaden care access, and lower healthcare costs. We partner with exceptional founders solving healthcare’s hardest challenges, supporting each with our deep sector expertise, unparalleled industry resources, and proven access to commercial opportunities. Our team of established investors and senior operating executives has invested in 70+ companies and has nearly $1 billion in assets under management. To learn more about Flare Capital Partners, please visit flarecapital.com or follow us on YouTube @flarecapitalpartners, Spotify, or Twitter @flarecapital.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Florida Funders
Description: Florida Funders is a hybrid between a venture capital fund and an investor network that discovers, funds, and builds early-stage technology companies.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: AltAssets Private Equity News
Description:
AltAssets connects LPs and GPs worldwide.

We have been serving the global private equity industry for over a decade and have become established as a trusted source of independent news and views on the industry by thousands of professionals worldwide.

Our online news service is the world's most widely used source of information with 450,000 individuals accessing the site to gain insights on investments in private equity, venture capital, real estate and infrastructure funds.

We also host invitation-only LP-GP Forums to connect active LPs with the leading GPs in various sectors in order to facilitate long-term investment partnerships.  These forums focus on sectors or geographies such as clean energy, mid-market, infrastructure, funds of funds, real estate and Asia.  All have been heavily oversubscribed and have initiated numerous relationships leading to investments in funds.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Mundi Ventures
Description:
Mundi Ventures is a global venture capital firm that invests in early and growth stage technology ventures.

Founded in 2015, Mundi has backed 60+ companies, with the long term goal of helping individuals, businesses, and society manage an increasingly risky world through technology. We focus on insurtech/insurance-adjacent technology, fintech, enterprise tech, and new ventures built by (and serving) the global Spanish-speaking diaspora.

Most importantly, we back bold and purpose-driven founders.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: PPC (Pritzker Private Capital)
Description: PPC partners with middle-market companies based in North America with positions in the manufactured products and services sectors. The firm’s differentiated, long-duration capital base allows for efficient decision-making, broad flexibility with transaction structure and investment horizon, and alignment with all stakeholders. PPC builds businesses for the long term and is an ideal partner for entrepreneur and family owned companies. PPC is a signatory to the United Nations Principles for Responsible Investment (PRI).
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: 10x Value Partners
Description:
10x Value Partners is a global, sector-agnostic investor with a focus on fast-growing technology companies that are post-revenue (Seed up to pre-IPO).

Our scope of business comprises early stage technology, company building, real estate, private debt and selected advisory mandates.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Danish Business Angels - DanBAN
Description:
DanBAN (Danish Business Angels) is a network organization for business angels in Denmark, with affiliation to similar business angel networks globally. DanBAN is today Denmark's largest network of business angels with more than 300 members.

Through DanBAN our members share insights and pool investment capital, as well as provide knowledge and advice to their portfolio companies. Investing both capital and knowledge, DanBAN business angel members invest in un-listed companies in exchange for convertible debt or equity. DanBAN members are today active with ownership in more than 233 companies, with a collective 5.000+ jobs and exceeding Danish kroner 6.47 billion (app. EURO 870 million) in turnover.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: LRM
Description:
Velen kennen LRM van de investeringen die we doen en de financieringen die we geven aan bedrijven met een Limburg-link. Maar LRM is zoveel meer. 

Zo managen we 3 bedrijvencampussen in Hasselt (Corda), Genk (Thor Park) en Sint-Truiden (DronePort). Verder kunnen ondernemers die op zoek zijn naar bedrijventerreinen bij ons terecht. En op de voormalige mijnsites be-MINE en Terhills realiseren we indrukwekkende transformaties waardoor beide mijnsites kunnen uitgroeien tot twee schitterende parels met internationale allures.

Daarnaast bouwden we een sterk netwerk uit van 7 incubatoren, verspreid over heel Limburg. Je vindt er ruim 300 start-ups. Via onze community ‘Limburg Startup’ versterken we al die start-ups met o.a. een relevant netwerk en met events en programma’s op maat. 

Tot slot bouwden we de voorbije decennia een sterke reputatie uit op het vlak van innovatie en duurzaamheid dankzij onze ambitieuze klimaatprojecten.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: F2 Venture Capital
Description: F2 is an early-stage venture capital firm that invests in the most promising AI startups out of Israel. With $500 million in assets under management, our team brings 20+ years of experience as investors, operators, and engineers, having built and scaled companies from startup to IPO. We specialize in identifying exceptional founders early and writing the first check ahead of the market. Our systematic approach and in-house platform give us an unfair advantage in backing outliers before they take off and transform industries.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: SoGal Ventures
Description: SoGal Ventures is a women-led, next-gen venture capital firm investing in very early startups in North America and Asia. We focus on world-class women & diverse entrepreneurs building billion-dollar businesses that change how we live, work, and stay healthy.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Hatcher+
Description:
Hatcher+ develops software and data models that support fast fund creation, AI-powered deal analysis, intelligent capital deployment, and real-time management and administration of alternative investment vehicles and strategies. Its main offering is the Hatcher FAAST (Funds-as-a-Service Technology) platform.

FAAST streamlines end-to-end fund administration with automated data processing, AI-powered deal origination, and a single source of truth for unparalleled efficiency. It enables effortless construction of scalable portfolios, task management, and seamless team coordination, while presenting real-time financial data through visually captivating charts and diagrams. Additionally, FAAST simplifies the generation of accurate, on-demand consolidated reports, elevating your fund management capabilities to new heights while keeping stakeholders informed.

Hatcher+’s innovations in wealth management technology have led to several accolades:

• Best “AI - Financial Technology” by Singapore Business Review Tech Excellence Awards 2024.
• Best “Client Accounting (External)” by WealthBriefingAsia EAM Awards 2023.
• Best “Compliance Solution (External)” by WealthBriefingAsia EAM Awards 2023. 
• Among the “Top 20 Data-Driven Venture Capital Companies of 2023” in a report sponsored by Affinity, Carta, and Vestberry.
• Runner-up at the “UBS Future of Finance Challenge” (2021).
• “Best Venture Management Platform” by APAC-Insider (2021).
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Foresite Capital
Description: Foresite Capital is a multi-stage healthcare and life sciences investment firm with ~ $3.5B in assets under management (as of 06/30/24). The firm aims to address areas of great unmet need by funding promising healthcare and life sciences businesses at all stages of their life cycles. Foresite Capital uses a data science-driven approach to invest in companies that leverage biology and big data to transform healthcare, including 10x Genomics, Relay Therapeutics, Element Biosciences, Inscripta, as well as companies developing next generation therapeutics. Founded in 2011, Foresite Capital is based in San Francisco.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: MDI Ventures
Description:
MDI Ventures is a multi-stage Venture Capital firm backed by Telkom Indonesia with offices in Indonesia, Singapore, and the United States with extended offices in Europe and South Korea. Since 2016, MDI has been trusted in managing multiple funds and has invested in over 80+ companies across 12 countries.

MDI currently manages unique fund with different angles, contributing to all stages of investment. MDI unified their investment operations using one-team, multiple-fund method to maintain efficiency and make sure no opportunities are left behind.

MDI is also mandated to manage incubator & accelerator programs, and also an angel investment network. The initiatives are meant to capture good opportunities as early as possible, and also contribute to building the emerging Indonesian startup ecosystem.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: DST Global
Description: DST Global is one of the leading Internet investment firms globally. Its investments include some of the world’s fastest growing and most valuable companies. DST Global has offices in Silicon Valley, New York, London, Beijing and Hong Kong.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: AE Industrial Partners, LP
Description: AE Industrial Partners (“AE Industrial” or the "Firm”) is a private investment firm with $7.5 billion of assets under management as of September 30, 2025, focused on investing in technologies and services considered critical to national & economic security. Since 2015, AE Industrial has completed more than 140 investments in market-leading companies that benefit from its deep industry knowledge, operating experience, and network of relationships across the sectors where the Firm invests (national security, aerospace and industrial services). With a commitment to driving value creation in partnership with the management teams of its portfolio companies, AE Industrial invests across private equity, venture capital, and aerospace leasing. AE Industrial is headquartered in Boca Raton, FL, and has an office in Washington, D.C.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Darwin Startups
Description:
Darwin Startups é mais do que uma aceleradora de startups. Somos uma comunidade de empreendedores, mentores e especialistas que oferece todo suporte para startups crescerem.

Construir um negócio não é simples, por isso acreditamos que investimento inicial, acesso a uma forte rede de contatos e capacitação são elementos essenciais para que novos negócios possam sobreviver e se transformar em grandes empresas.

Acelere sua startup com o Darwin Startups. 

Inscrições para a próxima turma em: http://darwinstartups.com
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: IQ Capital
Description: IQ Capital is a dedicated European deep tech venture capital firm, built on the conviction that frontier technology will underpin the next generation of globally significant companies. We back founders leveraging scientific breakthroughs to build enduring global businesses. We have invested in over 100 of Europe's most ambitious deep tech teams across six funds since 2005.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Emerge VC
Description:
Emerge - The first check for founders defining the future of work and learning

Emerge is a global pre-seed fund backed by 100+ of the world’s best future of work and learning operators. Our vision is to democratise access to opportunity – by being a catalytic partner for early-stage founders, providing first-cheque financial support, ongoing expertise and access to a community who have ‘been there and built it’ with unrivalled market-specific know-how.

Founded in 2014 as Europe’s only edtech specialist fund, Emerge now invests in B2B and B2C startups across all categories enabling people to grow and fulfil their potential, from early childhood, K12 and higher education through to lifelong learning, workforce development, career navigation and the future of work. Emerge has invested in over 80 companies, now valued at over $2b and impacting more than 31M people worldwide, including Yoto, Causaly, Colossyan, Edurino, Mattilda, Unibuddy, MyEdSpace and Solvely.

Emerge invests anywhere between $250k and $2.5M at pre-seed and seed. The team welcomes direct applications - apply through our website. Read more about Emerge’s investment thesis and the startup ideas we’re excited by in our Fund II manifesto linked below.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: invest.austria
Description:
invest.austria ist Österreichs führendes Netzwerk für Investor:innen am vorbörslichen Kapitalmarkt. 

Der Non-Profit-Verein hat es sich zum Ziel gesetzt, Innovationen österreichweit zu unterstützen - durch die Förderung und Professionalisierung der Business Angels, sowie der Venture Capital- und Private Equity-Gesellschaften. 

Zudem bietet invest.austria seinen Mitgliedern vor allem Sichtbarkeit und Vernetzung. Mit mittlerweile mehr als 350 Mitgliedern hat sich die Organisation zu einem der wichtigsten Eckpfeiler für das heimische Finanzierungsökosystem entwickelt. 

Um den Innovations- und Wirtschaftsstandort Österreich zu stärken, setzt sich invest.austria zusammen mit seinen Mitgliedern und Partnern für die Schaffung besserer Rahmenbedingungen für einen effizienten, wachsenden und zukunftsfähigen Kapitalmarkt ein.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: SEEDRA Ventures
Description:
SEEDRA is a CMA-licensed alternative asset management firm based in Riyadh, focused on early-stage venture capital. We back bold founders from Saudi Arabia and across the region who are using technology to redefine industries.
Our portfolio features high-impact companies such as Tamara, Lendo, Zid, Lucidya, and Noon Academy—each playing a transformative role in its sector. As more than just investors, we are long-term partners, providing strategic support, operational insight, and unrivaled access to regional markets to help build enduring, market-leading businesses.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Acrew Capital
Description: Defining the future of venture.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Acton Capital
Description:
Acton Capital is a leading European growth-stage venture capital firm with a presence in Munich and Vancouver. Since 1999, the Acton team invests in tech-enabled business models across industries, to create value for the long run. 
With more than two decades of investment experience, Acton Capital has supported +100 startups on their way to market leadership, incl. global category leaders like AlphaSights, Clio, HomeToGo or Mambu.


IMPRINT: Acton Capital Partners GmbH  //  Widenmayerstr. 29, 80538 Munich, Germany  //  Register Court Munich: HRB 171321  //  VAT No: DE259198323  //  Managing Directors: Dr. Christoph Braun, Dr. Paul-Bernhard Kallen, Fritz Oidtmann, Dr. Jan-Gisbert Schultze, Frank Seehaus, Sebastian Wossagk.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Satgana
Description:
Satgana is an early-stage Climate Tech Venture Capital firm on a mission to invest in the next generation of planet-positive startups building the Future of Earth. 

As of January 2026, we count 28 portfolio startups spanning 15 countries across Europe and Africa.

Satgana is a proud B Corp.

This is the decade to build the world we want 
Join the journey at satgana.com
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Passion Capital
Description:
Passion Capital is a founder-first European venture capital firm. As a partnership, we are committed to leveraging our extensive knowledge and experience to help founders and early-stage teams build ambitious, high-impact, disruptive technology companies that drive innovation and positive change across society.

For 15 years, we have fostered a collaborative ecosystem built on executional excellence and founder friendly principles. We believe that our founders are the key differentiator and the greatest asset to every business we support.

With more than 100 companies backed, we take pride in the success of all our founders and teams, including, but not limited to, GoCardless, Tide, Marshmallow, Butternut Box, PolyAI, Lendable, and Monzo.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: FinTech Collective
Description:
FinTech Collective is a global, early stage venture capital firm backing entrepreneurs who are rewiring the way money moves through the world. Founded in 2012 with offices in New York City and London, the firm has deep experience investing across capital markets, wealth and asset management, banking, lending, payments, insurance, and DeFi. The managing partners of FinTech Collective met in their mid 20’s and helped build, scale, and successfully exit four fintech businesses. 

Backed by some of the world’s leading institutional investors, FinTech Collective manages over $800m in regulatory assets. Over the last decade the firm has had 10 exits, taken one company from pitch deck to public markets and invested in 96 portfolio companies including well known firms such as Anyfin in Stockholm, Flutterwave in Lagos, IMMO in London, Minu in Mexico City, Mondu in Berlin, Simetrik in Columbia, and several important businesses in NYC including MoneyLion, NYDIG, Ocrolus, Quovo (acquired by Plaid) and Vestwell.

The firm publishes a weekly newsletter, delivered every Saturday, which provides a tightly edited rundown of global fintech news, along with a bit of original analysis (available at fintech.io/newsletter).
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: The51
Description: The51 is a financial platform and venture firm investing in innovative and ambitious founders, shaping the future. We activate capital into scalable, women-led ventures, accelerate growth with our network and expertise, and reshape who builds wealth, leads companies and drives economies forward.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Hambro Perks
Description:
Hambro Perks is a London-headquartered international investment firm focussed on private technology investing. We partner with founders and entrepreneurs to support growth businesses at all stages of investment cycle.

We are always delighted to meet talented individuals who are interested in working with us.

We enable innovation.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: XRC Ventures
Description: New York City-based venture capital firm investing in pre-Seed to Series A companies innovating at the intersection of technology and changes in consumer behavior.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Connect Ventures
Description: Connect Ventures is where Product Founders fit: a London-based venture capital firm partnering with exceptional product founders at pre-seed and seed from across the UK and Europe, since 2012. Connect investment areas include AI, deep tech, data & infrastructure, fintech and health, all united by a core focus on product-driven differentiation and defensibility.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Highland Capital Partners
Description: Founded in 1987, Highland Capital Partners is a venture capital firm focused on putting the entrepreneur first. Highland has raised over $3B in committed capital and invested in more than 270 companies, resulting in category-defining businesses across consumer and enterprise technology. Investments include companies such as Rent the Runway, 2U, Catalant, Harry’s, Malwarebytes, nuTonomy, Clearbanc, Scopely, ThredUP, and Turbonomic.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: True Global Ventures
Description:
True Global Ventures 4 Plus (TGV) is a global Venture Capital firm built by a group of serial entrepreneurs with an excellent track record of investing their own money together with Limited Partners into ventures run by serial entrepreneurs. Portfolio companies leverage Web3 technologies, incorporating blockchain as competitive advantages to drive change with proven products. TGV is a distributed fund with a presence in over 20 cities, including Singapore, Hong Kong, Taipei, New York, San Francisco, Vancouver, Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Moscow, Stockholm, Paris, Madrid and Warsaw. Visit us at www.tgv4plus.com.
 
The fund is dedicated to blockchain companies, primarily in late-stage Series B and C across three verticals: Blockchain Gaming and Entertainment, Blockchain Infrastructure and Data Analytics, and Blockchain Financial Services. Founded by an international group of “super angels”, TGV’s partners are entrepreneurs, business angels, family offices, and institutional investors, many with co-investment rights in future equity rounds.

Meet your TGV Partners in your region ! Stay tuned by following our Linkedin page: https://www.linkedin.com/company/true-global-ventures  https://www.tgv4plus.com/
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Fearless Adventures
Description:
We are Fearless Adventures, shaping a future where fearless entrepreneurship can thrive.

We invest in and support entrepreneur-led businesses with our expertise in growth strategy and support building great teams.

Our founding team have built and scaled their own businesses from scratch to multi-million-pound exits and are now looking to use that capital and expertise to help new founders on their journey to reach the same peaks.

Using a combination of best-in-class marketers, recruitment and data experts, we invest in and drive growth across our network of partners.

Those who travel together, travel further.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: AfterWork Ventures
Description:
We are a community-powered, industry agnostic VC fund investing in Australian and New Zealand based startups that have $100m+ revenue ambition. We invest at the earliest stages, once you’re ready to turn “after work” into “work”.

Our investment process is imbued with a deep respect for founders’ time, intel, and courage. Founders are frequently subject to hellish, drawn-out due diligence processes, only to be unceremoniously knocked back despite their best efforts. We made a commitment to turn up for founders, and have designed a highly transparent process which adds value at every step.

Our community is rallied around a shared goal: to invest in the next generation of Australia and New Zealand startups at the very earliest stage, and then support them on their long and arduous journey from improbability to outlier success. Our hivemind is our bedrock and our edge.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Iterative
Description: Iterative is an accelerator program focused exclusively on Southeast Asia. Founded by cofounders of Decide.com (acquired by eBay), Iterative differentiates itself with partners, mentors, advisors, and investors who have all previously started, sold, and operated startups. Iterative's mission is to build the strongest and most supportive network in the region for early stage founders. For more details, see http://iterative.vc.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Paragon Partners
Description:
Paragon is an independent private equity firm that stands for sustainable investments in mid-sized companies since its foundation in 2004. We currently manage a total of €2.4bn in equity capital. Our investors include institutional organizations, such as life insurance companies, pension funds and university foundations, as well as the Paragon team.

We invest in established mid-sized companies with sustainable business models and significant development potential. Each of the companies that we acquire is managed independently by its management team and is independently financed. We support our companies as shareholder and sparring partner and assist their management teams with a view to sustainably improving their strategy and operations.

We focus on companies with a strong business model and operational development potential. We promote entrepreneurial thinking and action and make more capital available for additional acquisitions and growth initiatives where needed. We further support the growth of our companies through expertise in a variety of areas, such as recruitment and other operational development opportunities.

We believe that by building companies sustainably, value is created for all stakeholders – the companies themselves, their employees and customers as well as our investors.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: National Angel Capital Organization (NACO)
Description: NACO members have invested $1.8 billion into more than 2,000 Canadian companies. Incorporated in 2002, NACO is Canada’s professional association for 4000+ angel investors and the national umbrella for over 100 organizations including angel networks and innovation hubs.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Quantonation
Description:
Quantonation is an Early Stage Venture Fund dedicated to Deep Physics startups with a focus on the emerging and disruptive field of Quantum Technologies. 
After years of R&D, properties such as quantum superposition and entanglement are starting to be harnessed and exploited in a new generation of Quantum Technologies, impacting many sectors by exceeding “classical” devices. 
Based in Paris, France and Boston, US, Quantonation invests in startups exploiting genuine quantum effects and also in companies leveraging deep physics towards disruptive applications. These include among others cybersecurity, pharmaceutics design, finance and manufacturing. Artificial Intelligence and Big Data are poised to be impacted by Deep Physics Technologies in a significant way. 
We are always scouting for startups with values and projects that fit with our thesis and if this sounds like you, we would love to talk.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: ArcTern Ventures
Description: ArcTern Ventures is a venture capital firm obsessed with helping solve the climate crisis and rethinking sustainability. We invest globally in breakthrough technology startups that can significantly reduce GHG emissions and environmental impact. We were founded on the premise that accelerating the transition to a carbon-neutral economy will disrupt all industries and present an unprecedented opportunity for outsized financial returns. Solving our planet’s biggest problems will lead to big rewards—for companies, their investors, and of course, Mother Earth.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Mosaic Ventures
Description:
We back founders who are reimagining the world. We invest $1-10m early, in those building daring adventures across Europe. 

Our partners have worked in leading Silicon Valley startups since the dawn of the Internet and have collectively amassed over 50 years in tech on both sides of the Atlantic.

We are a small team of investors and startup operators who make just a small number of new investments per year, so every relationship matters. We appreciate that success is not built overnight; we are in it for the long haul. We are humble, curious, open and straightforward — having learned from both mistakes and successes.

Read about our thesis-driven approach to investing and what you can expect when working with us on our website.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: TLcom Capital LLP
Description:
TLcom Capital, is an Africa focused tech VC, with offices in Lagos, Nairobi and London. TLcom had been investing since 1999 in Tech, Media, Mobil and Internet companies across Europe, US and Africa, which is the exclusive focus of its most recent TLcom TIDE Africa funds. 
TLcom manages total commitments of approximately 300 million USD in these sectors via a series of dedicated investment vehicles. Our investment strategy is to identify, back and assist world class entrepreneurs and management teams with disruptive technologies and business models, compelling intellectual property and deep market knowledge. 
We primarily target companies focused on Africa as a prime market, in the following investment themes: Access to Data Service; Financial Services; eCommerce; B2C applications (including but not limited to: health, education, energy, media and entertainment); and Software solutions to corporates and SMEs.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Bharat Innovation Fund
Description:
Bharat Innovation Fund backs fearless entrepreneurs building IP-driven companies of consequence from India. We are an early stage venture fund with a mission to invest in IP-driven Indian startups creating breakthrough  healthcare, agriculture, renewables, and advanced technology innovations.

We believe India, that is Bharat, and its transformational entrepreneurs are producing globally competitive and disruptive solutions for some of the toughest challenges. Their ventures can not only be game-changers in the Indian context - but emerge as dominant leaders globally.

Through our early-stage capital, unparalleled networks, strategic insights and operational hand-holding, we can significantly de-risk the process of conversion of these ideas into companies of consequence.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Pelion Venture Partners
Description: Since 1986, Pelion Venture Partners has been helping entrepreneurs turn early-stage concepts into tomorrow’s industry-leading companies. The Pelion team has deep and diverse industry and investment experience. We are hands-on in our approach and work collaboratively on each portfolio company over the life of an investment. Our company partners benefit from our insights and our abilities to focus strategically and tactically on success. We can tap into and leverage a vast network of technology executives in all corners of the IT industry to help our companies achieve success.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: COMETA
Description: COMETA is a venture capital firm that invests in early-stage technology companies for the Spanish-speaking world
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Emmis Corporation
Description:
Emmis Corporation owns and operates several technology entities. The Emmis culture carries at its heart the belief that, in order to succeed, a company must take risks; treat its people well and give them the tools they need to win.

Emmis sets high standards for excellence while creating a fun, exciting and innovative workplace, where every individual is part of the team.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Motion Ventures
Description:
Motion Ventures is a venture capital fund catalysing digital and energy transitions across global supply chains.

Backed by a unique network of corporate leaders, industry executives, and government partners, we empower founders to navigate complexities and achieve unparalleled success.
