Hony Capital puts China as its top market with investments in over 100 companies in areas of pharmaceutical and healthcare, consumer products, catering, media and entertainment, environmental protection and new energy, as well as machinery and equipment manufacturing. Hony Capital’s portfolio companies include China Shijiazhuang Pharmaceutical Group (CSPC), Zoomlion, China International Marine Containers (CIMC), Suning, Chengtou Holding, Jin Jiang International Hotels, ENN, PizzaExpress (UK), STX(US) , WeWork (US) , I-Mab Biopharma, COFCO Capital, Zoomlion Environmental Industry(Zoomlion-Enviro), etc. The assets value of these companies totals about RMB 2.9 trillion with sales volume of RMB 860 billion, providing more than 450,000 jobs.

Hony Capital strives to become a trustworthy and respected leading Chinese investment management company with worldwide prestige and long-term strength.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Singapore Venture & Private Capital Association
Description:
The Singapore Venture & Private Capital Association (SVCA) was formed in 1992 to promote the development and interests of the private capital industry. 

As the common voice of the private capital ecosystem across institutional investors, family offices, asset managers and service providers in the region, we promote the collective interests of our members and contribute towards the development of Singapore as a leading global hub for private capital fund management.

MISSION
As the common voice of the private capital ecosystem across institutional investors, family offices, asset managers and service providers in the region, we promote the collective interests of our members and contribute towards the development of Singapore as a leading global hub for private capital fund management.

VISION
Through proactive outreach, engagement, collaboration and expansion of our member base, we will further the development of a vibrant private capital ecosystem in the region and harness the power of private capital towards the achievement of the sustainable development goals.
 
Key Exclusive Membership Benefits:
-	Direct Channel to Relevant Authorities and Decision Makers through regular feedback/dialogue
-	Exposure and Recognition in the Investment Community
-	Event Partnership Opportunities with SVCA
-	Exclusive Invites to Member Only Events
-	Unfettered Access to the Regional VC/ PE Community
-	Discounts to Supporting Events & Related Services
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: P101
Description:
P101 SGR is one of the leading venture capital firms in Italy, investing in digital and technology-driven companies in Europe. Founded in 2013 by Andrea Di Camillo, it is supported by Azimut, Fondo Italiano di Investimento, European Investment Fund, Fondo Pensione BCC, Cassa Forense, Unicredit, as well as some of the main Italian entrepreneurial families.

P101 SGR currently manages five funds, as well as the first VC retail investment fund, developed in collaboration with Azimut Group. Managing assets for over € 400 million, P101 has invested in more than 50 tech companies, including Citynews, Cortilia, Cyber Guru, Deporvillage, Fatmap (Strava), Habyt, Milkman, Musement MusixMatch, Opyn e Tannico.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Runa Capital
Description:
Runa Capital is a global VC firm investing in early-stage tech companies and focusing on deep tech (AI/ML, open source and future of computing), enterprise software and fintech infrastructure.

The firm invested in NGINX, Mambu, Brainly, Pasqal, Smava and Zopa. Runa Capital brings tech and hiring expertise, along with a transatlantic network, to help portfolio companies scale. The fund has points of presence in Luxembourg, Palo Alto, London, Paris, and Berlin.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Pioneer Fund
Description:
We are a fund of 500+ Y Combinator alumni working together to invest in top Y Combinator startups.

Our portfolio has gone on to raise from Andreessen Horowitz, Accel, Sequoia, Khosla, Lux, First Round, Initialized, Founders Fund, and many other top VCs.

https://www.pioneerfund.vc
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Space Capital
Description: Space Capital is a venture capital firm with $450M AUM investing at the intersection of space technology and global markets. We understand the space economy at a fundamentally deep level. Our partners have built advanced rockets and satellites. We have founded companies with assets currently in orbit and have led multiple exits as founders/operators -- the latest was the $500M sale of Skybox Imaging to Google as CEO. We've been pioneering investment in this category for over 10 years and now we've literally written the book on the subject with The Space Economy, published by Wiley.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Reasoned.
Description:
Reasoned. the venture capital desk of the Bhagchandka Family Office is focused on providing capital and strategic insights to early-stage companies that are solving tomorrow’s problems. The Bhagchandka Group is a diversified business conglomerate with over three decades of existence in various sectors like Financial Services, Advisory, Renewable Energy, Media, and Infrastructure. We are here to empower the doers who dare to dream the extraordinary and are prioritizing innovation in the present, to ensure growth in the future.  We support them with the necessary funds, intel, connections, and guidance to develop scalable solutions to solve global challenges.



Transformational companies are built by obsessed founders and we back them for the long term. There are massive hurdles to be crossed  - questioning the obvious, challenging the status quo, reinventing business models, changing the existing paradigm, overcoming long-standing beliefs; it’s all just the beginning of disruption. We are drawn to the line where passionate entrepreneurs, breakthrough technologies, and ideas intersect with social, economic, and cultural trends. By partnering with people who operate at the edge of reasoning to create the unthinkable, we are committed to creating tomorrow.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Glilot Capital Partners
Description:
Glilot Capital Partners is a leading Israeli venture capital fund renowned for its impressive portfolio of innovative startups in Cybersecurity, Cloud, DevOps, SaaS, and Fintech, driven by visionary entrepreneurs. Ranked consistently among the top five performing venture capital funds globally by Preqin, Glilot's success lies in its hands-on approach. Through its unique Value Creation team, the fund provides personalized attention to each portfolio company, ensuring their growth into successful global entities. With Glilot Seed, the fund supports startups from their early stages and remains involved at the board level to facilitate business expansion. Glilot+ focuses on post-Series A startups in enterprise software and cybersecurity, reinforcing the fund's outstanding track record.

The fund creates an environment that makes it possible to generate real lasting value for both sides of the investment equation.  An amazing eight of the fund's first eight portfolio companies have been acquired.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Entrée Capital
Description:
We are a global venture capital firm founded in 2010. We manage $1.5bn across nine funds, with offices in Tel Aviv, London and New York. 
We believe in exceptional founders and invest in a wide range of sectors including AI, Data, DeepTech, FinTech, Cyber, SaaS, and Crypto, providing support to innovative startups from pre-seed to early growth stages. 

Our portfolio includes over 180 companies such as: monday.com, Riskified, Rapyd, Coupang, HiBob, Gusto, Talon Cyber, Weavy, Breezometer, Light, Empathy, Stripe, NVision, Stash, Classiq, Perimeter81, PillPack, Zocks and many more. 
  
Over the years, we have exited and IPO’d over 40 companies, with significant IPO’s including Deliveroo, Coupang, Riskified, monday.com, Talon Cyber and Perimeter 81.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: PoliStart
Description:
A PoliStart prepara fundadores de startups, através de uma metodologia desenvolvida na Universidade de Stanford, testada e adaptada na Escola Politécnica da USP (a PMI3817).
Com experiências reais e mentoria de fundadores e investidores anjo, em parceria com a Poli Angels, jovens talentos percorrem a jornada de uma startup, se preparando para o desafio do empreendedorismo.
fenerich.carlos@gmail.com
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: PSV
Description:
PSV cares about a conscious future. As a venture house, our mission is to clear the path for founders who build companies that matter. Our hybrid setup, comprising PSV Foundry, PSV Lab, and two unique venture funds, PSV Tech and PSV Hafnium, sets us free from adhering to a singular method. Rather we rethink existing ways and models to maximise our impact beyond any individual firm or investment.

Together, we can punch above our weight.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Hyderabad Angels
Description:
Hyderabad Angels (HA) invests in promising early stage companies globally to create tangible as well as intangible value.

Established in 2012, HA investors are leading venture capitalists, entrepreneurs and business leaders, who, with their financial and business acumen, are committed to providing support to the Indian and global start-up ecosystem. Besides providing capital to businesses that we partner with, we also mentor entrepreneurs and provide them access to our professional and personal network thereby helping businesses in achieving scale and exponential growth.

Although based out of Hyderabad, we source and invest in opportunities from all over India as well as the rest of the world including USA, UK, Singapore, UAE among other countries.

HA has over 120 members from diverse backgrounds who have strong operational experience to scale and create value companies.

Our current portfolio companies include Betaout, Dialogue in the dark, Epaathsala, Evibe, Explara, GIBSS , Healers At Home, Health Sutra, Identis, Indian Money, Innovapptive, Nowfloats, Online Prasad, Realox, Spareshub, Synersoft, Thrillophilia, Twigly, ZineOne.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: SIERRA Ventures
Description:
SIERRA Ventures is an early-stage venture firm investing in the future of Enterprise and Emerging Technologies. With over four decades of experience and over $2 billion of assets under management, Sierra has created a vast network of successful entrepreneurs, Fortune 1000 CXOs, operational executives, and deep domain experts, providing a platform for entrepreneurs worldwide.

For more information visit the Sierra Ventures website at  https://www.sierraventures.com
Twitter: @Sierra_Ventures
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Silicon Valley Investclub
Description: Silicon Valley Investclub is an investment consortium focused on venture capital and private equity. We provide exclusive access to unique market analytics, serving as an essential investor’s guide to navigating opportunities in Silicon Valley.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Founderful
Description: Founderful is Switzerland’s leading pre-seed fund. We're first, fast and founder-friendly, backing Switzerland's best tech entrepreneurs to become global market leaders.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Innovation Endeavors
Description: Innovation Endeavors is an early-stage venture capital firm that invests in cutting-edge technologies to drive generational change in order to solve problems that matter. The firm’s central investment thesis, the Super Evolution, combines data, computational capacity, and advanced engineering to transform a range of industries including engineering health, climate, computing infrastructure, intelligent software, the physical economy, and more. Its investments include Afresh, AlphaSense, Atom Computing, Color, Gatik, Eikon Therapeutics, Fabric, Homelight, Kong, Formlabs, Panther, Planet, Replica, SoFi, Uber, Upstart, Vicarious Surgical, and more.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Nuwa Capital
Description: A radical new investment platform redefining the relationship between founders and capital.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Quadria Capital
Description: Quadria Capital is Asia’s leading healthcare private equity firm, managing over US$4.3 billion in assets. We maximise returns by investing in high-growth healthcare opportunities across South and Southeast Asia, spanning healthcare delivery, life sciences, medical technology, and associated healthcare services.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Base10 Partners
Description:
Base10 is an early stage venture capital firm partnering with entrepreneurs who are bringing automation to traditional sectors of the economy - what we call automation of the real economy.

Base10 is headquartered in San Francisco.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: SuperCharger Ventures
Description:
SuperCharger Ventures is a leading EdTech ecosystem located in London, Singapore, and Malta.

We are the largest EdTech-only accelerator globally, supported by our EdTech Fund, backing bold founders shaping the future of learning and work. In addition to our programs, we support educational institutions worldwide and collaborate with top universities to promote innovation in education through our Sandbox.

Build the future of learning and work with us.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: GP Investments
Description: GP Investments is a leading alternative investment firm.  Since its founding in 1993, GP Investments has raised over $5 billion from investors worldwide, has completed investments in more than 50 companies and has executed over 20 equity capital market transactions.  GP Investments has a consistent and disciplined investment strategy targeting established companies that have the potential to grow and be more efficient and profitable by becoming leaders in their industries.  The firm currently has offices in São Paulo, New York, London and Bermuda.  For more information, please visit www.gp-investments.com.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Diversity VC
Description:
Diversity VC is an international nonprofit operating in the VC Ecosystem. Our mission is for every venture fund to have the understanding, tools, and resources to promote diversity and inclusion in both their firms and the companies they fund. Our ultimate objective is for the venture capital industry to represent the rich tapestry of society, which we in turn believe will generate better decision making and higher returns.
 
Our work includes:
 
• NETWORK: A community of more than 100 funds worldwide committed to increasing diversity & inclusion in the venture capital ecosystem
• TOOLS: The Diversity VC Standard, a diagnostic tool and resource library for funds with guidance for how to improve internal operations, deal flow, and portfolio management
• TALENT: Future VC (futurevc.com), an internship program giving underrepresented talent on-the-job experience in the industry and a lifelong network for support
• DATA: Investigation and data reports on diversity in the VC industry in order to educate those within and outside the industry on this topic and make recommendations on how to tackle the issues
 
Diversity VC is sponsored by Morgan Stanley, Amazon Web Services, Cooley, and HSBC Innovation Banking.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Garage App | Ai Operating System For Startups
Description: Garage University, the world’s first AI-driven business school, is dedicated to equipping businesses, startups, and consultants for the AI revolution. With big tech leading the charge, AI is set to transform every industry within the next 36 months, leaving smaller players at risk of falling behind. Our mission is to bridge this critical AI knowledge gap, empowering startups, established businesses, and consultants to thrive in an era of rapid technological change.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Angelini Ventures
Description:
Angelini Ventures is the venture capital arm of Angelini Industries funded with a €300 million capital commitment to build and invest in companies that develop innovative ideas and solutions in biotechnology, digital health and life sciences. 

Angelini Ventures invests across Europe and North America with a focus on brain health and consumer segments such as women, children and the elderly. 

The company is headquartered in Rome with a global team spread across Europe, Asia and the US to provide global perspective and capabilities.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Vsquared Ventures
Description:
Vsquared Ventures backs entrepreneurs engineering the seemingly impossible. We are early-stage investors in deep-tech companies tackling society's most pressing challenges, with an emphasis on quantum and novel computing, green energy, robotics, AI/ML, new space, synthetic biology, and healthcare.

Our team of founders, academics, operators and innovators has invested in over 30 companies to date and built one of Europe’s strongest deep-tech portfolios, forging alliances with key players in industry, research, and a global startup ecosystem along the way. The companies we’ve partnered with so far include Isar Aerospace, IQM, Zama, Hyperganic and Custom Cells.

For more information, visit https://vsquared.vc or reach out to the team at future@vsquared.vc.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: GVFL
Description:
GVFL transforms visionary ideas into world-changing realities. As India's first venture capital firm, we've been fueling the nation's entrepreneurial spirit for over three decades.

Our Impact

11 funds managed
125+ investments
75+ successful exits
70,000+ jobs created

What We Do

We identify, fund, and nurture innovative startups across sectors, from Biotechnology to FinTech. Our approach goes beyond capital—we provide strategic direction, governance support, and access to our vast network.

Our Funds

GVFL Emerging Enterprise Fund (Pre-Series A to Series B)
GVFL Prarambh Fund (Seed and Early-stage)

GVFL stands as a pillar of support for India's most promising startups, facilitating their journey from concept to market leadership.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: YOUNG
Description:
We are YOUNG

We’re an unusual collective of fearless yet down-to-earth companies, driven to break barriers and forge new paths in established markets, together with like-minded disruptors filled with unconventional ideas, fresh perspectives, and a strong desire to impact the future. Because, they believe they can do better. 

And, will do better. 

Just like us.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Sovereign's Capital
Description:
We provide capital and strategic partnership to companies and funds led by faith-driven teams that have the potential for outsized returns and impact. We currently have five main practice areas. First, we invest directly in profitable, lower middle market companies with $10 million to $100 million in revenue, and $3 million to $20 million in owner’s earnings. Second, we invest directly in promising, early-stage technology companies across Seed and Series A stages. Third, we invest in publicly-traded companies. Fourth we invest in domestic real estate with a primary focus on value-add strategies. Finally, we use a fund of funds strategy to invest in venture and private equity fund managers through primaries, secondaries, co-investments, and GP stakes. We also offer business consulting services for mature companies looking to forward-steward the business and mission beyond the current generation.
We have investment team members based in Silicon Valley, CA; Atlanta, GA; Chattanooga, TN; Raleigh, NC; and Jakarta, Indonesia.

Investing involves risk, including the loss of principal. Please consider the charges, risks, expenses and investment objectives carefully before investing. Sovereign’s Capital Flourish Fund Disclosures: For a prospectus or, if available, a summary prospectus containing this and other information, please call 404-260-2798 or download the file from www.SCETFs.com. Read it carefully before you invest or send money.

The Sovereign’s Capital Flourish Fund is distributed by Paralel Distributors LLC, FINRA Member Firm.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: better ventures
Description:
At better ventures, we believe that purpose-driven entrepreneurs will change our world for the better. They drive innovation and dare to tackle the most pressing challenges of the place our kids will live in.

When you as founders work with us, we commit to doing the same: We’ll help you make an impact and add value to your business far beyond money. We see us as your experienced co-founders, sitting in the same boat, solving your challenges in the best way together. And we are in for the long-run. Our commitment doesn't stop. 

We are entrepreneurs first and foremost. We don't care how much money you raise in follow-on rounds. We care about building a successful venture that lasts. We know how you stay in the driver seat and what it’s worth down the road. To us, it’s the better way on a mission to drive change if you as founders keep control of your company. Therefore, we invest with founder-friendly terms and stick to our values that define the way we work. 

Does this sound interesting to you and your team? Then let's talk!


better ventures GmbH acts for the account and under the liability pursuant to Section 3 (2) WpIG of Effecta GmbH, Florstadt
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Event Guide
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: AEQUITA
Description: AEQUITA is a Munich-based family office investing in special situations including corporate carve-outs, successions, and recovery situations across Europe. With a strong capital base, entrepreneurial expertise and a partnership approach, the team focuses on the acquisition and long-term value enhancement of companies that can benefit from an operational engagement. AEQUITA brings a fresh and sound view to all areas of the business, such as sales development, production optimization and efficiency measures, which can help management to drive sustainable growth. AEQUITA contributes not only the capital, but also the vision, inspiration and operational impetus needed to reach the next stage in the development of its companies and their success stories.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: HighTechXL
Description: We merge the unique skills of our global ecosystem with deep tech and entrepreneurship to build deep-tech ventures that tackle grand societal challenges. We support teams as they progress through our venture building program and connect them with essential resources, such as investors, advisors and customers.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: BayStartUP
Description:
OUR OFFER TO STARTUPS: With intense feedback and financial coaching, we prepare startups for discussions with interested investors, and to develop the right financing strategy. Our broad workshop program and business plan competitions support founders to optimize their business strategy and evolve to the point of investment readiness. 

OUR OFFER TO INVESTORS: For private and institutional investors, BayStartUP ensures a qualified deal flow and offers start-up insights at exclusive business angel meetings and investor conferences. BayStartUP is running Germany’s largest investor’s network including 300+ business angels and more than 100 institutional investors. Within the last fifty months, BayStartUP has led startups to more than 200 investment rounds. Through the matchings with investors from our network we have supported the funding of 200+ million Euro to startups, acting as neutral and free of charge intermediate.

OUR OFFER TO CORPORATES: With nationwide startup industry matchings and strategic support, BayStartUP advises established companies on the development of suitable strategies for cooperation with startups. Among others, we offer technology scouting programs and advise established companies on the development of suitable cooperation strategies. Our industry matchings lead to fruitful cooperations between corporates and startups.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Inventus Capital Partners
Description: We’ve been the first investors in scores of successful startups, including 7 Unicorns, two of which had multi-Unicorn IPOs in 2021.  We invest early, and with high conviction, providing as much as $3 million in Seed capital to finance the runway and resources required to attract a meaningful Series A and rapidly scale. We are coaches and collaborators, not referees. We’ve all been successful entrepreneurs with blue chip operating careers in leading Silicon Valley companies. And we have a network of 100s of Global 5000 CXOs with express interest in being customers and partners of  new companies that solve the hard problems their companies and colleagues are facing. Come work with us, and we’ll work for you.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: G2 Venture Partners
Description: At G2 Venture Partners, we’ve been investing in climate-tech for over 15 years, seeking out and partnering with companies at their inflection point that are changing how the world works by harnessing transformative technologies.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: VENTIUR
Description:
Pioneira no Sul do Brasil, a VENTIUR é a primeira aceleradora da região, atuando desde 2013 para impulsionar startups e conectar empreendedores visionários a uma qualificada rede de investidores. Reconhecida como a melhor aceleradora pelo Prêmio Nacional de Empreendedorismo Inovador da Anprotec, acreditamos no poder da inovação para transformar o mundo.

Nosso processo de aceleração combina investimento financeiro e smart money, oferecendo mentorias estratégicas e conexões de alto impacto. Mais do que fomentar bons negócios, buscamos grandes empreendedores, proporcionando as ferramentas necessárias para que suas startups cresçam, gerem empregos, distribuam riqueza e revolucionem a sociedade.

Com mais de 100 startups investidas, 8 exits e mais de 500 investidores conectados, seguimos mobilizando talentos e recursos para construir um futuro mais inovador e promissor.

Além da aceleração de startups, a VENTIUR se especializou em Corporate Ventures, com forte atuação em Corporate Venture Capital (CVC) e na estruturação de novas iniciativas de inovação corporativa, que chamamos de New Ventures. Utilizamos nossa experiência para apoiar empresas que desejam ampliar fronteiras, impulsionar a transformação digital e gerar valor por meio da tecnologia. Estruturamos soluções completas e personalizadas, conectando nossa expertise às necessidades estratégicas de cada cliente, com foco em inovação, crescimento sustentável e geração de impacto.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Épopée Gestion
Description:
Épopée Gestion is a French general partner founded in 2020 by Ronan Le Moal (former CEO of Crédit Mutuel Arkéa, one of France’s leading banking groups) and Charles Cabillic (French serial entrepreneur). Its mission is to support the long-term development of French regions by providing patient capital and strategic backing to entrepreneurs and projects rooted in local economies.

Since becoming a mission-driven company (French B-Corp equivalent) in January 2024, Épopée Gestion has aimed to foster the emergence of regional champions through an integrated investment platform spanning Venture Capital (funds Xplore I, Xplore II), Private Equity (Épopée Transitions I, ‘Relance’ bonds), Sustainable Real Estate (Épopée Immo Rendement I, Épopée Hôtels I, SC Y immo) and Low-Carbon Infrastructure (Épopée Infra Climat I).
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Dreamcraft Ventures
Description: Dreamcraft invests in European tech-driven companies from pre-seed to series A. We believe success is created by a team mixed with dreamers and crafters - and we are venture engineers who support the two. The right founders love our engagements that go deeper than just advice.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Makers Fund
Description:
Makers Fund is a global interactive entertainment venture capital firm focused on early stage investments. The team supports founders through an extensive network and deep experience in the industry.

Makers Fund has presence in San Francisco, London, Tokyo, and Singapore.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: 7wire Ventures
Description:
7wire Ventures is an early stage, healthcare venture fund. We help entrepreneurs who focus on empowering the Informed Connected Health Consumer.

We're working on changing the status quo. Our belief: connected devices, the cloud, and sophisticated analytics will improve the efficiency of the healthcare system and improve outcomes for all.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Launcho Ventures
Description:
Launcho Ventures is an AI-native venture studio that builds consumer brands from zero to scale — fast. With $600M+ in exits and a founder-led team of seasoned operators, we use AI to spot trends, validate demand, and launch products in weeks, not years.

Our tech stack powers every stage:
- Market Intelligence from real-time social listening and sentiment analysis
- Rapid Validation through low-cost experiments and pre-orders
- Automated Creative & Media Buying across Meta, Google, TikTok, Amazon, Shopify, Walmart Marketplace and more
- Full-Stack Commerce Execution for seamless omnichannel launches

We don’t take pitches. We build from scratch — smarter, faster, and with global ambition.

AI-built. Founder-led. Global-first. Welcome to Launcho.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Prelude Ventures
Description: Prelude Ventures invests in and supports early-stage startups with the greatest potential to mitigate climate change. Our goal is to help build the next generation of category-defining businesses.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: MML Capital Partners
Description:
MML is an international mid-market private equity investor focused on investing alongside strong management teams and working in partnership with them to deliver their bold expansion plans. Over the last 30 years, we have successfully invested in 150 businesses from our 4 global offices, with €2.7 billion of assets currently under management across our Value-Added Infrastructure, Partnership Capital, and Enterprise strategies. 

At MML, we create value from original thinking, designing deals which enable management teams to take the next step on their journey. We focus on a small number of investments where the business case is strong and the chemistry with people is right, and as an independent firm, our Partners take personal responsibility for our part in your success. In our experience, open minds mean better deals, so we take a fresh approach to every single investment, designing them to perfectly fit people, their unique businesses and personal aspirations. 

For our investors, our tailored ethos provides access to a unique set of investment opportunities, delivering strong equity returns whilst protecting investor capital.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Titanium Ventures
Description: We’ve rebranded from Telstra Ventures to Titanium Ventures ! We chose Titanium Ventures because it best represents who we are and who we want to be - a firm that backs very strong, resilient entrepreneurs who resist cracking under pressure. Titanium has the highest durability and strength-to-weight ratio of any metal in the world and like the leaders we invest in, we punch way above our weight.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Fatima Gobi Ventures
Description: By bringing together one of the largest conglomerates in Pakistan, Fatima Group and one of the most active multi-national venture capital firms in Asia, Gobi Partners, Fatima Gobi Ventures is fusing local expertise with VC know-how. We invest intelligently, using data collated from the flourishing entrepreneurial ecosystems of Northeast and Southeast Asia to find companies locally that have the edge and drive to go beyond Pakistan’s borders. Simultaneously, we accelerate the growth of founders by bench-marking their businesses and linking them to the developed markets in Asia.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Inspire Ventures (Venture Builder ASEAN)
Description:
Inspire is one of Southeast Asia's most active venture builders located in Thailand, Indonesia, Vietnam, and the Philippines.

Our Venture Labs group builds businesses that solve real problems and fill unique value-chain gaps faced by Southeast Asian businesses and consumers. We develop in-house with our committed technology development team and focus heavily on recruiting great managers who are astute operators. 

Our Venture Capital group invests in early stage and high growth businesses that are scaling proven, and sometimes novel, business models in the Southeast Asian markets with a strong emphasis on localization.

VENTURE LABS

- ASEAN / Southeast Asia regional focus 
- Opportunistic sector and vertical focus 
- Committed in-house technology development
- New business creator, developer, launcher, operator
- Co-founder and operating partner for growth companies expanding to Asia
- Acquirer / financier of turn-around, distressed, MBO candidate companies

VENTURE CAPITAL

- ASEAN / Southeast Asia regional focus 
- Opportunistic sector and vertical focus 
- Primarily a minority equity financial investor 
- Mid-seed, late-seed, series A and later stages 
- Average investment size US$500,000
- Capable of leading and co-investing 

LOCATIONS

- Bangkok, Thailand
- Jakarta, Indonesia
- Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
- Manila, Philippines
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Accelerate Africa
Description:
At Accelerate, we work with some of the world’s best investors, corporates, experienced founders and talented experts to directly coach 10 African startups over 8 weeks, concluding with a demo day in front of some of the world's best investors. 

Learn more at www.acceler8.africa

We have hands-on operating experience in Africa to help you accelerate your business, plus the scars and stories to prove it. For over a decade, we have taken on various roles advising, coaching, and mentoring startups, including over 25+ who have been admitted to global accelerators. Our founders Iyinoluwa Aboyeji and Mia von Koschitzky-Kimani have built, funded and advised hundreds of African founding teams like Daystar Power, DukaConnect, Andela, Flutterwave and Moove BV amongst others on how to build global businesses from Africa by solving our continent’s biggest challenges. Many of those businesses have grown to become billion dollar companies with hundreds of millions of dollars in revenues, or been acquired by global businesses like Mastercard and Shell.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: noa
Description:
At noa vc, we’re building Europe’s largest tech fund dedicated to transforming the built world.

We believe the built world is more than just physical infrastructure: it is a manifestation of human ingenuity and a reflection of societal values. We call it humanity’s OS. 

noa invests in pioneering founders and breakthrough technologies that decarbonise the built world.

We're backing tech that matters.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Standish Management, LLC
Description:
Standish provides fund administration services for general partners and managers of private equity funds, specializing in buyout, VC, real estate & fund of funds. 

Standish supports established GPs by providing admin & tech to whole fund families or select funds, helping to scale operations rapidly and efficiently. Standish also provides consulting services to new GPs, accelerating the launch of their funds.

Growing steadily since 2007, Standish has 19 offices worldwide, more than 6000 entities under administration, and over $700B in AUM.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: AceleraLatam
Description: We’re an accelerator & VC focused on improving performance of early-stage startups. We use our experience, network and funding to ignite our portfolio.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Inventure
Description: Inventure is the early-stage VC that knows how to get Nordic and Baltic founders to the next level. Since 2005, the team has been in venture with over 90 companies ranging from deep tech to consumer internet brands, including Wolt, Swappie, Stravito and Jobbatical. With its €377 million of assets under management, Inventure focuses on Seed and Series A investments across Nordics and Baltics, with offices in Helsinki and Stockholm.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: 4impact capital
Description:
4impact is a venture capital fund investing in digital ventures across Europe that solve problems relating to our Planet & People. We target market rate returns by investing in strong teams with international growth ambitions and commercial traction, backing highly scalable digital technology ventures that deliver intentional and additional impact (SFDR 9) at Seed to Series A. 

4impact was born out of a desire to increase the purpose of our work and help us give back. By backing tech4good technology startups with knowledge, experience, network, and funding, we act as a catalyst to a sustainable world.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Alloy Partners
Description: We co-create advantaged startups and venture studios with leading corporations and entrepreneurs.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Korelya Capital
Description:
We believe the next Tech Leaders will be European

At Korelya Capital, we believe digital investment opportunities can trigger growth and social progress in Europe. The digital revolution has already started to disrupt the way we live, work, have access to knowledge, culture and information, the way we produce, the way we consume, the way we interact with each other’s. Tomorrow, it will free us of repetitive tasks, change our relation to the city, facilitate travel and limit our exposure to risks.

We also believe that unprecedented success stories in the digital economy will emerge from Europe within the next ten years. The European tech ecosystem is reaching maturity at every levels (mindset, access to capital, tech know how, talent, etc.). Artificial Intelligence, IoT, Big Data, are the ingredients of the next digital revolution, the one that will follow the “platformization” of our economies and societies.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Mercato Partners
Description: For over 15 years we have had the privilege of partnering with visionary entrepreneurs and teams as they build transformational companies. While much has changed since we opened our doors in 2007, our commitment to fund the extraordinary has not wavered. We are more energized than ever to seek out the next generation of great American companies that will disrupt their industries and forever change how we learn, work and live—for the better.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: 500 MENA
Description:
500 Global is a multistage venture capital firm with over $2.7B in Assets Under Management that invests early in founders building fast-growing technology companies. We focus on markets where technology, innovation, and capital can unlock long-term value and drive economic growth.

500 Global has backed over 5,000 founders representing more than 2,800 companies operating in 80 countries. Our portfolio includes 51 companies valued at over $1 billion and 140 companies valued at over $100 million.

Our 170+ plus team members are located in more than 20 countries and bring experience as entrepreneurs, investors, and operators from some of the world’s leading technology companies.

500 Global made our first investment in the MENA region in 2012, and our first MENA fund in 2017. To date we have made over 300 investments across the MENA region.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: HyperGrowth Labs
Description: A Silicon Valley Firm
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: JME Ventures
Description:
JME is a venture capital firm focused on making investments in early-stage technology startups. We’re centrally located in Madrid (Spain), but we invest in companies across Europe and, occasionally, in the US. 

What We Do
As early-stage investors, we are comfortable making seed investments as well as participating in larger Series A venture financing rounds. Regardless of the size of our initial investment, we strive to continue to support our portfolio companies through their entire financing lifecycle. In addition to providing the necessary venture capital to finance a growing company, we are committed to leveraging our experience in scaling companies, our expertise in corporate finance and in the technology industry, and our network of relationships to help great entrepreneurs turn great ideas into great businesses.

Business Plans
backme@jme.vc
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Quest Ventures
Description:
Quest Ventures is a top venture capital firm in Asia.

Venture Capital for Startups
Since 2011, Quest Ventures has focused on an overarching ‘digital economy’ strategy across Asia, and is a top venture capital firm in artificial intelligence, e-commerce and marketplaces, entertainment, finance, food, insurance, logistics, media, property, sports, and the Islamic digital economy. Portfolio companies include industry leaders such as 99.co, Carousell, Carro, Glife, Hepmil, Kamereo, Oddle, Shopback, VulcanPost, and Xfers.

Innovation for Enterprises
In partnership with Silicon Valley’s pre-eminent Applied Innovation Institute, Quest Ventures’ enterprise innovation initiative drives industry and corporate transformation for at-risk sectors based on world class research, local knowledge, and collaboration with startups. Sectors covered include alternative food, aviation, banking, insurance, logistics & transportation, oil & gas, and smart cities. Clients include Applied Materials, Coca-Cola, HP, Nissan, and Tencent.

Impact Capital for Good
Quest Ventures’ multi-dimensional environment, social and governance strategy was the first in Asia for a venture firm, and supports a range of social good initiatives across Asia for financial inclusion, gender, healthcare and education for all. Impact acceleration initiatives include advocacy, investment, world class partner benefits, and collaborations with the venture portfolio. Portfolio organisations include ERTH, Ethis, Hatch, Social Collider, SoundEye, Tictag, and Vulcan Augmetics.

Potential of Asia
Asia’s potential is ultimately realized in its people. By the end of 2025, Quest Ventures’ portfolio of 150+ venture-backed companies operate in more than 150 cities across Asia, creating employment and advancement opportunities for more than 11,000 employees, while our Enterprise and ESG efforts directly impact thousands more.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: JioGenNext
Description:
JioGenNext Market Access Program (MAP) engages startups to explore opportunities within the Reliance ecosystem and receive hands-on guidance for scaling up.

All your queries are answered here: https://www.jiogennext.com/faq
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: aljabr.co
Description:
aljabr specializes in startup development and corporate innovation. We take pride in building entrepreneurial programs that help bridge startup innovation with corporate ambition, giving access to financial, human, and intellectual capital.

The company's mission is to establish a regional innovation hub, uniting enterprises, startups, and investors to achieve this collective goal.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Super Capital
Description:
Chez Super Capital, l’entreprenariat est notre moteur. Nous parlons votre langage, comprenons vos enjeux, et surtout, prenons des risques à vos côtés. 

Notre rôle : aligner les intérêts de notre club d’investisseurs, de nos partenaires bancaires, avec vos besoins en financement. 
Voici, en quelques chiffres, l’empreinte de notre travail :

+ 15 ans dans l’écosystème tech & finance
+ 2 000 investisseurs engagés
+ 200 entrepreneurs conseillés
+ 400 sociétés financés
+ 40M€ /an de financements levés pour les entrepreneurs et repreneurs 

Vous êtes entrepreneur ? 

Super Capital propose une offre unique d'investissement (business angels, VC, club deal), de conseil en structuration de financements non-dilutifs (BPI, banques, subventions) et d'accompagnement stratégique (banque d’affaires, DAF à temps partagé) pour soutenir chaque étape de votre développement.

Vous êtes investisseur ? 

Rejoignez le club et accédez à des deals exclusifs, des événements récurrents, bâtissez votre réseau et montez en compétences grâce à l’expertise de plus de 2 000 membres.

Vous êtes repreneurs ? 

Super Capital propose une offre sur mesure pour les repreneurs dans toutes les étapes clés et les défis liés à la reprise d’entreprise, avec un accompagnement modulable selon vos besoins et votre projet.

Rencontrons-nous sur supercapital.club.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Hivest Capital Partners
Description:
Hivest Capital Partners, established in November 2016, is a European-American private equity firm approved by the Autorité des Marchés Financiers (AMF). The firm specializes in investing in companies with an annual turnover ranging between €50 million and €500 million. 
Hivest Capital focuses on unlocking the full potential of its portfolio companies by driving growth and implementing operational improvements.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: TJC
Description: TJC LP, formerly known as The Jordan Company, has worked for more than 40 years with CEOs, founders and entrepreneurs across a range of industries including Consumer, Diversified Industrials, Healthcare, Industrial Technology, Logistics & Business Services and Digital & Power Infrastructure. With $30.9 billion of assets under management as of September 30, 2025, TJC is managed by a senior leadership team that has invested together for over 24 years on over 90 investments. TJC has offices in New York, Chicago, Miami and Stamford. For more information, please visit www.tjclp.com.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Investinor
Description:
Investinor is an evergreen investment company funded by the Norwegian government. It invests in promising unlisted (private) companies aiming for international growth and expansion. 

Investinor manages NOK 4.2 billion (mEuro 525) and invests on the same terms and conditions as private investors, with a clear exit strategy for all investments. 

Investinor is one of the major venture investment companies in Norway, both in terms of manpower and capital under management. Our team has a superior overview of the market and attracts high quality dealflow.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Westbound Equity Partners
Description:
Westbound Equity Partners is an early stage fund building a virtuous cycle of wealth and opportunity. Westbound-backed founders gain access to social capital via the Westbound Network of best-in-class investors, operators, and public figures committed to our mission.

In addition to driving impact through our investments, we commit 50% of our carry to the Westbound Community Foundation, which identifies and funds nonprofits closing opportunity gaps for underrepresented talent in America.

Westbound Equity Partners was previously known as Concrete Rose.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: NewSpring
Description: For more than 25 years, NewSpring Capital has partnered with founders and management teams in the lower-middle market, providing capital, operational support, and strategic guidance to help businesses scale. With over $3.5 billion in assets under management and more than 250 investments completed, we bring operational experience and investment expertise to build market-leading companies in sectors where we can combine deep market insight with a repeatable, informed approach, such as technology, healthcare, business services, consumer, and industrials. Through five distinct strategies covering the spectrum from growth equity and control buyouts to mezzanine debt, we tailor our approach to each company’s stage and goals, always with a focus on sustainable growth. As specialists in the lower-middle market, we support growth that leads to more predictable outcomes. At NewSpring, we are as invested in your outcome as you are.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Bek Ventures
Description:
Bek is a global venture capital firm accompanying a select group of early-stage founders from their earliest days to global scale with relentless, hands-on support. Insiders who adopt an outside perspective, we help exceptional teams succeed.

Currently in our second decade, we have backed multi-billion-dollar successes, and the firm has been recognized as the top-performing VC globally since 2010 by HEC / Dow Jones. 

Our conviction is that early-stage investors can only deliver through focus — which is why we have stayed uncompromisingly disciplined and selective in the nature and number of founders we back, the size of funds we raise, and the caliber of investors we hire. 

Bek has offices in London, New York, Luxembourg and Istanbul.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: RRE Ventures
Description:
RRE Ventures is an early-stage venture capital firm headquartered in New York City. Since our founding in 1994 we have sought out and partnered with extraordinary entrepreneurs who seek to disrupt and transform industries.

RRE is a long-term lead investor.  We are active strategic, operational and financial partners with the companies we finance. We also bring to bear a highly distinctive network of relationships across multiple industries and countries, proactively assist in recruiting top-tier talent, and provide innovative PR and marketing support.  You can learn more about our team and senior advisors.
RRE manages over a billion dollars of capital across five funds. Our operation is structured, from both a team and capital standpoint, to enable us to invest in early stage companies while remaining active and participatory throughout the financing life of a venture. 
 
We define the scope of our investment horizon as products or services enabled by information technology. This has historically included virtually all expressions of software and internet technology as well as hardware and technology-enabled services. 
 
We invest across the United States and in select overseas geographies. We view New York’s burgeoning innovation economy as critically important to the creation of the next wave of large technology companies. With over fifty portfolio companies based in the New York Metro region, we are among the area’s most active investors.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Angel Investors Ontario
Description:
Angel Investors Ontario convenes Ontario’s Angel investors, who provide capital and mentorship to innovative start-ups province-wide.

Angel Investors Ontario supports 16 non-profit Angel Groups and 14 investment clubs across the province. Angel Investors Ontario fosters Angel groups’ success by sharing information and education tools, transferring best practices across the network. Over the past decade, through the groups and clubs that it mobilizes and supports, Angel Investors Ontario has enabled over $700 million dollars to be invested into over 800 high-potential early-stage ventures, in turn creating and retaining over 15,000 jobs.

Since its inception, Angel Investors Ontario has built a robust network of over 1500 investors across the province. While the network continues to stand behind its original task of creating and growing non-profit Angel investor groups for all regions of Ontario, it has since expanded upon this to include establishing new ways to convene Angels province-wide, with special investment events and Virtual programs, making it easier for Angels to syndicate deals. This increased efficiency of deal flow directly contributes to the network’s mission: To grow Ontario’s Angel investing ecosystem to build prosperity, create jobs and strengthen communities.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: GEF Capital Partners
Description: GEF Capital Partners was formed in March 2018 following the completion of a collaborative spinoff from Global Environment Fund, a pioneer in global sustainability and environmental investing since 1990. Today, our mission is to promote a sustainable future by investing in great companies that deliver positive social and environmental outcomes and financial returns for our investors.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Asterion Ventures
Description:
Asterion Ventures is an early-stage investment firm focused on systemic impact across Europe, with offices in Paris and Amsterdam and active venture partners in Brussels and Zurich.

Impact-focused by design, Asterion backs founders tackling structural challenges across energy, industry, climate risk, health, and physical AI.

In four years, Asterion has mobilized nearly €65M into 30 early-stage companies.

Its current early-stage fund totals €50M, and Asterion is preparing a new €100M fund.

Four portfolio companies are now scaling into Series A/B with top European funds, including Weefin, Spark Cleantech, Everdye, and one soon to be announced; one has already exited.

Asterion’s edge lies in scale powered by people: a community of 900+ entrepreneurs and executives invest as business angels, representing roughly 50% of each round.

They bring not only capital, but also operational experience, time, and hard-to-access networks.

Beyond financing, Asterion has built dedicated programs for exited founders (Life After Exit), women investors (Invest Like a Woman), and entrepreneurial families (Immersion).

Its LP base includes founders of French unicorns and European top impact companies such as Back Market, BlaBlaCar, and Too Good To Go, a few corporates and long-term family offices like Entheos, including prominent families from Northern France.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Better Ventures
Description:
Better Ventures is a venture capital firm that provides funding and support to companies creating scalable solutions to some of the world’s biggest challenges.  We believe in the power of technology to address the big issues of our time, from job creation to education to environmental sustainability.  Given the magnitude of the world’s problems and the enormous market opportunities they represent, it takes the best and brightest minds armed with the best resources to address them.  These are the people we seek to back – entrepreneurs committed to using the tools and methodologies of the modern technology startup to address big global challenges.  We're thinking big and expecting big results, and so are the entrepreneurs we back.  

Better Ventures is the evolution of Hub Ventures, a successful startup accelerator for entrepreneurs building a better world.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Heliad
Description: Heliad AG (WKN 121806 / ISIN DE0001218063 / ticker symbol: A7A) invests in market leading, fast-growing technology companies with the target of initiating the next phase of growth. As a publicly listed company and through its strong team and strategic partners, Heliad can support companies pre-, at-, and post-IPO and act as a gateway to public equity capital markets. An evergreen structure allows Heliad to act independently of usual fund lifecycles and provides shareholders with unique access to pre-IPO market returns without any restrictions or limitations in terms of investment size and term commitment.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: DCM Ventures
Description: DCM is a venture capital firm with over $4 billion under management. Since 1996, we have invested in more than 300 technology companies across the U.S. and Asia. With offices in Silicon Valley, Beijing, and Tokyo, DCM empowers our entrepreneurs with hands-on operational guidance and a global network of business and financial resources.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Unicorns Network
Description:
#Startups #VentureCapital #Fund #Fundrasing #Founders #VentureDeals #VCs #Accelerators #Incubators #Seedfunding
http://www.facebook.com/unicornsnetwork
in case if you want to share your pitch deck with us, please share it over  pitch@unicornsnetwork.com
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Comvest Partners
Description: Comvest Partners (“Comvest”) is a private investment firm that has provided equity and debt capital to well-positioned middle-market companies throughout North America since 2000. Through its private equity, direct lending and opportunistic credit investment platforms, Comvest offers tailored investment solutions across the capital structure along with deep industry expertise, operating resources, a collaborative approach, and significant transaction experience as an active investor. In 2025, Comvest Partners proudly celebrates 25 years of investment management leadership, and today manages $16.6 billion in assets, with over $19.2 billion invested since inception. Comvest Partners is based in West Palm Beach, with offices in Chicago and New York City.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: IGNIA Partners
Description:
IGNIA is an early-stage venture capital firm investing in global entrepreneurs who are developing innovative technology solutions that address fundamental pain points in Latin America.

IGNIA serves as a bridge for international startups coming to Mexico and Latam, and supports high-growth Latam based startups in industries ranging from fintech, digital commerce, SaaS, marketplaces and the future of retail. Learn more about our investments at www.ignia.vc, and check-out our resources for entrepreneurs at www.igniaunlocked.vc.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Fuel Venture Capital
Description:
Fuel Venture Capital is a leading venture capital firm dedicated to backing visionary founders and broadening access to innovation for private investors. Founded in 2017 with offices in Miami and San Francisco, Fuel specializes in seed, early, and growth-stage investments across technology sectors. The firm has backed market leaders such as Replit, CookUnity, RecargaPay, and Betr.

As of 2025, Fuel manages approximately $550 million in assets across five funds and has deployed capital into over 40 early-stage companies shaping the future of AI, consumer technologies, enterprise software, and financial markets. Fuel partners with entrepreneurs to build enduring businesses and unlock value for investors and founders alike.To learn more about Fuel VC, visit fuelventurecapital.com. Follow Fuel VC on social media via Twitter, Instagram, and LinkedIn.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Sovereign Capital Partners
Description:
Sovereign is a specialist private equity house that partners with high-quality businesses and management teams in the UK and Europe to deliver truly transformational growth. 

We have deep and historic expertise of investing in four sectors: business and technology services, healthcare and pharma services, financial services and insurance, and education and training. 

With one of the largest investment and specialist research teams in our market, we have the expertise and resources to help each business deliver the growth strategy that's right for them.

Through our proven strategy of Buy & Build, we look beyond today to spot potential and create opportunities, and we go beyond what's expected to establish, build and nurture long-term relationships.

By seeing beyond and going beyond, we help great businesses become exceptional.

Sovereign Capital Partners LLP is authorised and regulated by the Financial Conduct Authority.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: DILA Capital
Description:
DILA Capital, founded in 2011, is a multi-stage Venture Capital firm based in Mexico City dedicated to investing in early-stage companies. Its successful and unique proven methodology investing in top class opportunities, creates value and improves entrepreneurial management and operation by providing access to its experienced business network.

With over 15 years’ experience participating in the entrepreneurial ecosystem, DILA’s Partners have been involved in consulting, mentoring, accelerating and investing in Mexican start-ups as founders, operators and investors. DILA Capital solid reputation and main asset, is its access to diversified pipeline opportunities generated through its own network. According to INADEM, DILA Capital is considered to have one of the largest and highest quality venture capital deal flows in the Mexican market.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals
Location: Bosques de las Lomas, Federal District

Name: Inovexus
Description: Inovexus is a cross-border acceleration fund platform investing in early-stage B2B tech founders with a global ambition.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Saama
Description:
With an AUM of $300M and a presence across India and the US, Saama is an early-stage investor with 20 years of experience across diverse sectors such as consumer tech, d2c brands, enterprise and financial services. 

Our investment approach is solution-driven, with decisiveness and speed at its core. The team’s experience working with entrepreneurs across sectors and stages has shaped our ability to help companies realize their full potential. 

At Saama, we are as much a community as we are an investor. Our portfolio companies gain access to our global network of advisors, founders and investors. 

We’re here to build tomorrow with you. From concept to reality – we stand by you all the way through.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: All Iron Ventures
Description:
All Iron Ventures partners up with bold founders promoting innovative startups. We mainly invest in the early stages of European companies that aspire to reshape the future of both consumers and enterprises through technology. 

We at All Iron Ventures have been and continue to be entrepreneurs. We know what it is to be a founder and empathize with the challenges our partner founders face.  We put our resources and experience creating, scaling and selling companies at their disposal to help them take their projects to the next level. 

Based in Bilbao, Spain, and with approximately €110Mn under management, All Iron Ventures was promoted by the founders of Ticketbis, a global marketplace sold to eBay in 2016, in what is one of the main success stories in Spain’s startup ecosystem.

If you are fundraising and want to contact us, please submit your deck and details via https://alliron.typeform.com/to/QU0Ij8.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Earthshot Ventures
Description:
Earthshot Ventures invests in entrepreneurs solving the toughest climate challenges. 

We invest in both hardware and software companies from Pre-seed through Series B across energy, mobility, food & agriculture, industry, and carbon. We help supercharge our portfolio companies' growth by plugging them into our global network of customers, investors, and policymakers. 

Prior to Earthshot Ventures, our team has collectively invested in over 200 climate tech companies and celebrated more than 25 exits. We have deep experience working alongside entrepreneurs as they deploy technology with customers.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Monterro
Description:
Are you a Nordic B2B software entrepreneur who wants to grow and expand your business?

- Need strategic and operational support on how to do it?
- Need advice on how to expand abroad?
- Need best practice and learnings from others that have done it?
- Need help with recruitment or common legal questions?

Monterro invests in and develops B2B software companies. That's it. 

Our mission is to turn Nordic software companies into market leaders and global leaders within their niche. 

Our operational experience from building and managing b2b software businesses set us apart:

We invest in software – we don’t plan to diversify.
We come from operations – we are not bankers.
We invest our own money – we don’t rely on others’ capital.

Since 2012, Monterro has completed many platform and add-on investments. We manage four funds with a total value of EUR 3.1bn, and 10 percent of the managed capital come from our founders and employees. 
To support our portfolio companies with software development, we've set up Scandinavia Software Park in Vietnam.

We know that it takes much more than just capital to successfully scale a software company.

Learn more at http://www.monterro.com
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Sorenson Capital
Description:
Sorenson Capital is a leading venture capital firm focused on investing in early and growth-stage AI, cybersecurity, B2B software, and DevOps & infrastructure companies. 

Sorenson has over $1.6 billion in assets under management. The firm supports entrepreneurs through every stage of their journey to accelerate revenue growth and further their product leadership position. 

Sorenson’s investments in product leaders include Amplitude, BambooHR, Bridgecrew, Couchbase, Fastly, Harness, and Socure. With offices in Palo Alto, CA and Lehi, UT, Sorenson is proud to partner with entrepreneurs from coast to canyon. 

To learn more about Sorenson, please visit: https://www.sorensoncapital.com/ .
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Shilling VC
Description:
Shilling was founded in 2011 with the aim of building an entrepreneurial economy in Portugal’s tech space.
Created by founders for founders, Shilling is Portugal’s leading early-stage VC firm, driven by the mission to establish sustainable economic growth by investing in diverse industries and disruptive technologies shaping the future.
Shilling operates on a profit-sharing model and offers more than just capital; it is a community-centric VC that fosters a thriving and invaluable network where all stakeholders work together to achieve mutual success.
The Shilling Founders Fund has been instrumental in supporting startups at the pre-seed and seed stages. At the same time, the Shilling Opportunity Fund backs startups in high-potential sectors across Europe from Series A and upwards.
Find out more at www.shilling.vc
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Persistent
Description: We believe in the power of climate neutral economic development in Africa. For the last decade, we have been working hand in hand with exceptional entrepreneurs, investing both financial and human capital to build successful climate ventures on the continent. Our companies offer competitive financial returns required to drive lasting impact.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: blisce/
Description:
blisce/ – based in Paris and New-York - is a technology investment firm committed to investing differently. Pragmatically optimistic that entrepreneurship, innovation, and purposeful capital can improve our world, we empower people to take real action. We work to be genuinely aligned with all our stakeholders because we believe there is no acceptable financial performance without responsibility.

Since 2014, blisce/ has invested in leading U.S. and European companies - including Spotify, Pinterest, Headspace, & Too Good To Go - with 8 exits. 

blisce/ was the first transatlantic fund to be certified as a B Corp.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Graham Partners
Description: Graham Partners is a private investment firm focused on investing in technology-driven companies that are spurring innovation in advanced manufacturing, resulting in product substitutions, raw materials conversions, and disruptions to traditional end markets. Graham Partners targets companies with EBITDA between $5 million and $50 million, and will invest in smaller companies to the extent they complement one or more of its other holdings.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: SeventySix Capital
Description:
SeventySix Capital is a Venture Capital co. that invests in innovative sports, media, and entertainment companies.

Recently, SeventySix Capital sold four portfolio companies - VSiN, the sports betting media network (sold to DraftKings), Vigtory, a next generation sportsbook (sold to FuboTV), Team Whistle, a sports and entertainment media company (sold to ELEVEN SPORTS and in 2022 sold to DAZN), and C360, maker of pylon cams and immersive video company (sold to Cosm). Other public companies that have acquired SeventySix Capital’s portfolio companies include: Aramark, Intel, IBM, Walgreens and Yahoo.

SeventySix Capital also has a Sports Advisory business, its Athlete Venture Group, the Sports Leadership Show, and a strategic partnership with Rubicon Talent.

SeventySix Capital Sports Advisory is a sports consulting group comprised of an expert team focused on the future of the sports and entertainment industry. Sports Advisory specializes in advising teams, leagues, family offices and brands on where the sports industry is going and how to best prepare in the evolving landscape of sports, including esports, sports betting, media and social responsibility.

SeventySix Capital’s Athlete Venture Group allows players to invest, learn, and work directly with top sports tech startups and entrepreneurs. The AVG aims to bridge the gap between athletes, entrepreneurs, and investors by creating opportunities for athletes to become tech investors and for entrepreneurs to access the financial and social capital that professional athletes have to offer.

The SeventySix Capital Sports Leadership Show is a podcast show that features the sports industry’s top entrepreneurs, athletes, and thought leaders. Host Wayne Kimmel looks into the guests’ pasts as they discuss all of the traits and experiences that have developed them into leaders in the sports industry today.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: CAVU Consumer Partners
Description:
Founded  in 2015 by Rohan Oza, Clayton Christopher, and Brett Thomas, CAVU Consumer Partners is a consumer-focused investment firm founded by operators to partner with operators in building high-growth and disruptive businesses. We are partners and operators first, investors second. 

At CAVU, we aspire to create the best possible conditions for companies to reach their fullest potential and for entrepreneurs to achieve their dreams. We believe that with the right team, culture, product, strategy and capital…anything is possible. Our deep industry experience and stellar track record as founders and brand builders in the consumer products world transcends the boardroom. We invest in passionate entrepreneurs with big ideas that make the world a better place. 

There is no more authentic experience than entrepreneurs partnering with a team that has been in the trenches and experienced first-hand the challenges that come with growing a consumer brand. Through our original operator-investing model, we can assist and support passionate entrepreneurs in areas that include new product development, top-tier CPG recruiting, channel & distribution strategy, celebrity partnerships, and marketing strategy.

With offices in New York and Los Angeles, our focus is on better-for-you branded consumer products companies in Food and Beverage, Pet, Personal Care & Beauty and other consumer lifestyle brands.  With total flexibility in stage and structure, CAVU can tailor investment solutions requiring a thoughtful approach, deep sector knowledge and a clear understanding of the company’s and other shareholders’ needs.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Wind Point Partners
Description:
Wind Point Partners is a Chicago-based private equity investment firm with approximately $6 billion in assets under management*. The firm focuses on partnering with top caliber management teams to acquire well-positioned middle market businesses where it can establish a clear path to value creation. Founded in 1984, Wind Point is one of the oldest private equity firms in Chicago and an early adopter in developing a partnership model to align with top operating talent in private equity investments. Today, the firm’s Executive Advisor Partner (“EAP”) network is comprised of more than 40 high-caliber executives who are closely aligned with Wind Point and contribute across all aspects of the firm’s investment process.

Wind Point targets investments in the business services, consumer products and industrial products industries. Since inception, Wind Point has deployed ten private equity buyout funds in partnership with leading institutional investors around the world, including public pensions, insurance companies, endowments, foundations, fund of funds and family offices.

Additional information about Wind Point is available at https://www.wppartners.com/.

*As of 6/30/2024.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Emerge
Description:
Emerge invests in and builds AI & Web3 technology companies globally.

We provide deep operational support to entrepreneurs and help them build great companies.

Emerge has backed over 200 projects in the sectors of DeFi, Infrastructure, Entertainment, Consumer, and Enterprise.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: APEX Ventures
Description: APEX Ventures is a European venture capital firm focusing on deep tech companies. The team act not only as investors but also as company builders with a mission to support the most talented startup teams in building global market leaders.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Scientifica
Description:
Scientifica is an innovative Venture Capital.

Scientifica VC was designed to fully express the potential of the ideas of researchers and startups, providing facilities, equipment as well as preseed, seed and early stage fundings.

We invest in technologies offering solutions to social and environmental challenges, while impacting positively on markets and revolutionizing current industrial models.

Our goal is to allow ideas turning into products, services and technologies.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Alleyway Capital
Description:
Alleyway Capital is an investment firm founded by a team of reputed investors, business operators and technology entrepreneurs. We are ecstatic about small digital businesses and are not chasing the most popular unicorn or the next big public company.

We almost always take a controlling stake in the businesses we buy and usually purchase them outright. We like software-as-a-service (SaaS) businesses, but occasionally also consider other types of tech-enabled businesses.

Our acquisition process is always transparent, respectful and leads to a quick outcome for all parties involved. We are not beholden to external investors and do not look to flip the businesses we buy.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Wynnchurch Capital, L.P.
Description:
Wynnchurch Capital, L.P., headquartered in the Chicago suburb of Rosemont, Illinois with an affiliate in Canada, was founded in 1999, and is a leading middle-market private equity investment firm. Wynnchurch's strategy is to partner with middle market companies in the United States and Canada that possess the potential for substantial growth and profit improvement. Wynnchurch Capital manages a number of private equity funds with $8.6 billion of regulatory assets under management and specializes in recapitalizations, growth capital, management buyouts, corporate carve-outs and restructurings. 

We leverage a business’s strengths, identify new market opportunities and provide strategic support to realize management’s vision—with an unwavering commitment to sound business judgment, partnership, communication and integrity.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Quantum Italia
Description:
Quantum Italia is the first Italian investment vehicle completely dedicated to Quantum Technologies created by Scientifica Venture Capital.
Scientifica Venture Capital has partnered with Quantonation and Unitary Fund
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: VC Unlocked
Description: In our VC Unlocked courses, we equip up-and-coming angels and VCs with the tools they need to become better investors. Our courses combine knowledge with real-world simulated exercises, helping investors fine-tune their investment strategies.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Calm/Storm
Description:
Calm/Storm is an exclusive founder network and boutique venture capital firm. We focus on talents, not industries.

We believe in lifelong learning & personal growth, empowering entrepreneurs with unique access to successful founders.

We are a fund built by founders for founders.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Nina Capital
Description: Nina Capital is a specialized venture capital firm investing in healthcare transformation powered by information technology led by need-driven founders.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals
