Name: SquareOne Venture Capital
Description: SquareOne is a venture capital firm focused on pre-seed and seed investments in B2B technology. Typically the first institutional investor on the cap table, SquareOne provides a unique first-customers-guarantee to all its portfolio companies, acting as an entrepreneurial sparring partner and hands-on supporter from day one. With its network of leading executives, tech entrepreneurs, and investors, SquareOne builds the foundation for large and profitable category leaders in B2B software and deep tech businesses across Europe and counts companies like Stripe, Pipedrive, Carbon One, and Wandelbots as part of its portfolio. The Berlin-based VC, formerly known as Paua Ventures, was founded in 2010.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Five Seasons Ventures
Description:
Five Seasons Ventures is the leading pan-European Venture Capital fund investing in iconic and sustainable consumer brands. 

We look for future category leaders with high growth potential and early commercial traction (Series A or B); our starting cheque size ranges from €2m-€10m.

Our team brings 40+ years of cumulative VC food & consumer experience. We are backed by strategic and financial investors who can provide access to business and financing opportunities. As long term investors, leveraging our deep industry knowledge and network, we aim to create lasting value for our portfolio companies.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: January Ventures
Description:
January Ventures is a VC fund focused on angel/pre-seed in the US & Europe. We are replacing the friends & family round and re-writing the networks in venture.

We invest early and opens doors for the visionary founders of the future. We believe the founders of the next decade will look fundamentally different: more female, more diverse and more distributed. Our firm is built on the principles of transparency and access, and we back founders based on their tenacity and ambition, not their pedigrees or who they know. 

January Ventures was founded in 2018 and is based in Boston, MA.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Industry Ventures
Description: Founded in 2000, Industry Ventures has pioneered flexible capital solutions over the past 25+ years across the life cycle of venture – from seed- and early-stage investing to late-stage secondaries and VC-backed companies transitioning to buyout. Today, the Firm manages over $8 billion on behalf of our Limited Partners and is regarded as a leader in the private technology ecosystem.  Our full-scale platform, complementary funds and unparalleled network have contributed to our long-standing track record. Headquartered in San Francisco, with offices in Washington DC, London and Boston, Industry Ventures continues to be at the forefront of private technology.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: ACVC
Description: The association seeks to promote the venture capital industry in Chile by promoting entrepreneurship and innovation financing. Fostering innovation and entrepreneurship since its financing is one of the main objectives of the new Chilean Venture Capital. Association, which aims to become a spokesperson for government entities, investors and other actors in the industry.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals
Location: Las Condes, Región Metropolitana de Santiago

Name: AMR Action Fund
Description: The AMR Action Fund is a groundbreaking VC fund that enables breakthroughs in the development of antibiotics, anti-fungals, and other antimicrobials. We invest in companies developing innovative treatments for priority drug-resistant pathogens and advocate for market reforms and policy solutions to change how society values these lifesaving drugs.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Kurma Partners
Description: Kurma Partners is a key European venture capital group specialized in healthcare, with €470 million under management,  with two dedicated franchises : Kurma Biofund focused on therapeutic (current active fund KBIII) and Kurma Diagnostics focused on diagnostic and digital health (current active fund Kurma Dx2).
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: DisrupTech Ventures
Description: Disruptech is Egypt's leading fintech venture capital firm focusing on investing in early stage fintech & fintech-enabled startups. We aspire to be the first call for rising fintech founders, and first money in. The founders we do support are our strongest champions making us the investor of choice for lucrative rounds.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Viking Growth
Description:
Viking Growth, the leading Nordic B2B Software investor, invests in fast-growing scale-up companies in the Nordics. The investment focus is business-to-business software companies with international potential. Viking Growth has over NOK 4.4 billion under management and is headquartered in Trondheim, Norway. Viking Growth provides support and investment opportunities to help innovative companies grow and succeed globally. 

Learn more about Viking Growth on www.vikinggrowth.com
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Faraday Venture Partners
Description:
We provide our Partners with efficient access to some of the best opportunities for investment in innovative and sustainable Startups in Europe.
We boost our investee companies with strength and rigour and with more resources and connections every day to maximise their chances of success.

Find out more about our passion and approach: www.faradayvp.com
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Brighteye Ventures
Description:
Technology is a lever. As software grows more intelligent and autonomous, it multiplies the value of human skills, knowledge, and creativity. We believe the next wave of category-defining companies will harness this power to redefine human capability.

We call this the HumanOS: the emerging layer of tools and systems that enable people to learn faster, work smarter, and adapt continuously. We invest early and work closely with founders building this future.

--

** Sidekick **

To help founders win, we publish regularly on Sidekick: our content hub packed with founder stories, operator playbooks, and signals from across the learning and work ecosystem.

Read/Listen to Sidekick: https://brighteyevc.com/sidekick

* Brighteye Insider – monthly updates from the fund and portfolio
* Sidekick Bulletin - a bi-weekly dose of curated insights
* Sidekick FM - a podcast for practical takeaways and signals from the future of learning & work

Subscribe to our newsletters here: https://tinyurl.com/brighteyenews
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: SomosVC
Description: SomosVC is a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization focused on unlocking opportunities for Latino/a VC investors, developing a community that leaves a lasting impact on the ecosystem. Our mission is simple: to accelerate and elevate the presence of Latinos/as in venture capital. We believe that when venture investors are empowered to show up as their authentic selves, the flow of capital from limited partners to venture capitalists and ultimately to startup founders becomes more diversified, impactful, and representative of U.S. demographics.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Enduring Ventures
Description:
Enduring Ventures is a holding company inspired by Berkshire Hathaway. We buy great businesses and aim to hold them forever. We utilize open book management and implement employee profit sharing to enable the people doing the work to build wealth rather than merely act as employees

We partner with diverse, young and non-traditional leaders to buy and grow businesses. Our goal is to enable people with exceptional skill to build wealth through business ownership. We value hustle, hard skills and integrity above fancy degrees or a long resume.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Alibaba Entrepreneurs Fund
Description:
Alibaba Entrepreneurs Fund is a not-for-profit initiative launched by Alibaba Group in 2015. Our mission is to help Hong Kong based entrepreneurs and young people realize their dreams and visions for their businesses and communities.

We are passionate about fostering the entrepreneurial spirit amongst  young people. As such, we established in Hong Kong a HK$1 billion fund and in Taiwan a NT$10 billion fund to support entrepreneurs in both markets.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Golden Gate Capital
Description: Golden Gate Capital is a San Francisco-based private equity investment firm with approximately $20 billion in cumulative committed capital. The principals of Golden Gate Capital have a long and successful history of investing across a wide range of industries and transaction types, including going-privates, corporate divestitures, and recapitalizations, as well as debt and public equity investments.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Rockaway Capital
Description:
Rockaway Capital was founded in 2013 by Jakub Havrlant with the vision of transforming industries through new technologies and the digital economy. Over the past decade, it has grown into a trusted asset management and private equity firm, managing structured funds in e-commerce, digital assets, fintech and blockchain.
 
Rockaway operates several specialized investment platforms such as RockawayX, focused on blockchain and digital assets with nearly EUR 2 billion under management including the prominent staking division, Rockaway Ventures Fund, which invests in early-stage startups across Europe, RockawayQ, which drives AI transformation of established companies, and Rockaway Private Equity, targeting cash-flow-generative businesses.
 
Rockaway Capital is also active in Real Estate development through its Real Estate division. Its social responsibility is fulfilled through Rockaway Arts, which supports cultural initiatives such as the Karlovy Vary International Film Festival, Colours of Ostrava or Designblock.
 
Rockaway serves families, wealth professionals, institutional investors, and companies, offering tailored investment solutions, capital access, and operational support. As of 2024, Rockaway manages over EUR 2.3 billion in assets across more than 50 companies in 17 countries.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: BackingMinds
Description:
BackingMinds invests in entrepreneurs outside of homogeneous networks that traditional venture capital is missing and by doing so we believe we can make a great return.  BackingMinds was founded in 2016 by Susanne Najafi and Sara Wimmercranz and is a VC firm that believes in the business of doing things differently. We look for entrepreneurs where others' don't. For us backing is more than capital. Backing is a mindset and backing is commitment and teaming up with founders. 

We invest in scalable, customer centric businesses with a proven revenue model.

For opportunities, visit: http://www.backingminds.com
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Wayra Hispam
Description:
Wayra es el Corporate Venture Capital de Telefónica Movistar y su plataforma de Innovación Abierta. Wayra invierte en startups con capacidad para atraer innovación a Telefónica Movistar y presta servicios de innovación a terceros, para ayudarles a llevar sus iniciativas de Innovación abierta al siguiente nivel.

Con presencia global, cuenta con siete hubs en Europa (España -Madrid y Barcelona-, Reino Unido y Alemania) y Latinoamérica (Brasil, Argentina y Colombia), y equipos que operan en nueve países. A través de sus fondos, está presente también en Silicon Valley e Israel.
 
Desde su creación, hace más de 15 años, Wayra ha invertido €233M en +1.100 startups y, actualmente, cuenta con +530 startups en su portfolio, de las que +190 trabajan con Telefónica. Contamos además con una red de más de 140 socios y clientes, y dos plataformas de innovación (Alaian y Open Future) abiertas a terceros.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Autotech Ventures
Description:
Autotech Ventures is an early-stage venture capital firm with more than $500M under management to date and a mission to solve the world’s ground transport challenges with technology, realizing the next frontier in mobility. 

At Autotech Ventures, we aim to generate financial returns by helping passionate entrepreneurs to deploy revolutionary transportation technologies and business models.

Autotech Ventures provides startups with capital, ground transportation market intelligence, and access to our transportation sector network which includes our corporate investors representing a global market capitalization of over $500B. 

As a lead or follower investor, we leverage our deep industry network to help our portfolio companies recruit transportation-specific talent and engage corporations as their scale-up partners.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Capital Cell
Description: Capital Cell is the world's leading alternative investment platform for biotechnology and life sciences companies. We offer you the opportunity to build the future of healthcare with every investment, selected by experts and backed by innovation leaders.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Elevate Ventures
Description:
Elevate Ventures invests in high-potential cross-sector innovative companies with a minimum $500M TAM at the pre-seed, seed, and early stages. Over the last 10+ years, Elevate has invested capital in more than 500 Indiana-based startups and provided assistance to nearly 4,000 companies across 86 counties. We are the #1 Most Active Seed & Early-Stage Venture Capital Firm in the Great Lakes Region.

The foundation is set for an even more impactful 10 years ahead with Indiana’s potential to become the Innovation Capital of the World.

To drive our state closer to this vision, Elevate focuses on three areas:

• Community: Build Collaborative Communities
• Capital: Invest in High-Potential Companies
• Acceleration: Provide World-Class Programming

Learn more at https://elevateventures.com
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: PEWIN - Private Equity Women Investor Network
Description: Private Equity Women Investor Network (PEWIN) is an organization that provides an intimate forum for senior women general partners, limited partners and private equity professionals to network, share investment ideas, explore potential opportunities to work together and generally increase the profile of female leaders in our industry. Founded in 2008, this invitation-only group currently has over 1500 members globally at the most senior levels of their respective firms. PEWIN has also become a natural network for its many women CIOs and hosts several high profile CIO Roundtable events throughout the year in various locations where our members gain unprecedented access to this elite group of leaders in the industry.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Oxford Seed Fund
Description:
The Oxford Seed Fund is a founder-friendly team comprising students and alumni from the University of Oxford. We invest up to £100,000 in early-stage startups where the founding team has at least one current student, alumni or academic staff member from the university, and provide additional support to scale.

Supported by the Oxford Saïd Entrepreneurship Centre at Saïd Business School, University of Oxford.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: VenturEast
Description:
VenturEast is one of India’s longest-standing venture capital fund managers, investing since 1997, and managing $400+ million of AUM. Ventureast is an early and growth stage fund investing in Technology, Healthcare, Life Sciences, Food/Agri and Cleantech. 

Ventureast has made close to 100 investments and boasts a number of marquee repeat investors globally. The Ventureast portfolio features market-leading companies such as Acko - India's first and largest digital insurer, Portea - India’s largest home-healthcare company, 24 Mantra - India’s largest organic foods company, and MoEngage - India’s leading marketing automation company. 

Ventureast exits include Facebook’s only acquisition in India, Little Eye Labs; an exit from Onconova through a NASDAQ listing; an exit from Evolva through a Swiss Stock Exchange listing; Bill Desk’s acquisition of Loyalty Rewards; Genpact’s acquisition of Atyati; etc.

Ventureast team is based out of Bangalore and Hyderabad.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: nuvini
Description:
We acquire exceptional SaaS companies across Latin America — and never ask them to change who they are.

Nuvini is a B2B SaaS group listed on Nasdaq ($NVNI), purpose-built to scale vertical software businesses without killing what made them special. We buy companies that are profitable (or close), mission-critical to their customers, and built by founders who know their niche better than anyone.

Our model is simple:
	•	Buy & hold — we’re not flipping assets, we’re compounding value.
	•	Decentralized by design — founders stay in control, we back them with capital and shared expertise.
	•	Growth without chaos — we help our companies scale sustainably, not at all costs.

Since launch, we’ve acquired 7 SaaS companies, raised over R$100M, and went public on Nasdaq in 2023. We’re just getting started.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Best Nights VC
Description:
Best Nights VC is the Venture Capital Investment Unit of Mast-Jägermeister SE, backing founders who are reimagining nightlife and redefining how people come together. Our mission is to shape the future of global nightlife by investing in bold ideas that foster real-world connection and unforgettable experiences. So far, we’ve invested in 17 startups across 3 continents, each driving innovation at the intersection of culture, community, and nightlife.

> Stage: Seed - Series A
> CheckSize: 300.000 - 1.000.000
> Worldwide: Consumer-Tech within and around Nightlife
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Maximon - The Longevity Company Builder
Description:
Maximon empowers entrepreneurs to build impactful, science-based and scalable companies providing healthy aging and rejuvenation solutions.
 
As a company builder, we identify the most promising business opportunities in the field of longevity and build companies from scratch. We provide proven structures, financing, and a unique and inspiring playground for entrepreneurs to build a longevity venture. 
 
With a team of globally successful entrepreneurs and venture investors, we have built a venture building process that bridges the gap between science and business.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Supernova Invest
Description:
Supernova Invest is a European multi-stage VC firm with currently €850m AUM. Our team provides unparalleled expertise and patient capital in the fields of Digital, Industrial Technologies, Healthcare and Cleantech to support high-growth, deeptech start-ups and scale them globally. We support disruptive tech companies such as Soitec, Alice & Bob, Gleamer, Sonivie, UnitySC, Unseenlabs, Loft Orbital, ANYbotics and Exein. The Supernova team exited +25 companies through top IPO and M&A deals. 

The team is composed of +20 experienced investors with a unique ability to understand both the underlying technologies and the most complex deeptech business models. Our team provides in-depth expertise and on-going support in key areas over the life of companies, involving a perfect comprehension of IP, international expansion, and industrial scaling strategies, while engaging with a whole ecosystem.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: The Kitchen Hub
Description:
Founded in 2015 by the Strauss-Group as a part of the Israeli Innovation Authority incubators' program, The Kitchen is a seed investor and a FoodTech focused incubator.  
The Kitchen addresses global food challenges by harnessing Israel’s renowned innovation ecosystem. We strive to make the world’s food chain more productive, affordable, sustainable and healthy by investing in and nurturing cutting-edge technology startups. 
Some examples of our areas of interest are: improved agricultural processes, supply chain technologies, efficient food processing, sensors for food safety and quality, prolonged shelf life and reduction of food spoilage, smart packaging, ingredients and products with new health benefits, improved nutritional profiles, reduction of environmental footprint and more. 
In addition to a capital investment, the incubator provides the portfolio companies with benefits such as: close mentorship from the incubator's team; access to expertise and know-how from within the Strauss-Group and its partners; connections with global F&B companies and access to international investors.   
Our vision is: Better Industry; Better Food; Better World
We believe that technological innovation can overcome the challenges of the food industry and are teaming up with the best FoodTech entrepreneurs to turn our vision into a reality.   
More on http://www.TheKitchenHub.com/
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Outliers Venture Capital
Description: Outliers is an early-stage venture capital fund backing outlier founders building compounding businesses in the MENA. Built by operators, Outliers partners with teams who are leveraging unique insights to address current or emerging market needs with technology solutions.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: ENGIE Factory
Description:
ENGIE Factory is a startup studio of ENGIE Group – a global leader in low-carbon energy and services. 

At ENGIE Factory, we partner with founders to build new climate-tech startups to help us accelerate our transition to a carbon-neutral economy. We fund startups and support founders in scaling their businesses globally through collaboration with ENGIE.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: EUVC
Description: Europe's leading podcast & community for European Venture
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: OSS Ventures
Description:
OSS Ventures is the startup studio building & investing in the future of operations.

We ideate, test, build, invest in great ideas to change the future of the organizations who provide physical services to the world.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Teranga Capital
Description: Teranga Capital est un fonds d’investissement qui apporte des solutions de financement et d’accompagnement innovantes spécifiquement conçues pour répondre aux besoins des petites et moyennes entreprises sénégalaises et gambiennes ayant un besoin de financement jusqu'à 300 millions de FCFA, souvent freinées dans leur développement par un difficile accès aux financements de long-terme et aux compétences.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Stealth Company
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Adara Ventures
Description:
Adara Ventures invests in ambitious businesses, partnering with founders with the capacity, courage, and vision to execute. 

We have invested in over 46 companies and manage over €250m in capital. Adara Ventures’ portfolio includes companies dedicated to cybersecurity, applied AI, data infrastructure, hardware components, digital health, and the energy transition. 

For more information, visit www.adara.vc.

Política de Privacidad: https://rb.gy/wjvi0q
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: CITES
Description:
CITES is a Venture builder, supported by a 24MU$S VC fund that co-creates, along founders, scientific-based startups. With a deep tech focus, CITES invests at the startups’ formation stage, through seed and series A. With over 30MU$S in assets under management, CITES is uniquely equipped, and positioned, to enable the development of scientific-based entrepreneurs, and the deep tech ecosystem in the region.

Besides the capital investments, CITES supports its portfolio companies by providing office space, with fully equipped labs, team formation resources and trainings, hands-on technology expertise, IP and product development guidance, and insights for business strategy, networking, and fundraising processes, among others.

Founded in 2013, initially backed by Sancor Seguros Group – the leading insurance company in Argentina, CITES has been a pioneer in the deep tech venture building space. In 2017, CITES was awarded the Scientific Accelerator Program Franchise from SePyME, and in 2020, listed its first financial trust (CITES I), in the Argentine stock exchange – the first listed VC vehicle in the region.

CITES invests in deep tech opportunities, spanning multiple industries.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Verod
Description:
We partner for sustainable growth, gender equity, and climate action in line with the UN SDGs.  

As the first PE fund worldwide to achieve 2X Certification and proud to have been assessed as "Best-in-Class", we're committed to empowering women in our portfolio companies and internal operations. We invest in high-growth mid-market companies and help them grow into African champions. With a disciplined approach, we transform operations and build sustainable businesses. 

We have been investing in West Africa since 2008.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Acasia
Description: Acasia Group is a leading investing and impact platform that invests, supports and empowers the next generation of technology entrepreneurs in the Middle East and Africa. Established in 2011, Acasia Group (formerly The Cairo Angels) is built by the region, for the region and has three offices in Cairo, Dubai and Lagos.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Shield Capital
Description: Shield Capital is a team of veteran investors, founders and national security leaders who are helping founders build frontier solutions in cybersecurity, artificial intelligence, space & autonomy for commercial and government enterprises.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: B Heroes
Description: B Heroes è un ecosistema di iniziative a supporto della crescita delle startup italiane più innovative per aiutarle ad affrontare con successo il mercato e per creare un nuovo tessuto imprenditoriale in Italia anche grazie alla collaborazione di aziende mature.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: MassMutual Ventures
Description:
Our Culture: 

At MMV, we’re a team of fair, dedicated investors and operators who put integrity, collaboration, and teamwork at the forefront of what we do.

We believe in sharing ideas and perspectives and welcome the robust debate that comes with it. We approach our work knowing that trust and respect are earned. We look for this same culture in the founders and companies we back.


Where We Invest:

Our investment focus is on enterprise SaaS, climate technology, fintech, cybersecurity, and healthtech companies - areas that are fundamentally transforming business processes and consumer relationships.

We invest in companies that bring differentiated technology solutions and scalable business models to drive enterprise-level innovation.


When We Invest:

We are a multistage investor, funding seed through growth stage rounds. We back teams that address real industry pain points and successfully convey the value of their solution to customers who are willing to pay.


LP Value:

Our sole limited partner is MassMutual, a Fortune 500 financial services firm with over $500B in assets under management. Our connection to MassMutual gives MMV’s portfolio companies access to a unique set of assets and capabilities within the firm, including a large real estate portfolio, renewable energy assets, and an internal network of later-stage equity and debt funds.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Saison Capital
Description: Saison Capital is the venture arm of Credit Saison, one of Japan’s largest consumer credit companies. We invest in Seed to Series A companies across South East Asia and India. Although the mandate of the fund is sector agnostic, we like to work with founders that are building platforms or ecosystems that have the potential to distribute financial services to the underbanked.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Deutsche Private Equity (DPE)
Description:
Deutsche Private Equity (DPE) ist eine unabhängige deutsche, international aktive Beteiligungsgesellschaft, die in mittelständische Wachstumsunternehmen in Deutschland, Österreich und der Schweiz investiert. DPE wurde 2007 in München gegründet und hat seitdem fünf Fonds erfolgreich aufgelegt. Insgesamt verwaltet DPE ein Vermögen von 3,0 Milliarden Euro. 

Seit unserer Gründung haben wir in mehr als 40 Unternehmen sowohl als Mehrheits- als auch Minderheitseigner investiert, über 140 Add-on-Investitionen getätigt und rund 6.000 neue Arbeitsplätze geschaffen. Unsere aktiven Portfoliounternehmen beschäftigen derzeit über 10.500 Mitarbeitende. Wir sind stolz auf die Leistungen der Unternehmer, die wir als agiler Partner bei ihrer Expansion unterstützen - mit Kapital, Erfahrung, Vertrauen, Respekt und all der Unterstützung, die eine Unternehmensfamilie  leisten kann. 

Die Investoren von DPE sind institutionelle Anleger, die langfristig investieren, wie Family Offices, Versicherungsgesellschaften, Pensions- und Dachfonds. Darüber hinaus hat DPE mehr als 60 private Investoren, mit denen DPE zusammenarbeitet, zum Beispiel über Funktionen im DPE Beirat oder innerhalb des DPE Portfolios. 

Seit Beginn wird DPE von namhaften Finanzpublikationen für den Erfolg ihrer Aktivitäten ausgezeichnet, z.B. als „Best European Growth Private Equity Fund“, „Best German, Austrian & Swiss LBO Fund“ oder „Deal of the Year in Germany, Austria and Switzerland, Small and Mid-Cap“.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: MiraclePlus
Description:
Founded in 2018, MiraclePlus is one of the largest early-stage startup accelerators in China.

Invest first, then accelerate. Each year, we provide funding support and hold two cohorts of the Accelerator Program to startups worldwide. Startups arrived at MiraclePlus at different stages from ideation to Series B. We are dedicated to technological innovation and entrepreneurship that are changing the world today, and our aim is to drive the frontier of innovation at a speed faster than ever.

Co-founder as a Service. MiraclePlus serves like your co-founder to offer support, expertise, and resources that help you solve problems and achieve great success. By creating a global connected community of entrepreneurs, we are guiding you through every step of the journey!

Join us today. Submit your application with this link: https://apply.miracleplus.com/?locale=en&s=rA2X
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Sweater
Description:
Sweater has shaped the future of venture capital. We've spent the last 6 years unlocking the VC asset class for retail investors. Now we are doing the same for those looking to tap into their own communities and give their audience courtside seats to investing in startups.

Sweater’s platform allows partners to raise venture capital funds from both accredited and non-accredited retail investors. Sweater offers turnkey fund management, from fund launch to full fund operations, using our modern tech stack and APIs to seamlessly unlock venture capital access for the mass retail market.

To learn more, visit: sweaterventures.com
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Blockchain Founders Fund
Description: Blockchain Founders Fund (BFF) is a Singapore-based early-stage Venture Capital Fund that invests in top-tier Blockchain startups globally. Their industry-leading go-to-market focused Venture Program aids seasoned and first-time entrepreneurs across key business functions to fast track growth. BFF has scaled many of the leading Blockchain startups and is always looking to connect with exceptional founders across the industry, including tooling, DeFi, and infrastructure.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Nova Founders Capital
Description:
Nova Founders Capital invests in and builds sustainable large-scale business models in rapidly growing internet markets. We are very disciplined company builders and investors and understand how to efficiently grow companies. Our companies receive the continuous financial and operational support they need to be successful.

Examples of companies we have founded include www.compareasiagroup.com (the leading financial platform in Asia), www.lionandlion.com (leading digital agency in South East Asia), www.edirectinsure.com (leading online insurance platform).

Follow us on Twitter @NovaFounders - https://twitter.com/NovaFounders
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Eutopia
Description:
We invest in emerging brands with a purpose.

Since our creation in 2015, we have backed more than 30 companies that redefine our ways of living: how we eat, sleep, socialize, learn and feel.

We invest between 2 and 10 million euros in companies based in France, Europe or the US with a proven business model. But we do not stop at funding. We support our portfolio companies and provide them with our operating tool box and network to help them thrive.

We want to make a real difference by improving lives and encouraging change in everyone’s day-to-day. We are excited to be on this path to crafting a better world.

Together with our portfolio founders, we aim to balance profit with purpose. We all are committed to creating a sustainable way of living and of doing business for individuals, the community and the planet. That is why we have been a mission-led company with B-Corp certification since 2019 and are willing to continue to improve whenever we can.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: CoBe Capital
Description:
CoBe Capital, a global private investment firm with a permanent capital base, specializes in the acquisition and operation of non-core and underperforming business units in the Americas and Europe from leading global corporations.

Firm Profile:

• Focus on acquisition and operation of non-core and under-performing corporate divestitures
• Strategy is agnostic to industry sector
• Owns and operates a diversified portfolio of companies in North American and Europe
• Strong track record of successful turnarounds

Portfolio Companies:

• Bus Part Warehouse (USA) - acquired from HSBC Holdings plc (LON: HSBA)
• Hatria (Italy) - acquired from Mohawk Industries' (NYSE: MHK) Marazzi Group
• LOGOCOS Naturkosmetik (Germany) - acquired from L’Oréal (ENXTPA:OR)
• Resilion (USA) - acquired from IAC/InterActiveCorp (NASDAQ: IACI) 
• Stark Manufacturing (USA) - acquired from Dover Corporation’s DE-STA-CO (NYSE: DOV)
• Völker (Germany) - acquired from Hill-Rom Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: HRC)

Acquisition Profile:

• Divestiture by leading global corporation
• Sales decision based on the strategic decision that the business is non-core, non-strategic  and/or underperforming
• Target company undergoing financial, operational and/or market related transition
• Revenue up to $1 billion
• Primary operations in the Americas or Europe
• Excess cost, capacity or underperformance
• Opportunity to add value
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Galata Business Angels Official
Description:
Galata Business Angels is Istanbul’s premier angel investor organization. GBA is a formal group of executives, entrepreneurs and angel investors who are interested in investing their time and money into new, cutting edge, startup companies. GBA members have founded companies such as AirTies, Yemeksepeti.com, Mynet.com, and Markafoni.com and been senior executives at the likes of Apple, eBay, Maxim, Turkcell and DBI.

GBA operates as a non-profit organization and acts as a platform where member angel investors and aspiring entrepreneurs meet to exchange ideas about startups and discuss investment opportunities.





Galata İş Melekleri İstanbul’un ilk melek yatırımcı organizasyonudur. Galata İş Melekleri zamanlarını ve paralarını yeni, ileri teknoloji start up şirketlerine yatırım yapan girişimciler, yöneticiler ve melek yatırımcılardan oluşan bir gruptur. Galata İş Melekleri üyeleri Airties, Yemeksepeti.com, Mynet.com ve Markafoni.com gibi şirketler kurmuşlar ve Apple, eBay, Maxim, Turkcell ve DBI gibi şirketlerde üst düzey yöneticilik yapmışlardır.

Galata İş Melekleri kâr amacı gütmeyen bir dernek olarak faaliyet göstermekte olup melek yatırımcılar ile arzulu girişimcileri bir araya getirerek yatırım olanakları ve startuplarla ilgili fikir alışverişi yapmalarını sağlayan bir platform rolü üstlenmektedir.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: EQT Growth
Description:
EQT Growth explores thematic growth opportunities at the point companies are ready to scale, investing in a range of technology and technology-enabled businesses. We partner with founders and management teams of market leading companies across Europe, unleashing their growth potential and establishing them as sustainable market leaders. 

Our highly-experienced team is united by a passion for technology and an absolute commitment to sustainability, driven by the belief that doing good is good business. EQT Growth is powered by Motherbrain, EQT’s proprietary AI-based Investment Platform designed for better and more efficient decision making.

To find out more, visit our website: https://eqtgroup.com/private-capital/growth
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Searchlight Capital Partners
Description: Searchlight Capital Partners is a private investment firm that identifies and develops distinctive opportunities for its investors and partner companies. We seek out situations in which our capital, strategic and operational support help create substantial value. We operate across North America and Europe.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Marathon Venture Capital
Description:
Marathon Venture Capital partners with ambitious founders to build world-class technology companies from the very first idea through scale and beyond, blending deep local roots with a global vision. 

We aim to be the first true believers in tomorrow’s most impactful startups, deploying conviction capital alongside hands-on support￼. Each year, we back only a select group of outlier founders, embedding ourselves as active partners who roll up our sleeves to tackle challenges￼. 

With over €170 million under management across three funds and marquee seed investments in companies like Causaly, Hack The Box, and Delian Alliance industries  we demonstrate that conviction capital and operational rigor can turn ambitious visions into market-leading enterprises￼.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Cardumen Capital
Description:
Cardumen Capital is a global venture capital firm and asset management company that invests in world-class founders and breakthrough technologies that bring the future into the present.

With €300M in Assets Under Management, Cardumen Capital’s extensive portfolio encompasses tech companies and fund investments across three core strategies, DeepTech, AgriFoodTech & Fund of Funds, offering global coverage across the world’s leading technology ecosystems.

Cardumen Capital strives to be the most active and value-driven partner for both entrepreneurs and investors. We bring over 15 years of experience operating in top global innovation hubs, guided by a culture of radical collaboration, transparency, and unwavering commitment to our portfolio companies.

Backed by world-leading institutional investors and corporations, Cardumen Capital leverages deep industry expertise, cross-border networks, and a hands-on approach to accelerate growth and innovation.

We invest in the people and technologies shaping the evolution of society and business, today.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Go To VC²
Description:
𝐋𝐞𝐭 𝐱 𝐛𝐞 𝐭𝐚𝐥𝐞𝐧𝐭. 𝐖𝐞 𝐦𝐚𝐤𝐞 𝐢𝐭 𝐱².

GTVC² is a platform turning talent into x²: early VC openings, Europe×tech briefs, and the tools to win offers. Start with roles before everyone else and a deep understanding your competitor doesn’t know (yet). 

Mondays: Substack insight. 
Tuesdays: LinkedIn roles. Follow for signal that compounds.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: VENTIUR
Description:
Pioneira no Sul do Brasil, a VENTIUR é a primeira aceleradora da região, atuando desde 2013 para impulsionar startups e conectar empreendedores visionários a uma qualificada rede de investidores. Reconhecida como a melhor aceleradora pelo Prêmio Nacional de Empreendedorismo Inovador da Anprotec, acreditamos no poder da inovação para transformar o mundo.

Nosso processo de aceleração combina investimento financeiro e smart money, oferecendo mentorias estratégicas e conexões de alto impacto. Mais do que fomentar bons negócios, buscamos grandes empreendedores, proporcionando as ferramentas necessárias para que suas startups cresçam, gerem empregos, distribuam riqueza e revolucionem a sociedade.

Com mais de 100 startups investidas, 8 exits e mais de 500 investidores conectados, seguimos mobilizando talentos e recursos para construir um futuro mais inovador e promissor.

Além da aceleração de startups, a VENTIUR se especializou em Corporate Ventures, com forte atuação em Corporate Venture Capital (CVC) e na estruturação de novas iniciativas de inovação corporativa, que chamamos de New Ventures. Utilizamos nossa experiência para apoiar empresas que desejam ampliar fronteiras, impulsionar a transformação digital e gerar valor por meio da tecnologia. Estruturamos soluções completas e personalizadas, conectando nossa expertise às necessidades estratégicas de cada cliente, com foco em inovação, crescimento sustentável e geração de impacto.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Lumis Partners
Description:
Lumis is an Alternative Asset Platform that partners with seasoned entrepreneurs to build funds focused on themes with opportunities of a global scale.

Leading with the build-buy-invest philosophy, Lumis joins hands with exceptional entrepreneurs and fund managers to build category-shaping businesses & funds in select pre-sunrise segments and solves problems of global relevance.
 
Over the last 15 years, Lumis has been leveraging its immense domain depth & deep expertise in supply-chain, human capital, technology and healthcare to solve problems at scale, such as – Ageing, Future of Work, SME commerce, Digital Skilling, etc.
 
We, at Lumis, employ the power of the balance sheet capital to create the initial torque. This is further multiplied by tailored capital structures leveraging LP capital and existing co-investors, to consistently deliver superior returns.
 
Years of experience has assisted us in building expertise in supply-chain, human capital, healthcare and technology which has been effectively deployed to create businesses and funds focused across different industry verticals. We have perfected the methodology of leveraging India as a crucible, enabling frugal innovation and taking businesses global thereafter.
 
Lumis takes many paths to value, building businesses for long-term value creation; anchoring funds, making equity investments across path-breaking companies; and offering debt structures for risk calibrated returns and consistent cash flows. The power of the firm gets exponentially deployed through deep assets we own – for instance, Supply-chain Labs, a fellowship program in collaboration with leading Corporates & MIT touches over 1000 supply-chain startups, and over 100,000 SMEs every year; it selects 1% in a tight cohort every year, and then collaborates with them over a 6-month program to get them scale ready. In doing so, we make equity investments in these companies.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: 顺为资本 Shunwei Capital
Description:
Shunwei Capital is a premier venture capital firm specializing in early to growth stage investments in disruptive business models.  We invest in mobile Internet, Internet+, consumer IoT, smart manufacturing, deep technology and rural Internet.  Shunwei's investment portfolio comprises Xiaomi, 17zuoye, Meicai, iQiyi, NIO, Ninebot, Huolala, ShareChat, and other premium companies in China and internationally.  We strive to work with founders to fulfill their dreams and build great companies.

Shunwei Capital was founded in 2011 by Jun Lei and Tuck Lye KOH.  Today, Shunwei Capital manages over US$3 billion in funds under management. Our investors include globally renowned sovereign wealth funds, fund of funds, university endowment funds and family offices.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Esterad Bank B.S.C. (c)
Description: Esterad Bank is a wholesale Islamic bank, licensed by the Central Bank of Bahrain, that provides global alternative investment opportunities to GCC-wide high net-worth individuals (HNWIs) and institutional investors in private equity, real estate, and venture capital by implementing international-quality best practices and risk mitigation to deliver high-performance results.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Flybridge
Description: Seed-stage venture capital firm based in Boston and New York City investing in ambitious founders leveraging the power of AI. With over $1 billion under management across six seed funds and seven pre-seed funds, portfolio companies include BetterCloud, BitSight, Bowery, Chief, Codecademy (acq: SKILL), FalconX, Firebase (acq: GOOG), Infracommerce (BVMF: IFCM3), MadeiraMadeira, MongoDB (NASDAQ: MDB), Open English, Plastiq, and Splice.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Pareto Holdings
Description: Building and investing in early-stage companies.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Singular
Description:
We are an early-stage venture capital firm born in Europe, committed to empowering European founders with global ambitions, across all sectors, from Seed to Series B - with a strong focus on Series A companies. 

By combining the speed and agility of a smaller fund with the resources and infrastructure of larger platforms, we aim to be adaptable and swift in our decision-making, while also having the capacity to invest in any type of company, anywhere in Europe.

From our offices in London and Paris and a team of both investors and operators committed to supporting founders on critical topics, we strive to be strategic sparring partners to founders and their teams, delivering real value from day one through every stage of their growth journey.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: The Heico Companies LLC
Description:
Heico has a long history of success. Since its founding over 40 years ago, The Heico Companies L.L.C. has grown from a single business to over 74 separate companies through a strategic acquisition policy, and by reinvesting its earnings into internal growth and new prospects. Historically talented at restoring distressed companies, Heico now also targets acquisitions that will complement its ever-growing portfolio of companies in manufacturing, construction, and industrial services.

These four core operations are organized into platforms: Metal Processing Group, Industrial Technologies Group, Construction Solutions Group, and Applied Solutions Group. Once acquired, new Heico companies are assigned to a platform and run on a stand-alone basis, allowing for great independence as well as the opportunity to share knowledge about markets, production processes, and management practices across other Heico platforms and companies.

Heico continues to seek out new opportunities and maintain its standard of success. The Heico Companies L.L.C has remained a privately held company since its creation and maintains a majority ownership in each of its operations, which generate more than two billion dollars in revenues.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Startup.Network
Description:
Startup.Network is a market place for startups, businesses, investors and service providers. 

There are more than 20,000 startups and investment projects from all over the world on our platform.

We are organizers of the World Largest Startup Pitch Contest  - Unicorn Events https://unicorn.events/  where extraordinary startups meet TOP VCs and Business Angels.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: All In Capital
Description: We are an pre-seed and seed stage fund that backs the best founders from India.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: STG – Symphony Technology Group
Description: STG is a private equity firm focused on funding innovative software and software-enabled tech services leaders in the mid-market. In addition to capital, STG provides transformation expertise to enable its portfolio companies to deliver more value to clients to retain and attract the best talent and to achieve best-in-class business performance.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Expert Dojo
Description:
We’re a VC fund & growth accelerator backing ambitious founders worldwide. Based in Santa Monica, we invest in early-stage startups and work hands-on to help them win customers, raise follow-on capital, and scale across borders.

What we do:
- Invest in strong founders with real traction and global ambition
- Run an intensive accelerator focused on measurable growth
- Open doors to our global investor, operator, and customer network
- Support post-program with follow-on funding and strategic guidance

Why founders choose us: we move fast, we’re practical, and we stay in the trenches long after demo day.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Affirma Capital
Description:
Affirma Capital is an independent emerging market private equity firm owned and managed by the former senior leadership of Standard Chartered Private Equity (SCPE). The Founding Partners have worked together for over 16 years and currently manage over US$4 billion in assets for leading global limited partners. 

Affirma Capital helps build and nurture national and regional champions by investing in companies backed by strong management teams and founders. Throughout our 22 year history of investing in emerging markets we have deployed over US$6 billion in 99 companies across Asia, Africa and the Middle East and have returned over US$7 billion in cash proceeds to our investors at highly attractive rates of return. 

Our investment philosophy, focused on selective origination, disciplined deal structuring and intensive portfolio management, has helped us build a superior track record with realized returns at a significant premium to the MSCI Emerging markets index.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Innova Capital
Description:
We are an independent private equity firm established in 1994 in Poland with the objective of investing in controlling stakes of mid-sized companies in the CEE region. 
We have followed the Polish economy, as it has powered ahead on a wave of entrepreneurialism, all the while responding to new market dynamics and challenges.

For investors and entrepreneurs looking for value creation and winning partnerships, Innova Capital seeks to deliver attractive returns through a proven track record of profitable investments using, innovative strategies, commitment to excellence, support for management and steely determination. We build businesses and accelerate growth by identifying feasible and profitable opportunities, converging complex objectives to build a competitive edge for our partners.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Venture Atlanta Conference
Description:
Venture Atlanta is proud to be one of the nation’s largest venture capital conferences and communities. Over the years, we’ve connected over 760 companies to $7.5 billion in capital.

We began 15 years ago with one mission: to connect startups to capital. Today, this mission has expanded beyond monetary capital to connect companies with the resources, networks, clients, partnerships, and talent they need to grow.

Venture Atlanta has played an important role in the tech ecosystem of the Southeast. Each year, we bring together innovative companies, disruptive technologies, and top-tier investors for a high-caliber, 2-day conference in the heart of Atlanta.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: NPM Capital
Description:
Wij zijn een betrokken en ondernemende investeringspartner die samen met onze participaties bouwt aan de bedrijven van de toekomst: Building better business together.

NPM is uitgegroeid tot een onafhankelijke investeringspartner die middelgrote en grote bedrijven met een hoofdkantoor in de Benelux helpt hun ambities waar te maken. We richten ons hierbij op familiebedrijven en op ondernemingen met een sterk en betrokken managementteam.

NPM helpt door actief te ondersteunen bij de ontwikkeling van een toekomstgerichte bedrijfsstrategie, internationalisering, Buy & Build, passende financieringen en het realiseren van ESG-ambities.

Wij zijn altijd op zoek naar interessante investeringsmogelijkheden. Lees op npm-capital.com meer over onze focus en investeringscriteria.

—

We are an investment partner who joins forces with our portfolio companies to build future growth: Building better business together. 

NPM is an independent investment partner that helps medium-sized and large companies with a head office in the Benelux to achieve their ambitions. We focus on family-owned enterprises and companies with a strong and dedicated management team. 

We help by providing active support in relation to developing a future-focussed business strategy, internationalisation, buy & build, appropriate financing and achieving your ESG goals.

NPM Capital is always looking for interesting investment opportunities. Read more about our focus and investment criteria at npm-capital.com.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: CairnMartin
Description:
Operating a business requires varied forms and shapes of capital. To a Finance person, it means money. To a Human Resources person, it means labour. 

We are a privately owned group which remains a partner of choice among top companies providing business solutions for both financing and human capital requirements.

We help companies in various stages of growth to raise financial capital via a variety of financial instruments and options. Our partners and advisors have vast experience in raising equity and debt capital for conglomerates, small and medium size organizations, both public and private institutions across the globe.

We have also helped organizations acquire the right talent and workforce at all levels, across industries and functions. We also provide customized strategic business and market advisories.

Our global reach allows us to have unparalleled access to executives across industries, functions, markets and geographies. Our consultants provide you with a distinctive combination of experience and expertise. The group has domain consultants and experts divided across practices and sectors thus providing best-in-class services and solutions to your needs.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: IIT Mandi Catalyst
Description:
IIT Mandi Catalyst was launched in 2016 by IIT Mandi as Himachal Pradesh's first Technology Business Incubator (TBI). It offers a low-cost, tranquil, and high-tech venue for early-stage entrepreneurs which is away from the hustle and bustle of a fast-paced life, pollution, excessively long commutes, and other big-city complexities. 


Catalyst is strongly backed by the Central Government and State Government and strives to incubate technology-based start-ups focused on economic and social impacts. The incubation program at Catalyst caters to startups at all stages of their early life cycle, including ideation, prototyping and product development. Through its high-touch incubation program, Catalyst has so far supported over 600+ startups and funded over 270+ startups through several funding schemes. 

https://iitmandicatalyst.in/
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: GreenTec Capital Partners
Description:
GreenTec Capital Partners is an Entrepreneurial Support Organization (ESO) with roots in providing investment and venture-building support to African ventures. We have transitioned from an investor with a successful 20x exit to an experienced Technical Assistant, delivering comprehensive strategic, operational, technical, and investment readiness assistance, fostering the growth of impactful ventures in Africa and beyond.

To date, we've sourced and screened over 1,000 businesses, guiding them to become successful, mature, and investable entities. With a proven track record, we've secured over €10 million in startup support, encompassing operating and investment capital, through partnerships with GIZ, UNDP, EIB, and AFD during our 8+ years of existence.

Our core product offerings include:

Entrepreneurship Programs: We develop and implement end-to-end, tailored entrepreneurship programs in various sectors, equipping local entrepreneurs with the knowledge and resources to raise investments independently.

ESG & Impact Training: We create and deliver customized ESG and impact training toolkits for ESOs, VCs, and impactpreneurs, empowering them to build an impact track record and implement effective ESG strategies to attract investors, mitigate risks, and support sustainable development.

AFRICA Consulting: Leveraging our extensive experience in diverse African markets and a compelling background in investment management, we provide comprehensive assistance to private businesses exploring opportunities in Africa. Our services range from market research, ecosystem mapping, and due diligence to business case development and investment target setting.

At GreenTec, our mission is to forge a lasting impact in Africa by nurturing a resilient local entrepreneurship ecosystem and advocating for socially responsible enterprises to drive sustainable development across the continent.

Join our network and embark on an exciting journey into the world of African entrepreneurship!
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Ingressive Capital
Description:
Ingressive Capital targets tech-enabled startups in Nigeria, Kenya, Ghana, Morocco and Egypt. The fund is Delaware-incorporated and headquartered in Nigeria. 

We target 10% ownership in Pre-Seed to Seed tech-enabled companies based in Sub-Saharan Africa with typical check sizes of up to $500k.

We provide follow-on funding with our own investor base, who run some of the leading funds in the world. We look for post-launch founders with great products, solving big problems and we work with them on ways to grow and scale through business development, partnerships and financial support.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Catamaran
Description:
Catamaran wants to be a globally-respected catalyst that invests in innovative ideas from passionate and value-based entrepreneurs to help them build successful enterprises. We manage over $1 billion across asset classes.

We invest in bold ideas from passionate entrepreneurs and work with them across stages to build successful enterprises.

We partner with respected global corporations to create enduring enterprises in India.

We invest in listed companies catering to large markets, with high standards of corporate governance and the ability to stay resilient across economic cycles.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Alternatives.pe
Description:
Alternatives.pe: The only comprehensive and 100% accurate data and insights platform for Venture Capital, Private Equity, M&A professionals looking for the best in class coverage across Southeast Asia and Australia.

Used by the majority of VC Funds and Investors across Southeast Asia including Square Peg, 500 Startups, Temasek, Sequoia, Tiger Global, Warburg Pincus, KKR, Vertex, GIC and Softbank, to mention a few.

We source our data using regulatory filings, giving you timely access to 100% accurate data, on every deal - even those that are unannounced. 

Whilst others rely on web crawlers and volunteered information which is inherently unreliable and incomplete, Alternatives.pe is the source of data and intelligence you can rely on.  

We give you more coverage:  2x to 4x vs competitors

- 200k companies
- 35k Investors
- 50k deals

More Data Points, including:

-Company Profiles & Performance
-Funding History (Cap Tables with Every Participating Investors at each round)
-Valuations
-Company Financials (Revenue, Revenue Growth, EBIT, EBITA) and Audited Filings
-Investor Profiles and Portfolios
-Fund Profiles and Performance (at deal and fund level)
-Employee Growth


This is why more investors use Alternatives.pe than any other source for data on PE, M&A and VC deals.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Halogen Ventures
Description:
Halogen Ventures is an early stage venture capital fund focused on female founded consumer technologies founded by Jesse Draper.
We believe in hands on attention and plug each of our portfolio companies into a strategic network of advisors, investors and accelerators in the greater venture community. With a focus on consumer, we also add value in the entertainment, marketing and PR space to further the footprint of our brands.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: 10x Founders
Description:
We're the network-powered early-stage investor that unites more than 300 entrepreneurs to back the most ambitious tech startups.

We focus on backing ambitious founders in Europe and the US who are capable of building category-leading companies. 

As entrepreneurs ourselves, we believe in collaboration and enthusiasm for all tech industries and themes. Our focus is on partnering with exceptional founders utilizing technology to solve the world’s biggest problems.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: American Securities
Description: American Securities is a leading U.S. private equity firm with approximately $26 billion under management. Based in New York with offices in Shanghai, the firm invests in market-leading North American companies with annual revenues generally ranging from $200 million to $2 billion. Our mission is to generate superior returns by making investments in great businesses and helping management better them.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Airbus Ventures
Description:
We are a fast-moving, intensely curious early-stage investment group. We seek exceptional, inspired founders from around the world who will set the course for ground-breaking innovation in mobility, security, and the future of flight. Our vision is to continuously ignite interest in the wonder that is aerospace.

Airbus is in our DNA, from our legacy of innovation and industry expertise to our global network. It is an asset to every company we fund, if and when they want it. Yet we operate with autonomy and trust, from the investments we make to the technologies they develop; we independently support entrepreneurs with unique ideas, plans, and structures. We are headquartered in Silicon Valley and Paris and fund start-ups across the globe. We are a valuable, efficient, and energetic partner to those who recognize that advances in aerospace will impact all life on Earth and beyond.

We welcome hearing from founders working hard to transform any facet of our industry. From urban air mobility, to connected fleets, to digital development and manufacturing, to advanced energy and propulsion. Quite literally, there is no limit.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: New Brunswick Innovation Foundation
Description:
INNOVATION. INVESTMENT. IMPACT.  

NBIF is an evergreen pre-seed and seed stage venture capital organization that invests in the creation and scaling of New Brunswick tech companies on behalf of the Province of New Brunswick.  NBIF offers a comprehensive support system, including direct and indirect investment as well acceleration and incubation programs.

NBIF is frequently the initial source of funding for a New Brunswick startup. Beyond financial support, our investment includes actively participating on portfolio company boards and guidance and support to founders.  Our vast network links startups and our portfolio companies with co-investors and additional resources to foster their success and growth.  

NBIF is continuing to expand our portfolio and reinvesting in the companies we believe in.

For more information visit NBIF.ca
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Haatch
Description:
Haatch are strategic pre-seed and opportunistic Seed investors that invest in B2B SaaS companies solving deep pains in the present and/or creating massive impact for organisations.

We offer both EIS & SEIS funds to investor and have over 2,000 investors across our funds.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: LIFTT
Description:
Chaired by the scientist and entrepreneur Stefano Buono, LIFTT came to life as an operating company in 2019 thanks to Compagnia di San Paolo, Politecnico di Torino and LINKS Foundation. 

The aim is to encourage technology development and transfer from University to Industry, but also to clear the way from a simple business idea to the creation of an innovative product, offering a dynamic and modern vision of venture capital as applied to Technology Transfer. 

LIFTT guarantees high visibility to ideas and new businesses at a national and international level, investing and attracting capital and ensuring maximum impact on the local and national territory. While generating value for its shareholders, LIFTT supports the creation of businesses, development, employment and economic growth, through the implementation of an ethical and transparent governance model, based on the participation of all the actors involved.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Oxygea
Description: A Oxygea investe e acelera startups dedicadas a sustentabilidade e transformação digital na indústria. Valorizamos o ecossistema e nos articulamos para proporcionar o melhor às pessoas e seus novos negócios, para construirmos um futuro mais sustentável.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: MidEuropa
Description:
MidEuropa is a leading European private equity investor with deep roots in Central Europe and a track record spanning over 25 years. Headquartered in London, with offices in Warsaw and Bucharest, MidEuropa identifies winning investments across the consumer, healthcare, services, and technology sectors and supports them in their growth and international expansion. 

To date, MidEuropa has raised and managed funds of over €6.5 billion and completed 46 investments and over 290 add-on acquisitions across 20 countries.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Together
Description:
Together Fund is India’s only operator-led venture capital firm, backing ambitious founders building global-first companies. With a focus on AI and deep tech, we invest $1M–$10M at Seed and Series A, with a mission to support bold founders with India in their DNA.

Our portfolio of 35+ companies includes Emergent, Composio, RapidClaims, Confido, Spendflo, Rocket, and Scalekit, among others.

As part of our mission to help early-stage builders, we have SwarmSpace - a platform for AI founders offering up to $1M in capital, an AI-first community, and a research lab for applied innovation.

For more, reach us at deals@together.fund
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Plug and Play Japan
Description:
Plug and Play is the world's leading accelerator/venture capital. 
Plug and Play is founded in 2006 in Silicon Valley, our mission is to globally accelerate innovation by connecting startups, corporate partners, investors and governments.
As a global innovation platform, our programs have expanded worldwide in over 50 locations. We have 1,700+ cases of startup investment and have worked with over 2,000 startups through accelerator programs, corporate innovation services. 
Plug and Play Japan was founded in 2017 as a subsidiary of Plug and Play and 45+ leading companies participating in our programs as official corporate partners. Plug and Play's major expertises are "support corporate partners creating innovation", "cross-industrial accelerator programs" and "startup investment", making best use of our extensive global network.
Plug and Play Japan supports the co-creation and collaboration between Japanese/international startups with cutting-edge technologies and industry-leading corporations to generate innovation.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Educapital
Description:
Educapital is the largest European Impact VC fund backing tech entrepreneurs shaping the future of education and work. We invest from late seed to Series B. 
To apply for funding or contact us, https://www.educapitalvc.com/contact
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Revent
Description:
Today’s immense climate and societal challenges will not be solved without visionary entrepreneurs creating tomorrow’s most innovative companies.
 
We gather a community of purpose-led founders, investors and scientists to drive systemic change in climate, healthcare, education and finance. 
 
Our role is to provide founders the platform to succeed, supporting them with capital, relevant networks and an aligned mission.
 
We believe that in today’s world, the companies founded by extraordinary teams around a strong purpose, will be the ones to succeed and thrive.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: LoftyInc Capital
Description: LoftyInc Capital co-founded an ecosystem where impact-focused investors and African founders commercialize innovations for a better world. Please see our portfolio, apply for funding, or request investment insights via links on our website.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Novastar Ventures
Description:
Novastar Ventures is one of the first and largest VCs investing in Africa. Since 2014, Novastar has partnered with the bold entrepreneurs transforming markets and sectors and creating financial, social and environmental for people and planet - for good.

Novastar’s work and team encompass both Novastar Ventures Limited and its investment advisors in Nairobi and Lagos.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Igah, Ventures.
Description: We believe bold entrepreneurs make a difference and we want to engage our full spectrum of resources behind a supportive ecosystem to help them thrive.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Merak Ventures
Description: Merak is a sector-agnostic, early-stage venture fund, investing in B2B and emerging technologies companies that are solving real problems and creating large-scale impact.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Vision Ventures (VV)
Description:
Vision Ventures is a sector-agnostic VC firm “By Entrepreneurs, for Entrepreneurs”. 

We invest in early-stage tech startups in MENA since 2016 offering hands-on experience to assist founders in their journey and empower them to accelerate their companies’ growth and realize their dreams.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Alter Equity
Description:
Première société de gestion à impact, alter equity a porté une disruption radicale dans le private equity dès 2007 et continue d’innover depuis au service d’un investissement rentable et utile aux personnes et à l’environnement. Cette finalité est symbolisée par le sigle 3P : People, Planet, Profit. 

Elle gère aujourd’hui plus de 260 millions d’euros exclusivement dédiés à l’investissement à impact. Son dernier fonds, en cours de levée, investit des montants de 4 à 20 millions d'euros au capital de startups françaises et européennes dont l’activité et les pratiques de gestion portent la transition vers une économie plus durable et plus responsable. 

Ilek, OpenAirlines, Murfy, Teale… Depuis sa création, alter equity a financé 31 startups dans des secteurs clés : énergies renouvelables et efficacité énergétique, gestion des déchets et économie circulaire, intégration et emploi, éducation et culture, bien-être et santé.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Mucker Capital
Description:
Not in Silicon Valley? 
Not a problem.

Mucker Capital invests in Seed and Series A stage companies outside Silicon Valley.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Den Sociale Kapitalfond
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Nama Ventures
Description:
WE ARE TECH FOUNDERS FUNDING TECH STARTUPS
"Lets give you your first investment cheque"

We are the champions of first money in (lets call it pre-seed) in MENA tech startups.  

Said differently, we want to give you your first investment cheque.

If you are a MENA based startup, with a founding team that has complementary skill sets, then we sure want to talk to you, please apply for funding.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: DueDash
Description:
DueDash provides the essential digital infrastructure for the private capital markets. Our non-custodial Intelligence Layer empowers GPs, LPs, Family Offices, and Founders to move from the chaos of manual coordination to a state of intelligent, auditable orchestration.

We are not another system to replace. We are the API-first, agnostic hub that sits atop your existing ecosystem, providing a single source of truth for deals, diligence, and portfolio operations. Our platform, powered by 18+ proprietary financial AI agents, is architected for institutional trust, with SOC 2-aligned controls and options for deployment within your own secure VPC/VNet.
Our mission is to eliminate operational drag so our clients can focus on what they do best: building Alpha.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: startAD
Description:
startAD is an Abu Dhabi-based global accelerator steering seed-stage technology startups to launch, develop, and scale their ventures.

Anchored at NYU Abu Dhabi and powered by Tamkeen, an Abu Dhabi government owned company, the accelerator equips startups to pilot solutions with industry leaders, while enabling corporates to innovate with startups disrupting their core businesses.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Gear Up
Description:
From finding new business model, fundraising, internal organization improvements, pivoting, launching your product, to scaling up; the challenges and questions in running your business seem to be never-ending.

This is where we come in.

Gear Up provides one-on-one and catered support for the chosen startups in our network.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Cambridge Angels
Description:
Cambridge Angels is a leading UK business angel network providing smart capital from entrepreneurs to entrepreneurs. 

We are a collaborative Cambridge-based group, actively mentoring and investing in innovative teams and their ideas. We equip generations of entrepreneurs to generate returns and help realise their full potential. We have a strong ethos of backing merit and supporting entrepreneurship.

Our members, most of whom are successful entrepreneurs, invest in a wide range of start-up and scale-up businesses with a particular focus on deep-tech, and tools and technologies supporting healthcare. 

Through our members and their networks, our entrepreneurs are better connected.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Pitchdrive
Description:
Pitchdrive is a radical break from traditional early-stage investing.

We want to get funding in the hands of great founders as soon as we can - in weeks, not months. Because entrepreneurs should focus on building a company, not on talking to investors.

With our data-driven engine, we can qualify seed-stage ventures faster than anyone on the market. This allows us to make seed-stage investing scalable for founders and investors.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Selfless Ventures
Description:
Selfless Ventures is a private equity firm that is pioneering the next frontier of initiating innovation with Commercial Real Estate Services, CPG, and Robotics.

Our portfolio companies enable services & products to Tesla, Target, Tonino Lamborghini, Costco, Ulta Beauty, Keurig Dr Pepper, and many more.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: HarbourView Equity Partners
Description:
HarbourView Equity Partners is a global investment firm focused on investment opportunities in the media and entertainment space. 

HarbourView invests to empower the stewards of culture. We back companies and creators that create narratives which impact the world. We provide resources to power creativity, innovation and to help tell stories told and untold, shaping a better tomorrow.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: The Sterling Group
Description:
Founded in 1982, The Sterling Group, L.P. (www.sterling-group.com) is a private equity investment firm that targets controlling interests in basic manufacturing, industrial services and distribution companies. Typical enterprise values of these companies range from $100 million to $750 million. Sterling has sponsored the buyout of over 55 platform companies and numerous add-on acquisitions for a total transaction value greater than $10 billion. 

Sterling partners with management teams to grow and build winning businesses in the industrial sector. Nearly 80% of Sterling’s past partnerships have been with family businesses and corporate carve-outs. Sterling excels as a partner where it can bring its operational focus and expertise to a situation.
