Description:
Golden Ventures is a leading seed-stage venture capital fund, based in Toronto and investing across North America.

We’re here to support founders who are building the future. It is our job to take big risks on the world’s most talented, driven and resilient founding teams who want to change the world.

We believe technology is not an industry. It transcends conventional categories and touches every facet of life, improving the world as we know it. People will find new ways to make things simpler, faster, cheaper, and smarter.

It is for this reason that we invest across sectors, trusting a founder’s ability to teach us what is on the horizon and deliberately leverage our mentorship and diverse network to their advantage.

It is also why we focus exclusively on our superpower, the seed stage. While companies at seed stage might seem messy and imperfect to most, that’s our comfort zone. It’s where we can help you identify what matters — setting milestones and the necessary focus that will help you achieve product-market fit.

Our mission is centered around providing intelligent capital and building a strong community and ecosystem of operators to support our portfolio startups throughout their scaling journey and ensure their success.

Our members and investors are all seasoned professionals from an ethnically diverse background. Many have worked with some of the largest brands in the world.

Made up of high-ranking officials, individuals who have received orders of the British Empire,  US Presidential appointees and C-suite members. They are serial entrepreneurs,  institutional investors, investment bankers
and university professors from the globe’s most established and prestigious educational institutions.

With a combined experience of over 50 years,  our team have successfully generated solid returns for clients of over $12 billion in investment assets, including private equity funds for the benefit of black, POC and entrepreneurs.

Impact X believes in social change, and through successful venture investing, the creation of wealth can be achieved. It can also be leveraged to drive great improvements to our society and our chosen communities.

We posit that entrepreneurship is a catalyst for developing new opportunities, creating jobs,  experiences, networks, success narratives,  wealth, and future investment opportunities.
From this cycle, true wealth can be sustained and subsequently individuals can drive philanthropy. Thus, creating a positive social impact, empowering others to achieve even greater success.

Mais do que investidores, somos operadores. Colocamos a mão na massa com um método autoral de crescimento, acompanhando de perto os fundadores para superar os maiores desafios do setor:

- Aquisição estratégica de clientes, combinando marketing de performance com branding de valor.

- Desenvolvimento inteligente de canais e fortalecimento comercial.

- Estruturação financeira robusta, com internalização de processos de contabilidade e controladoria.

- Conexões constantes com grandes compradores, abrindo portas para novas oportunidades.

Nossa força vem da experiência: Eduardo Moraes (fundador da Latinex Brands) e Leonardo Tonini (ex-CMO da Mondelez) unem mais de 40 anos de atuação direta na indústria, com um conhecimento profundo das dores e necessidades das marcas de consumo.

Se você é fundador de uma marca emergente e quer acelerar seu crescimento com quem entende do jogo, fale com a gente.

The Startup Scorecard and Investor Network, accessible to all investors and Founders, aim to reinvent the early-stage ecosystem, eliminate bias in the investment process and empower Founders with the data they need to assess performance and drive growth. Name: Fil Rouge Capital
Description:
Ten reasons you will want to work with us:

One
We love building and being a part of an entrepreneurial ecosystem where everybody plays their role. We want to make the Croatian entrepreneurial ecosystem the best in class so expect to see a lot of us because this is what we want to achieve!

Two
Our reputation is our wealth.

Three
We always stand behind our founders, in good and bad times, we mean it, you will see!

Four
We hate getting the “long yes” so we never give …the “long yes”.

Five
We love bold founders and we provide “Capital for the Bold”. Get it?

Six
We at FRC have “been there, done that”. Our combined M&A and financing track records exceed $4B. We didn’t always get it right, but we’re not ashamed of it.

Seven
We can give continuous support to our startups from incubation and acceleration to scale-up and exit.

Eight
“We bring you more than money”: every VC claims it but very few actually live by it – we do. We were voted “Best Investor” in our region 2 years in a row and there is a reason for that.

Nine
We’re fine with opinions but we’d rather focus on facts.

Ten
We are no nonsense guys. We will tell you things as they are, we never intend to demean or hurt. We might seem offensive every now and then, remember, we NEVER mean bad but we’d rather be straight.

TVM pursues a unique two-pronged strategy, financing innovative early-stage therapeutics through a single asset company approach (Project-Focused Company, PFC) that leverages the firm’s strategic relationship with global pharmaceutical firm, Eli Lilly and Company. TVM also invests in differentiated commercial-stage medical technologies and late clinical-stage therapeutics.

The TVM investment team has worked together for over a decade to effectively utilize this innovative approach to maximize returns for investors and finance new therapies and technologies to meaningfully improve patient lives.

Name: ODBA
Description:
We are an early stage VC firm who back innovative founders using technology to create improbable stories.

Our portfolio companies are founded and led by people whose stories we admire, visions we share, and efforts we back.

People are at the heart of everything we do. We don’t invest in ventures, products or ideas, rather we invest in the individuals who build them. As founders ourselves we invest in people like us: wherever and however we find them.

Our investments span 25+ innovators across 13+ countries, with a combined follow-on capital of over $150 million and a user base exceeding 9 million.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: AHL Venture Partners
Description: AHL Venture Partners believes in the power of entrepreneurs to drive African development forward. We have expertise in working with innovative entrepreneurs building scalable businesses to solve pressing social and environmental challenges across Africa. Since our founding in 2020, we have been the primary advisor to AHL Charitable Foundation (AHLCF). Since 2007 AHLCF has committed more than US $100M to 35 impact-focused businesses and funds that operate across 27 different African countries. Our team on the ground, works closely with leading entrepreneurs to provide fit-for-purpose capital and ongoing business support. We facilitate the deployment of innovative financing products that respond to founders' needs, with tickets ranging from venture debt, working capital and equity investments. Our primary client AHLCF, being a permanent capital vehicle, is uniquely positioned to participate in subsequent funding rounds and have the ability to be patient to optimise for both return and impact.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: HSEVEN - H7
Description:
HSEVEN is one the largest startup accelerators in Africa. HSEVEN is the Hub for Africans by heart who want to change the World.

We are building an ecosystem that will maximize entrepreneur’s possibilities to make it Big & Global. HSEVEN is an African Platform for startups, corporations & investors.

We are 7.

We are Entrepreneurs, Inventors, Experts, Connectors, Executives, Headhunters, Investors, & Inventors.

We are Human, Honest, Humble, Happy, Heartful, Hopeful, & we aim Higher.
We believe that we need 7 exceptional Humans to build a High Impact Entrepreneur.

We are going to open gates to Talent, Training, Expertise, Innovation, Co-creation, Capital, and Global Networks & Markets.

We want to Impact Africa.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Castor Ventures (an Alumni Ventures Fund)
Description:
Castor Ventures is an Alumni Ventures' venture capital fund for alumni of MIT that invests in companies with an MIT connection. 

Meet the team:
Chris Sklarin, Managing Partner
Cainon Coates, Managing Partner
Meera Nair, Principal

We are part of Alumni Ventures, America’s largest venture fund for individuals and the #1 most active venture firm in the US and #3 globally (PitchBook 2022).

Follow Castor Ventures for content at the intersection of our shared alma mater, venture capital, and entrepreneurship.

We are private, for-profit, and not affiliated with or sanctioned by the university.

Offers of securities are made only to eligible investors through formal offering documents, which describe the risks, terms, and other important information that must be considered before investing.  Example portfolio company investments shown for illustrative purposes only, do not necessarily reflect investment outcomes that were or would be obtained by any AV fund or investor, and are not available to future investors, except potentially in the case of follow-on investments.  Venture capital investing involves substantial risk, including risk of loss of all capital invested.  Past performance does not guarantee future results.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: BAG Collective
Description: The BAG Collective is a collective of angel investors from top tech companies and startups that invests intellectual, social and financial capital in seed to Series A startups around the world. Our collective believes in and support founders who build ethical, high-growth technology companies.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Mindshift Capital
Description:
Mindshift Capital invests in women-led early-stage tech companies in the Middle East and globally at the post-seed round. Through a global network, Mindshift identifies companies with scalable technology, exceptional leadership and high growth potential. We invest with a gender lens, ensuring diversity of thought while narrowing the funding gap for female-led ventures.

Founders, apply for funding here!  https://gust.com/organizations/mindshift-capital/funding_applications/responses/startups/new
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Eolus Capital
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: ACE Ventures
Description:
WE BACK THE OUTLIERS, THE ONES BOLD ENOUGH TO DEFY THE STATUS QUO.

ACE Ventures backs early-stage founders building enduring companies in climate tech, deep tech, fintech, and software.

We are a team of operators, engineers, and investors deploying capital and expertise to empower and support outliers.

Our commitment goes beyond capital. We get the grind, we get the hustle, we have been there: our engagement extends beyond capital to deliver meaningful support.

We're in it for the revolutionary shifts and lasting impact, not market trends.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Busines
Description: At Down to Earth Systems, we are dedicated to developing sustainable and eco friendly sanitation products. Our innovative products are designed to be clean and green with a focus on a low environmental impact.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Invivo Partners
Description:
Invivo Partners promoted by Albert Ferrer and Luis Pareras, is a management company investing in early stages companies in the healthcare sector. Invivo Partners has a team of highly qualified professionals, with the scientific, technical and financial know-how required to analyse and make investments to provide value to the invested company. It also has a network of contacts and key strategic relationships in the health ecosystem.
 
Invivo Ventures is managed by Invivo Partners, promoted by Luis Pareras and Albert Ferrer, with the experience gained through the first fund Healthequity. The fund was registered to the Comisión Nacional del Mercado de Valores (CNMV) in March 2019 and has achieved a final closing of 60M €.

We are a team of highly qualified professionals, with the scientific, technical and financial know-how required to analyse and make investments to provide value to the invested company. We also have a network of contacts and key strategic relationships in the health ecosystem.

Our company is financed by the European Investment Fund, the Instituto de Crédito Oficial, the Institut Català de Finances, the Institut Valencià de Finances, the Ajuntament de Barcelona and other private investors.

Two successful exits from our first fund in 2022, validating our early-stage investment thesis focused on extraordinary science in leading-edge fields that are to play a role in the future of medicine.

Our portfolio companies from the first fund have raised >220M€ from international VCs.

Our knowledge of the Technology Transfer space plus our ability to identify new market trends and create biotech companies opens the opportunity to become one of the major players in Technology Transfer in Europe.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Laconia
Description: We lead investments in pre-seed and seed stage B2B software companies that transform how business is done. We support founders with the only things that matter in the early days: sales acceleration, operational execution, and capital strategy. Apply for funding here: bit.ly/laconiapitch
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Injaro Investments Limited
Description:
‘Injaro’ derives from Kilimanjaro which in Swahili means ‘Mountain of Greatness’. We believe in the greatness of the African entrepreneurial spirit and in the ability of African entrepreneurs to build successful businesses that make a difference in the lives of the communities in which they operate. We believe that supporting these entrepreneurs with great investments will help create an Africa that future Africans would prefer to inhabit rather than flee.
We work with partners to use business as a force for the good of the planet and its people.
For entrepreneurs with a dream, we work alongside you to refine your vision and to grow your business profitably as a good corporate citizen. 
For investors who care as much for the planet as for profit, we combine international business acumen with deep-rooted local knowledge and hands-on entrepreneurial business experience to deliver profit with a purpose.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Starshot Ventures
Description: Backed by a team of highly successful consumer entrepreneurs and investors, Starshot Ventures is a venture studio and capital firm that strives to grow brands that anticipate and deliver rapidly on consumers’ wants and needs. We invest in and build subversive and energetic brands in wellness, consumer-packaged-goods, and consumer technology.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Voima Ventures
Description:
Voima Ventures helps founders accelerate the growth of deep technology ventures to global markets. We shed light on the ideas and technology that require time and courage to build.

The way we work is simple: we combine science-driven innovation together with the Nordic serial entrepreneurial experience and a global mindset.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: SSE Business Lab
Description:
SSE Business Lab is the startup incubator of the Stockholm School of Economics and the most successful unicorn-creating business accelerator ranked #1 in the Nordics and #8 in Europe. 

Since 2001, SSE Business Lab has supported 350+ companies, including well-known successes like Klarna, Budbee and Voi.

Through coaching, mentorship, workshops, and access to a first-class network of investors, SSE Business Lab helps startups develop their ideas, accelerate their growth, and create impact. The incubator provides access to a wide variety of partner offers from organizations like Scrive, PE Accounting, and Grosshandelssocieteten as part of Stockholms Borgerskap.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: ReGen Ventures
Description:
ReGen Ventures invests in regenerative technology companies created by wildly ambitious teams who want to radically transform our world for the better.
  
Regenerative technology is inspired by nature, complementary to people and actively addresses the most compelling challenges of our lifetimes – the health of people and our planet. 

The most valuable companies of the future will be led by insanely talented and committed teams who are harnessing regenerative solutions to our greatest challenges. 

Supercharged by a powerful convergence of macro megatrends and a unique approach to developing teams, ReGen Ventures will deliver exponential outcomes (both returns and impacts), with less risk than traditional VC .
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Asia Strategic Holdings
Description:
Asia Strategic Holdings ("Asia Strategic") is a leading developer and operator of a portfolio of consumer-focused businesses that offers investors exposure to emerging Asia, mainly Vietnam and Myanmar. Asia Strategic is listed in the London Stock Exchange as ASIA.

Operating in Myanmar since its economy re-opened in 2013, we are one of the first professional players with an established investment track record as well as a fully operational team on the ground. Our contrarian investment philosophy, hands-on approach and deep local knowledge set us apart from other players in the market.

At MSH, we apply our strengths as a leading Myanmar-focused firm to deliver solutions, unlock value and accelerate growth.  Our capital fuels the development of businesses and communities.  Our strategic advice helps businesses plan for the future and unlock their potential. We build and invest in businesses and entrepreneurs with strong teams and bright futures.

MSH’s focus to date has been on opportunities relating to the Education (Brands: Wall Street English, Auston College, Auston University and Yangon American International School), Services (Brands: EXERA) and Hospitality (Brands: Ostello Bello). The Group has headquarters in Singapore, Yangon and Ho Chi Minh and employs over 2,000 people).

Through our Board, leadership team, external consultants, advisors and partners, we are able to leverage a global network of experienced professionals across different sectors and markets.

Intellectual capital and entrepreneurial zeal are critical to providing innovative solutions.  We are committed to building and maintaining a first-in-class team with a creative culture that encourages outside-the-box thinking.  Our people are our most valuable assets and we will continue to invest in them and their development.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Capvis AG
Description:
Capvis is a leading entrepreneurial mid-market investor in Europe creating global niche market leaders in Advanced Services & Software, Industrial Technology, and Healthcare. Formed in 1990, Capvis has developed into a leading private equity advisor in the heart of Europe focusing on the Innovation Corridor of Europe (Switzerland, Germany, Austria, northern Italy, Liechtenstein, Luxembourg) and specialising in control investments in innovation-driven and technology-enabled companies operating in these attractive economies and sectors. The firm focuses on primary investments, in particular successions, partnerships and spin-offs, and aims to support management teams in unleashing entrepreneurial potential and achieving new levels of excellence.
 
For over 30 years, Capvis has been an active investor in the private equity market, with a process-orientated and consistent approach to investing. Capvis has generated strong and consistent returns across many market cycles, having advised 60+ transactions with a total investment capital of more than EUR 4.0 billion and having floated 10 companies on stock exchanges in Europe. 
 
Capvis is an established organisation with a current team of 40+ people. The firm has repeatedly been voted Switzerland’s best private equity firm by the international financial press and been awarded “Best Place to Work” by GPTW.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: OneRagtime
Description:
OneRagtime is a venture capital fund founded by Stéphanie Hospital and Jean-Marie Messier. Since 2017, OneRagtime has sourced, financed, and scaled +50 startups. 

Through its unique platform model, OneRagtime enables its community to invest in the most promising French and Europe-based startups, be it through its funds or via its dedicated club deals, simultaneously offering entrepreneurs an unparalleled network and business acceleration support.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: OpenOcean
Description:
OpenOcean is a pan-European early-stage Venture Capital investor with offices in Helsinki and London. Our investment strategy focuses on leading or co-leading Seed and Series A investments with initial ticket sizes up to €5m in European B2B software companies driving the data economy.

Our founding team members include key persons behind MySQL AB (sold to Sun Microsystems Inc. for $1 Billion in 2008), after which the team jointly built category leader MariaDB Corporation Ab, as well as forming and managing OpenOcean.

OpenOcean's DNA is rooted in having a deep understanding of the underlying technology and software stacks, which drive the growth of innovative new digital platforms and services. Our strong technical background and expertise allows us to identify and invest in the next game-changing and category winning start-ups at the early-stages, whose unique solutions can be rapidly scaled and adopted globally.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: FIRSTPICK
Description:
FIRSTPICK is a first-check VC fund backing Baltic founders at inception and pre-seed.

We’re a generalist early-stage fund with a strong focus on AI, SaaS, and Fintech. We write first checks of €100K-€500K and back our founders with follow-on capital up to €1M.

We provide capital plus real support from day one. FIRSTPICK combines investment with know-how through its platform - a strong 250+ founder community, experienced operators, and hard-earned playbooks. We work side by side with founders from idea to early growth.

FIRSTPICK is backed by private investors, the founding team, and the Lithuanian state-financed ILTE fund, as part of Accelerator 2, funded by the European Union NextGenerationEU.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: ETF Partners - The Environmental Technologies Fund
Description:
Founded in 2005, ETF Partners (The Environmental Technologies Fund) stands as Europe's original venture capital firm dedicated to sustainability and impact investing. For nearly twenty years we have established a leading position in promoting sustainability through innovation. ETF Partners is founded on the conviction that entrepreneurship and innovation are critical in addressing the global challenges presented by the climate crisis. We are committed to fostering and supporting Europe’s ecosystem of pioneering entrepreneurs who are creating the innovative solutions capable of making a profound environmental impact. We believe in the transformative power of aligning profit with purpose in order to build a more sustainable future. 

For additional information about our investment thesis and approach, please visit our website at https://etfpartners.capital.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Clean Growth Fund
Description:
CGF invest in tech innovations that reduce greenhouse gas emissions or improve resource efficiency across power, transport, industry, buildings, waste and water. 
We look for UK early stage companies with commercially viable solutions that are generating early revenues and also consider pre-revenue businesses with a minimum viable product.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: ACRE
Description:
ACRE is a vertically integrated real estate fund manager focused on U.S. residential housing strategies with both credit and equity capabilities.
The firm has executed more than $8.0 billion in transactions across 200+ investments, establishing a proven track record across multiple market cycles. 
ACRE manages dedicated equity and credit vehicles that target multifamily and single-family rental housing, deploying capital through discretionary funds and specialized teams across direct lending, acquisitions, and development. 
The firm is headquartered in New York with additional offices in Miami, Atlanta, and Singapore.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: KRING
Description:
KRING is a venture studio and fund that builds and invests in startups tackling complex challenges in health, wellbeing, and sustainable energy.

We focus on pre-seed and idea-stage ventures, where bold thinking meets the right support to grow.

We co-create ventures from the ground up, infusing AI into product building, market validation, go-to-market, and growth.

As founder or a team, you get access to KRING’s toolbox, AI plays, and playbooks for every stage, from building and scaling your venture to long after launch.

Our team works side-by-side with founders and corporates on strategy, product, brand, recruitment, and operations, while bringing the capital, network, and investor readiness to unlock funding and scale.

If you’re a founder or building a startup, let’s turn it into a business that lasts.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: JC2 Ventures
Description:
JC2 Ventures is a purpose-driven venture firm helping global startups scale, grow, and create inclusive jobs for the digital future. 

Startups are the future in terms of job creation and gender equality, and as such, we invest in companies and entrepreneurs that are committed to solving today's most pressing problems - such as security and world hunger.

“In teaming with strategic, visionary startups, we hope to create new markets, new jobs, and new possibilities for generations to come.” - John Chambers

Learn more at www.jc2ventures.com
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: GROW
Description:
GROW is an ecosystem catalyst established to advance innovation, sustainability, and resilience in the agrifood system. 

We’re on a mission to inspire and accelerate extraordinary founders who are developing technology solutions that deliver positive impact for people, place, and planet. Through our fund and accelerator programmes we work with startups to supercharge their growth on the global stage. 

GROW is backed by AgFunder – a leading venture investor in the agrifoodtech sector – and supported by Enterprise Singapore, a government agency advancing the country's small and medium businesses.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: InnoBAN | Business Angels Network
Description:
InnoBAN is a Business Angels Network that facilitates the meeting between #entrepreneurs and #businessangels with the mission of stimulating sustainable economic growth and employment.
* Do you have a project and are you looking for investors? Submit your project: https://share.hsforms.com/1IHM-XGoURvS6KcWt4NxIhw16vvn
* Are you looking for projects to invest? Apply for membership as Business Angel https://share.hsforms.com/1SflHPyJRRsCFJx9YrGYzLA16vvn
* Would you like to establish an InnoBAN node in your region? https://share.hsforms.com/10jK0_NviTtaNwDlEF89lFQ16vvn

Send your Project! We look for startups with innovative projects in the initial stages, scalable and with high growth potential. We do not charge membership fees. Initiation of your project through this simple form: https://share.hsforms.com/1IHM-XGoURvS6KcWt4NxIhw16vvn 

InnoBAN has a review process, performance rules and a code of conduct. InnoBAN works throughout Spain and is currently present in Madrid, Catalonia, Galicia, Extremadura, Illes Balears, Andalucía and Comunidad Valenciana and La Rioja. InnoBAN is a member of EBAN, the main European association of Business Angels Networks.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Global HealthX
Description:
Global Health X (GHX) is a venture studio, accelerator and a fund operating at the intersection of Healthcare, Life Sciences and Technology, serving as the Innovation and R&D arm of the Global Institute for Research & Innovation (GIRI).

Based in Hyderabad, India, GHX integrates technology, capital and expertise to make care more accessible and affordable across the globe.

GHX is on a mission to create the largest innovation hub, fostering collaboration and driving breakthroughs to transform healthcare and improve patient outcomes.

We actively collaborate and work with subject matter experts, industry veterans, and startup ecosystems across the globe.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Vauban from Carta
Description: Launch & run your venture firm online.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: HYCAP
Description:
HYCAP is a global investment firm leading the energy transition through strategic investments across Private Equity, Technology, and Infrastructure. 
 
Founded by green entrepreneur Jo Bamford in 2021, HYCAP have offices in London, Oxford, and Abu Dhabi. 

Our Mission: To accelerate the energy transition through strategic investments that deliver both environmental impact and attractive returns while creating sustainable employment opportunities across our markets.

Investment Focus includes: 

Clean Transport: Backing Europe's fastest-growing zero-emission vehicle manufacturers 

Renewable Energy: Developing 4.5 GW wind and solar facilities 

Clean Technology: Advancing production facilities and infrastructure worldwide 

Innovative Financing: Making sustainable transport adoption accessible through fintech solutions

Our portfolio companies are delivering measurable results: 

 Supporting thousands of green jobs across UK and Europe 

 Accelerating zero-emission fleet deployments 

 Developing gigawatt-scale renewable energy projects 

 Establishing vital clean energy infrastructure

Strategic Approach: Our investments create powerful synergies across the value chain, connecting clean energy producers with end-users, integrating transport solutions with infrastructure development, and combining innovative financing with clean technology deployment.

Global Alignment: Our investments support broader climate initiatives including the Paris Agreement, UNFCC, and UK Government's Ten Point Plan, while creating lasting economic value and sustainable employment opportunities.

Innovation in Action: From landmark transport deals to pioneering energy projects, our portfolio companies are setting new industry standards. 

Recent achievements include over 1,000 zero-emission vehicles contracted, multiple large-scale renewable facilities under development, and a fintech platform supporting the finance of 4,500+ clean vehicles.

Connect to learn more.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Exponential
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Kerten
Description: Kerten is a low profile private investment group, which operates using a Private Equity model. Kerten invests in and develops portfolio companies into best-in-class businesses, which provide customers with unique value and service.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Earth Venture Capital
Description: Earth VC is a global climate tech venture capital firm dedicated to backing earth-changing deep tech startups that are key to decarbonizing Emerging Asia. Earth VC was born from a shared belief that science and economics are our best solutions to fix the planet. Our bold vision is to foster a new era of investment that prioritizes protecting and preserving our planet over endless growth. Earth VC provides holistic support, from market bridging to Asia to key hirings and strategic fundraising guidance, ensuring that game-changing innovations get the backing they need to thrive. With a hands-on approach and a mission to decarbonize through breakthrough technologies, Earth VC is at the forefront of solving the climate crisis and driving sustainable progress in the Asia-Pacific region.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals
Location: Thu Duc City, Ho Chi Minh City

Name: Helion Ventures
Description:
Helion Ventures Partners is a $605 Million India-focused, early to mid-stage venture fund, investing in technology-powered and consumer service businesses in sectors like Outsourcing, Internet, Mobile, Technology Products, Retail Services, Healthcare, Education and Financial Services.

Our mission is “Partnering with entrepreneurs to build world-class companies”.

We believe that companies are fundamentally built from inside, but as Board members we play an active role. Typically we help companies in making strategic choices and in building an organization that can execute on strategy. We have access to world-class executives that we can bring to our portfolio companies. We also help in building a high quality Board of Directors / Advisors.

We also team with the management and provide operational value add in the area of finance, HR, technology, marketing and operations.

In helping manage rapid growth, we participate in future rounds of financing in syndication with other venture partners. Our prior experience in M&A is also available to entrepreneurs in driving inorganic growth.

Most of all, we act as a sounding board to the CEOs as they navigate challenges of building world-class organizations.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Open Opportunity Fund
Description: Open Opportunity Fund is a technology venture capital firm focused on investing in software companies founded by outstanding overlooked founders. Open Opportunity Fund's portfolio spans B2B SaaS, enterprise IT, artificial intelligence, fintech, and health tech. Opportunity Fund 1 is a $100 million fund with SoftBank as an anchor LP. The firm has invested in 75 tech companies including Atomic, Brex, Cityblock Health, Eight Sleep, Esusu, Lumu, Paystand, QuickNode, Squire, and Subject. The fund has achieved seven portfolio company exits. In 2023, the team led by Paul Judge and Marcelo Claure acquired the Fund from SoftBank and announced Fund 2 to continue to execute the thesis.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Propeller
Description: Propeller is a venture fund investing at the ocean-climate nexus. Founded in 2022, Propeller Fund I is $118M, focused on startups from Pre-seed to Series A, with 23 investments to date in early stage companies working across infrastructure, maritime, energy, food, data, robotics, marine carbon dioxide removal and more. Based in Boston, but investing globally, Propeller’s partners are all former entrepreneurs, with a deep network across ocean and climate science and industries. To learn more about Propeller and see our portfolio, please visit us at https://propellervc.com.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Aster Capital
Description: Aster is a Climate Tech VC with two decades of experience, specialized in hard-to-abate sectors. We invest in sectors including energy, logistics, mobility, manufacturing, building, chemicals, agriculture and more.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Gemspring Capital
Description: Gemspring Capital, a Westport, Connecticut-based private equity firm with $5.1 billion of capital under management, provides flexible capital solutions to middle market companies. Gemspring partners with talented management teams and takes a partnership approach to helping drive revenue growth, value creation and sustainable competitive advantages. Target companies have up to $2.0 billion in revenue and are in the business services, consumer services, financial and insurance services, healthcare, industrial, software, and tech-enabled services sectors. For more information, visit www.gemspring.com.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Bin Butti International Holdings
Description:
BBIH is a holding company and private equity investor with global ambitions tied to local roots. BBIH’s diverse investment portfolio offers facilities management, catering, contracting, manpower supply and environmental services across the GCC. Currently employing 10,000 people, BBIH was founded by prominent entrepreneurial businessmen – a background which gives BBIH intricate knowledge of local markets and capabilities expanding into the wider GCC region.

BBIH cultivates business success that supports Abu Dhabi’s vision to become a global capital city following the entrepreneurial spirit and social responsibility of the UAE’s leadership. BBIH believes that economic success, national prosperity and corporate social responsibility are entirely interlinked and mandates adherence to best practices, ethical operations and employee welfare in all the businesses they invest in.

With state-of -the-art assets, international certifications and a sensitivity to global impact, BBIH is proving that sustainability is indeed a key component to commercial success. BBIH is committed to the prosperity and sustainable development of the UAE.

Over the last few years, BBIH’s operations have expanding rapidly and earned a market leadership position across strategic industry sectors across the region.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Bright Pixel Capital
Description:
Former Sonae IM, Bright Pixel Capital is a venture capital company with a global aim, financially driven and oriented to make businesses prosper. We have the power of transformational change across our DNA sectors: Cybersecurity, Retail Technologies, Digital Infrastructure and Emerging Technologies.

Envisioned as the tech investment arm of Sonae Group, a Portuguese multinational with a diversified portfolio of innovative brands, Bright Pixel Capital has invested over 250M€ in the first 5 years in more than 50 direct investments, and will continue this path using our expertise to spot unique opportunities with the potential to change an industry.

Working with Bright Pixel Capital means accessing a group of dedicated and experienced professionals, with incomparable knowledge of each investment vertical.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: L'ATTITUDE VENTURES
Description:
L’ATTITUDE Ventures is a $100 million venture fund dedicated to investing in early-stage (pre-seed to Series A) U.S. Latina/o entrepreneurs. To date, we have invested in 38 companies spread across 12 major U.S. cities, with over 40% of our portfolio companies being led by Latinas. U.S. Latinos represent the most entrepreneurial and significant growth cohort in the country, accounting for one in every four new entrepreneurs and 27% of net GDP growth.

L’ATTITUDE Ventures helps to identify and foster these entrepreneurs by providing early investment, substantial capital, and access to an unparalleled network of global expertise and relationships. This includes the insights and experience of two former Fortune 200 CEOs: Oscar Munoz, former CEO of United Airlines, and Sol Trujillo, former CEO of Telstra, as well as Gary Acosta, CEO of NAHREP; Laura Moreno Lucas, former Managing Director at Nasdaq; and Pete Amaro, formerly of The Raine Group.

By leading investment rounds, securing board representation, and highlighting Latina/o entrepreneurial innovation, L’ATTITUDE Ventures is transforming the landscape for Latino entrepreneurs.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: BACK to WORK 24
Description:
BacktoWork24 is a young company, founded in 2012. Yet in just over a year it has achieved quite astonishing growth, due primarily to the quality of the services that it offers. 

These services are broken down into a couple of distinct areas. Firstly, Back to Work helps business owners who are looking to expand, but who are held back from their desired expansion plans, by not having current access to the resources required. We analyse the market place in which they are based, we perform all relevant research, and create the complex documentation which is required for them to successfully pursue financing. Ultimately, this service allows companies to successfully expand, often Internationally.

We also help Investors and Managers, people who are looking to invest in companies which offer them the real possibility of a rewarding return on their invested capital. We carefully select a handful of businesses of potential interest, for the specific investor. Having carefully analysed every single company which registers with us, we are in a position to give investors an honest and accurate illustration of the true state of each business in which they are interested.

BacktoWork24 also works with a major Italian bank, and are able (where required) to considerably increase the sum available for investment, in a manner which provides low rates and is fully guaranteed against loss.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Bullish
Description: Bullish blends capital, consulting and creation to design the most remarkable businesses in the world.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Credo Ventures
Description:
We partner with outstanding technology founders from Central & Eastern Europe to help them realize their global ambitions - from early conviction to global scale.

Since 2010, Credo Ventures has invested behind the belief that CEE - and its diaspora - produces world-class technical talent and ambitious builders. We’ve partnered with teams including ElevenLabs, UiPath, Productboard, Pricefx, Kontakt, Equilibre, and many more.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Foundamental
Description:
Early investors in Infra.Market, Enter, Permitflow, Tazapay, Speckle, Snaptrude, Wiz Freight.

Foundamental partners with the most ambitious builders from day zero. Our minds are locked on our search for those who build the next 100 legendary technology companies in the real world.

We search for vertical singularities often overlooked by others, spending 365 days a year dedicated to 3D design, construction, blue-collar workforce, robotics, supply chains, logistics, and opportunistically, industrial manufacturing and aerospace. 

Our expertise comes from our team's diverse background across technology, venture, and industrial operations, including prior successes with Spotify, Uber, Lyft, Zetwerk and more. Across the Foundamental portfolio, we had the privilege to build alongside daring category creators such as Infra.Market, Enter, Speckle, Snaptrude, Tazapay and SafeAI.

We aspire to be the earliest partner, leading pre-seed, seed and Series-A rounds globally, and by principle reserving more than 50% of each fund for follow-ons. We put in the work outside of board meetings, leveraging our deep understanding and unique convictions to help founders navigate adversity in the critical early years. 

We are building the preeminent vertical technology investment firm for the real world, one legendary company at a time.

1. Strategic Investments and funding for Deep Technology aided by MTDC Investments
2. Provisioning of local solutions related to industry 4.0 through the Centre of 9 Pillars ( Co9P)
3. Providing capacity building in technical and social competencies from Technopreneur Training Academy (TENTRA)
4. Offering a conducive environment to elevate technology-based companies at MTDC’s Technology Centres
5. Nurturing, handholding and expediting the growth of technology-based companies guided by Business and Technology Advisory Services

Positioning itself as a strategic investor and Deep Technology venture builder, MTDC is the catalyst for technology development and in bringing innovations to market. Successful technology ventures will be the main contributors to Malaysia’s economic development and wealth creation. MTDC is always willing and able to assist all sectors of the community in maximising their opportunities in relation to Malaysia's technology advancement.

Name: Taibah Valley
Description:
بدأت جامعة طيبة جهودها التنموية في عام 2018 من خلال تأسيس “شركة وادي طيبة" التابعــــة للجامعـــة التـــي تهدف إلى تنمية استثماراتها في عدة مجالات وفقاً للرؤية (2030) وبرنامج التحول الرقمي.


* رؤيتنا 
  “رواد الاستثمار القائم على المعرفة”
  
*رسالتنا
  “تطويـــــر فــــرص استثماريـــــة فاعلـــــة ومستدامة وتوظيف المزايا التنافسية لتعزيز مصالح المساهمين ودعم الاقتصاد الوطني”

*قيمنا 
     التشاركية نشجع تنوع الأفكار والآراء، كما نطور الشراكات التي تأتي بفوائد متبادلة للجميع.

     الالتزام نلتزم بوعودنا لجميع أصحاب المصلحة وفق أعلى مستويات الأداء والتحسين المستمر.

     الابتكار نعمل على الابتكار المستمر والممنهج من خلال الاستفادة من إبداعات أصحاب المصلحة.

     التميز نأخذ بزمام المبادرة لنتخطى التوقعات، نحن نهتم بما نقوم به لأعلى مستويات الجودة والقيمة.

    الاستدامة نسعى لتحقيق نتائج متميزة ومستدامة تلبي وتتجاوز احتياجات أصحاب المصلحة على المدى القصير والطويل.

 
*أهدافنا 
  تعظيم العائد  للمستثمرين والمساهمين.

 بناء بيئة عمل داخلية محفزة لاستقطاب الكفاءات المتميزة والمحافظة عليها.

 رفع مستوى الولاء لدى عملاء الشركة.

 تطوير منتجات مبتكرة تواكب احتياجات السوق المتغيرة.

رفع كفاءة أداء الشركة ودعم مركزها المالي.

 المساهمة في توطين التقنية بما يخدم الاقتصاد الوطني.

Name: Endeit Capital
Description:
Endeit Capital is a growth capital firm fueling internationalization and innovation. We’re a €300M European-first institutional VC, born from scaling and exiting Endemol for $6B. Did you know we have been boosting European tech scale-ups for almost two decades?

Why do we do it?

In Amsterdam, our journey as a European scale-up investor began in 2006. Now, with three offices across Europe and backed by 72 entrepreneurs, we are proud of our portfolio.

Visionary entrepreneurs

In the canvas of innovation, the belief in the power of technology drives us forward. Through the landscapes of AI, machine learning, deep learning, and algorithms, we embark on a mission of intelligent empowerment. It’s a commitment to visionary entrepreneurs who are the architects of the future.  We’re proud to support entrepreneurs shaping the future. Our Buy&Build strategy effectiveness is underscored by 40 add-on acquisitions across 22 countries.

European focus 

Rooted in Germany, the Netherlands, and Sweden, we catalyze change across Europe with our latest €300M+ fund. But it’s not all about the numbers. Together with a team of international colleagues, we celebrate personal connections. Entrepreneurs return for a second act; portfolio innovators join us as limited partners and former employees find their way back to contribute. 

Segments

With AI as the overall denominator, we focus on Future of Work, SalesTech, Supply Chain & Procurement, FinTech and ClimateTech. 
 
Join us on a journey into the heart of innovation, where purposeful investment isn’t just a concept—it’s the force that shapes a brighter, more empowered future for all.

Our collaborative mentorship approach and strategic financing supports entrepreneurs through various stages of early growth.  Our investments often represent the bridge between the self-financed  or seed stage and the venture capital and/or private equity level of funding.

Nous investissons jusqu’à 50 M€ en fonds propres et quasi-fonds propres, notamment lors d’opérations de capital-risque (seed et série A), de réorganisation du capital (MBO, OBO, MBI…) ou de capital-développement.

Notre plateforme s’articule autour de trois pôles complémentaires, conçus pour répondre aux besoins des entreprises à chaque étape clé :

Pôle “Venture Capital à impact” : Gaia Impact et Ternel

Pôle “Buy-Out & Growth Capital” : Edelweiss, Cairn et K2 Business Club

Pôle “Fonds de fonds & co-investissement” : Bluester Capital

Ce qui nous anime : créer des relations exigeantes et simples, soutenir des dirigeants ambitieux, et apporter du capital, des idées et de l’énergie pour construire des histoires qui durent.
Financée par une communauté de plus de 500 entrepreneurs, nous sommes soutenus par le plus grand club d'investisseurs entrepreneurs de France avec qui nous entretenons une relation de proximité et de transparence. 

Plus d’informations : www.capitalcroissance.fr

Description:

LLCP utilizes a differentiated Structured Private Equity investment strategy, combining debt and equity capital investments in portfolio companies. LLCP believes that by investing in a combination of debt and equity securities, it offers management teams growth capital in a highly tailored, flexible investment structure that can be a more attractive alternative than traditional private equity.

LLCP’s global team of dedicated investment professionals is led by 9 partners who have worked at LLCP for an average of 20 years. Since inception, LLCP and its affiliates have managed approximately $18.3 billion of capital across nearly 20 investment funds and invested in approximately 120 portfolio companies. LLCP currently manages $12.6 billion of assets and has offices in Los Angeles, New York, Chicago, Miami, London, Stockholm, Amsterdam and Frankfurt.

Cycle Capital is the founder of Cycle Momentum Accelerator + Innovation Engine and co-manager of The Circular Innovation Fund ("CIF"), a global venture capital fund aimed at scaling growth stage circular innovations and business models across various sectors. Cycle Capital has developed an ESG and impact assessment methodology integrated into the investment workflow from the pre-investment phase to the exit of the portfolio company.

Name: DVx Ventures
Description:
We follow a repeatable process — defining a hypothesis, researching and testing it vigorously, assembling the world class team to build a product, iterating the solution to find product-market and go-to-market fit, and then hatching and scaling breakthrough businesses. We build companies primarily based on our own ideas and with our infrastructure and initial teams.  As such, we can grow businesses faster and have a much higher success rate.

We’ll Get There by… 

Obsessing over our customers — 
We build insanely great products that make our customers’ lives better. We provide a perfect customer experience - every time. We build diverse teams to ensure our products and services reflect the perspectives, experiences, and needs of all our potential customers.

Empowering our team of Experts — 
We attract best-in-class talent across a variety of disciplines, that share our mission, motivation, and sense of purpose, to form great teams. We give each other high trust and high agency. We speak directly to each other and are grateful for feedback. We are dynamic is how we place talent into new challenges and evolving opportunities across the portfolio. We will build a positive, motivating, high-performance culture.

Leading with a bias for Impact — 
We solve challenging problems at unprecedented speed. If we can’t find a way, we make a way and battle through, around and over obstacles. Our immediate reaction is to help and we default to “yes”.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Description:
LUMO Labs is an impact-driven multi-stage (pre-seed through series A) venture capital fund with  coaching program for founding teams. of ventures focused on AI/Data, Blockchain,  IoT, VR/AR, and/or Digital Security.

We believe these emerging technologies hold the key to solving the social challenges people face today. At LUMO Labs, we focus on sustainable cities and communities, health & Well being, Quality Education, and Climate Action.

We create opportunities for people and emerging technologies by connecting impact-driven groundbreaking start-ups to our funds, our expertise, our network and each other.

LUMO Labs Eindhoven (the Netherlands) is situated in the heart of the Brainport region where high-tech and design go hand in hand with high-quality manufacturing and entrepreneurship. Collaboration and knowledge-sharing are part of this regions DNA. It is the region where Open Innovation started. Philips Electronics has its origin in the city of Eindhoven.

LUMO Labs Los Angeles (United States) is located in Silicon Beach, a booming technology region on the US West Coast. It is home to over 500 tech start-ups, and major technology companies have opened offices in the region. Opposite to Silicon Valley, the L.A. Silicon Beach has a more diversity of industries besides technology. This is in alignment with LUMO Labs multi disciplinary approach.

Description:
Celesta Capital is a global deep tech venture capital firm, investing in brilliance at the forefront of science and engineering.

Celesta primarily invests in early-stage infrastructure technologies throughout the stack. From semiconductors and systems to breakthrough biology, we seek out the physics‑defying, code‑rewriting breakthroughs that will power the next decade of technology advancement.

Celesta was founded and is led by Nicholas Brathwaite, Sriram Viswanathan, Michael Marks, and Lip-Bu Tan, technology industry veterans with decades of investment and operations experience as CEOs, senior management, and board directors at global organizations, including Flex, Intel, Cadence, and others.

Celesta prides ourselves on being operators in the ring alongside founders – not just on the cap table. With a team of seasoned company builders, we leverage our unique scaling experience, repeatable playbooks, and partner networks to help turn prototypes into powerhouses. 

Deep tech breakthroughs are borderless and Celesta works with entrepreneurs in emerging tech hubs across the globe. We are an active cross‑border investor, bridging SiliconValley with India, Canada, Israel, and other markets to build generational global companies.

Three Hills has EUR c.3 billion of assets under management, with backing from Europe’s leading industrial holding groups, family offices and entrepreneurs, as well as global institutional investors. With offices in London, Milan, New York and Luxembourg, Three Hills operates with a growing team of around 65 professionals.

For more information visit www.threehills.com

Certified B Corporation

Professional investors only. Capital at risk.

Originally inspired by Adi Dassler and the entrepreneurial spirit he embodied, LEAD launched in Berlin in 2017. We were founded with the belief that greater investment in sports technology was on the horizon, so we built an academy to accelerate early-stage start-ups in the space. LEAD soon grew beyond an accelerator, becoming a collective of investors, advisors, and innovators who expanded their focus upon recognizing that the line between sports and health was blurring. 

Today, LEAD is a venture corporation with 70+ portfolio companies, $120 million in assets under management, and a strategic advisory arm supporting global organizations.

Each funded FundersClub startup benefits from the capital, the advice, and the professional networks of its associated venture fund, and are spared from the overhead of interfacing with a crowd of investors by receiving capital in a traditional venture capital fund format. Investors benefit from greater access to private investment opportunities, a more convenient investment process and the ability to diversify with relatively small amounts of capital. 

Backed by Y Combinator, First Round Capital, Spark Capital, Intel Capital, Draper, Andreessen Horowitz, Felicis Ventures, and more.

PitchBook ranks MVP Top 5 US, Top 10 Global Secondary Investor by transaction volume.
