Managing $1.5B AUM, we deliver top-decile returns 3x faster than traditional VC funds with 2.2x average net DPI in under 4-year hold periods versus industry 13+ years.

Our track record: 18 IPOs, 6 strategic sales including Coinbase, Palantir, Spotify, Lyft, Airbnb, DraftKings, Postmates, DocuSign, and Pinterest. Current portfolio spans AI/ML leaders (Anthropic, Figure AI, Groq, xAI), transformative technology (Epic Games, SpaceX, Klarna, Revolut), and category-defining companies across robotics, defense tech, fintech, and space technology.

Limited partners including pension funds, family offices, and sovereign wealth funds trust MVP to identify high-growth, disruptive businesses at pivotal inflection points. We solve the liquidity problem for late-stage companies stuck in the “private market trap” while connecting institutional capital with tomorrow’s IPOs today.

Manhattan Venture Research delivers institutional-grade analysis of private companies with 16,000+ subscribers on Bloomberg terminals globally. Our pioneering research on private tech giants became the industry gold standard, guiding institutional investors worldwide.

MVP’s integrated platform combines primary investments, secondary market innovation, and deep industry relationships to spot opportunities others overlook and execute with precision. Currently investing from MVP All-Star Fund V.

Building liquidity infrastructure for private markets, one company at a time.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Norrsken22
Description: Norrsken22 is a technology growth fund, backed by over 30 prominent unicorn founders, partnering with exceptional entrepreneurs building Africa’s next tech giants.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: FountainVest
Description:
FountainVest is one of the most established independent private equity firms in Asia. The capital under management comes from some of the world’s largest and most established institutions. FountainVest seeks to invest in industry leaders and emerging leaders with a strong track record delivering high growth.

FountainVest has a stellar reputation in the market for pioneering highly innovative and landmark transactions including one of China's first LBOs in the privatization of Focus Media.   Other portfolio companies include IMAX, Peacebird, Key Safety Systems, Meituan-Dianping, Zhaopin, Trendy,  WME-IMG China, Guazi, LaoBaiXing, Pure Fitness, Amer Sports, Rokin Ligistics, Langdi Pharmaceutical and Ziwi Pet Food.

The Firm has a highly focused sector-based investment approach, generating deep knowledge verticals in sub-sectors of focus, creating sector-based ecosystems, while leveraging its excellent market reputation, networks, and know-how built up over a decade as an independent, institutional private equity firm.    Additionally, FountainVest emphasizes a hands-on approach to creating value in its portfolio company through the capabilities of its operational team and advisory platforms. 

FountainVest has also an excellent track record of being a cycle-tested manager delivering performance and liquidity across various market cycles while having clear, systematic, and institutional processes that enhances its risk management capabilities.

Environmental, social, and corporate governance are also key aspects of FountainVest's institutional approach in investing and building champions.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Fortissimo Capital
Description:
Fortissimo Capital is a leading private equity fund in Israel with $2.7 billion under management. Founded in 2004, our unique, proactive approach to private equity investments empowers us to think out of the box to achieve the seemingly impossible, and build long-term, sustainable growth.

We provide capital in special situations, buyouts, and growth capital opportunities to facilitate expansion. We seek investment opportunities in companies that are positioned to grow, improve, and gain market leadership.

We believe that honesty, trust, respect, transparency, and collaboration are crucial ingredients for success at Fortissimo as well as at our portfolio companies.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Bramble Partners
Description:
Our mission is to build a thriving food system that generates prosperity, restores the environment, and provides nourishing food for everyone.

We believe that the value in the food system of the future will be captured by businesses that share this mission.

There are two businesses within Bramble Partners - Investments & Intelligence.

Bramble Investments: We use our proprietary insight and evidence to help leaders spot opportunities, avoid risks, and capture value as the food system changes.

Bramble Investments: We target the most ambitious food system innovators across the UK and Europe, typically deploying £1million – £5million per initial investment.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: easyGroup, creator and owner of the easy family of brands, Europe's most famous value brand
Description:
Companies trading under the easy family of brands join one of Europe's most recognised brands – rubbing shoulders with easyJet, easyHotel, easyGym and many more. 

This is the result of the strategic decision made during the easyJet flotation that retained ownership of the ‘easy’ brand, (including easyJet) in Sir Stelios Haji-Ioannou’s private investment vehicle, easyGroup, which now enjoys a steady and predictable income from licensing the easy brand in return for a royalty based on turnover.
 
easyGroup has gone on to grow successfull businesses in different sectors, including aviation, financial services, health and fitness, travel & tourism. And Sir Stelios continues to take a personal interest in looking for carefully selected business partners with whom to extend the easy brand so as to increase its presence across more business sectors and include easyBus, easyCar, easyCoffee, easyHire, easyStorage, with many more in the pipeline. All are dedicated offering consumers more value for less cash.

easyGroup excels in combining skills, knowledge, and operational expertise from a range of budding entrepreneurs to build exciting and successful companies that are free to leverage skills from one business to another while  running their own affairs.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Littlejohn & Co
Description:
Since 1996, Littlejohn & Co. has invested in middle market companies across the capital structure. Our flexibility and creativity provide our business partners with attractive equity and debt solutions across economic cycles, including “good-to-great” buyouts, corporate carveouts, operational turnarounds, distressed securities, structured capital, and performing credit. Our integrated approach across these strategies creates long-term value and builds sustainable success for our portfolio companies through a disciplined and active approach to engineering change.

Littlejohn utilizes its unique culture and complementary capabilities to make transformative equity and debt investments in a broad range of middle market companies. We complement this effort through our investments in the performing credit of corporate borrowers. The companies we invest in are all facing the opportunities and challenges of significant change, and we partner with management to transform these businesses.

With over $8 Billion of assets under management, Littlejohn is a private equity and special situations investor with a long track record of successfully building value in middle market companies.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: SeaAhead
Description: SeaAhead is a Public Benefit Corporation with the mission of supporting new venture development at the intersection of innovation + sustainability + the oceans. Our ecosystem includes technologists, scientists, startups, corporations, governments and other ocean stakeholders that are coming together to create impact in areas including greener shipping and ports, aquaculture and fishery processes, offshore alternative energy and smart cities.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: TPH Group
Description: TPH Capital is a diversified Private Equity Firm based in New York City, overseeing a portfolio of wholly-owned and co-owned companies across various technology sectors. Our portfolio encompasses businesses with employee sizes ranging from 40 to 500, operating on a global scale. These companies span a wide array of industries, including Direct-to-Consumer and B2B SaaS, demonstrating our commitment to innovation and growth in the tech space. Notable companies within our portfolio include PraxisEMR, Holafly, MapVX, FullFlld, and Orchid Black, among others.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: GREENPEAK Partners
Description:
GREENPEAK Partners, headquartered in Munich, has been a service company builder and alternative asset operator for nearly a decade.
We realize potential value in private markets by financing and developing great services companies, close to businesses, real estate or essential infrastructure.
Our successful history allows us to build up synergistic operating structures and platforms in new markets in very short time.
GREENPEAK Partners believes in strong value culture, environmental impact investing and fair incentivisation of its key employees to offer long-term returns to its investors.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Mountain Partners
Description:
Mountain Partners is a global multi-fund manager. It acts as a global holding company for a diversified investment portfolio and a global network of VC funds that spans three continents. Founded in 2005, the Mountain Partners House of Funds today encompasses 16 independent VC funds & investment vehicles. In total, we are invested in more than 170 active portfolio companies.

A pioneer of investing in GP stakes in VC funds, we partner with the most promising managers in high-growth markets. Together we are building some of the leading local VC firms. The funds are managed independently by local managers and raise third-party capital. Mountain Partners acts as an anchor investor and provides operational support. As a result, we hold both GP and LP stakes in our partner funds.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: MBK Partners
Description: A leading North Asia private equity firm,owned and operated by Asians
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: SEP (Scottish Equity Partners)
Description: SEP is a specialist growth equity firm investing in enterprise technology companies across the UK and Europe. With over $1 billion invested and a 25-year track record, SEP partners with founders who are transforming how enterprises operate and grow. A signatory to the UN Principles for Responsible Investment, SEP combines deep expertise, long-term partnership, and a commitment to sustainable business growth.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: 2080 Ventures
Description:
2080 Ventures is a venture capital accelerator focusing on emerging markets.

2080 Ventures provides top-tier startup acceleration tailored to the local markets, leveraging managing partners' backgrounds at global accelerators like Techstars and 500 Global, as well as experience in startups, investments, and exits — 2 startup exits (1 IPO, 1 M&A). Partners have also invested in 3 unicorns (Animoca Brands, SpaceX, Cerebras) and as many as 20+ early and growth-stage companies. 

HOW WE HELP:

 Acceleration programs online, on-site & hybrid
 Investments
 Community & events
 Advising: mentorship, one-on-one sessions & office hours, growth, product, sales, design, export innovation, entry market strategies, and much more!
 Build a startup ecosystem from the ground up for corporate & government

WHY US:

 10+ years of team experience at global accelerators, first-hand experience growing startups as founders & VCs.

 15+ countries where the team already run programs from San Francisco, CIS, South Korea, Japan, Vietnam, Kazakhstan, Azerbaijan, Georgia and more.

 5300+ mentors available via our network from 500 Global, Techstars, Alibaba, Google, Uber, and many more.

CONTACT US:
 Pitch us form at the website — https://www.2080.ventures
 Email for partnership & inquiry — info@2080.ventures
 Stay tuned for new episodes — coming soon
 Subscribe & share — https://www.youtube.com/@2080ventures

#2080Ventures #VC #startupaccelerator #startups #growth
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: CDL-Montreal
Description: CDL-Montreal is a nonprofit organization powered by HEC Montréal that delivers an objectives-based program for massively scalable, seed-stage, science- and technology-based companies. Founded at the Rotman School of Management, CDL's mission is to enhance the commercialization of science for the betterment of humankind.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: STARTPLATZ
Description:
STARTPLATZ is a startup incubator and accelerator with branches in Cologne and Düsseldorf and functions as a hub for the Rheinland ecosystem and the local founders’ scene.

We offer much more than just coworking: The biggest startup community in NRW including networking events, conference and meeting rooms in an innovative atmosphere, workshops on all kinds of topics, an accelerator program & much more.

On approximately 4.500 square meters in Cologne Mediapark and 2.000 square meters in Düsseldorf’s MedienHafen, an ecosystem was created that offers aspiring startups and innovative companies space for growth, advice & coaching, workshops & events as well as a connection to the large network. 

More than 350 startups have already worked on their businesses, over 150 million euros have been invested in them and more than 170 teams participated in the STARTPLATZ accelerator. In cooperation with partners from the ecosystem, STARTPLATZ also offers companies and medium-sized enterprises various solutions from the startup world to successfully implement and promote digitalisation and innovation processes. Visit www.startplatz.de for more information.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Gemba Capital
Description:
Guided by our True North, we at Gemba Capital back tech enabled startups that are scalable and looking for seed funding.

What we look for?
At Gemba Capital we look for three things: Founder, Market and Product.
• Ability, passion and vision in a founder.
• Size, competition and growth in a market.
• Need, differentiation and value in a product.

We are sector agnostic, however below are our focus areas:
SaaS, Fintech, B2B Commerce, Agri tech

Our ideal investment will be:
We look to invest in visionary founders, strong in execution and with complementary skill sets
Significant growth potential over the next 3 to 5 years.
Startups having paying customers.
We prefer backing founders with at least 4-5 years of prior experience
Differentiated products or services that have the potential to be "platforms“
Products or services which solve a particular problem or caters to a particular need/gap in the market

How we invest?
We typically invest US$200-250K per company.
We are open to investing through convertible structures and instruments, however we prefer straight equity. 

Please visit our website to check our portfolio, team and advisors and to reach out to us !!
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Bicycle Capital
Description: Partnering with the extraordinary growth stage companies in Latin America
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Dutch Good Growth Fund (DGGF)
Description: Are you doing business in an emerging market or developing country, or do you represent an investment fund active in these regions? We can work with you to explore how DGGF can support your plans. For business inquiries related to DGGF Track 2 - Financing Local SMEs, please contact us at dggf@pwc.com.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: lool ventures
Description:
We are a venture capital firm investing in early stage startups, based in Tel Aviv. We work shoulder to shoulder with exceptional founders with huge dreams that once realized will make the world a better place.

Investment Focus:
* We value teams that are diverse, supportive of each other and exceptionally committed.
* We value software. We value IP.
* We value doing over talking. We are more likely to invest our capital in teams that already invested their own resources and actually created something.
* We think Global. We appreciate teams that think global from day one, and validate their thesis with their target markets.
* We are vertical-agnostic. The world is changing is so fast these days, what’s a vertical anyway?!
* We have a preference for startups with Israeli founders. We were Israeli founders. We know the pros and the cons, we think we can help maximize the value of the first while working around the later.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: NoemDek Ltd.
Description: "We're passionate about teaming up with entrepreneurs to help them build sustainable breakout businesses. We are organized by industry group and match our entrepreneurs with the right technical expertise and funding."
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Vitosha Venture Partners
Description: Vitosha Venture Partners is a EUR 26M fund and entrepreneurship ecosystem development company focused in emerging Europe.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Bowery Capital
Description: Bowery Capital is an early-stage venture capital investor focused exclusively on founders looking to modernize business through technology. As more and more internet natives drive purchasing decisions, Bowery Capital believes that roughly $468B will change hands over the next 10 years as old products are replaced with new. In addition, the firm believes that the key ingredient to early success is revenue and customer growth, and as such provides various products and services through their Acceleration Team that portfolio companies can leverage to develop a strong early base. This combination of a focused thesis and support system are the cornerstones of Bowery Capital's investment approach.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Aurum Impact
Description:
Aurum Impact is an impact investing firm, launched in February 2023, backed by the Goldbeck family and part of the Goldbeck Family Office. We invest in impact VC funds & impact startups with a focus on circularity & materials, climate & energy, ecosystems, and business models that advance a stable and equitable society. 

With our long-term investment approach and evergreen structure, we support companies through every phase - from pre-seed to growth, and act as a long-term and trusted partner.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Illumen Capital
Description:
Illumen Capital is an impact fund of funds addressing systemic inequity by reducing racial and gender bias in investing.

Working closely with the world’s leading social psychologists at Stanford SPARQ, we combine investment capital with evidence-based tools and training designed to reduce implicit racial and gender bias in order to unlock latent return and multiply impact.

We believe an inclusive and optimal asset management industry will be the cornerstone of an equal and equitable future.

Less bias. Better returns. One investment.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: SVV (Sure Valley Ventures)
Description: We help early-stage AI software entrepreneurs in the UK and Ireland grow and scale businesses that will have a global impact.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: EvolveX Accelerator
Description:
EvolveX, founded by We Founder Circle, is a prestigious program that has been providing high-impact acceleration to early-revenue startups from various sectors since its inception in 2021. With a mission to take startups to the next level, EvolveX offers its extensive network of seasoned mentors and successful entrepreneurs to guide startups on their journey to success. The program offers a range of benefits, including one-on-one mentorship sessions with handpicked angel investors and industry experts, upfront funding of $30K. 

EvolveX is committed to providing continuous opportunities to startups, and applications are accepted on a rolling basis.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Delta40 Venture Studio
Description:
Our mission at Delta40 is to increase incomes and tackle climate change in Africa by building and investing in inclusive climate innovations.  At Delta40, we invest in Africa because 40% of the world will live on this continent by 2100.  We invest in energy, agriculture and mobility innovations because they are essential to sustainable growth. We invest in climate innovation because we only have 10 years to act to prevent irreparable damage to Planet Earth.  We invest in diverse Founders because they are close to the customer and bring critical ideas, experiences and skills to solving the biggest problems on this important continent.  

Beyond capital, our venture studio team provides hands on support, shared services and partnerships to our ventures and Founders to increase speed, returns and impact. 

Together, we aim to deliver life-changing innovations to the last mile across Africa and to build a community of Founders go from idea to scale to exit.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: The Yield Lab LATAM
Description:
The Yield Lab Latam is an AgriFoodTech Venture Capital firm that invest in startups based in Latin America that address the multiple challenges faced by the agri-food industry.

Founded in 2017 and with offices in Argentina, Brazil, Mexico and Chile.
We have already invested in 23 companies in 7 countries across the region, which span the whole food and agriculture innovation spectrum.

Our commitment is to connect investors, startups, corporations, farmers, academia, research community and the public sector to promote the sustainable transformation of this critical industry. 

The Yield Lab Latam is part of The Yield Lab, a global network of Venture Capital funds, which initiated activities in 2014 in St. Louis, Missouri and now has regional operations across Europe, Latin America and Asia Pacific.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: EMK Capital
Description:
EMK Capital is a growth-focused private equity firm. EMK has an exceptional track record of investing in European and international mid-market businesses. 

EMK invests in opportunities where there is unrecognised and/or hard to realise value, identified through extensive work on sub sector theses, and where EMK can partner with outstanding management teams in executing transformative change. Across 25 exited investments over the last 20 years, EMK’s team has on average multiplied EBITDA five-fold during its period of ownership.

EMK operates from Amsterdam, Frankfurt, London, Madrid, Milan, Mumbai, Munich, New York, Oslo, Paris and Singapore.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Susquehanna Asia Venture Capital
Description: Susquehanna Venture Capital has the most flexible source of capital you will find anywhere. Our capital comes from Susquehanna International Group, a bootstrapped financial services firm with its origins in derivative trading and market making. We love working with passionate entrepreneurs, founders, and operators. We are a firm that has no fixed time horizons and is not subject to the vagaries of the venture capital fundraising cycle; a firm that can be flexible in the types of deals it does, the securities it holds, and the risks it takes.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: SpaceFund
Description: SpaceFund is a Venture Capital firm focused on supporting and investing in the growth of the space economy. Our team has the extensive industry experience and a strategic investment approach. By backing innovative ventures and leveraging our portfolio, we aim to drive the development of the space industry and generate solid returns for our investors. Our focus is on building a sustainable future for space exploration and improving people's lives on Earth and beyond. If you are interested in supporting the space industry's growth and exploring potential investment opportunities, we welcome the opportunity to speak with you.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: G. Ventures
Description:
France's 1st Student VC 

We back France's most ambitious young Founders. 
(students and young graduates)

Our Founders get up to 200k euros in funding.
(equity + non dillutive) 

 Learn more about GV : gventures.co 

----------

Want to get involved with G. Ventures? 

Whether you’re a founder, investor, aspiring VC, or looking for a role at a startup, we’ve got you covered.
 
 Check out our "opportunities" page on our website
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Faith Capital Holding
Description:
Faith Capital is a venture capital firm investing in talented founders building long-term value by developing sound operations at home and abroad.

A Kuwait based venture capital fund owned and managed by individuals with proven business experience and success.
 
The principal focus of Faith Capital is on e-commerce businesses, based in the region and internationally, which have high growth potential for the future.
 
Faith Capital’s approach is to support and create further value in those companies through both its funding, and most importantly, specialized local and international operational and management expertise.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: seafund
Description:
seafund is a SEBI registered Category 2 Alternate Investment Fund (AIF) and invests in start-ups and early stage companies. The Partners and Mentor network build on our expertise in Information Technology, Mobile, Internet of Things and Machine Language to invest in industries across Fintech, Enterprise SaaS, Semiconductor tech, Space tech and Health care.

We look for ideas and business models that can be scaled up rapidly using technology as an enabler. We invest in industries, domains and technologies where we understand the business, the business model, the competitive environment and can add value through our participation.

We have a dedicated focus on the pre-Series A investment stage and our ecosystem of best of breed Legal, Accounting, IP Consulting and Mobile Development firms enables us to do faster due diligence, decision making and deal closure, a simple term sheet and quick feedback on investment decisions to help scale our investee companies.

The core of the fund is a team of operators who have lived and breathed building businesses. We roll up our sleeves and get down in the trenches with the founders and are the first port of call whenever they run into a roadblock - anything that needs to be done to keep the lights on, we are your guys. Our mission is, to help the next set of technical founders, with small amounts of early capital in getting to market to build efficient and scalable businesses. These offerings are bolstered by our access to the 50,000 INSEAD alumni network. Two of our Partners are TiE Charter Members.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Illuminate Financial
Description:
We find, fund and support the best entrepreneurs solving real problems for financial institutions.

Building an enterprise software company and selling solutions into financial institutions is hard.

Large financial firms know they need to adopt new technology solutions to remain competitive and compliant, but they struggle to filter and identify the best companies that are fit for purpose.

Bridging this gap requires more than just patient capital to help with this challenge.

It needs the support of a trusted partner who can help make the right introductions to the right people at the right time.

At Illuminate, our deep networks and partnerships with key industry participants across banks, infrastructure providers, asset & wealth managers, exchanges and established vendors allow us to gain real insight into what the industry needs and help portfolio companies achieve their full potential.

We understand the challenges founders face. We have been the entrepreneur, the vendor, the industry executive and the end consumer.

We are an independent sector specialist investor.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Apax Digital
Description:
Apax Digital specializes in growth equity and buyout investments in high-growth enterprise software, internet, and technology-enabled services companies worldwide. As the growth stage investment arm of global private equity group, Apax, Apax Digital leverages Apax's deep tech investing expertise, global platform, and specialized operating experts, to enable technology companies and their management teams to accelerate the achievement of their full potential.  

For further information about Apax Digital and Apax, please visit www.apax.com.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Blazar Capital
Description:
Blazar, evolving from Blazar Capital, specializes in the innovative intersection of company building and influencer collaboration. Our core mission is to develop consumer brands that resonate globally, leveraging the unique appeal of influencers and celebrities. Our approach to company building is segmented into three pivotal phases: Ideating to identify innovative brand ideas by collaborating with talented entrepreneurs and influencers, launching the business rapidly, and scaling these ventures effectively and efficiently over time. We focus on partnering with creative talents to establish brands that not only disrupt markets but also connect authentically with audiences through compelling narratives and experiences. We have historically worked with individuals like Emma Chamberlain, with whom we have co-created Chamberlain Coffee, and Logan Paul which we've created an eyewear collection with in our eyewear brand, MessyWeekend.

Alongside brand development, we are deeply invested in e-commerce technologies. Recognizing the transformative power of digital platforms in today's market, our investments include initiatives like Dreaminfluence, an influencer marketing platform. This strategic move underscores our commitment to advancing e-commerce solutions that support our brands and partners, ensuring they have access to the forefront of digital marketing tools.

At Blazar, our approach is twofold: nurturing innovative consumer brands and investing in e-commerce technologies. We aim to create a synergy that drives market success, fueled by creativity, engagement, and a vision that spans across global markets.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Luminar Ventures
Description:
Luminar Ventures is a VC firm focused on seed-stage startups across the Nordics, providing experienced seed financing and active operational support to Nordics-based early-stage technology companies that are looking to disrupt or transform major industries.

Luminar's founding partners, Magnus Bergman and Jacob Key, are both former serial entrepreneurs and active angel investors with a successful track record of founding and growing tech startups such as Truecaller, Prezi, Sportamore, FirstVet and Challengermode to name a few of the 50+ startups they've backed at the earliest stage. They founded Luminar alongside Sting, Sweden's most successful startup platform.

Now managing two funds totalling over €130m, Luminar’s core investment focus is on scalable digital seed-stage companies from the Nordics, founded by highly-motivated and visionary entrepreneurs. The fund leads seed rounds through investments ranging from €500k to €2.5m, and supports early-stage startups on their journey to becoming breakout growth-stage scaleups, including Carla, Greenely, CodeScene, Hiber, Insurely, Mindler, Normative, Mynt, Yazen and many more.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Buoyant Ventures
Description:
Buoyant Ventures is a woman-owned early-stage climate tech venture capital fund. We invest in software and simple hardware that help adapt to and mitigate the impacts of climate change. Our focus areas include energy, the built environment, food & agriculture, circular economy, mobility, and climate intelligence.

Want to share your company with us? Visit our website at https://www.buoyant.vc  for more details.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Invisto
Description:
Somos o maior círculo de investimentos em venture capital no sul do Brasil, e nascemos da fusão das empresas Bzplan e da unidade de venture capital da FIR Capital.

Ao longo dos anos investimos mais de R$300 milhões em scale ups e temos em nosso portfólio grandes cases de sucesso, como o do desinvestimento da Axado que obteve retorno de 426%. 

A Invisto chega para ser a melhor e a maior referência para os investidores.
Acreditamos na mentoria corpo a corpo, valorizamos nosso ecossistema, investimos na economia real e não acreditamos em apostas, mas sim, em fazer o que é certo.

Investimos em tudo isso juntos, com você.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: TrueBridge Capital Partners
Description:
TrueBridge Capital Partners is an alternative asset management firm focused on generating superior returns in the venture capital industry. TrueBridge is focused solely on venture capital, investing in elite venture funds focused primarily on early-stage IT, as well as directly in select venture and growth-stage technology companies. Over the past decade, TrueBridge has deepened its platform of venture capital opportunities, developing funds alongside its Flagship and Direct Funds to support both of these strategies in Seed, Blockchain, and Secondaries ecosystems, along with Customized Solutions.

The firm is the data partner behind Forbes’ Midas List, Midas Seed List, Midas List Europe, and Next Billion-Dollar Startups, which highlight annual rankings of technology’s top investors and companies. The firm was founded in 2007 and currently manages over $8.0 billion in institutional assets.

For industry insights, primers, readers digest, and more, check out TrueBridge’s Forbes blog: https://www.forbes.com/sites/truebridge/#420ca66a3999
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: The Westly Group
Description: The Westly Group is one of the largest venture funds in North America focused on the digitization and sustainability of the energy, mobility, building, and industrial sectors, with >$800M under management.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: WestBridge
Description:
Established in 2008, WestBridge is a UK independent buyout firm focusing on control investments in profitable lower mid-market companies. 

WestBridge operates across the UK with offices in London, Manchester and Cardiff. 

The firm’s approach is to partner with market leaders operating in fast growing sectors where the growth drivers are not closely linked to the general economic cycle. 

The team then systematically deploys its Value Creation Model to accelerate growth and deliver outperformance. 

The WestBridge funds are benchmarked as top quartile for their vintages.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Cache Labs
Description:
At Cache Labs, we redefine innovation by solving real-world problems that transform industries and impact lives. Founded by Saiman Shetty, an EB1A awardee, Cache Labs is built on the belief that bold ideas, backed by innovation and precision, have the power to create a lasting legacy.

Through our pioneering approach, we’ve created brands like:

𝐒𝐦𝐚𝐫𝐭 𝐆𝐫𝐞𝐞𝐧 𝐂𝐚𝐫𝐝: Revolutionizing immigration through tailored profile-building solutions.
𝐂𝐫𝐚𝐳𝐲 𝐂𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐬 𝐂𝐚𝐩𝐢𝐭𝐚𝐥: Empowering the next generation of startups with strategic incubation.
𝐖𝐨𝐫𝐝𝐂𝐫𝐚𝐟𝐭 𝐀𝐈: Leading advancements in artificial intelligence to shape tomorrow's tech.
𝐏𝐑𝐨𝐱𝐢𝐦𝐢𝐭𝐲: Redefining global press services, connecting impactful stories with the world.

Our mission is to use technology, design, and strategy to address underserved industries and deliver scalable, purpose-driven solutions. Every challenge we take on is an opportunity to innovate, inspire, and grow.

𝐎𝐮𝐫 𝐂𝐨𝐫𝐞 𝐕𝐚𝐥𝐮𝐞𝐬:

𝐈𝐧𝐧𝐨𝐯𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧-𝐂𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐫𝐢𝐜: Constantly challenging the status quo to redefine possibilities.
𝐏𝐮𝐫𝐩𝐨𝐬𝐞-𝐝𝐫𝐢𝐯𝐞𝐧: Focusing on creating solutions that matter and bring meaningful change.
𝐄𝐦𝐩𝐨𝐰𝐞𝐫𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭 & 𝐎𝐰𝐧𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐡𝐢𝐩: Building leaders who take pride in what they create.
𝐂𝐮𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐦𝐞𝐫-𝐂𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐫𝐢𝐜𝐢𝐭𝐲: Delivering excellence by keeping the end-user at the heart of everything we do.

Guided by Saiman’s vision and a culture of ownership, Cache Labs fosters an environment where top talent collaborates to turn ideas into breakthroughs. Inspired by icons of innovation and driven by an unwavering commitment to excellence, we are not just building brands—we are building the future.

𝐉𝐨𝐢𝐧 𝐮𝐬 𝐨𝐧 𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐣𝐨𝐮𝐫𝐧𝐞𝐲 𝐨𝐟 𝐢𝐦𝐩𝐚𝐜𝐭 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐞𝐱𝐩𝐥𝐨𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧. 𝐓𝐨𝐠𝐞𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐫, 𝐥𝐞𝐭’𝐬 𝐬𝐡𝐚𝐩𝐞 𝐰𝐡𝐚𝐭’𝐬 𝐧𝐞𝐱𝐭.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Lightyear Capital
Description: Lightyear Capital is a New York-based private equity firm that partners with growing companies at the nexus of financial services and technology, healthcare, and business services. For over 20 years, Lightyear has worked closely with management and leveraged its industry expertise, network of advisors, and operating resources to accelerate growth and build market leading businesses. As of December 31, 2024, the firm had assets under management of $7.2 billion.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: GSR Ventures
Description: Founded in 2004, GSR Ventures is one of the world’s most successful early-stage venture firms, with over $3.7 billion under management. We focus on investing in companies that apply AI to drive transformation in Healthcare, Enterprise, Consumer and Fintech sectors. We are a team of entrepreneurs, engineers, physicians and enterprise executives with unmatched industry expertise.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Beyond Capital
Description:
Beyond Capital is seed funded $10M from USAID and created through a joint partnership between Endeavor Jordan and Silicon Badia

BeyondCapital supports start-ups and asset managers build high growth ventures, accelerate job creation, advance and develop the investment eco-system, and encourage increased equity investment in early and growth stage businesses in Jordan.

BeyondCapital has been established to realize long-term ecosystem development and capital expansion in Jordan. The company will take a three pillar approach which consists of (1) Start-up Support (2) Existing and Aspiring Fund Managers Support and (3) Angel Investors Support.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: NATIVELEAD
Description: Native Lead Foundation is a not for profit organization works with the vision to make South Tamil nadu, a region of innovation and business leadership. It is highly evident that the inclination for native innovation and entrepreneurship is on the negative scale comparing the large pool of human resource of our entire nation. Native Lead, a dynamic online-offline platform helps the young minds of South Tamilnadu to become innovators and entrepreneurs through practical learning. Towards this end, Native Lead works with the concerned stake holders such as Educational Institutions, Students, Aspiring Entrepreneurs, Enterprises, Independent Experts, Investors, Industrial Forums, Governments, NGOs and General public. The objective being creating awareness, motivating, training, connecting to resources and extending real-time platforms for the younger generation to become innovators and business leaders of the future.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Metavallon VC
Description: Metavallon VC is a venture capital fund founded in 2018 and based out of Athens, Greece. With > € 50m AUM and currently investing out of Fund II, we are active at the Seed and Seed+ stages, deploying tickets of € 0.5m - 1.5m.  Our mission is to engage at early stage with companies that will operate at the forefront of business and technology innovation. We seek to invest in and work alongside ambitious entrepreneurs, supporting them to build transformational businesses across multiple stages, geographies and industries. With an affinity for B2B models, deep technology, and strong ties with Greece, we have backed pioneering teams, including Think Silicon, Purposeful, Better Origin, Ferryhopper, Krotos, Wikifarmer and Perceptual Robotics.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Group 11
Description: Group 11 is an early-stage venture capital firm based in Southern California. Group 11 invests in visionary entrepreneurs who are utilizing the unstoppable momentum of AI to redraw the landscape of their respective industries. With a goal of creating change across generations and building long-term value through technology, Group 11 has emerged as a coveted partner to veteran entrepreneurs at the forefront of their fields. Since its inception in 2012, the firm has deployed over $686 million across six flagship funds and SPVs in some of the world’s most prominent and disruptive technology companies, including: Navan (Nasdaq: NAVN), Next Insurance (sold to MunichRe at a $2.6 billion valuation), Tipalti, HomeLight, Sunbit, Dream Security, Masterschool, Venn, BridgeWise, Healthee, AeroPay, and CapitalOS.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: AC Capitales
Description:
AC Capitales SAFI, por mandato de sus inversionistas, gestiona fondos de inversión enfocados principalmente en los sectores infraestructura e inmobiliario. Invierte en empresas y proyectos de capital privado, con un horizonte de maduración de mediano y largo plazo.  
Es una subsidiaria de APOYO Consultoría.

AC Capitales SAFI se constituyó en el 2002, y desde entonces se ha consolidado como una de las sociedades administradoras líderes en el mercado.

Su visión es construir una plataforma de gestión de capital de largo plazo, rentable y sostenible, en activos reales. Esta meta se basa en la confianza que inspira su reputación, el talento y profesionalismo de su equipo, y el profundo conocimiento de los mercados en los que opera.

AC Capitales Sociedad Administradora de Fondos de Inversión S.A. | RUC 20504893295
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: ENGIE New Ventures
Description: ENGIE New Ventures (ENV) was founded in 2014 as the corporate venture capital fund of global energy provider ENGIE. Its €180 million fund is dedicated to making minority investments in technology startups that complement existing activities and resources to spur internal innovation within ENGIE.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Planeteer Capital
Description:
The most successful decade of wealth creation in the tech sector solved first world problems at the expense of real world problems. As our planet burns, we’ve retreated towards the digital world instead of reckoning with a broken physical one. 

We’re moving from a system of brittle supply chains, analog production, and extractive industries to a future that’s renewable, productive, and whose enterprises and technologies augur resilience through adaptation. 

The path ahead entails two massive opportunities: both transitioning existing business and creating new markets. Together, these twin forces represent a generational investment opportunity and an addressable landscape ripe with innovation.

The world we want is abundant, where breaking things means putting them back together better than before. The world we’re investing in will enable us and future generations to grow with less friction, less cost, and more value.

The opportunity in front of us is planetary, growing exponentially, and requires conviction, creativity, and community to thrive. 

We built Planeteer Capital for this moment. We’re climate market experts, founders, and technology leaders. We invest with conviction at the pre-seed and seed stages where inflecting climate verticals are positioned for outsized financial success.

The power is yours.

Reach out: hello@planeteercapital.com
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: AngelsWay
Description:
Angels Way (aka AW) is a community-driven investor focused on Portuguese-based early-stage Startups that have a direct impact on making the world a better place through the use of technology.

The goal of Angels Way is to support and develop the Portuguese entrepreneurial ecosystem as well as to create a like minded community to bring value to everyone involved.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Kaizenvest
Description: Kaizenvest is an emerging markets asset manager focused on the future of learning and work, managing private equity and private debt funds in South & South-East Asia and in Sub-Saharan Africa. The team is passionate about education and technology and represents an effective combination of investing and operating experience.  We distinguish ourselves through our sector knowledge and networks and bring value to our partner companies  through access to our global network of strategic and financial partners, education focused investors, policy influencers, thought leaders and organizations that empower learning innovations.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Fulcrum Equity Partners
Description:
Fulcrum Equity Partners manages approximately $1 billion and makes equity investments in rapidly growing businesses that are led by strong entrepreneurs and management teams. We target companies within the healthcare, B2B SaaS, and technology-enabled services industries. We provide financing to meet a wide range of needs including internal growth initiatives, acquisitions, shareholder liquidity, buy-outs, recapitalizations, and divestitures.

INVESTMENT PARAMETERS & STRUCTURE

-	Investment size: $5 - $25 million with potential for follow-on investments as needed
-	Providing capital to meet a wide range of needs
-	Will make non-control and control investments
-	Will lead or participate with other firms; collaborative with angel investors
-	Strong relationships with senior and sub-debt lenders
-	Relatively uncomplicated capital structure


For more information, please visit https://www.fulcrumep.com/
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: WndrCo
Description: Founded in 2016 by Sujay Jaswa and Jeffrey Katzenberg, WndrCo is a $2.8B AUM holding company and venture capital firm reimagining how people live and work. We build and invest in category-defining technology companies, with a portfolio that includes Abridge, Aura, Cursor, Deel, Figma, Point Wild, and Super Unlimited. Prior to WndrCo, our partners founded and scaled companies including Dropbox, DreamWorks, and Disney.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: CapitalT
Description:
We are a (pre) seed stage VC that invests in software technology companies. Companies that solve real problems with AI or have a strong data component, who have international potential and amazing teams. We invest in companies in the Netherlands, United Kingdom, Sweden, Norway, Denmark, Finland and Germany.

In our investment decision making, the quality of the founding team plays a key role. In our quest to find these teams, we focus on specific areas of technology pro-actively (climate tech and future of work). 

We use proprietary technology to evaluate teams in a data driven way.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: xdeck
Description:
We are xdeck. xdeck is Germany’s first startup accelerator and venture capital fund from founders for founders, located in THE SHIP, Cologne (https://shipcologne.com). 
We aim to be the leading platform for early-stage European tech companies positively shaping a better tomorrow.  

xdeck is seed-funded by the founders of FOND OF and made possible through strong partners: Bank-Verlag, Capnamic, Cassini AG, Cherry Ventures, considerIT, ECOVIS KSO, FOND OF, Gateway Factory, Haufe, Heuking, High-Tech Gründerfonds, Kienbaum Consultants, Spread Group, Teal, Techniker Krankenkasse, UBS, Volksbank Köln Bonn, @-yet.

Get in touch if you are looking for a strong network, access to funding and operative know-how. No frills. no fuss. 

Imprint: https://xdeck.de/imprint/
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Avinya Ventures
Description: Avinya Ventures is a SEBI approved early-stage venture capital firm. Avinya Ventures seeks out startups with founder market fit, which entails founders who possess a profound comprehension of the problem they are addressing, relevant expertise, exceptional execution skills, and a commitment to integrity. The startups must also have the potential for scalability, market acceptance of their product, and unique product differentiation.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Listen Ventures
Description: Listen invests in consumer-obsessed entrepreneurs building at the tipping point of behavior shifts. Many firms invest in consumer, few actually Listen to consumers.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: POMAC
Description: We enable entrepreneurs from idea to growth with a wide range of professional services to create companies that the market needs
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: super{set}
Description:
super{set} represents a new model for building startups—purpose-built for AI-native and data-first companies. Founded in 2019 by serial entrepreneurs Tom Chavez and Vivek Vaidya, we combine hands-on company building with a people-first culture, supporting founders from pre-seed through exit.

We believe company building is a craft, not a critique—repetition, accumulated knowledge, and shared playbooks produce stronger, more resilient outcomes.

And our order of operations is simple: people → customers → product. When great people thrive, great companies follow.

If you're an entreprenuer, product or engineering leader with a great idea, domain expertise and the passion to win, reach out to: https://superset.com/signal and complete the form to be accepted into our Signal platform.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Exfinity Venture Partners
Description:
Exfinity Ventures is an early-stage venture capital firm investing at the intersection of Enterprise Tech and Deep Tech across the US-India-Singapore corridors.

We back visionary founders solving global problem statements in AI, NextGen Computing, Robotics, Cybersecurity, Industrial Automation, Healthcare, and Enterprise AI.

With three successful funds, and 40+ portfolio companies, our partnership extends far beyond capital: we bring operating experience, cross-border GTM expertise, and board-level governance. Our founding DNA includes leaders from Infosys, Wipro, McKinsey, Intel, and SanDisk, giving us privileged access to Fortune 500 CXO networks and global R&D ecosystems.

Some of our breakout investments include MoEngage (customer engagement), Pixis (GenAI marketing), Kinara (AI Semiconductors), Ati Motors (autonomous mobile robots), and CloudSEK (cyber-risk intelligence) - each redefining their category globally.

If you are building at the frontier of enterprise and deep tech, we’d love to meet you.

 info@exfinityventures.com |  exfinityventures.com
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Enzia Ventures
Description:
‘enza’ is a root word for plants in Latin and ‘zia’ means light in arabic.
Enzia represents light and life. 

Enzia is a purpose-built venture capital fund focused on healthcare, education and environment. 

We believe that early stage investing needs a focused approach and a deep understanding of sectors. Our expertise, focus, and curated networks enable us to identify promising early stage companies and help them build long-lasting businesses. 

We are a trusted investor and partner for purpose-led entrepreneurs addressing large fundamental needs.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Türkiye Development Fund
Description:
Türkiye Development Fund (TDF), founded in 2019 by the Development and Investment Bank of Türkiye aims to invest in companies and funds which support Türkiye’s sustainable development. TDF has 9 sub-funds with a total committed capital of ca USD140 mn.

• Regional Development Fund
• Technology and Innovation Fund
• Development Participation Venture Capital Investment Fund
• Innovative and Advanced Technologies Venture Capital Investment Fund
• DIBT Capital Fund
• Invest101
• TÜBİTAK BiGG Fund
• DIBT FoF
• TÜBİTAK BiGG+ Venture Capital Investment Fund
 
Through these sub-funds, TDF supports the development of strategically important economic sectors as well as the nascent VC ecosystem of Türkiye.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Elevator Ventures
Description: Elevator Ventures is the venture capital fund backed by Raiffeisen Bank International, Raiffeisen-Holding Niederösterreich-Wien and Raiffeisen-Landesbank Steiermark. It manages funds of 100m€+ to elevate the growth of technology companies in Fintech and Beyond Banking. The team has a wide sourcing and business development network in DACH and CEE and uses the deep expertise and intel of its investors as an advantage. To date, Elevator Ventures has invested over €60 million in 21 companies, resulting in seven exits, and holds two fund-of-funds positions.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Lindsay Goldberg
Description: Lindsay Goldberg is a leading upper middle-market private equity firm based in New York City. We seek to build long-term value by partnering with exceptional families, founders, and management teams. Our collaborative approach is rooted in trust, strategic alignment, and a shared commitment to growth. Since our founding in 2001, we have raised $24 billion and invested $17 billion in over 65 platform companies and more than 350 add-ons, primarily across the industrials, services, and healthcare sectors. Lindsay Goldberg has been recognized as a top-10 private equity firm, ranked at #6 on the 2024 HEC-Dow Jones Private Equity Performance Ranking. To learn more, visit www.lindsaygoldbergllc.com.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: GLOCAL LATAM
Description:
GLOCAL is the Latin American AgriFoodTech innovation platform that accelerates, invests and works with startups, investors and corporations to better the future of food and agriculture.

Our purpose is to scale the growth of agtech, foodtech & climatech companies that are developing cutting-edge technology to make the agriculture-food supply chain more efficient, secure and sustainable.


 We are the first AgriFoodTech fund born and raised in LATAM

 We are the first AgriFoodTech acceleration fund to be certified as a B Corp worldwide


X: @glocalagro
Instagram: @glocalagro
Email: info@glocalmanagers.com
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Styleit Accelerator
Description:
Styleit è l'acceleratore FashionTech della Rete Nazionale Acceleratori CDP: nasce da un'iniziativa di CDP Venture Capital SGR insieme a Startupbootcamp e GELLIFY.
Startupbootcamp è l’acceleratore di startup leader in Europa e uno dei più grandi network mondiali di innovazione dedicato al mondo B2B su specifici settori come servizi finanziari, moda, energia, salute, sostenibilità e tanti altri, attivo con +20 programmi in Europa, Asia, Australia e Medio Oriente.

GELLIFY è la Purple innovation factory che abilita le organizzazioni ad avere successo come moderni business digitali,  attraverso un mix unico di tecnologia, ingegno umano e capacità di interpretare il futuro.

Le 10 startup selezionate beneficeranno di un investimento pre-seed di circa 113mila euro e potranno partecipare a successivi finanziamenti post-accelerazione fino a 200mila euro, oltre che di un supporto concreto e costante da parte del team dei promotori, per essere sempre più competitive sul mercato e realizzare un up-round.

Sei una startup che opera in settori diversi ma che hanno un impatto sul settore FashionTech? Lavori in Italia o intendete trasferire le vostre attività in questo Paese?

Stiamo cercando proprio te!
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Times Bridge
Description:
Times Bridge is the U.S.'s leading venture firm with a mission of bringing the world's best ideas to India. 

Our current investment portfolio includes Airbnb, Coursera, Girl Effect, Headspace, Houzz, MUBI, Smule, Stack Overflow, Stocktwits, Uber, Wattpad, Malaria No More & others. We're capitalized by Bennett Coleman & The Times Of India Group. 

More @timesbridge and timesbridge.com. Passionate about what we're doing? immerse@timesbridge.com!
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Tin Shed Ventures
Description: Tin Shed Ventures is Patagonia’s corporate venture capital fund, which we use to invest in environmentally and socially responsible start-up companies. It takes its name from the blacksmith shop where Patagonia founder Yvon Chouinard forged pitons, and then made removable hardware that enabled a clean-climbing revolution. That Tin Shed in Ventura, California, still stands alongside our corporate headquarters, as Tin Shed Ventures funds the next generation of responsible businesses.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Eos Capital
Description:
Eos Capital is a Namibian private equity fund manager that is managing the Allegrow Fund. “Eos” means a new dawn in Greek mythology and the company aims to bring new life to portfolio investments through capital and management support which allows them to grow to their full potential. 

Eos Capital’s objective is to contribute to the growth of the Namibian economy as a leading Private Equity player that is the first choice for investors to manage private equity funds, as well as the preferred partner for companies looking for financing in Namibia, building on its strong local network and ability to add value to portfolio companies.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: WAVE - Women's Association of Venture & Equity
Description: Women's Association of Venture and Equity (WAVE) is a nonprofit organization, which was founded in 2003 and is committed to the development and advancement of women in private equity and venture capital. WAVE achieves this objective through a series of developmental and networking events organized in financial centers each year.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: build3
Description:
build3 is a startup studio & launchpad that supports impact-oriented startups that better the mind, body, and the earth via our various programs like the impact accelerator and the impact startup academy. 

build3 also operates a co-working and co-living space in goa which is a hub for like-minded founders, digital nomads, and creators, offering weekly events, meditation sessions, art workshops and startup bootcamps.  


https://www.build3.org
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Anzu Partners
Description:
Anzu Partners is a venture capital and private equity firm that invests in breakthrough industrial technologies. We team with entrepreneurs to develop and commercialize technological innovations by providing capital and deep expertise in business development, market positioning, global connectivity, and operations.

Anzu Partners has offices in Washington, DC, San Diego, CA, Boston, MA, Atlanta, GA, and Tampa, FL.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: The Global Emerging Markets Group (GEM)
Description:
Global Emerging Markets ("GEM") was founded in 1991. Our firm is a $3.4 billion alternative investment group that manages a diverse set of investment vehicles focused on emerging markets across the world.
The partners have a century of collective experience and as a group have invested in 265 companies across 55 countries. GEM's investment vehicles provide the group and its investors with a diversified portfolio of asset classes that span the global private investing spectrum.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Blackbox
Description:
Blackbox is a global founder-focused platform. We believe entrepreneurs are the core engine for global economic growth. Our mission is to create equality of entrepreneurial opportunity by connecting them with the very best of Silicon Valley—the people, wisdom, mindset, and culture— right at home.

Through immersive programs that champion the human element of entrepreneurship, and a powerful network that spans the globe, we transform high-potential founders into global value creators.

Since 2011, Blackbox has empowered over 400 founders from 60+ countries who have participated in our programs. Our alums' combined liquidation and funding raised have reached ~$1.5 billion and have 28 successful exits.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: SemperVirens VC
Description: SemperVirens is an ecosystem-driven venture capital firm helping visionary founders expand their reach, amplify their impact, and build a better-working world. We back category-defining startups developing AI solutions for the world’s most complex markets. By combining strategic capital with a network of thousands of experts, advisors, and partners, we help founders scale faster, go to market efficiently, and turn strategy into traction to lead where the world is headed.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Business Angels Europe
Description: Business Angels Europe (BAE) brings together the most active angel federations and networks in the most advanced angel investor markets in Europe.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Company Ventures
Description: Company Ventures is a NYC-based venture capital firm that invests in new technology-driven businesses at the earliest stages. We predominantly invest in digital health, fintech and enterprise SaaS businesses at pre-seed, seed and series A stages through our funds with a typical check size of ~$500k-$1M.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Brand Capital, India
Description:
Brand Capital is the strategic investment arm of The Times of India and a part of Bennett, Coleman & Co. Ltd. (BCCL). We invest in ambitious entrepreneurs to grow their businesses and build strong brands. Through the power of media, we help companies scale and succeed.

Brand Estate, our realty-focused arm helps property developers gain trust and recognition. We turn visibility into credibility, ensuring long-term success in a competitive market.

With access to India’s largest media platforms covering Print, Digital, Television, Out of Home, Cinema and Celebrity Investors —we help brands reach the right audience and make a lasting impact.

From D2C to real estate pioneers, we don’t just fund the journey- we catalyze it. 

At Brand Capital, we believe in the value of branding. Our goal is to help businesses unlock their full potential through effective marketing and strategic advice.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Ananta Capital
Description:
Ananta Capital is an investment management platform focused on partnering with businesses for the long-term. We manage a pool of very long-term patient capital and look to partner entrepreneurs and own businesses matching our mindset of long-term compounding of capital.  

We look at a mix of control and minority transactions with orientation as business owners or partners. We are broadly sector agnostic and evaluate all fundamentally strong capital efficient businesses which we believe can be long-term market leaders in their respective industries. Some of the sectors we particularly like are Consumer Products, Asset-light Healthcare, Financial Services and Specialized Manufacturing.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Parthenon Capital
Description: Parthenon Capital Partners (“Parthenon” or “Parthenon Capital”) is a private equity firm that partners with and invests in management teams and their companies.  We take a research-driven approach within our core sectors where we have sustainable operating and investment experience.  We work collaboratively with management teams to create value by building market leaders and accelerating earnings growth through both acquisitive and organic strategies.  We believe our specialization and focus allows us to better understand key issues, risks and opportunities and provide relevant resources and insights.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Pipeline Angels
Description:
Pipeline Angels is changing the face of angel investing and creating capital for founders who are trans women, cis women, agender, gender non-conforming, non-binary, and two-spirit. In 2023, Pipeline Angels became part of the Institute for Entrepreneurial Leadership (IFEL).

Our members serve as the friends and family round for entrepreneurs who may not already have support at that critical stage.

Learn more: pipelineangels.org
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Vendis Capital
Description:
Founded in 2009, Vendis Capital is an independent private equity firm specializing in the consumer goods sector in Europe.
In partnership with experienced entrepreneurs and managers, Vendis aims to invest in small to medium sized consumer companies in order to help them realise their potential for growth and value creation.
Vendis invests in France, Belgium, the Netherlands, Germany and in the Scandinavian countries.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Übermorgen Ventures
Description: An early stage venture capital investment company backing entrepreneurs, who understand that climate change mitigation is not only the responsibility of our generation but also the potentially biggest business opportunity of our time.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: EHAB - Esmaeilzadeh Holding
Description:
EHAB is a Swedish family owned investment firm that believes entrepreneurs create the innovation, growth and opportunity that advance society. We invest for the long term in a range of sectors and people, all linked by their ability to grow throughout the economic cycle.

Learn more about us at: www.ehab.group
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: BluWave, LP
Description: BluWave is the Business Builders' Market Network for private equity grade service provider needs. The company's platform combines technology, data, and AI with concierge-like consultative support to expertly and quickly connect businesses with proven providers across due diligence, value creation, and prep for sale. The BluWave Vetted network is an invite-only ecosystem of top-tier individuals and service providing groups. Based in Nashville, Tennessee, BluWave ranks as one of America's fastest growing companies and today serves hundreds of leading private equity firms and thousands of proactive businesses. Visit www.BluWave.net to learn more.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: FEMSA Ventures
Description:
FEMSA Ventures is a Venture Capital fund backed by FEMSA and dedicated to building collaboration bridges between FEMSA’s business platforms and the entrepreneurial ecosystem. 

FEMSA Ventures aims to improve and transform people’s lives through innovative ideas and world-class entrepreneurs. As a strategic partner for founders, FEMSA’s years of experience in the beverage, retail and logistics industries in Latin America, USA and Europe offer a unique value creation potential to drive growth. 
 
Founded in 2018, FEMSA Ventures’ portfolio includes companies operating in a variety of industries such as conversational commerce, logistics, e-commerce, retail and fintech.

Name: Ballistic Ventures
Description:
Ballistic Ventures is a new kind of venture capital firm, built by and for cybersecurity entrepreneurs and investors.

For over 35 years, our work in the field has granted us exclusive insights into the evolution of the cyber threat landscape. We’ve tracked its progression from the benign hacking of the 80s to the ruthless and insidious attacks on individuals and nations alike, which disrupt millions of lives daily.

As technological innovation continues at a blistering pace, every aspect of our physical lives will soon be accessible online. Without fail, nefarious acts will follow. There's no turning back. Adaptation is the only reasonable response.

Ballistic Ventures was formed out of a profound sense of urgency and moral responsibility to address the growing threats to society’s digital infrastructure. 

We believe that the most important action we can take today is to empower the world’s greatest cybersecurity entrepreneurs with our collective experience, network, and passion. Together, we can turn the tide at this crucial inflection point to ensure a safe, prosperous future for all generations to come.

For us, this mission is personal.

The Gauge team collaborates with management and its network of advisors and influencers and primarily focuses on four things:

(1) optimizing the strategy and value creation agenda; 
(2) ensuring the right talent exists at the management and board levels; 
(3) creating alignment among all stakeholders; and 
(4) providing sufficient capital to achieve the company’s vision.

Gauge invests in high-potential businesses in the United States and Canada with approximately $5-50 million in EBITDA. Typical transactions include management buy-outs, recapitalizations, divestitures, consolidation, and growth investments.

Name: Systemiq Capital
Description:
Systemiq Capital back tech founders solving planet scale problems, investing where tech meets the physical world.  We focus on Series A± companies in UK, Europe and North America. 

At Systemiq Capital, we: 

* Have access to a platform of 300+ experts through our partnership with climate consultancy Systemiq Limited. This allows us to open doors for founders: direct access to customers, talent, and partners 

* We back exceptional people in industries we know inside out. 

* We provide deep insight, not just capital. 

* We bring a global perspective. 

Each investor backs 1–2 companies per year to build deep, lasting relationships with our founders. 

Investment themes include:  

• Electrification: Software for distributed energy, EV charging, power trading, and industrial efficiency.  

• Decoding Nature: Tech-enabled platforms for biodiversity, synthetic biology, and regenerative agriculture.  

• Applied AI: bringing advances in AI to complex physical industries like logistics, manufacturing and real estate.  

Our portfolio includes:  

 Ohme – Europe’s largest home EV charging company (electrification)  

 Basecamp Research – Mapping nature’s biodiversity to unlock valuable proteins for biotech (decoding nature).  

 Circulor – Enabling supply chain transparency in the automotive sector through digital material tracking (applied AI).

Name: GENEO Capital Entrepreneur
Description:
La raison d’être de GENEO, inscrite dans ses statuts, est de mettre au service de l’économie réelle une finance positive, c’est-à-dire :
•	une finance de long terme, capable de passer les cycles conjoncturels, de s’adapter au cycle naturel de chaque entreprise 
•	une finance qui mise sur l’accroissement du capital humain comme principal levier de création de valeur et de pérennité des sociétés et de leur croissance. Celle qui s’appuie sur l’expérience, l’envie, l’engagement de toutes les générations d’entrepreneurs pour accélérer, dans un collectif puissant. 
•	une finance qui dépasse l’approche contrainte de la responsabilité sociale d’entreprise pour rechercher l’impact positif, répondre aux attentes sociétales, transformer les entreprises et leur écosystème, les organisations et les territoires 
•	une finance qui verse double dividende, financier et sociétal, et qui s’appuie sur les mécanismes de la valeur pour maximiser l’engagement de toutes les parties prenantes, et réconcilier – pour tous - performance et sens.

Name: VeniSIA - Venice, the oldest city of the future
Description:
𝗩𝗲𝗻𝗶𝗦𝗜𝗔 𝗶𝘀 𝗩𝗲𝗻𝗶𝗰𝗲’𝘀 𝗗𝗲𝗲𝗽 𝗧𝗲𝗰𝗵 𝗩𝗲𝗻𝘁𝘂𝗿𝗲 𝗕𝘂𝗶𝗹𝗱𝗲𝗿. 

It creates new ventures starting form technology-based research projects. 

The project was conceived by Professor Carlo Bagnoli (Head of Strategy) and Maria Claudia Pignata (CEO), who had the vision to identify Venice and its fragile, unique environment as the perfect setting to develop and test scalable solutions for the global challenges of our time.

In just three years, VeniSIA has 𝗮𝗰𝗰𝗲𝗹𝗲𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗱 𝟮𝟯 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘁𝘂𝗽𝘀, selected from over 6,000 applications, and 𝘀𝘂𝗰𝗰𝗲𝘀𝘀𝗳𝘂𝗹𝗹𝘆 𝗿𝗮𝗶𝘀𝗲𝗱 𝗼𝘃𝗲𝗿 €𝟱𝟬+𝗠𝗟𝗡 from 20+ corporate and private investors. This impressive track record underscores VeniSIA's role as a catalyst for innovation in the sustainability sector.

VeniSIA collaborates with notable partners, including 𝗘𝗻𝗶 𝘄𝗶𝘁𝗵 𝗝𝗼𝘂𝗹𝗲, 𝗖𝗶𝘀𝗰𝗼, 𝗘𝗱𝗶𝘀𝗼𝗻, 𝗦𝗻𝗮𝗺, to enhance its impact.

VeniSIA's targets are companies (corporations and SMEs), startups, researchers, master's students, donors, and institutions interested in pursuing or supporting innovation.

𝗩𝗲𝗻𝗶𝗦𝗜𝗔'𝘀 𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗴𝗿𝗮𝗺𝘀:
1. Venture Builder
2. Co-Innovation 
3. Manufacturing Accelerator
4. Company Spin-off
5. Human Venturing
6. Startup Acceleration with Argo Accelerator, the CDP Venture Capital on Tourism & Travel Tech

President: Prof. Marco Vedovati
CEO: Maria Claudia Pignata

Name: Meanings Capital Partners
Description:
Meanings Capital Partners is a leading unlisted French investment platform specialising in the Lower Mid Cap segment in Private Equity, infrastructure, and Real Estate. 

Meanings assists management teams in transforming and financing the development of French and European businesses to empower them to become leaders on their markets. Meanings also transforms and improves real estate assets in accordance with the highest environmental standards.

The platform is comprised of 45 people organised around four divisions: 
● Private Equity Mid Cap, for companies with revenue of up to €150 million, 
● Private Equity Small Cap, for companies with revenue of up to €50 million, 
● Infrastructure, for companies with revenue of up to €150 million, 
● Real Estate, for property projects valued at up to €150 million. 

Meanings has a proprietary Humanly Responsible Investor approach, rooted in a vision of the management company’s work designed to promote human dignity and fulfilment. This applies to all companies in the private equity, property, and infrastructure portfolios. 

B Corp certified, Meanings is also at the forefront of sustainability commitments in France, particularly in terms of decarbonisation, setting targets aligned with the Paris Agreements. Meanings' commitments are also officially approved by the Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi), making the platform one of the Private Equity pioneers in France and the world's tenth SBTi-approved investment company.

Name: Old Tom Capital
Description:
Old Tom Capital is a specialist investment platform focused exclusively on the global golf economy.

We invest, acquire, finance, and build businesses across golf’s real estate, media, technology, and infrastructure stack. Our mandate spans minority growth investments, control assets, credit strategies, and platform builds, all unified by a single objective: institutionalizing a fragmented but durable category.

Golf is a $140 billion global industry with record participation, strong utilization, and long-term cultural relevance. Yet ownership remains fragmented, capital access uneven, and institutional control limited. We believe this structural gap creates opportunity for focused, patient capital with deep category fluency.

Our platform is built around five integrated engines: Venture, Growth and Control, Credit, Advisory, and Studio. Each engine reinforces the next, converting access into capital efficiency and capital into lasting ownership. The result is a system designed to compound value across the full lifecycle of the industry.

We partner with founders, operators, governing bodies, and long-term investors who share a commitment to disciplined growth and permanent value creation. Many of the most compelling opportunities in golf are relationship-driven and never reach broad auction processes. Being embedded in the ecosystem is not an advantage layered onto our strategy. It is the strategy.

Old Tom Capital is not a generalist firm with a sports allocation. We are a focused platform built to own golf’s institutional era, with active capital, operational discipline, and a long-term horizon.

Broad enough to matter. Narrow enough to master.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

We look for teams that are persistent, have invested their time and energy in understanding the nuances and have a clear thought process of how they would go about building the business.
