Name: 1752vc: Venture Fellow & Emerging Angel Program
Description:
The 1752vc Journey: Mastering Every Step of Venture Investing

Every investor’s journey begins with a spark—an ambition to fuel innovation and make an impact. Yet, without the right tools, many take their first steps blindly, risking losses and missed opportunities.

The 1752 Venture Fellow & Emerging Angel Program equips you with mission-critical skills and the opportunity to invest in the fund, gaining hands-on experience. Over an 8-week intensive journey, you’ll navigate key milestones:

Week 1: Startup vs Lifestyle & Growth Stages
Week 2: Demystifying VC, Fund Theory, Power Law
Week 3: Valuations & Investing
Week 4: Sourcing Deals & Growth Hacking
Week 5: Reviewing Deals
Week 6: Due Diligence: Management Team and Compensation
Week 7: Due Diligence: Go-To-Market Strategy, Technology & Financials
Week 8: Deal Terms & After Investment

From Theory to Action: Investing with Confidence

Beyond the coursework, you’ll participate in live diligence calls, working alongside experienced investors to analyze opportunities and make data-driven recommendations with clarity and conviction.

Mission Control: A Community That Fuels Innovation

Investing is not a solo endeavor. Through 1752 Residence, our dynamic community, you’ll gain ongoing support, continuous learning, and shared insights—working together to navigate the evolving venture landscape.

Your Next Step: Join the Hunt

Step into the command center of venture investing and gain an exponential advantage as you explore the endless frontier of opportunity. Go beyond the surface, master the inner workings of venture, and invest with precision and purpose.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Chandaria Capital

We have all the skills to ensure that an entrepreneur or business is successful. In support of our investments, we are able to leverage strong international networks, giving us access to world-class expertise in manufacturing, distribution, brand-building, logistics, supply chain management, property development and real estate, business management and consulting.
 
Chandaria Capital understands the significance an amazing team has on the growth of a company. We pride ourselves on being a dynamic and highly approachable VC, building our philosophy around not just funding, but all the values and benefits of being part of a successful and growing family of incredible entrepreneurs all across Africa.
 
We are proud of our growing portfolio of exciting companies like Kobo360, Sokowatch, TradeDepot, Carry1st, Koko Networks, Ilara Health, Guidewheel, Savannah Brands, Bamboo, Shara and Chari.
 
Twitter-@ChandCapitalKE

Name: Astia
Description:
INVESTING IN HIGH-PERFORMING, WOMEN-LED COMPANIES

Currently investing from Astia Fund I - a $32M Series A/B fund that is sector and geography agnostic.

For twenty years, Astia has carved a unique path to source, screen and invest in the top performing companies.  Astia’s proprietary Expert Sift deal sourcing and screening process is a robust, data-driven methodology that uses best-in-class tools and wisdom-of-the-crowd techniques to eliminate bias. To successfully address the intersectionality of race and gender, Astia established a clear focus on investing in women of color. 

Grounded in deep domain expertise, exceptional investment performance, a belief in the value of women as leaders and a proprietary investment process, Astia invests via a family of funds.

Throughout its twenty years, Astia has paved the way for investors to align human values with investment rigor.

Understanding the fundamentals of change, Astia has built an institution to last. Through a variety of investment vehicles, Astia enables investment at all stages of private company growth.

With an acute understanding of the unique challenges of high-growth, Astia ensures portfolio success. We are entrepreneur-centric and hands-on.

By investing with Astia, Limited Partners expand their legacy of impact.

Founded by tech pioneer Catherine Muther in 1998, Astia has never wavered from its fundamental commitment to level the investment playing field. Still today, less than 10 percent of VC investments are made into companies that include even one woman leader.

We believe in investment as a force for change.

Name: TACTICAL MANAGEMENT
Description:
Tactical Management ist eine Beteiligungs- und Managementgesellschaft, die mehr bietet als reines Kapital: Wir bringen operative Stärke und unternehmerische Verantwortung ein. Wir investieren nicht nur in Zahlen, sondern in Substanz. Unser Ziel ist es, Unternehmen langfristig weiterzuentwickeln und verantwortungsvoll zu führen.

Ob wir ein neues Vorhaben aus der Taufe heben oder ein Traditionsunternehmen für die Zukunft neu aufstellen – unser Handeln ist geprägt von Verstand, Bodenhaftung und strategischem Weitblick.

Unser Fokus liegt auf vier zentralen Säulen:

• Unternehmensaufbau:
Wir realisieren neue Geschäftsideen von Grund auf. Dabei stellen wir nicht nur Kapital bereit, sondern bauen die gesamte Organisation und das Team auf, um aus einer Vision ein stabiles Unternehmen zu formen.

• Unternehmensnachfolge:
Wir bieten Inhabern diskrete und verlässliche Lösungen für die Übergabe ihres Lebenswerks. Wir bewahren die Identität des Unternehmens und sichern durch einen professionellen Übergang den Fortbestand für die nächste Generation.

• Unternehmensabspaltungen:
Wir spezialisieren uns auf die Herauslösung von Geschäftsbereichen aus bestehenden Strukturen. Diese Einheiten entwickeln wir zu eigenständigen, agilen Unternehmen, die ihre Marktchancen voll ausschöpfen können.

• Unternehmensneuausrichtung in schwierigen Phasen:
Wir sind zur Stelle, wenn es brenzlig wird. Bei operativen Engpässen oder notwendigen Restrukturierungen führen wir Unternehmen mit klarer Strategie und Erfahrung zurück in die Profitabilität.

Wir sind keine anonymen Investoren, sondern Mitstreiter mit Ausdauer. Wir schätzen den Wert gewachsener Strukturen und haben zugleich die Entschlossenheit, notwendige Veränderungen konsequent umzusetzen.

Lassen Sie uns persönlich und vertraulich über Akquisitionen, Nachfolgelösungen oder gemeinsame Projekte sprechen.

Name: Wellington Partners
Description:
Wellington Partners is one of the most successful pan-European venture capital firms. With funds totalling over € 800 million, we have invested throughout Europe in companies that have the potential to become real market leaders for more than 15 years.
 
We are committed to providing outstanding entrepreneurs with the necessary resources to fund their strategies. We typically lead financing rounds ranging from € 0.5 million to € 20 million. Depending on the maturity of the company, our own commitment can go as high as € 15 million.
 
Providing funding is only one part of our business. After funding, the entrepreneurs we back have access to the advice and guidance of our complete team and our entire global network. Our investment professionals operate out of four offices, located in London, Munich, Zurich and Palo Alto. The pan-European and transatlantic makeup of our organisation enables us to support our portfolio in expanding globally.
 
To date, Wellington Partners has invested in more than 100 companies throughout Europe. We have been a part of great successes as well as dismal failures. In our view, success has always been the result of a great idea executed by a great team with strong leadership and commitment; plus an enormous amount of hard work and an ounce of luck, the good fortune to be in the right place at right time.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Instituto 3IE
Description:
Somos la incubadora de negocios de la Universidad Técnica Federico Santa María, desde el 2001 contribuyendo y participando en el crecimiento económico-industrial nacional e internacional.

Nuestra labor, es ser un ente articulador de los distintos actores que forman parte del ecosistema de emprendimiento, integrando los sectores universitario, profesional y productivo en beneficio de la innovación, el fomento y fortalecimiento empresarial.

Nuestros principales objetivos son el desarrollo del emprendimiento, la creación y desarrollo de empresas e industrias orientadas al mercado global, que generen más puestos de trabajo, aumenten la producción y la riqueza del país y de la región.  El Instituto 3IE  es un punto de encuentro entre la universidad, el sector empresarial y el gobierno. Con ellos se busca diseñar y desarrollar iniciativas que aporten, a través de la incorporación de nuevos conocimientos, a actualizar y hacer más competitivo al sector empresarial, y a la generación de nuevas empresas de alto contenido tecnológico.

Estos objetivos se encuentran completamente alineados con las políticas de emprendimiento e innovación que la Universidad ha declarado prioritarias. En este sentido, el Instituto se complementa con otras instancias tales como la Oficina de Transferencia Tecnológica, el Centro Científico Tecnológico de Valparaíso, los centros de Investigación e innovación dependientes de la Dirección de Investigación y Gestión de Proyectos u otro tipo de iniciativas de origen estudiantil o académica orientadas en la misma dirección de forma integral o complementaria.

The second fund, EPIC II (2020), had a volume of €1.3 billion. EPIC I b (2021) had a volume of €0.7 billion and is a single asset fund that owns a controlling stake in Waterlogic/Culligan.

Description:
Act VC is an early-stage venture capital firm that partners with founders starting out, and established teams scaling their growth. We have raised over €600m across multiple funds to support this goal. 

We look for innovative, category-defining companies in large markets. We help founders build and scale these leveraging the experience of backing over 200 founders before. We work closely with them in this process. 

Over the past 25 years, we have invested in over 120 companies and built a broad global network.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: C2 Capital Partners
Description:
A C2 Capital Partners é uma sociedade de capital de risco independente, registada na Comissão de Mercado de Valores Mobiliários (CMVM), fundada em 2009 pela equipa de gestão (como Capital Criativo), sendo atualmente um operador de referência no setor de capital de risco em Portugal. 
A C2 tem duas áreas de negócio principais, tendo equipas de gestão dedicadas e autónomas para cada uma dessas áreas: Capital de Expansão e Investimentos Alternativos.

C2 Capital Partners is an independent private equity firm registered and supervised by the Portuguese Securities Market Commission (CMVM). Founded in 2009 by its managing partners as Capital Criativo, C2 Capital Partners is a reference player in the Portuguese private equity market.
C2 Capital Partners has independent dedicated teams assigned to each of its core business areas: Growth Capital and Alternative Investments.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Lok Capital
Description:
Lok Capital was founded in 2004. Lok (meaning "people") is an impact investor that makes investments in the financial services, healthcare, food & agri, and climate & sustainability areas in India. The focus is on Series A+ ventures that leverage technology to deliver quality in an affordable, accessible and sustainable way with a strong discipline on generating above market returns. 

Lok has multi-dimensional, contextual impact screening criteria that incorporate founder intent, gender, income levels, geography and a focus on underserved consumer segments. Across 4 funds (and counting!) — Lok has currently active AUM of >$500M.

Reach out to us at contact@lokcapital.com to discuss opportunities to work together.

External Grievances: A person, community or other external stakeholder, such as a civil society organization, can submit their questions or concerns to us at contact@lokcapital.com or by sending a mail to the following address: Lok Advisory Services Pvt Ltd, 418, Time Tower, MG Road, Sector 28, Gurugram, Haryana, 122 002 India. For more details, please refer to our External Grievance Redress Mechanism Policy available on our website.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: BRI Ventures
Description: BRI Ventures (BVI) is a corporate venture capital initiative backed by Bank Rakyat Indonesia, with headquarters in Jakarta, Indonesia. The firm is established as an independent entity with its own funding processes.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: KWORKS - Koç University Entrepreneurship Research Center
Description: KWORKS is a leading accelerator in Istanbul, helping technology-based Turkish startups become investment ready.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Northpond Ventures
Description: Northpond Ventures is a multi-billion-dollar science-driven venture capital firm based in Cambridge, MA; San Francisco, CA; and Bethesda, MD. Northpond has consistently been named one of the most active lead life science investors in venture industry rankings. It is deeply engaged in the academic ecosystem, having founded The Laboratory for Bioengineering Research and Innovation at the Wyss Institute at Harvard University; launched the MIT-Northpond Program – Advancing Life Science & Engineering Innovation; launched the Northpond Laboratories — Program for Research and Innovation at Stanford Medicine; and sponsored a prize for women entrepreneurs at MIT. It has led or co-led over 60 financings over the past several years and sits on the board of the vast majority of these businesses. Learn more at npv.vc.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: The Gores Group
Description:
The Gores Group is an investment firm focused on partnering with differentiated businesses that can benefit from our extensive industry knowledge and decades long experience. We have a deep understanding of and appreciation for building businesses given our operational roots and focus. We only deploy capital in partnerships where we have high conviction.

For additional information, please visit The Gores Group's website at www.gores.com
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Arise Ventures
Description:
Arise Ventures is the leading global early stage tech fund. Arise is the third global fund launched following the success of Saha Fund and Tholons Capital. Saha Fund was the first global gender lens women entrepreneurship venture capital fund, investing in women led/focused technology companies.

We are taking our legacy forward and building the largest platform for early stage tech companies via our fund, accelerator and community. We are building an amazing community and ecosystem of  women founders as well with our platform for women entrepreneurs at StrongHer. 

We understand the importance of operational know how to scale early stage companies and bring our strong network and investment expertise to catalyze that.

Our portfolio has a focused and curated pipeline of deals built with expert advisors who bring relevant leadership industry expertise and deep relationships with the innovation ecosystem.

With over 50+ startup investments across three funds with unicorns like Licious, Uniphore, Fitternity CultFit, Phenom. We are investing across Enterprise SaaS, Gen AI, Consumer Brands and Consumer Tech. 

Write to us at hello@ariseventures.vc
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Marktlink Capital
Description: Marktlink Capital helpt individuele investeerders te investeren in toonaangevende private equity en venture capital fondsen.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Meritech Capital
Description:
Meritech has operated since 1999 on a few simple beliefs: our companies should be center stage, enduring brands are the endgame, and the best tech companies don't just win – they win big.
We exist to help teams build market-leading companies in the technology markets that matter. We know this is ambitious and difficult, which informs our role of providing assistance without ego or ulterior agendas.

Our product and strategy are purpose-built. This enables focus, and focus is our advantage. We are not a venture supermarket. We do one thing, period: invest in the best late-stage tech companies in the universe. We’re comfortable not being part of every great company, knowing that it enables us to do whatever is needed to help make every one of our companies great.

Like you, we’re a group of builders and owners. Our small team of equal partners are on the frontlines throughout every step of the journey. We’re not just another fringe investor – we integrate as team members, contributing however we can to the shared mission. Everything we do, we do ourselves. We believe this increases the probability of a company’s success, and also results in deeper trust and more meaningful connections.

Every investment we make begins with us believing, “this could become the next Salesforce, Facebook, Coupa, NetSuite, Tableau, Datadog, Roblox, Snowflake or UiPath.”

If you share our motivation to transform a market, we’d love to find a way to do it together.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: UK Innovation & Science Seed Fund [UKI2S]
Description:
As a national public seed investment fund we invest, fund and support early-stage businesses and spinouts.

We embrace risk. With a 20-year track record of helping tech companies to grow from pre-seed to exit, we put in the work to make your business work. We’ll help you to: 

→  Find the best talent
→  Establish your board
→  Fundraise
→  Advance DE&I
→  Drive ESG
→  Deliver impact & more!

UKI2S are managed by Future Planet Capital (FPC). FPC helps companies to realise their full commercial and impact potential, providing the tools they need and embedding impact metrics into their journeys to deliver success and a legacy of positive change.

https://futureplanetcapital.com/
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Erito Ventures
Description:
Erito Ventures is a dynamic platform that connects small startups and SMEs with industry experts, larger organizations, and venture capitalists.
Our goal is to enable emerging businesses to access the right network and raise the funds they need to grow.

We serve as a bridge between innovation and opportunity by facilitating valuable partnerships and investment connections.
Whether you're an early-stage founder or a scaling SME, Erito Ventures helps you take the next big leap.

Under Erito Ventures, we offer Erito Consulting, our dedicated Investment Banking (IB) advisory arm.
Erito Consulting provides strategic consulting, fundraising support, and growth advisory services tailored to your business stage.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: BOND
Description: Bond is a venture capital firm that supports visionary founders of high-growth Internet companies throughout their life cycle of innovation and growth. The firm, a spinout of the Kleiner Perkins Digital Growth Fund, was launched in January 2019 and founded by Mary Meeker with Mood Rowghani, Noah Knauf.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: FitFinder || Empowering Innovation
Description:
At Fitfinder, we are committed to nurturing innovation and empowering entrepreneurship. As a premier incubation center, we provide cutting-edge technology resources and strategic business guidance to early-stage ventures. Our mission is to build a sustainable ecosystem that enables startups to thrive, with a strong focus on mentoring and scaling innovative ideas into successful enterprises.

What We Offer
	•	Mentorship & Guidance: Access to experienced mentors who provide insights to refine business models and go-to-market strategies.
	•	Funding Support: Connections to investors and funding opportunities tailored to your startup’s needs.
	•	Networking & Collaboration: Tap into our extensive network of industry leaders, potential customers, and strategic partners.
	•	State-of-the-Art Facilities: Workspaces equipped with advanced technology to foster creativity and productivity.

Our Focus Areas

We prioritize startups in healthcare, deep tech, and social innovation, aiming to solve grassroots challenges and drive impactful change. Our emphasis is on creating scalable solutions that contribute to a better and healthier world.

Why Bengaluru?

Located in the heart of India’s innovation hub, Bengaluru, Fitfinder leverages the city’s vibrant startup ecosystem. Our connections with industry partners, investors, and thought leaders enable us to support entrepreneurs through every stage of their journey—from ideation to commercialization.

Join Fitfinder

If you’re a health-focused startup or an innovator with a groundbreaking idea, Fitfinder is the place for you. Together, let’s turn your vision into impactful products that create real-world change.

Fitfinder: Where Innovation Meets Impact.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Yissum | The Hebrew University Tech Transfer Company
Description:
YISSUM is more than a tech transfer company.
We are a home for researchers, industry partners, and entrepreneurs who believe in the power of innovative ideas to change the world.
Founded in 1964 as the world’s third tech transfer company, we bring over 60 years of proven expertise in licensing and commercialization. We connect groundbreaking research from the Hebrew University with global markets - backed by a strong record of partnerships, economic growth, and impact.
Innovation means different things to different audiences: for a researcher it is a scientific breakthrough, for industry it is a technology that drives competitive advantage, and for an entrepreneur it is the vision of a new venture. Whatever your innovation means to you, we work with you to turn pioneering research from the Hebrew University into real-world impact.
We are committed to open dialogue with every researcher, industry partner, and investor - to understand your needs and work together to create win-win solutions and partnerships that bring innovation to life in the most effective, relevant, and sustainable way.
From the first spark to global success, we walk the journey with you. With deep academic roots, strong industry collaborations, global market insight, and personalized engagement, we offer a unique ecosystem of support, connection, and shared purpose. Our ecosystem provides not only the extraordinary portfolio of technologies and knowledge from the Hebrew University, but also direct access to the full potential of the Hebrew University’s research and collaborations.
We are dedicated to empowering great minds and their cutting-edge ideas - by shaping the right strategies, finding the right partners, and facilitating the right opportunities to thrive in the marketplace.
Now, we are shaping a future where every innovator feels seen, empowered, and inspired.

Join us. Together, we can shape the future of innovation and turn ideas into impact.
Your Innovation. Our Journey. Shared Impact.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: EMPEA
Description:
EMPEA is the global industry association for private capital in emerging markets. An independent, non-profit organization, the association brings together 300+ firms—including institutional investors, fund managers, and industry advisors—who manage more than USD5 trillion in assets across 130 countries. EMPEA supports its members globally through research and intelligence, investor meetings, education, and advocacy.

Despite significant differences across regions and countries, private capital managers and investors face important common challenges and opportunities. EMPEA’s mission is to foster a vibrant and informed industry to realize sustainable growth in emerging markets. In support of its mission, EMPEA:

- Researches, analyzes, and disseminates authoritative information on emerging markets private capital fundraising, investment, and exits while continuously monitoring and reporting on industry trends, benchmarks, best practices, and market developments

- Convenes investors for meetings and programs around the world, which provide its members, investors, and other interested stakeholders with forums and opportunities to debate, network, and learn about key issues affecting private capital investing in emerging countries;

- Collaborates with industry partners, including national and regional venture capital/private equity associations, to strengthen the network and knowledge base of emerging markets private capital practitioners

- Advocates for policy and regulatory reforms that strengthen the environment for private capital investing in emerging markets
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Kalei Ventures
Description:
Our mission is to help the best latin american early stage entrepreneurs successfully address big opportunities by providing capital and strategic value.

Kalei was born with a clear focus on international expansion and global leadership for its portfolio companies, as demonstrated by the fact that its partners have lived and invested in startups across four continents and their networks span the whole globe. 

Kalei held its first closing in January 2019 and has already invested in companies based in Argentina, Chile, Brazil, Colombia and Mexico. 

In order to marry our international passion and expertise with the strengths of the regional ecosystem in Latin America, our investment thesis revolves around sectors where Latin America can create global leaders, either because of the quality of the education system and importance of regional companies in a particular sector or because of the global importance of the region as a percentage of the global output in a given sector. These sectors include software development applications (e.g. marketplaces, consumer internet, fintech, edtech) and sectors that heavily benefit from new trends like Artificial Intelligence and the Internet of Things (e.g. healthtech, agtech, logistics). 
Kalei stands for ‘Kaleidoscope’, which symbolizes the importance of diversity of thought background, ethnicity and gender in our team.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Piper
Description:
We are the investor-partner of choice for ambitious founders growing brand legends that make people’s lives healthier, happier, and more fulfilling, while helping them minimise their impact on the environment. This is our purpose.

We invest in fast growing brands with sales of £5-50m. 

Started by founders, we are still a mix of founders, investors, brand strategists, digital innovators, talent and culture experts who have helped more than 50 brands become disruptive leaders across 70 countries, growing digital sales by over £500m and opened more than 350 stores, restaurants and bars.
 
Our team of experts alongside our global community of brand leaders help our partner brands navigate their growth challenges and fast-shifting changes in consumer behaviour. Our invite-only skills-sharing Founders’ Collectives and Geekmeets are attended by hundreds of the most innovative brands every year.

With $750M under management, Mercury has created over $9 billion of value with an operationally focused investment strategy helping startups achieve rapid, sustainable growth. Name: Sydecar

Sydecar eliminates operational headaches, freeing up time and resources so managers can focus on building portfolios, strengthening track records and fostering stronger relationships with limited partners. Name: Saudi Angel Investors
Description:
Launched in October 2020, SAI is a Micro-VC founded by 60 like-minded investors. We search for entrepreneurs that have taken their ideas from proof of concept to customer traction to scale with drive, energy, determination and ambition. We invest in the Seed and Series A rounds of early-stage technology companies with high growth potential.
 
We are a fully-capitalized investment company and our angels range from seasoned investors, tech entrepreneurs, venture fund partners, senior executives. We utilize our collective experience with our extensive network of contacts to add value to our investees through our ability to open doors and to mentor them.
 
We aim to invest between $50,000 to $150,000 in each of the companies we select, and our founders will be looking to co-invest in exceptional deals. We aim to keep a reserve to deploy additional capital to support the growth of our portfolio companies that shows great potential.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Apeiron Investment Group
Description:
Apeiron Investment Group is a discretionary investment firm founded and owned by serial entrepreneur and investor Christian Angermayer. At our core, we are driven by a bold optimism for a future where technology empowers people to live longer, healthier, and more fulfilling lives. As entrepreneurs at heart, we pride ourselves on being hands-on, reliable, and long-term partners—committed to supporting exceptional founders of companies as well as emerging asset managers in pushing the boundaries of imagination and shaping the future we aspire to live in.

We apply a global multi-strategy investment approach, with a primary focus on the US, and teams across New York, London, Berlin, Abu Dhabi, and Malta. Our efforts span direct investments in innovative companies, as well as anchor LP investments combined with minority GP stakes in emerging asset managers. Asset managers we have stakes in currently manage approximately $5 billion in external capital.

Follow Christian and Apeiron on X: @C_Angermayer and @ApeironInvests.  

For media, event and podcast queries please email media@apeiron-investments.com.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Sony Innovation Fund
Description:
For over 70 years Sony has been relentlessly innovating technology, content and services. With the creation of Sony Innovation Fund in 2016, we are now investing in companies to journey along with us. 

Sony Innovation Fund is dedicated to engaging with promising early-stage companies. Beyond investment, our mission is to provide access to the broader Sony world and its global network and collaborate with startups to: 

• Foster business creation in new and existing areas of interest to Sony
• Catalyze a talented and passionate team
• Develop innovative and scalable technology
• Explore new and emerging ecosystems 

Our investment criteria:

• Funding: Seed, Series-A, Series-B round or similar funding stages
• Geographies: US, Europe, Israel, Japan
• Areas of Interest: Consumer and Enterprise-facing businesses, including but 
   not limited to:
         • Platform and Service offerings across verticals
                    • Entertainment and Gaming
                    • Lifestyle, Health and Wellness
                    • Industrial, Manufacturing, Mobility, Agriculture & Logistics
                    • Financial Technology (Fintech)
         • Enabling Technologies
                    • Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning: core algorithms, 
                       recognition technologies, service platforms
                    • Drones and Robotics: structural and embedded technologies, 
                       control systems, management platforms
                    • Sensors and IoT: sensing hardware, middleware, connectivity
                    • Immersion and Visualization: virtual reality / augmented reality / 
                      mixed reality
                    • Next-generation devices: display, security, biometrics, haptics

Name: Virgin USA
Description:
Virgin Management USA (previously Virgin USA) is the North American headquarters of Sir Richard Branson's Virgin Group.  Its role is to develop the Virgin brand in North America and to manage Virgin's investments in its portfolio companies.  

Virgin businesses in North America include Virgin America, a domestic airline that's reinventing air travel; Virgin Mobile USA and Virgin Mobile Canada, leading youth-oriented national wireless networks in the US and Canada; Virgin Galactic, Virgin's ground-breaking space tourism venture; and Virgin Hotels, which is developing a highly differentiated hotel proposition that taps into evolving trends in consumer tastes.

Name: Bregal Sagemount
Description: Bregal Sagemount is a growth-focused private capital firm with over $7.5 billion in committed capital. The firm provides flexible capital and strategic assistance to market-leading companies in high-growth sectors across a wide variety of transaction situations. Bregal Sagemount invests $15 million to $400 million per transaction into targeted sectors including software, digital infrastructure, healthcare IT / services, business and consumer services, and financial technology / specialty finance. For more information, please visit www.sagemount.com.

Name: Rethink Impact, LP
Description: Rethink Impact is the largest, US-based impact venture firm with a gender lens that invests in female leaders using technology to solve the world’s biggest problems. Rethink Impact believes that the next generation of extraordinary companies (in health, environmental sustainability, education, and economic empowerment) will find success through their relentless pursuit of mission, for the benefit of all communities.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Tidal Ventures
Description: We are insatiably curious technologists who partner with disruptive companies to revolutionise industries. Armed with an unmatched understanding of how technology catalyses transformation within our targeted verticals, we leverage our extensive hands-on experience to build and scale technology companies. We engage closely with founders, acting as strategic partners to see around corners and unlock their full potential. We don’t just invest capital; we invest the necessary time and expertise at every stage of a company’s journey to realise the upside potential  while mitigating against downside risk.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Pymwymic
Description: For over 30 years, we’ve played a pioneering role in impact investing, proving that capital can be a force for restoring our food systems and driving positive change. By investing in visionary entrepreneurs who are rethinking how we grow, produce, and consume food, we help scale regenerative solutions that work in harmony with nature, empower farmers, and create lasting impact.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: DOB Equity
Description:
DOB Equity is a leading Dutch family office investing in innovate, scalable and impactful companies in East Africa. DOB Equity invests in businesses that positively contribute to a more social and sustainable society and deliver long-term profitability.

DOB Equity allocates substantial resources to portfolio management. DOB actively works with the entrepreneurs to mitigate potential risks related to the environment, social and governance matters, whilst creating value and social impact for the company and its communities.  
 
DOB Equity takes a diversified portfolio approach and invests venture capital and private equity in companies in different stages of life in a variety of sectors in Kenya, Tanzania, Uganda, Rwanda and Burundi.  

DOB Equity works from its offices in Kenya and The Netherlands. This provides DOB Equity with a deep insight into the unique opportunities and challenges that Africa presents, enabling DOB Equity to provide tailor made capital solutions to enterprises, resulting in lasting performance.

DOB Equity is an evergreen fund with all proceeds from investments being reinvested, making DOB Equity a true long-term growth partner for its portfolio companies.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Cambridge Future Tech
Description:
Cambridge Future Tech (CFT) is a uniquely tech-first venture builder, working closely with top-tier universities for positive global impact.

Based in Cambridge, UK, and led by CEO Owen Thompson, CFT founds and grows deep tech ventures that would not exist without early-stage intervention. 

Its work spans semiconductors, advanced materials, AI, quantum, and robotics – building companies from day zero with scientists and inventors at the forefront of their fields.

Alongside university partnerships, CFT also builds on behalf of FTSE100 companies and collaborates with global leaders including Anglo American plc, Nokia Bell Labs, Cemex, and CERN, the home of the Large Hadron Collider.

With the leading deep tech scouting mechanism in the UK, CFT acts as a founding partner in identifying and realising the potential of the technologies that will define the future.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: BIGBAN Investors Spain
Description:
BIGBAN, fundada en 2007 como entidad de carácter privado e independiente, se posiciona como un referente del sector de inversión privada en capital semilla y early stage.

La asociación aglutina a más de 130 business angels de distinta tipología y ha canalizado más de 20 millones de inversión privada en proyectos empresariales innovadores. 

Formamos a los dos colectivos para tener un sector robusto y profesionalizado, dinamizando un nuevo tejido empresarial.

Miembro de AEBAN - Asociación Nacional de Business Angels.
Miembro de EBAN - European Business Angels Network.

Name: Social Impact Capital
Description: Social Impact Capital specializes in impact investing, which we define as investments that can deliver top decile returns in addition to a positive social impact.  We focus on the "essentials of human need" — energy, water, food, health, environment, education, housing, access to capital, and social justice.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Tenacious Ventures
Description: We drive change at the intersection of agri-food system transformation and climate solutions. Host of the AgTech...So What? podcast.

Name: Wise Equity
Description:
We are a team of professionals with deep experience gained from consultancy, investment banking and industry, based in Milan

We invest in Italian Excellence, targeting export-oriented leaders in specific market niches with compelling industrial plans and/or a need to develop a professional management structure (and do not shy away from complex investment propositions)

We like to co-invest with entrepreneurs and management, accompanying them in tackling daily challenges and sharing the burdens and benefits

We are strong believers in strategic business combinations (locally and internationally) and sector consolidation to further strengthen our portfolio companies and increase their competitiveness on an increasingly global scale
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Miami Angels
Description: Founded in 2013, Miami Angels is one of Florida's largest, longest-running, and most active angel networks. We are industry agnostic, focusing primarily on post-product, post-revenue, early-stage technology companies.

Description: Human Ventures creates and builds innovative technology companies that aim to make life easier and more fulfilling. Our model is built around cultivating an ecosystem of highly talented and inspired Humans from the outset. We help our companies find great talent, build a strong foundation and raise investment from top tier investors who will help set our companies apart.
