Name: Operator Collective
Description: Operator Collective is a venture fund and dream team community of operator LPs. OpCo brings together 200+ of tech’s most exceptional executives from diverse backgrounds to invest in and supercharge the next generation of enterprise tech. Meet the Collective Venture Model.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: TOMCAT
Description:
Accompagner les équipes fondatrices, dérisquer l’investissement, recruter les meilleurs talents.

Cette mission, nous l’accomplissons avec le désir de transmettre à la nouvelle génération d’entrepreneurs et d’entrepreneuses les quelques clés de succès que nos expériences complémentaires nous ont apprises, et en réunissant au même endroit tout ce dont ils ont besoin pour décoller.

 Envie de nous présenter votre projet en 15min ? 
Complétez le formulaire suivant : https://www.tomcat.eu/rejoindre-tomcat/entrepreneurs-contact/
Nous vous recontacterons 

Après une aventure entrepreneuriale à succès de 17 ans chez ProwebCE, vendue au groupe Edenred pour 300m d’euros, Patrice Thiry, Jeremy Pouyer et Pierre Marronnier sont rejoints par Elie du Pré de Saint Maur, ancien CMO de Doctolib et du groupe Edenred, pour co-fonder Tomcat fin 2020.

Ce qui réunit l’équipe Tomcat depuis le Jour 1, c’est cette envie partagée de transmettre notre expérience, notre savoir-faire, nos erreurs et nos bonnes pratiques à la nouvelle génération d’entrepreneurs et d’entrepreneuses, pour accélérer et amplifier son succès.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: kopa ventures
Description:
kopa ventures is an established early-stage impact investor with a focus on European climate tech startups in the fields of Energy, Mobility, Nature and Carbon Tech. 

The kopa ventures team, located in Berlin, Munich, Mainz, and London, combines exceptional domain expertise, entrepreneurial acumen, and access to an extensive investment and expert network to support early-stage startups in achieving substantial positive financial and ecological impacts.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Velocity Ventures
Description:
Velocity Ventures is a Venture Capital fund manager that invests in Travel & Hospitality technologies globally.

Our team comprises of sector specialists and successful entrepreneurs with extensive investment experience and a robust global network. By leveraging our deep industry insights and connections, we empower visionary founders transforming the global Travel & Hospitality landscape.

If you are the founder of a growing startup with great potential in the Travel & Hospitality sector, please get in touch at reachus@velocityventures.vc
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Prima Materia
Description:
We are a European company that builds and develops new companies for the long term.

Through our companies, we leverage technology to drive progress in areas that matter most to society.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: NGP Capital
Description:
We back early-stage B2B companies from Series A onwards in Europe and the US, focusing on enterprise software, industrial technology, cybersecurity, and edge & data infrastructure — sectors at the forefront of the convergence of the digital and physical worlds.

Since our founding in 2005, we’ve grown to over $1.6B in AUM and have invested in more than 100 companies, including 18 unicorns and 11 IPOs.

Our current portfolio includes ANYbotics, GrayMatter Robotics, The Exploration Company, Lime, GetYourGuide & SecurityScorecard, while our exits include Deliveroo, Xiaomi, Moovit, Kaltura, and many more.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: BaltCap
Description:
BaltCap is the largest private equity firm in the Baltic States focusing on small and mid-market buyout, expansion capital and infrastructure investments.

BaltCap has strong presence in all three Baltic countries, Finland and Poland. Our experienced team of 35 + investment professionals works in our local offices in Helsinki, Tallinn, Riga, Vilnius, Stockholm and Warsaw. 

Since 1995, BaltCap has been managing several private equity and venture capital funds with total capital of over EUR 650 million and has made more than 80 platform investments.

BaltCap is a member of European Private Equity & Venture Capital Association (www.evca.eu), Estonian Private Equity and Venture Capital Association (www.estvca.ee), Latvian Venture Capital Association (www.lvca.lv ) and Lithuanian Venture Capital Association.

BaltCap is a signatory of the United Nations Principles for Responsible Investment (UNPRI) since 2008.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Fluid Ventures
Description: Direct to Consumer focused Venture Capital Fund
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Nepal Private Equity Association
Description:
Nepal’s prominent private equity and venture capital firms have come together to set up the Nepal Private Equity Association (NPEA). The objective of the Association is to promote alternative investment activities by bringing together stakeholders in Nepal’s expanding entrepreneurial ecosystem.

The NPEA, incorporated as a profit non-distributing entity under the Company Act, will be governed by a Board of Directors and administered by a small team of professionals. The following firms are the founding members:

Accelerator Nepal 
Business Oxygen (WLC Ventures)
Dolma Advisors
One to Watch 
Team Ventures
True North Associates

In addition to relevant research activities, the Association will conduct various programs and initiatives in the forms of training, workshops and networking events catered towards upskilling of professional practitioners in the private equity/venture capital space. This will help forge a stronger ecosystem that will lead to greater collaboration opportunities with similar international networks.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Austin Ventures
Description: Austin Ventures (“AV”) has worked with talented entrepreneurs to build valuable companies for over 30 years. With $3.9 billion of capital raised, AV is one of the most established venture capital firms in the nation. AV invests in early stage and middle market companies, and its strategy is to partner with talented executives and entrepreneurs to build industry-leading companies predominantly in Texas.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Suffolk Technologies
Description:
Suffolk Technologies is a leading venture capital platform investing in ConTech, PropTech and InfraTech startups transforming the $12T built environment sector. Since 2019, we’ve supported over 50 high-growth startups in AI, automation, robotics, sustainability, smart buildings and supply chain, creating tangible value across the construction and real estate industries. Leveraging the resources and expertise of Suffolk’s $6B tech-forward construction business and a network of industry-leading companies, we provide unparalleled access to validate, scale and commercialize innovative solutions.  
 
Currently deploying capital from a $110M institutional venture fund (launched in 2023) and with a team that combines deep industry and VC experience, Suffolk Technologies helps startups reshape the built world. Portfolio highlights include OpenSpace (jobsite AI), Kojo (materials procurement), WINT (water damage prevention), EquipmentShare (next-gen equipment rental), and Higharc (AI-driven home design). Check us out at SuffolkTech.com.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Azolla Ventures
Description: Azolla Ventures invests in early-stage technology companies with the potential for gigaton-scale climate impact. Azolla Ventures was created by Prime Coalition, a nonprofit organization that partners with philanthropists and other mission-driven investors to support market-driven innovations designed to catalyze, deepen, or accelerate solutions for climate change. The management company of Azolla Ventures also manages the Prime Impact Fund portfolio of companies.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: SHIFT Invest
Description:
SHIFT Invest, founded in 2009, is an impact venture capital fund. We turn investments into positive impact on climate and nature by investing in early-stage companies and supporting impact entrepreneurs to scale faster. 
 
Based on our fund-level impact mission we strive to bring back the balance between nature and society by fighting climate change, loss of biodiversity and depletion of the resources of the planet. We do so by supporting and investing in innovative start ups and scale ups contributing to this mission in the themes: food & agriculture, green industries, energy and mobility.

Together with our partners, we offer entrepreneurs an extensive network and insights into various sectors.

Our involvement in the start ups and scale ups we invest in is above all about the support we can give to the people who run them. This support is based on our core qualities analytic, reliable, professional and our broad expertise.

We are a diverse and experienced team committed to accelerate innovation by supporting the creation and acceleration of great companies. We work according to our values, professional, ambitious, entrepreneurial and fun.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Fenox Venture Capital
Description:
Fenox Venture Capital is a Silicon Valley-based venture capital firm founded by an exceptional team of seasoned entrepreneurs and proven international business leaders. Fenox VC works with emerging technology companies worldwide and specializes in helping entrepreneurs achieve global expansion into North America, Asia, the Middle East, and Europe. Our team operates out of offices across 7 different countries, including Japan, Indonesia, and South Korea, and offers a wide range of domain expertise.

Fenox VC is an early stage investment firm, working with world-class management and technical teams that are targeting disruptive opportunities in IT, Health IT, Artificial Intelligence, IoT, Robotics, Big Data, Virtual Reality, Augmented Reality, FinTech and Next Generation Technologies.

Fenox VC applies a collaborative and transparent approach to working with portfolio management teams. As an advocate of the lean startup model, Fenox is dedicated to helping ideas grow quickly, obtaining market feedback, and assisting entrepreneurs in launching new products on a global scale.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Maverix Private Equity
Description:
Maverix Private Equity is a Toronto-based private equity firm that provides scale-up capital and operating expertise to disruptive, tech-enabled businesses. Maverix partners with entrepreneurs across Canada and the U.S. to build the next generation of global champions. The firm supports founders via significant minority positions to help accelerate organic growth.

Maverix is run by entrepreneurs, funded by entrepreneurs, for entrepreneurs.

For more information on Maverix and all its investments, visit maverixpe.com or follow on X @MaverixPe.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: OCBC Ventura
Description:
Venture Capital arm of Bank OCBC in Indonesia, focusing on investment on seed and series A stage tech enabled company in Indonesia

For any investment proposal please send email to investment@ocbcventura.com
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: CincyTech
Description: CincyTech is a venture capital firm that invests in founders with complex innovations that drive compelling improvements to the world’s critical challenges. One of the most active seed funds in the Midwest, CincyTech is supported by Ohio Third Frontier.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: C4 Ventures
Description:
C4 Ventures is a leading European Venture firm led by former Apple and Microsoft executives, a team of business operators backing ambitious tech entrepreneurs with capital and much more. 

C4 Ventures supports entrepreneurs as lead investor in Early-stage companies and smart co-investor in Growth-stage companies. Its strategy is based on its expertise in three major themes: Smart Hardware, Future of Commerce and Future of Work. Its leaders believe in transformational technology at the service of business, society and our planet. 

More than an investor, C4 Ventures strives to create value through deep understanding, strong involvement, and concrete operational support, notably companies’ development in Europe. 

Since inception, C4 Ventures has backed over 50 startups of which 10 became unicorns.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: IRIS Ventures
Description:
We are a growth equity firm empowering a new generation of extraordinary visionaries. Bolstering brands and tech-enabled solutions that make our lives healthier, happier and more convenient, where no one is left behind.

We look for unstoppable founders who have the ability to understand today the problems of tomorrow, defining the future of consumption with a clear mission: upgrading our lives.

We admire brands that encourage responsible innovation, diversity, transparency and positive change.

We guide founders by providing top operational and strategic support, working side by side in true partnership. Our community and expert network is endless, and we make sure you get what you need.

We understand the power harnessed by the brands that modern consumers love: a compelling mix of seamless products & experiences, engaging content and a true sense of belonging, all enabled by data and technology.  We specialise in the intersection of Community, Branding, Innovation and Technology. 

And we do this by combining art, science and intuition, secretly noticing details that no one else sees, operating with purpose and empathy, with the aim to build a more human digital-lifestyle future.

We back globally ambitious founders operating across Europe, UK and the US; helping accelerate their growth via our unique access to major markets, including Asia.

We promote investments leading/co-leading Series A (+/-) and co-investments in later-stage rounds.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Enterprise Investors
Description: Enterprise Investors is the most experienced private equity firm in Central and Eastern Europe. Since 1990, we have supported the growth of 161 companies by providing capital and expertise for ambitious expansion strategies. We’ve raised 10 funds, invested over EUR 2.4 billion and exited 141 companies, including 35 IPOs on the WSE, PSE, Nasdaq Vilnius and NYSE. We focus on fast-growing sectors like technology, financial services, healthcare, retail and manufacturing. ESG is fully embedded in our operations, and we avoid projects that could harm communities, the environment or the economy.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: AnD Ventures
Description:
Based in Tel-Aviv, we invest in early stage Israeli startups powered by extraordinary founders & cutting edge technologies. Focused on data, AI and validated market fit by working hand in hand with our growth & corporate partners to accelerate our entrepreneurs, creating industry leading companies.

We redefine Value-Add investing by accelerating and developing company building, enabling our entrepreneurs to build transformational tech companies

better and faster, together.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Main Street Capital Corporation
Description: Main Street Capital Corporation (NYSE: MAIN) is a principal investment firm, based in Houston, Texas, that provides long-term debt and equity capital to lower middle market companies and debt capital to middle market companies. Main Street’s portfolio investments are typically made to support management buyouts, recapitalizations, growth financings, refinancings and acquisitions of companies that operate in diverse industry sectors. Main Street seeks to partner with entrepreneurs, business owners and management teams and generally provides "one-stop" financing alternatives within its lower middle market portfolio. Main Street’s lower middle market companies generally have annual revenues between $10 million and $150 million. Main Street’s middle market debt investments are made in businesses that are generally larger in size than its lower middle market portfolio companies.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Aurora Tech Award
Description:
Backing the boldest female tech founders in emerging markets 
2026 Top 100 is on the way.

To founders: capital, connection, community.
To investors: meet the boldest startups shaping the future.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Palm Venture Studios
Description:
Palm Venture Studios is the only venture studio focused on "second-chance" capital for early-stage startups. We partner with leaders whose startups are stuck, and we provide the critical funding and strategic support needed to help their businesses succeed.

Our investment approach is sector-agnostic. Instead, we invest in visionary founders and early-stage startups poised to reshape industries and drive meaningful change. Our unique strategy solves a critical need for startups. With patient capital and operational support, we help promising startups find their path to profitability and greater impact.

If you or someone in your network could benefit from our investment, contact us at hello@palmventurestudios.com

If you or someone you know would be interested in working with us, contact us at talent@palmventurestudios.com
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Agility Ventures
Description:
Agility Ventures, a leading Angel Investors Network, is capturing the market by storm through its guidance and consultations about investing in new technology-focused businesses. 

Agility Ventures is keen to invest in early-stage businesses, which have the potential to create disproportionate value. 

Agility has an ever-growing network of more than 350+ investors. 

The members of Agility network are leaders and experts, having the valuable experience of having run successful ventures or creating successful ventures. 

Agility has five chapters across India and will be going global soon with 4 upcoming chapters in 3 continents. 

Going forward Agility aims to conclude investments well over 30 companies with an average ticket size of INR 50 to 75 lacs. These investments will span across education technology, healthcare, E-commerce, gaming, automobiles, electric vehicles, robotics, agri-tech, manufacturing, etc. 

Agility plans to go beyond the informal structure of angel groups to a larger institutionalized model because of its standardized & transparent processes that allow it to access geographies, scout exciting new businesses, and approach a large number of investors.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: StartupCrafters
Description:
StartupCrafters is uniquely positioned as a hands-on Startup Studio, Accelerator, Network, and Venture Fund.

The challenges faced by startup founders are as diverse as their ideas. Startups evolve through multiple phases; a piece of advice or mentorship or a cookie-cutter 12 week cohort isn’t enough. 

This is precisely why we get into trenches together with founders and do the heavy lifting on various aspects at every step of the way.

Ideate, Build, Network, Fundraise, Blitzscale.
Ace the 5-step mantra to your venture’s success with StartupCrafters – a result-driven startup studio.

Visit StartupCrafters website and apply today.

Our Core Competencies

Bring what you have, whether it is an idea or a team of founders, we will help you ‘start-up.’ At StartupCrafters, we turn your vision into a thriving business.

Join Us Now
Build Incredible Products
Leverage our top-notch talent, stringent processes and meticulous execution to turn your ideas into world-class software and hardware products.

Branding and Marketing
With the right mix of strategy, creativity, and technology tools, we create right perceptions about your brand and help you monetize.

Legal & Accounting Support
We connect you with our attorneys and CPAs for IP/Patents, ESOPS, Partnership and Counsel to make sure your startup is due-diligence ready.

Product-Market Fit
We help you gain a precise understanding of the market opportunities, expectations, and validation to build early traction and grow.

Growth Strategy
We help you create brand presence and generate revenues. Connect with our network to explore opportunities to blitz scale globally.

Capital Raise
We do a “Investor Readiness Check” and prepare you for the “Pitch Days” to present in front of potential investors - both angel networks and VCs.

Visit StartupCrafters website and apply today.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: HAVN Capital
Description:
HAVN Capital partners with innovative companies to advance decarbonisation across Europe. We invest in private companies, offering our strategic assistance to scale sustainable solutions within renewable energy, electrification, and energy efficiency.

We are a buyout investor specialising in the lower-middle market and seek to partner with exceptional management teams. Our mission is to foster sustainable, profitable growth, delivering industry-leading returns for investors whilst yielding significant environmental impact.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Vida Ventures, LLC
Description: Vida Ventures is a next-generation life sciences investment firm founded in 2017 by a group of scientists, physicians, entrepreneurs and investors passionate about building and funding breakthroughs in biomedicine. Together we form an independent, bold investment group bound together by a simple word – life. Our mission is to bring science to life and advance transformative biomedical innovations that have the potential to make a meaningful difference for patients. Vida has a bicoastal presence and currently manages approximately $1.8 billion.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Linzor Capital Partners
Description:
Founded in 2006, Linzor Capital Partners is a leading regional private equity firm with investments across Mexico, Chile, Colombia, Peru, and Uruguay. The firm has raised more than US$1.4 billion in capital commitments since its inception and currently holds investments in diverse sectors, including healthcare, telecommunications, financial services, education, retail, and technology. Linzor invests in companies with strong growth potential, creating value through strategic initiatives and operational improvements that drive impact outcomes and sustainable business growth.

For more information, please visit www.linzorcapital.com.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Cottonwood Technology Fund
Description:
Cottonwood Technology Fund is an early stage venture capital fund that makes impact investments in Key Enabling Technologies (Deep Tech & Hard Science). 

Cottonwood's investment criteria are as follows:

 Sector focus: B2B High-Tech/ Hard Science (e.g. Photonics, Quantum, Micro- and Nanoelectronics, Advanced Materials, Sensortech and Nanotech, Medical Technology, Energy Transition, Advanced Manufacturing, Robotics & Spacetech)

 Regional focus: Netherlands, Germany (secondary: Belgium, Denmark, Finland, Sweden, Switzerland) and Southwest USA (AZ, CO, NM, OK, UT, TX)

 Stage: Pre-Seed, Seed & Early Stage
Ticket Size: min. €500.000 and max. €3 million in the first round

 Other Requirements: IP/ patent-based technology

 Locations: Denver | Santa Fe | Amsterdam | Enschede

Current and prior investments include Skorpios Technologies, Sarcos Robotics (NASDAQ: PDYN), Exagen (NASDAQ: XGN), BayoTech, Sencure, Infinitum Electric, Flexiramics (previously Eurekite), FibeRio (acquired by Clarcor), xF Technologies, Respira Therapeutics, BennuBio, Arominca Technologies, The Drone Bird Company, TriLumina (acquired by Lumentum), SoundEnergy, OPNT, mPower Technology, Reyedar, Smartnanotubes Technologies, Q*Bird, Orange Quantum Systems, Keiron Printing Technologies, Team Wildfire, Green Theme Technologies, Circular Genomics, BioFlyte, LatticeX, Horne Technologies.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: AI Forge
Description:
AI Forge is a world-class AI incubator headquartered in London, dedicated to nurturing and funding over 45 new AI startups annually.  

Our mission is to empower the next generation of innovative founders to disrupt industries, drive economic growth, and tackle real-world challenges.  

We offer a comprehensive 12-week program, including 8 weeks of in-person collaboration, running 3 cohorts per year with 25 companies in each.  

At AI Forge, we connect startups with experienced mentors and leading corporates to help them succeed and scale effectively.

Contact: 
Investment: kevin@aiforge.org
Program: tom@aiforge.org
Partnerships: jj@aiforge.org
Events / Marketing: contact@aiforge.org
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Atento Capital
Description: Atento Capital is a Tulsa-based venture capital firm focused on unlocking unsung potential in early-stage founders through providing access to venture capital, human capital and expanded professional networks. Atento Capital has created pathways to upward mobility and  helped dozens of companies and entrepreneurs thrive in Tulsa’s tech ecosystem by democratizing access to venture capital for traditionally underinvested groups of people.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Gresham Executive
Description:
Leveraging our international roots, Gresham Executive blends local market knowledge with vast global networks to place best in class professionals in the Private Equity Sector.
 
Our focus is exclusively centred on the Private Equity community. The teams specialised expertise ensures that we are the chosen partner for professionals and investment firms across the globe.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: SIDBI Venture Capital Ltd
Description:
SIDBI Venture Capital Limited (SVCL), incorporated in 1999, is an investment management company and a wholly owned subsidiary of SIDBI (www.sidbi.in), the Apex Financial Institution in the country for the MSME sector. Over its life, SVCL has managed funds focussed on different themes including Startups/ early stage technology businesses, manufacturing SMEs, service entities, agri businesses, financial inclusion companies, etc. However, the common string in all investments has been the focus to identify strong & ethical leadership teams capable of executing innovation based business models or robust scalable businesses. 
We firmly believe our investments are partnerships and seek like-minded entrepreneurs to work with a view to develop businesses that are solid in their principles and objectives.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Vorwerk Ventures
Description:
Vorwerk Ventures is an independent venture capital fund (in its 4th fund generation) from Germany with assets under management of over €400 million. We are supporting startups that drive meaningful change for people and planet. Our investment focus is on the Consumer, Food, Health, and Climate sectors. Built on decades of expertise and a strong track record, we are guided by a thesis-driven investment strategy.

Our highly experienced team combines deep domain knowledge with a hands-on approach to support founders, offering expert guidance and access to a robust network of follow-on investors.

At Vorwerk Ventures, we believe visionary entrepreneurs can shape a better future for people and the planet. We are proud to partner with startups making this vision a reality.
 
Headquartered in Berlin, one of Europe’s leading startup hubs, we are constantly on the lookout for opportunities and invest in Seed/Series A with tickets of €1m to €5m and reserve up to €15m for future growth.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: McKesson Ventures
Description:
McKesson Ventures helps innovators build and scale businesses that support an easier to navigate, more effective and efficient health care delivery system for key stakeholders on all sides of the health care economy. 

McKesson Ventures targets companies that both catalyze and benefit from the key changes taking place in the health care ecosystem. We focus on the long-term strategic needs of the industry and the McKesson ecosystem - not the tactical needs of specific McKesson business units. We are a valuable partner to our portfolio companies, serving as a conduit to the many strengths, relationships and industry breadth of McKesson. We understand health care and we recognize the importance of responding and acting at a pace calibrated with early stage innovators. Lastly our team’s financial incentives are aligned with entrepreneurs and our investor syndicate partners.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Brick & Mortar Ventures
Description: Focused exclusively on venture capital opportunities in "technology for the built world," Brick & Mortar Ventures identifies, backs, and enables emerging companies developing innovative software and hardware solutions for the industries of architecture, engineering, construction, and facilities management. Its hyper-focused mandate allows Brick & Mortar to continuously develop industry expertise and relationships across these large and growing verticals and build value to its portfolio by taking a hands-on, active role as an investor and partner to its companies.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Prime Ventures (VC)
Description: Prime Ventures is a leading venture capital firm focusing on investing in European companies in the technology and related industries and leverages its capital, experience and network to actively guide them into global category leaders. The firm has invested in companies in the Benelux countries, United Kingdom, France, Finland and Sweden. From its offices in The Netherlands and the UK the independent partnership manages over 750 million euro in committed capital.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Rubicon Venture Capital
Description:
Rubicon Venture Capital is a bi-coastal VC (SF and NYC) that invests in Late Seed and Series A & B venture capital financing rounds of high potential early stage disruptive technology companies. We are focused on backing consumer and enterprise technology companies in the internet, software and connected verticals. This includes fintech, insurance tech, hospitality tech, marketing tech, big data, AI, machine leaning, enterprise Saas, B2B and B2C. 

We have co-invested in disruptive companies with notable VCs and angels such as Eric Schmidt, Peter Thiel, Google Ventures, Founders Fund, Sequoia Capital, Menlo Ventures, Battery Ventures, Tomorrow Ventures, Greylock Partners, Formation 8, Y Combinator, SV Angel, Lerer Ventures, HBS Angels, Sand Hill Angels to name a few.

Rubicon raises capital from corporates, individual high net worth investors, family offices and institutional LPs creating a powerful extensive global network. This provides our portfolio companies access to strategic relationships resulting in partnerships, talent, advisory boards, key customer introductions, leading venture capital firms for follow on funding and ultimately introductions and advice related to buyers for M&A or IPO.

We enable our LPs to co-invest along side the fund on a deal-by-deal basis via innovative sidecar funds right up to IPO or M&A exit. Our goal is to add value to our portfolio companies providing them with access to a powerful constellation of successful Venture Partners and family offices that can help our portfolio companies reach success. 

Our extensive global network of limited partners and advisors enables our portfolio companies access to capital and strategic relationships resulting in partnerships, talent, advisory boards, key customer introductions and leading venture capital firms for follow on funding and ultimately introductions and advice related to buyers for M&A or IPO.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: FRESH START FoodTech Incubator IL
Description:
Fresh-Start FoodTech Incubator is part of the IIA incubators program, as well as the evolving AgriFoodtech cluster in the north of Israel.  
Incubator's partners form a unique balanced syndicate of strong industrial players and track record financial partners:  Tnuva is Israel's leading dairy and food company, Tempo is a leading beverage company, OurCrowd is one of the largest crowd funding vehicles in the world, and Finistere Ventures is a specialized agrifood tech VC fund. Supported by the added values of each of the partners, Fresh Start is seeking to  grow Impact FoodTech Companies from Vision to Scale. 
Fresh-start offers Strong Industry Orientation, Access to a Full Funding Cycle (from bridging period to round A and further), Leveraged by its Partner’s Global Network, Integration in the Northern FoodTech Cluster Initiative and Inception Specialization of both Food technologies and cross vertical technologies, tailor-made for strategic partners’ needs.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Access Holdings
Description: Access Holdings is a next-generation alternative asset manager providing investors with access to the lower-middle market. Founded in 2013, Access Holdings has approximately $2.3 billion in assets under management. The firm implements its systematic research and data-driven operating model - The Access Edge - to partner with lower-middle market businesses in industries essential to economic growth and resilience.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Camber Creek
Description: Camber Creek is a venture capital firm providing strategic value and capital to operating technology companies focused on the real estate market.  Camber Creek contributes in a direct and significant way to the success of its portfolio companies by leveraging the real estate expertise, operating experience and portfolio of assets of its partners, investors, and advisors. Our investment team has investing, operating, and technology experience and expertise across a range of real estate businesses, including construction, property management, development, and leasing.  Our investors own, operate and manage billions of square feet of real estate in the U.S., giving us a unique competitive advantage as an investor and value-added partner in the real estate technology space.  The firm has ~$1bln AUM.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Emerging Venture Capital Fellows
Description:
We are the community of the future leaders in Venture Capital. Our every day mission is to connect, educate and inspire the next generation of VCs through a strong and diverse fellowship.

EVCF is an association of 400 professional investors from over 150 VC firms working to bridge the VC industry and the entrepreneurial ecosystem, with transparency and access.

Together, we share and discuss ideas, produce new content, exercize our anaylsis capabilities and, ultimately, do business. The outcome is a transformative impact in the economy; through VC we will create and find solutions that can be implemented and scaled in society in a sustainable way.

Investors and founders, join us in the journey to develop the VC industry!
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Scout Ventures
Description: Scout Ventures is an early-stage venture capital firm focused on dual-use critical technologies that solve National Security challenges.  Backing mission-driven founders at the forefront of innovation, Scout provides capital, strategic support, and operational expertise to help scale transformative companies. Our investment areas include space & aerospace, autonomy, quantum, AI/ML, and advanced materials. Scout Ventures is driven by a mission to make the world a better, safer place by fostering innovation to advance frontier technologies to build a more resilient, secure, and prosperous future.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Asabys Partners
Description: Asabys Partners is a venture capital firm from Barcelona investing across the board in human healthcare. We are active in the health-tech and biopharma industries and aim to invest in Spain and abroad in highly innovative and transformative technologies. We are motivated by the idea of pushing the boundaries of science and medicine. We do this through the sourcing and financing of the most disruptive technologies, and through the collaboration with the best internal and external talents of our industry. We have an entrepreneurial spirit and seek to be involved in the building and management of our companies. Not just investors, we consider ourselves as partners and collaborators to our portfolio companies.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Wilbe
Description:
Scientists and engineers will define this century.

That’s why we built Wilbe – the fastest path from science to company and your first $100-500K check: Start building today and get funding decisions in days  http://app.wilbe.com.

Since 2020, we’ve equipped thousands of researchers with the know-how, community, and lab space to turn breakthroughs into companies. Some we’ve backed from day zero — from Apoha and ExpressionEdits to Proxima Fusion.

With Wilbe, you can:
- Build strong company foundations and avoid expensive mistakes
- Join a community of exceptional founders
- Access lab space and hands-on venture support
- Secure your first $100K–500K investment
- Raise follow-on funding from top-tier investors to scale your company

Follow our work:
X: https://x.com/wilbe_science
YouTube: https://youtube.com/@wilbescience
Say hello@wilbe.com
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Mountside Ventures
Description:
Mountside Ventures is Europe's leading startup & VC accelerator, and early-stage advisory firm. 

We are the first port of call for founders and investors looking to fundraise, and are on a mission to optimise the fundraising process. 

For pre-seed and seed startups, we run the UK's leading fundraising accelerator programme (free to participate, including equity-free), backed by corporates and the government.

For Series A and Series B companies, we provide interim CFO and fundraising support, enabling founders to raise their next round of funding faster, more efficiently and causing the least disruption to their business.

For VCs, we run Europe's first VC Accelerator, The Emerging VC Manager Programme, the gold standard in accelerating Europe’s exceptional fund managers through a combination of workshops, world-class mentoring, and LP & Family Office introductions.

For Limited Partners, we provide access to best-in-class emerging Venture Capital funds through our annual Funding Venture Conference and VC Accelerator.

For Family Offices, we run the VC Academy, a two-day programme designed for FOs looking to invest in tech covering venture strategies, sector deep dives, how to be a VC insider, deal sourcing, term sheet negotiation, diligence, management and exit.

Mountside Ventures is proud to be a certified B Corp, is regulated by the ICAEW, and is a member of the BVCA, UKBAA and EISA.

Description:

We plug into weak spots: tech, GTM, ops, or capital, and absorb up to 85% of execution risk, turning early traction into scale.

What makes us different?

- Zero Equity Entry (ZEE): Scale before dilution
- Execution Pods: In-house teams across Tech, Ops, GTM & Comms
- Results-Focused: 368 ventures built, 238 exits, MRR jumps from ₹10K to ₹6.3L in 120–180 days
- DATAGS Framework: 25M+ data points to map startup risk
- Global Presence: India (metro + Tier 2/3), UAE, Egypt, LATAM, North America

Freeflow helps founders, investors, and incubators turn bold ideas into investor-ready ventures.

Our goal is to accelerate the discovery, development, and distribution of revolutionary technologies that improve the human condition. Founded by Bill Maris, the team has deep experience in building iconic companies.

We invest across the entirety of technology. We focus on software, data, and algorithmic advancements including artificial intelligence, enterprise software, infrastructure, cybersecurity, quantum computing, and computational biology.

Name: MindWorks Capital
Description:
MindWorks Capital invests in and empowers Asia’s brightest entrepreneurs to build transformational companies. MindWorks manages capital from university endowments, global asset managers, fund of funds, family offices as well as Asia's leading new economy entrepreneurs. The firm utilizes a Pan-Asia strategy to source direct investments in technology companies across both Greater China and Southeast Asia. Founded in 2013, the firm is headquartered in Hong Kong with offices in Beijing, Shanghai and Jakarta. 

MindWorks has been recognized by Preqin as a top-performing ASEAN venture capital firm and is also a signatory of United Nations’ Principles for Responsible Investment.

Name: BVK Bundesverband Beteiligungskapital
Description:
Der BVK Bundesverband Beteiligungskapital ist die Stimme und das Gesicht der Beteiligungsbranche in Deutschland.

 Als BVK beziehen wir Stellung gegenüber Politik und Medien, um die Bedeutung von Beteiligungskapital für die deutsche Wirtschaft zu unterstreichen. Wir setzen uns für bessere steuerliche Rahmenbedingungen und einen leichteren Zugang zu Beteiligungskapital ein, damit noch mehr Unternehmen in Deutschland von Beteiligungskapital profitieren können. Wir beobachten und analysieren den Markt kontinuierlich und reagieren auf Veränderungen. Wir fördern den Erfahrungsaustausch zwischen unseren Mitgliedern, damit die Beteiligungsbranche in Deutschland enger zusammenwächst. Unsere Kernforderungen finden Sie hier: https://www.bvkap.de/politik/das-neue-kapital

 Dem Vorstand des BVK gehören neben Ulrike Hinrichs elf weitere ehrenamtliche Mitglieder an, die die einzelnen Fachbereiche des BVK repräsentieren. Darüber hinaus verfügt der BVK über einen juristischen Beirat, dem renommierte Rechtsanwälte aus den Bereichen Kapitalmarkt und Steuern angehören.


 English Version 
The German Private Equity and Venture Capital Association (BVK) is the voice and face of the private equity and venture capital industry in Germany. We are committed to the German private equity industry. We strive for better tax and legal conditions and easier access to private equity. We take a firm stance towards politics and the media to emphasise the importance of private equity for the German economy. We observe the market and analyse its developments. We promote the exchange of experience among our members. Our association has 300 members. Almost 200 of them are private equity firms investing in German companies. We also represent around 100 associate members, renowned legal professionals specialising in financial markets and taxation. These advisors support and advise BVK.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Description:
We focus on supporting founder-entrepreneurs, their teams, and their cultures. We share their vision and commitment to growing bigger, better businesses, helping to create a legacy that lasts.

We are very thoughtful about the long-term trends that underpin the businesses that we invest in. Some call this “thematic investing”. When a business is aligned with one of these trends, we move quickly and with conviction.

We team up with founders and entrepreneurs that lead established, growing businesses where there is the opportunity for us to invest between £10m to £60m equity in each partnership.

Name: Band of Angels
Description:
The Band of Angels is Silicon Valley's oldest seed funding organization. We are a formal group of more than 150 former and current high tech executives who are interested in investing their time and money into new, cutting edge, startup companies. We've seeded over 277 companies in our history with 61 profitable M&A exits and 11 IPOs. Band members have founded companies such as Symantec, Logitech, and National Semiconductor and been senior executives at the likes of Sun Microsystems, Hewlett Packard, and Intuit.

The Band meets monthly to formally consider three startups selected from among the more than 50 that are screened each month by the Band Deal Selection Process. Entrepreneurs can expect a thorough examination and, occasionally, an investment from some of Silicon Valley's most accomplished entrepreneurs.

Description:

This puts our skin in the game and allows us to make high impact marketing interventions at the point of time that the startup needs it the most. 

The Marketing Consulting firm will offer our consulting expertise to a select set of brands, where we hope to bring the same experience coupled with the nimbleness and agility that young, upcoming, upstart brands demand. The consulting firm would focus on delivering the required high quality interventions through a best-in-class marketing and creative services team. This team will a) work with the founders and management teams of our portfolio companies and help them scale to the next stage and b) work with a select few brands (beyond the startup phase) and offer them a deeply integrated, medium agnostic marketing solution to create high impact change in their respective categories.

To the established brands we work with on the consulting side, we aim to offer the same ‘skin in the game’ thinking and attitude that drives us, through a set of bespoke teams built around the requirements of each brand / business that we work with. We aim to seamlessly blend our learnings from the start up and well established business worlds to deliver a truly differentiated engagement model to our portfolio of business partners.

Headquartered in Singapore and Dubai, with representative offices in Munich and Boston, the firm partners with Southeast Asian management teams to build sector champions. The firm’s comprehensive ESG framework contributes to the creation of impactful, sustainable, and well-governed companies that deliver excellent healthcare services, continued growth, and create high-quality jobs for healthcare professionals in a fair and diverse workplace. Kamay Ventures is the first regional multi-corporate venture capital fund, established by industry-leading consumer goods companies such as Coca-Cola Latin America, Grupo Arcor, and Grupo Bimbo. This initiative is aimed at organizations looking to invest in the digitalization of traditional value and supply chains across Latin America.

It is managed by Overboost, a corporate-backed VC with extensive experience in venture capital across the region, acting as both operators and investors in high-potential startups. Since its inception in 2019, Kamay Ventures has analyzed over 600 projects and its portfolio includes 15 startups throughout Latin America, including markets like Argentina, Mexico, Brazil, Ecuador, and Colombia.

In addition, the fund launched Kamay Code in 2023, an event specifically designed for the Latin American innovation ecosystem, connecting startups with large organizations to discuss business and technology opportunities. The first edition took place in Buenos Aires, followed by São Paulo, and this year the event reached Mexico City with its third edition. The next stop will be Bogotá, Colombia, in September 2024.

A decentralized VC with an accelerator model, backing early-stage blockchain startups through global dealflow sourcing—especially from frontier and emerging markets like LATAM, Poland and more.

At BFG, we operate as a decentralized venture capital firm, sourcing deals globally through trusted local partners who deeply understand their ecosystems. Our mission: to make sure the best ideas don’t fail due to lack of access, experience, or opportunity.

Qualified teams are invited to join our 8-week accelerator, which runs twice a year. The program culminates in a pitch to our investment committee—where startups have the chance to secure a €100K investment ticket to turn their vision into reality.

Our Value Proposition:
1. Early-stage investments (€1–5M valuations) – We continuously invest in founders building the future.
2. Global startup sourcing – With a focus on LATAM and Poland, we partner locally to discover world-class talent in frontier markets.
3. Blockchain-native focus – We back what we know best: infrastructure, protocols, and real-world blockchain applications.

With a founder-first approach and access to a global network of operators and investors, BFG helps startups gain traction early and scale with strategic support.

We don’t chase trends. We meet builders where innovation starts.

Name: Third Sphere
Description:
Third Sphere works for founders transforming global systems. We’ve made over 100 investments in notable firms like Cove Tool, OneWheel and Bowery Farming. We’re usually a pre-customer investor and offer traditional venture as well as credit finance, along with coaching and connections to over 12,000 customers, investors focused on re-imagining our planet. Our team is ranked in the 99th percentile of climatetech investors on NFX Signal, and Techcrunch named us one of the top 10 VCs founders love the most.  

We know that climate is about more than carbon—it’s also about force multipliers like asset finance and distribution. We believe the best climate solutions don’t look like climate solutions at all, just better, faster, and cheaper products and services. We prefer rapid deployment that will get us close to 1.5C in warming while upgrading our systems to make them more resilient. But we’ll also look at moonshot opportunities because we know we need a plan B. 

[VC] A real investment is about more than capital. We invest at the earliest stages, usually pre-customer, stay close to our founders, and work with them from the inception of our relationship so they can build relationships with other founders, investors, and customers. 

[Credit] Our investments are designed to minimize dilution and preserve ownership for your team without compromising on rapid growth and impact. That’s why, in addition to venture investment, we lend and create asset finance structures like leasing vehicles.

[Platform] The Third Sphere platform helps to connect portfolio founders with leading founders, investors, and customers in climatetech. We use it internally to source the most promising investments and to make introductions within our network in order to increase our portfolio’s chances of achieving rapid impact at scale. 

[History] We probably look familiar. We used to be known as Urban Us. Here's what's changed - https://hubs.li/Q014-Jsb0

Name: Crosser Capital
Description:
A Crosser Capital é um fundo de investimento de Venture Capital especializado na criação, desenvolvimento e aceleração de empresas da economia real, com foco em negócios B2B que atendem grandes corporações nacionais e multinacionais.

Investimos em empresas com alto potencial de crescimento e atuamos ativamente em sua operação, aportando capital, inteligência estratégica e disponibilizando uma estrutura robusta de suporte para as nossas investidas. Nosso objetivo é transformar bons negócios em organizações de excelência, com estrutura, escalabilidade e rentabilidade.

A atuação da Crosser Capital se organiza em três pilares principais:

• Fábrica de Empresas: criamos negócios do zero a partir de oportunidades mapeadas no mercado ou no ecossistema das nossas investidas, conduzindo todas as etapas – da concepção ao crescimento.

• Editais de Captação: selecionamos empresas de base tecnológica ou operacional com alto potencial para receber investimento e aceleração.

• Captação Ativa: buscamos diretamente empresas e operações de M&A que se conectem às nossas teses de investimento.

Nosso diferencial está na metodologia. Operamos um Centro de Serviços Compartilhados (CSC) que oferece estrutura completa de backoffice, marketing e vendas para nossas investidas, permitindo que empresas em estágios iniciais operem com o mesmo nível de excelência e eficiência de grandes organizações.

Mais do que investir, a Crosser Capital constrói. Atuamos com rigor técnico, visão de longo prazo e profundo conhecimento do cenário brasileiro, sempre orientados por uma tese clara: o país precisa de empresas verdadeiramente habilitadas para atender à complexidade e à escala que o futuro exige.

Our investment philosophy is anchored in the ‘Yuva Bharat’ thesis, focused on Manufacturing India’s Future — backing founders who are building factories, not just brands. We believe India stands at the cusp of a manufacturing renaissance, driven by policy tailwinds, demographic advantage, and global supply-chain diversification.

At Rockstud Capital, we focus on four core manufacturing-led verticals that define India’s right-to-win advantage. Advanced Manufacturing & Industry 4.0 – Factory digitisation, robotics, and industrial SaaS improving productivity across MSMEs. Consumer Products Made in India, Sustainable Materials & Green Processes – Climate. Strategic & Frontier Manufacturing – Defence, aerospace, and space-tech ventures driving India’s self-reliant future.

What sets Rockstud Capital apart is its operational DNA — shaped by the successful turnaround of Jost Engineering, a family-owned manufacturing business that grew to ₹400 crore market cap through deep operational discipline. This experience forms the foundation of how we evaluate and support founders building industrial excellence.

Our portfolio spans DesignX, Ember Cookware, Indic Wisdom, SpaceFields, and Everest Fleet, reflecting our commitment to scalable, sustainable, and globally competitive Indian enterprises. By combining public-market discipline with private-market agility, we bridge the gap between founders and investors — creating enduring value and helping shape the makers of modern India.

Name: Good Capital
Description:
About Good Capital

We're a VC firm backing founders who understand that India's economy runs on relationships, not algorithms.

While others see India's 63M+ intermediaries - traders, brokers, resellers - as inefficiencies to eliminate, we see them as the foundation of a low-trust, high-touch economy where consumers prefer trusted humans over faceless brands.

Our Investment Thesis

We invest in companies that place intermediaries at the heart of their business models, leveraging them for low-CAC, high-conversion growth. Recent AI developments have created a powerful synergy: rather than replacing relationships, AI handles coordination and workflow management, allowing intermediaries to focus entirely on what they do best - building trust and solving customer problems.

This manifests as:
- Orchestration AI that gives MSMEs the systematic coordination they've always lacked
- Vertical Workflow-Integrated AI that eliminates administrative friction for professional intermediaries

Who We Back

- Out of left-field business models
- Founders enabling micro-entrepreneurs instead of removing intermediaries
- Deep problem understanding without predetermined solutions

When a founder captivates us, we lead rounds and deploy our global network to solve specific business needs.

Our Story

Founded in 2019 by second-generation entrepreneurs Rohan and Arjun, Good Capital emerged from Investopad, where we first experienced the thrill of backing brilliant minds at inception. We're here to empower visionaries harnessing technology while staying rooted in Indian realities.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals
