Name: Climentum Capital
Description:
Climentum Capital is an investment fund based in Copenhagen, Berlin, Stockholm, and Oslo. We are an Article 9 climate tech fund leading Seed & Series A investments in European B2B hard tech companies that cut emissions at the core of industries.

As one of the first funds with a dual carry structure (with both financial and impact targets), Climentum Capital is dedicated to only investing in companies that can deliver true greenhouse gas emissions reductions.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Equity Group Investments
Description: Equity Group Investments (EGI) is a private investment firm founded more than 50 years ago by Sam Zell. Backed by private capital, EGI is flexible and opportunistic with a primary focus on direct private investment opportunities but has the in-house expertise to invest across the capital structure. EGI actively partners with portfolio company executives to execute strategic planning, implement operational efficiencies, and scale businesses. EGI has grown companies across numerous industries into multi-billion-dollar businesses throughout economic cycles. EGI’s current portfolio includes investments in healthcare, transportation and logistics, infrastructure, energy, consumer, industrial, manufacturing, and agri-business.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Revelstoke Capital Partners
Description:
Revelstoke is a private equity firm formed by experienced investors who focus on building industry-leading companies in the healthcare services and healthcare technology sectors. Revelstoke partners with entrepreneurs and management teams to execute on a disciplined organic and acquisition growth strategy as it strives to build exceptional companies. Revelstoke is based in Denver, Colorado and has approximately $5.1 billion of assets under management. Since the firm’s inception in 2013, Revelstoke has completed 191 acquisitions, which includes 28 platform companies and 163 add-on acquisitions.

For more information, visit www.revelstokecapital.com.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: SNÖ Ventures
Description: SNÖ is a Nordic-focused VC firm providing global access and local support for the region's most daring tech pioneers.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Pale Fire Capital
Description:
We are a private equity investment group supporting technological innovation across multiple industries. We form strong partnerships with business founders and help them build companies on solid foundations. We share and utilize everything we have learned over the 20 years of building successful companies, including the outstanding skills of our internal team. We help overcome obstacles and break the limits that growing companies encounter while expanding to foreign markets. Rather than focusing solely on profit, it is of great importance to us that our activities are of benefit to the wider society.

Do you have a growing business?
You can demonstrate a proven demand for your product. You want to grow your business further but you realize you cannot do it all alone. Organizing a larger team is not as simple as a one-office project. You need contacts, as well as financial, human resources, and strategic support for expansion within your current markets or into new regions. You are ready to scale up. We are here to help you with that. 

We can adapt to the size of your project and provide investment and strategic guidance tailored to the needs of your project. Let's have a chat together!

Are you are thinking about a new job?
For our internal projects, we are seeking extraordinary people with a proven ability to grow. We are not afraid to roll up our sleeves and we expect the same from you. We apply meritocracy to value our projects, we give capable people the opportunity to participate in our success.

We offer opportunities in various career fields (analysts, developers, managers, marketers, etc.). If you are ambitious, a builder in nature, you have climbed the career ladder from the bottom up, and are searching for further professional growth in a strong team, we are the right opportunity for you. 

Write us an email at jsme@palefire.com including a link to your LinkedIn profile and a few sentences about your life´s journey and goals.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Better Tomorrow Ventures
Description:
BTV was founded in 2019 to partner with fintech founders building the future of financial services, from idea to IPO. We take a pretty broad view on fintech, and many vertical SaaS and marketplace businesses fit in our purview, too.

The BTV team is made of experienced operators building and backing exceptional early-stage fintech companies for over a decade. And the firm’s partners are seasoned fintech founders and angel investors: Sheel Mohnot built and sold two fintech companies before starting the 500 Fintech accelerator, and Jake Gibson co-founded NerdWallet (Nasdaq:NRDS). Find the BTV team at www.btv.vc or on Twitter at @btv_vc.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Swisscom Ventures
Description: Swisscom Ventures is the venture capital arm of Swisscom AG, the leading telecommunications and IT provider in Switzerland. Since our inception in 2007, we have invested in over 70 IT, digital media and telecommunication companies from our offices in Switzerland (Zurich and Lausanne) and the USA (Silicon Valley). As a strategic investor, we offer entrepreneurs access to our technical infrastructure and market channels in addition to financial support. We focus on sectors of domain expertise such as Telco & IT Cloud, DeepTech, Cybersecurity and Fintech as well as Big Data & AI related new business models where we leverage our access to Swisscom’s technology and market experts.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: The Arcview Group
Description: The Arcview Group blazed the trail for cannabis investments and is the largest and 1st vertically integrated firm servicing the industry. As a trusted global leader and nexus for investors, companies, entrepreneurs, money-managers and community, Arcview provides an expansive ecosystem that delivers a broad spectrum of programs and services to the industry. Arcview is synonymous with best-in-class. By providing the tools necessary and curating top-notch cannabis companies, Investor Members have had the playbook that has enabled them to invest hundreds of millions in more than 300 private cannabis startups. Furthermore, Arcview Market Research is the #1 source cited for market data, thought leadership and insights. In early 2020, Arcview Ventures was launched, as a member-managed fund that pools resources and strategic alliances together to make collective investment decisions. We also launched the Women's Investor Network, focusing on building community through networking and education opportunities for women in the industry. Additionally, Arcview Capital was formed, a FINRA approved broker-dealer to meet the demand for later-stage funding and M&A. Arcview continues to expand novel programs, proprietary technology and platforms and international footprint. For more information, please visit https://arcviewgroup.com/
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Evergreen Climate Innovations
Description: Evergreen Climate Innovations, formerly Clean Energy Trust, provides catalytic capital and support to entrepreneurs and startups that bring impactful climate technologies to market. The nonprofit pioneered its 501vc Investment Fund to align philanthropic and corporate contributions to deliver environmental, economic, and social impact. Evergreen advances and expands access to innovation across the Greater Midwest and cultivates an ecosystem of investors, donors, and collaborators. For over a decade, Evergreen Climate Innovations has invested in startups that have raised $41 for every $1 invested. Learn more at evergreeninno.org
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: growX ventures
Description:
growX invests in disruptive B2B / EnterpriseTech startups that use technology to solve hard business problems. 

We have taken bold bets in emerging technologies, ahead of the curve - BigData (2012), AI (2014), Drones (2016), Space (2018), Robotics / EVs (2019), Genomics (2020), Semiconductors (2021), Cybersecurity (2023), and DefenceTech / BioMaterials (2024) . 

Across a decade, we have backed 46 disruptive companies incl AUS, Bellatrix, Fynd, Locus, LightSpeed, MadStreetDen, Pantherun, Progcap, Pixxel, StashFin and ZipLoan.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Horizons Ventures
Description:
Solina Chau co-founded Horizons Ventures in 2002, investing early in DeepMind, Siri and Skype.

Enterprising science and technology companies power the privately-funded portfolio: founders and businesses whose IP and ideas can propel humanity to a brighter future.

Horizons Ventures’ track record is built on vision, instinct and drive. The vision of a better future for all, the instinct to spot companies and founders whose ideas will form the next- normal human reality - and the drive to push those companies to scale and impact.

We believe that a brighter future for humanity is within our grasp. But we know there are great barriers - entrenched inequities - preventing humanity from reaching this horizon. We inhabit the deep science and tech community, seeking out and investing in companies whose impact can smash the barriers to human potential. Code in kindness and respect. And build a better human.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Propel Venture Partners
Description: Founded in 2016, Propel is a seed-stage venture firm that backs visionary founders building tomorrow's economy. These founders are revolutionizing money, reinventing financial services, and creating technology that transforms traditional institutions. Propel invests in startups worldwide and to date has raised over $436 million to invest in industry-leading companies such as Coinbase, Docusign, Groww, Guideline, Neon, and Newfront.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Ysios Capital
Description: Ysios Capital, a leading Spanish venture capital firm, provides private equity financing to early and mid-stage life science companies that develop disruptive therapeutic products and platform technologies. Founded in 2008, Ysios Capital manages over USD 420M through three dedicated funds in life sciences and is led by a team of professionals experienced in building biotech companies.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: SYNOVA
Description:
Synova is one of Europe’s most innovative growth investors, generating market-leading returns from investing in companies typically valued between £20m and £250m. Synova invests across the full mid-market spectrum from its £875m fifth fund, raised in 2022, which includes a dedicated £250m pool of capital, #Chrysalis, to support smaller growth companies.

We work across a handful of core sectors where we have deep investment and operational expertise. The Synova model is focused on using this knowledge to help our partners outperform. Time and again we’ve helped companies achieve more – hitting ambitious targets by enhancing their capabilities. We work as one team across the whole business, providing companies access to deep pools of talent within Synova to help drive accelerated growth.

We help entrepreneurs achieve their vision. Providing expertise, coupled with ambition.

We are true partners for growth.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: IAM - International African Minds
Description:
IAM stands for International African Minds. 

Together we can change the World because we are the ones who believe we can. Going the extra mile is part of who we are. Benefiting the society is our mission. Being happy is our reward. Making other people happy rewards our spirit. And so we can continue on this journey, changing the World together one day, one hour, one story at a time. 

We started as a wanna be start up to become something else we have not given a name to. We are here to show that International African Minds are pure art in the making and we aim to provide an environment of innovative collaboration.

Our purpose is to showcase the most brilliant artists, repost relevant news and talk about subjects that truly matter. 

IAM regards all people as valuable human beings. We value inclusion, authenticity and cultural diversity in art and entrepreneurship. 

If you are an artist or author whose work we have showcased or adapted here and you wish us to take it down, please contact us. All images and most text belong to their respective owners - we have no copyrights on the images nor on most of the shared text - we mostly adapt, share and point out the source. The images/ videos are sometimes unrelated to the text to challenge observers' preconditioned perceptions of reality. Should you feel uncomfortable, remember that the unfollow button is free and just a click away. We are not here to do harm. We are here to show our appreciation of brilliance and the work of beautiful minds.

Founders:
Aiala Tchikanha  
Donovan Gumbo  

Curators:
Aiala Tchikanha 
Maria Tchikanha de Oliveira Pires

IG: iamafrica_art
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: The Yield Lab
Description:
The Yield Lab formed in 2014 to address a lack of capital and support for early stage agriculture technology companies. Agriculture innovation is essential in sustainably feeding a rising global population. We enable entrepreneurs to revolutionize agrifood systems, globally. We do this through our 4 funds in Europe, Latin America, Asia Pacific, and North America. Each region invests in seed stage to growth stage agrifoodtech companies, provides and international business connections and the resources of the entire Yield Lab international network.

~90 portfolio companies, and 4 international locations since our founding, we continue to grow and evolve to meet the need for agricultural innovation in order to sustainably feed the world.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Seedstars Africa Ventures
Description: Seedstars Africa Ventures invests in the most promising early stage entrepreneurs in Africa
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Winklevoss Capital
Description: At Winklevoss Capital, we believe in determined entrepreneurs. Those rare individuals comprised of three essential qualities: acumen, artistry and audacity. Risk-taking is just in their blood. By providing guidance, relationships and capital, we reinforce their pursuit of a frictionless world and a better human experience. Because those who dare to fail greatly, dare to achieve greatly.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Qualgro Partners
Description:
Qualgro (Quality & Growth) is a leading Venture Capital firm based in Singapore investing into tech companies with strengths in Data/AI, Software and B2B, at Series A and B. We have achieved strong financial returns (DPI), combined with high economic development impact for both individuals and businesses (SMEs).
 
To date, we have minted 3 unicorns and 3 soonicorns, out of 18 investments in our Fund 1 (2015). Several Qualgro’s portfolio companies have become regional and global leaders, across various verticals. Out of 30 investments, across 2 Funds in 8 years, we have already generated 8 full exits, including 5 acquisitions by international players and one IPO. In 2019, Qualgro was awarded “VC Exit of the Year” by the Singapore Venture Capital & Private Equity Association. 

Qualgro was founded in 2015 by Heang Chhor. He has led many investments in Data/AI and Software, at Seed to Series B stages, and helped portfolio companies grow regionally and globally. He has supported companies on fundraising and exits, leveraging an extensive network of global investors. His record includes investments into 3 unicorns, several full exits including 1 IPO and 3 acquisitions by international players. He was previously a Senior Partner at McKinsey & Company (26 years) and a member of the McKinsey Global Board, working in Europe and Asia. Before and during McKinsey, he was an entrepreneur building a series of companies. 
 
Qualgro is co-led by Weisheng Neo. He has made several investments into Fintech, Education, Marketing, Software startups in Southeast Asia and has helped them accelerate their growth and build strong talent pools.

Our team has diverse and international expertise in startups, businesses, technology, investment, and strategy. We have built, in the past 8 years, proprietary databases, tools and methodologies to provide differentiating value-add to startups.
 
Visit  www.qualgro.com to learn more.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: MPM BioImpact
Description: MPM BioImpact is a world-leading biotechnology investment firm with nearly three decades of experience creating and investing in companies that seek to translate scientific innovations into cures for major diseases. With its world-class team and deep experience in scientific research, clinical development, and company-building, MPM BioImpact strives to power novel medical breakthroughs that transform patients’ lives. MPM BioImpact invests across the biotech landscape from early stage start-ups to public companies.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: AURELIUS Wachstumskapital
Description: Die AURELIUS WACHSTUMSKAPITAL, Teil der AURELIUS Gruppe, investiert in erfolgreiche, eigentümergeführte Unternehmen und unterstützt diese vor Ort bei der zukunftsorientierten Weiterentwicklung. Unsere Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter verbindet der unternehmerische und dynamische Ansatz, zusammen etwas erreichen zu wollen. Geleitet durch unsere gemeinsam gelebten Werte schreiben wir Erfolgsstories!
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Inkef
Description:
Inkef is an early stage venture capital firm based in Amsterdam. From the very early stages of a technology or lifescience venture, Inkef supports entrepreneurs building their ideas into successful international businesses. 

Inkef covers multiple investment stages but focuses mainly on series A investments. For exceptional teams it also considers seed capital to turn a great idea into a company or growth capital to give a running start-up the next push. Inkef is the partner for the long haul. 

Focus areas: Technology and Healthcare
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: al jabr mena
Description:
Al Jabr MENA specializes in startup development and corporate innovation. We take pride in building entrepreneurial programs that help bridge startup innovation with corporate ambition, giving access to financial, human, and intellectual capital.

The company's mission is to establish a regional innovation hub, uniting enterprises, startups, and investors to achieve this collective goal.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: String Ventures
Description: String Ventures is an early-stage investment firm founded on the principle of using AI and exponential technology to not only provide financial capital but transformative capabilities to firms. We take great pride in helping passionate founders realize visions from cradle to exit.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Veteran Ventures Capital
Description:
Veteran Ventures Capital (VVC) is a veteran-owned growth-equity investment fund & firm focused on dual-use tech firms coupled with veteran leadership. VVC interacts exclusively with companies that have military veteran leadership, recognizing the value of military experience, training, and character in business operations. VVC’s team is comprised of distinguished former military officers and seasoned financial experts from across the country. Our value proposition lies in our granular understanding of the military culture, significant connections within the federal government & defense industry, and working knowledge of the government procurement process.

Our differentiators are people and dealflow. We have a veteran team with deep expertise at the intersection of private capital and security.  Our people have an exceptional track record in private enterprise with multiple billion-dollar exits.  We also have decades as public servants at highest leadership levels in government (all the way to the White House). Our dealflow is quite unique:  cross-referencing government and quasi-government groups, military-centric partnerships, and our private network gives us a deal pipeline unlike any you'll find. The market opportunity is huge: veteran leadership has set the precedence and been the backbone of our country for 70+ years (founders like Wal-Mart, FedEx, U-Haul, Kinder Morgan, RE/MAX, GoDaddy, Enterprise, etc., the list goes on).  The government invests billions in developing our military:  now with greater technology, greater investment from the government, and greater educational opportunities -- their leadership is more poised than ever to take businesses to the next level. They just need the proper access to capital, and that's Veteran Ventures Capital.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Everstone Capital
Description:
We are an active, control-oriented mid-market growth investor focused on businesses with strong ties to India and Southeast Asia. With teams across India, Singapore, and the US, we bring local insight and a hands-on approach to building long-term value.
At the core of everything we do and every investment we make is our belief in the power of great partnerships.
As fiduciaries to our investors, we are committed to delivering best-in-class, risk-adjusted returns through a highly institutionalised execution model. Our strategies also aim to address the developmental needs of our home markets by creating jobs, driving economic progress, and upholding globally recognised ESG standards.

Contact us at: https://everstonecapital.com/contact/#contactUs
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: BM Prime Capital
Description:
BM Prime Capital is a Venture Capital & Venture Studio firm. We operate private companies in United States, and we're the world’s first venture firm exclusively focused on early-stage investments in French speaking African countries.

We believe the most underserved, yet, highest growth-potential region in the world is Francophone Africa. With a populace of ~450,000,000 people, this region represents ~30% of the total African population. Yet, it receives less than 2% of venture funding in Africa.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: AgHub - Agri-Innovation Hub of PJTSAU
Description: AgHub is a first of its kind Incubator in a Hub and Spoke format with its Incubator Hub at PJTSAU, Hyderabad. It is envisioned to promote food and agritech start-ups and its rural innovation spokes at Warangal, Vikarabad and Jagtial are put in place to promote rural entrepreneurship among rural youth, women and FPOs.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Kaya Founders
Description: Kaya Founders partners with exceptional founders as early as Day 0 to bring industry-shaping ideas to life. We derisk and accelerate the start-up journey by providing strategic and operational support and by activating synergies with our partners and across our portfolio.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Elmirate Capital
Description:
Elmirate Capital is a globally oriented private equity and venture investment platform headquartered in the United Arab Emirates, with a core mandate to deploy capital into transformative, defense-aligned, and frontier technology sectors that define sovereign resilience and next-generation economic value.

We specialize in backing bold, unconventional ventures across a wide spectrum of strategic domains—including artificial intelligence, cybersecurity, dual-use defense technologies, advanced healthcare, national security infrastructure, Web3, and fintech. Our approach combines precision capital deployment with deep operational engagement, enabling high-growth enterprises to evolve into market-defining global leaders.

Elmirate Capital and its affiliated entities manage and advise on a diversified portfolio encompassing next-gen fund managers, disruptive scale-ups, sovereign-sensitive assets, and institutional-grade infrastructure. Our investment model integrates direct equity, fund-of-funds allocations, M&A and exit readiness, and capital market pathways—empowering ventures from early-stage incubation to IPO-level scale.

With active operations in Dubai, Singapore, and Israel, and expansion underway in the United States and Europe, we operate with a global lens and regional depth—bridging capital corridors across allied innovation ecosystems.

Our mission is to partner with visionary founders, strategic institutions, and national champions—delivering bespoke investment solutions, embedded strategic intelligence, and long-term alignment in sectors critical to national security, technological sovereignty, and global competitiveness.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Ideaspring Capital
Description: Ideaspring Capital is focused on investing in early stage technology product companies in India. We fund ideas that are disruptive, and help them achieve commercial viability and scalability.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: PeakSpan Capital
Description: PeakSpan Capital is a growth equity firm based in New York City and Silicon Valley. Having partnered with over 55 scaleups and with $2.5B+ in AUM, PeakSpan’s mission is to be the partner of choice for growth stage entrepreneurial teams who are building amazing software targeted at business buyers of all sizes. PeakSpan combines deep domain expertise within a select number of themes with a homegrown, proprietary technology platform providing visibility into company and market performance, to help disruptive entrepreneurs drive resilient, risk-adjusted value creation. To learn more about PeakSpan Capital and its portfolio, please visit: www.peakspancapital.com.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: OpenGate Capital
Description:
OpenGate Capital is a private equity firm that strives to acquire and optimize lower-to-middle market businesses throughout North America and Europe. OpenGate Capital partners with companies to drive operational improvement and realize opportunities for long-term value creation. We provide flexible capital solutions on a global basis in key industry verticals including Industrials, Technology, Consumer, and Business Services.

Founded in 2005, with headquarters in Los Angeles and Paris, France, OpenGate has completed 36 platform acquisitions and 16 full realizations including, 15 pre-fund investments and one fund investment.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Mangrove Capital Partners
Description:
Mangrove Capital Partners is a contrarian, bold but patient investment firm helping innovative entrepreneurs start and grow global, disruptive companies.

We back a wide range of ventures across information technology with an emphasis on mobile, software, e-commerce and the mobility industry.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: TitletownTech
Description: Formed in 2019 out of a partnership between the Green Bay Packers and Microsoft, TitletownTech is an early-stage venture capital firm that invests in entrepreneurs solving meaningful problems in industries core to Wisconsin and the Midwest.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Keen Venture Partners
Description: Keen Venture Partners is a radically human venture capital firm that backs exceptional founders across Europe from Seed to Series B.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: BGV (BioGeneration Ventures)
Description:
BioGeneration Ventures (BGV) is a venture capital company, with a focus on early stage European biotech, medtech, and diagnostics companies. BGV has a strong track record of significant financial returns through investing in innovations in healthcare and providing the expertise to build world-class teams. The Company manages over €100 million of funds investing in areas where true scientific innovations, the unmet medical need, and the potential to demonstrate a significant proof of concept all come together.

BGV strives to work with founding teams to mature science and build companies. The Company uses its experience to guide progress into clinical trials, ultimately leading to successful drug development and value realisation for its investors. BGV applies its expertise in a rigorous process to select the most compelling opportunities with the best prospects for exit.

Historical successful investments include divestment of Dezima Pharma to Amgen for up to USD 1.55 billion in total deal value and in Acerta Pharma for up to USD 7 billion with a guaranteed payment of USD 4 billion. Both companies were co-founded by BGV in 2012 and 2013 respectively. The Acerta Pharma sale was the largest exit ever of a privately held European biotech company.

BGV is based in Naarden, The Netherlands, and closely collaborates with Forbion.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Camber Partners
Description:
Camber Partners believes that modern software companies should be architected for mass distribution. In our 25+ years of operating experience, this has meant scalable, data-driven, and capital-efficient growth methods that, when executed properly, accelerate growth and compound enterprise value. Camber provides the capital and operating expertise to support this rapid, disciplined growth. 

Camber’s internal Growth team provides functional support in marketing, sales and customer success. Our dedicated data team and platform unlocks the power of marketing, product, and customer data to increase LTV and scale customer acquisition. Camber’s hands-on engagement helps achieve the go-to-market execution that growth-stage software companies deserve. 

Camber prioritizes investments in growing B2B SaaS businesses with $3-20m in recurring revenue and has a strong preference for Product-Led Growth (PLG) and inbound customer acquisition models.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Fin Capital
Description: Fin Capital is a global asset manager focused on full lifecycle investing in B2B Fintech Software. We are passionate about rolling up our sleeves and partnering with repeat entrepreneurs that have deep financial services experience, differentiated products, and a global mindset. Fin is headquartered in San Francisco, with offices in Los Angeles, Miami, and New York.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Aldrich Capital Partners
Description:
Aldrich Capital Partners (“ACP”) is a middle-market private equity firm investing in promising enterprises in the United States. Aldrich Capital Partners primarily focuses on investments in technology sectors such as healthcare IT, internet, software and financial services technologies. 

ACP was formed by experienced investors and operators who are successful entrepreneurs in their own right. The firm was started with the philosophy of “being the entrepreneurs behind the entrepreneur”, ….helping private, entrepreneur-run companies attain their growth objectives by tapping into the resources, knowledgebase and network of relationships of the ACP organization, a team that has been responsible for over $1 Billion in technology investments over the past decade. 

Companies in which the ACP Principals have invested have successfully completed Initial Public Offerings (“IPO”) and have had numerous investments be successfully acquired by large corporations. We have a successful track record of working with owner-operators and entrepreneurs to build companies for the long-run and then help them realize their liquidity objectives when they are ready. 

ACP's principals are investors and operators who bring their experience to bear from the strategic investment level down through active support of portfolio companies at the operational and business planning level. ACP's leadership and advisors bring many decades of experience executing transactions in sectors such as business services, software & cloud-services, FinTech, healthcare IT and internet. 

ACP is headquartered in the Washington D.C. metro area, with additional offices in the San Francisco Bay Area and a research center in Hyderabad, India.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Reframe Venture
Description:
Since 2021, we have spent our time and resources figuring out how VCs can analyse risk better and create more value supporting their startup portfolios; that is what we call ESG integration, fully aligned with bottom line considerations and technological progress. 

Now, VentureESG has become too small and restrictive; the misunderstood notion of ESG can close doors where we want to open them. As Reframe Venture, we will continue to talk about ESG - and DEI and responsible investing - but calibrate our language to prevent misunderstandings where necessary. 

Our continued focus is clear and builds on the strong foundations of the last four years: we are reframing venture capital around ESG integration and responsible investment alignment.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: LiveOak Ventures
Description: LiveOak Ventures is an early-stage venture capital firm based in Austin, Texas. With 25 years of successful venture investing in Texas, the founders of LiveOak have helped create nearly $5 billion of enterprise value. LiveOak is a complete life cycle investor focused on technology and technology-enabled service companies. With nearly $500M under management, and led/co-led over 60 high-growth investments in Texas-based leaders, such as AmplifAI, DISCO (NYSE: LAW), Eventus, Homeward, OJO Labs, Osano, SchooLinks, Take Command Health, and many more, some starting at inception. The firm was honored at the inaugural Austin A-List Awards in 2022 as the Venture Capital Firm of the Year and received the Austin Gives Charitable Champion award.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Imagine
Description:
Imagine es un grupo empresarial especializado en impulsar el desarrollo de innovación, emprendimiento tecnológico e inversión en América Latina. Nuestro propósito es conectar empresas, startups e inversionistas para transformar desafíos estratégicos en oportunidades de negocio con impacto real.

Con más de 10 años de trayectoria, trabajamos junto a organizaciones públicas y privadas en el diseño y ejecución de estrategias de innovación, desarrollo de nuevos negocios, corporate venturing y fondos de inversión, articulando un ecosistema que acelera la creación de valor.

Nuestra propuesta integral se estructura en cuatro unidades complementarias:

Imagine Co: consultora especializada en innovación corporativa y venture building. Acompañamos a empresas en la definición de estrategias, diseño de modelos de negocio, desarrollo de nuevos productos y construcción de capacidades internas.

Imagine Lab: plataforma de aceleración y conexión con startups tecnológicas de alto potencial, orientada a generar pilotos, alianzas estratégicas y nuevos vehículos de crecimiento.

Imagine Ventures: fondo de venture capital que invierte en etapas pre-seed y seed, con foco en startups que abordan desafíos relevantes en sostenibilidad, fintech, futuro del trabajo y tecnologías emergentes.

Imagine Waves: microfondo especializado que invierte en verticales estratégicas y oportunidades de nicho, combinando capital inteligente con redes industriales y capacidades de validación temprana.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Sambrinvest
Description: Sambrinvest est un acteur privé de capital à risque actif dans la région de Charleroi Métropole. Il a pour objet l'accompagnement et le développement des PME et des startups. Par son expertise, il conseille les entrepreneurs, à chaque stade de développement de leurs projets, tout en respectant leur autonomie de gestion.

Name: LUCHA

Name: Graphite Capital
Description:
We are an independent partnership with a highly stable and experienced team. Since the early 1990s, we have backed management teams in more than 100 companies across a wide range of sectors, making us one of the most experienced investors in mid-sized businesses in the UK.

In 2018 we raised over £500 million for Graphite Capital Partners IX, remaining committed to the mid-market and focusing on companies valued at between £30 million and £150 million. We believe companies of this size offer the highest potential returns to investors, as they are small enough to grow fast but have sufficient scale to employ high-quality management teams and generate diversified revenues.
 
The relative attractiveness of different sectors will ebb and flow with economic cycles and changes in technology, consumer preferences, distribution methods and government policy. We a have a very strong track record in; Business Services, Health & Care, Education, Technology, the Consumer Sector, Industrials and Financial Services.

Our senior management team has worked together for over 15 years and most have been at Graphite for over 20 years. We operate as a genuine partnership, with ownership and incentives broadly spread across the team, promoting stability and a strong, cohesive ethos. We enjoy what we do and like working together in an informal environment, taking collective responsibility for our decisions. We believe this comes across in our dealings with portfolio companies and plays a very important role in building strong partnerships with their management teams.

As we typically only make two or three investments a year, backing the right management teams has been key to our success. We review large numbers of opportunities and prioritise those where we can build a strong relationship with management and where we see angles to add value. If you would like to discuss an opportunity, please get in contact https://www.graphitecapital.com/contact

Technology is bringing abundance to the world. But, only a handful of people start the iconic companies with the biggest impact.

At Floodgate, we call these special founders the Prime Movers.

Prime Movers -- through their vision, talent, and will -- create massive outcomes from nothing. Equally important, they are brave enough to defy conventional wisdom. Walls and barriers and “rules” accepted by others don’t stop them.

Floodgate backs Prime Movers before others believe.

We are built from the ground-up to partner with Prime Movers when their legendary journeys begin. We’ve seen that breakthroughs seem crazy at first. We are not afraid of startups that re-write the rules (and even the law), if that’s what it takes to create enduring change. We know that a raw startup must navigate through a fog of massive uncertainty. Dramatic and frequent course corrections come with the territory. Taking these risks with founders is unique to our DNA and how we add value.

Launched in 2001, the Private Equity Awards are the oldest and most respected accolades bestowed on the private equity industry and those who advise it.

There is no nomination fee and the entry deadline is 29 November 2024 for all categories.

Consisting of four different categories of awards; these are broken down by research-led finalists for the Deal of the Year and House of the Year awards, and nomination-judged Advisory and Special Awards. Financed by the Alumni, the fund accompanies and invests in start-ups from the Ecole Polytechnique's innovation and entrepreneurship ecosystem. We target companies that will provide powerful solutions to the challenges of the transition to tomorrow's world. 

We support start-ups emanating from the Ecole Polytechnique ecosystem: founded by one or more Ecole Polytechnique alumni, incubated at Ecole Polytechnique or emanating from the school's laboratories. Our investment strategy is focused on early stage financing, in co-investment, with average initial tickets of €250K to €500K in pre-seed and seed, followed by reinvestments in series A (average ticket per company of about €2.5m). We give priority to ambitious deep tech teams, able to transform the industrial sectors they target. We cover a wide range of sectors, derived from the School's areas of technological excellence: energy, climate and environment; mobility, transport and aerospace; biomedical engineering and health; industry 4.0 and robotics; IoT and digital applications; digital economy; cybersecurity; new materials; finance ... 

We are focused on the values of proximity, notably with entrepreneurs and the Ecole Polytechnique ecosystem; of experience through the Alumni network and the X community; and of generosity from all stakeholders to the community built around the fund.

Lowering industrial emissions
Decarbonising rice
Better yields and lower fertilizer emissions
Tackling deforestation and palm oil

And more...

Description:
Rhia Ventures works at the intersection of racial equity, women’s health, and capital to drive systems change, innovation, and financial and social returns.


The multibillion-dollar reproductive and maternal health market has tremendous potential for public health impact, but it has been built on flawed systems that perpetuate unjust outcomes for women of color, low-income women, and others directly affected by systemic inequities. Our work is to transform this market. 

Operating in a novel impact space, we seek opportunities to move investment toward reproductive and maternal health in a way that does not perpetuate harm and that will yield measurable, sustainable improvements in health outcomes.

Our activities include impact investment to stimulate innovation and equity in women’s health, ecosystem building to support entrepreneurs and investors incorporating health equity into business strategy, narrative change to shift harmful social norms that influence the market, and corporate advocacy to promote corporate responsibility and improve public policy regarding reproductive and maternal health.
