Mediterra Capital Management Limited (“Mediterra”), is an independent private equity firm focused on investing in Turkish companies and manages Mediterra Capital Partners I, LP. Mediterra held the Final Close of its debut fund, Mediterra Capital Partners I, in January 2013 at €164 million, backed by international institutional investors such as Alpinvest Partners, DEG – Deutsche Investitions - und Entwicklungsgesellschaft mbH, a member of KfW Bankengruppe, EBRD – European Bank for Reconstruction and Development, FMO – Nederlandse Financierings - Maatschappij voor Ontwikkelingslanden N.V, IFC – International Finance Corporation, a member of the World Bank Group, iVCi – Istanbul Venture Capital Initiative and Siguler Guff & Company as well as leading Turkish industrialist families and entrepreneurs as Limited Partners in the fund.

Mediterra’s exclusive investment adviser Mediterra Private Equity Limited employs a world class team that has global private equity experience as well as Turkish deal making experience, with investment professionals from Kohlberg Kravis Roberts (KKR), Lehman Brothers, Bedminster Capital and İş Private Equity. Team has served more than 30 boards in 11 countries, and invested over $2.0 billion globally and over $800 million of equity capital in Turkey.

Mediterra is actively investing in mid-market companies with enterprise values ranging from €25 million to €200 million, geographically focusing on broader Turkey particularly to Anatolian businesses and targeting export driven industrial companies as well as domestic consumer demand driven sectors.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Arete Ventures
Description:
Arete Ventures is an institutional advisory firm working at the intersection of capital, technology, and transformation. For over 15 years, we’ve supported GPs, LPs, founders, and enterprise leaders across the US, Europe, and APAC on high-stakes decisions — from capital strategy and M&A to market entry, frontier-tech diligence, and enterprise performance.

Our work blends operator experience with buy-side rigor. We decode complex markets, pressure-test assumptions, and help leadership teams move with clarity, speed, and conviction in environments where the cost of a wrong decision is high. 

Areas We Lead:
• Fund Strategy, Portfolio Construction & Capital Allocation
• Investments, M&A, Commercial Diligence & Exit Planning
• Regulatory Intelligence, Government Interface & Macro-Policy Navigation
•  Frontier-Tech Diligence (AI, Life Sciences, Quantum Tech, Blockchain,)
• Climate Finance, Impact Investing & Sustainability Strategy
• Enterprise Value Creation, Operating Model Redesign & Performance Uplift
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Agronomics Limited
Description: Agronomics is the leading listed venture capital firm with a focus on cellular agriculture.  The Company has established a portfolio of over 20 companies at the Pre-Seed to Series C stage in this rapidly advancing sector. It seeks to secure minority stakes in companies owning technologies with defensible intellectual property that offer new ways of producing food and materials with a focus on products historically derived from animals. These technologies are driving a major disruption in agriculture, offering solutions to improve sustainability, as well as addressing human health, animal welfare and environmental damage. This disruption will decouple supply chains from the environment and animals, as well as being fundamental to feeding the world's expanding population.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: TPL Holdings (Pvt) Limited
Description:
We at TPL Holdings are committed to making a positive contribution to create and deliver innovative concepts for our customers comprising of products and services utilizing cutting edge technologies backed by customer that delivers. All the companies under TPL Holdings are committed to being best is class in their respective businesses focused in delivering unparalleled service to all our customers and signifying a vision of dynamism and promise resulting in the ultimate masterpiece of a global leader. 

TPL Trakker Limited – Pakistan’s first and the region’s largest asset tracking monitoring and fleet management solution provider.

TPL Direct Insurance Limited – Pakistan’s first and only Direct Insurance Company that offer host of products and services through a 24-hours Call Centre operation with claims and underwriting services.

TPL Properties (Pvt) Ltd – The developers of ‘Centrepoint’, the state of the art office complex that adheres to the highest international standards of design and technology in commercial building

TPL Security Services (Pvt) Ltd – Pakistan’s first licensed and specialist stolen vehicle recovery company, with nationwide deployment of Trakker Recovery Team.

Trakker Energy (Pvt) Ltd – The groups exploration and production business, is a part of consortium comprising Swiss company heritage Oil and Gas Limited and Pakistani company Sprint Energy (Pvt) Ltd for the exploration and production of oil.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Women's Private Equity Network
Description: WPEN runs the Women's Private Equity Network Summit. We bring together the most successful female business and investment leaders along with next-generation professionals.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Conquest, BITS Pilani
Description:
Conquest is India's largest student-run Startup Accelerator by the Center for Entrepreneurial Leadership, BITS Pilani. We provide an ideal platform for young, fresh startups to come to the fore and grow.

Conquest provides a six-week long summer mentorship program with weekly mentoring sessions for our Top 10 startups in Bangalore followed by the Grand Finale at the end of August. We provide free accommodation, workspace and intensive mentorship to the startups during this period, thus building India's first student run startup accelerator.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Chui Ventures
Description: Chui Ventures is an investment company with a focus on venture capital investments. We invest in early-stage, tech-enabled high-growth businesses while seeking out African founders with strong local expertise and a global mindset.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Venture Care Services (P) Ltd
Description:
Driving Innovation and Success for Startups!
We are catering to all startup problems with our “YOUnique” approach.
We at Venture Care ignite transformation, not just provide services. Envision a committed group of professionals who translate ideas into successes. Our outstanding team is in charge of advancing innovation and influencing the direction of startups. 

At Venture Care, we ignite the spark that propels startups to extraordinary heights. With unmatched precision, boundless passion, and a relentless drive, we transform disruptive ideas into compelling, investor-ready realities.

Imagine your startup growing and soaring, capturing the attention of top investors and leading the market. That’s what we do. We aim to turn your visionary ideas into success stories that demand attention. 

Would you be ready to soar?

Contact us today
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Building Ventures
Description:
Championing disruptive ideas for a better built world.

Building Ventures offers the perfect mix of capital, mentorship and industry connections.

As built environment pioneers, our mission is to provide access to funding, rich knowledge and decades of experience, to entrepreneurs, partners and disruptive thinkers. Together, we will build a better world.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: The Trendlines Group
Description: The Trendlines Group invests in innovations in agrifood and medtech, leveraging our experience, partnerships network, and resources to go from seed to market. Trendlines’ shares are traded on the Singapore Stock Exchange (SGX: 42T) and in the United States as an American Depositary Receipt (ADR) on the OTCQX International (OTCQX: TRNLY).
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Translink Capital
Description: Translink Capital is an early-stage venture capital firm based in Palo Alto with $1B under management, and investing out of its fifth fund. The fund’s mission is to partner with US entrepreneurs, and add value by leveraging the firm’s proprietary insights and connections to strategic Asian partners. The team is led by investors and operators, all of whom have managed successful US venture practices for large Asian strategics such as Foxconn, Hikari Tsushin, SoftBank, and UMC.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: QVentures
Description:
QVentures is a Venture Capital firm providing direct investment opportunities.

QVentures sources, screens, and invests in top-tier start-ups from Seed to Series C. 

QVentures has participated in rounds with an aggregate combined size of over £220m in 115 companies. Our team is experienced with deep knowledge of the UK venture ecosystem and our focus lies on high-growth, revenue-generating companies raising Seed to Series C investment rounds.

QVentures advises on a Pre-Seed Fund which backs the next generation of best-in-breed technology founders in the UK. 

If you are looking to invest £100k+ in early-stage companies, request information at www.qventures.co/register

If you are an entrepreneur seeking funding, please apply here https://qventures.typeform.com/to/zZPOWf

--

Investing in early-stage businesses involves risks, including illiquidity (the inability to sell assets quickly or without substantial loss in value), lack of dividends, loss of investment and dilution, and it should be done only as part of a diversified portfolio. QVentures is a trading name of Quintessentially Ventures Limited (FRN: 617109), an Appointed Representative of Kin Capital Partners LLP FRN: 656789 who are authorised by the FCA.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Anchorless Bangladesh
Description: Anchorless Bangladesh is a New York-based investment firm focused on increasing global capital flow into outsized Bangladeshi opportunities.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Quadrille Capital
Description:
Based in Paris, New York and San Francisco, Quadrille Capital is an independent investment firm focused on technology and healthcare in the United States, Europe and China. 

Quadrille Capital has four investment solutions: investments in private companies, commitments in growth equity and venture capital funds, secondary investments in funds and private companies, and long-only public equity funds.

Quadrille manages approximately €1.7 billion for institutional investors and sophisticated family offices in Europe, the UK, the Americas and the Middle East.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Bridgewest Group
Description:
Inspiring solutions for a better tomorrow fuels our success. Our focus on "people empowerment" catapulted our expansion from niche investor to $3B global investment group. Innovative software, AI and semiconductor technologies to biotech and life sciences, people across the world - entrepreneurs, partners, customers and communities at large - experience our vision for a better tomorrow.

We grew our portfolio of companies with smart, motivated people. Collaborative mentorship and capital infusion move the brightest entrepreneurs forward. From idea inception through exit, our seasoned team of operating partners and subject matter experts guide entrepreneurs to successful financial outcomes. As private investors, we are not beholden to other investors nor artificial timeframes. We maximize outcomes for everyone based on merit instead of timeline adherence. Our robust eco-community, including our Global Capability Center - Bridgewest India - facilitates functional support so CEOs can turn their ideas into prosperous companies. Those with vision, skill and determination enjoy long tenure. Nearly 100% of portfolio CEOs stay with us to form new ventures after exits.

Learn more about our company through our showcase pages and our team.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Karista
Description:
Karista is an early-growth investment firm backing ambitious entrepreneurs across Europe. For nearly 25 years, we have supported over 100 startups and scale-ups, many of which have achieved successful exits through acquisitions or listings on major exchanges, including Nasdaq.
 
Our current strategy focuses on two key sectors: HealthTech and Space, Defence & Security, executed through dedicated funds and specialized teams with deep domain expertise. We primarily invest in early-growth opportunities, while selectively supporting early-stage moonshot projects with transformative potential.
 
Trusted by leading institutional investors, financial groups, strategic corporates, and family offices, Karista pairs capital with hands-on support and strategic guidance. We leverage our extensive networks and sector expertise to help founders scale rapidly, execute their global commercial strategy, innovate boldly, and achieve transformative, market-leading success.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Redwood Capital Partners
Description: Redwood Capital Partners is a forward-thinking asset manager with deep expertise in venture capital, private equity, and investment banking. We give investors access to high-return opportunities, partnering with visionary entrepreneurs and transformative companies across a wide range of industries.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Supply Change Capital
Description:
Supply Change Capital is an early-stage venture firm powering the food systems of tomorrow. 

We invest in technology across the food supply chain — systems that people and our planet rely on every day. From automation that improves labor and safety to platforms that predict climate volatility and supply chain risk, we back the critical food infrastructure that no one sees but everyone needs.

In a $10T industry under pressure, early-stage infrastructure is where value compounds, and where we invest with rigor and trust.

Powering the food systems of tomorrow starts at the root.
We’re there early.

Find out more → supplychangecapital.com
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Greenfield Capital
Description:
Greenfield is a European crypto investment firm.
We are long-term backers of early developer teams building toward an open, decentralized, and more robust architecture of tomorrow’s web.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Mobeus
Description: Private equity investments of up to £20m for entrepreneurial, fast-growth UK businesses. If you’ve reached a key moment in the life of your business and need investment to get to the next stage, we can provide attractive and flexible funding packages. We partner with talented and determined management teams of companies with strong growth potential to deliver your vision.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Atal Incubation Center Gujarat Technological University
Description: Atal Incubation Centre at Gujarat Technological University promoted by Gujarat Technological University and supported by Atal Innovation Mission, NITI Aayog, Government of India is a Section-8 (Not for profit) the company incorporated under Companies Act 2013. Atal Incubation Center at Gujarat Technological University has been established to nurture the ideas into viable enterprise/Startup with a specific focus on Healthcare, Medical Devices and Biotechnology, and allied areas
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: CommerzVentures
Description:
Founded in 2014, CommerzVentures is a specialist fintech investor with €550m under management. CommerzVentures backs early and growth-stage companies in the fintech, insurtech and Climate FinTech sectors. A returns-driven Europe-first investor, CommerzVentures’ global strategy includes Israel, the USA, and Africa.

CommerzVentures’ first €100m fund was launched in 2014, their second €150m fund started investing in October 2019, whilst their third €300m fund was launched in 2022. All three are managed by the same team of experienced venture capitalists, who personally co-invest in each investment. 

CoV Management GmbH is the independent manager of the CommerzVentures funds. Commerzbank AG is the anchor investor across all three funds.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: OVNI Capital
Description:
OVNI Capital is a first-check venture capital firm committed to aliens redefining global markets. With offices in Paris and San Francisco, we partner with entrepreneurs seeking to invent new markets or disrupt large existing industries, with a crucial focus on early internationalization.

We only invest if a company has the potential to be a global market leader with a strong impact on human lives. We favor being the first venture investor and we follow on our investments.

We invest as little as €250k to seed a company and as much as €2M to lead a round. We invest primarily in Europe and the US but we can be followers in other regions.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Harlo Entertainment
Description:
Harlo Entertainment is a Toronto-based private equity firm with more than $250M assets under management. From conceptualization to creation and early-stage investments, our firm focuses on investments in the hospitality, entertainment, lifestyle, and technology industry. 

We take a value-oriented approach to investing and have a clear focus on operational improvements to drive performance and growth. To stay ahead of the game, we aim to identify trends that are ahead of the broader market and we make choices that allow us to capitalize on these future market opportunities.

Our team works across multiple high-profile, growing brands including: Shake Shack Canada, Hotel X Toronto, MIMI Chinese, Sunnys Chinese, Linny's, Kasa Moto and more. 

Check out our website to learn more: www.harloentertainment.com
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: THE HOLT XCHANGE
Description:
The Holt Xchange is Canada's most active seed fintech investor. 

Supported through five generations of experience and a robust global network, Holt Xchange is powering innovative tech products, world-class companies, and entrepreneurs, helping shape the future of their businesses and technology in the financial services sector.

Tracking over 10,000 early stage fintechs globally. We utilize our advanced data platform; algorithms enhanced with human capital, to seek best matches with our investment thesis and Advisor network (ie: individuals who represent financial institutions, institutional investors and domain experts).

We enable through our network, new revenue opportunities as well as growth funding for our portfolio companies. 

The Holt family has a history of investing, growing, supporting, and building financial companies for the past five generations. With the rising need for AI throughout all aspects of our daily lives, we have decided to launch Holt Fintech Accelerator that focuses on boosting AI capabilities of Fintech businesses and expanding their international network.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: People Ventures
Description: We help entrepreneurs succeed. It has been our mission from day one. We challenge existing paradigms of how things are done in the normal VC world. Our experience of actually being in the thick of the action day in, day out with Founders and their companies, actively pushing them towards their end game - wherever it might be - has taught us it pays off. To be active. To be present. To be hands on.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Vireo Ventures
Description: We support and invest in early-stage companies that disrupt the established ways how we generate, manage, and use energy. We believe that we must find new ways how to create connectivity between the physical and digital world in order to build the 21st century infrastructure to support how we live, move and work.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: WePlay Ventures
Description:
WePlay Ventures is a Gaming VC in Europe, Central Asia and Turkey that supports pre-seed and seed-stage gaming studios to achieve their potential. Our longstanding relationship in the ecosystem has allowed us to bring our expertise to each of our investments. For studios to achieve maximum growth, we share our deep industry expertise and extensive network of partners. We go beyond investment. Our acceleration program and smart money model make us active partners in the studios’ success.

WePlay Ventures is an Istanbul-based investment company in Gaming sector. We invest in early stage Mobile, PC, Console game developers that are seeking for more than just money. We provide capital, know-how, experience, and a wide network to gaming startups that have potential to scale in global markets. We are not only an investor but also a team-mates. We support you with our professional and experienced team in gaming and startup ecosystems. We understand your business, we accelerate your team, we work together! We Play together!
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Alpine Space Ventures
Description: Alpine Space Ventures is an industry insider-led venture capital firm exclusively investing in early-stage companies in the new space sector.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Samsung Ventures
Description:
Samsung Venture Investment Corporation (SVIC) is headquartered in Seoul and has a strong presence in the world’s innovation hubs across the United States, Europe, Israel, India, China, and Japan. 

SVIC backs emerging technology startup founders, whom we believe will pioneer and shape the future.

Samsung Ventures represents investments in the US/Canada, Europe, Israel, India, China, and Japan. Startups located in the areas listed here can reach us at sv.a@samsung.com

■ AUM: $2.5B+
■ Investment Pace: $200M deployed annually

For more information, please check out our website.
https://www.samsungventure.co.kr/english_portfolio.do
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Kickstart Global
Description:
The US is saturated with student founders. Twitch, DropBox, Facebook, Dell were all founded from university dorm rooms.

Yet in the UK, students are 80% less likely to start companies than those in the US.

Our education system divides and isolates student talent into boxes. The coders, the creatives, the med students and the finance chasers. When it comes to innovation, these ambitious minds need to come together to solve problems.
By bringing together UK's first ever cross-university student-accelerator, we break these barriers.

We are the hub for the top 0.03% of students: the ultimate place to build an impactful, investment-ready start-up. From MedTech, FinTech, to education and B2B services, Kickstart is the place for the greatest innovators under 24 from any industry.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Vargas Holding
Description:
Vargas was founded 2014 in Sweden. We identify, validate, finance, launch and scale impact companies. By pushing boundaries in the areas that matter the most, we target hard-to-abate industries to accelerate decarbonisation. And we have started with green batteries, steel and hydrogen.

Polarium, Northvolt and H2 Green Steel are proof of concept for our greenfield model for building companies from the ground up.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Silverbacks Holdings
Description:
We back dominant platforms’ builders in underserved markets. Our goal is to help their founders sustain industry dominance, nurture optimal corporate governance and expand beyond their original jurisdiction. We help them gain more capital, more authority and more empathy. Our priority region is Africa and its vicinity. We typically intervene once product market fit is demonstrated.

As a capital allocator, we are a data driven decision firm and seek alpha. We prioritize tech enabled businesses able to capture growing pools of export oriented revenues. Our portfolio is risk-adjusted across a diversity of select high growth industries: tech, entertainment, sports & creative economy related segments. 

We believe that these sectors play a crucial role in the creation of new jobs and, ultimately, in the strategic positioning of a geography. They also capture both the innovative spirit and untapped energy residing within the youth and women from our priority region.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: MTIP
Description:
MTIP is a Swiss growth and buyout firm specializing in healthcare software companies. We focus on accelerating European businesses that are transforming global healthcare. Our purpose is to drive growth and improve lives through impactful innovation.
 
As an impact investor, MTIP focuses on healthcare software companies addressing inequalities. With our MTIP Impact Tracker, we measure and enhance healthcare access and outcomes. By integrating ESG principles and aligning with SDGs, we deliver financial returns and meaningful societal impact.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: PalasTree Catalyst
Description:
Welcome to PalasTree, navigating from SEED to SERIES to SUCCESS! 

PalasTree built a robust network of Elite School partnerships, legendary intellectual founders, industry experts, alumni from top ELITE INDIAN INSTITUES are committed to being your most dependable partner through all stages of growth, offering invaluable support in fundraising, team building, and international expansion

 From Seed to Series, our Venture Capital prowess infuses lifeblood into startups, propelling them forward. Our rigorous Market Research & Feasibility Studies are your compass to success, while our mastery in Technology Commercialization translates groundbreaking ideas into profitable ventures.

 Mentorship is our heartbeat at PalasTree. Our meticulous Pitch Due Diligence is not just an evaluation; it’s a crucible of refinement, shaping your business strategy to perfection. We don't just invest; we build ecosystems. We don't just support; we champion your growth through every twist and turn.

 We are your unwavering ally in fundraising, scaling, and conquering international arenas. At PalasTree, we transform startups into titans.

 Are you ready to embark on a journey of a lifetime? Are you prepared to see your vision soar? At PalasTree, we don’t just believe in your dreams. We invest in them, nurture them, and stand by you as they take flight.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Possible Ventures
Description:
Possible Ventures backs the most ambitious teams using frontier tech in critical industries at the intersection of AI, energy, robotics, space, compute, climate and health.

As a team of proven entrepreneurs, we invest early and actively support founders as a wingman. 

We're unabashed optimists when it comes to the power of technology to solve problems. 

See our website for the missions we’re helping make possible: https://possible.ventures
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: IU Ventures
Description: We invest to generate significant and long-lasting social and economic impact for IU, Indiana, and the World.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Mithril Capital Management LLC
Description: Mithril is a global investment firm founded by Ajay Royan and Peter Thiel. We provide capital to leading growth companies by partnering with teams who use technology to build transformative and durable businesses, often in industries long overdue for change. Each of these businesses is unique, but all face common challenges to unlocking long-term growth. We help navigate these critical inflection points by investing in size and with conviction.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: VestedWorld
Description:
There are innovative, exciting companies that are poised for growth in emerging markets.  However, these companies lack access to the capital required to fuel their growth.  VestedWorld is a venture capital fund focused on investing in those companies.

The three primary countries that we invest in are Ghana, Kenya, and Nigeria. We also consider opportunities in four secondary countries: Ethiopia, Rwanda, Tanzania, and Uganda. We focus on three sectors that we view as essential to the growth of any developing country: Agribusinesses, Consumer Products, and Technology-enabled businesses.

We believe that we can have a profound impact on the development of the economies where we invest and the people that our portfolio companies employ. We also deliver competitive, risk-adjusted returns to our investors.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: HappyHour
Description:
We go all in early.
We work with brilliant people on novel ideas.
We help shape them, grow them, into meaningful stories, at an epic scale.

HappyHour provides capital, technology, network and access to our partners, to ensure the companies and products we invest in will have an outstanding launch and durable future.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Gateway Partners
Description:
Gateway Partners Group (“Gateway”) is a Singapore and Dubai-based alternative investment manager investing across the fast-growing markets of South Asia, Southeast Asia, Middle East and Africa.

For over three decades, the founding partners have collaborated across several financial institutions through which they developed their expertise in emerging markets. They established Gateway in 2014 to offer a one-stop solution to investors seeking emerging markets exposure to regions which are long on opportunities and short on capital.

The Gateway team brings a well-balanced mix of backgrounds across functions, sectors and geographies in the form of “trusted advisor” relationships with many leading business families supporting deal flow, due diligence and navigation of local environments.

Providing bespoke financing solutions to well-established, growing businesses, Gateway is an active investor, adding value to portfolio companies across strategy, people, capital markets, governance, finance, and marketing.  As a core tenet of our strategy, Gateway also manages key emerging markets risks, providing downside protection to the portfolios we manage.

A UN PRI signatory, Gateway is committed to being a responsible investor. We are also the first asset manager globally to receive a Governance and Control Effectiveness Rating from Sigma Ratings (‘A’ rating with a positive outlook).
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Corpfin Capital
Description:
Corpfin Capital is an independent private equity fund management company with +30 years of experience in the mid-market segment in Spain. Throughout its history Corpfin Capital has managed five different institutional funds plus an evergreen vehicle for an aggregate amount of €1000 million, participating in more than 50 business projects in a variety of sectors. Corpfin Capital is currently investing Corpfin Capital Fund V (c.€300 million) and divesting Corpfin Capital Fund V (€255 million).

We select companies with a sound business model and a clear potential for value creation, whether through the acceleration of their organic growth, selected acquisitions or as a result of operational or financial improvements. We seek growth and embrace transformation.

Corpfin Capital usually invests in association with experienced and committed management teams, with whom we form alliances and establish close links, aligning interests and values towards a growth-based business project. This relationship of trust with our partners in the day-to-day management of the companies is a key component of Corpfin’s DNA and an essential factor for the success of our projects.

We have a large team of experienced professionals, able to foster innovative solutions which contribute to the development of our participated companies. Our work, based on discipline and transparency, has enabled us to grow companies in the most varied sectors, and enjoy of a remarkable recognition in the market.

Our institutional investor base, mostly international, includes pension funds, insurance companies, funds of funds, financial institutions and large family offices.”We are proud of the support that our investors have placed in us over the years.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Future Planet Capital Regional
Description:
Future Planet Capital Regional (formerly Midven) is the catalyst for ambitious businesses across the West Midlands. Specialising in equity gap funding, we empower promising companies to unlock their full potential, regardless of sector. Together, we’re delivering impact for the region, one business at a time.

We have an experienced, energetic and hands on team that works closely with the management teams in its portfolio companies to ensure their growth strategies are aligned with achieving high value returns for all shareholders. 

Our focus is on dynamic businesses with the potential to create a strong competitive position in a large growing market, helping them to achieve their goals and build profitable businesses with attractive exit options. 

It has been 3 years since Midven was acquired by Future Planet Capital. Midven has played a pivotal role in supporting entrepreneurs and innovation across the UK, and we are proud of all that has been achieved under its banner.  Going forward, Future Planet Capital will serve as our core brand, with the Midven team becoming Future Planet Capital Regional. The funds remain unchanged in both structure and management, and continue to be led by the same dedicated teams. While the brand name is evolving, the team, values, and regional investment focus remain unchanged. We remain deeply committed to the regions we serve and to the early-stage businesses we support.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: BONVENTURE
Description:
BONVENTURE is a pioneer in European impact venture capital.
Founded in 2003, we invest in scalable companies that tackle social and environmental challenges with strong, sustainable business models.

With over €100 million under management and 60+ impact investments, we back founders creating measurable impact across Digital Health, Education & Equality, Climate & Nature, and Sustainable Consumption. As the first impact VC in the German-speaking region and Europe’s first BaFin-registered EuSEF, we combine experience, impact and returns.

At BONVENTURE, impact and financial performance go hand in hand.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Pacific Lake
Description:
Search entrepreneurs bet on themselves. We bet on them.

Our legacy is built on the foundation of partnering with ambitious individuals on their path to entrepreneurship through acquisition. How can we help you amplify your potential?
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Protégé Ventures
Description:
As Southeast Asia’s first student venture fund, we have taken it upon ourselves to help build up the region’s student startup ecosystem. Our mission is twofold:

   1. Invest in great Student Ventures
   2. Groom amazing Student VCs to keep doing the same.

As such, at Protégé Ventures, you have the choice to either apply for funding as a Student Founder, or for training as a Student VC. We leverage on industry leaders in the regional startup ecosystem as well as experts in entrepreneurial education to prepare students for real world success in venture capital and entrepreneurship. 

To learn more, register your interest here: https://bit.ly/3sDkoLJ

This programme is managed by Singapore Management University's Institute of Innovation & Entrepreneurship.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: FutureLabs Ventures
Description:
Established by the former Partners of McKinsey New Ventures and accomplished veteran entrepreneurs, FutureLabs Ventures is a top-tier corporate venture studio & venture capital firm.  We partner with leading corporations to build, launch and scale ventures into multi-$100m businesses.

We apply a global perspective to technology innovation, and take a hands-on business building approach, bringing serial entrepreneurial talent, fast-prototyping tech and over two decades of corporate venture building experience. 

Over the past years, FutureLabs has built a strong track-record partnering with leading corporations such as ING, Standard Chartered, OCBC, Maxis, Cargill, DHL to build 20+ digital ventures that have become regional & global players in their fields.

Our Vision
To create positive impact at scale for corporates, consumers and societies by harnessing the power of technological & business model innovation.

Our Mission

Name: The Column Group
Description:
The Column Group (TCG) is a science-driven venture capital firm that makes significant financial and operational commitments to build early stage drug discovery companies based on their unique scientific platforms and potential to deliver multiple breakthrough therapeutics.

TCG’s investment strategy runs counter to the prevailing trend in life sciences venture capital toward assembling diversified portfolios of later stage, single product-orientated companies across multiple industry sectors, with proximity to value inflection points and the early identification of a Pharma “buyer” as key investment considerations.

In contrast, TCG takes the long view in making investments, recognizing that significant time is often required to generate significant value. Our approach is not “building-to-exit.” Key variables, including scientific opportunities, the competitive and regulatory landscape, and Pharma priorities, can change very rapidly. Instead, TCG’s mission is the generation of fundamentally strong companies, built from the ground up based on great science and the ability to generate multiple differentiated product opportunities.

Rather than diversification, TCG emphasizes focus. We are dedicated to early stage drug discovery as the best source of a new generation of novel, highly effective human therapies. We believe that the most critical resources, such as great ideas, world class founders, and top quality managerial and scientific talent, are very rare and that concentrating them within a small cohort of companies is the key path to success.

TCG is about the bold pursuit of big ideas using innovative science to generate breakthrough therapies that address significant diseases. Our firm is committed to all facets of company building and brings together a rich combination of scientific, financial and operational expertise to shape promising science into a value-rich portfolio poised to have a profound impact on human health.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Spark Growth Ventures
Description:
Recognized as a 2022 Emerging 50 VC and 2023 Top 25 Founder’s Choice VC, Spark Growth Ventures is a community oriented, early & mid stage, vertical-agnostic, technology venture capital firm. Our mission is to support gritty and exceptional founders in their missions by bringing forth the combined value of our strong community. We are fortunate to have a global network of entrepreneurs, C-level relationships, subject matter experts, world-class talent, institutional investors, high net worth individuals and family offices, many of who are investors in our platform. Our team has several decades of global experience in venture capital, entrepreneurship, innovation, executive & board management, functional leadership and advisory work. 

We create 360° long-term value for our startups and our investors through active participation alongside our founders, leveraging our extensive experiences and global networks. We work in the trenches with our portfolio on top-line growth, bottom-line expansion and capital optimization. Our partnership areas span all commercial aspects such as sales & go-to-market, operations, corporate functions, fund-raising and organizational effectiveness as well as exit planning and execution.

We respect authenticity, intellectual curiosity, collaboration, optimism, grit and boldness. We prioritize efficiency and transparency in our work. We believe in integrity and doing business with the goal of creating a win-win for all stakeholders, not just the shareholders.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: T1D Fund
Description: Launched in 2016, the T1D Fund is the first scaled venture fund established to catalyze the development of T1D cure-oriented therapies through equity investments. The Fund co-invests with venture capital and biopharma in support of early-stage companies pursuing disease-modifying therapies and potential cures for T1D. A core element of our mission is to rapidly advance promising therapies through development and ultimately regulatory approval. The Fund works in close partnership with Breakthrough T1D (formerly JDRF) and The Leona M. and Harry B. Helmsley Charitable Trust—two of the leading global organizations committed to supporting the T1D community and to advancing T1D research and innovation. Led by a deeply experienced team of healthcare and investing professionals, the Fund leverages its vast research, clinical, regulatory, and medical affairs network on behalf of its portfolio companies. Capitalized through philanthropic dollars, the Fund makes investments in biotech companies and recycles returns into new investments, thereby extending the impact of its donors’ contributions.

•	In companies with great teams.
•	In companies with products or services that solve a real pain point.
•	In companies that have a proprietary or highly differentiated product with a path towards sustainable differentiation.
•	In companies with enormous potential for growth and that are addressing large target markets.
•	In companies with reasonable valuations reflecting a realistic assessment of the company's progress to date and prospects for success.
We have a strong preference for companies that are demonstrating early evidence of having identified efficient, scalable, paid customer acquisition channels, a low ratio of Customer Acquisition Cost to Lifetime Value and a quick time to recoup Customer Acquisition Cost.
We only invest in companies that will have a minimum available cash runway of 12 months post-close.

Description:

The focus of the direct business is on the structuring and financing of corporate succession models, the acquisition of group divisions/ subsidiaries and the expansion financing of medium-sized companies. In contrast to most other financial investors, which only manage funds with a limited term, NORD Holding acts as a so-called "evergreen fund" with no term restrictions and invests from its own balance sheet. The company is currently involved in more than 13 companies in Germany and other German-speaking countries.

The Fund Investments division targets the small-cap segment of the European private equity market and focuses on primary, secondary and co-investments. NORD Holding concentrates strongly on buyout managers newly established on the market, operational investment strategies and regularly acts as an anchor investor.

We typically invest in companies that are generating revenues with attractive margins and/or unit economics and capital-efficient business models.

We focus on Seed, Series A, and Series B rounds. We are prepared to invest up to US$ 5 million in each new investment and expect to continue investing in our portfolio companies in successive rounds. We are flexible on the mechanics. We can lead or participate.

We primarily invest in companies based in Latin America, but we also back businesses led by Latin founders in other places like the US or Europe.

We are purpose-driven investors. We seek to invest in companies and exceptional entrepreneurs who are on a mission to solve our biggest social and environmental challenges by building companies rooted in solid unit economics and long-term value creation.

VeniSIA collaborates with notable partners, including 𝗘𝗻𝗶 𝘄𝗶𝘁𝗵 𝗝𝗼𝘂𝗹𝗲, 𝗖𝗶𝘀𝗰𝗼, 𝗘𝗱𝗶𝘀𝗼𝗻, 𝗦𝗻𝗮𝗺, to enhance its impact.

VeniSIA's targets are companies (corporations and SMEs), startups, researchers, master's students, donors, and institutions interested in pursuing or supporting sustainable innovation.

Description:
ZoneStartups India is the India-based startup accelerator program of Ryerson University's Digital Media Zone.

ZSI is a joint venture between Ryerson University (Toronto) and Bombay Stock Exchange Institute (BSE). We believe that, by having a presence in Toronto, and now in Mumbai, we will be able to deliver a high quality international accelerator program, providing access points into both markets for startups from respective geographies. In addition to functioning as a startup accelerator, we will be able to bring quality mobile / internet / digital media startups from both geographies, to the industry.

We are here to build the startup ecosystem, by creating an interdisciplinary coworking platform. Our model doesn't involve any equity or fee for service. During the tenure on incubation, we offer infrastructure, access to industry partners, business development support, mentoring and client relations. Only when we evaluate for seed funding and go forward with the funding (after 3-4 months into the program), do we take a 5-7% equity in the take. Companies are free to exit the program after the 4-6 month duration, without funding (and without diluting their equity and/or paying any fees to us!). Beyond the free infrastructure, our main value add to the accelerator program is industry contacts, test markets and client facilitation.

Description:
Cortado Ventures is backing the frontier of American industry from the heart of the Midcontinent. We invest in founders building dual-use, scalable companies in sectors where America’s next strategic advantage will be created,  space, energy, cyber/telecom, advanced manufacturing, logistics, life sciences, and other mission-critical technologies.

Headquartered in Oklahoma City, we’re helping define the region’s emerging tech economy while accelerating the reshoring of the American industrial base. Our team brings decades of operator experience, from CEO seats to national-security, geospatial, and deep-tech backgrounds,  giving founders a true strategic partner from day one. We go far beyond capital with hands-on support in hiring, customer access, operational scaling, and federal market navigation.

Founded in 2020, Cortado Ventures is built to invest at the intersection of commercial adoption and national-security demand. With strong partnerships across industry and government, including relationships with NASA leadership, defense networks, and major corporate innovators, we source proprietary opportunities overlooked by coastal capital and grounded in the historic strengths of the Midcontinent.

We exist to build enduring companies, not just portfolios. From Oklahoma to the broader Midcontinent, we back globally ambitious founders using technology to solve real-world problems in energy, space, logistics, biotech, cyber, and the future of work. Our mission is simple: to create a generational legacy of frontier-tech companies that transform the Midcontinent and strengthen America’s competitive edge.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Djassi Africa
Description:
We envision technology, entrepreneurship, and bold innovators as the catalyst for the socio-economic transformation of the African continent and the rest of the world.

Our mission is to unlock the potential of the next generation of African and Afro-diasporan innovators and accelerate the growth of their businesses to deliver impact at scale.

We seek high-impact and scalable startups leveraging technology and digital innovation to unlock long-term value, drive economic growth, and enable the global digital economy.

WE ARE VENTURE BUILDERS

We accelerate and mature high potential early-stage startups into investable and market-ready businesses (Idea, pre-Seed and Seed stages).

WE ARE ECOSYSTEM BUILDERS

We follow a data-driven approach to embed diversity, equity, and sustainability in the DNA of innovation and entrepreneurship ecosystems.

WE ARE ANGEL INVESTORS

With an holistic approach to funding, we are typically the first investor in early-stage startups that require much more than financial capital to grow and scale.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Roundtable
Description: Roundtable is Europe's leading infrastructure for private investments, handling all legal and administrative operations so founders, angels, and fund managers can focus on what matters.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: HAL Investments
Description: HAL is the Dutch investment subsidiary of HAL Holding N.V., an international company that is quoted on the Amsterdam Stock Exchange via HAL Trust (Ticker symbol: HAL NA). HAL has a diverse portfolio of internationally active companies.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: FLEX Capital
Description:
Wir glauben, dass Deutschland nicht nur ein Land der Ingenieure, sondern auch ein Land der Programmierer ist. Hierzulande gibt es über 11.000 mittelständische Software- und Internetunternehmen, die sich aus eigener Kraft zu wachstumsstarken und profitablen, mitunter Weltmarktführern, entwickelt haben. Als „digitales Rückgrat“ leisten diese Tech-Pioniere die Innovationsarbeit, die unseren Wohlstand auch in Zukunft gewährleisten werden. Darin wollen wir sie unterstützen – mit Investitionen und Know-how.

FLEX Capital ist ein Private Equity Fonds, der von erfolgreichen Serienunternehmern gegründet wurde und in profitable und wachsende Unternehmen aus dem deutschen Internet- und Software-Mittelstand investiert. Der Anfang 2023 verkündete zweite Fonds in Höhe von 300 Millionen Euro enthält erstmalig eine gewerbliche Struktur, die es FLEX Capital ermöglicht, Portfoliounternehmen mit einem eigens aufgebauten 30-köpfigen Expertenteam operativ zu unterstützen, wodurch sich der Investor von vielen anderen Private Equity Fonds unterscheidet.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Relay Ventures
Description: Relay Ventures is an early stage venture capital firm that invests in passionate entrepreneurs disrupting and creating new markets through mobile technologies. Unlike other funds, Relay exclusively focuses on software for mobile devices and the connected Internet, creating an unparalleled set of networks and resources that tangibly help founders build world-class companies. With offices in Toronto and Calgary, the firm is active throughout North America. For additional information, visit www.relayventures.com.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Chemovator
Description:
Chemovator is the business incubator and early-stage investor of BASF and supports venture teams to turn great business proposals into scalable and investable business opportunities. 
We leverage the unique connection to BASF knowledge and domain expertise, ambitious founders, industry partners, universities, investors and the entrepreneurship ecosystem to create deep tech opportunities that truly matter for our industry. 

As an early-stage or pre-seed investor, we offer two different programs: 
Chemovator - Evolve as the intrapreneurship program for BASF employees, and 
Chemovator - Elevate, where we invest into visionary founders with ideas centered around sustainability, next generation materials and other groundbreaking areas.


Data Protection: https://www.chemovator.com/data-protection/
Impressum: https://www.chemovator.com/impressum/
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Crowdberry
Description:
Crowdberry is the leading private investment group in growth capital and debt financing for private and institutional investors in Czechia and Slovakia. 

Crowdberry manages an ECSP regulated alternative investment platform that allows private investors to directly invest and finance specific companies and real estate projects. Crowdberry manages EUR 120m+ of capital and a portfolio of 100+ start-up, SME and real estate investments through the alternative investment platform and managed investment funds.

Crowdberry helps to change the investment market. We enable investors to take a direct ownership stake or provide private debt to Czechia and Slovakia based or orginated companies and real-estate. We create long-term value and thus contribute to the overall growth of the domestic economy.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Graduate Entrepreneur Fund
Description:
Empowering founders through funding and support. From the start of your journey to late growth, we have you covered, We invest and provide support to founders from the universities of Delft & Rotterdam. We help you accelerate through our early stage fund of €58M and our unique and expansive network. 

Check out our website for more information! Please send pitches for Graduate Entrepreneur via https://www.graduate.nl/forms/funding-request

Name: Sanabil Studio
Description:
A Venture Builder creating the next generation of startups in Saudi Arabia.

At Sanabil Studio, set up by Sanabil Investments, a wholly owned subsidiary of PIF, we partner with exceptional founders to ideate, build, and launch new ventures. We combine capital, deep market insight, and hands-on support across product, design, engineering, growth, and access to a powerful network - focusing on real problems shaping the Kingdom and the region.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Momenta
Description: Momenta is the leading Industrial Impact venture capital firm, accelerating industrial innovators across energy, manufacturing, smart spaces, and the supply chain. For over a decade, our team of deep industry operators has helped scale industry leaders and innovators to improve critical industries, the environment, and people's quality of life. PitchBook has ranked Momenta as one of the ten best-performing venture capital firms for 2023 in its prestigious Global Manager Performance Score League Tables, and the firm is the only European-headquartered VC to secure a Top 10 spot on the list.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Rhône Group
Description: Rhône, established in 1996, is a global private equity firm with a focus on investments in market leading businesses with a pan-European or transatlantic presence and expansion prospects. Rhône’s investment philosophy includes the development of strong, strategic partnerships with the companies in which it invests. Rhône has offices in London and New York and currently holds investments in a diversified portfolio of companies including investments in the business services, chemicals, consumer products, food, industrial, materials, mining, and shipping industries.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Foxmont Capital Partners
Description:
With deep local expertise and a global investor LP network, Foxmont helps founders build scalable, sustainable businesses that deliver real impact. Founded in 2018, the firm has raised three funds while building a strong track record of scaling startups and attracting follow-on capital across diverse sectors in the Philippine market.

Beyond capital, Foxmont provides value-added support for founders and management teams across key areas such as talent acquisition, expense management, operational strategy, corporate structuring, blueprinting, and fundraising strategy. With its local presence, first-mover advantage, and hands-on support, the firm consistently delivers top-quartile returns and is well-positioned to capitalize on the country’s growing venture capital landscape.

Foxmont has offices in Manila and Singapore, and is an MAS-licensed fund manager. 

Learn more about us: www.foxmontcapital.com
Join the #FoxmontMafia: https://careers.foxmontcapital.com/
Pitch your company: https://www.foxmontcapital.com/contact-us
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: HTwenty
Description: HTwenty is an early-stage venture firm that invests primarily in Pre-seed, Seed, and Series A technology companies across Latin America and the US Hispanic market. The firm has a local presence in Miami, Mexico City, and Bogota and helps founders across every stage of their life cycle starting with ideation, MVP construction and product-market fit and then providing tools to scale businesses towards a successful exit.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Burnt Island Ventures
Description: We are at a turning point. From the wildfires of the Western US to flooding in Niger, climate change is here. Water resources across the world will be under increasing stress as the world warms. Products and services that allow individuals, governments and companies to navigate this change will see more and more demand. Entrepreneurs are emerging with the skill and insight to meet that demand, developing solutions to water problems at scale. Burnt Island Ventures exists to find, fund and support the best of these founders.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Climate Angels
Description: Backed by India’s leading Entrepreneurs, VC, Investors for solving Pollution & Climate change. Climate Angels provide a platform for angel investors keen to invest in sustainability startups and will curate exclusive deal flow that not only fits our mandate but also has a viable exit strategy.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: RHL Ventures
Description:
RHL Ventures is a private investment firm founded in 2015. RHL’s three partners invest their personal and family funds, to champion long term growth and support small and medium size businesses in ASEAN countries. 

We have been humbled to see the dramatic impact that small businesses can have on the world. And yet, these companies share common beginnings. A few people banding together and taking a leap into the unknown and building businesses that not only aimed to disrupt existing ways of doing business but as well providing a social good. Therefore, we have rethought traditional investing and want to bridge the gap between private and public equity markets, taking the best practices of public and private equity markets investing and applying them to small businesses. 

We believe we are building a future where businesses can work together with us to get holistic advice, capital and tools they need to make a big difference from the very beginning. In building this partnership, our focal point will be to build expert knowledge on the business, industry and management team as we are looking to hold an investment for 5 years. 

We are looking to be long term capital and strategic partners for businesses we invest in and are looking for outsized return upon exit. At times, we will be co-invested with trusted investors in our network which may include individuals with relevant industry expertise and institutional investors. 

Our philosophy allows us to circumvent the constrains that most traditional private equity and public investors such as the conflict of interest in the ownership of capital and will not be restricted to short term market performance benchmarks.

For more enquiries, please write to RHL: info@rhl.ventures
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Seraphim Space Accelerator
Description:
Seraphim Space Accelerator is the UK’s first dedicated accelerator programme for start-ups in the SpaceTech industry. Launched by Seraphim Space, the world’s leading venture capital firm specialising exclusively in SpaceTech investment, Space Space Accelerator is backed by both the UK and European Space Agencies as well as by corporate partners such as Dentons, ESA. Airbus and NSSIF. 

Taking a “VC-mindset” approach to the accelerator concept, the founders of Seraphim Space Accelerator believe that investability should be a prerequisite for companies’ participation in the programme, not the endgame.

The Seraphim Space Accelerator value proposition is designed to attract the ‘best of breed‘ high growth technology companies that are best addressing the biggest challenges facing corporates and the wider SpaceTech industry, and to support them in achieving commercial scale by creating tangible outcomes beyond simply funding.

Seraphim Space Accelerator is creating an ecosystem and community support network to ensure that participating start-ups are equipped to maintain their accelerated growth beyond the completion of the programme, providing mentoring from more established companies from the Seraphim Space portfolio, opportunities to work with invested corporate partners on proof of concepts and other technology integrations, and ongoing access to facilities and resources in locations around the world.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: NAR REACH
Description:
REACH, a technology scale-up program created by Second Century Ventures, is dedicated to helping technology companies connect with the trillion-dollar real estate industry and expand into adjacent markets such as insurance, mortgage and financial services. The REACH program is a business accelerator offering education, mentorship, and exposure at key industry events to technology startups of all types, ranging from big data and marketing automation to business productivity and lead generation companies. The program accepts companies in a wide variety of growth stages, not just early-stage companies. 

REACH provides an unparalleled industry network, giving selected companies direct access to more than 350 mentors and advisors who are highly regarded executives, entrepreneurs and investors responsible for managing billions in revenue. In addition, REACH provides companies’ access to an insight panel of more than 50,000 practitioners, who help participating startups refine their products.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Alpha Intelligence Capital
Description:
Alpha Intelligence Capital (AIC) is an entrepreneurs-led, entrepreneurs-invested, global closed-end private venture capital fund. 


We invest in Seed to Series B, deep Artiﬁcial Intelligence/Machine Learning (AI/ML) technology-based companies. We invest in teams applying deep expertise in the algorithmic sciences to develop breakthrough products and solve real business problems.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Afinum Management GmbH
Description:
As a German investment firm, we have been shaping succession situations for SMEs for 20 years: respectful, strategic and far-sighted.

With the ambition to make good things even better, today we strengthen and develop leading companies for tomorrow.

Our investment approach puts people first, because we believe that people in a company are the most valuable asset.

Name: Aussie Angels
Description:
Aussie Angels lets Angels join leading investors funding the next wave of world-changing startups. Find and join angel syndicates to get access to exclusive startup funding rounds. Invest deal-by-deal in world-changing startups.

Get unprecedented access to premium deal flow while investing with leads whose incentives are aligned with yours.

We’re giving more people the opportunity to participate in the venture economy and more startups the resources they need to change the world.

For emerging syndicate & fund leaders, we're providing a stepping stone to run an angel syndicate at a fraction of the cost.

Name: Crosscut Ventures
Description: Crosscut Ventures is a seed-stage venture capital firm in Los Angeles. The firm invests $1,000,000 to $3,500,000 in start-ups that have the potential to scale, disrupt, and build large markets. Crosscut is a catalyst for innovation, bringing decades of expertise in technology and entrepreneurship to help passionate founders build world-class companies. Founded in LA, the firm has been committed to powering the entrepreneurship community in southern California since 2008.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Headline - Asia

Name: UP.Labs
Description: UP.Labs and UP.Ventures are the go-to venture builders and capital providers and for visionary enterprises. We co-create high-impact AI startups that unlock massive operational gains and radically accelerate time to value.

Name: Lion Group
Description: Lion Group is a venture builder and holding company for a number of businesses.

Name: The Lab Ventures
Description:
The Lab Ventures is an operational venture capital firm backing B2B founders who are digitizing underserved industries across Spain and MENA markets. We combine early-stage capital with hands-on operational support, working directly alongside founders to accelerate growth.

Investment Focus
We invest in pre-seed and seed-stage companies in PropTech, Construction Tech, HealthTech, and professional services digitalization; sectors where technology adoption remains low but customer willingness to pay is high. 
Our investment structure deploys capital across milestone-based tranches tied to product and sales achievements, ensuring alignment and capital efficiency.

How We Support Portfolio Companies
Portfolio companies gain direct access to our expertise across product development, engineering, business development, and talent recruitment. 
We work alongside founders on product strategy, customer acquisition, and operational execution, not just from the boardroom, but in the day-to-day challenges of building scalable businesses.
Equally important, our LP network consists of experienced operators and successful entrepreneurs who actively open their networks to support portfolio companies, providing strategic introductions, market intelligence, and partnership opportunities.

Geographic Positioning
With offices in Madrid and Dubai, we serve founders in both mature European markets and high-growth Gulf economies. This dual presence enables portfolio companies to access diverse customer bases while benefiting from on-ground operational support in both regions.

Who We Are
Founded by serial entrepreneurs with decades of company-building experience, we understand the operational realities of early-stage companies because we've built, scaled, and exited businesses ourselves. That operational DNA informs how we evaluate opportunities and where we can genuinely add value.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Boathouse Capital
Description: Boathouse Capital is a Philadelphia-based private equity firm with $650 million of capital under management. We invest up to $100 million of capital into high growth middle-market companies including SaaS/software, technology-enabled services and healthcare IT/services companies. Our sector-focused investment strategy is centered around partnering with management teams to create enduring value and position our companies for accelerated growth.  We're a flexible capital provider with an ability to invest debt and/or equity on a control and non-control basis.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Dealflow.eu
Description:
At Dealflow.eu, we support the most promising EU-funded startup and innovations to scale up and grow. To do so, we leverage advance data platforms to select and connect the founders to key investors and corporations, and provide tailored support to capitalize on these connections. From thousands of applicants, our startups have received up to €2.5m in grants and €15m in equity thanks to EU support. These ready-to-scale companies have clean cap tables and drive innovations that seek aligned connections to grow across markets.

If you would like to discover more about our startups dealflow or the support that we can provide to EU funded innovations, contact us at team@dealflow.eu
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: 37 Angels
Description:
37 Angels is a community of 100+ angel investors with a mission to activate investors through local and global investor trainings. Our main goal is to increase diversity in angel investing. 

Many of our members are former entrepreneurs who understand the highs and lows of business-building. As such, we are committed to transparency In communication and providing advice grounded In empathy. We primarily invest in early-stage startups and we are sector and geography agnostic.
www.37angels.com
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Jasmin Capital
Description:
Jasmin Capital specialises in Private Markets:
- Financial Investment Advisors on Private Markets (private equity, infrastructure) for family offices and institutional investors
- Marketing advisors and private placement agent for private equity (buyout, growth capital, venture capital, mezzanine, debt, distressed, fund of funds) and infrastructure funds

For Limited Partners (LP’s), Jasmin Capital advises family offices and institutional investors with regards to their private assets:
- Reviewing/analysing portfolios
- Granting targeted assets in line with liabilities constraints
- Defining a targeted investment strategy
- Implementing investment strategies: selecting funds/ investment vehicle/ mandate/ co-investment or direct investment
- Following up/monitoring investments, divestments

For General Partners (GP’s), Jasmin Capital assists private equity and infrastructure fund managers:
- Marketing advisor (image study, advisor for new management teams on investment and/or marketing strategies, etc.)
- Placement agent on primary operation to raise capitals with family offices and/or institutional investors for investment fund managers, and on secondary operation with disposal of existing investment funds stocks or with portfolios of direct company stakes

Jasmin Capital is a member of the ANACOFI-CIF, and is registered with the French Financial Market Authority (AMF) as a financial investment consulting firm under the number E002432
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: QuillHash Group
Description:
QuillHash Group is a dynamic force in the Web3 ecosystem. We are dedicated to accelerating the growth of cutting-edge Web3 & AI products and supporting entrepreneurs through our extensive ecosystem. 

 building innovative products and supporting the growth of the community. With over 5 years of experience and 50+ ecosystem leaders, we have helped over 2000 Web3 & AI projects thrive. Our commitment to nurturing talent and fostering collaboration sets us apart as a leader in the space. Join us as we continue to drive progress and shape the future of Web3.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: TOMEK
Description:
Welcome to our autonomous movement—where systems end and self-directed transformation begins. We are here for the few who can’t unsee the illusion—for those who build the impossible, invest where it truly matters, and seek not roles, but meaning.

We’re not just a community; we’re a dynamic network where every individual’s dreams can find the support and resources to become a reality. We believe in the power of connection, in bringing together diverse talents and visions to create something greater than the sum of its parts. Where the success of one fuels the evolution of all.

In this network, each member is a dot waiting to be connected, weaving a web of opportunities where every interaction is a step closer to achieving our goals. We’re here to catalyze that transformation—offering high-impact opportunities to collaborate, share, and grow beyond limits. Join us today and become part of the movement where everything is possible—if you dare.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Beyond Next Ventures Inc.
Description:
Beyond Next Ventures believes in the potential of Japanese science and technology. Our core mission is to grow and harness the potential of motivated entrepreneurs with revolutionary technology, and commercialize their ideas to help build a better future and society.
We focus on fostering an environment that stimulates maximum productivity and growth for entrepreneurs, providing professional assistance to support commercialization, and development of new industries and talent.

We provide services as a VC and accelerator in Japan, India, Asia and elsewhere. Our two funds have a total value of just under 20 billion yen and invest in over 40 companies.
Our investments are focused on leading-edge technologies, including healthcare, food, agriculture, data science, and devices/robotics.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Aldea Ventures
Description:
Aldea backs frontier innovation from inception to scale. We partner with specialist venture managers and visionary founders building transformative technologies in areas such as AI & advanced compute, robotics & autonomy, energy systems, blockchain, and computational biology. We build long-term conviction that enables us to support companies as they scale.

Through long-standing relationships with leading seed funds, Aldea maintains early insight into the next generation of breakout companies and deploys capital to accelerate growth at critical inflection points. 
Specialist by design not agnostic: we invest where scientific depth and domain expertise create asymmetries.

Europe-rooted and globally oriented, we connect talent, founders, and long-term capital to help build enduring technology businesses.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Type One Ventures
Description:
Inspired by astrophysicist Nikolai Kardashev’s method for measuring a civilization's level of technological advancement (the Kardashev scale), Type One Ventures has the goal of advancing humanity closer to a technologically advanced Type One Civilization. 

We are a venture capital fund investing in Seed and Series A startups with operational expertise, capital, and industry resources. The startups we invest in have dynamic teams and are building technical products with the capability to progress humanity forward. At Type One, we help founders harness their superpowers so they can change the world.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Draper B1
Description: Business Booster es la primera aceleradora en la comunidad valenciana que impulsa ideas de negocios basadas en internet o aplicaciones para móvil. Colaboramos, orientamos y cuidamos las ideas para convertirlas en empresas de éxito. Facilitamos el difícil camino del emprendedor.
