Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Özel
Description: ÖZEL Investment Group is focused to set up your company and get it operating worldwide
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Bintang Capital Partners
Description:
Bintang Capital Partners Berhad [197501001009 (22728-T)] is founded on the premise that investing to create a better world is entirely consistent with generating sustainable and superior risk-adjusted long-term returns.

We do this by partnering with visionary entrepreneurs who share our values and want to build their innovative businesses into global champions within their respective fields. 

We have a strong affinity for entrepreneurs and companies who play big roles in their respective communities – those who go far beyond the basic requirements of governance, to meaningfully give back to the communities they live in. 

We are also passionate about helping our investors find truly unique investment opportunities that yield superior risk-adjusted returns - whilst making a difference to the world we live in. 

We understand that our investors need strong returns on their capital so that they can continue doing the great work they do to make the world a better place: but we also understand that increasingly, they want these returns to be generated in sustainable and responsible ways. 

We are driven to give people opportunities – the greatest investments we make are in relationships. 

From the entrepreneurs whose visions we back, to the investors who support our mission; to the fresh graduates entering the world of private equity, or the employees who work within our partner companies, to clients and suppliers of our partner companies – we know the work we do touches many lives.

Bintang Capital Partners is a Private Equity Management Company registered with the Securities Commission of Malaysia. 

The firm is a signatory to the United Nations Principles for Responsible Investment and the first Malaysian signatory to Impact Principles. 

In May 2023, Bintang Capital Partners became Southeast Asia's first Certified B Corporation private equity firm.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Nobody Studios
Description:
At Nobody Studios, we are startup artisans and serial entrepreneurs who curate the best ideas, expedite company creation, and craft successful ventures in succession. We are proud to be crowd first and people first.

We aim to create 100 compelling companies in the next five years, guiding them from ideation through MVP to full-scale company validation. 

The close-knit powerhouse team of talent at Nobody Studios is stacked with industry experts in the areas of marketing innovation, e-commerce business strategy, wellness, RE tech, fin-tech, data science, product innovation, and beyond. We are larger than any one personality, and unified by our principles of rapid and frugal innovation, a ‘people first’ mentality, crowd first execution in everything, and transparency to our core.  

We embarked on our first significant crowdfunding campaign at the end of 2022, inviting 900+ investors from 55 countries to come along on their journey to build companies that resonate with the crowd.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: LVP
Description:
LVP is a specialist, sustainability-led, multi-strategy alternative asset manager. LVP manages c. A$1.6billion of investor commitments across 𝘁𝗵𝗿𝗲𝗲 strategies: 𝗣𝗿𝗶𝘃𝗮𝘁𝗲 𝗘𝗾𝘂𝗶𝘁𝘆, 𝗚𝗿𝗼𝘄𝘁𝗵, and 𝗥𝗲𝗮𝗹 𝗔𝘀𝘀𝗲𝘁𝘀. We seek to pair tangible impact outcomes with leading financial returns.

𝗟𝗩𝗣 𝗣𝗿𝗶𝘃𝗮𝘁𝗲 𝗘𝗾𝘂𝗶𝘁𝘆 – specialises in the lower mid-market sector, targeting fragmented industries where opportunities exist to "buy and build" platform assets. Focusing on Australian and New Zealand businesses with Enterprise Values up to A$200 million, that are aligned with our growth investment strategy.

𝗟𝗩𝗣 𝗚𝗿𝗼𝘄𝘁𝗵 – We provide flexible capital to fuel specific growth opportunities, while achieving specific sustainability and impact outcomes.

𝗟𝗩𝗣 𝗥𝗲𝗮𝗹 𝗔𝘀𝘀𝗲𝘁𝘀 – Investing in the built environment, focusing on asset classes such as housing and sustainable social infrastructure that generate outstanding financial, social, and environmental returns.

At LVP, we are deeply committed to responsible investing, sustainability and impact outcomes across all our strategies. This includes our philanthropic arm, 𝗟𝗩𝗣 𝗙𝗼𝘂𝗻𝗱𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻. With a goal to facilitate enabling life-changing opportunities for disadvantaged children through education. We encourage our companies to partner with the LVP Foundation to accelerate our goal of supporting >1,000 children learning.

More information on our strategies along with our sustainability commitments can be seen at 𝘄𝘄𝘄.𝗹𝘃𝗽𝗳𝘂𝗻𝗱𝘀.𝗰𝗼𝗺.𝗮𝘂
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Lightship Capital
Description:
Lightship Capital drives innovation and investment in areas not served by venture capitalists in New York or Silicon Valley. 

Our fund is modeled to offer remarkable founders an alternative to traditional firms— enabling them to avoid the challenges associated with traditional funding. 

We join or lead rounds, we don’t require board seats to invest, and if/when we are invited to serve on the board— we strongly support the founder.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: DO VENTURES
Description:
Do Ventures is an early-stage VC firm that focuses on making investments in technology companies in Vietnam and Southeast Asia. We look for pioneers with a desire to create disruptive products that can bring about outstanding values to society.

Our Philosophy is Grow by Doing. We believe that entrepreneurs who are willing to do more tend to make more right decisions. Luck originates from resilience and persistence. Those who work harder will have more chances to encounter luck in their career path.

At Do Ventures, we believe that failing is equally important to do the right things. Success can frequently be taken for granted, but failure is a remarkable opportunity to learn. Therefore, we highly encourage our talented entrepreneurs to take risks, challenge themselves, and extend their visions beyond the usual boundary. Our ultimate goal is to discover daring founders and nurture them into PIONEERS in their fields to form new consumer behaviors.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: SpringTide Ventures
Description: Venture capital for tomorrow’s greatest healthcare companies
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: MyProBuddy
Description:
The best deals never reach the open market, they’re curated within trusted networks.

At MyProBuddy, we bridge the gap between bold founders and discerning investors. Our mission is to turn promising ventures into fundable businesses, while giving investors privileged access to a rigorously vetted pipeline of opportunities.

We do this by partnering with 200+ incubation centres, accelerators and venture studios, and by collaborating with reputed CA firms, auditors and sector mentors. This ensures every venture in our network isn’t just innovative, but also disciplined in governance, compliance and growth.

Every opportunity is sharpened to meet the standards of serious capital, making co-investment not just possible, but powerful.

Whether it’s equity, debt, or grants, we ensure founders access the right capital and investors connect with ventures that are truly investment-ready.

Founders, raise funds like a pro, with your Pro Buddy!
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: MassVentures
Description:
MassVentures is the Commonwealth’s strategic venture capital team. We find, fund and foster early-stage deep tech that fuels economic growth across Massachusetts. We are a vital, comprehensive resource for entrepreneurs offering investment, non-dilutive grants, technical support and business guidance.
 
“Diverse Teams Outperform” is our investment thesis, and we are intentional about supporting founders with diverse backgrounds or founders from diverse geographies in the state.
 
MassVentures is a venture studio at its core with an emphasis on academic spinouts and converting research and early-stage ideas into companies. We seek to identify ideas at the very earliest prototype stage and provide much needed coaching, mentoring and funding to help convert those ideas into thriving companies to solve today’s biggest challenges for tomorrow’s generation. We establish long-term relationships with founders, aiding them on their journey from startup to growth company.

Visit our website to learn more about all the funding opportunities available through MV Capital and the business guidance resources offered through MV Accelerate.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: SpeedUp Venture Capital Group
Description:
We are group of funds investing in early stage, yet dynamically developing, ventures with global aspirations. Our cooperation with companies is based on a 3-8 year investment horizon. We're interested in innovations from areas such as: consumer internet, fintech, martech, IoT and hardware. 

Marc Andreessen's sentence “Software is eating the world”, resonates with us. We believe that the world is reaching a point where every process will be streamlined, and traditional human labour is going to be replaced by the computational power of machines and universal network access. We cannot stop this process, however, we can control it and build, on the basis of it, companies that would conquer the global markets.

You can find our GDPR here: https://bit.ly/2Ts0i4X
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Signals Venture Capital
Description:
Signals Venture Capital partners with founders who are in the early stages of building global enterprise software and tech companies.

Investment Area: B2B software-centric business models across many enterprise segments
Geography: Focus on Europe
Stage: Seed, Post-Seed, Series A
Investments: €1m to €5m
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Graphite Ventures
Description:
Trusted by founders, Graphite Ventures is a seed-stage venture capital firm that invests in B2B software and hardware companies across Canada.

We support startups with early commercialization expertise to build capital-efficient businesses while preserving optionality for founders. 

Today, Graphite Ventures is actively guiding 100+ Canadian B2B companies moving from early product-market fit to repeatable sales to scalable growth. 

Our $120M Fund IV provides initial seed investments of $500K to $1.5M to B2B technology companies and strong founders demonstrating early market traction. 

Find out more at graphitevc.com.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Statkraft Ventures
Description: SK Ventures is a leading venture capital investor focused on the energy transition and climate tech. We partner with exceptional founders in early- and growth-stage start-ups in Europe and North America. With offices in Germany and Norway and backed by Statkraft, Europe's largest producer of renewable energy, SK Ventures provides capital and expertise to accelerate the transition to a more sustainable future.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Indaco Venture Partners
Description:
Founded in 2016, today Indaco Venture Partners SGR is the largest independent Italian venture capital asset management company, with a strong specialization in companies that innovate in electronics and robotics, medtech, digital and new materials.

Indaco manages over 250 million across its five funds. Investments in Indaco Ventures Fund I are focused on growth-stage companies whose competitive advantage stems from cutting-edge proprietary technologies and innovations. In terms of teams and technologies, the focus is on Italian enterprises, although investments are made throughout Europe, USA, Canada and Israel.

Anchor institutional investors in Indaco Ventures Fund I include Intesa Sanpaolo, Fondazione Cariplo and Fondo Italiano d’Investimento. In the digital sector, Indaco has an advisory partnership with growITup.

The investment team managers have more than 10 years of experience in venture investing in Italy and abroad and have executed a high number of successful exits, including IPOs and transactions with corporate partners.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Crest Capital Partners
Description:
Crest is a private equity firm with an exclusive focus on sustainable and competitive Portuguese businesses.

Established in 2017 by a group of professionals with extensive cross-sector experience in the private equity market, Crest invests in businesses with a competitive advantage and high value creation potential, developing partnerships with ambitious entrepreneurs and management teams.

The Crest team members have worked together for more than 10 years and led several consolidation and internationalisation strategies for a variety of businesses and sectors.

Crest operates under the best market practices with funds from institutional Investors among them pension funds, funds of funds, insurance groups and family offices. 

Crest is currently investing its second buyout fund, Crest II, with a capitalization of €125M, and divesting from Crest I (€100M, launched in 2018). In 2023, Crest launched a €90M fund to invest in the Agribusiness sector – Crest Agro Fund I.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Founders
Description:
We are a first-money and incubation investor.  We partner with people with whom we share a vision, and work together to figure out how to get there. We will never say “come back when you have traction”. If we like the WHY and the WHO, the WHAT and HOW is what we figure out together. 

We don’t see our investments as “bets”, but as companies we want to exist in the world. Entrepreneurs put all their eggs into one basket and don’t have a portfolio to optimise. We like to think like that: we focus on only a few opportunities at the time and do everything we can to make them work. We think, take risk, and are incentivised much more like Founders than funders.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Medicxi
Description: medicxi is a Life Sciences venture capital firm, with offices in London, St. Helier (Jersey) and Geneva.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Epiq Capital
Description: Premier tech growth- and later-stage investment firm
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: StartupMarket (Acquired by Fongogo)
Description: StartupMarket girişim ekosisteminin dijital platformudur ve birinci önceliği girişimlerin verimli şekilde büyümesidir. Bunun için ekosistemdeki tüm oyunculara hayatlarını kolaylaştırmak için SaaS ürünler sunarken, birbirleri arasındaki ilişki ve iletişimi bir platformda toplayarak daha iyi hale getirir. Teknoloji severler, girişim dünyasını takip edenler, girişimciler, yatırımcılar ve yenilikçi kurumların yöneticileri için değer yaratan StartupMarket, hedeflerini gerçekleştirmek için üyelerine beş ana başlıkta fırsat ve kolaylıklar sunar: 1- Kendini Tanıt Kurumların, yatırımcıların ve girişimcilerin kendilerini tanıtmalarına imkan verir. 2- Girişimini Tanıt Girişimci yatırımcılara, mentorlara, potansiyel çalışanlarına ve potansiyel müşterilere girişimini tanıtır. 3- Portföyünü Yönet Kolayca başvuru almanıza ve portföyünüzdeki girişimlerden durum güncellemesi almanızı sağlar. 4- İş Ağını Geliştir Yatırım, mentorluk, danışmanlık yapmanız için olanakları artırır. Yeni ekip üyeleri ve işbirlikleri geliştirmenize yardımcı olur. 5- Bilgilen Filtreler ile ilgilendiğiniz konularda çalışan startupları listelemenizi ve yatırım arayanları hemen görmenize imkan verir.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Anchor Asia (Anchor Taiwan)
Description:
Anchor Asia is a venture platform driving global innovation through curated experiences, cross-border ventures, and purpose-driven leadership.
Headquartered in Taiwan and built for the world, Anchor bridges capital, technology, and culture to accelerate transformation across industries and borders. Since 2017, we have been convening founders, investors, and corporate leaders to spark bold ideas, nurture talent, and catalyze collaborations.

From Bike Venture (micromobility innovation) at Taipei Cycle, Venture On at Taichung Bike Week, and East Meets West at EUROBIKE, to Weave Venture (textile transformation and fashion tech), the Anchor Corporate Venturing Roundtable (network of 100+ Taiwanese enterprises), and the Women in Venture Roundtable, we curate high-impact conversations and partnerships that reshape industries — from cycling, mobility, and textile to semiconductors, AI, sustainability, and beyond.

Anchor is where visionaries meet, ecosystems grow, and Asia connects with the world.

–
Anchor Asia（Anchor Taiwan）致力於透過國際策展、生態圈活動與早期投資，連結企業、新創與投資人，推動跨境、跨產業的創新合作。自2017年創立，我們持續扮演亞洲與世界的橋樑，在科技、資本與人文的交匯處，注入國際資源與洞見，引領產業轉型。

Anchor 推出多項策展計畫，包括 CVC (Corporate Venture Capital) 與 Women in Venture 圓桌論壇、自行車與紡織為主題的產業計畫 Bike Venture 與 Weave Venture、國際影音節目 Asia Venturing，持續以台灣為平台，匯聚全球創新能量。

More about Anchor Asia (Taiwan): https://reurl.cc/qGaEaR
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Ulu Ventures
Description: Ulu Ventures is a top seed stage venture fund in Silicon Valley focused on innovation across enterprise, fintech, consumer, health, and sustainability. Ulu generates great financial results using a disciplined, repeatable decision-making process that analyzes risk-reward trade-offs and also reduces cognitive bias. The majority of Ulu portfolio companies are founded by diverse teams that include women, minority, URM and/or immigrant founders. Ulu’s investment thesis is based on the concept that diversity is profitable. The firm has more than $200M AUM, 10 unicorns in the portfolio and is dedicated to increasing diversity in the entrepreneurial and assets under management communities.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Correlation Ventures
Description:
Correlation Ventures is a new breed of venture capital firm, leveraging world-class AI to offer entrepreneurs and other venture capitalists a dramatically better option when they are seeking additional capital to complete a financing round. We're founders, VCs, and Data scientists who have founded and funded hundreds of companies of all shapes and sizes.  We pride ourselves on being the industry’s most entrepreneur-friendly firm, including making decisions within days.  We have a world-leading analytics and data team, and the world’s most complete VC data set, so neither we nor our portfolio companies are ever flying blind. 
 
We're one of the most active early-stage VC investors in the US. What do we invest in? Great companies. Let’s connect.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Whiteboard Capital
Description:
Whiteboard Capital is an early stage investment fund established by founder of Freecharge Mr. Sandeep Tandon.
Apart from capital we invest time in Ideas and teams we believe in. We are sector agnostic fund with investments in Consumer, financial and healthcare sectors. 

Do visit us @ http://whiteboardcap.com/ or write to us @ info@whiteboardcap.com
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Actera Group
Description: Actera is the largest private equity firm primarily focusing on investments in Turkey, advising funds with assets exceeding US$3.3 billion. Portfolio companies of such funds collectively employ over 70,000 people and generate more than US$5 billion in revenues. Funds advised by Actera have generated the highest returns in the asset class from the Turkish market on a consistent basis.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Oria Capital
Description: Oria Capital is a Growth Equity for B2B technology companies, based in São Paulo. A team of operational and technology experts and market insiders, with decades of entrepreneurial and industry experience. Oria is the ideal partner for technology companies looking for growth combined with profitability.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Chicago:Blend
Description:
Chicago:Blend is a 501c3 nonprofit organization working to create a more inclusive venture capital and startup ecosystem. We provide industry data and insights, support emerging talent and unite VC investors to strengthen Chicago’s entrepreneurial community.

 AWARDS 
• DEI Impact Award - National Venture Capital Association (NVCA)
• Social Innovator Award - Chicago Innovation
• Fourth Revolution Award for Community Empowerment - mHUB
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: STRATA Investment Group
Description: Strata was created to consolidate and manage a diversified group of companies operating under its umbrella. Since Strata’s inception, we have sought to acquire and nurture quality fledgling niche businesses with potential for significant growth, developing them into thriving entities with healthy returns.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: DeepTech & Climate Fonds (DTCF)
Description: The DeepTech & Climate Fonds (DTCF) invests up to €30 million in high-growth deep-tech and climate-tech companies in Germany and Europe. With a fund volume of €1 billion, the DTCF acts as a long-term-oriented anchor investor and bridge between investors, SMEs, and innovative high-tech startups from their early growth stage onwards.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Antler Brasil
Description:
A Antler é um fundo global de venture capital early-stage, que apoia empreendedoras e empreendedores fora da curva a se dedicarem ao trabalho mais significativo de suas vidas: construírem e desenvolverem startups que redefinirão mercados. 

Sabendo que bons fundadores vêm de todos os lugares, temos escritórios em 30 localidades, em todos os continentes. Pessoas visionárias e talentosas escolhem a Antler para irem mais longe, mais rápido. 

Apoiamos esses founders desde o princípio, oferecendo um ambiente de inovação único, feedbacks e direcionamentos estratégicos, conexões com uma rede internacional de mentores de negócios e especialistas de mercado e, potencialmente, capital para alavancar o negócio. 

Já ajudamos a criar e investir em mais de 1.400 startups no mundo todo, em mais de 30 indústrias diferentes, e temos o objetivo de alcançar 6.000 empresas investidas até 2030.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Aldea Ventures
Description:
Partnering with and co-investing alongside Europe's most ambitious pre-seed and seed VC managers to drive innovation through disruptive technologies

As the first of its kind in Europe, Aldea’s pioneering hybrid strategy is two-fold: back highly specialized emerging fund managers investing in early-stage companies and co-invest in growth-stage companies in their breakout paths.

With a multi-specialist approach, rather than agnostic, Aldea has backed 50+ fund managers and growth companies since its inception in 2020 including companies like Automata, Kenbi, Podimo or Sorare; and funds like Moonfire, Cocoa, Green Generation Fund and Semantic Ventures.

Aldea’s mission is to invest in cutting-edge technologies and industries connecting VC talent and startup ecosystems across entrepreneurial hubs. Its diverse portfolio also provides the fund with deep knowledge and insights across the European tech landscape.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Innovation Industries
Description:
Innovation Industries is an European deep tech venture capital firm. We invest in deep tech companies with ground-breaking technologies that can address the fundamental challenges of our time. 

Our portfolio companies are delivering real impact in their industries, ranging from climate-resilient vegetable seeds to safer and more efficient batteries. We are committed to catalysing positive change in the world, which is why we only invest in companies that support one or more environmental, social and/or corporate governance (ESG) goals. Overall impact is important to us, so we focus on both late-stage startups as well as early-stage founders who are making a difference.

We are technology enthusiasts with decades of experience in (bio)physics, physiology, chemistry, engineering, and more. We take a hands-on approach to investing, where we act as not only a financial investor but also a business partner, actively supporting our portfolio in reaching their growth and impact goals.  

Active since 2000, we are the most experienced deep-tech VC firm in the Netherlands and have become a leading player in the Benelux region. We have 20+ years of partnership with key research institutes and experts that support our portfolio.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Cronos | Cronos Labs
Description: Cronos Labs is a Web3 startup accelerator that focuses on Decentralized Finance and blockchain games, and on the development of the Cronos chain ecosystem. Visit cronos.org for more information about Cronos.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Motivate Venture Capital
Description:
Motivate Ventures invests in pre-seed and seed stage startups. 

Target first check size is $500k-$2mm and ours is typically the first professional capital in a business. We target 15%+ ownership and 10x+ returns on each of our investments.

Warm email intros from other professional investors are best or entrepreneurs can reach out and tell us more about their startup and its funding needs here: www.motivate.vc/funding

We haven’t mastered any of the social media platforms' messaging systems yet so heads up that we don't usually check those messages.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: One Global Holding
Description:
One Global Holding is a venture-building company that embodies the essence of digital transformation and restores trust between investors and ventures. 

The company's vision is to elevate humanity by providing life with support, equity, advice, and an ecosystem of financial, technological, and intellectual resources that empower innovators and digital disruptors to build successful ventures.

The company has a global presence in over 16 countries across the GCC, Middle East, North Africa, East Africa, Europe, US & Canada. 


In 2023, One Global Holding transformed into a venture building company and launched three subsidiaries: 

o	One Global Innovation 
A technological and creative ecosystem that allows ventures to build, collaborate and grow. 

o	One Global Hub
An incubator and accelerator for prospective ventures that propels and realises their operational potential.

o	One Global Capital 
A digital venture and capital management unit which secures funding through digitized venture capital practices.

Built on the technology, marketing and business expertise of the team members, One Global has a global outlook that focuses towards world’s Over-The-Top (OTT) market to do business with major industries.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Entrepreneur Week
Description:
Entrepreneur Week is a global community driven to connect and educate both aspiring and early-stage business owners with the necessary knowledge, tools, skills and access to create jobs, unleash ideas, strengthen economies, and attract capital investment.

The Entrepreneur Week platform sets the stage for entrepreneurship and its founding principles engender change at the intersection of ideation, innovation and disruption.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: YBF Ventures
Description:
YBF’s three-tiered mission is to help startups and scaleups to succeed, corporates to innovate and the Australian tech ecosystem to thrive. As such, YBF is home to several large technology hubs that centre on key aspects of innovation for Victoria and New South Wales. Examples of these include the YBF Fintech Hub in partnership with the Victorian Government, the LawTech Hub in collaboration with Lander & Rogers; the PropTech Hub in partnership with building automation giant, Honeywell; and SquareGrape, Australia’s first tech hub for the wine sector, in partnership with one of the world's largest wine companies, Treasury Wine Estates.

YBF is Australia’s original and largest tech and innovation hub, headquartered in Melbourne. Today it is proud to be home to over 500 members making up over 75 future-focused Australian and international technology startups and scaleups at its Melbourne and Sydney CBD locations.

The YBF team features several senior leaders from international technology and engineering companies, and as a result, is able to provide unmatched insight into international companies and expansion into the APAC region. In addition, YBF’s senior leadership includes serial entrepreneurs, technologists and industry experts.

YBF Melbourne and YBF Sydney are top-choice landing pads for international technology firms setting up operations in Australia. Uber, 90 Seconds, Foodora and Kickstarter started their Australian journeys from YBF. Currently, several large American and British tech companies are  based out of both YBF Melbourne and YBF Sydney, including a world-renowned unicorn.

YBF has a vast alumni network, and hosts hundreds of events annually to support the growth of the Australian technology sector. Startup, scaleup and corporate members of YBF are able to take advantage of YBF’s global network that reaches over 50,000 people annually, becoming immersed in Australia’s oldest and most-renowned tech community.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Wollemi Capital
Description:
Wollemi Capital is a global climate specialist investment firm. We invest in businesses and projects that strive to advance global decarbonisation.

At Wollemi, we believe that the custodianship of the environment is key to a thriving future – one in which astute deployment of capital will drive even greater outcomes for our planet, partners and investors.

Our team has been at the forefront of climate investing for over 10 years, founded by former Global Head of Macquarie Capital, Tim Bishop, and former Head of Asia and Australia for BCG Digital Ventures, Paul Hunyor.

With 35+ people across Sydney, Seattle and San Francisco, Wollemi brings together under one roof a unique breadth of climate capability – combining a track record of investing across the spectrum from technology to infrastructure, with specialist technical and development expertise and institutional grade operational support.

We’re focused on bridging the climate growth capital gap, providing flexible and patient capital and building multi-year funding partnerships to support emerging climate solutions to scale and maximise their impact on our planet.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: ASIF Ventures
Description:
ASIF Ventures is a VC fund entirely led by students, for students - built by the very community we back.

We provide early-stage funding, network, resources and support to student and recent graduate founders from the University of Amsterdam and Vrije University who are ready to take the next big leap.

Curious to find out more about ASIF? Get in touch!
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: ICICI Venture
Description:
ICICI Venture is a specialist alternative assets manager based in India. The firm is a wholly owned subsidiary of ICICI Bank (www.icicibank.com), the largest private sector financial services group in India.

ICICI Venture has been at the forefront of driving entrepreneurship in India for over two decades, both as a partner and capital provider for individuals with a clear common objective, the passion to pursue business ideas in the quest for creating value for all stakeholders and for the larger good of the nation. Till date, various funds managed by the firm have invested in over 500 companies. ICICI Venture continues to remain committed to this mission.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Cocoa
Description:
We are VCs turned angels supporting founders as their in-house VC. 
Angel checks + VC hacks & network +EQ

 We invest ~$500k angel checks at the first institutional round. And we don’t give a damn about stake: we don’t have a minimum ownership stake and we don’t follow-on. Free to be 100% on your side of the table.
 
 We have been VCs. We know how VCs think & operate. And we have the network of a VC.

 We become your in-house VC: here to help you hack the system from the inside, with independent & unfiltered investor insights. And EQ. And chocolate ;).

 We back Killers with a Heart: brilliant beasts with a right to a secret, building because it's inevitable to them.

 We are backed by mission-driven institutions, supporting children’s health, public education, and cutting-edge research. 

Check out our founders' deck: https://bit.ly/cocoapitchesfirst
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Amplifica Capital
Description:
We are on a mission to bring more women into the game –as investors and founders– because we know they will transform LatAms's future. 
We are a VC firm investing in women with early-stage tech startups in Latam, with teams including female founders, or with goods and services for women.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Sofindev Private Equity Partners
Description:
Sofindev is a leading independent private equity firm, specialised in buyout and growth capital for small and mid-sized companies in the Benelux region. Sofindev was founded in 1991 by Sofina and Colruyt, two prominent family-controlled publicly listed groups. Over the past decade, the Sofindev Management team has evolved into full independence and counts a wide number of respected families and (international) institutions in its investor pool. Among these investors are entrepreneurs and family business owners of companies in which Sofindev has invested in the past.

Currently, the Sofindev Management team manages three funds with combined commitments of more than 500 MEUR: Sofindev IV (°2015 - 107 MEUR), Sofindev V (°December 2019 - 170 MEUR) and Sofindev VI (December 2022 - 250 MEUR). With the Sofindev VI fund, the Sofindev team aims to invest equity tickets between 5 and 30 MEUR in successful Benelux-based SMEs.

More details on our website: www.sofindev.com.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: The Venture Crew (Minimal Ventures)
Description:
A portfolio company of Minimal Ventures.

Get timeless advice from the world's best founders and investors.

We're a community of 86,000+ founders and investors across our newsletters. We run three newsletters aimed at making startups, venture capital, and AI more accessible to founders, investors, and tech professionals.
You can check out our newsletters:

1. Get bi-weekly advice about startup, venture capital, products and startup growth through the Venture Curator newsletter: https://theventurecrew.substack.com/

2. Get daily updates on startup fundraising, venture capital and tech direct to your inbox: https://venturedailydigest.beehiiv.com/

3. Stay updated with AI market trends, jobs, and research breakthroughs via The Prompt Report: https://thepromptreport.beehiiv.com/

Through these newsletters, we aim to bridge the gap between founders, investors, and tech enthusiasts. Sign up to join our growing community!
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Italians in VC
Description:
Italians in VC is the largest community of Italian VC operators around the world . With a mission to connect, share and educate the next generation of Italian Investors and founders. How to do so?

- With recurring initiatives such as Office Hours, networking events, masterclasses, and other initiatives.
- With community-building efforts, gathering investors who share our same souls and goals.
- … and more!
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: SteelSky Ventures
Description:
SteelSky Ventures is a visionary technology venture fund revolutionizing healthcare by backing groundbreaking companies that unlock new markets and redefine the industry.

We invest in game-changing solutions that break barriers, create new categories, and capitalize on untapped market opportunities—driving real, measurable impact in healthcare.

Notable investments include: Zipline, MIDI Health, Lark, Twentyeight-Health, Origin, Bend Health, Posterity Health, Proov, Motivo and ConcertoCare. 

We take a focused, thematic approach to investing in the expansive and resilient healthcare technology sector, where AI-driven advancements are driving rapid growth toward a $164B market by 2030.

At SteelSky, we accelerate innovations that drive real impact. With our portfolio soaring past $7B in value and improving outcomes for 45M people globally – in our world, the sky's not the limit-it's just the beginning.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: FEBE Ventures
Description: FEBE Ventures, acronym for “For Entrepreneurs, By Entrepreneurs,” is a global seed-focused venture capital firm.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: AF Ventures
Description:
AF Ventures is a consumer fund investing in emerging growth-stage businesses across food & beverage, health & wellness, personal and household care, beauty, and pet. Beyond capital we provide hands-on partnership and domain expertise to build enduring consumer brands and drive long-term value. Past and current investments include ByHeart, Cirkul, Clio, Hello Cake, Jinx, and Siete (acquired by Pepsi). 

For more information on AF Ventures, visit www.afventures.vc.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Breakout Ventures
Description:
Breakout Ventures is the home for creative bioscience entrepreneurs. We invest in early stage companies harnessing the power of cells to build solutions in human health and sustainability. Our team has spent the last decade supporting science-driven companies moving with urgency. We partner with bold founders throughout the entire life cycle, from seed to scale. 

Our portfolio has grown leather without the cow, reprogrammed B cells to produce personalized protein therapeutics, and transformed industrial carbon dioxide emissions into useful products.

We believe cells are the engine of the next decade as the tools, technologies and, most importantly, talent from across industries are brought to bear on biology and chemistry in surprising ways.

Breakout Ventures, building the future powered by science.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Borski Fund
Description:
Wist u dat slechts 5% van alle Venture Capital investeringen worden verstrekt aan gemende teams van mannen en vrouwen. Slechts 1% wordt geïnvesteerd in teams met alleen vrouwen en 94%(!) van de Venture Capital investeringen komt terecht bij teams met alleen maar mannen. Tegelijkertijd blijkt uit onderzoek dat diverse teams innovatiever zijn en beter presteren.

Wij geloven in diversiteit, gendergelijkheid en eerlijke kansen. Wij investeren in vrouwelijke ondernemers omdat we met hen goede bedrijven willen bouwen, omdat hun talent beter benut moet worden, omdat wij hun natuurlijke partner zijn, omdat wij het netwerk hebben dat voor hen van belang is. Omdat het van belang is dat innovatie vanuit vrouwelijke ondernemers wordt gestimuleerd.

Welkom bij Borski Fund. Heeft u een startend of groeibedrijf dat de potentie heeft om (verder) te groeien? En bestaat het team (mede) uit 1 of meerdere vrouwen, die het bedrijf leiden en ook aandelen houden in het bedrijf? Of heeft u een bedrijf dat gericht is op vrouwen? En bent u op zoek naar durfkapitaal? Dan willen wij graag meer van u, uw team en uw plannen weten.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Motion Equity Partners
Description:
Motion Equity Partners is a long-standing European mid-market private equity firm.

Motion Equity Partners has an experienced team of investment professionals in Paris. 

The firm targets majority or minority investments up to €300m in enterprise value, working in partnership with management teams to extract untapped value. 

The firm track record demonstrates the successful conduct of many operations in the past. Motion is a strong backer for management teams who are ambitious for growth, change and development. By bringing its business expertise to its investments, Motion accelerates success.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Kline Hill Partners
Description: Kline Hill Partners focuses on and invests in the private equity secondary market with sellers of all types, including those with smaller or more fragmented asset pools. Kline Hill purchases limited partnership interests in buyout and venture funds and has the flexibility to evaluate and acquire stakes in energy, real estate, and other private funds as well. The firm also acquires direct company interests on a secondary basis.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Lvp
Description: Lvp is a seed fund with a valuable difference: the team are operating experts in the game ecosystem, and they only ever invest in those sectors. The LVP Team has been seed investors in game companies that have created approximately $18 billion in value including Supercell, Unity, NaturalMotion, Playfish, Peak, Applifier, Boomlagoon and Radiant Entertainment.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Schenker Ventures
Description:
Schenker Ventures Venture Capital is an early stage investor focusing on startups in logistics and supply chain within Europe. Investment scope: B2B Xaas, digital business models, Seed to Series B Investment, Ticket size: 200k-5mio

Schenker Ventures Venture Studio is a company builder equipping founders with operational support and capital to turn great ideas into industry-changing companies. The Venture Studio is built upon a partnership between DB Schenker and MVP Factory, Berlin.

Our portfolio companies benefit from the access to the global DB Schenker network of suppliers, partners, and customers, as well as active connections to top-tier investors. Additionally, we provide deep industry knowledge in land transport, air and ocean freight, contract logistics and supply chain management. 

Check out our striving portfolio companies on https://www.schenker-ventures.com/portfolio/

If you have the ambition to become an entrepreneur or have already started your own venture in the logistics and supply chain industry, feel free to reach out through schenkerventures@dbschenker.com
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: PT. Mandiri Capital Indonesia (MCI)
Description: Mandiri Capital Indonesia (MCI) is the Corporate Venture Capital arm of Bank Mandiri, under OJK supervision. We invest in companies with strong fundamentals and bold ambitions—creating sustainable impact that extends beyond financial returns.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Tusk Venture Partners
Description:
Tusk Venture Partners is a New York City based venture capital firm that invests in early-stage technology companies operating in highly regulated markets or creating new verticals where no regulatory framework currently exists. We understand regulatory risk better than any other fund and offer founders a platform that helps portfolio companies execute against those risks like no other venture capital firm can.  

Founded in 2016, by Bradley Tusk and Jordan Nof, Tusk Venture Partners remains the first and only venture capital firm positioned at the nexus of technology and regulation. Our portfolio includes some of the most transformative technology companies across sectors that include FinTech, Digital Health, Transportation, Consumer Internet, and Gaming.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: The Fundamentum Partnership
Description:
Fundamentum is a one-of-a-kind scale up platform committed to help build enduring technology companies out of India. It is founded by Nandan Nilekani and Sanjeev Aggarwal; both of whom come with a stellar record in entrepreneurship and investing. Fundamentum will have an initial corpus of $100 Million extendable to $200 Million. It will lead investment rounds from $10 to $25 Million in companies that have attained the product market fit, have an initial momentum and are looking to scale up.
 
The company will focus on consumer technology businesses, particularly ventures that are solving unique Indian problems. A portion of its capital will also go into investments in enterprise technology/outsourcing companies serving global corporations.
 
Fundamentum is a platform for entrepreneurs by entrepreneurs and will have on board India’s leading entrepreneurs, as investors and mentors.
 
Fundamentum’s team will assist portfolio founders in areas like leadership and organization development, building scalable technology architecture and navigating important inflexion points like capitalization and inorganic growth. They will leverage their experience of having built successful enterprises.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: RPSG Capital Ventures
Description:
RPSG Capital Ventures is an early-stage consumer VC fund focussed on investing in the D2C ecosystem including food & beverage, personal care, and lifestyle goods. 

Started in 2018, RPSG Capital Ventures works to be the value-adding ally of exceptional entrepreneurs looking to transform the Indian consumer landscape.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Africa Startup Festival
Description: The Africa Startup Festival convenes top investors, founders, builders, and operators to delve into how tech advancements and strategic innovations are transforming various African industries. As the premier event, it sets the tone for the deals that happen in the following year.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Activate Capital
Description:
Activate Capital is a growth-stage venture capital firm investing in the sustainable, resilient transformation of the global economy. Our strategy centers on the belief that large-scale, climate and technology-driven shifts are underway, transforming how we power, produce, and move economic activity. We believe that this sustainability supercycle is contributing to the widespread disruption of global economic systems and represents a generational investment opportunity to rebuild core systems and infrastructure over the coming decades. Activate partners with technology companies at their inflection point, led by exceptional entrepreneurs with ambitions to build category-defining platforms of the future.  

Founded in 2017, Activate is led by general partners with over 100 years of combined experience investing and operating in energy and infrastructure technology companies. Over this time, the team has invested more than $1.5 billion into some of the leading companies in their sector: Tesla (TSLA), SolarCity (SCTY), SpaceX, Generate Capital, Stem (STEM), Ping Identity (PING), TPI Composites (TPIC),  EnerNOC (ENOC), Capstone Turbine (CPST) and AquaVenture (WAAS). The Firm invests primarily across the US and Europe and is backed by a world-class set of global investors.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Ten Eleven Ventures
Description: At Ten Eleven, we support cybersecurity entrepreneurs with the capital, connections and expertise needed to bring game-changing technologies to market.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: 216 Capital Ventures
Description:
We are a team of international tech entrepreneurs and startups experts funding great founders at Pre-Seed and Seed stages from Tunisia and beyond.
We invest in teams transforming the world with technology.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Anchorage Capital Partners
Description:
Anchorage Capital Partners is a specialised private equity firm that invests in businesses operating below their full potential or undergoing a significant transformation.  We seek active partnerships with management teams via control investments where we can apply our unique combination of capital, operational expertise and change disciplines. 

The professionals at Anchorage are highly experienced, having been involved in private equity investments in the Asia-Pacific region for over 25 years.  Anchorage manages three funds with a total of $810M funds under management.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Outward VC
Description:
Helping founders breakthrough is what gets us out of bed in the morning. Being an early-stage founder comes with numerous challenges and hurdles. The greatest value that Outward can add is to make the early-stage experience easier.   

Breakthroughs are about our founders and their businesses reaching their fullest potential, whether that’s a multibillion or multinational success. There will be bumps and multiple no’s. We back ourselves to back you. 

Outward invest in pre-Series A companies raising <£5m and we often invest 50% of the round.  

We know what it takes to help you in this moment.  

Link to apply: https://rbtx7yowkqk.typeform.com/to/xmCFCCvc?typeform-source=outwardvc.com
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Sparrow Capital
Description:
We invest upto $500k, in SaaS, B2B, Fintech, and Consumer Internet sectors.

We were institutional VC investors in the past and we understand what needs to happen for you to raise your next round, that`s where we add the most value. We can make key intros to top investing firms, to large startup and tech company CEOs for you to explore synergies, to sales and tech leaders in the ecosystem for your GTM and tech strategy, and to your next crucial hire.

Our capital comes from active & former GPs of top VC firms; unicorn & startup founders; senior business, tech, product, & sales leaders in India and Silicon Valley; and a handful of hustlers like ourselves who want to collaborate with you to help you in any manner they can.

We understand being a founder - we are ones ourselves, only in the business of investing.

Give us an opportunity to pitch ourselves to you and tell you more!
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Redrice Ventures
Description: Redrice provides capital, advice and connections to early stage businesses. We are a high conviction, anti-hype investor, seeking companies with a sustainable differentiation. We initially invest at seed stage, with the ability to support founders through the entire entrepreneurial journey. We are partnered with a collection of highly respected European entrepreneurs. Our investee companies benefit from their active involvement, honest advice and expansive networks.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: ACTIVA
Description:
Activa is a Paris-based private equity firm, deeply rooted in entrepreneurship and focused on mid-sized innovative services companies valued between €30-100 million.

With over €450 million in assets under management, we have completed more than 50 external growth transactions over the last decade. Activa transforms ambitious goals into solid successes through strategic foresight, deep market understanding, and innovation in technology and sustainability.

Our journey champions visionary entrepreneurs, providing the capital, guidance, and network necessary to achieve impactful growth. We are committed to fostering responsible and high-performance business practices - a dedication further reflected in our status as a Certified B Corp.

We strive for fast, ambitious impact for our stakeholders, driving value that is both financial and purposeful.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: A2D Ventures
Description:
A2D is Southeast Asia's fastest growing startup investing platform where investors meet tomorrow's game changing startups.

Our mission is – to be the region's leading early-stage startup investing platform and angel syndicate, dedicated to:

• Accelerating the growth of promising startups
• Building innovative businesses
• Capitalizing on new opportunities
• Democratizing access to the exclusive world of venture capital

Our streamlined and full-digitalized platform offers ease of access to opportunities all across Southeast Asia. Our dynamic team of ex-operators, angel investors, investment managers, and corporate leaders collaborate closely with portfolio companies, providing not just funding but strategic guidance and hyper-local network access.

Diversity is at the heart of what we do. We are committed to creating an inclusive ecosystem where everyone, regardless of background, has an equal chance to succeed. We empower entrepreneurs and investors to come together, fostering collaboration and innovation.

Join us in shaping a future where boundaries to success simply do not exist.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Yosemite
Description: Yosemite is an oncology-focused venture fund investing in biotech and healthcare innovations to make cancer non-lethal. Founded by Reed Jobs in 2015, the fund originated with Emerson Collective before becoming independent in 2023. Yosemite’s unique investment model restructures the traditional academic-industry partnership by utilizing philanthropic capital to seed pioneering scientific research, enabling Yosemite to strengthen collaborations with academic institutions and provide access to investable science earlier in the commercialization pipeline.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Bloomberg Beta
Description:
Bloomberg Beta is an early stage venture capital firm with $450M under management, capitalized solely by Bloomberg. The fund exists to expand Bloomberg’s horizons by investing in companies built by extraordinary founders that make business work better, with a focus on artificial intelligence.

We run our fund in unorthodox ways to build trust with founders: We're a corporate-backed fund that invests to make money. We experiment with the limits of transparency -- instead of a normal website, we open sourced our entire operating manual. We measure success by our founders' customer service ratings of us.

Bloomberg Beta has an unconventional investing model where anyone on the team can say yes to a deal. The investing partnership has an equal female-to-male ratio.

Read our full internal operating manual here: https://github.com/Bloomberg-Beta/Manual
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Movac
Description: The investment partner behind world-class tech ventures. Established in 1998, we are the longest- standing independent VC firm in New Zealand. Specialised in seeding and scaling tech companies with a focused and proven investment ethos. Over $700 million raised, across eight thoughtfully raised funds, invested into 60+ Kiwi companies and founders.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: K3 Ventures
Description:
K3 Ventures is a Singapore-based venture capital firm that invests in technology start-ups with talented founders and vision to develop and transform Southeast Asia. In partnering with K3 Ventures, companies leverage from our exclusive bamboo network that enables strategic opportunities to scale Southeast Asia with pilot projects and by championing adoption that establishes as part of their use case portfolio. 

The wave of digital disruption on traditional businesses is inevitable and a necessary evil for progress. Yet technology startups often face obstacles from incumbent businesses and other stakeholders that can halt their growth. K3 Ventures bridge technology startups and incumbent businesses to create an ecosystem of collaboration and foundation for creation of new market leaders.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Ezdehar Management
Description: Ezdehar Management is an emerging growth equity investor focused on the Egyptian market. Our team combines local presence with international experience to create long term value for our investors, partners and portfolio companies.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Bee Partners
Description:
At Bee Partners, we passionately believe today’s decades-long supercycle of AI-enabled machines will transform our world via software, hardware, and biology. Innovation favors adaptive, technical, and bold founders, aligning perfectly with our investment ethos. The inception-stage remains the best for producing exceptional returns, especially through close collaboration with founders to drive profound change. Here is what we are looking for.

Bee Partners invests at inception in deepTech startups, deploying $500k - $1.5M per company. Our commitment goes beyond capital; we build genuine partnerships founded on integrity and trust, facilitating strategic introductions to customers, advisors, employees, and capital sources. We underwrite every investment to return the fund, with a Partnership Model that centers around collaboration as the highest form of value addition.

Our strategy is grounded in team expertise, extensive research, and comprehensive support from our advisory network. We have established engines of innovation that drive deal flow, from universities such as UC Berkeley, Stanford, MIT, and Georgia Tech, alongside angel networks and our Founders network. Our track record over the past 15 years demonstrates our commitment to deep tech investing long before it was widely recognized as a bastion of venture return generation.

Our model has resulted in a 60% matriculation rate to Series A, with over $2B in follow-on capital raised from the world's leading VCs. With $150 million under management, we are currently investing out of our fourth flagship fund.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Simon Group Holdings
Description: Simon Group Holdings (SGH) is a Birmingham, Michigan–based private equity and investment firm founded by Sam Simon with the launch of Atlas Oil in 1985. SGH invests in energy, logistics, real estate, aerospace and defense, technology, and emerging ventures. With a hands-on, people-first approach, SGH provides both capital and strategic operational support to accelerate growth, strengthen performance, and build long-term value across its diverse portfolio of companies.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Echo Health Ventures
Description:
Echo Health Ventures drives systemic health care transformation through hands-on, purpose-driven strategic venture capital and growth equity investing. Echo brings together USAble Corporation, Cambia Health Solutions and Mosaic Health Solutions to accelerate health care innovation on a national scale and support meaningful health care impact. 

Echo Health Ventures operates nationwide with offices in Durham, N.C., Portland, Ore., Seattle and Boston. For more information, please visit echohealthventures.com.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Sango Capital
Description: Sango Capital is an investment firm making private equity investments in Africa's fastest growing economies through a select portfolio of direct investments, private equity funds and bespoke pooled investment vehicles. Sango currently manages a number of investment vehicles aggregating capital from institutional investors including pension funds, foundations, endowments, sovereign wealth funds and high net worth family clients from the United States and Asia.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Tin Men Capital
Description: Headquartered in Singapore, Tin Men Capital is a venture capital firm that invests in South-East Asian Series A B2B tech & marketplace startups that address opportunities in large, traditional industries.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: The Players Fund
Description: The Players Fund is pioneering a new frontier in venture capital as the UK's first athlete-led firm, founded by athletes, to empower the athlete community as investors. Our first-of-its-kind strategy brings together a collective of renowned athlete investors alongside seasoned VCs, leveraging their combined expertise, global access to opportunities and value creation ability, to support exceptional entrepreneurs and accelerate the future of athlete investing.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Kolkata Ventures
Description:
Kolkata Ventures is a Indo-US collaboration to foster entrepreneurship through:

Incubation:
Our Virtual Incubation Programme is a structured module specifically designed to help you start, grow and scale up through expert guidance, access to startup resources and funding without the constraint of having to work from a specific place or office.

Expert Mentorship:
Rockstar entrepreneurs from India and US share valuable lessons they have learned the hard way building their ventures so you that can build your’s smoothly. Get the opportunity to be mentored and guided by them through a one to one mentorship session.

Funding:
We helps you from creating your pitch deck to making you and your startup investor-ready by fixing holes in your business model and preparing you with likely questions, techniques and skills so that you can pitch confidently to investors. We also provide pitching access to investors for qualified post revenue startups. 

Networking:
Meet your cofounder, investor, designer or engineer through our vast international network in India, US, Hong Kong, China and Vietnam. Our group of advisors and mentors are here to help you find exactly who you need on your team.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: HB Investments
Description: HB Investments is the private investment office of the founders of Huda Beauty, working closely with exceptional entrepreneurs to build and scale the next generation of amazing companies. We pair visionary founders with a brand-building ecosystem and actively support them in product development, marketing and distribution.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: 3VC
Description: 3VC is a European venture capital fund that invests in carefully selected startups with global ambition. We partner with companies with strong ties to DACH, CEE and the Baltics, focusing on Series A with an initial ticket size up to 10M. Together with our extensive network, our entrepreneurial team provides dedicated support to our portfolio companies.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Pampa Start
Description: We are a Venture Capital firm that accelerates the growth of AgriFoodTech startups located in LATAM, with high profitability potential and rapid global scalability. From the productive heart of our country, we promote industry innovation to the world, fostering a technological and collaborative ecosystem. We seek projects in the initial or early stages of development that have the potential to transform the way we produce and commercialize.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Ridge Ventures
Description:
Founded in 2007, Ridge Ventures is an early stage venture capital fund investing in experienced founders redefining how the world interacts with software.  We back companies delivering advanced technologies, new distribution models and incredible user experiences to market.  Our approach -  fast, flexible and founder-focused - creates the right relationship from the word “go” helping companies become market leaders quickly.  Alignment matters.  Here’s the proof:  Krux, MindMeld, Sapho, Minted, Braze, ThirdLove, Fastly, for starters. 

Ridge Ventures was formerly IDG Ventures USA.  To learn more, visit us at Ridge.VC
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Amplify.LA
Description:
Amplify is an early stage venture capital firm in Venice, CA dedicated to making early investments in LA's most promising startups, and is a leading institution in the Los Angeles venture capital scene.

Since 2011, Amplify has backed dozens of companies, which together have gone on to raise billions of dollars in funding, with exits to Apple, Google, and FanDuel, among others.

Some prominent Amplify portfolio companies include:
 - Clutter (clutter.com)
 - FloQast (floqast.com)
 - HelloTech (hellotech.com)
 - Bouqs (bouqs.com)
 - Bitium (acquired by Google)
 - Winc (winc.com)
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: GGF
Description: We are a Berlin-based venture capital firm backing early-stage founders in food tech and energy tech. Our approach combines capital with entrepreneurial insight, working hands-on with teams from pre-seed to series A.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Morphosis Capital
Description: We are a founder-centric regional private equity fund, focused on turning entrepreneurs’ vision into reality. Morphosis deploys capital into high-growth companies, transforming them into national and regional champions. We don’t just sit on the sidelines, we get in the trenches with you because we know what it takes to run a business.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Veda Holding
Description:
Veda holding is an incubator in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia that supports startups and mature companies by providing value and growth capital. By investing in these high potential companies were helping them fund expansions, acquisitions or other major investments. We believe that together we contribute to global growth, development and innovation.


Veda Holding is led by Founder Fahad Alhokair, alongside Co-Founder Abdulrahman Alhokair board of trusted directors and his team of well-qualified experts.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Green D Ventures (an Alumni Ventures Fund)
Description:
Green D Ventures is an Alumni Ventures' venture capital fund for alumni of Dartmouth that invests in companies with a Dartmouth connection. 

Meet the team:
Laura Bordewieck Rippy, Managing Partner
Charlotte Jenkins, Senior Associate
Drew Wandzilak, Senior Associate

We are part of Alumni Ventures, America’s largest venture firm for individual investors. Founded in 2014, we are the venture investing partner to over 11,000 individuals and institutions.  

Follow Green D Ventures for content at the intersection of our shared alma mater, venture capital, and entrepreneurship.

We are private, for-profit, and not affiliated with or sanctioned by the college.

Offers of securities are made only to eligible investors through formal offering documents, which describe the risks, terms, and other important information that must be considered before investing. Example portfolio company investments shown for illustrative purposes only, do not necessarily reflect investment outcomes that were or would be obtained by any AV fund or investor, and are not available to future investors, except potentially in the case of follow-on investments. Venture capital investing involves substantial risk, including risk of loss of all capital invested. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Hadean Ventures
Description: Hadean Ventures is a European life science fund manager based in the Nordics. We invest across Europe in companies developing innovative new medical solutions within pharma, biotech, medtech, diagnostics and digital health. Hadean Ventures has offices in Oslo and Stockholm.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Innovate Africa Fund
Description:
The Innovate Africa Fund is an angel fund dedicated to backing super early-stage technology driven ventures that:

- connect Africa
- create synergy 
- unlock prosperity
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Dioun Health
Description:
Dioun Health is an operator-led Healthcare Acquisition Group, focused on delivering high-quality care to seniors and medically vulnerable individuals.

We acquire and operate established Healthcare agencies and organizations with strong clinical reputations and experienced staff. 

Our leadership team brings deep expertise in healthcare operations, compliance, and patient-centered service, allowing us to maintain and enhance care quality while improving efficiency and scalability.

Each acquisition is carefully selected based on local market fundamentals, clinical standards, and long-term growth potential. We work closely with existing teams to ensure continuity of care, retain top talent, and invest in the systems that support both clinical excellence and sustainable growth.

We are the all‑encompassing home healthcare solution: a vertically integrated platform that allows our patients to age in place with dignity and confidence.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Lowercase Capital
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Ennovate Ventures
Description:
Ennovate Ventures is a tech venture factory dedicated to investing in ambitious founders who are leveraging innovation to improve lives, create jobs, and accelerate sustainable development.

Through our microfund, we are building and funding the next wave of disruptive innovations to drive Africa's prosperity. We are committed to supporting Africa’s underrepresented tech founders, accelerating their growth as they tackle the continent's most pressing challenges.

In collaboration with visionary companies and development organizations, we design and implement innovative entrepreneurship programs across various sectors. Our mission is to support and scale impactful startups that enhance livelihoods, foster smart cities, and create jobs.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals
Location: Dar Es Salaam, Dar Es Salaam

Name: Black Venture Capital Consortium (BVCC)
Description: Our mission is to narrow the wealth gap by strategically recruiting, educating, training, and placing top HBCU students into lucrative careers within the Venture Capital & Tech ecosystem
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Frontier Growth
Description: Frontier Growth supports the growth of software companies in the lower middle market by deploying both investment capital and operational expertise. The firm was founded with a culture that puts People Before Numbers, because it’s people that lead to real growth. With over 20 years’ experience, Frontier respects that each of their companies represents someone’s life’s work. It’s why the firm’s explicit focus is to help them grow without stifling the innovation that’s made them successful.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Pender Ventures
Description:
Pender Ventures is a thesis-driven venture capital investor focused on B2B software and health tech startups at the inflection point between commercialization and scale. As hands-on, high-conviction investors, Pender Ventures’ diverse team leverages decades of experience to add operational and strategic value to its portfolio companies.

Pender Ventures is the brand of Pender Private Equity Fund Management Inc, a 100% owned subsidiary of PenderFund Capital Management Inc. and has the same mind and management as PenderFund.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Moove Lab
Description:
Lancé en septembre 2017 par MOBILIANS (ex CNPA) et Via ID, le Moove Lab est l’accélérateur des startups de la mobilité de Station F.

Le Moove Lab offre un programme de 6 mois comprenant un accompagnement sur mesure par une équipe d’experts et de mentors, ainsi que des opportunités de collaboration avec ses partenaires leaders de la mobilité. Le tout à Station F, le plus grand campus de startup au monde.

Depuis 2017 ce sont plus de 110 startups qui ont été accompagnées, telles que Fidcar, Zenride, Betterway, Cocolis, Géovélo, Fluctuo ou encore ProovStation.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Sarona Ventures
Description: Sarona Ventures, an international VC fund and Tech Ecosystem, was established in 2016 in Israel as a progression of the Bouaziz Single Family Fund. With 90+ companies in our portfolio, including 10 successful exits and 7 unicorns like Deel, Notion, Ramp, Sorare, and Verbit, with a combined valuation of over $45B. Our reach spans Israel, New York, San Francisco, Miami, Paris, Mexico, and more - We partner with extraordinary minds for global impact.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Woven Capital
Description: Woven Capital is Toyota’s independent growth fund dedicated to realizing the promise of mobility — how people, goods, information and energy can move. Our global team of investors is advancing open innovation across Toyota by connecting the world’s most promising innovators with the world’s most trusted automotive brand, strengthening Toyota’s products and capabilities today while positioning Toyota for continued success tomorrow. Founded in 2021, we are investing $800 million in startups that create new ways to connect cities, advance automation, harness and store energy, further electrification, and make our vehicles smarter. To learn more, visit https://woven.vc/.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: 186 Ventures
Description:
We are early stage technology investors that focus on agile teams working on disruptive problems.

We believe in supporting bright entrepreneurs who are at a stage where being nimble is everything. 

186 Ventures is a pre-seed & seed stage VC firm based in Boston investing across consumer, enterprise, and disruptive tech. We are generalist investors that bring full operational & strategic support and an unparalleled network to founders, beginning at the earliest stages of building a high growth tech business. Founded in 2019, our portfolio spans 30+ high growth technology companies across multiple industries.

Description:
Eir Ventures aims to use a strong Nordic base and focus as a foundation to help leverage the power in current global medical research, thus being part in bringing innovative medicine to the patients.

Our team has strong roots and networks in the Nordic countries, exceptional industry networks, an international perspective and proven track records:

- Experts in life science investing, company creation, and technology/science evaluation.
- The team has been part in managing funds with more than €4 billion assets under management in aggregate, with more than 30 profitable exits.
- Deep experience-based approach to Life Science Venture Capital investing – from early stage as well as more mature opportunities.
- Investing in opportunities addressing significant unmet medical needs for new therapies, medical technology and digital health.
- Strong collaborations with universities and incubators in the Nordics.

Name: Lithuanian Private Equity and Venture Capital Association
Description:
LT VCA unites all the main private equity and venture capital market participants in Lithuania by having 64 members covering different types of private equity and venture capital business activities.  

During 2023 our PE&VC market players invested EUR 111 M into Lithuanian companies. Those investments boost financing of the economy, for small and medium businesses in particular.

The LT VCA monitors and helps to improve the regulatory and business environment which is necessary for the healthy functioning of the private capital market in Lithuania. 

The association also serves as a central platform for representation and promotion of the Lithuanian private equity and venture capital market to institutional investors, policymakers, and the general public on local and global levels. 

The LT VCA is also the main research and statistics provider on the Lithuanian PE&VC market.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: LongHash Ventures
Description:
Founded in 2018, LongHash Ventures (LHV) is a $150M AUM crypto native VC fund that pioneered ecosystem bootstrapping. The team of 8 is comprised of crypto native investors hailed from a background of McKinsey & Co, MIT and Imperial College London. We have a deep bench of advisors and LPs including Protocol labs, Stefan George from Gnosis, Gabby Dizon from YGG, Hashkey Capital and Synthetix co-founders.

Our accelerator arm LongHashX has pioneered the infrastructure ecosystem bootstrapping program for leading L1/2s, such as Polkadot, Cosmos Hub, Filecoin, Gnosis Safe, and most recently Virtuals protocol. Under LongHashX, We have accelerated more than 90 projects including Astar, Acala, Manta, Balancer and Lit Protocol. LongHashX enables LHV to secure proprietary deal flow in the ecosystems that we collaborate with deeply.

Strong Track Record
• LongHash Ventures Fund 0 (Vintage 2018) - Invested Capital of $4M (TVPI of 10x, DPI of 10x)
• LongHash Ventures Fund I (Vintage 2021) - Invested Capital of $12M (TVPI of 1.5x, DPI of 0.1x)
• LongHash Ventures Fund II (Vintage 2022) - Invested Capital of $22M (TVPI of 1.5x, DPI of 0.5x)

Our Value Proposition
• Deep Asia expertise with Global coverage we have an edge in sourcing early stage deals.
• Hands-on portfolio support through ecosystem bootstrapping via LongHashX and active governance participation.
• Thesis driven with deep research through offering research insights via podcasts, industry reports and investment thesis.
• Robust risk management through cycles untouched by industry catastrophic events such as the collapse of FTX and Luna.

LongHash Ventures Fund I and Fund II have both been recognized by Preqin as Top Quartile Funds within their respective Early-Stage Asia benchmarks for digital assets.

–Identifying, mentoring, and developing promising ideas (ideas),

–Establishing proof of commercial concept and entrepreneur credibility (acceleration)

–Creating validated commercial value-propositions and plans to scale (business plans),

–bringing together investors and angels to lead seed rounds (investment),and

–leading and facilitating subsequent investment in Series A,B, and C (scaling)

INNOVentures Global seeks to promote and facilitate a “smart money” approach to investing in Pakistan.

Co-fondée par Ronan Le Moal et Charles Cabillic en septembre 2020, Épopée Gestion a pour ambition de réinvestir les territoires de l’Arc Atlantique en accompagnant les entreprises en financement et en accompagnement opérationnel.
