Pour aller plus loin, Épopée Gestion a créé la marque Xplore pour accompagner les startups innovantes - et pas seulement digitales -, sur tout l’Arc Atlantique - et pas seulement en Bretagne ! Nous commençons une nouvelle épopée extraordinaire. Ensemble, explorons jusqu’où l’innovation nous porte !

> Protecting climate against global warming
> Protecting Humans against sanitary and digital risks
> Protecting resources against overconsumption

Our favorite sectors:
Clean energy, energy efficiency, food security, digital security, circular economy, process and material traceability, education...

The investment team resides full-time in six countries across South and Southeast Asia, and investment capital is sourced from leading Asia-based family offices and institutional investors in the U.S. and Australia. 4BIO Capital is an international venture capital firm focused solely on the advanced therapies sector. 

4BIO’s objective is to invest in, support, and grow early stage companies developing treatments in areas of high unmet medical need, with the ultimate goal of ensuring access to these potentially curative therapies for all patients. Specifically, it looks for viable, high-quality opportunities in cell and gene therapy, RNA-based therapy, targeted therapies, and the microbiome.

The 4BIO team comprises leading advanced therapy scientists and experienced life science investors who have collectively published over 250 scientific articles in prestigious academic journals including Nature, The Lancet, Cell, and the New England Journal of Medicine. 4BIO has both an unrivalled network within the advanced therapy sector and a unique understanding of the criteria that define a successful investment opportunity in this space.

As a result of an acceleration in the number of potential business opportunities, especially tech-based, along with better access to venture capital and fast growth, the number of valuable early stage growth companies has increased significantly. 

Many founders, seed and early investors own stakes of considerable value in these companies. These stakes – however – cannot be monetized, as the market for minority stakes in non-listed early growth Nordic companies is in reality non-existing.

Our experience spans the spectrum of innovation transforming and decarbonizing energy, resource-intensive industries, and our world at large - from smart buildings and cities, AI and autonomy, infrastructure and grid modernization, distributed energy systems, to EV transportation, hydrogen economy, battery technology, carbon management, methane monitoring and beyond.

Our team sits in San Francisco, Houston, Boston, and New York– the energy innovation and financial capitals of the world. Our team consists of multi-time CEOs and experienced technology investors, and we have collectively made over 150+ investments across energy tech. Description:
Panakès Partners is a Venture Capital firm, based in Milan, which invests in the most ambitious companies and teams, developing revolutionary technologies and products, in the field of life sciences, aiming to improve the lives of people around the world, in two funds. 

Panakès, founded in 2015 by Fabrizio Landi, Alessio Beverina and Diana Saraceni, has 250 million under management.

Panakes brings strong entrepreneurial and financial expertise to portfolio companies well beyond just capital, relying on a wide network of clinicians and industry experts. We have established relationships with selected industrial partners to assist our founders in accelerating their development.

We invest in people, believing that a strong and dedicated team is one of the most important factors in the success of our investments. We aim to work together with entrepreneurs to develop successful businesses as an active and well-connected investor.

We invest for people, supporting the growth of companies and people that will reshape the medical world, answering real medical needs, saving lives and providing a better quality of life for patients and care-givers.

An overall positive impact that will produce intrinsic value for both investors and society.

Name: Deep-Tech Showcase
Description:
Investors, Federal agencies, and large corporations are the primary actors moving deep technologies forward through funding and initiatives. On the other side are deep-tech focused startups, who are the primary innovators pioneering advanced tech. At Deep-Tech Showcase the catalysts and innovators meet and meaningful results follow.

Deep-Tech Showcase is a platform for deep-tech startups who have recently received funding from Federal agency programs such as the SBIR program, BAAs, CSOs, OTAs, etc. These companies gain exposure and connect with dedicated investors, corporate representatives, and stakeholders from Federal agencies who are willing to consider pilot contracts, investments, and strategic partnerships.

Deep-Tech Showcase is a members-only community. Anchoring the Showcase are 4 annual gatherings, ongoing matchmaking, pitch events, and focus groups around critical subject matter solved by pioneer tech.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Ensemble VC
Description:
Ensemble is a venture capital platform purpose-built to identify and back exceptional technical founding teams. We’ve delivered on TVPI and DPI, placing us among the top venture capital firms by industry benchmarks.  Our portfolio includes companies like Zoom, Carta, Groww, CHAOS, and Saronic—early investments made well before they became market consensus.

The venture capital industry is changing rapidly, with more and more GPs claiming to be “data-driven.” We have been ahead of this trend for a decade, and we now boast a suite of data-enabled tools that promote objectivity and deep research on technical investments.

At the core of Ensemble is our proprietary data and research platform that continuously scrapes, analyzes, and refreshes billions of datapoints across the global talent ecosystem. We focus on highly technical markets—AI, defense, healthcare, and infrastructure.

Our team brings experience across engineering and investing from IBM Watson, Bain Capital Ventures, Norwest, Kauffman Fellows, and Correlation Ventures.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: big_bets
Description:
big_bets is a fund that invests exclusively in software-intensive companies, that is, in companies built around code and data.

There is a very important belief behind everything we do: we believe that the destiny of every atom is to become an electron. And precisely when an atom is turning into an electron is when the grand investment opportunities emerge. 

Think about it, this occurred with media (all the money that once flowed into the atoms of magazines, newspapers, radios, and TVs is now in the electrons of social networks, search engines, e-commerces, etc.), with financial products (in the past, banks had a branch on every corner, but today there's a branch in everyone's pocket), with software (the older generation will recall buying software CDs at newsstands or having numerous servers within companies, today much of this is in the cloud), and with entertainment (no need to mention that books, music, and films have become apps on your phone) and so forth.

It's precisely for this reason that our investment thesis is centered on identifying the largest industries currently transitioning from atoms to electrons and investing in and backing the entrepreneurs who are best equipped to accelerate this transformation.

Therefore, our investments are highly agnostic, covering areas like financial services (Conta Simples, Ume, and Justos), identity (Unico), pharmaceutical industry (Menten AI and Pepper Bio), diagnostics (Huna), media (Festalab, Prota, and Newtail), primary education (Studdy), energy distribution (Lemon), devtools (Lazy AI, DataMilk, NuMind, Croct), among others.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Parkwalk

Parkwalk invests in businesses creating solutions to real-world challenges, with IP-protected innovations, across a range of sectors including life sciences, AI, quantum computing, advanced materials, genomics, cleantech, future of mobility, medtech and big data.

Name: HPE Growth
Description:
Established in 2010, HPE Growth is a leading sector specialist pan-European private equity firm focused on early-mid growth capital investments in technology companies throughout Europe with assets under management in excess of EUR 600 million. 
 
HPE invests in high-growth software and internet-enabled businesses that have shaken off the risks associated with early, venture-type investments and have an option to leverage their proven technology and the status of a (local) champion. By bringing in additional equity and active support, HPE acts as a catalyst to expansion and enables portfolio companies to execute on their vision of securing market leadership. Typically, HPE aims to deploy about EUR 10 to 40 million in equity per transaction for a meaningful minority or majority position. Portfolio investments include companies such as PPRO, Tiqets, eGym, Uberall and WeTransfer. 
 
HPE’s team has diverse backgrounds with international experience in Investing (General Atlantic, TPG), Finance (Morgan Stanley, ING) and Operations (Walt Disney, Shell) and a global network supported through its regional offices in Amsterdam (HQ), Düsseldorf and San Francisco.

Investimos e potencializamos Startups voltadas ao agronegócio.

Quer inovar? Quer aprender? Aperte o play?

Name: Define Ventures
Description:
Define Ventures is one of the largest funds exclusively focused on early-stage digital health companies with $800 million in assets under management. We’re a high-conviction team that invests in companies at the incubation, seed, Series A, and Series B stages. 

Define Ventures was founded on a simple belief: the future of healthcare will be defined by those who bring together a deep understanding of the healthcare ecosystem paired with a technology-driven mindset.

Our thoughtfully curated team brings together investors and founders who have built category-defining companies in this vision, collectively delivering $22 billion in exit value, including Livongo (LVGO), Evolent (NYSE: EVH), and Hims & Hers (NYSE: HIMS). Our proven track record in scaling enterprise, value-based care, and direct-to-consumer companies provides our founders with a competitive edge to bring their visions to life.

Name: Propeller
Description:
A venture capital firm that partners with brilliant founders during the early days.

Capital is important, but your first customers, hires and product are fundamental to building great companies. As builders ourselves, we understand that product-market fit is the only thing that matters.

We are here to empower & challenge you to build global products. No doubt that getting there is tough - that is why we have built a set of tools, a community of experts, and a talent pool to ease the journey.

Description:
All Chance is an innovative independent private equity firm, specialised in buyout, Investment and growth capital for Start-up Ventures, small and mid-sized companies in the EU, UK, US and the Americas. Formed by All Chance Boutique bank investors, the All Chance management team has evolved, with an innovative concept of giving all start-up Ventures a Chance, if such Ventures aspirations evaluation looks promising and inline with All Chance strategic aspirations.

For Startups, we invest from Concept/Pre-Seed, Seed, all the way to Series A, we back founders who are building innovative disruptive enterprise.

Partner with us.
Send us your pitch deck:  info@allchance.co.uk

Want to know more, visit our website;
www.allchance.co
www.allchance.co.uk

Name: Green Rock
Description:
Green Rock is an independent Venture Capital and Private Equity investment firm, which invests in the early stages of companies with high potential in the healthcare sector.

We believe that every investment made in health is reflected in a better quality of life for the people served by the invested businesses — whether through greater access, efficiency or innovation. It was this vision that inspired our partners' medical and entrepreneurial careers and that continues to keep us engaged and optimistic about the future, as investors.

Therefore, together with a winning team of entrepreneurs, we want to form the next generation of companies that will improve the efficiency of the healthcare system, encourage disease prevention and control, expand access to services and advance the frontiers of current medicine.

After all, when our efforts prosper, our entire health prospers.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: FounderFuel
Description: FounderFuel helps technology powered companies reach escape velocity. It is a 4-month intensive program supported by a network of veteran entrepreneurs, operators and executives. Our program pushes companies to refine their vision, expand their network and rapidly accelerate their output. FounderFuel is backed by Real Ventures, the most active seed stage venture capital firm in Canada.

Name: Kade Ventures
Description:
There's a new kid on the block - Kade Ventures. We are all about investing in cool, hip, and tech-savvy companies. We don't care about the boring old widget factory, and want a piece of that hot new fintech startup that's disrupting the industries.

Also, forget about the stiff and stuffy approach of traditional private equity firms. Kade Ventures is all about being flexible, collaborative, and...well, just plain cool. We’re like that friend who shows up to social gatherings with a guitar and some craft beer, ready to party.

So if you're a cutting-edge company with big dreams and an even bigger desire for a group of investors who totally get you, look no further than Kade Ventures. We may not have a corner office with a mahogany desk, but we've got plenty of beanbag chairs and kombucha on tap."
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

An alternative investment fund passionate about the early stage ecosystem, working closely with businesses that can leverage on technology to build world class products and offer best in class services in the most capital efficient way.

Name: Ferd Sosiale Entreprenører
Description:
Ferd Sosiale Entreprenører investerer i og støtter selskaper som løser viktige samfunnsutfordringer, spesielt innen skolefrafall og økt arbeidsdeltakelse blant utsatte grupper. 

Gjennom kapital, strategisk støtte og et sterkt nettverk bidrar vi til å utvikle og skalere virksomheter som gir mennesker nye muligheter.

Vi investerer både i sosial innovasjon og dokumentert sosial effekt. Det betyr at vi støtter etablerte selskaper, men også tidlig fase initiativer– for å sikre at gode løsninger når sitt fulle potensial og skaper varig endring i samfunnet.

Ferd Sosiale Entreprenører er ett av fem forretningsområder i Ferd – et familieeid investeringsselskap med mål om å skape varige verdier og reell samfunnseffekt.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Greenbackers Investment Capital
Description:
GREENBACKERS Investment Capital are VC specialists for Climate technology globally. We help fund advanced innovation and commercial businesses in this space with global connections to funds investing in Seed, Series A & B: equity, asset and project finance.  

GREENBACKERS brokerage works with over 5000 funding sources covering equity, debt, asset and project finance:
* Corporate Venture Funds
* Technology VC’s
* Impact Investors
* Single and multi-Family offices and UHNWIs
* Angel Syndicates and Individual Angel Investors
* Asset Finance and specialist funders
* Government Funds which direct or co-invest with private funds

Our client focus is on scaling-up technology companies and project developers looking to commercialise & optimise their capital raising strategies, connecting them with our established, diverse and qualified network of funders, first-adopters & strategic providers active in the sector.

Clients include:
* Start-up and early stage clean technology companies seeking capital and/or strategic partners/investors
* Project developers focussed on low carbon, cleantech and climate change
* Investors and funds seeking investment opportunities
* Multinational corporations pursuing acquisition / divestment strategies

We spend considerable time engaging with the wider ecosystem and take great pride in our industry-wide reputation for integrity. 

www.greenbackers.com   
www.twitter.com/greenbackersIC

Name: Fika Ventures
Description:
Fika Ventures is an early-stage, B2B venture capital firm based in Los Angeles. Founded in 2016, Fika focuses on pre-Series A software companies in sectors like vertical SaaS, fintech, commerce enablement, healthcare, and marketplaces. Of course, AI touches all of these categories.

The Fika team is made up of former operators, investors, and entrepreneurs who have founded, scaled, and exited companies themselves. This lived operational experience means we understand the journey firsthand, the highs and lows, and can provide extremely high-touch support across a wide range of areas to the founders we back.

Fika has raised four funds and invested in over 90 B2B software companies. Notable investments include BuildOps, Atticus, Payabli, OpenPath, Edge Impulse, Noyo, and Papaya Payments.

Cota Capital is an early-stage investment firm that builds and invests in technology companies addressing “Net New” challenges in the enterprise. Cota believes knowledge is the true capital, and the firm leverages its deep enterprise expertise, global network of industry leaders, and systematic investment rigor to empower founders to build transformative businesses. Founded in 2015, Cota is an SEC-registered investment advisor headquartered in San Francisco. For more information, visit www.cotacapital.com.

Name: Terminus Capital Partners
Description:
Founded in 2017, Terminus Capital Partners is a growth-oriented private equity firm focused exclusively on majority investments in B2B software companies.  For over 14 years, at Terminus Capital Partners and at predecessor companies, our principals and associates have helped build 7 market-leading companies.

We differentiate ourselves by being sector experts, truly helping our companies with nitty gritty work, and by being the best possible partner to founder to managers, founders, and sellers.  Indeed, we strive to be the world's premier small-cap B2B software private equity firm, a commitment we renew every day.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: The Craftory
Description:
The Craftory is an $550M global investment house focused solely on amping Challenger Brands. We only invest in new, digitally-activated consumer goods brands that have powerful mission-driven purposes to improve the categories they serve, our society, or the planet.

Our Mission
Deliver Righteous Causes, brand by brand. When we say ‘Righteous Cause’ we’re not getting churchy, we’re talking about a brand purpose that aims to make the world a better place.

Our New House of Brands
We're building the house of brands for the 21st Century. There are a handful of big themes we really care about - these are the truly Righteous Causes that excite us, and stand to change our world:

1. Deliver Good Health
2. Democratise Access
3. Progress Society
4. Prosper Sustainably
5. Champion Self-Esteem

If your brand addresses any - or multiple - of the themes listed here, we'd love to talk. Think we've missed something important? Hit us up. We're all about visionary thinking, progress and collaboration.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Aurica Capital
Description:
Aurica Capital Desarrollo se caracteriza en la toma de participaciones minoristas pero significativas en compañías con una clara visión de crecimiento y expansión.
Aurica Capital es la sociedad gestora de Aurica III-190M€ bajo gestión actualmente en proceso de desinversión y Aurica IV-más de 200M€ bajo gestión, en proceso de inversión.
Enfoque, empresas que tengan una ventaja competitiva en su sector y potencial de crecimiento tanto orgánicamente como a través de adquisiciones, empresas familiares con equipos directivos cualificados y expertos, operaciones no apalancadas y operaciones mixtas de cash-in y cash-out.
Criterios de inversión, facturación superior a 30M€, ebitda superiores a los 4M€ y bajo endeudamiento.
Tipo de inversión, principalmente en participaciones minoristas pero significativas, permanencia entre 4-7 años y rango de inversión 10-50M€.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Axadra Ventures
Description:
We envision ourselves to build and sustain a thriving ecosystem of life-long learners who share the same passion for innovation - creating and delivering remarkable digital solutions to business enterprises around the globe.


Today, the mediums of communication have changed and at a fraction of what it used to cost.

Eye-catching, relevant, and compelling are still the same rules for creating any content that's engaging to your existing and potential clients. 

There’s a story underneath your data. It’s in your Traffic, your Analytics, your Trends. With our decade's worth of experience providing digital solutions, Axadra helps you make sense of your data and transforms it into the story of your brand.

It doesn't happen overnight, it takes time and research. But at the end of the day, it's meant to help you become the disruptor instead of the disrupted. Because if your business isn't online, there's a big chance your competitors are.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Stirring Minds is an initiative to support, help grow and nurture the entrepreneurial mind.

We have set up a 8000+ sq ft Coworking Hub at central Delhi and a 20,000 sqft in Gurgaon, with a node office in the Bay Area, California (Silicon Valley). We intend to connect the indian startup ecosystem with that of the Valley.

Name: Bundesverband Alternative Investments e.V.
Description: Bundesverband Alternative Investments e.V. (BAI) is the central advocacy association for the alternative investment industry sector in Germany. The BAI serves as a catalyst between institutional and professional German investors and recognized providers of alternative investment products worldwide. Particularly, one goal is to make it easier for institutional and professional German investors to more effectively diversify their financial assets into Alternative Investments. Another core task is to improve public awareness and enhance the understanding of asset classes and strategies in public. The BAI maintains an intense dialogue with political institutions as well as supervisory bodies. It advocates for legal reforms to design an attractive and competitive regulatory environment for AI in Germany. BAI counts more than 200 members from all areas of the professional alternative investments sector. www.bvai.de.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Pembroke VCT
Description:
Established in 2013 and managed by Pembroke Investment Managers LLP, Pembroke VCT plc backs ambitious founders at growth-stage companies in the technology, business service and consumer sectors

Led by entrepreneurs for entrepreneurs, our investment team aims to find exceptional and innovative founders to grow the brands of tomorrow, giving investors the opportunity to share in the growth of some of Britain’s most exciting and entrepreneurial smaller companies.

Pembroke is committed to helping our community of founders realise their vision through its strategic and operational expertise, helping at every stage of a company’s growth.

For more information, call 020 7766 6900, email info@pembrokevct.com or visit www.pembrokevct.com

Pembroke VCT is managed by PIM LLP (Pembroke Investment Managers LLP)
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Insurtech Gateway
Description:
Insurtech Gateway, the specialist insurtech investor - recently named by the Financial Times as one of Europe’s leading startup hubs for the second year in a row - supports founders tackling large scale challenges. Their incubator supports early-stage MGA and SaaS founders with underwriting capacity, regulatory compliance, seed capital and expert guidance.

Founded in 2017, Insurtech Gateway has authorised incubators in London and Sydney, supporting over 45 portfolio companies, live in 98 countries, working with 75 insurance partners. Insurtech Gateway was the birthplace of many of Europe’s hottest insurtechs; Bondaval, Coincover, Kita, Truvi and Onsi.

Insurtech Gateway would like to meet early-stage founders with game-changing ideas or products, and progressive (re)insurers who are interested in collaboration.

‘Without the support of Insurtech Gateway, there might not have been a Bondaval. By sponsoring us as an Appointed Representative under their FCA license, Insurtech Gateway gave us the regulatory support we needed to start operating immediately: the equivalent of a two-year head start. Now, their guidance has helped us to navigate the process and become directly authorised with the FCA ourselves. They have been invaluable champions of the business, and their continued support is greatly appreciated.’ Tom Powell, CEO of Bondaval
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Israel-UAE Investments Club
Description: This exclusive club was established to help business partners from both countries to collaborate, make new business partners, explore new business opportunities, and share knowledge about business, culture, and more
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Slingshot Ventures
Description:
Slingshot Ventures is a Dutch venture capital fund solely backed by successful entrepreneurs. We back ambitious, talented and charismatic entrepreneurs and actively help them accelerate their businesses with our knowledge, experience and international network of people and companies. By providing smart growth capital we help these start- and scale-ups catapult their business to the next level. This makes us the partner of choice for B2(B2)C focused fast growing ventures with international growth ambition and potential. 

We believe that proven entrepreneurs are the best inspiration for the next generation of entrepreneurs. That’s why both our team and our carefully selected group of investors consist of proven entrepreneurs and venture builders. This makes us truly hands-on in our investment approach. It’s what we call “inspirational growth capital”.

We currently manage a portfolio of multiple investments, all with a base in the Netherlands and all with a cross-border ambition. Our portfolio includes companies such as Swishfund (online business lender), The Fabricant (digital fashion house)Temper (online marketplace for freelancers), Wasteless (dynamic pricing solution for supermarkets), Stox Energy Socks (innovative pressure socks), Fangage (all in one fan platform), Toothfairy (smart dental app), Check (shared e-moped platform) & Boldking (online male grooming).
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: shipshape.vc
Description:
"Ship Shape is the Venture Capital Search Engine. Ship Shape is a Search Engine that lets you search individual investors at VC firms, portfolio companies and investment entities. 

Our results compress the research time required to draw up a well-informed investor shortlist from 183 days to a matter of seconds, dramatically improving the chances of a warm response to outreach. Because we index unstructured data, you can find the investors interested in a specific field. Ship Shape provides you with evidence, in addition to the firm's portfolio of other investments. 

This gives you confidence, clarity and certainty that you are speaking with the right person. 

Ship Shape is the Welsh Fintech Start-up of the Year 2021."
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: AIX Ventures
Description: AI practitioners investing into AI powered companies
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Growth Partner
Description:
We back growth - and growth is driven by people. The founders and teams we work with understand that. They have pride in their businesses, but they also have humility.

Their plans are ambitious but they’re also pragmatic. We may have patient capital, but our operators are anything but patient. They’re people who have built a fundamentally strong business model in attractive markets, and are primed for further scaling.

We are primarily backed by an entrepreneur, Richard Harpin, so we have the privilege of being able to take a longer-term view. That matters, because we recognise that growth isn’t linear.

It also means we can be flexible. We can structure a partnership the right way, whether that means capital for organic growth (for new products, channels or geographies), acquisitions, or to de-risk.

We look for:
- Sales: £10m-£100m
- Growth: 30%-100%+ yearly
- EBITDA: £1m+ (in high gross margin categories)
- Investment range: £5m-20m 

You can find out more the types of businesses we invest in and how we partner with the brands we work with on our website.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Lightrock India
Description:
Lightrock provides patient capital and business-building support to world-class entrepreneurs across three key themes - Unlocking human potential, equitably; Building resource efficiency, sustainably; Reimagining business productivity, responsibly - covering key sectors such as Food and Agriculture, Logistics, Mobility, Healthcare, Renewable energy, Education and Financial services.

Our thematic platform approach to investing stems from our belief that every firm operates not in isolation but through a set of symbiotic relationships with players across the value chain in their sector. The ability to think through these interconnections and find ways to improve system-level outcomes across firms can create a virtuous cycle of value creation that significantly outpaces mere individual firm growth.

Lightrock invests between $10 and $50M in a company. We also have the ability to invest significantly higher amounts in situations that offer a compelling fit to our investment thesis and mission.

Lightrock India team will continue to manage investments for the SONG Fund and Aspada Investment company
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Iron Pillar
Description:
Iron Pillar is a growth stage investor specializing in enterprise and consumer technology companies building their core products “from India for India and the world”. Since 2016, we have partnered closely with founders to guide their businesses from early growth stage to sustainable enterprises generating $100 million or more in revenue.

Our approach is to collaborate with founders as a trusted partner, helping them build scalable global businesses with strong competitive advantage and long-term, compounding profitability. We provide strategic and operational support in key areas, including (1) business development assistance in India and global markets; (2) go-to-market strategy support, including access to C-level talent; and (3) facilitating access to long-term capital. 

Our portfolio includes leading companies such as BlueStone, Curefoods, FreshToHome, SEDEMAC, Servify and Uniphore.

With offices in Bangalore, Mumbai, Dubai and Palo Alto, we are committed to helping Indian entrepreneurs build globally successful businesses.

Additional information about Iron Pillar is available at https://ironpillarfund.com
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Quantium
Description:
Quantium is a next-gen investment management software suite, designed for modern private markets managers. Our easy-to-use platform streamlines investment administration, performance analytics, data aggregation and investor reporting. 

We now service some of the most prominent clients around the world with over USD 90 billion of client assets under platform.

We are passionate team of practitioners and technologists with long term oriented mindset and encourage a culture of commitment, accountability and truth seeking. 

Learn more at www.quantium.pe
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Ardabelle Capital
Description:
Ardabelle Capital is a private equity firm dedicated to driving the transition to a sustainable economy. 
The firm is led by a transatlantic team with a proven track record in private equity, operations, and sustainability. Pioneering a horizontal value chain investment approach, Ardabelle is joining a small group of buyout private equity investors in climate, with a unique ecosystemic focus on accelerating the transition and the alignment of suppliers and service providers of consumer corporations. 

Ardabelle’s ambition to bridge the “Scope 3” gap embraces the largest investment opportunity in decades. Corporates are increasingly dependent on their upstream and downstream value chains for solutions that ensure business continuity, improve resource efficiency, satisfy regulatory requirements, and meet their net zero and environmental commitments.  

Ardabelle aims to invest in profitable mid-market industrial, services, and technology companies that are poised to lead the charge in the sustainable transition and generate long-term value. The firm is developing a proprietary sustainability transformation plan to drive value creation for portfolio companies. 

Ardabelle is embedded in the ecosystem of consumer corporations, as well as sustainability experts and scientific institutes. The team’s distinctive network generates access, knowledge, and expertise for the firm. Ardabelle’s gender-balanced leadership team is dedicated to diversity, equity, and inclusion within the firm, its portfolio companies, and beyond. 

United by a shared vision, they are committed to building a leading private equity firm that is a driving force for positive change.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Ligo Partners Family Office
Description:
Ligo Partners is a single family office based in Miami run by Alec Andronikov (Principal) and Cindy Mihalova (Chief Investment Officer).

We invest with our discrete and invitation-only consortium of like-minded investors into disruptive tech-focused deal flow sourced directly from top venture capital firms and investors worldwide. 

Hence, 100% of our deal flow has a lead, is warmly referred, often proprietary and mostly off-market. 

In parallel to equity financings, Ligo Partners family office invests in tech debt financings; tech secondaries; traditional roll-up strategies with a tech component and off-market real estate opportunities.

Since 2022, Ligo Partners have deployed $780mm into 103 companies backed by tier-one investors; 11 investment funds anchored by tier-one sponsors - and successfully exited 25 venture-backed companies.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Our focus is on makers, hackers, and scientists interested in working outside tracked institutions because we believe that the path geared towards higher education is not for all. We motivate people to work on what they’re passionate about, to learn by doing, and to create new technologies.

Name: Wayra UK
Description:
Wayra is Telefónica's Corporate Venture Capital and Open Innovation platform. 

We invest in startups with the potential to offer innovative solutions to Telefónica and third parties, to support taking their Open Innovation initiatives to the next level.
 
With a global presence, we have seven hubs in Europe (Spain -Madrid and Barcelona-, United Kingdom and Germany) and Latin America (Brazil, Argentina and Colombia), and teams operating in nine countries. Through our funds, we are also present in Silicon Valley and Israel.
 
Since launching 15 years ago, Wayra has invested €233M in +1,100 startups and currently has +530 startups in the portfolio, of which +190 work with Telefónica. 

We also have a network of more than 140 partners and customers, and two innovation platforms (Alaian and Open Future) open to third parties.

Description:
We are an engineering-led early-stage venture firm investing in companies and protocols uniquely enabled by cryptography and distributed systems. Founded in 2018, our 30 person team is 61% engineers and 35% former founders. We manage over $3 billion across five funds and several SPVs. We have offices in San Francisco, New York, and Toronto.

At Electric we are investors in industry leading companies such as Aven, Bitnomial, Bitwise, EigenLayer, Ellipsis, Kraken, Layer3, Magic Eden, SF Compute, Solana, Spruce, and Squads.

Name: GG Ventures
Description:
GG Ventures - Investing in The Female Performance Stack

A $1T+ opportunity unfolding at the intersection of health, sports, and longevity - reimagined through a female lens. We’re not indexing the category, we’re defining it.

GG Ventures is Europe’s first and only investment platform focused on female performance. Investing since 2021, we’re now raising a $100M institutional Fund II to back AI-native, science-led companies reengineering the female health stack from the ground up.

We invest at the inflection point—between Seed and Series A, where founder–market fit, data moats, and machine learning DNA converge to create exponential, compounding value. We partner with founders of any gender building from first principles, with AI as the engine. We back AI-native companies with proprietary data flywheels, predictive architectures that improve autonomously with every use, regulatory-grade infrastructure aligned with payers and globally compliant from day one, and defensible, scalable IP.

Where we play: 
1.	Sports, Strength & Wellness
2.	Next Gen Reproductivity
3.	Longevity & Chronic Diseases
4.	7 Female Cancers
5.	Mental Health / HealthTech Products & Services

We leverage elite women’s sport as a high-velocity distribution engine—fueling access, adoption, and authenticity at scale. This isn’t niche. This is foundational to global health, economic resilience, and generational continuity.

We’re not just backing the future of female performance, we’re engineering it.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Maggie Jamison

At RapidIT Venture Capital Partners, we invest in people first. When vision meets execution, transformative companies follow.

Description:

Our highly focused team has extensive operational, financial and venture capital  experience team. Together, we provide growth equity, strategic advice and scale-up support for entrepreneurs seeking to build global market leaders within their niche. 

What we look for: 
We are industry agnostic, but only invest in B2B business models. We look for aspiring Nordic and UK software and tech companies with inherent global potential, scalable business model and talented management.

How we work with our companies: 
Fast-growing software companies face a variety of challenges and opportunities. A successful market penetration is dependent on a patient and strategic partner to help them transform from a potential star into a market leader. In our role as a steady and strategic co-pilot, we help our portfolio companies manage and accelerate their growth by assessing opportunities, avoiding risks, and preparing to scale their business models.

Name: Oakley Capital Investments
Description:
Through its investments in the Oakley Capital Funds, Oakley Capital Investments (“OCI”) enables investors to share in the growth and performance of a portfolio of high-performing, private European companies across Technology, Consumer and Education sectors. Oakley’s unique deal origination capabilities combined with proven value creation strategies generate consistently superior returns for investors. With over 70 professionals across four European hubs, Oakley has demonstrated a repeated ability to source attractive growth assets at attractive prices. To do this it relies on its sector and regional expertise, its ability to tackle transaction complexity and its deal-generating entrepreneur network. Oakley’s Investment Team then works proactively with founders and management teams to create sustainable value through M&A, growth acceleration, business transformation and ESG integration. This unique approach has produced a high-quality underlying portfolio with businesses that grow earnings 30-40% on average. This underpins consistently strong NAV growth and market-leading returns for shareholders, resulting in a 10-year total shareholder return of 112% versus FTSE All-Share of 72%. 

For further details, please visit www.oakleycapitalinvestments.com

amberra ist das Corporate Venturing Studio der genossenschaftlichen FinanzGruppe.

Mit Investments in Startups, Kooperationen mit Startups und der Eigenentwicklung von Geschäftsmodellen bauen wir ein Portfolio aus neuen Geschäftsfeldern auf.

amberra baut neue Kundenbeziehungen für die Genossenschaftsbanken – mit Lösungen für das ganze Leben.

Description:

Our team relentlessly pursues its search for the ultimate combination of ambition, bold ideas potentially impacting hundreds of thousands and possibly billions of people and brilliant, courageous teams with specific operating genes, harnessing the power of exponential technologies to solve hard, valuable problems.

The Digital Tech Fund provides seed and venture financing to entrepreneurs running innovative startup companies active in the field of Digital Technologies. The fund’s aim is to foster long-term innovation, support the technology startup ecosystem in Luxembourg and facilitate the transfer of new digital technologies developed at the University of Luxembourg into successful spin-off companies.

#VC #Impact #DigitalTechFund

Name: AfricInvest Europe
Description:
AfricInvest Europe  is a French Incorporated Investment Company, regulated by the French Market Authority (AMF). Led by a dedicated team, it manages the Franco-African Funds 1 and 2 (“FFA”). The “Fonds Professionnel de Capital Investissement” or FPCI, are the first cross-border funds dedicated to the French Small and Medium-sized companies, which are willing to invest and grow in Africa. Driven in particular by Bpifrance, the FFA bring together French public investors, private groups, international institutional investors, family offices and entrepreneurs.
As of February 2022, the FFA have already made 12 investments in innovative and fast-growing French SMEs in sectors as varied as health, industry, education and the environment. The FFA invest unit tickets between €2m and €6m, either directly as a minority shareholder or alongside renowned co-investors.

AfricInvest Europe, in addition to providing capital, aims to assist these French companies in their growth strategy and to provide differentiating expertise for their expansion in Africa. AfricInvest Europe provides SMEs with its network, experience, and expertise from multicultural teams based in France and Africa in order to accelerate their growth and facilitate their access to new markets by promoting commercial, industrial, and technological partnerships, as well as financial resources.

AfricInvest Europe, a subsidiary of the AfricInvest Group, benefits from the positioning of the Pan-African Group, a pioneer and leader in Private Equity in Africa, founded in 1994 in Tunisia. With nearly €2 billion in assets under management, AfricInvest has made more than 180 investments to date in nearly 30 countries and relies on a team of 90 employees from 15 different nationalities operating from 11 offices.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Description:

In their honor, we are committed to creating a lasting legacy of hope and innovation. Our mission is to ignite the launch of over 1,800 startups, each one a tribute to the unique life and values of one of these beloved souls. These startups will not only preserve their memories but will also transform their legacy into a powerful force for growth and positive change. 

We invite you to join us in this journey. Together we will ensure that next October, and all the months that follow, are filled with more light and hope than ever before.

Name: Ben Franklin Technology Partners of Southeastern Pennsylvania
Description:
We’re (not just) investors. We’re (more than) advisors. We’re (beyond) connectors.

Ben Franklin Technology Partners combines the best practices of early stage investing with a higher purpose – to lead the region’s technology community to new heights, creating jobs and transforming lives. 

For over 30 years, Ben has been the leading seed stage capital provider for the region’s technology sectors, investing over $175 million in more than 1,750 regional technology companies, many of which have gone on to become industry leaders. Ben Franklin has also launched university/industry partnerships that accelerate scientific discoveries to commercialization, and has seeded regional initiatives that strengthen our entrepreneurial community.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Web3 Capital
Description:
W3 DAO is a decentralized autonomous organization (DAO) that oversees the management of three key platforms: Web3 Capital, Web3 Ventures, and Web3 Accelerator. Each platform has distinct roles but collaborates to provide comprehensive support and resources to startups, driving their success in the blockchain and digital asset sectors.

W3 DAO
As the central management body, W3 DAO is responsible for overall strategic planning, resource allocation, and supervision of the operations of each platform. Through a decentralized governance model, W3 DAO ensures that each platform achieves its specific objectives while collectively fostering the development of the ecosystem.

Web3 Accelerator
Web3 Accelerator focuses on early-stage startup incubation, providing extensive support from concept validation to prototype development, including technical guidance, marketing, and legal consulting. It organizes training programs and mentorship plans to enhance startup teams' management and operational capabilities and connects startups with potential investors, partners, and customer resources.

Web3 Ventures
Web3 Ventures handles pre-seed and seed-stage venture capital investments. It evaluates and invests in high-potential early-stage blockchain and digital asset projects, offers strategic advice to help companies formulate development plans, and utilizes an extensive industry network to establish important industry connections for startups.

Web3 Capital
Web3 Capital specializes in post-Series A investments, secondary market, and digital asset management. It provides further funding for companies that have reached certain milestones to help them scale their operations, invests in mature blockchain projects and digital assets for capital appreciation in the secondary market, and offers digital asset management services, including asset allocation, risk management, and return optimization for investors.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: BV Portföy
Description:
BV Portföy Yönetimi A.Ş. ("BV Portföy"), girişim sermayesi yatırım fonları ile halka açık teknoloji şirketlerinin hisse senetlerine yatırım yapan fonlar kurmak ve yönetmektedir. Yatırımcılarının risk ve getiri beklentilerini dengeleyen stratejik yatırım politikası yaklaşımı ile yurt içinde ve yurt dışında teknoloji alanında faaliyet gösteren yenilikçi ve yükselen trenddeki şirketlerin hisselerinden oluşan fon seçeneklerinin yanı sıra HFT (High Frequency Trading) ve Quant (Kantitatif) yatırım stratejileri ile yönetilen fonlarıyla yatırımcılarına katma değerli hizmet sunmaktadır.  

BV Portföy bir Boğaziçi Ventures iştirakidir. Boğaziçi Ventures, “Disruptive Innovation” odaklı yenilikçi ve dönüştürücü teknoloji şirketlerini fikir aşamasından halka açık olanlara kadar geniş bir yelpazede takip eden ve yatırım yapan lider alternatifler yatırım şirketidir. Özellikle Türkiye’de yerleşik teknoloji şirketlerine ve girişim ekosistemine üst düzeyde katkı sağlamakta ekosistemin gelişmesi için devlet, sivil toplum kuruluşları, girişimciler ve yatırımcılar ile birlikte çalışmaktadır.Türkiye’den çıkıp globale açılan girişimcilerin yolculuklarına ortak olarak değer yaratmakta, yıkıcı ve yenilikçi teknolojiler ile sermayedarlar arasında köprü görevi görmektedir.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Hunch Ventures & Investments Pvt Ltd

Hunch has invested in visionary founders in industries across - Ports and Logistics, Healthtech, Real Estate, Lifestyle, Media, Fine Arts, Sustainable Food Supply chains and food security, Air Mobility, F&B, several B2B SaaS platforms. Hunch represents patient and long term capital that supports founders through their startup journey.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: TAU Ventures
Description:
TAU Ventures is an early-stage focused venture capital fund affiliated with Tel Aviv University, investing in the next generation of impactful home-grown technology companies. 

At the heart of the start-up nation, TAU Ventures invests the first capital into startups and is dedicated to helping them transform their ideas into global businesses. 

TAU Ventures cultivates an innovation ecosystem by combining the resources and global network of Tel Aviv University, strong industry connections, and a supportive home-base for founders. Together with its world-leading team of experienced mentors, TAU Ventures empowers startups in their critical, early steps. 

At its 1000 sq meter co-working office space located in Tel Aviv, the team works shoulder to shoulder with their portfolio companies, nurturing their growth by drawing on the strength of its innovation ecosystem on a daily basis.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Lab Box
Description:
Lab Box is a Belgian start-up studio focusing on the future of mobility. Lab Box has the ambition to promote and develop new mobility solutions that will make cities more liveable and enjoyable in the future. Belgium is one of the most congested countries in the world. This is one of the reasons why Lab Box decided to make this small but complex piece of land its living laboratory. Lab Box has now launched or acquired 10 portfolio companies active in various fields of the mobility ecosystem. Lab Box is backed by D’Ieteren Auto, a company active in the automobile distribution and retail.
www.lab-box.com

Name: Bolster Investment Partners
Description:
Bolster Investment Partners is a long term investor. Bolster acquires minority and majority stakes in extraordinary Dutch companies with a sharp focus and a proven business model. Bolster supports entrepreneurs in realizing the full potential of their business. Bolster’s mission is to create true sustainable value for its companies and its investors, through knowledge, resources and network. 

The team has a proven track record; it has successfully cooperated with more than 100 companies since 1982. Until the end of 2017 under the name Van Lanschot Participaties, at which time the team became independent under the name Bolster Investment Partners.  

Bolster invests in companies with an EBITDA of at least € 3 million. Between € 7,5 and 50 million is invested per company for a stake of at least 20%. 

Bolster has a broad sector focus, with an emphasis on manufacturing, services and trade.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: North Texas Angel Network
Description:
For more than a decade, the North Texas Angel Network (NTAN) has connected early stage companies with angel investors to help private investors make private deals with private companies. 

Over its 10-year history, NTAN members have invested in excess of $10 million into startup organizations. Notable investments, totaling more than $1 million each from NTAN members, include Ikonopedia, Natural Dental Implants, Tella Firma, and Vital Arts & Science. In 2018, angel investments were made into Natural Dental Implants, Haxiot, Stocked Robotics, teleCalm, and TeVido, among others.

Annually the organization reviews several hundred business plans and presents approximately 50 investment opportunities for hands-on analysis, due diligence and investment consideration to its membership of more than 60 individual, accredited investors.

The non-profit, member-led organization reviews investment opportunities across industries, including medical device and service companies, software and hardware technology, and construction innovation, among others. 

One of the oldest and largest networks in Texas, NTAN is a member of the Angel Capital Association and the Alliance of Texas Angel Networks.

Please visit the website to learn more about membership as an angel investor or to present your business for seed funding consideration by our members.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Hidden Dreams
Description:
Hidden Dreams startades 2019 som ett akademiskt och entreprenöriellt affärsutvecklingsexperiment. Idag är vi en av av Europas mest snabbväxande Venture Builders som specialiserar sig på att lösa ineffektiva arbetsprocesser inom organisationer genom nya digitala tjänster. Dessa ineffektiva arbetsprocesser kallar vi på Hidden Dreams dolda problem.

Vi startar nya bolag utifrån kommersiellt intressanta problem vi identifierar som går att lösa genom en digital tjänst. Bolaget ges initial finansiering, verktyg, affärskritisk expertis och ett brett nätverk för att omvandla problemen till praktiska digitala lösningar och slutligen till ett självgående SaaS-bolag. I dagsläget har vi startat över ett dussin portföljbolag som syftar till att lösa dolda problem inom bland annat branscher som tillverkande industri, försäkringsbranschen samt foodtech.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Exceptional Ventures
Description:
At Exceptional Ventures, our motto is Believing in Believers. We believe that innovative businesses can make the world a better place, and we believe in entrepreneurs that feel the same. It is our mission to support them with our expertise and capital, and to help them build a better future.

We focus on businesses that are helping people live healthier, happier, longer lives. Our portfolio ranges from sustainable consumer products to applications focused on mental and physical health, and on the future of foods. We have extensive experience and networks across Europe that we have built while running and investing in some of Europe’s most successful businesses. We have over 50 years of combined expertise across the sectors of focus and a portfolio of over 160 startups. 

We are uniquely able to access the most talented entrepreneurs building the most progressive companies and are building a portfolio of 40 exceptional businesses in our first fund. We offer extensive support to companies early in their journeys with our capital, network, and advice. 

By bringing together passionate investors and world-class entrepreneurs, our mission is to improve the length and quality of human lives, while helping to build a sustainable planetary ecosystem.


Exceptional Ventures LLP is a Limited Liability Partnership registered in England and Wales (No OC440667) and is authorised and regulated by the Financial Conduct Authority (FRN 991058).

Name: Holland Startup
Description:
Holland Startup, an Utrecht-based venture builder, was founded in 2014 with the goal to enable young entrepreneurship. At Holland Startup young entrepreneurs are guided on their entrepreneurial journey to succeed. 

Since then, Holland Startup has become the specialist in the design, incubation, acceleration and active operational support of digital companies and their founders. For the next 5 years it's our aim to help 50 entrepreneurs build 25 startups. 

Holland Startup is different! Holland Startup invests in young entrepreneurs. We believe in guided entrepreneurship; First we investigate problems worth solving, then we design a solution and sell it to a target customer, to finally invest in the startup. Young entrepreneurs enjoy coaching on the job, hands-on support, and back-office services.

Since its inception in 2014, Holland Startup has helped 20+ young entrepreneurs and built 8 startups. We are a diverse, international team of 26, dedicated to find repeatable and scalable business models!

Name: CIVC Partners
Description:

CIVC was founded in 1970, and our current investment strategy and the core of our management team have been in place since 1989, investing almost $2.4 billion of capital in 82 platform companies since then.  

In this time span, CIVC has actively and consistently invested in the Business Services vertical. This focus area offers CIVC investment opportunities across numerous attractive, high growth niches. We believe this focused approach has led to our strong results by creating advantages in selecting and working with portfolio companies to achieve our collective strategic and financial goals.

Our mission is to support entrepreneurs building products and platforms that resonate with how India lives, shops, and consumes. We look beyond noise, and back founders with clarity, conviction, and a readiness to build something enduring.

At Kairon Capital, we bring:

Kairon (from the Greek Kairos) stands for the perfect moment when preparation meets opportunity - and that’s when we show up.

Join us in reshaping the future of consumer innovation.

Name: Invus
Description:
Invus has been empowering entrepreneurs to transform their industries since 1985. We have a continuous capital structure with over $10 billion under management and offices in the U.S., Europe and Asia. We focus on investments in consumer, technology and life sciences. 

We know what it takes to transform an industry: strategic insight, capital that isn't on an arbitrary exit schedule and world-class execution. We partner with entrepreneurs and their teams on all three of these dimensions.  Invus offers the best of both worlds: The time horizon and personal attention of a bespoke family office with the professionalism and capabilities of a world-class multi-strategy firm. 

In addition to investing in private companies, we have been investing in public companies since 2004, where we take significant, long-term positions. 

We have been running a fund-of-funds strategy since 1994 with a particular expertise and focus in emerging/early-stage hedge fund managers. 

We welcome you to visit our website and learn more about Invus.

Name: Costa Norte & Company
Description:
"We believe that innovation and entrepreneurship can change the world, and every human being with great ideas and passion has the right to succeed"

We are the leading global Investment Agency, with offices in Europe, Asia and the US, and a team of professionals and partners based in 9 countries around the world.
Costa Norte's agency-infrastructure allows our teams to leverage both their personal networks and the agency's established connections. This dual network approach accelerates deal success by expanding our reach to potential investors. 
The centralization of tools and knowledge within the headquarters fosters collaboration, leading to faster and more informed decision-making. 
Ultimately, this structure creates a synergistic effect, where individual and collective efforts multiply the chances of closing successful deals.
Our expertise covers two main advisory services within the tech and real estate sector:

1. Capital raising    
2. M&A (Buy and Sell side)   

Our extensive network of investors spans Europe, the UK, Asia and the US. Our seasoned team, with backgrounds as founders, investors, and analysts has over 20 years of experience in the tech and real estate industry.

Name: HDFC Capital Advisors Limited
Description:
HDFC Capital Advisors Limited (HDFC Capital), a subsidiary of HDFC Bank, is the real estate private equity financing arm of HDFC Group. Set up in 2016, HDFC Capital is aligned with the Government of India’s goal to increase housing supply and support the Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - ‘Housing for All’ initiative. The Company also seeks to promote innovation and the adoption of new technologies within the real estate sector by investing in and partnering with technology companies. 

HDFC Capital is one of the largest residential real estate fund managers in India with funds under management of approximately USD 3 billion. The company manages 3 funds which are registered with SEBI as Category II Alternative Investment Funds. 

HDFC Capital was set up with the primary objective of providing long-term equity and mezzanine capital to developers at the land and pre-approval stage predominantly for the development of affordable and mid-income housing in India. The funds managed by HDFC Capital have recently been rated as one of the world’s largest private finance platforms focused on development of affordable housing.  

HDFC Capital believes that new technologies will play a vital role in the creation of efficiencies within the real estate development cycle which is critical for affordable housing projects. The company has set up the HDFC Affordable Real Estate and Technology Programme (H@ART), a first-of-its-kind initiative aimed at creating efficiencies and lowering costs in each part of the development cycle for a real estate project. The funds managed by HDFC Capital also invest in technology companies (construction-tech, fin-tech, clean-tech etc.) engaged in the housing ecosystem.

In May 2022, HDFC Ltd sold 10% of the fully diluted paid-up share capital of HDFC Capital to a wholly-owned subsidiary of the Abu Dhabi Investment Authority (ADIA). ADIA is also an investor in the alternative investment funds managed by HDFC Capital.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Builds-up | بیلدزآپ
Description:
مرکز نوآوری مهندسی و ساخت بیلدزآپ با هدف تقویت همکاری فعال و یکپارچه در میان شبکه گسترده منابع انسانی ماهر، جامعه مهندسی، شرکت های فعال، سیاست گذاران و مشارکت کنندگان متنوع در زنجیره تامین ساخت و ساز و زیرساخت تاسیس شده است. این مجموعه از یک طرف، فعالانه با بازیگران صنعت درگیر است و از سوی دیگر، با مبتکران و ذینفعان فناوری در این اکوسیستم همکاری می کند. هدف اصلی بالا بردن کیفیت، کارایی و اثربخشی کلی حوزه ساخت و ساز است که منجر به پیشرفت و گسترش خدمات می شود. مرکز نوآوری بیلدزآپ با ایجاد یک بدنه نوآورانه و بهرهگیری از آخرین پیشرفتها در فناوری، گامی تأثیرگذار را در جهت پیشبرد این صنعت مهم به ارتفاعات جدید و ارائه ارزش به همه ذینفعان برمیدارد.
The Engineering and Construction Innovation Center is established with the objective of fostering active and seamless collaboration within the extensive network of skilled and proficient human resources, the engineering community, active enterprises, policymakers, and diverse contributors in the construction and infrastructure supply chain. On one front, it actively engages with industry players, while on the other, it collaborates with innovators and technology stakeholders in the ecosystem. The primary aim is to elevate quality, efficiency, and overall effectiveness, leading to the advancement and expansion of services. By instituting an innovative body within this ecosystem and harnessing the latest advancements in innovation and technology, the center takes a modest yet impactful stride towards propelling this significant industry to new heights and delivering value to all its stakeholders.

Name: Two Small Fish
Description:
Two Small Fish Ventures (TSF) is a seed-stage deep tech venture capital firm that invests globally in the next frontier of computing and its applications. For more than a decade, TSF has backed multiple breakout successes across consumer, enterprise, industrial, and dual-use markets and has consistently demonstrated its ability to spot the next major opportunities early.

TSF invests in five interconnected areas: Vertical AI Platforms, Physical AI (e.g., robotics and smart machines), AI Infrastructure, Advanced Computing Hardware (e.g., semiconductors and quantum), and Smart Energy. The firm supports founders at the earliest stages, primarily pre-revenue, when foundational technology is ready for commercialization. TSF makes five to seven high-conviction early-stage investments per year.

The TSF team represents a rare combination. All partners are engineers with deep operating experience; the team includes a former CEO, serial entrepreneurs, and startup leaders who have built, scaled, and exited category-defining companies before becoming deep tech investors. This full-cycle expertise gives TSF a unique ability to assess deep tech opportunities and provide unmatched hands-on support from technology through commercialization after investment. This support is strengthened by long-standing relationships with a network of top founders, research institutions, and technical ecosystems.

Name: Higher Ground Labs
Description:
Higher Ground Labs is building an ecosystem for progressive political technology. We provide capital, assistance, programming, and mentorship to talented individuals and early-stage companies that are building the next generation of progressive political technology that can help win campaigns. 

The current ecosystem around progressives' campaign and persuasive tech is broken. It lacks committed capital, sustained mentorship, and a network of active supporters to make new ideas successful. Rather than build tech and data infrastructure from the bottom up, progressives have instead relied on Presidential campaigns as their innovation hubs, generating a recurring pattern of short-term thinking from hard-working but under-resourced campaign staff who tasked with innovating on products while trying to win national-scale campaigns. 

Our programming is designed to spark and nurture new collaborations and startups, and to strengthen the bonds of connectivity across progressive tech. It includes (1) an active accelerator for companies building scalable political technology, (2) fellowships that allow individuals to explore ideas for solutions to problems, (3) a recurring summit for political and technology experts to forge alliances and share ideas, and (4) ad hoc events like conferences and hackathons that deepen and reinforce the ecosystem.

With c.€1bn raised and managed to date and a track record across multiple economic cycles, Bluegem combines a specialised operating platform with a differentiated ability to interpret end-consumer demand signals and translate them into higher-value, upstream investment opportunities.

Name: HealthCap
Description:
HealthCap is a family of venture capital funds investing globally in life sciences. With more than EUR 1.2 billion raised since the start in 1996, HealthCap is one of the largest specialized providers of venture capital within life sciences in Europe.

HealthCap is a European venture capital firm investing exclusively and globally in life sciences. The investment strategy focuses on diseases with high unmet medical needs and breakthrough therapies that have the potential to be transformative and change medical practice, and the lives of patients suffering these conditions.

Having raised more than EUR 1.2 billion since 1996, HealthCap has backed and built more than 125 companies, taken more than 45 companies public and done numerous trade sales.

Over the years, HealthCap companies have developed 30 pharmaceutical products to market approval, many of which are breakthrough therapies helping patients with life-threatening diseases. In addition, HealthCap companies have brought more than 50 innovative medical device products to market. These products have generated significant value to many stakeholders, including patients, physicians and society, and as a result also to HealthCap investors.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Capiton
Description:
capiton AG is an owner-managed private equity investor with a current fund volume of €1.3 billion under management and a strong track record of over 20 years of investing in profitable companies in the DACH Mittelstand We are currently investing out of our sixth fund, which was established in 2020. capiton’s origins go back to the late 1970s.
capiton invests in SMEs located mainly in Germany, Austria and Switzerland. We usually invest between €20 and €60 million of our own funds in profitable companies with a turnover of between €50 and €300 million and an strong growth prospects. However, by partnering with co-investors we are also able to realise larger transactions. 
For us, private equity is more than just money invested. With each investment we take responsibility, for our investors’ money and for the company and its workforce. We invest in different sectors - key sectors are pharmaceuticals, medical and industrial technology and responsible consumption – because we see opportunities in more than just one place. The capiton team consists of more than 30 people, 10 of whom are partners, and has managed more than 80 investments to date, of which more than 70 exits have been realised. 
Whether you are looking for a successor, want to secure future growth or are planning a management buy-in, at capiton you will find the right solution for your particular challenge, regardless of what your project is or the current circumstances of your company.

For more information about our solutions, our philosophy, or job opportunities, please visit our website: www.capiton.de
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Chloe Capital
Description:
Chloe Capital is a seed-stage venture capital firm that invests in diverse-led innovation companies.

Despite recent progress, only two percent of female founders receive venture capital funding, with only .2 percent going to African American founders.

Chloe Capital is on a mission to change that in partnership with foundations, universities and corporate innovators. We travel across the U.S. as part of the #InvestInWomen Tour, moving capital to undercapitalized founders in each city we visit. Our fundraising experiences for diverse entrepreneurs and impact investors spotlight innovation, connect founders and investors to resources, and build community.

Creating an inclusive venture ecosystem is a Movement. Chloe Capital aims to act as a catalyst. Join us > ChloeCapital.com/Contact

The Firm invests in seed-stage companies with at least one woman in the C-suite receiving a fair amount of equity. Companies should have a working prototype, with the potential to disrupt macro industries including SaaS, Blockchain, AI, VR/AR, IoT, Cleantech, Agtech, Hardware, Edtech, Wearables and/or Robotics.

Chloe Capital is open to investments throughout North America. View our latest investment opportunities > ChloeCapital.com/funding

Name: Irish Venture Capital & Private Equity Association
Description:
The Irish Venture Capital Association (IVCA) is the representative organisation for venture capital and private equity firms in Ireland. Our full members are venture capital and private equity firms that provide equity funding to growing unquoted companies. Associate members of the IVCA include firms that provide advisory services including corporate finance houses, commercial and intellectual property law firms, accountants and other advisers experienced in the venture capital field.

IVCA members have invested over €2.5bn in Irish SMEs in the last three years €1.3bn directly and €1.2bn through international syndication. Research undertaken by Dublin City University at regular intervals over the last fifteen years highlights the outsize impact IVCA capital backed firms have on the Irish economy. The last cohort studied, contributed 40% of the indigenous SME spend on research and development in 2016. These companies grow both sales and employment on average 15 times faster than those in the wider SME economy. 

The affairs of the Association (IVCA) are managed by the Director General in conjunction with the IVCA Council. The IVCA Council consists of not less than six members who shall be elected in general meeting. 

The work of the IVCA consists primarily of representing the interests of the industry to regulators and standard setters; developing and promoting professional standards; conducting industry research and providing opportunities to facilitate interaction between the members and key industry participants including institutional investors, entrepreneurs, policy makers and academics.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Vaaka Partners
Description:
Vaaka Partners is a Finnish private equity firm that helps mid-sized companies become business champions.

We began minority investing in 1989, gradually shifting to buyout investing. In 2010, we became an independent private equity firm, focused on building winning businesses by combining operational insight and new growth opportunities in a collaborative team environment.

The Vaaka factor

Our ambition is to be the #1 partner for entrepreneurs and management teams of mid-sized companies in our home markets. We offer our companies:

1. Tools for developing high-performing management teams and companies
2. People with knowledge of and experience in growing businesses in the global marketplace
3. Collaboration built on integrity and transparency

Name: The Pay It Forward Company
Description:
Our mission is to build better lives for billions. We invest in source-solving, not symptom-solving.

Solving problems at the source shifts paradigms, which creates new markets. We capture the upside of these new markets and help direct them to be in service of humanity and our planet. 

Source-solving often requires building new infrastructure. That’s why we primarily invest in infrastructure - across financial technology, health, energy and more. We partner with founders building infrastructure for a better world.

We build supportive ecosystems for our portfolio through all stages of growth by backing select emerging managers. We’ve supported the growth stories of successful venture capital franchises like Deciens Capital & Tribe Capital.

Organizations building new societal infrastructure need top-notch internal infrastructure. Through PIF Advisory, we build operational infrastructure for founders, family offices, private equity and enterprise. This includes services across finance, accounting, operations, and legal.

We believe in paying it forward, so we donate 20% of GP upside to outcomes-oriented nonprofits. 

Legal Disclosure: pif.co/legal-disclosure

Name: GroundSwell
Description:
Who We Are:
GroundSwell is the destination for owner-managers transitioning their organization from an entrepreneurial business to a professionally managed, entrepreneurial company. We provide the people and tools to successfully stabilize, grow or exit your business. 

Who We’re Not:
We’re not consultants who tell you what to do but don't help you do it.
We’re not managers who pretend to get stuff done.
We’re not investors who write a check and tell you what you should do.

Our Customers:
Our customers are businesses with $3 to $30 million in annual revenue. Over forty years of academic research indicates that businesses of this size must transition from an entrepreneurial business to a professionally managed, entrepreneurial company. 

Our Difference:
We create peace of mind for owner-managers. We’ve made the often complex and chaotic transition from an entrepreneurial business to a professionally managed, entrepreneurial company highly rigorous, flexible, repeatable and programmable.  

We provide predictive diagnostics, business ownership training, hands-on execution through long-term partnerships, holistic enterprise management software, and capital – all in one place.

Diagnostics: GroundSwell provides exclusive predictive online surveys that diagnose the key organizational and management development gaps. 

Training: Our Business Ownership School bridges the gap between an individual’s industry, product or functional knowledge and the critical skills required to manage a larger more complex organization.

Support: We provide hands-on support and execution that is aligned with your goals through long-term partnerships.

Capital: We invest in companies that have a demonstrated and ongoing commitment to organizational and managerial development.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

صندوق پژوهش و فناوری پرشین (با نام کامل صندوق پژوهش و فناوری غیردولتی پرشین داروی البرز)  در تاریخ 1390/07/10 تاسیس شد. ما به دنبال ایجاد زمینه های مشارکت و سرمایهگذاری در بخش غیردولتی هستیم و هدفمان حمایت کمی و کیفی از فعالیت های پژوهشی، کاربردی و توسعهای است. این صندوق با شخصیت حقوقی غیردولتی، توام با استقلال مالی فعالیت میکند. تمرکز ویژۀ ما شناسایی و تجاریسازی پروژههای مطالعاتی و تحقیقاتی دارویی است که مراحل مقدماتی خود را طی کردهاند و آمادۀ ورود به تولید نیمهصنعتی یا صنعتی هستند. در این مرحله، زمینۀ ورود شرکتهای نوپا به بازار را فراهم میکنیم و با توجه به حق مالکیت معنوی یا حق امتیاز بهره برداری، زمینه های شکوفایی علمی و بهرهوری پژوهشی را ایجاد میکنیم، بهعلاوه کمک میکنیم تا این شرکتها در عرصههای جدید به شکل بهینه وارد شوند.

Name: Nordian
Description:
Nordian is a leading Private Equity manager in the Dutch mid-market. It focuses on majority stake investments in medium-sized Dutch companies. Nordian has invested in more than 37 companies over time and currently has € 500 million in capital under management. Founded in 2014, the company is the spin-out of Rabobank’s buy-out arm Rabo Capital. In our latest Fund, we are backed by a mix of European institutional investors, combined with our original cornerstone investors Rabobank (a leading Dutch bank), Commonwealth Investments (a Dutch family office) and PGGM (a leading player in pension and asset management).

Nordian typically invests in one of the following situations:
• Entrepreneur looking for succession.
• Management buy-out or buy-in (MBO/MBI).
• Large shareholder who wants to sell a (majority) interest in a company.
• Management looking for additional capital to finance growth.
• Sale of part of a larger group (carve-out).

Typical characteristics of companies we invest in: 
• Dutch companies with an (potential) international footprint. 
• Proven business model and strong track record. 
• Clear strategic plan focused on realising (additional) growth. 
• Operating profit (EBITDA) € 3-15m. 
• Nordian typically investing at least € 10m. 
• Majority stake. 
• Active in non-government regulated markets.

Nordian has a multidisciplinary team with a broad experience and expertise. It acts as an active shareholder, supporting the management team in realizing value for the company in an ESG sustainable manner.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals
