Name: Lakson Venture Capital (LVC)
Description:
Lakson Venture Capital (LVC) is a Pakistan based Institutional VC Fund regulated by the Securities & Exchange Commission of Pakistan (SECP). The fund is structured as a Trust with Central Depository Company of Pakistan Limited (CDC) acting as the Trustee for investors. 

LVC invests in entrepreneurs and local businesses to build enterprises, taking innovative ideas to the next stage. It works with Lakson Investments’ (“LI”) team of over 50 experienced professionals while at the same time, leverages the operational experience of the Lakson Group. Over 14,000 people are employed by Lakson in Pakistan in businesses across sectors such as Broadcast and Print Media (Express Media Group), FMCG (Colgate-Palmolive Pakistan), Insurance, QSR (McDonald’s Pakistan) and Technology (CyberNet & Sybrid). LI is one of the largest private sector asset managers in Pakistan with over US$300mn under management with a rating of AM2+.

Investment Focus

LIVC invests in Pakistan based opportunities, concentrating on investments where technology can be leveraged to enable, enhance and disrupt existing business models or create new ones. Our investment focus is at the stage in the start-up lifecycle where the company is less than 36-48 months away from a successful Series A round or potential exit. We also invest in select Seed rounds through our Incubation and Accelerator ecosystem relationships as well as overseas partners in Silicon Valley and Europe where we seek to bring proven foreign technology to Pakistan.

Name: BIRD Foundation
Description:
BIRD is an acronym for Israel-U.S. Binational Industrial Research and Development. The BIRD Foundation's mission is to stimulate, promote and support industrial R&D of mutual benefit to the U.S. and Israel. 

Our primary vehicles include matching grant program and matchmaking services supporting Israeli and U.S. companies engaged in joint R&D projects. We take no equity in the joint projects and expect repayment only from actual revenues generated. BIRD supports approximately 20 projects annually.  

The BIRD Foundation was established by the U.S. and Israeli governments in 1977 to generate mutually beneficial cooperation between the private sectors of the U.S. and Israeli high tech industries, including start-ups and established organizations. BIRD's scope extends to Agriculture, Communications, Life Sciences, Electronics, Electro-optics, Software, Homeland Security, Renewable and Alternative Energy and other sectors of the hi-tech industry.

Since its inception in 1977, BIRD has approved over 940 projects with leading companies in the U.S and Israel. The cumulative sales of products developed through BIRD projects have exceeded $10 billion.

US companies and organizations that enjoyed BIRD grants include:  American Red Cross, Applied Materials, Avaya, Bayer Pharmaceutical, Becton Dickinson, Bio-Rad Laboratories, Eastman Kodak, General Dynamics, General Electric, Guidant, IBM, J&J, KLA- Tencor, Molex, Motorola, Procter & Gamble, SanDisk, Spansion, Telcordia, Texas Instruments, Tyco and others.

You too can take advantage of the business opportunities offered by the BIRD Foundation. We can help you find your strategic partner, whether technological or marketing. Furthermore, our financial support and request for repayment only on the basis of actual revenues generated, demonstrates our commitment and our willingness to risk sharing.

Yotta investit ainsi dans les sociétés industrielles françaises et européennes à travers deux fonds : Yotta Smart Industry, fonds de buyout et de capital développement dédié aux PME industrielles et Yotta Growth Industry qui accompagne les scale-up industrielles. La plateforme Yotta leur propose un accompagnement fort sur leurs enjeux de croissance, de décarbonation et de sobriété en matière d’empreinte environnementale (biodiversité, gestion de l’eau...). Our syndicate members are angel investors, family offices, healthcare providers, donor advised funds, and individuals who have been impacted personally by the problems we aim to help solve.

We accept investors of all shapes, sizes, walks of life and interests.  Please get in touch if you would like to learn more.

- Investissement dans des PME profitables,
- Montants d'investissement allant de 1 à 10 millions d'euros par transaction,
- Absence de préférence sectorielle,
- Possibilité d'investir en position minoritaire ou majoritaire,
- Privilégier des structures simples et adaptées à chaque situation,

Description:
Teralys Capital is a technology-focused Fund of funds which finances private venture capital funds investing in life sciences, information technology and cleantech companies.

Our mission is to partner with entrepreneurs solving big problems across enterprise, healthcare, bio-tech, and food. At GPV we make fewer than 10 new investments per year so we have time to fight in the trenches with every team we back.

Description:
Hatteras Venture Partners is a venture capital firm that builds transformational companies in areas of health innovation. We focus on cutting-edge science and teams in biotech, medtech, and healthtech. Many of our companies are based on leading science from academic research institutions. The firm has invested in companies across the United States in most of the major hotspots for health innovation. Given our headquarters location in Research Triangle Park, NC, Hatteras plays a leadership role in building companies in North Carolina and the Southeastern United States, where technology is plentiful but resident venture capital is limited.

Core to the mission of Hatteras Venture Partners is a belief that entrepreneurial innovation will create valuable new products that will transform the practice of medicine and create value for our investors. As entrepreneurs, operators, and investors, we are dedicated to the success of our companies and to the men and women who create them.

Founded in 2000 and based in Durham, NC, the firm consists of an experienced team with a broad and complementary skill set that is particularly relevant to building successful new biomedical companies. The Hatteras team brings operational experience, a successful track record, and a proven ability to enhance the value of the companies in which it invests. With seven core funds, the firm has over $900 million under management and has invested in over 100 portfolio companies.

Hatteras is an Innovation to Impact sponsor of the Council for Entrepreneurial Development, a member of NCBIO, and an active volunteer in support of North Carolina and Southeast regional biotech activities.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Description:
Riverwalk Holdings is an India focused fund that is set up to invest in early stage companies from Seed to Series B. Riverwalk is anchored by the multi billion dollar Thakral Group and has also raised capital from prominent Asian family offices. Our primary focus sectors are SaaS, Fintech and consumer brands.

We are founder first and are more than just your capital partners. We provide strategic value over and above financial capital, by leveraging the Thakral Group’s global network and businesses across real estate, technology, consumer product distribution and manufacturing.

Everything we do revolves around a single problem: What are the best ways to reconcile economic growth with human and planetary wellness? If your venture aligns with our mission, we invite you to get in touch.

We are proudly based in Miami, a vibrant gateway to the US, Latin America and Europe that provides our team and community an inspiring environment to convene and conspire.

Description: SV Health Investors’ Dementia Discovery Fund (DDF) is the world’s largest family of specialized venture capital funds that invests exclusively in companies developing or enabling novel therapeutics for dementia. Dementias including Alzheimer’s Disease are arguably the largest unmet medical need with over 55m patients worldwide. With more than $600m raised for this strategy, and offices in London and Boston, DDF capitalizes on global investment opportunities to fulfill its dual mandate of delivering measurable impact and generating significant financial returns. Utilizing its network of venture partners, entrepreneurs, leading scientists, and strategic partners, DDF invests in and creates new biotech companies and provides thought leadership in the field. DDF is enabled by its cornerstone investors AARP, British Business Bank and Gates Frontier, as well as additional limited partners, including major pharmaceutical companies and leading non-profits.

Notre mission ? Soutenir le développement des entreprises locales en investisseur actif minoritaire, de long terme, en cohérence avec les besoins et le rythme économique des entreprises. 

Notre engagement se manifeste à travers quatre fonds d'investissement : 

- SOFILARO accompagne en fonds propres les entreprises matures dans leurs développements et leurs transmissions 
- CALEN (Crédit Agricole Languedoc Energies Nouvelles) investit dans des infrastructures ENR contribuant à la transition énergétique du territoire
- SOFILARO DETTE PRIVEE finance la croissance des entreprises via du placement obligataire privé 
- SOFILARO INNOVATION accompagne l'amorçage et l'accélération des start-ups du territoire 

SOFILARO s'adapte aux projets de chaque entreprise et participe aux réflexions stratégiques ainsi qu'à leurs mises en œuvre.

Name: Lever VC
Description:
Lever VC is a leading FoodTech and AgTech specialist venture capital firm, investing globally in entrepreneurs creating a more sustainable and healthier food system.

Lever VC's Fund II is actively investing across food tech, crop tech, animal ag tech, and consumer-facing F&B goods with a focus on improving health and sustainability in our food systems. Lever VC invests globally, with a portfolio spanning North America, Europe, Asia, Latin America, and the GCC. 

Lever VC’s USD 80 Million Fund I has invested since 2019 in over thirty leading companies spanning alternative proteins, crop genetics, machinery, functional ingredients, pet, plant-based dairy, and meat alternatives, packaged meals, bars/powders/supplements, cell cultivation, fermentation, and sector service providers. 

Lever VC’s Fund I has consistently remained a top-decile performer for its vintage year (per Pitchbook industry benchmarks). Lever VC’s Fund II held a first close in early 2024 and is currently open to new investment.

Over the years, Lever VC has established a reputation as a top value-add investor in the FoodTech, AgTech, and future of protein space, closely supporting portfolio companies in areas including strategy, sales, fundraising, media, and more. This reputation as well as its sector expertise (including the expertise of its in-house scientific and technical team) provide added advantages to the Fund for deal origination, due diligence, market intelligence, and supporting its portfolio companies. Lever VC’s founding partners have been active investors in the alternative protein, animal protein, and broad FoodTech/AgTech categories for the past decade, backing a range of major winners across these categories in the US, Europe, and Asia and deploying over half a billion in capital (including investments made outside of Lever VC) across over 100 deals, with stellar exits and IRRs.

Name: AllegisCyber Capital
Description:
THE ALLEGIS DIFFERENCE

Our Corporate partners have been carefully selected because of specific expertise in their executive teams, the power of their brand and market positions in key consumer and business markets and their complementary (versus competitive) relationships with each other. This magnifies the size and potential of our combined network for entrepreneurs.

At AllegisCyber, we are a uniquely assembled team of General and Venture Partners committed to working with our portfolio companies proactively to find and establish lasting connections. Our team is involved in a hands-on way, working to find the best points of leverage within our Corporate partners. This enables entrepreneurs to access operating executives, to test environments and validate new product concepts, insider market intelligence, and accelerate branded distribution networks.

INVESTMENT FOCUS & CRITERIA

We are all about seed and early stage investing in cybersecurity and its applications in emerging technology markets. Today that focus encompasses related areas including big data analytics, Internet of things (IoT), and virtualization. The global economy operates on a digital substrate: It’s complex. Pervasive. Powerful yet highly vulnerable. Cybersecurity touches all aspects of this critical infrastructure and the businesses and services that depend on its security, reliability and integrity.  Whether it’s banking, retail, consumer, financial services, industrial, manufacturing, healthcare or government, cybersecurity is essential to the functioning of the global economy.
At AllegisCyber, we believe the imperative for cybersecurity innovation is a mainstay and will be with us for the foreseeable future. We are focused on identifying and partnering with the creative and passionate entrepreneurs who are committed to securing the digital frontier, through disruptive innovation.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Notre scope d'investissement comprend le Maroc et les startups de la diaspora marocaine partout dans le monde.

Description:
Jaguar Path Ventures is a technology venture builder leading the path to the next horizon by building positive impact companies. 

Our purpose is to support the world positive entrepreneurs building disruptive solutions and to build scalable businesses with global presence. 

We co-create the companies of tomorrow with the economy leaders and innovation experts.

We aim to achieve superior returns thanks to a proven model with an unbeatable launching and a growth acceleration methodology:  

Design and validation of new ventures
Allocation of funds and resources
Launch and monitoring
Growing them exponentially and making them profitable
Permanent Capital

We are not a Venture Capital Fund. We are managers and we do not seek a ‘2 out of 100’ success rate to make a return, but a 100% successful exit of all of our ventures with high returns.

We are not a Private Equity Fund. We do not invest in traditional companies, we conceptualize, launch and escalate our own ventures.

We are not an Accelerator/Incubator. We do not incubate third-party ideas for a short period of time. We launch them with a team of experts and accompany them until exit time only 24 months after having brought them to life.

At Jaguar Path Ventures, we are innovators, doers and investors.

If you want to join this adventure and create high growing ventures from scratch, don’t hesitate to get in touch with us!!

- Hardware Tech session (focusing on Mobility & IoT, Real Estate, New Materials & Packaging, Sustainability & Energy) recurs every second Friday of the month. 

- Health Tech session (focusing on Health & Medical Devices, Biotech & Genetech, Food & Agritech) recurs every third Friday of the month. 

- Commerce session (focusing on Retail & E-Commerce, Supply Chain & Logistics, Travel & Hospitality) recurs every fourth Friday of the month. 

- Industry focused session (focusing on Advertising, Entertainment, Media & Music, Drones & Autonomous Systems, Smart Homes & Cities, Blockchain, AI & Machine Learning) on fifth Friday of the month. 

The agenda for the session is as follows:
10:00am           Welcome and Introductions
10:15am            Startup Presentations
12:15pm            Networking Luncheon

Description:
We accelerate quality healthcare delivery through building and energizing digitally enabled health companies that expand access to patient-centric healthcare, in the Philippines and beyond.

Our portfolio companies are guided by the following principles:

1. GROUNDED IN REAL PROBLEMS
Is this a nice to have or a must have?  We believe that business and technology can be powerful agents for change, but only if the solutions are rooted in a deep understanding of key challenges within the local context and by practicing human-centered design.

2. ECOSYSTEM APPROACH
When and how will it contribute to the bigger picture? We are guided by a holistic, systems-based view of the healthcare industry. We are committed to serving actual user needs by bridging the gaps and forging the connections necessary to make our digital solutions relevant, accessible and enduring.

3.TECHNOLOGY- MARKET FIT  
Can the solution be scaled and empowered by technology? The most impactful technologies are not necessarily the most sophisticated, but the ones that key stakeholders along the healthcare value chain are ready to adopt. We design our solutions around the problems and our target users, never the other way around.

Ignition is the leading venture capital firm focused on early-stage investments in enterprise software. 

Our mission is to be a transformative partner to our portfolio companies, investing not only our capital but our time, expertise and personal/professional relationships with top leaders in technology and throughout the Fortune 500.   We will do everything in our power to help our founders achieve their mission of building an iconic business. 

We know “early enterprise.” This understanding is not academic but comes from our team’s collective experience in leadership positions at top technology and Fortune 500 companies, as startup builders, and investors.  This is not just the space we invest in, but the life we live and the circles we move in. 

Our network is unparalleled.  We have deep relationships with well-respected entrepreneurs and key decision makers within top technology companies and members of the Fortune 500.   Through these relationships and our past experience as builders and operators, we understand the needs of your potential customers, partners, and acquirers.   

Through our focus on enterprise software, our duo-locations in Seattle and Silicon Valley, and our past experience, we have deep relationships with the cloud vendors. We don’t just know the “VC relationship” person at AWS, Microsoft Azure and Google Cloud, we also know the best Go-To-Market people (the engineering and product teams, the business development teams and field leaders)--and know them well.  Corporate development too!  Why does this matter?  More than any other investor, we can help you position your business and products to meet your business goals and provide you with access to influential decision-makers who can change the trajectory of your business. 

We have a track record of investing in category makers such as Cloudera, Docker, DocuSign, Heroku, Icertis, Splunk, XenSource and Xamarin. Ignition Partners has returned more than $1B to investors since 2012. 

We are actively investing in early-stage startups in the following sectors:   Cloud Computing, Intelligent apps, Cybersecurity, B2B, Business IT, Machine Learning, AI (Artificial Intelligence), Frontier Tech, SaaS, Vertical SaaS, Business Applications. 

Silicon Valley & Seattle

Name: AdVentures
Description: AdVentures is a venture studio that helps build the next generation of world-changing companies by designing businesses and guiding them from ideation to MVP to full-scale validation. Our team of experts in telecommunication, fintech, Big Data, agriculture, and more work closely with founders to bring together ideas, capital, talent, and resources. Are you ready to join us on the next AdVentures?
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Skyharbor Capital Partners
Description:
Skyharbor Capital is a private investment firm that invests in high-quality companies that help improve people’s lives. 

We are focused on the health and human services industry.  With our in-depth background in information and technology, we focus on investing in companies that we can help grow and scale through the implementation of new technology. We look to partner with talented operators and honest entrepreneurs who are excited about professionalizing and scaling companies in order to be a force of positive change in the word. We're hands on and roll up our sleeves. We focus on supporting and empowering ethical and talented leaders to build advanced capabilities within each functional department at the company
 
We acquire companies with our own capital and don't invest via a traditional fund; therefore, we have the flexibility to invest in a variety of situations and prefer to think over the long term and don't have pressure for short-term exits.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Base Partners
Description:
Base Partners is a growth equity firm based in Sao Paulo and backed by an influential group of Brazilian business owners. Since our launch in 2017, we have been delivering on our mission to invest globally in leading technology companies. More than investors, we consider ourselves partners.

Today, we are proud to have partnered with amazing companies:

Zoom, Stripe, Netskope, Nubank, Getir, Wildlife, UiPath, Bytedance, Virta Health, MPL, Paradigm and Docker.

Beyond capital, every investment we make is based on mutual trust and the conviction that we can be relevant.  Our companies recognize that depth and consistency are essential to capturing the Brazilian market. This commitment to winning Brazil, and then Latin America, is at the heart of our mission and investment strategy.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Rivus Capital
Description: Rivus Capital is a privately owned family office based in Munich, Germany. Our investment strategy is focused on impact investing, and we deploy our own capital to support entrepreneurs who are working towards creating a sustainable, clean, safe, and healthy world for both present and future generations. Our investments are exclusively directed toward medium-sized firms in the DACH region.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Keyhaven Capital Partners
Description: Keyhaven Capital Partners is a specialist private equity firm, headquartered in London, exclusively focused on the European lower-mid market since its establishment in 2003. By partnering with best-in-class sponsors, Keyhaven strategically invests in high-quality companies, aiming to achieve robust risk-adjusted returns and diversification. This commitment is underscored by an outstanding track record.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: 33N Ventures
Description: 33N Ventures is a specialized venture capital company. Its first fund invests across Europe, Israel and the US in early growth-stage companies developing and commercialising emerging technology solutions in cybersecurity and infrastructure software. 33N has an active approach in supporting companies to expand globally, with an experienced and established international team and an extensive global network of leading entrepreneurs, experts, and cybersecurity decision-makers across industries.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Baring Vostok Capital Partners
Description:
Baring Vostok is one of the leading private equity firms operating in Russia and the CIS. The Baring Vostok Private Equity Funds have invested over $1.8 billion USD in more than 60 companies since 1994, and currently have committed capital of $3.6 billion USD for new investments. The Funds’ portfolios were diversified among financial services, oil and gas, consumer products, telecommunications, and media sectors, including СТС Media, Golden Telecom, Yandex, Ozon, Gallery Group, Centre of Financial Technologies, Enforta, ER-Telecom, 1C, Burren Energy, Volga Gas, Zhaikmunai, Novomet, Kaspi Bank, Orient Express Bank, Europlan, EMC and others. The Investment Advisor of the Funds, Baring Vostok Capital Partners (Guernsey) has been voted “Russian Private Equity Firm of the Year” by the readers of Private Equity International and Private Equity Online every year since 2005.  
The sub-advisor of BVCP has a branch office in Moscow with a team of 30 experienced investment professionals. Baring Vostok is a member of Baring Private Equity International, a global private equity group with more than $10 billion USD of capital under management by affiliates in CIS, Asia, India, Europe and Latin America.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Chile Ventures
Description:
Fondo de Venture Capital (VC) especialista en Startups tecnológicas con ingresos recurrentes (SaaS, suscripciones, licencias, membresías). 

Estamos en búsqueda y selección de Startups en etapa temprana que necesiten inversión para acelerar el crecimiento de sus compañías.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Ansa Capital
Description: Ansa is a venture capital firm based in New York City built to support founders as they scale. We make high-conviction, thesis-driven investments in new markets and systems, serving as the hub of tomorrow’s leading companies, operators and ideas. Read more about how we work and our approach to partnership: https://www.ansa.co/about-us
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Downing Capital Group
Description: Downing Capital Group’s mission is to build exceptional businesses and create substantial value for all the constituencies of our portfolio companies: customers, employees, capital providers, and management teams alike.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Enlightened Hospitality Investments
Description:
Enlightened Hospitality Investments (EHI) is a value-added strategic growth equity firm affiliated with Danny Meyer’s Union Square Hospitality Group (USHG).
 
The firm was formed to leverage the brands, businesses and team at USHG to identify and invest in scalable businesses with proven category leadership and a commitment to building an employee, customer and community-focused culture. 
 
EHI partners with portfolio companies to provide strategic direction, operational experience, increased visibility and access to relationships to drive growth with our portfolio partners. 
 
EHI manages over $550M of committed capital and primarily focuses on hospitality and related technology businesses, but will also invest in other hospitality-related companies that share an employee, customer and community-focused culture.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: San Diego Angel Conference
Description:
Angels say, there are not enough good deals.
Entrepreneurs say, there aren’t enough investors writing checks.

The San Diego Angel Conference (SDAC) aims to improve both of these issues through a series of events that build up to a one-day conference. SDAC is open to any member of the community interested in learning more about starting a company and investing in a new business.

The conference is the culmination of many months of due diligence, review, evaluation, and selection by the investors. The entrepreneurial candidates are narrowed down and on the day of the conference, the conference finalists have the opportunity to make their best pitch for why their company deserves the investment.

Seasoned community-minded investors pair with novice first-time investors to create an LLC, and pool their funds to create an investment of up to $1,000,000 awarded at the SDAC. Entrepreneurs receive intense coaching and feedback to ensure deal flow improves as they prepare to compete at SDAC.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: the Evangelistas
Description:
The Evangelistas is Europe’s leading network of women investors transforming the venture capital landscape. Recognized by Sifted as one of the top tech communities in 2024, we bring together 400+ seasoned investors to back game-changing startups. Since our founding in 2019, we have annually connected over 1,000 founders with investors at high-caliber events in European tech hubs, fostering trust and collaboration, while also facilitating access to more than 800 investment opportunities.

We focus on (pre-)seed ventures led by diverse teams across Europe’s key tech sectors. Our unique advantage lies in the deep industry expertise of our operators, strategic co-investment alongside top VCs, and our collaborative, pan-European approach. For investors, we provide curated deal flow and valuable knowledge-sharing opportunities. For founders, we offer smart capital, strategic guidance, and access to a powerful network of seasoned investors.

Connect   www.theevangelistas.com or reach out to us  hello@theevangelistas.com
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Epidarex Capital
Description: Epidarex Capital is a leading transatlantic venture capital firm that invests in early-stage, high growth life science opportunities in under-ventured markets.  Epidarex funds ground-breaking research, often building companies from scratch, to address large unmet medical needs with solutions that provide significant benefits to patients.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: SWIPE (Senior Women in Private Equity) Network
Description: A private network for Senior Women in Private Equity founded by Julia Boyd (M&A Partner at McDermott Will & Emery), Lane McDonald (Managing Director at OMERS), Priscilla Guevara (Science Ventures). SWIPE has over 3800 members globally.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Alexia Ventures
Description: Alexia Ventures is a Venture Capital firm focused on leading series A rounds in software platform, SaaS, and data/intelligence and Blockchain/ Crypto startups founded by top entrepreneurs from Brazil and Latin America. Alexia VC's "smart money" comes from founders with profound experience, and is supported by a network of investors, venture partners, and founders from innovation hubs in the region, key emerging markets, and Silicon Valley.

Name: Critical Capital Partners
Description:
Critical Capital Partners is the capital platform for family offices financing growth-stage industrial technologies and infrastructure across the EU & US. 

Our platform, market intelligence, and expert diligence network help families and sponsors co-invest from proven revenue to large-scale deployment. 

We invest in the four pillars of the real economy: energy, food and agriculture, industrial processes, and the built environment. These sectors are anchored in permanent demand and long-term resilience. 

Our first offering is a deal-by-deal co-investment platform with AIFM-backed Luxembourg governance and both equity and infrastructure vehicles.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: i5growth
Description:
At i5growth, we back bold founders, scalable technology, and transformative business models.

We partner with high-potential startups, combining strategic backing with hands-on support. Our focus is on building value-driven, globally competitive companies with lasting impact. i5growth operates long-term with a founder-first approach.

Name: Cohen Circle
Description:
Cohen Circle is an investment firm founded by financial services pioneers, Betsy Cohen and her son Daniel Cohen. Since 2015, the firm has provided transformative capital to late stage fintech growth companies. Today, we make investments across the capital structure in the fintech, technology, and impact spaces, with $5bn+ in capital raised. 
 
Our decades-long experience as founders, operators, and innovators uniquely positions us to capitalize and transform companies through our significant networks and expertise.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Temasek Life Sciences Accelerator
Description: Temasek Life Sciences Accelerator (TLA), a joint venture between Temasek Life Sciences Laboratory and Vertex Venture Holdings Ltd, is a company that aims to incubate, nurture and grow life sciences innovations into early stage companies within its go-to life sciences incubator.

Name: Savano Capital Partners
Description:
Savano Capital Partners is a late stage venture fund investing in technology-driven businesses. We focus on investment opportunities in high-growth companies within the software, communications, e-commerce, technology-enabled services, healthcare and clean tech/alternative energy sectors.

We partner with leading companies by providing liquidity to individual shareholders, such as former executives, angel investors and founders. The fund was founded by life-long venture capitalists and entrepreneurs who aim to work collaboratively with company management, venture investors and individual shareholders.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Health Velocity Capital
Description: Health Velocity Capital invests in growth-stage healthcare software and services companies. Spanning three decades as investors, entrepreneurs, and operators, our principals have invested in and helped build some of healthcare's most impactful innovators -- companies that became industry leaders and that created entirely new markets, a few of which include Teladoc Health (NYSE: TDOC), Tivity Health (NASDAQ: TVTY), Change Healthcare (NASDAQ: CHNG), Aspire Healthcare, and Livongo (NASDAQ: LVGO). In addition to investing on behalf of institutional investors, we are proud to invest on behalf of a number of our nation’s largest and most influential healthcare organizations and a number of current and former healthcare senior executives and leaders. Collectively, our investors represent organizations that provide health insurance to more than 140 million Americans, operate more than 500 hospitals, provide pharmacy and PBM services to almost every American, and provide software and services to every major hospital in the United States. For more information, please visit www.healthvelocitycapital.com.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: BIP Capital
Description: BIP Capital is a vertically-integrated investment platform that provides direct access to high-quality private equity, venture capital, and private credit strategies and products. With this sophisticated, comprehensive approach to the private markets, we seek to generate consistently strong performance, access, and competitive advantages for our investors and advisor partners. We invite you to get to know us.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Junction Growth Investors
Description:
Junction Growth Investors is a long-term, sustainable investment fund (art 9, SFDR) focussed on non-listed European SMEs and scale-ups that play a crucial role in the energy transition. We're not about early stage and we're not about financial engineering.
We believe in scaling great things that have already been invented and invest with a sense of urgency about climate change. We believe we need to speed things up. We need to transition, not just set goals.
Junction is a combination of award-winning entrepreneurs, CEOs and investors with a track-record in successful energy (-tech) businesses, incl. Lampiris, REstore, sonnen, tiko and Tado.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Ajax Health
Description: Ajax Health deploys capital and leverages operational experience to accelerate healthcare innovation across medical devices, digital health, healthcare services and biotechnology. We partner with entrepreneurs across all stages of a company's lifecycle and leverage deep domain expertise to support business strategy, clinical & regulatory, R&D and M&A.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Estonian Private Equity & Venture Capital Association (EstVCA)
Description:
Estonian Private Equity and Venture Capital Association (EstVCA) is the representative body of private equity and venture capital industry players and related support services providers in Estonia. Since our founding in 2009, our main focus has been on strengthening and developing the local ecosystem, international relations and providing industry knowledge, research and training to all our members, associate members and other key stakeholders.

Today, EstVCA represents the most influential firms and decision-makers across the industry, comprising leading Private Equity & Venture Capital, Mezzanine, Real Estate and Infrastructure funds, Family Offices, and institutional investors as well as various advisors active in the field.

In 2022:
* EstVCA member AUM has reached €3,08bn; 
* €449m was invested in 296 companies, €195m of that invested by PE/VC funds; 
* 19 divestments were made by our members, 13 of which were made by professional funds.
* The dry powder of EstVCA members as of 31.12.22 was €595m.

There is a total of 650 active portfolio companies with a number of employees reaching 23 800 people.

A tightly-knit organisation, the Management Board has three priorities:  
• To strengthen international network, with a special focus on Nordic-Baltic cooperation. 
• Developing the Estonian private equity and venture capital ecosystem. 
• Activities supporting the widening of network and sharing of industry know-how with our members and associate members. 

The goal of EstVCA is to support its members and associate members in all of their activities and in developing the PE/VC market. Our aim is to be the central organization for networking and knowledge sharing between our members and associate members as well as to support them in the development of their international network. Activities related to this include trainings, insights, seminars, regular communication and the annual Baltic VCA Summit: www.balticvcasummit.com
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Vencapital
Description:
Vencapital is an investor accelerator that provides entry-level experience for minorities and women seeking career opportunity in venture finance. We partner with Venture firms and Accelerator programs to build the talent muscle needed for growing new ventures 

Our Mission is to improve the pipeline of diverse investors and increase funding opportunities for venture builders

Name: International Accelerator

The International Accelerator’s 12-month program offers foreign-born entrepreneurs the unique opportunity to live, work and develop their concept in the United States. 
From free housing and office space to relocation and legal support, we provide everything our founders need to be successful, in addition to a powerful network of investors, experts and mentors who help them navigate the challenges of launching their company in the United States.

Apply: www.internationalaccelerator.com/apply

We have a single mandate - to help fledgling companies navigate the challenges of building generational businesses.

Description: Emergent Ventures is a Silicon Valley based early-stage VC firm that invests in Al and data-led B2B Software businesses and manages over $200M. Emergent invests early in high-potential entrepreneurs, leads seed rounds, and works closely with entrepreneurs to help them get to their next milestones faster. One of Emergent’s key assets is a tightly knit network of 100+ influential founders, senior corporate executives, and investors, who provide valuable insights and connections to the portfolio.

Name: allygatr
Description:
allygatr builds and invests into HR Tech companies and helps them thrive by providing high-quality expertise in Business Development, Sales, Marketing and IT. We provide deep operational support to entrepreneurs and help them build market-leading companies.

We design, validate and grow each venture by leveraging their existing assets from the origination of an idea to business launch. We have the knowledge and strategy that keeps businesses running smoothly after the birth of a portfolio.

Since 2012 we have assembled a group of experts in Sales, Marketing, Business Development and IT who are eager to transform and enhance tomorrow's working culture. Our HQ is located in Berlin and most of us prefer working remotely.

LaunchCapital enables great people to accomplish great things.

We will take on an active role with our portfolio companies depending on the needs and nature of the business.

Name: Ideaspace Ventures
Description:
Ideaspace Ventures is a Manila based VC that invests in early-stage startups in the Philippines and the region.

It is the only Philippine based VC backed by the largest network of strategic businesses that include mobility, healthcare, logistics, fintech, energy, digital infrastructure, and media.

Through flagship initiatives like the Ideaspace Accelerator Program, the HALO Fund, and the evergreen LEGACY Fund, Ideaspace Ventures provides comprehensive support with funding, resources, and strategic partnerships. These holistic and specialized capabilities enable startups to thrive and scale in Southeast Asia's fastest-growing digital economy.

Ideaspace Ventures is part of the Metro-Pacific and MVP group of companies, one of the Philippines' largest business conglomerates. Our mission is to find and fuel innovative ventures that fit into the MPIC and MVP Group ecosystem.  This offers our portfolio startups the unique opportunity to strengthen their success journey through strategic partnerships and investments by some of the country's leading enterprises.

Name: HealthQuest Capital
Description:
HealthQuest Capital is a private asset firm that provides capital to transformative healthcare companies. Our focus transcends healthcare modalities and sectors, honing in on commercial prospects that drive enhanced patient outcomes and elevate the efficiency of healthcare delivery. This includes medical products, diagnostics, healthcare IT, and innovative services.

With a portfolio spanning diversified healthcare sectors and geographical domains, particularly emphasizing the US, HealthQuest currently manages approximately $2 billion. Our approach is underscored by adaptability and an open-minded assessment of opportunities, complemented by ties to a diverse healthcare network. We actively seek investments that have innovative potential, capitalizing on our combined experience as investors and healthcare operators to fundamentally change the trajectory of a business.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Our commitment to building leading businesses is further realized through the growth program Bertelsmann Next, which is home to our own incubation efforts and buy-and-build strategies.

Name: Uniseed
Description:
Uniseed is Australia’s longest-running venture fund, operating at the Universities of Melbourne, Queensland, Sydney & New South Wales, and the CSIRO, with investment capital provided by these research organisations and investment partners including a leading Australian Superannuation Fund, UniSuper.

We are a unique commercialisation fund helping researchers from our partner research organisations turn their ideas into products and services. We support innovations that solve market problems and create a positive impact for our community. Uniseed invests over a broad range of technology sectors and has exited ten investments, to date.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: FFL Partners
Description: FFL Partners is a leading middle-market private equity firm that has been investing in high-quality companies since 1997. Based in San Francisco, FFL is a hyperspecialized, thematic investor focused on targeted areas within Healthcare and Tech-Enabled Services, two complementary sectors in which the firm has deep expertise and broad networks. FFL employs a proprietary sourcing and value creation strategy called the Sector Exploration and Expertise Development (“SEED”) process. The firm aims to partner with exceptional management teams and employs a high-engagement approach to accelerate growth at its businesses. FFL currently has over $6 billion of cumulative capital commitments. For additional information, please visit www.fflpartners.com.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: CapitalSpring
Description: CapitalSpring is a leading institutional investor with deep expertise in foodservice, multi-location business models and related industries. Since 2006, NCV and its member investors have deployed more than $90M into 67 high-potential ventures.

EQ2 Ventures is a Dubai-based evergreen investment company that invests in Seed to Series B-stage startup companies. It was incorporated as a spin-off of Equitrust, a corporate VC arm launched in 2015 by Choueiri Group to capture opportunities linked to the digital transformation of the Middle East.

Relying on a strong network of strategic investors and mentors, EQ2 Ventures helps talented entrepreneurs solve major consumers & businesses problems, build sustainable companies and create long-term value.

Name: Revel Partners
Description:
Revel Partners is an early-stage (Seed to Series A) venture capital fund focused on financing disruptive innovation in enterprise and B2B software. 

Based in New York with offices in Berlin, our mission is to champion the next generation of enterprise visionaries. Having founded and sold businesses in the sector, Revel capitalizes on its entrepreneurial heritage, global network, and business acumen to help grow our portfolio companies to unparalleled differentiation and scale.

Twitter: @RevelPartners

Our mission is to support entrepreneurs with big ideas and to help them build companies that make a significant impact on the lives of people in Vietnam and beyond. We partner with entrepreneurs and empower them with capital, access to our extensive business network, and local know-how from our years of experience in Vietnam and Southeast Asia.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Arctaris Impact Investors
Description:
Arctaris Impact Investors, LLC is a Boston-based impact investment firm with experience spanning more than 13 years and seven funds, with both debt and equity investments. Arctaris today is the largest impact-focused manager of Opportunity Zones nationally. The firm manages funds that invest in growth-oriented operating businesses and community infrastructure projects located in underserved communities. Founded in 2009, Arctaris has partnered with the Kresge Foundation, Richard King Mellon Foundation, Colorado Health Foundation, Harvard Business School Professor Michael Porter’s Initiative for a Competitive Inner City, and multiple other foundation, federal and state government agencies to invest in Opportunity Zones, inner cities, and targeted rural communities throughout the U.S., with the aim of delivering above-market investment returns alongside positive social impact. 

Arctaris utilizes an innovative capital structure, blending public capital from federal and state government agencies with private capital from institutional investors, foundations, and CRA banks. As a result, each of Arctaris’ funds is designed to provide attractive returns along with the benefit of principal-protection, while also spurring economic development in underserved communities.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: DFS Lab
Description: We invest in early-stage founders building the future of digital commerce in Africa. We back our portfolio with the funding, mentorship, and expertise they need to thrive.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Sunstone Partners
Description:
Sunstone Partners is a growth-oriented private equity firm that makes majority and minority investments in technology-enabled services and software businesses. Founded in 2015, the firm has over $1.7 billion committed to its three funds. Sunstone Partners has been recognized on Inc. Magazine’s “Founder-Friendly Investors” list* five years in a row, in 2020, 2021, 2022, 2023 and 2024.

*Inc. Founder Friendly Investors  – Awarded by Inc. Magazine in October each year. This determination is made following application from private equity / venture capital firms that have exited U.S.-based, founder-led, private portfolio companies. The submitted application includes references from portfolio companies. This award reflects Inc. Magazine’s determination each such year that Sunstone Partners is a founder friendly firm that entrepreneurs can collaborate and trust as they receive the financial support they need to help drive growth. A fee is paid to be considered for the award. The full extent of the range and scope of firms and data included in the evaluation is unknown. To compile the list, Inc. went straight to the source: entrepreneurs who have sold to private equity and venture capital firms. Founders fill out a questionnaire about their experiences partnering with private equity and venture capital firms and shared share data on how their portfolio companies have grown during these partnerships.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: The Conscious Fund
Description: We invest in global early-stage ventures in psychedelic medicine, helping deliver better outcomes for mental health, addiction, and pain.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: TR Capital Group
Description:
TR Capital is a leading secondary private equity investor in the Asia Pacific region. 

TR Capital provides liquidity solutions to owners of private equity assets through single asset and portfolio transactions. The firm makes significant investments in innovative leaders in the Technology, Next-Generation Consumer and Healthcare sectors across Asia. TR Capital is an active investor, working closely with its portfolio companies to optimize their business models and capital structures. 

Since its inception in 2007, TR Capital has closed five flagship funds, managed total capital commitments of close to US$1.5 billion, and completed 46 secondary investments. TR Capital’s sophisticated investor base includes sovereign wealth funds, pension funds, asset management firms, entrepreneurs, and family offices.

Name: Aventuur
Description:
Aventuur is the leading global creator of integrated surf, leisure and wellbeing developments. 

We are curating a global network of deeply connected communities, bound by a love of surfing, that provide transformational experiences that enhance wellbeing.

Our mission is to create exceptional surfing destinations and experiences that generate meaningful social and economic value. 

Founded in 2019, Aventuur is currently developing three surf parks in Perth (WA, Australia), Auckland (North Island, New Zealand) and Jacksonville (Florida, USA).

Aventuur is Wavegarden's largest partner globally, holding exclusive rights to its market-leading technology in a range of markets across North America and Australia, along with the country exclusivities for New Zealand, Singapore and Fiji.

With offices in Los Angeles and Perth, our team combines deep surf park expertise, investment rigour and passion to drive exceptional outcomes.

"Aventuur" is a hybrid of the Swedish word (“aventyr”) and the Dutch word (“avontuur”) for "adventure". 

“av·en·tuur” | (pron. \ a-ˈven-tor) (noun)           

(1.)  A daring and exciting endeavour calling for great enterprise and enthusiasm.

(2.) To arrive at, reach, arise, develop.

(3.) A bold undertaking.

Description:
Créé en 2003, CIC Private Debt gère aujourd’hui 3,5 milliards d’euros pour le compte d’investisseurs institutionnels et privés. Le CIC, sponsor historique, continue d’investir dans les fonds gérés par CIC Private Debt. 

Acteur de référence du financement désintermédié à destination des PME et ETI européennes, CIC Private Debt bénéficie d’un courant d’affaires dense grâce à sa présence historique sur le marché de la dette privée, avec une équipe de gestion dont l’expertise est reconnue sur le marché (N°1 dans le classement France Direct de DC Advisory au T2 2024) et de par sa proximité avec le groupe Crédit Mutuel Alliance Fédérale. Depuis sa création, CIC Private Debt a réalisé plus de 500 investissements. 

CIC Private Debt prend en compte les enjeux de durabilité dans ses activités et s’aligne sur l’approche du Crédit Mutuel Alliance Fédéral, première banque entreprise à mission. Des critères environnementaux, sociaux et de gouvernance sont intégrés à chaque étape du financement. Dotée d’une équipe ESG, la Société de Gestion s’appuie sur un processus de financement sélectif et un accompagnement des participations pour améliorer leurs pratiques. CIC Private Debt s’engage pour la promotion d’une finance responsable à travers des initiatives de place comme les Principes pour l'Investissement Responsable (PRI), la Charte Engagement de France Invest et l'Initiative Climat International.

Name: Health Innovation Capital
Description:
HIC is a pediatric and women’s health focused venture capital impact fund. The firm’s thesis  targets therapeutic, medical technology, and care service solutions that address the unmet medical needs of these patient populations.  HIC’s leadership and partnership philosophies are that of an active ally, which brings over 150 years of thought leadership and execution excellence in: pediatric patient care, clinical research outcomes, commercializing innovation, and providing investors with meaning alpha.  HIC is committed to supporting clinical growth, corporate maturation, market adoption, and tangible improvement in patient care quality and outcomes- attributes that are consistent with best-in-class healthcare solutions.  

To reinforce HIC’s patient centric impact investing and ESG strategy, the firm established The Health Innovation Capital Foundation, a 501c3 not-for-profit that donates an expected 10% of the General Partner’s Carry Interest, or 2% of the firm’s overall return performance, back to select centers of pediatric healthcare excellence. The objective is for each institution to leverage this donation to propel the evolution of early-stage pediatric, maternal/fetal health, perinatal, and postpartum medical research and innovation.

A core pillar of HIC’s operating model and investment thesis: to achieve an exceptional fund performance and a sustainable upper quartile net return on investment, the firm partners with entrepreneurs and business models that are dedicated to commercializing innovation that improves the quality of care and outcomes for pediatric and maternal health patients globally.

Name: TinySeed
Description:
We are the next generation of startup accelerator. 

TinySeed was started by Rob Walling and Einar Vollset, two serial entrepreneurs who saw a gap in the ability for non-unicorn startups to raise early-stage funding.

So we decided to fix that.

We announced in late 2018, and the response was beyond anything we imagined.

Hundreds and hundreds of tweets, re-tweets, likes, Hacker News upvotes, email responses... it was immediately obvious that there is pent up demand for this kind of alternative early-stage startup funding.

That’s the moment we knew we were onto something.

TinySeed is an accelerator, but it’s remote, runs for a full year, focuses on SaaS, and “non-unicorns” (companies that don’t aspire to grow at all costs to reach a $1B valuation).

To venture capitalists, a company doing $10m in annual revenue is a miss. To us, it’s a great business.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Cook M&A Advisory Services
Description:
Cook M&A is recognized as one of the leading buy side M&A advisory firms in the industry. Our M&A advisory team delivers transaction focused strategic advice to corporations, private equity funds, and executives in buy side transactions. We work with businesses across all industry sectors and sizes to understand the market, identify potential acquisition targets, assist in due diligence and resolve transaction issues throughout the process. Whether your business is investigating a platform or add-on acquisition, our research driven methodology has been proven to execute the best deals.

Sourcing deals through investment banking auctions is both inefficient and unsatisfying. We look for companies that create the right fit, rather than “just what’s on the market”.

We have developed proprietary tools, including FocusFirst and CEOVisions, to source proprietary deals that meet your investment goals.

FocusFirst is a strategic process through which we align a search process with the buyer’s investment goals to identify and develop prospective acquisition targets. CEOVisions is a strategic process through which we partner with exceptional executives who have an investment thesis with private equity backing to acquire industry leading companies.

Our company culture is characterized by transparency, flexibility and personal relationships, which has resulted in over 120 successful transactions, with enterprise values ranging from $5-800 million.

Description:

Xponentia aims to be a catalyst for such sustainable growth by providing capabilities & capital to our portfolio companies through our uniquely developed Value Creation Strategy. We are committed to partnering with extraordinary entrepreneurs in helping build exceptional businesses.
 
Investment philosophy
We generally look for fast growing business in need of equity financing with Enterprise Valuations less than INR 1000 Cr and positive EBITDA. Our target founders seek to maximise shareholder value and are equally excited about M&A or IPO at fair values. While we typically invest between INR 75-120 Cr in each investment, we can invest a larger amount (>INR 250 Cr) in select situations.

Tam, gdzie jedni widzą niepewność i zagrożenia w biznesie, my widzimy głównie nowe szanse i głodnych sukcesu menedżerów, gotowych zostać współwłaścicielami firm. Specjalizujemy się również w procesach konsolidacyjnych oraz wykupach spółek zagranicznych. Nasz know-how obejmuje także wsparcie w procesach sukcesji w firmach rodzinnych. 
Zespół Avallon MBO tworzą partnerzy, eksperci od inwestycji i doświadczeni analitycy, działający w wielu różnych obszarach biznesu.

Przez ponad 20 lat działalności braliśmy udział w ponad 100 transakcjach menedżerskich. W tym czasie zgromadziliśmy ponad 300 mln EUR na inwestycje. 

Wśród naszych sukcesów warto wymienić m.in. udany  wykup menedżerski spółki Velvet Care od globalnego koncernu, czy udział w stworzeniu wraz z menedżerami spółki Mangata Holding największej grupy metalowej w Polsce. Wsparliśmy również firmę Meyra w akwizycji zagranicznej, dzięki której wartość spółki wzrosła z 30 mln do ponad 300 mln zł. Jesteśmy również współautorami sprawnie przeprowadzonej sukcesji w Clovin SA – to polski producent środków czystości, dostarczający innowacyjne produkty do ponad 50 krajów na świecie.

Służymy firmom swoimi kwalifikacjami i tworzymy nowe możliwości biznesowe dzięki posiadanym kontaktom. Avallon MBO jako jedyny fundusz private equity w Polsce jest członkiem organizacji EPEC (European Private Equity Club), zrzeszającej niezależne fundusze z różnych krajów. Umożliwia to stałe rozszerzanie sieci kontaktów i jest pomocne przy planowanych akwizycjach spółek portfelowych.

Our mission is to honor God by creating a workplace where every team member can thrive and prosper. We’re a collective of 200+ mission aligned shareholders focused on purpose, people, and profits.

We own 6 businesses, both majority and minority stakes, and manage over $250M. 

Our Approach: We focus on people, buying and holding companies long-term with minimal debt. We retain the management team, close deals within 60 days, and protect the founders' culture and legacy.

Strategic Capital: We don’t use institutional investors. Our funding comes from aligned, value-driven partners who share our passion for growing businesses.

We are active investors, thoughtful advisors and dedicated problem-solvers with a passion for technology and a deep belief in the transformative power of digital-first businesses.

Our understandings and experiences lead us to be particularly interested in 2 broad themes which are Financial Inclusion (including new FinTech products and distribution of existing products) and B2B Enterprise Tech (including Deep Tech. and Enterprise SAAS) Apply to us if you think you're the right fit at https://www.windrose.capital/Apply

LOUD Capital is an alternative investment firm comprising early-stage venture capital, private growth equity, and wealth management services. We back early-stage founders solving the world’s most challenging problems, starting with human health. 

We are more than a check. We are trench-ready partners prepared to tackle the day-to-day challenges of building successful companies. We curate custom financing solutions, leverage our robust network of clinical and consumer/enterprise partners, and dig deep into our collective operator experience to drive company growth and return out-sized value to our global community and investors. We are data-driven, experience-backed, results-oriented, and people-centered. 

Building a world where health is optimized – for everyone. Join us.

Name: TM3 Capital
Description:
Somos uma Gestora de Recursos de Terceiros e investimos desde 2011 no setor de Venture Capital, Real Estate, e Bolsa de Valores.
Nosso fundador é um empreendedor de muito sucesso. Foi co-fundador e CEO da empresa Bematech, passou por todos os estágios de investimento, expandiu internacionalmente para todos os continentes e abriu capital na bolsa de valores em 2007. 
Ou seja, temos o DNA empreendedor na nossa equipe e entendemos os desafios e sonhos dos empreendedores. Sabemos como construir soluções escaláveis, eficientes e integradas de hardware e software. 
Além do capital, buscamos agregar experiência na gestão empresarial, focando em estratégia e governança corporativa. Apoiamos a construção e consolidação do tripé: finanças, recursos humanos e vendas.
Somos ativos na gestão. Gostamos de construir juntos, de mãos dadas. Investimos em empresas de alto potencial que entendem o valor que podemos agregar.

Princípios
• Performance: acreditamos que execução diferenciada é a principal alavanca para o sucesso.
• Governança: buscamos sempre transparência no que fazemos, entendendo que a confiança de nossos stakeholders é o nosso principal ativo.
• Consistência: entendemos que os resultados são fruto de um trabalho de longo prazo, construído ‘tijolo a tijolo’, e que a disciplina de trabalho é o que gera reconhecimento.
• Inovação: acreditamos no poder da tecnologia e da inovação para trazer novos conceitos, que vão além e que quebram paradigmas.
• Ética: parcerias de sucesso começam e se mantêm com a comunhão de valores e princípios. Nada substituiu ou justifica a falta de ética, nos negócios e na vida pessoal.

Our customised approach combines deep insight into the dynamics of companies and markets with close collaboration at all levels of the client organisation. This ensures that our clients achieve sustainable competitive advantage, build more capable organizations, and secure lasting results.

Development Consultancy

We work with partners in the public and private sectors, in both developing and developed countries. Name: Colossa Ventures
Description:
Colossa Ventures is a growth investment platform backing bold, innovation-led companies solving real-world problems in India—to generate alpha for investors and create meaningful impact across the broader economy.

We invest across high-impact sectors such as life sciences, climate tech, sustainability, edtech, deep tech, and financial inclusion—targeting scalable business models built on strong governance, sharp execution, and future-ready thinking.

Founded by seasoned financial leaders Ashu Suyash (Former MD & CEO, CRISIL; Former Country Head, Fidelity International India; ex-Citi banker) and Vandana Rajadhyaksha (ex-Partner, ICICI Ventures and Aditya Birla Private Equity), Colossa brings decades of capital markets experience, deep investment expertise, and a strong commitment to founder success.

Colossa is a ₹500 crore SEBI-registered Alternative Investment Fund (AIF) with a differentiated investment strategy:

· The majority of the fund is dedicated to businesses where women are key value drivers—as founders, co-founders, or primary economic beneficiaries.

· The remaining corpus is deployed with a gender-agnostic lens across high-potential, innovation-first ventures in climate tech, sustainability, and inclusive growth sectors.

We apply gender-smart investing not as a limit, but as a strategic edge—unlocking value in one of India’s fastest-growing and most underrepresented economic segments.

At the heart of our approach is the proprietary Colossa 3C framework—Capital, Capability, and Confidence—which ensures founders receive not just funding, but the strategic and operational support they need to scale.

With a growing portfolio, Colossa is building a distinctive ecosystem of category-defining businesses—grounded in real-world relevance, committed to values, and designed for long-term returns.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Phoenix Holdings
Description:
Phoenix Holdings is a pioneering family investment office in Vietnam. We apply “Built-to-Last” thinking, based on our observations that the most successful VC-PE investments are in companies built on the quality of endurance. That is how we approach, attract and build with best-in-class entrepreneurs in their respective fields of the startup ecosystem. 

Phoenix’s DNA is the culmination of Mr. Henry Nguyen - its founder’s long history in both traditional finance and high-tech ventures. Phoenix covers the entire financial services value chain, including a commercial bank, a consumer finance company, an asset management company, a securities brokerage and more. These licensed "Brick & Mortar" businesses all operate under their own professional management teams and are heavily focused on growing in their respective segments. This "traditional" side of the business is complemented with tech-backed ventures including a Digital Bank, a BNPL, a Payment Company, a Micro SME Lending Company, a Salary on Demand Company as well as a wide range of other companies within the Phoenix ecosystem. 

In short, we believe Vietnam’s billion-dollar opportunity to be less in pure disruption through Fintech and more in the convergence of Fintech and conventional finance, underpinned by being fully licensed with regulatory compliance. Aside from the previously mentioned businesses in the financial sector, our portfolio includes business in F&B/Consumer as well (McDonald’s). Some of our tech-backed ventures include Timo (Digital Bank), Kredivo Vietnam (BNPL), Moca (Payment Platform, Acquired by Grab), Advance (Salary on Demand Platform) and First AI (AI Driven Media Platform).

Most of Blue Sage’s investments are in established, profitable companies with $20 million to $200 million of revenue and $5 million to $25 million of cash flow. Blue Sage invests in a variety of industries, with each initial investment ranging from $25 million to $60 million with the ability to scale up.

Name: Riverside Acceleration Capital
Description:
Business building has certainly changed with the advent of modern cloud paradigms. These platforms have shifted the way products are built and companies are scaled, simultaneously offering reduced technology risk with improved capital efficiency. As a result, today’s software companies are scaling faster than ever before, against an ever broadening set of market opportunities. Yet, despite these innovations in business building, funding innovation has not kept pace.

We believe there remains a time for traditional venture models, but that often an alternative is needed. Riverside Acceleration Capital gives companies the capital needed to grow their business, launch new products and maximize value without diluting ownership, control, or optionality. We do so by delivering the right amount of capital at the right stages of growth and development. Our unique model and backing help us to support our companies across their entire lifecycle.

The Urban Innovation Fund provides capital and regulatory support to entrepreneurs creating scalable solutions to tough urban challenges – helping them grow into tomorrow's most valued companies.

Name: Lumma Ventures
Description:
Lumma Ventures is building a network-led accelerator designed to help the most ambitious European founders scale into the U.S. market with speed, structure, and long-term support. We focus on early-stage companies with clear potential for global expansion—especially those prepared to validate, sell, and operate in the United States—because we believe U.S. market access is one of the strongest accelerators of growth, capital formation, and category leadership for EU startups.

Lumma strongly believes that ecosystems are strengthened through partnership, not isolation. Our network is designed to integrate trusted partners and enabling services into the founder journey, creating a repeatable support layer founders can rely on—across markets, across cohorts, and across time. 

Our vision is to scale Lumma across Europe through a structured, quality-controlled expansion into multiple EU countries, powered by a growing network of local Managing Partners and Venture Partners. As the network grows, Lumma becomes a cross-border engine: more credible local access, more consistent execution, and a stronger bridge for founders moving from EU market entry to U.S. expansion.

Name: TRANGELS
Description:
TRANGELS Finansal Hizmetler A.Ş. yatırımcılar tarafından Türkiye’nin en gözde ve bilinirliği en yüksek ayrıca gelişmiş ve gelişmekte olan ülkelerde konuyla ilgili kişilerce bilinirliği olması düşünülerek İstanbul da kurulan “İş ve Girişim” geliştirme şirketidir.

Kurucular, farklı meslek guruplarından değişik uzmanlık alanlarında ve farklı sektörlerde profesyonel yöneticilik ya da girişimcilik yapmış çoğunluğu “melek yatırımcı” sertifikası sahip kişilerdir. Organizasyon içinde eşit ortaklık payı ve eşit haklara sahiptirler. Bunun temel nedeni de, her görüşe eşit değer verilmesi, kararların objektif  işletmecilik kuralları doğrultusunda alınabilmesi ve bilim ,akıl ve deneyimlerin optimum ölçülerde yönetime yansıtılabilmesidir.
Bu özellikleriyle, kurumsal yönetim ilkelerine ve etik kurallara uygun olarak yönetilen, hızlı ve objektif karar alma yeteneğine sahip bulunmaktadır.

Şirketin amacı; iş, bilim, ve teknoloji alanlarındaki girişimlerin erken aşamalarında ve desteklendiğinde kısa sürede ülke veya dünya çapında kayda değer fayda yaratacağı öngörülen projelere destek vermektir. Bu projeler buluş, veni fikir veya yeni uygulamalar içermektedir. Girişimçilerin bağımsızlık ve, yenilikçilik özelliklerini engellemeden ve ilişkide olduğu deneyimli ortakları ve kadroları ile iş ve finansman boyutlarında gereksinim duyulan kaynak havuzunu girişimcilere sunmak, ve desteksiz işlerini sürdürebilecek seviyeye getirmek hedeflenmektedir.

Ülkemiz ekonomisi ve sosyal yaşamında en önemli sorunlardan birisi, başlatılan işin sonunun getirilememesidir. TRANGELS Finansal Hizmetler A.Ş. kurucuları; her fikrin değerlendirilmesi ve ekonomiye değer katacak düzeye getirilmesi gerektiği inancındadır. Bu hedeflere ulaşmak için gelecek vaat eden, gerek ekonomiye gerekse sosyal yaşama değer katacak her türlü fikir değerlendirilecektir. Bu projelere yatırım yapmayı ve bünyesinde ki bilgi ve tecrübeyi kullanarak bu girişimlerin hedefler doğrultusunda büyümesine yardımcı olmayı hedefler.

Name: Maxburg Capital
Description:
Maxburg is an investment management company focusing on Germany and the German-speaking markets. Set up by three partners with long-standing and successful track records as entrepreneurs and investors in public and private equity, Maxburg is actively seeking out long-term investments in stable and profitable small and medium-sized companies with a view towards lasting and sustainable value creation.

With a total fund volume and capital commitments of more than €1bn, Maxburg is able to draw on an exceptionally flexible investment mandate: we do not only actively invest using a broad range of equity and quasi-equity means – ranging from straight equity to mezzanine and related  options – but are also able to take sizeable positions with publicly listed companies. We take minority as well as majority positions with our investment companies. We consider ourselves as friendly activist in style and approach. On a deal-by-deal perspective, we would usually commit between €10m and €100m per transaction.

Our ultimate aim is to create real and lasting long term value across and beyond the business cycle. We are happy to leave short-term and momentum-driven investments to other market participants.

We believe in the values of an open and trustworthy partnership together with our investors, portfolio companies as well as management. By doing so, we not only help to create great companies but also hope to maximize the long-term upside for all parties involved.

Maxburg is fully-owned by its management and partners.

Pact is an early-stage venture capital fund partnering with mission-driven founders who are building technology to solve the world's most pressing challenges.

Description:
Scrub Capital is a venture capital firm powered by clinicians, operators, and digital health experts, combining deep industry knowledge with investment expertise to drive strategic health care investments. Our platform draws from our community of 650+ medical professionals who actively participate in every step of the investment process, from deal sourcing to post-investment support. 

Our members are not just health care professionals but founders, builders, operators, investors, and clinical leaders, uniquely positioned to reshape health tech startups through strategic investment and operational insight.

This unique approach allows us to identify and nurture early-stage startups with high potential for both outsized financial returns and meaningful impact on health care’s future.

Scrub Capital is actively investing. If you have promising opportunities, you can learn more and submit investment opportunities here: 

https://tinyurl.com/yc5ayua5


Scrub Capital is a venture capital firm that operates with the support of the broader Clinicians Who VC community- amplifying our reach and impact.

Name: Pureland Global Venture
Description:
Pureland Global Venture (“Pureland”) is a global healthcare venture capital firm. As Enterprise Singapore’s designated co-investment partner, our mission is to deliver medical solutions and savings to over 100 million people around the world. At Pureland, we look for visionary entrepreneurs who combine integrity, intelligence, and passion to address pressing healthcare challenges innovatively and ethically.
 
Focused on early to growth-stage investments, Pureland specializes in sectors including medical devices, digital health, healthcare services, and AI-empowered solutions. We have particular interests in areas such as oncology, ophthalmology, brain health, orthopedics, cardiology, and other chronic disease management. Our globally diversified portfolio comprises 60% allocation in the U.S. and the remaining 40% distributed across Singapore, India, and the EU.
 
Our engagement extends beyond financial investment. We provide robust post-investment support, focusing on strategy development, distribution, cross-border expansion, and manufacturing/OEM partnerships. We strive to establish an ecosystem that fosters collaboration among start-ups, government bodies, clinical, investment, and commercial partners. This approach ensures that portfolio companies receive comprehensive support, aiding in their growth and impactful contribution to the healthcare sector.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Incubate Fund
Description:
インキュベイトファンドは、創業来総額1,250億円以上の資金を運用し、関連ファンドを通じて400社以上のスタートアップへ投資活動を行うなど、創業前後のシードステージに特化したベンチャーキャピタルとして国内最大規模の実績を有しています。長い期間に渡り、スタートアップの創業期において投資活動を続けてこられたのも、起業家の皆様やコミュニティとの信頼関係を構築し続けられた証だと考えています。

私達が大切していることに「志ある起業家の挑戦を、愚直に支え抜く」というモットーがあります。

これは、私達も起業家と同じ目線でしっかりと経営・事業について考え抜くと同時に、事業を成長させていく中で訪れる大変な局面でも起業家が安心して事業に集中できるような良きパートナーでありたいと真剣に考えているものです。事業の成長に必要な資金調達についても、リードインベスターとして起業家が事業に集中できるよう徹底的にサポートしています。 スタートアップの主役は起業家です。ベンチャーキャピタルである私達は黒子に徹し、時に縁の下の力持ちとして時に共にスクラムを組んで、共に事業を創造していくことがハンズオン支援という言葉に集約されないインキュベイトファンドならではの起業支援だと考えています。

また、より創業期に近い起業家との接点として、2010年からシードアクセラレーションプログラム「Incubate Camp」を運営をしています。

参加者の中には当プログラムを経て大きく資金調達し急成長を遂げたスタートアップが多数あり、スタートアップの創業・飛躍の場として、またベンチャーキャピタリストのコアコミュニティの場として活用されています。 本プログラムは起業を考える全てアントレプレナーにとって、より事業の発射角度を上げていける登竜門として社会インフラとなることを目指していきます。

私達は、今後も「志ある起業家の挑戦を、愚直に支え抜く」をモットーに、起業家の良きパートナーとして新規事業の創造・スタートアップの支援に邁進していきます。

We have built a portfolio of over 400 companies in Asia, taking 12 companies to public and 20 companies to M&A exit since 2010.

We currently have offices in Tokyo, Singapore, Bangalore, and San Francisco, covering Japan, Southeast Asia, India, and United States respectively.

Name: Icos Capital
Description:
Icos Capital is a ClimateTech Venture Capital Fund, backing ambitious founders tackling our most urgent and complex challenges. Specialising in Food systems, Chemical & Materials, Sustainable industry process & digital technologies and Decarbonization, we seek to find the biggest opportunities and most promising solutions for change.

Since our inception in 2006, we've developed a collaborative venturing model that brings startups/scaleups and corporations together. The corporations we partner with continue to play an active part in our funds and continue to benefit from our extensive global network and deal flow strategy. The startups we've backed have disrupted and led their respective markets and have benefited from the Icos approach of considering financial, social and environmental returns in equal measure.

Description: Invstt is an integrated investment tech platform enabling global networking & investment ease among founders & investors. Backed with global fund structures, invstt offers deal discovery, connection with global founders & investors, online documentation, cross-border investment & portfolio tracking, all at one platform. Apart from dashboard experience & cross-border investments, Invstt’s integrated ecosystem offers great networking opportunities with a curated 20,000+ global investors community from 65 countries. One can join as an individual investor, build their own investor community or run a syndicate on the platform. Our platform boasts 70+ global domain experts & angel networks.
