Name: Great Range Capital
Description:
It’s simple. We buy businesses in the Midwest. We are from here, we are based here, and we live by the values that define the Midwest. 

Great Range Capital has a unique combination of institutional grade experience and Midwestern values. They’re basic values that we learned from our parents, teachers and coaches. They work here in the Midwest because other people, regardless of whether they’re entrepreneurs or family-based business owners, learned the same values in the same way and same places we did.

Yet our experience with firms on the East Coast completing more than $5 billion worth of deals means we have best-in-class processes, deep and connected networks, broad industry and transaction experience and the ability to customize solutions.

Business owners and management teams are bringing on an investment partner. Great Range Capital is investing in the hard work they’ve done that brought the business success. That “gut feel” when it’s a good match comes from values. And it’s institutional-grade experience that says it’s a wise match.

Business owners and management teams are seeking more than just an investor.  GRC can be a unique and valued partner with a shared Midwestern culture and a best-in-class approach to private equity.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: The Moringa Partnership/Fund
Description:
Moringa Partnership, a subsidiary of Edmond de Rothschild, is an impact investment team specialized on the financing of the agro-ecology transition. It currently manages the Moringa Fund, a €84m private equity vehicle dedicated to agroforestry companies in Africa and Latin America, and the Agroforestry Technical Assistance Facility (ATAF). The Moringa Fund is invested in 10 portfolio companies.

Moringa targets profitable large scale agroforestry projects with high environmental and social impact, located in Latin America and Sub-Saharan Africa. The fund makes equity investments of EUR4-10m into projects and adds value via its technical skills, environmental and social know how and global network. The fund leverages the inherent sustainability of agroforestry to distinguish itself from other land-based investment approaches and to build genuine sustainability into its projects.

Agroforestry will become a central element in the global response to the growing demand for sustainable agricultural and timber products, global warming, biodiversity conservation and poverty alleviation. It combines trees and crops or livestock under conditions which help to generate synergies, and, therefore better land management, higher productivity, higher and more sustainable income for local populations, reduced risks and positive environmental impacts. 

Moringa’s vision is to create economic benefits for investors and local communities while contributing to building environmental and social resilience of land-use. We are looking for partners to develop sound and sustainable projects.

For more information on the fund, please contact us at contact@moringapartnership.com.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

We also connect business angels with international investors around Europe and are actively helping to further contribute to the development of the Slovenian and regional Startup ecosystem.

Name: Asymmetric
Description:
We partner with disruptive technology companies across software, marketplaces, fintech, and digital health by offering founders, early investors, and limited partners the most transparent, research-driven, and operator-centric capital.

We believe it’s important to have a meaningful point of view on a space and sector *before* meeting teams so their most precious resource - time - is well spent.

Our investment themes and specific company targets are substantially generated by a network of operators: a special class of Limited Partners which we call our Advisory Partners. We have strong conviction that operators who are actually in the arena each day are best positioned to identify the differentiated people and ideas we want to back.

We reject wholeheartedly the growing sense that VCs should be hands off cheerleaders - we want to be tremendously helpful and positive thought partners on a weekly basis. We believe founders and early employees deserve honest, empathic capital partners who are supportive, emotionally invested and transparent. We take extreme personal accountability for helping to make each of our portfolio companies successful.

We participate alongside and after world-class investors, and encourage our extensive network in the later-stage growth capital industry to follow behind us when companies have demonstrated successful scale.

We believe the best founders come from diverse backgrounds and we enter first meetings with no preconceived notions of the “correct” background for a founder. We don’t compromise in one area, however: unquestioned integrity.

Description:
CataCap is a private equity buy-out fund.

CataCap invests in Danish SMEs that hold a significant development potential and have an innovative business model with long-term sustainability.

CataCap's business concept is to act as a catalyst for sustainable step changes through a systematic and consistent approach to strengthening business development, operational processes and management development in active interaction the managements and employees of the portfolio companies.

CataCap operates with an extended organisation in which CataCap's own employees are supplemented by Operating Partners, Development Partners and Executive Advisors. The team for each investment are recruited from this group.
 
CataCap is a proactive and dedicated owner. The systematic hands-on approach to developing CataCap's businesses is intended to increase both the speed and sustainability of company step changes, thereby creating long-term value for all stakeholders as well as stable excess returns for investors.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: QuattroR
Description:
QuattroR SGR S.p.A. is a management company. Incorporated in 2016, it manages a fund of over €700m (first closing April 2017). QuattroR targets Italian companies with solid business fundamentals in need of resources to develop growth and relaunch strategies. Limited Partners of the QuattroR Fund are prominent Italian institutional investors.

Mission
The mission of QuattroR is to invest in and relaunch Italian businesses with solid market and industrial fundamentals in need to fund their growth strategy. QuattroR also invests in businesses facing temporary financial and economic distress. The Fund aims at strengthening and relaunching these companies by providing adequate financial and managerial resources to support the development, also through potential build-up processes also internationally.

QuattroR value creation drivers:
Recapitalise: provide businesses with the necessary financial resources to achieve operating efficiency and rebalance the capital structure
Reinforce the capital structure: primarily by new equity injection and/or rebalance of the debt structure through restructuring and/or refinancing initiatives
Reorganise: rethink the company’s operating and business model; review the managerial structure and governance in alignment with existing shareholders
Relaunch: support the development and the growth of the investee companies, including the injection of additional financial resources to boost growth also through add on acquisitions.
QuattroR has raised significant financial resources fully dedicated to Italian companies and has a flexible investment approach, encompassing the entire spectrum of equity, equity-like and debt instruments. Typically QuattroR has a “money in” approach although it has the flexibilities to consider purchase of stakes.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: DigitalDx Ventures
Description:
DigitalDx Ventures is a majority woman-owned impact fund on a mission to transform global healthcare through early, accurate, and accessible diagnosis. We invest at the intersection of AI, big data, and medical innovation to address some of the world’s most pressing health challenges — including breast and other cancers, cardiovascular and kidney diseases, Alzheimer’s, and mental health.

Our team brings together successful Silicon Valley digital health investors, as well as leading medical and legal experts, to identify and support groundbreaking technologies that:

Enable earlier, more precise detection

Minimize invasiveness in diagnosis and treatment

Lower costs and expand access to care

At DigitalDx, we believe that smarter diagnostics save lives. By backing bold entrepreneurs and next-generation platforms, we aim to improve health outcomes for millions — while delivering meaningful returns and measurable impact.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Sixty Degree Capital
Description: Built on strength and balance, Sixty Degree Capital invests in the evolving areas of biopharmaceuticals, healthcare platforms and technology. Engaging with companies throughout North America, we aim to remove the barriers between us and our potential in order to make present visions a reality.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: RippleX Fellowship
Description:
Learn more here: https://linktr.ee/ripplexfellowship

The RippleX Fellowship is a 12-week extracurricular program powered by Ripple Ventures. Throughout the school term, students are coached and taught the intricacies of venture funds, and startup operations/financing. It is a remote program that connects students from Canada & the United States with a common interest of becoming better equipped as aspiring VC’s, founders, or employees at tech startups. It builds the skillsets, knowledge, and experience that otherwise are rare to acquire as a student.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: UNLEASH Capital Partners
Description:
UNLEASH Capital Partners is a Japanese venture capital firm focused on early-stage fintech and financial services in India, with a strong emphasis on driving financial inclusion.

Backed entirely by Japanese capital, including leading Japanese banks and corporates, UNLEASH is uniquely positioned to bridge the gap between Japanese capital and India's evolving financial ecosystem.

The firm’s inaugural fund, valued at USD 35 million, typically makes initial investments ranging from USD 300K to USD 2 million.

Vision: Enable a world where everyone can determine their future.

Mission: Maximise opportunity and resilience for everyone through extending financial inclusion.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Mars Shot Ventures
Description:
Mars Shot is an Angel fund spearheaded by Harshil & Shashank - founders of Razorpay. We invest in early-stage startups. We believe that for India to be a $10Tn economy, we need the startup ecosystem to increase its impact manifolds.

We are a group of experienced operators and entrepreneurs that have gone through the journey of building a unicorn from nothing. Our team has experience across product, design, sales, marketing, finance, operations and strategy.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Venture Lab Niterra Group
Description:
Our global Venture Lab was established in April 2018 as an open innovation and collaboration team to partner with and invest in the brightest creative and entrepreneurial minds around the world.
 
Through internal innovation projects and startup partnerships, our global team of more than 300, backed by a $100M fund, is transforming the industries of mobility, food, energy, clean air, wound care, women’s health and home health to build a better future for all of us.
 
Our Venture Lab is the doorway for us, as future partners and collaborators, to launch innovation projects that will improve the quality of life for all.
 
Accelerate your business into the next stage and contact us at venturelab@ngksparkplugs.com.
 
Find us on social media using #TeamVentureLab #BeyondCeramics
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Long Arc Capital
Description: Long Arc Capital is a private equity firm dedicated to building and scaling breakthrough businesses. The firm operates with an investor/owner mindset and partners with entrepreneurs and management teams to build sustainably successful companies.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Positron Ventures
Description:
Positron Ventures helps and funds Europe-based scientist-entrepreneurs who are pursuing moonshots for (planetary) health.

We invest in scientist-entrepreneurs working on a breakthrough in their field, across the natural sciences. We back teams from day one in their pursuit of solving a major global challenge. We do this with pre-seed investments and, wherever needed, support across all aspects of building a company.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Solum Capital
Description: A Solum Capital é uma gestora de private equity especializada em empresas do middle market – negócios com grande potencial de crescimento e geração de valor. Atuamos como sócios estratégicos, próximos do dia a dia das companhias, apoiando a implementação de melhores práticas de gestão, melhorias operacionais e expansão de mercado.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Breakaway Ventures
Description:
Overview
INVESTORS IN BRAND
We invest in consumer brands at a point of inflection where we can accelerate business growth and value creation.  We are passionate about working with extraordinary people to build extraordinary brands.

CONSUMER FOCUSED
We specialize in what we know best.  We invest in consumer brands.  Period.  We have developed our capabilities and network to drive success through a focused approach.

APPROACH
We invest in emerging brands with >$2MM Revenue that seek $3MM to $8MM in Growth Capital.  We believe that investments this size enable us to be a meaningful partner and add meaningful value.

BREAKAWAY ADVANTAGE
We have access to exceptional deal flow.  Our established rolodex enables great partnerships that drive growth.  We are active investors with the ability to influence the outcome of our investments.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: JUPTER
Description:
JUPTER is an ecosystem platform to help Find, Fund & Launch the companies & networks of tomorrow. The ecosystem platform is optimized around systematic origination of technology leveraging open innovation & science-based development for startups & their early collaborators. We are looking for the bold and brave adventurers, for the courageous and crazy, the outliers and the makers of the future.
#Jovian #OpenScienceOrigination #InDWeTrust (Data, Diversity, Decentralization)
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Evok Innovations
Description:
Evok Innovations is a leading climate-focused venture capital firm investing in hard tech solutions for heavy industry. We partner with exceptional entrepreneurs to scale transformative technologies in our
focus areas of energy, critical minerals, industrial optimization, and adaptation and resilience.

Launched in 2016, Evok was built on a mission to collaborate with industry to scale transformative energy technologies across North America. With Fund II in 2022, we expanded this mandate, bringing in strategic partners
across new industrial verticals, including critical minerals.

Beyond capital, Evok delivers deep technical expertise, real-world operating experience, and unparalleled industry access through our network of global strategic partners. We work closely with our portfolio companies to bridge innovation to market adoption, accelerate commercialization, and create clear pathways to scale and exit.

Evok aims to empower the next generation of entrepreneurs to lead the charge in developing transformative technologies that redefine industries and drive meaningful change.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: HAT SGR
Description:
HAT SGR è una società di gestione del risparmio indipendente, attiva dal 2007 nel mercato degli investimenti alternativi. 

Con capitali raccolti per circa 600 milioni di euro, opera attraverso fondi di Private Equity specializzati nel mercato tecnologico italiano e, più in generale, nei settori TMT (Technology, Media & entertainment, Telecommunications).

Negli anni HAT SGR si è conquistata un posizionamento unico nel mercato italiano, grazie alla forte specializzazione in innovazione e tecnologia, una grande attenzione alla mitigazione del rischio e l’ottenimento di rendimenti superiori al valore massimo registrato dai peer europei con ritorni medi pari a circa 3x volte i capitali investiti. Negli ultimi 6 anni, è stata 6 volte in nomination al “Premio Dematté - Private Equity of the Year” promosso da AIFI insieme a Intesa Sanpaolo e EY, risultando vincitrice 3 volte. 

Con 37 operazioni di investimento completate - tra cui Assist Digital, Burke & Burke, GPI, Huma Therapeutics, Lutech, Primat, Safety21, SIA e Wiit - oltre 50 acquisizione di nuove società con le aziende in portafoglio (add-on), 29 exit e 2 quotazioni in Borsa, HAT SGR continua a creare valore per gli investitori, le aziende acquisite, i team di investimento, il management delle partecipate e la comunità in cui operano.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Alberta Enterprise Corporation (AEC)
Description:
We invest in venture capital funds, not companies.

Formed as an independent corporation in 2008, Alberta Enterprise is a key component of the Government of Alberta’s goal of building a more sustainable, diversified technology industry in Alberta, one where home-grown innovation is encouraged and technology entrepreneurs have greater access to venture capital.

Our mission is to promote the development of Alberta’s venture capital (VC) industry. We achieve this by investing in VC funds that finance early stage technology companies and that have a commitment to Alberta – including a full-time presence in the province. We also support Alberta’s VC ecosystem by connecting investors, entrepreneurs, and experienced technology veterans who share our passion for building a bright, innovative Alberta.

In the long term, our activities will help Alberta claim a larger share of the venture capital invested in Canada. We anticipate venture funds will be more active in pursuing investments here with local lead investors and in looking at Alberta-based companies and technologies. Alberta’s investment community will also be better networked within Alberta, across Canada and internationally.

- See more at: http://www.alberta-enterprise.ca/?page_id=13#sthash.vW9BIrL1.dpuf
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: VESTBERRY
Description:
Vestberry is a portfolio management solution tailored to the needs of VC investors seeking a data-driven advantage. 

Our platform consolidates vital portfolio information, enabling venture capital professionals to concentrate on extracting valuable insights from their data, rather than managing it. Leveraging a no-code approach, Vestberry empowers users to effortlessly construct their data infrastructure and seamlessly integrate with hundreds of data sources for unparalleled analytical capabilities. Trusted by top-tier fund managers from around the globe, who have come to rely on Vestberry as a partner in delivering excellence in portfolio management.

Find more information on https://vestberry.com/
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Cornell Capital
Description: Cornell Capital is a U.S.-based private equity firm with approximately $6 billion of AUM and offices in New York and Hong Kong. Leveraging decades of global investment experience, the firm takes a disciplined approach to investing across the consumer, financial services, and industrials/business services sectors, often in companies that can benefit from the firm's Asia presence and cross-border expertise. Founded in 2013 by Senior Partner Henry Cornell, the former Vice Chairman of Goldman Sachs' Merchant Banking Division, the firm is led by a highly seasoned team with decades of shared investment experience. We take a value-driven, partnership oriented approach to investing, targeting companies with significant potential to unlock growth through our industry, geographic, and value-creation expertise.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Alta Growth Capital
Description:
Alta Growth Capital manages funds directed towards a diversified portfolio of private equity and equity-linked investments in middle market companies operating in Mexico.  We target sectors benefiting from the rising domestic consumption of goods and services in the Mexican market, including industries such as consumer goods, financial services, housing, healthcare, education, entertainment, and selective manufacturing and industrial sectors.
 
The team at Alta Growth Capital is comprised of Mexican and U.S. nationals with deep networks and significant business experience, both operating and investing in companies.  In addition to our investment, we bring these resources to bear on each portfolio company to create the best possible outcomes for all parties involved.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: XFactor Ventures
Description:
XFactor Ventures is looking for female founders and mixed-gender teams attacking billion dollar market opportunities. We invest $150k into pre-seed or seed stage rounds and provide advice, mentorship, and connections to help our companies succeed. The XFactor investing partners are current successful operators, who have collectively raised over $550M in capital for their own companies, hired thousands of employees, and who are still in the trenches every day.

www.xfactor.ventures
https://twitter.com/xfactorventures
https://medium.com/@XFactorVentures
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals
Location: New York, San Francisco, LA, Boston, Seattle, Denver

Name: Privilège Ventures
Description:
Privilège Ventures is a Swiss, FINMA-authorized, early-stage venture capital firm. Our team brings deep expertise in entrepreneurship, management, finance, and governance, all essential for sustainable success.

Driven by trust, passion, and vision, we champion bold founders building transformative technologies. At Privilège Ventures, we invest with conviction, fostering innovation that shapes a better future for people, businesses, and the planet.

We back bold, ambitious, and resilient founders driving breakthrough innovations in HealthTech, CleanTech and AgriFoodTech. Investing across Europe, with a focus on Switzerland, we support gender mixed startups from pre-seed to Series A, aiming to be a relevant and strategic partner.

Our commitment goes beyond returns, we build lasting value, drive innovation, and create impact. For those who share our vision, we are a partner you can trust.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: AltaIR Capital
Description:
AltaIR Capital is an international early-stage venture investment company. 
The company invests in global startups with teams mainly from the USA, Israel, and Europe. The company’s investment focus is on Productivity Tools/Future of work,  AI, SaaS, Fintech, Insuretech, and Digital Health.

AltaIR manages early and growth-stage investment vehicles as well as a pre-IPO fund. 

AltaIR Capital was founded by prominent entrepreneur and angel investor Igor Ryabenkiy in 2005. The first two funds were fully invested and have been paid back. Profitability has reached more than 17x on invested capital. Current funds are in the active investment stage and already show healthy profitability and have very promising portfolios.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Omni Ventures
Description: Omni Ventures is the Manufacturing Tech VC. We are engineers turned VCs. We believe in supporting the next generation of entrepreneurs from the earliest possible stage.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Entropia Capital
Description:
At Entropia Capital, we partner with founders who don’t just build companies — they redefine industries.

We invest in, build, and advise ventures at the intersection of enterprise tech, fintech, and frontier tech. Our approach to private equity combines strategic capital with a global network of thinkers, operators, and investors.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Indian VCs
Description:
Indian VCs is a global venture community. A space where founders, venture capitalists, and investors come together to connect, learn, and grow.

We build an ecosystem that accelerates ideas, supports people at every stage, and creates transparency in venture. We see a future where India’s brightest ideas don’t just succeed at home, but make a global impact.

We play the long game. With curiosity, hunger, patience, and a bias for supporting underdogs, we’re here to grow India’s venture ecosystem – from 0 to 1, 1 to 10, and 10 to 100.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Stray Dog Capital
Description:
Stray Dog Capital is an early-stage Venture Capital fund investing in innovative, early-stage companies across the food, beverage, and biotechnology sectors that drive a healthier, humane, and more sustainable future. 
With over 40 years of combined experience, Stray Dog Capital supports its portfolio of investments with our team of entrepreneurs, operators, advisors, and investors. Since 2015, we’ve made more than 45 investments in early-stage food, food tech, and biotech companies that are transforming the food system, including Beyond Meat, Kite Hill, and Upside Foods.

Stray Dog Capital strives for a world where: 
-We achieve high-quality, efficient, and sustainable food systems that support the wellbeing of our planet
-We promote healthy and great-tasting food alternatives to consumers around the globe
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Longbow Capital
Description:
Longbow Capital Inc. is a private equity investment management company based in Calgary, Alberta that invests in the North American energy, power and technology sectors.

We invest in innovative companies that are doing things differently; companies that help bring energy to the world in the most efficient, cost effective and environmentally responsible manner.

Since being founded in 1997, Longbow has been a long-term strategic partner and an engaged and effective shareholder in over 150 high-growth investments.

For over 25 years, Longbow has employed a disciplined investment strategy which is simple to describe, though difficult to replicate.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Shaper Impact Capital
Description: Shaper Impact Capital [SIC] is an impact investor newsletter, a grassroots, decentralized (not blockchain) network that helps to connect thousands of social enterprises and social impact startups, with thousands of impact investors and angels, globally.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Gyrus Capital
Description:
Gyrus is a private equity firm dedicated to transformational investments. We focus on sectors with strong, sustainable growth and investment opportunities where we can leverage our sector focus to support management to drive change and unlock value. 

Gyrus is based in Geneva, Switzerland.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: CRE Venture Capital
Description: CRE Venture Capital partners with visionary entrepreneurs building category-defining tech companies in Africa. We bring the full arsenal of our capital, relationships, and experience to position the teams we work with for outsized success.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: nVentures
Description:
Building a startup is hard. We know because we did it. Not once, multiple times! Scaling and successfully exiting is a lot harder. We know because we did that too!! We understand the struggles founders face better than most. 

Being founders ourselves, we know the pains of raising capital. We saw the need for a founder-friendly, early-stage VC fund. Given how fast technology evolves, we also saw the need for a VC that understood tech like the back of their palm.

nVentures is a seed fund focusing on B2B Fintech startups in South & Southeast Asia. We invest in proven models to scale them efficiently geographically in Southeast Asia. 

Licensed by the Monetary Authority of Singapore, our vision is to be the preferred early-stage VC in South Asia. We aim to be the gateway for South Asian startups to enter the Southeast Asian ecosystem.

We learned that the best way to build a startup is through revenue, not venture capital. To help founders gain traction fast, we leverage our vast network of potential customers spread across Southeast Asia, the Pacific Islands and Europe.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: D11Z. Ventures
Description:
D11Z. Ventures is a dynamic early-stage investor, specializing in digital and AI startups across Germany and Europe. The Family Office aims to actively shape the digital future and driving real impact in the industry.

With a wealth of experience, expertise, and agility, D11Z. Ventures plays a crucial role in driving significant digital transformation. D11Z has strong ties to leading technology SMEs and global market leaders.

At its core, D11Z. Ventures is driven by the search for founders who not only have a strong entrepreneurial vision but are also committed to shaping a sustainable digital future. D11Z. Ventures is committed to turning game-changing ideas into reality, today.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: 116 Street Ventures (an Alumni Ventures Fund)
Description:
116th Street Ventures is an Alumni Ventures' venture capital fund for alumni of Columbia that invests in companies with a Columbia connection. 

Meet the team:
Ludwig Pierre Schulze, Managing Partner
Rob Adams, Managing Partner
Andrew Padilla, Partner
Brook Stroud, Senior Principal
Akshata Bailkeri, Senior Associate

We are part of Alumni Ventures, America’s largest venture firm for individual investors. Founded in 2014, we are the venture investing partner to over 11,000 individuals and institutions.  

Follow 116 Street Ventures for content at the intersection of our shared alma mater, venture capital, and entrepreneurship.

We are private, for-profit, and not affiliated with or sanctioned by the college.

Offers of securities are made only to eligible investors through formal offering documents, which describe the risks, terms, and other important information that must be considered before investing. Example portfolio company investments shown for illustrative purposes only, do not necessarily reflect investment outcomes that were or would be obtained by any AV fund or investor, and are not available to future investors, except potentially in the case of follow-on investments. Venture capital investing involves substantial risk, including risk of loss of all capital invested. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Stanford Angels & Entrepreneurs
Description: Stanford Angels and Entrepreneurs is an official club under the Stanford Alumni Association. We seek to strengthen Stanford’s startup community by fostering relationships among entrepreneurs and alumni investors. Our community approach to the investment process creates diverse opportunities for education, professional development, advising / mentoring, and growing one’s business and investment portfolio. SA&E has helped fund over 20 startups to date, greatly impacting the Silicon Valley landscape.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Springbank
Description: We back founders building the backbone of the economy, the overlooked systems in work, care, and daily life that need re-architecting for the future generation. With demographic shifts driving urgency and new technologies unlocking solutions, these markets are finally open for reinvention.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Crédit Mutuel Innovation
Description:
Crédit Mutuel Innovation est la filiale spécialisée dans les investissements en capital-risque de Crédit Mutuel Equity (4 Mds € de capitaux gérés). Elle investit en fonds propres des tickets compris entre 1 et 20 M€, dans des entreprises innovantes de la deeptech, du digital et des sciences de la vie. 

Crédit Mutuel Innovation permet aux entrepreneurs de développer leur potentiel de croissance en les connectant aux entreprises de ses écosystèmes.

Parce qu’il faut plus de 5 ans pour créer un leader mondial, Crédit Mutuel Innovation investit durablement ses propres capitaux et bâtit des relations de long terme avec les entrepreneurs qu’elle accompagne.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Inveo Ventures
Description:
Established in 2022, Inveo Ventures is a corporate venture capital fund in Turkey, dedicated to empowering the startup ecosystem through strategic investments and hands-on support. Built on the foundation of over 30 years of capital markets expertise from Gedik Yatırım, one of Turkey's largest private brokerage firms, and backed by Inveo Yatırım Holding, the firm brings deep financial and operational knowledge to the venture capital landscape. As pioneers in venture capital investments in Turkey, Inveo co-founded StartersHub in 2014 and has invested in over 100 startups and already 7+ exits to date. The firm actively invests in technology companies at seed to Series A stages, through direct startup and VC investments.
 
Inveo Ventures' mission is to transform visionary ideas into global success stories by investing in technology startups with clear traction and scalable business models. The firm positions itself as a value-bridge between today and tomorrow, helping founders overcome the challenges of their entrepreneurial journeys and build impactful ventures that drive disruptive change. Inveo Ventures has already supported numerous innovative startups across Turkey's technology ecosystem, leveraging its extensive network and corporate resources to accelerate growth.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Actum Group
Description:
We deliver complete and actionable insights for your value creation agenda. 

Actum Group is the leading provider of insights dedicated to value creation across the private equity, private capital and venture capital markets. Our in-house journalists analyse value creation levers across the financial, operational, ESG and digital spectrum. Our content is enriched and supported by original company financials as well as key people information. We deliver accurate, actionable and real-time insights to our subscribers to drive critical decision making. We empower private equity professionals, advisors and the broader investment community to identify, strategise and execute business development opportunities and achieve maximum portfolio returns.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: ambit partners
Description: ambit partners is a specialist investor dedicated to search funds and entrepreneurial acquisitions. Our approach is defined by a deep respect for the entrepreneur's journey and our total commitment in supporting the world's best acquisition entrepreneurs to find, buy, and build extraordinary companies around the world.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Pi Campus
Description:
Pi Campus was established with the profits generated by Marco Trombetti, Isabelle Andrieu, and Gianluca Granero from their previous businesses.

Initially, it was the investment arm of Translated, a translation service that pioneered the use of artificial intelligence to help professional translators. After a few years, things started growing very fast and the VC firm was created.

We invest in Europe and the US, without any constraints regarding how much and when to invest. Nor do we plan to exit in advance. We invest mostly in AI, but if your startup is growing incredibly fast, it would be our pleasure to meet you anyway.

To date, we have 49 investments mostly in the AI field, 5 of which already successfully exited.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Aera VC
Description: Aera VC invests in early stage ventures developing transformative technologies to build a resilient future.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Basis Set
Description:
Technology has the power to help us reinvent the way we work—whether that’s at an office, in a factory, or on a farm. Basis Set invests in early-stage startups that are harnessing artificial intelligence to let people perform more productively across four themes: scaling infrastructure, intelligent collaboration, automated workflows, and autonomous machines.

We are pragmatic operators and problem solvers. We are experts in machine learning and passionate about AI. We are inspired by the drive and creativity of our entrepreneurs and focused upon supporting them in whatever way they need.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Sciety
Description: Sciety is a leading investment company, committed to supporting the growth of innovative life science and health tech companies in the Nordic region. We invest alongside Sciety Venture Partners, comprising family offices and private investors, as well as venture capital firms. Our mission is to enable the full potential of life science innovations, helping to bring breakthroughs in healthcare to people all over the world.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Romulus Capital
Description:
We're hiring! http://romuluscap.com/careers/

Romulus Capital invests in early-stage technology companies that are looking to become industry leaders. We invest in brilliant – often first-time – entrepreneurs often affiliated with top universities and incubators; as a given company grows, our total investment can scale to $5M and beyond.

We are focused on company-building, rather than betting, and we remain strong partners throughout the trajectory of growth. Our firm is youthful, entrepreneurial, and experienced, with a powerful investor base from around the world.

We place a heavy emphasis on the people in whom we invest and the market opportunity they pursue; we are interested in sparks of rational genius and industry-leading ambitions.

We are a venture capital firm of the future, one that merges the classic, humanist focus on building large, impactful entities with the exciting realities of modern entrepreneurs.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: MD One Ventures
Description:
MD One invests in early stage European technology companies. Thematic sectors include National Security, Defence, Cyber, AI, Robotics, Space and Life Sciences.

Founded in 2021, our team combines comprehensive Venture Capital Experience across multiple sub sectors, and operational expertise from the Tier One Special Forces and Intelligence Communities. 

We support founders who deliver a technical advantage to European and Allies National Security.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Campus Fund
Description:
Campus Fund est le premier fonds d'investissement français dédié aux entrepreneurs étudiants. Il soutient des start-ups innovantes dirigées par des étudiants ou de jeunes diplômés en investissant jusqu'à 60 000 euros en love money et pré-amorçage. 

Soutenu par plus de 50 actionnaires et une société de conseil dédiée aux participations, Campus Fund Advisory, le fonds accélère et accompagne ses investissements jusqu’en seed/série A.

--- 

Campus Fund is France's pioneering investment fund for student entrepreneurs. It backs innovative startups led by students or recent graduates with investments of up to €60K in love money and pre-seed funding.

Supported by over 50 shareholders and Campus Fund Advisory, a specialized support network, the fund expedites and sustains its investments through the seed and series A stages.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: 10D
Description: We partner with entrepreneurs who transcend the constraints of space and time, seeing beyond the obvious - charting new frontiers, enabling new capabilities, and creating new markets. Together, we navigate the overt as well as unseen opportunities and obstacles throughout the epic journey to market success. It's not a straight line, it's a journey filled with ups and downs, successes and failures - and we are in it for the long haul, side by side with you, every step of the way.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Foundation Investment Partners
Description: Foundation Investment Partners is a private equity firm focused on acquiring niche manufacturers, high value added distributors, outsourced business service providers, and niche software developers.  Our operating model focuses on partnering  with the owners or operators of smaller businesses to provide the support, guidance and resources necessary to grow the business.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Kingsley Capital Partners LLP
Description:
Kingsley Capital Partners (“KCP”) is a holding company that creates new businesses in growing markets. 

Backed by family offices, we create businesses ‘on balance sheet’ in sectors with long-term growth potential. 

Our heritage as entrepreneurs is an essential resource for our portfolio companies. We enjoy building these companies further, working in partnership with management teams to generate lasting growth. 

KCP invests significant resources when researching markets and creating companies. Once launched, we act with focus and a shared vision across our portfolio of businesses.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Ugly Duckling Ventures
Description:
Ugly Duckling Ventures is a Nordic-focused venture fund investing in early-stage B2B software and tech startups with proven revenue, partnering with exceptional founders to help them scale and succeed.

We are operational by nature and want to get in the grind as we excel at getting early-stage ventures ready for scale. Being a GP-only team, our portfolio founders are never handed off to junior account managers, but are directly linked to our experienced partners. 

We invest in Danish and Nordic B2B software and tech startups at the pre-seed and seed stage;

- Initial ticket ~€1m
- Follow-up thesis: Heavy
- Geo: Denmark and Nordics
- Stage: Pre-seed/seed, post revenue
- Focus: B2B software and tech. Themes: Medtech, Resilience tech and Business Services, open for hardware-enabled SaaS

Please don't hesitate to get in touch at hello@uglyduckling.ventures
We look forward to hearing from you!
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Regenerative Capital Group
Description:
Regenerative Capital Group (RCG) is a Canadian-based investment firm that invests in purpose-driven impact entrepreneurs, to acquire high potential, growth-stage SME businesses that can support a thriving and regenerative future for people and planet.

RCG’s innovative investment model leverages the momentous opportunity created through the ‘Silver Tsunami’ decade of baby-boomer generation SME business owners retiring and without succession plans for their proven and profitable companies (900,000+ in Canada). 

In addition to 20 years of GP success in SME acquisitions, growth, and exits, the Fund utilizes the incredibly successful ‘Search Fund’ investment vehicle (35% IRR historical returns), and a Regenerative Value Creation strategy that aims to grow the overall health and wealth-building capacities of the stakeholder ecosystems that these proven businesses can reach.

RCG creates Net-Positive systems impact by supporting the evolution of a business’ core purpose and value creation strategies to come into alignment with living systems principles and wider nested stakeholder and ecosystem needs, as a non-displaceable source of competitive advantage.  

Get to know our mission at www.regenerativecapitalgroup.com
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: U.S. Venture Partners
Description:
U.S. Venture Partners (USVP) is a leading Silicon Valley-based venture capital firm, helping entrepreneurs build world-class companies since 1981. U.S. Venture Partners (USVP), is a venture capital investment firm headquartered in Menlo Park, California in the heart of Silicon Valley focusing on investments in an array of segments including enterprise software, cyber security, consumer, e-commerce, healthcare, and IT-enabled healthcare services.

Since its inception USVP has invested $4.3 billion in over 523 companies across a broad range of industries, of which 93 have completed an initial public offering.

The firm is currently investing out of its thirteenth fund, USVP XIII. The USVP team foundation is grounded in four generations of high-technology venture investing and are accomplished venture investors, former CEOs, senior executives and technology company founders that committed to taking an exemplary firm into the 21st century. USVP personnel make up and the firms heritage combine to make us part of the company building process. In many situations the USVP board partner is the first call the entrepreneur makes when faced with strategic decisions, daily challenges and personal support, knowing that we will be there to provide the counsel needed, which is grounded in decades of experience and understanding of our role as coaches and confidantes. 

The investment team is composed of Jacques Benkoski, Steve Krausz, Rick Lewis, Jonathan Root, Casey Tansey and Dafina Toncheva. USVP has invested in many world-changing companies, including: Arkose Labs, Box, Carrot Fertility, Cato Networks, Check Point Software, Guidewire, Happy Returns, HeartFlow, HotelTonight, Human Interest, Imperva, Inari Medical, Inspire Medical Systems,  Medigate, Omada Health, Pluto TV, ThreatMetrix, Trusteer and Zerto. Visit our website for a complete list of investments, portfolio company news and more information on USVP: www.usvp.com. Like us on Facebook and visit us on Twitter: @USVP_
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

From seed to growth, we support companies that leverage innovative technologies and strong business models to become leaders and disrupt traditional industries, including in the energy, healthcare, manufacturing, agriculture and transportation sectors.

Our hands-on team provides a professional and friendly environment to support top entrepreneurs throughout their journey to a great success. 

Our Values: Excellence, Fairness, Integrity, Professionalism and Transparency .

Name: Victory Hill Capital Partners LLP
Description:
Victory Hill is based in London and was founded in May 2020 by an experienced team of energy financiers, that have spun-out of a large established global project finance banking group. The Team have an established track record built over 5 years while working together in their previous roles and participating in over $37.1bn in sustainable energy project transaction values, generating over 24.2 per cent. equity returns. In addition, the Team has also participated in more than $200bn in transaction values across 91 conventional and renewable energy-related transactions in over 30 jurisdictions worldwide, throughout their individual careers. The average experience per individual is 23 years of relevant energy finance experience.  

The Victory Hill team deploys its experience across different financial disciplines to holistically assess investments from different perspectives. The firm pursues operational stability and well-designed corporate governance to generate sustainable positive returns for investors. It focuses on supporting and accelerating the Energy Transition and the attainment of the UN Sustainable Development Goals. 

VHCP is a signatory of the United Nations Principles for Responsible Investing (UN PRI) and is a formal supporter of the Financial Stability Board’s Task-Force on Climate-related Disclosures (TFCD).
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Quake Capital Partners
Description:
Quake makes seed level investments in new and early stage ventures across a wide range of industries.  Working closely with key advisers, and tapping into exclusive relationships developed over the last 30 years, our team boasts unparalleled access to the top players in finance, development, manufacturing, and distribution.

Launching a startup requires hard work, long hours, good people, and a great idea... but it never hurts to have a little help.  That’s where we come in.  We provide entrepreneurs with the following benefits:

• Seed Funding - We prefer to get involved early, investing anywhere from $50k to $250k per opportunity.
Additional Capital - We work with our startups to raise any follow-on capital needed.  Our network includes over 300 family offices, venture funds, and high net investors.

• Expertise - Our mentor network includes over 200 industry leaders, covering a wide range of market verticals.   Specialized advisors with relevant domain expertise work closely with our entrepreneurs to refine strategies and maximize growth.

• Partners - we have partnered with key companies and service providers to assist our startups.

Outlierz Ventures is an Africa-focused early-stage VC fund based out of Morocco. The fund invests in tech-enabled companies solving fundamental problems in key industries across the most dynamic ecosystems in Africa (mainly fintech, insurtech, agritech, healthtech and distribution/logistics). The fund primarily focuses on 4 main markets: Morocco, Egypt, Nigeria and Kenya, with a growing interest for Francophone West Africa. Portfolio companies include Kenya's retail tech platform Sokowtach, Morocco's B2B trade platform for Africa WaystoCap, Africa's corporate data company Asoko Insight, Egyptian retail and distribution platform MaxAB, and last-mile B2B logistics company TousFacteurs (diaspora). 

The fund was launched by African entrepreneurs for African entrepreneurs, and backed by world-class investors and successful entrepreneurs from Silicon Valley and Africa, including Michael Seibel of YCombinator, 500 Startups, as well as former CEOs and C-level executive of large companies in Africa and the diaspora.

Description:

Our dedicated credit funds are more industry agnostic, providing unitranche and subordinated debt, structured junior capital and minority equity to support leveraged and management buyouts, generational transfers, acquisitions and general growth. Graycliff often seeks to partner with family and entrepreneur-owned businesses.
For more information about Graycliff Partners visit www.graycliffpartners.com.

Description:

With over 60 years of collective experience in venture capital, 60+ investments, 120+ years in multinational enterprises and 60+ years in research, we are uniquely positioned to translate scientific innovation into market opportunities and address the global challenges ahead. 

Operating primarily in the fields of Computational Sciences, Aerospace and Energy and Sustainability, we currently manage VV3TT Fund and serve as the entrepreneurial partner and co-investor in Galaxia, the Italian Technology Transfer Hub on Aerospace, established by CDP Venture Capital.

New Stack was founded in 2015 with a mission to invest in the Outsiders. After Fund 1 ($6M) exceeded top decile performance, the team raised a 7x larger vehicle ($42M) to accelerate their strategy.  The firm continues to innovate, building software including VC Rank and the Seeker – all with the goal of identifying and partnering with the most transformational tech leaders of our generation.

Learn more here -> http://newstack.com

Inflect is a healthcare innovation hub backed by Vituity, one of the largest physician-owned partnership in the US, with 8K+ clinicians in 800+ practices serving 12.3M+ patients annually. Our on-the-ground healthcare expertise enables us to invest, incubate, and advise companies to transform the future of healthcare.

Inflect Capital invests in the best pre-seed, seed, and Series A health and wellness startups. Inflect Studio identifies critical problems and builds where there are unaddressed gaps. Inflect Advisory shares our industry expertise and provides guidance to other startups, F500 companies, and government entities aiming to break into and change the healthcare status quo.

Name: Simma Capital
Description:
Simma Capital es una gestora de venture capital que impulsa a los emprendedores que están construyendo el futuro de América Latina. Invertimos en compañías tecnológicas con alto potencial de crecimiento, lideradas por equipos excepcionales y enfocadas en resolver grandes desafíos de sus industrias.

Gestionamos tres fondos complementarios:

•	Simma Ventures, un fondo agnóstico invirtiendo en startups de toda América Latina. Nos enfocamos en etapas tempranas, el fondo ya está invertido en 27 compañías. 
•	Bios Ventures, el fondo corporativo de Grupo Bios, invierte en innovación dentro de la cadena de valor animal. Su enfoque está en soluciones que transforman la producción, nutrición y salud animal. 
•	Simma Fintech+, nuestro nuevo fondo especializado en fintech, con foco en startups que están redefiniendo los servicios financieros en América Latina, como infraestructura, CFO stack/SaaS, risktech y vertical Fintech.

Name: Transition Capital Partners
Description:
Transition Capital Partners (“TCP”) is a Southlake, TX based private equity firm. 
Founded in 1993, TCP has successfully invested in over 50 middle market companies spanning a diverse array of industries. 

TCP partners with management teams to build sustainable value in businesses over the long-term, without the artificial constraints fundraising cycles create for traditional private equity funds. With almost thirty years of proven success, we have a long track record of collaborating with our partners to accelerate the growth of lower middle market companies.

INVESTMENT CRITERIA:

- Control Investments
- Owner Recapitalizations, Corporate Divestitures and Management Buy-Outs
- EBITDA of $2mm – $20mm for platform acquisitions 
- Recurring Revenue of $5mm – $20mm for SaaS software companies (no EBITDA minimums)

Sectors:
- Business / Consumer Services
- Healthcare Services
- Niche Manufacturing / Distribution
- Software and Technology-Enabled Services

Geography:
- HQ in the US  

Please contact Andy Foskey (andy@tcplp.com) or Jason Faucett (jason@tcplp.com) with investment opportunities.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Stride Consumer Partners
Description:
Stride Consumer is a private equity firm that specializes in partnering with talented and dynamic founders, entrepreneurs, and business leaders to build the next generation of great consumer brands.

Founded in 2019 by a passionate group of experienced and successful investor-operators, our unique approach brings together a fully integrated team of successful investors working alongside seasoned operators to assist high-growth and disruptive consumer products and services businesses to hit their stride.

Stride: a step or stage in progress toward a goal; to walk with long decisive steps in a purposeful direction; to overcome an obstacle. Every person has a unique stride, no two are identical. Similarly each brand has its own story, personality and approach. Together, we support our partners on their journey as they take decisive steps toward delivering on their vision.

Stride Consumer’s deep industry experience and success as investors, founders, operators and brand builders in consumer products and services goes well beyond the boardroom. Stride brings together a fully integrated team with complementary skills across three vital perspectives to support our brands as they take decisive steps toward delivering on their vision: an investment team with an operator’s mindset; operating partners who are functional experts; and operating partners who are industry specialists and former founders themselves. Through this model, we can best assist and support passionate founders and business leaders.

Within consumer we focus on the following areas of expertise:
Food & Beverage
Beauty & Personal Care
Active Lifestyle
Multi-unit Consumer Services
Direct-to-Consumer

We provide Growth Equity with flexibility in stage and structure and investments ranging from $10 to $150 million of equity in minority or majority transactions.

EVC’s team is comprised of entrepreneurs. Fifteen years of combined experience has enabled EVC to help build great companies across the US. As entrepreneurs, “we have been in their shoes and speak the same language”.

We look to invest in great and passionate entrepreneurs and pride ourselves on being available for our teams 24/7. We work side by side with them, providing intellectual capital and assistance in any way we can. From mentorship, raising capital, business development, customer acquisition, sourcing talent, press coverage are some of the ways “we work for you”. When one of our founders have a question we want to be the first place they turn. Their success is our success!

We are founder friendly! “Entrepreneurs, not VCs, build great companies”

We invest in early-stage startups with high disruption potential in verticals such as fintech, agtech, healthtech, mobility, logistics, e-commerce, and Web3. ⦁ Digital Structured Credit:

Through intensive use of data, automation, and artificial intelligence, we enable a continuous and scalable flow of performing assets, with legal, operational, and regulatory protection.

Name: Rumbo Ventures
Description:
It is often assumed that major changes must necessarily come from governments, political groups or the world’s most vibrant innovation hubs.

And, although it is true that historically these have been the places where people have tried to find answers to our usual problems, we believe that today there is another rumbo¹...

We are convinced that a real change of course can also be led by startups and people with extraordinary ideas and visions. Today more than ever, entrepreneurs from Latin America and around the world have the knowledge, tools and perspectives to do so. All they need is a push.

This is the purpose of Rumbo, a Venture Capital firm that was born to be a trigger for the innovation needed to leave the carbon economy behind, electrify our transportation, optimize our food production, clean up our industries and protect nature.

In other words, we exist to empower those who believe in a change for the planet and are ready to make it happen.

The challenge is enormous and the task very ambitious, so we will need bold and committed leaderships to achieve it.

So what do you say? Shall we set a new Rumbo together?

¹Rumbo:
In Spanish, a path that someone intends to follow in what they attempt or seek to do
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Depuis près de 17 ans, les Angels d'Investessor, maintenant accompagnés par le fonds d'investissement Sibessor 2 et la plateforme de crowdfunding WeLikeStartup, ont financé plus de 200 projets innovants qui, par leur potentiel d'activité, ont apporté en 2013 près de 120 millions d'euros de chiffre d'affaires et 1.800 emplois à la Région Île-de-France.

Train the next generation of impact investors to “think like an impact investor” providing them with the opportunity to source, diligence, and present early stage impact investment ideas to an expert judging committee.

Create a vibrant network of students and practitioners active in the impact investing field.

Name: Bullpen Capital
Description:
Bullpen Capital invests in post-seed companies that have achieved product-market fit, but have not yet proven sufficient market scalability to raise a major VC round.  We invest in companies that have an operational plan to hit big milestones within a 12-month period, and we work closely with the companies in our portfolio to develop this early traction into large, sustainable businesses.

Seed financing is now more of a process than an event, with multiple rounds of investment layered into the early stages of startup companies.  The "post-seed" stage is often the inflection point of value, the last lean money in before a “super-sized” A round.  Bullpen’s strategy aims to provide leverage for founding teams, who can minimize dilution to maintain ownership and control of their companies, while retaining the option of choosing either a quick acquisition or raising major growth capital to go for a big win.

At the core, we back exceptional entrepreneurs and blockchain protocols that bring us closer to a world of more individual sovereignty, trust, and privacy. 

As a specialised investment firm, we differentiate ourselves through our strong connections within Web3 and the wider Fintech ecosystem, advisory board, team of operating partners, and our partnership with leading cryptographic research centers (COSIC).

Description:

Our team operates on a new business model where our interests, the interests of our investors, and the interests of the startups we support all align. Through this approach, we strive to foster a mutually beneficial relationship with our investees and help them achieve their goals. We provide not only capital but also active support in developing entrepreneurs and leaders – through mentorship, training programs, and our exclusive Launchpad program. 

Knowledge and Growth for Every Entrepreneur
Our training programs are open to everyone – not just startup founders, but also CEOs, business owners, leaders and anyone who believes in growth and the power of innovation and entrepreneurship.

 Our training portfolio focuses on the most essential business areas:
 AI & Innovation – How to integrate artificial intelligence and the latest technologies into your business.
 Strategy & Finance – Sustainable growth and smart financial planning.
 Sales & Marketing – Customer acquisition, growth strategies, and modern sales techniques.
 Personal & Organizational Development – Becoming an effective leader and building successful teams.

 Our goal is to help Hungarian and regional startups grow into internationally recognized companies.

Description: Earth Foundry is a pioneering early-stage venture capital firm, recognized globally for our ability to identify, invest in, and scale the most transformative startups in critical sectors. With a decade-long track record of delivering alpha and impact, we are the partner of choice for innovators and companies who aim to redefine industries and solve the planet’s most pressing challenges.  Our investments target five core areas—energy, water, waste, mobility, and agriculture, where we lead the charge in driving breakthrough technologies to market. Our unparalleled network of 100 innovation catalysts and 90+ research institutions provide us with access to every North American cleantech innovation. We combine this with deep domain expertise, precision-engineered playbooks, and the right strategic partnerships with world-class corporations and research institutions to turn visions into victories.

We provide support across all the elements required for growth acceleration and out-performance: 
✓ People
✓ Capital 
✓ Strategy

Una Terra has cracked the scouting code with participation in true ESG game changers in different verticals, now rapidly growing in market.

Better Scouting -> Better Financing -> Better Operation -> Better Planet.

 Actively deploying capital? Yes

Name: LongWater
Description:
Founded in 2009, LongWater is an alternative asset management firm focused on the lower middle market. We invest in and partner with exceptional business owners and management teams to build enduring value through collaboration, strategic growth, and long-term alignment.
Our platform provides investors with access to a broad range of strategies — including private equity, private credit, and co-investment opportunities alongside leading general partners — all designed to generate meaningful results and sustainable growth.
With offices in Fargo, Dallas, and St. Louis, we combine institutional discipline with a partnership-driven culture rooted in integrity, transparency, and teamwork. At LongWater, we believe success is built by investing not only in companies, but also in people.


HOW WE OPERATE
•	Build Trusting Relationships
•	Serve with Humility
•	Stay Positive and Confront Reality
•	Create Clarity Through Simplicity
 
Contact us at info@lwopps.com

Name: Sancor Seguros Ventures
Description:
Construyamos el futuro.

Somos el fondo de venture capital corporativo que invierte y potencia startups tecnológicas disruptivas de alcance global que estén buscando escalabilidad y expansión de sus negocios y/o que puedan generar un impacto en los negocios o en la cadena de valor del Grupo Sancor Seguros.

Somos uno de los brazos de innovación del grupo asegurador líder del mercado argentino, que desde hace 75 años se mantiene a la vanguardia gracias a su búsqueda permanente de una propuesta de valor superadora que mejore la calidad de vida de sus más de 9 millones de asegurados.

Queremos impulsar nuevos espacios de colaboración, networking y capital dentro del ecosistema emprendedor, para apoyar a los nuevos talentos y ayudarlos a desplegar su potencial de crecimiento. Creemos que nuestra región tiene una oportunidad inmensa para desarrollar su ecosistema tecnológico, y queremos ser parte de ese desafío aportando nuestra capacidad de agregar valor significativo.

Name: TLabs
Description:
TLabs is India's leading tech accelerator. With 50+ companies, 7 Exits, $200M+ market cap of the portfolio, 150+ Mentors, 160+ co-founders and connecting to over 200 Angels and most VCs India and abroad. Our Startups employ over 1000 people. 

TLabs has seen a tremendous success rate with over 65% of the companies getting funded after graduation raising over $450k investments per team.

We are a mini eco-system in ourselves, enabling to help incubated startups with unparalleled support for Product-Market fit, Growth, Strategy, UX and scaling big. We offer a funding of INR 30 Lakhs, a working space and a host of other benefits from prominent tech partners to the startups we accept in the program. 
 
It also helps that we are part of the largest Internet tech company of India that reaches to over 250+M users.

Our vision is a world where exciting new fund managers can more easily connect with the right capital partners and put their money to work.

Name: Beyond The Billion
Description:
Beyond The Billion is the world's first and largest consortium of venture funds pledged to invest and actively deploying over $1bn into women-founded companies.
Beyond the Billion’s (BTB) first pledge campaign was launched as The Billion Dollar Fund for Women in October 2018 with an audacious goal of catalyzing $1 billion into the hands of women founders globally, addressing the gender venture investment gap where women were receiving only 2.2% of all venture capital funding. To continue to build on this momentum, the founders, Shelly Porges and Sarah Chen-Spellings launched Beyond The Billion, to catalyze capital deployed to and with these venture funds, ensuring their continued capacity to invest by bridging LPs and GPs, building a community of institutional investors, sovereign funds, IFIs, DFIs, family offices, wealth managers and high net worth individuals; driving the agenda collectively. As of 2025, over $1.04Bn has been deployed to 1302 women-founded companies, of which to date, 16 have been recognized as unicorns.

Description: Scale Capital is a Danish venture fund from 2012 investing in digitization and disruptive technologies. Name: A Plus Finance
Description:
A Plus Finance est une société de gestion essentiellement dédiée aux institutionnels (environ 80% des actifs gérés), gérant 1 Mds€ à fin 2024.

 Notre cœur d’activité : le Private Equity, l’Immobilier, et le financement du Cinéma indépendant. 

Depuis plus de 20 ans, A Plus Finance investit dans l’économie réelle en finançant les PME au cœur des territoires, l’immobilier géré (notamment les Résidences Services Seniors) et le cinéma indépendant français.

Chaque activité est pilotée par une équipe de gestion spécialisée, garante d’une approche qualitative.

A Plus Finance œuvre en faveur d’une économie sociale et solidaire, et plusieurs de ses fonds immobiliers sont actuellement engagés dans la démarche de labélisation Investissement Socialement Responsable (plusieurs de ses fonds ont déjà obtenu le Label ISR).

Le groupe dispose également d’une forte empreinte régionale, et contribue à la valorisation des territoires grâce à une fine connaissance des enjeux territoriaux.

 Notre ambition : mettre la finance au service de projets à haut potentiel d’impact sociétal.

Description:
AAF Management Ltd. (AAF) is a leading early-stage venture capital firm focused on pre-Seed, Seed, and Series A stage technology companies in North America. Since late 2016, we’ve invested in 138 venture-backed portfolio companies across fintech, healthcare, consumer, enterprise software and deep tech as well as 39 emerging managers globally across 45 LP positions. The firm currently has close to $250M in assets under management.

We are backed by 130 Limited Partners (LPs) across two funds, a fund-of-funds and two SPVs. Our investors include leading multi-family offices, single family offices, royal families, c- level executives, ministers, ambassadors, fund-of-funds, foundations, hedge fund managers and other strategic investors across the US, Europe, and MENA region. 

We actively manage Limited Partnership (LP) allocations into early stage emerging managers globally exposing us to over 1,000 venture-backed companies. We’ve backed emerging managers who were previous venture investors at prestigious firms such as Sequoia Capital, Lightspeed Ventures, NEA, Khosla Ventures, Kleiner Perkins among others.

Notable companies in our extended portfolio include: Deel, Decagon, Elevenlabs, Robinhood, Didi, Savage X by Fenty, StockX, Figure, Reddit, Current, Jasper, Drata, Epic Games, FiscalNote among many others. 

Notable exits in our extended portfolio include: CrowdStrike (NASDAQ: CRWD), TruOptik acq. by Transunion (NYSE: TRU), Even Financial acq. by MoneyLion (NASDAQ: ML), Prodigy acq. by Upstart (NASDAQ: UPST), Portfolium acq. by Instructure (NYSE: INST), now a Thoma Bravo Company, HeyDoctor acq. by GoodRx (NYSE: GDRX), Medumo acq. by Philips Healthcare (NYSE: PHG) among others.

Our mission is to find quality companies for our Members to consider and invest in. On average, 20-30 companies are presented to the membership annually. 

Angel One’s membership base gives angel investors the opportunity to expand their network of like-minded investors and reduce their risk through syndication.

We are a part of the Equation Angels network consisting of 4 other groups focused on the Southern Ontario region.

Aceleradora VIP de Startups

Nacemos para resolver los principales problemas que una startup encuentra desde el lanzamiento de su MVP.

Seleccionamos ideas con alto potencial que cuenten con un MVP desarrollado y listo para lanzarse al mercado. Incubamos a las mejores startups y las aceleramos a través de Mentoring con empresarios y directivos de largo recorrido, donde ayudamos a los emprendedores a convertir sus proyectos en negocios reales e invertibles.

Our investment philosophy is driven by identifying innovative and impactful technology products, processes, or platforms that provide real-world solutions with disruptive growth potential to effectively scale into markets both locally and internationally.

ADVISING · INVESTING · RAISING CAPITAL

-	B2C Services (home services, automotive aftermarket)
-	Supply Chain &Infrastructure Services (transportation/logistics, utility/water/waste, specialty distribution)

Description:
We connect investors with high-growth startups, handling the entire investment process. Our expertise lies in providing professional access to emerging startups in the digital economy, health, and sustainability sectors. Leveraging our network, we help scale these startups into successful companies.

Our success 
• 38+ startup investments closed
• Total investments exceeding EUR 23 m
• Network of more than 3500 registered investors

For investors 
We review approximately 1000 startups annually from across Europe, with only 1-2% making it through our rigorous process. After assessing the founding team and reviewing the data, investors can participate with equity investments starting at EUR 10k.

For startups 
If you're a DACH-based startup seeking funding, submit your pitch deck here: https://gateway.ventures/pitch-us/. We've successfully financed ventures in HealthTech, AI, FinTech, CleanTech, IT & Software, and Big Data & Social Impact. Join our primeFAMILY and gain access to our exclusive partner network.

Managed Pooling as a Service 
M-PaaS is a Full-Service offering with Pool-Captain and Gateway platform, enabling lower investments for investors, wider investor access for start-ups, and improved efficiency. It provides professionalism, experience, and immediate availability without the need for extensive setup.

Female Investors Network 
In Europe, only 8% of business angels are female. We believe that diversity is crucial for success, regardless of company size. Our goal is to increase this number and promote a more diverse ecosystem. Through guided access and partnerships, we empower you to be an active agent of change.

Contact us: info@gateway.ventures

We invest in profitable UK/Irish headquartered companies with revenues of £5m to £50m which have the ability to accelerate their growth.

Our singular focus on a select group of software companies, many of which have received minimal or no external capital to date, drives our success through focus. By concentrating our efforts and resources, we consistently and successfully identify, fund, scale, and support companies as they navigate the next stage of their journey. This transformative phase, which we call second-stage growth, involves a renewed emphasis on investing in people, products, and processes.

We are a highly experienced team that brings together entrepreneurial, operational and private equity experience to help our companies realise their potential.

A strong partner, we provide capital, expertise and a wide network of connections together with the experience and energy to drive exceptional growth in large markets across diverse geographies.

For further information please visit www.fpecapital.com or get in touch with a member of the team.
