- Industries: ConsumerTech, Enterprise, Deeptech
- Sectors: New Brand, New Lifestyle, Creative Content, New E-Commerce, Productivity, vSaaS, DevTool, Robotics, Clean Energy, AgriTech, AI+
- Featured Companies: Rippling, Instacart, Hims & Hers, Lime, Ironclad, Astranis, Boom Supersonic, Rescale, Dialpad, Checkr
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Maven 11
Description:
Maven 11 is a crypto-native fund that partners with brave outliers challenging the status quo by redefining ownership.

Our core belief is that by redefining ownership, you create a more open, transparent and inclusive world.

Maven 11, which was among the earliest crypto-focused venture capital firms to be registered in Europe, initiated its inaugural fund in 2017. Since then, it has evolved into the M11 Group, a company that boasts a team of over 20 professionals with a global presence across all continents. The M11 Group now offers a range of products, including multiple Venture Funds, Credit Pools, and Asset Management services.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: TempoCap
Description:
TempoCap is a European growth-stage technology fund with offices in London and Berlin. We have backed some of Europe’s most successful businesses including Onfido, Depop, Currencycloud, Talentsoft, CybelAngel, Dedrone and Efficient IP.

For leading technology companies across Europe, TempoCap provides capital to support their growth and / or acquires positions in those companies from existing investors. 

TempoCap also acquires portfolios of companies from other VCs and corporate VCs, helping them to exit their investments.

We invest across a variety of high- growth sectors, including enterprise software, cybersecurity, fintech, consumer internet, digital health, robotics and infrastructure.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Blue Ashva Capital
Description:
Blue Ashva Capital is an investment firm based out of Singapore and India, backing sustainable and profitable businesses which are solving real challenges in areas such as Food & Agri, Energy & Environment, Health & Wellness and Money & Finance.

It aims to nurture businesses by bringing capital, technology and market linkages together.

Blue Ashva also runs a deep-tech incubator called Blue Ashva Labs, which focuses on taking technologies from lab to market. Some of the focus areas include green hydrogen, pharma APIs, biotechnology and battery recycling.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: GM Ventures
Description:
Serving as the venture capital arm of General Motors, GM Ventures strategically invests in startups that share GM’s vision of a world of zero emissions, zero crashes and zero congestion, and are helping to accelerate the company’s evolution into a platform innovator and leading transportation technology enterprise.

Our team connects startup companies with GM’s extensive network of partnerships, iconic brands, technology talent and manufacturing expertise to accelerate and commercialize innovations globally.

We focus on four key investment pillars including Electrification Ecosystem, Connecting the Customer, Autonomous Experience and Digital Enterprise, as well as additional breakthrough innovations.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: OCA Ventures
Description: We're a hands-on, collaborative, and entrepreneur friendly early stage venture capital firm. We focus on equity investments in companies with dramatic growth potential, primarily in technology and highly-scalable services businesses.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: iFly.vc
Description: iFly.vc is an early-stage VC firm based in the Austin Area.  We invest in the seed to Series A stages across the value chain of traditional industries with the initial focus on commerce.  We don’t follow the herd. We look for gritty entrepreneurs who are solving tremendous problems and creating real value in any sector that may appear unglamorous.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Piva Capital
Description:
Based in San Francisco, Piva Capital is a venture capital firm investing in disruptive energy and industrial companies across North America and Europe.

Our team of accomplished domain experts is passionate about working with creative entrepreneurs to address the complex technical challenges facing industry today.

Piva Capital’s global connections help startups access new markets, leading corporations, and technical experts. We take risks and reap the rewards — as a team and as a planet.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Plexus Capital, LLC
Description:
Plexus Capital invests across the United States in a variety of transaction types, including acquisitions, buyouts, recapitalizations, and growth capital. Since 2005, Plexus has raised over $2.2B* across seven committed funds and funded over $2.5B in over 195 companies. Plexus has built an institutional platform with a team of 46 professionals based in Raleigh and Charlotte, NC. 

Our transaction experience has resulted in active working relationships with numerous third party due diligence providers, ensuring a smooth and efficient transaction process for management and the Company. We are value-add, long-term, patient investors who are committed to excellence in everything we do.

Geography
• Nationwide

Industries
• Business services • Healthcare • Value-add distribution • Retail & consumer • Manufacturing 
• Other basic industries

Use of Proceeds
• Acquisitions • Leveraged buyouts • Recapitalizations • Growth • Management buyouts 
• Minority recapitalizations

Investment Size
• $3,000,000 - $30,000,000 • Co-investments for larger amounts

Company Characteristics
• Revenue up to $100,000,000 • Strong market dynamics
• EBITDA from $2,000,000 to $20,000,000 • Sustainable positive cash flow
• Experienced and committed management • Proven business strategy

Investment Types
• Subordinated debt • Unitranche • Equity (majority or minority)

*Includes leverage across SBIC and private funds
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Ben Franklin Technology Partners
Description:
Ben Franklin Technology Partners is Pennsylvania’s statewide innovation engine and one of the nation’s most respected high-tech investment models. Since 1983, we have fueled emerging technology ventures, strengthened established manufacturers, and accelerated economic growth across the state.

With four regional offices: Central and Northern PA, Northeastern PA, Southeastern PA, and Innovation Works in Southwestern PA, we combine statewide reach with local expertise. Together, we provide strategic investments, hands-on support, and industry connections that transform ideas into thriving enterprises.

Our impact speaks for itself: more than 159,000 jobs created and 30 billion dollars in economic growth. By backing the high-risk companies others will not, we ensure Pennsylvania remains competitive, prosperous, and positioned to lead in the global innovation economy.

The Ben Franklin Technology Partners is an initiative of the Pennsylvania Department of Community and Economic Development and is funded by the Ben Franklin Technology Development Authority.

Follow us as we help light the way for Pennsylvania’s innovators, manufacturers, and job creators.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: FuturePlay
Description: Founded in 2013, FuturePlay is a venture capital and accelerator specializing in the investment and growth of startups. Leveraging expertise in deep-tech commercialization, FuturePlay supports startups from their establishment to growth stages. It actively participates in follow-on investments, covering all funding rounds.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: MAGIC Fund
Description:
MAGIC Fund is an early-stage venture capital fund built by founders for founders. We back founders solving daunting challenges across the globe at their earliest stages (pre-seed/seed).

We've backed 200+ tech startups around the world: Bank Novo, Payfazz, Frubana, Retool, CafeX, Py, KiwiBot, Muxy, Chronus Health, Mono, Oxygen, and many more.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Bridge Latam
Description: Bridge Partners es un fondo de inversión early stage hecho por los mejores emprendedores de Latinoamérica con la misión de crear el puente perfecto para apoyar a los nuevos emprendedores a potenciar sus negocios y conseguir subsecuentes rondas de inversión.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: init 6
Description: Init-6 is an Indonesian VC fund that looks for technical founders with a passion to solve big problems. The firm was founded in early 2020 by co-founders Achmad Zaky and Nugroho Herucahyono (Xinuc) after leaving the company Bukalapak. We’re an industry agnostic investor who primarily invests in early-stage rounds.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Overture Ventures
Description:
Overture is an early-stage venture fund with a hyper-differentiated edge. We invest in energy, artificial intelligence, resilience, and industrial transformation startups and focus on helping those founders win government support and navigate regulatory complexity. 

Industrial policies are here to stay. Government and geopolitics is today as important as economics. Accordingly, each Overture portfolio company receives in-kind support from the country’s leading climate government affairs firm, Boundary Stone Partners, to unlock the full potential of federal, state, and municipal governments.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Talent Venture Group
Description:
Talent Venture Group (TVG) is a fast-growing investor and venture creator in the HR and Talent Tech space. We help founders create companies that supercharge talent through the next generation of HR & Talent Tech. With our specialization and deep insights into the full spectrum of employment and career progressions - from recruitment to engagement and performance - we raise the bar for our founders to build the future of HR with tangible, sustainable impact. Our vision is to become the world’s leading investor and venture creator in our space. 

To date, TVG has invested in over 20 HR and Talent Tech-focused founding teams and conducted 6 successful exits, and is seeking future visionaries to continue to grow our family. Our portfolio today consists of Talent Inc, Nova, NyTeknik, Wintrgarden, UBI Global, Future Talent Council, Agentum, WeStudents, Hyre and Preppio, to name just a few.

If you’re interested in reading more about weekly investment news, trends and TVG insights into the HR & Talent Tech space, subscribe to the TVG HR & Talent Tech Deal Radar here: http://eepurl.com/hE8eFX
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Puma Growth Partners
Description:
Puma Growth Partners (formerly Puma Private Equity) is a leading provider of growth capital to SMEs across all sectors and regions of the UK, delivering investments between £4 million to £10 million.  

Puma Growth Partners takes a highly active approach to value creation, partnering with management teams to help drive up equity value through expansion and professionalisation. Puma Growth Partners is a division of Puma Investment Management Limited which is authorised and regulated by the Financial Conduct Authority. 

Registered office address: Cassini House, 57 St James’s Street, London, SW1A 1LD. Registered as a private limited company in England and Wales No. 08210180.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Havencrest Capital Management
Description: Havencrest Capital Management is a Dallas-based, private equity fund manager specializing in the healthcare industry.  Havencrest focuses on buyouts and majority recapitalization as well as minority growth equity financing with like-minded investors.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Nexxus Capital
Description: Nexxus Capital, one of Mexico’s largest independent alternative asset managers, has completed 35 investments and has fully divested from 14 portfolio companies; and through its Nexxus Mezzanine Fund, it has invested in 5 structured credit facilities. For the past 22 years, Nexxus has raised and managed several funds with aggregate capital commitments of over US$1.36 billion and is the only Mexican alternative asset manager to have listed six portfolio companies in the public markets such as Homex, Genomma Lab, Sports World, Credito Real,  Grupo Hotelero Santa Fe and Traxion. Nexxus has also completed 5 investments in Spain with its local team through Nexxus Iberia Fund.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Soapbox
Description:
Soapbox helps founders and companies - whatever stage, sector or surrounding hype - publish a clean, golden source of their fundraise online for onward sharing.

And allows the rest of the tech community catch-up on the latest venture stories or discover new companies in a simple feed and newsletter without the usual clickbait or paywall.

We’re just getting started building the home of venture announcements. Join us in our mission to democratise the opaque world of VC investing.

Powered by   K&L Gates  |  Venture Comet  |  Jumpstart
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Nex Cubed
Description: Nex Cubed is a pre-seed venture accelerator on a mission to invest in and uplift underrepresented founders and underserved communities. Our unwavering commitment lies in fostering diversity and inclusion within the startup ecosystem. We envision a world where all founders, regardless of background, enjoy equal opportunities, access to crucial support, abundant resources, and capital. Together, we forge an inclusive and diverse startup landscape, igniting a transformative path towards a future of boundless possibilities.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Startfeld - Startup support of the Switzerland Innovation Parc East
Description:
Startfeld, die Startup-Förderung der Switzerland Innovation Park Ost AG, hat sich der Unterstützung von Start-ups und Innovationen in der Ostschweiz verschrieben.

Gegründet von der Universität St.Gallen, der FHS St.Gallen, der Empa, der Stadt St.Gallen, der St.Galler Kantonalbank (SGKB) und der Swisscom, verbindet Startfeld von Anfang an forschungsgetriebenes Unternehmertum mit Wissenschaft.

Unsere Arbeit:

Unternehmertum stärken: Wir fördern das Bewusstsein für Unternehmertum bei hochqualifizierten Forschungsteams, Studierenden und Entwicklungsteams in der Ostschweiz. Unser Fokus liegt auf der Unterstützung von Initiativen an der Basis.

Unternehmer unterstützen: Wir bieten Wissen, Coaching, Training, Finanzen und Infrastruktur für ambitionierte Unternehmer, um Misserfolge zu minimieren und neue Impulse zu setzen.

Marktreife Produkte entwickeln: Wir unterstützen die Entwicklung marktreifer Produkte aus Forschungsergebnissen und stärken damit die Wettbewerbsfähigkeit der Schweiz auf globaler Ebene.

Innovationsfreundliches Ökosystem schaffen: Wir fördern ein kreatives und innovationsfreundliches Umfeld in der St.Gallen-Bodensee-Area durch die Vernetzung von Start-ups, KMU, Experten, Business Angels, VC's, CVC's und anderen Investoren, um das Unternehmertum zu beschleunigen.

Markteintritt unterstützen: Wir erleichtern den Markteintritt in der DACH-Region durch starke Partnerschaftsprogramme und steigern so die Exportindustrie der Schweiz.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: OIC
Description:
WE ARE CAPITAL SOLUTIONS PROVIDERS

We’re building a diversified portfolio of investments, backed by hard asset collateral, supporting innovation in infrastructure. We utilize flexible capital and employ a partnership approach to support business owners and operators.

Our approach centers on a true capital partnership model – for entrepreneurs, by entrepreneurs. We don’t pretend to know more about a partner company’s business than they do. We offer customized capital solutions that allow them to pursue their vision as they see fit – supported by our team’s deep expertise, extensive industry connections, and proven operating experience.

We focus our investments on eight key sectors shaping the transition to a sustainable infrastructure future.

ENERGY EFFICIENCY
WASTE & RECYCLING
DIGITAL INFRASTRUCTURE
SOCIAL INFRASTRUCTURE
RENEWABLE FUELS
SUSTAINABLE POWER
TRANSPORTATION, MOBILITY & STORAGE
FOOD SYSTEMS & AGRICULTURE

We take a disciplined, proactive approach to optimizing value with our investment partnerships by reducing risk, improving oversight and adding value to generate results that meet or exceed targeted returns.  We have dedicated teams focused on optimizing performance and managing risk across the lifecycle of our investments.

We partner with private company owners and management teams to provide essential liquidity and capital to enable them to grow. We also work with them to build relationships, develop and implement ideas and add value wherever possible. 

Responsible investing and ESG principles are core to OIC’s culture, investment strategy and partnership approach. We believe that investing responsibly is not an option; it’s our obligation as corporate citizens in the 21st century.

Businesses building infrastructure systems of the future require capital solutions as innovative as their assets. But frequently, companies face challenges and limited access to flexible financing options.  OIC is here to help.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: MSM fund (Mustard Seed Maze)
Description: We are an early-stage generalist impact fund . We invest in brave founders solving the world’s biggest social and environmental challenges.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: peercheque
Description:
In a world with infinite noise around early-stage capital, the best founders seek backers with strong operating experience to assist them with company building. 

peercheque is an inception stage investment syndicate run by Miten Sampat & Soaib Grewal, to back the most exciting technology companies being built from India, often partnering from the -1 to 0 phase itself.

Together, they have written angel cheques in more than 80 companies since 2013. Notable ones being Unacademy, MPL, Dukaan, Pepper Content, inVideo, Park+, Indiagold, Third Wave Coffee, Onecode, PocketFM, Boba Bhai. 

More importantly, they are company builders themselves having built several businesses from -1 to 0 to unicorn outcomes.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Betatron Venture Group
Description:
Betatron Venture Group is a venture capital fund investing in exit-focused startups from Hong Kong and Singapore. We typically invest between US$500k-US$2million at the Seed to Series A stage. We're happy to lead your round and can follow on in future rounds.

If you're working on a scalable tech company, Betatron wants to hear from you.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Oxford Venture Capital Network
Description:
We're here to help both students and startups grow, with our network of startup founders, investors, and entrepreneurial Oxford students.

We provide a pathway for students to learn, upskill, and gain confidence to enter businesses from any background. By introducing students to venture capital, we show them how it is possible to pursue a business idea and access funding and support.

We achieve that through speaker events and our flagship Venture Capital Program, a 7-week program training aspiring analysts. Applications for the program open before week 0 of every MT and HT, so stay tuned!
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: NGIF Capital
Description:
NGIF is a Canadian venture capital firm offering grant and equity financing for startups that deliver solutions to the environmental and other challenges facing the natural gas sector. We are unique in how we bring Canada’s energy industry leadership to every investment, accelerating the validation, demonstration, and customer creation of our startup portfolio. 

Unlike other VCs, NGIF has strong connections to every part of the gas value chain, from production through to end-use, offering it a means to test, develop, and accelerate the commercial implementation of innovative gas technology wherever it fits in the sector. The model benefits consumers, investors, and Canadian society as a whole.

The team at NGIF is talented. We are forward thinkers. Innovators. Dealmakers. We are committed to driving innovation in the natural gas sector. We know natural gas is critical to the long-term well-being of Canadians, and indeed, citizens around the world. And we believe innovation in the sector will make the future of natural gas – and what it delivers – that much better.

Our goal as a team is to deliver the highest quality service and products while positioning Canada’s natural gas as the most competitive gas molecule in the world, with the lowest-emission profile. Our experience, network, and success to date is the right formula for a prosperous tomorrow.

NGIF Capital Corporation operates NGIF Industry Grants (the original Natural Gas Innovation Fund), the NGIF Emissions Testing Centre, and the NGIF Cleantech Ventures. NGIF Capital Corporation is wholly owned by CGA Enterprises, a venture of the Canadian Gas Association.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: STARTUP CREASPHERE
Description: Startup Creasphere was founded in 2018 by Roche, its main goal is to establish new digital business models with the best startups in the world that challenge clinical practices, improve data analytics, and enhance the patient journey across the continuum of care. For more information, visit: www.startupcreasphere.com
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Haji Abdullah Alireza & Co. Ltd.
Description:
The House of Alireza is one of Saudi Arabia's oldest family businesses, with a legacy spanning over 175 years. Founded by Zainal Alireza in 1845, the company began its journey in Jeddah, importing diverse commodities.

In the early 20th century, the company was restructured as a diversified holding group, renamed Haji Abdullah Alireza & Co., and proudly received the Kingdom's first commercial registration.

Since then, our growth has mirrored the dynamic evolution of Saudi Arabia, contributing to its development across key industries. Today, aligned with Vision 2030, we continue to play a vital role in the following sectors:

•	Fuels & Lubricants
•	Maritime & logistics 
•	Packaging
•	Real Estate
•	Renewable & Sustainable Energy Solutions
•	Travel & Tourism
•	Water & Power
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Cento Ventures
Description:
Founded in 2011, Cento Ventures is a venture capital firm dedicated to supporting early-stage tech startups in Southeast Asia, positioning them to become market leaders.

We are a multidisciplinary team of domain experts, fundraisers, deal makers and operators with over 100 years of collective experience in Southeast Asia. Through our deep industry expertise and networks in the region, we are able to offer data-driven insights to help our portfolio founders gain a solid understanding of the tech landscape.

At Cento, we love going into the trenches with our founders: we believe that adopting a hands-on approach makes a significant impact on their growth journey. To date, the Cento team has facilitated over a quarter-billion dollars of proceeds earned by our portfolio founders.

Cento Ventures adopts an industry-agnostic investment thesis but with a keen interest in digital financial services. We believe embedded finance is critical in catalysing revolutionary change across all business sectors — strengthening value chains at every touchpoint, meeting dynamic industry demands and accelerating digital transformation.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: J12
Description:
We back founders early building at the frontier of AI.

Founders building within two core segments of the data and AI landscape – the Enablers and the Applications. But most importantly still, founders with outlier ingenuity, childish curiosity, and the stamina to prevail.

With roots in Stockholm and reach across Europe, our team combines a decade of company building experience with commercial expertise. Our portfolio spans 40+ companies across Europe.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: 2022 Female Angels
Description:
A group of passionate women and men who have come together in a voluntary capacity to engage, educate and activate women to become investment angels in early stage businesses.   Subscribe to our mailing list: http://eepurl.com/h1A52b

Our mission is to identify and inspire 2,022 female angel investors for MENA by the end of 2022 to help diversify the early stage investment landscape.

Are you a woman who is an active or aspiring angel looking to to start their investing journey? Be an angel here: https://2022femaleangels.network

Are you a Guy in angel investing that wants to see the landscape change? Can you share your angel experience to help activate new educated women angels? Contact us: 2022femaleangels@gmail.com

Subscribe to our mailing list: http://eepurl.com/h1A52b

#angelsdodeals #angelsmakenoise #angelsinvest
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Outset Ventures
Description:
An incubator and VC investor, Outset Ventures is the champion of deep technology founders in Aotearoa New Zealand.

Outset's mission is to bring New Zealand’s deep technology innovations to the world stage by helping founders turn unique science and engineering-based ideas into companies that deliver real-world solutions on a global scale.

We are New Zealand’s only technology incubator with flexible laboratory and workshop facilities designed to support the development of early-stage, deep technology start-ups. 

We have a 20+ year history of technology commercialisation on-site, with notable alumni including Rocket Lab, LanzaTech and Mint Innovation.

Our unique facilities and extensive experience as founders mean we offer an unparalleled investment opportunity to back credible, innovative founders operating on the forefront of new industries.

Fund II is currently open for investment. Talk to us today to find out more.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: BNP Paribas Développement
Description: BNP Paribas Développement, filiale autonome du groupe bancaire international BNP Paribas, est une société anonyme qui investit directement ses fonds propres pour soutenir le développement des PME et ETI performantes et assurer leur pérennité en facilitant leur transmission, en qualité d’actionnaire minoritaire.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Climate VC
Description:
Climate change is an existential threat but also our greatest opportunity. 

We are on the lookout to support and fund early-stage UK-based climate startups.

We make sure to invest in the long term, providing space and opportunity for the people at the forefront of innovation.

Potential Climate Ventures F1 Limited (PCV) is an appointed representative of SFC Capital Partners Ltd which is authorised and regulated by the Financial Conduct Authority (‘FCA’) in the United Kingdom (FRN 736284)
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Duke Street
Description:
Duke Street is a leading UK private equity firm, which has been investing in the European mid-market buyout space since 1988. As well as managing funds, we also offer our investors access to co-investments on a direct basis.

Our investment strategy focuses on four sectors: consumer, healthcare, industrials and services. These are sectors which we know and understand well, bringing to each of them the deep industry knowledge of our operating partners and a proven track record of successfully building companies, both through value creating acquisitions and organic growth. These companies are typically valued between €75m and €350m.

Our mission is to accelerate the growth of the companies we back, creating value for everyone involved in our investments. We invest in management teams which have a real ambition to succeed. We do this in a driven and collegiate way, with a mix of highly experienced investment and operating partners, who all share the same straightforward values. This is what attracts the best managers to work with us.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: E3.Ventures
Description:
E3. Ventures empowers the next generation of innovators. We're a pioneering venture studio providing startups with funding, mentorship, and the resources they need to thrive. 
Join us in building a vibrant entrepreneurial ecosystem.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Rise Capital
Description:
Rise Capital is a global investment firm that focuses on making expansion-stage investments in Internet businesses in the most prominent Emerging Markets.

We back industry-leading businesses run by world-class entrepreneurs who attack large addressable market opportunities.  Leveraging our experience as Emerging Market Internet operators and investors, we strategically guide these businesses to scale.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Thinkhat
Description:
At Thinkhat, we are building platforms that transform innovative concepts into successful companies through ideation, incubation, and illumination. Leveraging artificial intelligence and machine learning (AI/ML), opportune investments, and strategic partnerships, we are unlocking new possibilities across the continuum of life sciences (upstream) and healthcare (downstream). 

In the past 24 months, we have established robust healthcare and life sciences platforms, laying a solid foundation with a global team of over 120 specialists: scientists, researchers, machine learning engineers, strategists, full-stack developers, and UI/UX designers. Our 2024 portfolio (Cohort 1) includes over 10 initiatives addressing critical issues, such as 
Operational inefficiencies in health systems
Alleviating physician burnout and administrative burdens
Creating sequence-as-a-service solutions for targeted diseases
Advancing personalized precision medicine
Conducting R&D in CRISPR and mRNA for novel cell and gene therapies

To learn more, visit www.thinkhat.ai.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Droia Ventures
Description: Droia is a specialist biotech investor with an exclusive focus on therapeutics for oncology and genetic disease.  Droia invests globally in young drug development companies that use novel science and innovative approaches to bring promising therapies to patients.  With our team of seasoned scientists, entrepreneurs and investment professionals we build great companies to save patients’ lives. More information can be found on www.droiaventures.com.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Astir Ventures
Description:
Astir Ventures is an early stage VC based out of the US and India. We back early/seed stage startups that are shaping the future by creating a positive disruption in the industries they operate in. 

We are actively looking for the next generation of change makers and thought leaders.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Maor Investments
Description:
Maor is a European-Israeli VC fund focused on Israeli tech companies with established proof of concept and a need to scale up. 
Maor was founded in 2017, by Philippe Guez & Eric Elalouf. With backgrounds in cross-border investment banking focused on Israel and Global Tech IPOs, Philippe and Eric felt the enormous opportunity to set up fund that would invest in revenue-generating tech companies in Israel. 
Deeply-rooted in the European corporate ecosystem, Maor serves as the gateway to Europe for Israeli startups.
With a local team based in Tel Aviv, Maor enjoys extensive sourcing capabilities and robust research & execution.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Angels4Impact
Description: Business Angels Association investing in startups with strong innovative and technological content and a focus on Impact.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Kairous Capital
Description:
Kairous Capital is a regional private equity and venture capital investment firm led by professionals with extensive experience in both venture capital and private equity sector. We focus on investing in mid-sized companies in Greater China and ASEAN region that aimed to disrupt existing industry through technology. We believe technology will bring significant impact to businesses within the region for the next decades and we are prepared to be part of it.
 
Different from traditional VC firms, we go beyond capital provision. We adopt an active approach in managing our investments to create values to our investees, increasing their chances of success. Kairous Capital is led by experienced investment team with proven track records in creating values in investee companies via strategic, financial and operational improvements. We emphasize on initiatives to build strong fundamentals that drive growth, enhance profitability and improve asset efficiency.
 
Kairous Capital sees ourselves as the cross-border investment partner and serves as the bridge between Greater China and ASEAN region. During the past 10-15 years, our team has the track records of executing more than 10 successful cross-border expansions. We help companies to break the barrier between Greater China and ASEAN region, leading our portfolio companies to a rewarding regional expansion.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Keystone Capital
Description: Keystone was founded in 1994 with the objective of investing the personal capital of its partners in high quality, market-leading businesses; patiently building long-term value alongside management through organic growth and strategic acquisitions. Today, Keystone manages over $1 billion in capital commitments across two funds - Keystone Capital Fund II, LP ("Fund II") and its most recent Keystone Capital Fund III, LP (“Fund III”), with Fund III representing $630 million of capital commitments. To maintain consistency with its historical investment strategy and align interest across all stakeholders, the principals of Keystone collectively represent the largest single investor in both Fund II and Fund III, with both Funds having been structured with an extended life to support investment period flexibility. Over the course of its history, Keystone has completed over 40 platform investments and more than 170 total acquisitions with a focus on professional & tech-enabled services, engineering & technical services, commercial & industrial services, food & beverage manufacturing, and engineered products.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Bulgarian Angels Club
Description:
Bulgarian Angels Club (ex-CEO Angels Club) is a group of senior executives and entrepreneurs related to Bulgaria investing their own money in early stage startups in return for equity.
Our members make their own investment decisions and they can invest together or individually. They also provide expertise, contacts and pro-active mentorship to increase company value.

The Club looks for early stage, normally post-accelerator startups that are highly scalable and that can show us how the company will get to break-even or to a clear meaningful mile stone (e.g.Seed or Series A.Funding) within 12-24 months on the basis of our one-time investment. This typically means smallish teams (2 to 5 people), with serious domain expertise and a product that is either currently in the market or already in beta.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: HG Ventures
Description: HG Ventures supports innovation and growth across The Heritage Group by investing and partnering with private companies developing new technologies and approaches in both our core and adjacent markets. We leverage the world class expertise of The Heritage Group operating companies and research center to offer a unique value proposition to our portfolio company partners.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Venture Lab Niterra Group
Description:
Niterra Ventures is the corporate venture arm of Niterra, formerly known as NGK Spark Plugs, a global technology leader with a 90-year history. With 17,000 employees worldwide, Niterra is the world’s #1 spark plug company. Our core business in spark plugs and sensors for automotive combustion engines generates over $1 billion in free cash flow annually, providing us with the financial flexibility to invest in new growth areas beyond our traditional markets.

Niterra Ventures launched its investment program in 2021 with a dedicated $100M CVC fund, where we invest $0.5M to $5M in Series A and onward, with the potential to invest additional capital off the balance sheet for particularly compelling opportunities. Since launch, we have made 15 investments, supporting innovative companies that align with our long-term vision.

At Niterra Ventures, our mission is to build the future of Niterra beyond spark plugs by identifying and investing in transformative technologies and business opportunities. We make strategic, minority investments in innovative companies at various stages of growth, with a focus on Series A and onward, that align with our vision for long-term growth.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Rouge International & Rouge Ventures
Description:
Rouge International & Rouge Ventures (www.rougevc.com)
Venture capital, VC scouting, biz turnaround advisory, sustainability accelerator, AI, etc

Name: Mighty Capital
Description:
Mighty Capital is the VC firm that leverages the Product Alpha Effect, a data-backed way to produce outliers by reading product signals from a 600,000-product-leader network. 

Founded in 2018 by SC Moatti, a product visionary and former Meta product leader, and Jennifer Vancini, an idea-to-IPO veteran of tech investing, we bring a differentiated edge to venture. Through Moatti’s 600,000-strong Products That Count network of product leaders, we see trends before others do, giving us a proprietary advantage in sourcing, diligence, and post-investment value creation. 

Our early-stage B2B tech portfolio speaks for itself: 1 in 5 companies is a category leader like Amplitude (NASDAQ:AMPL), Groq, and Netskope (NASDAQ:NTSK). Founders consistently call us the most value-add investor on their cap table, and use our global product ecosystem as a marketplace to accelerate time to revenue, scale, and exit. 

Anchored by GCM Grosvenor, we’re deploying Fund III with both prior funds in top decile DPI and TVPI, $20B+ in value created, and 6 IPOs to date. 

Learn more at Mighty.Capital.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Description:
Funding for the odd ones out in European B2B.

We back the best founders. We like boring or ‘too small’ markets, atypical business models, or any early-stage business that is simply a little different in one way or another.

Name: Rising Tide Africa
Description:
The Rising Tide Africa Programmes are part of a global movement to increase women's participation in angel investing as an asset class. The Global movement originated as 180 women from across 5 continents innovating cross-border angel investing. 

Rising Tide provides an enriching investment experience including infrastructure to support the development of a robust investment portfolio in start-ups, education on the investment process, and the development of a global angel community of successful women across Africa, the United States, Latin America, Europe and the Middle East.

Description: Some call you founders. We call you Superheroes. Seed stage VC investing in software-driven startups in Finland and the Baltics. Our initial tickets range from 100 K€ to 1 M€. You are never too early - just be in touch.

Description:
We are operators with a mission to empower and enable entrepreneurs to build world class products. In our world, capital has three forms - Financial, Social & Intellectual, at Eternal everything we do is aimed at catalysing this convergence. 

Empowered by a seasoned operator-led team and bolstered by a diverse tribe of advisors, our collective wisdom is not just on paper - it's the heartbeat of our tribe, fuelling growth for founders seeking success.

A sector agnostic fund, we help create and scale transformative businesses!

Name: True Wealth Ventures
Description:
True Wealth Ventures is an early-stage stage venture firm, led by two Austin-based women, Sara Brand and Kerry Rupp. The fund invests in women-led companies improving human and environmental health. 

Their investment thesis is that women-led companies perform better financially, as reported in many studies, yet are an untapped market with approximately 2% of venture dollars going to female-founded start-ups over the last decade.

True Wealth Ventures was at the vanguard of this movement of women investing in women. Closing their ~$20M Fund I in Jan 2018 made them the largest VC fund ever raised with an exclusive gender-lens investment strategy, and with an unprecedented 80% of LPs identifying as women. 

The future of savvy investing is gender diverse.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Recast Capital
Description:
Recast Capital is a 100% women-owned venture capital platform that invests in and supports top-tier emerging fund managers, with a focus on diverse partnerships. The platform was founded by seasoned, institutionally-trained fund investors Courtney McCrea and Sara Zulkosky, and built to drive returns and create change in the venture industry. 
 
The core of the platform is a fund-of-funds providing LPs diversified exposure to top-performing emerging, diverse managers (US-based, Fund I-III), as well as access to a pipeline of tomorrow’s industry-leading franchises.  
 
As strong complements to the fund-of-funds, the platform also includes a tuition-free, virtual educational program called the Enablement Program, providing learning and development for emerging venture managers (109 funds have participated to date) and Recast Accelerate, a new program to support women- and nonbinary-led emerging managers in venture, including educational programming and $100k to be leveraged in support of their fund backend operations. Both the Enablement and Accelerate programs are powerful differentiators for Recast, helping Recast support more of the community than just those that it can invest in.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Beyond Impact VC
Description:
Beyond Impact Advisors creates portfolios that accelerate our transition to a kinder, cleaner, healthier world through superior, scalable and sustainable solutions with are animal-free, carbon-negative, and nature-positive across nutrition, ingredients, pharmaceuticals, and materials. The firm targets disruptive technologies in supply chains vulnerable to climate change, disease, and shifting consumer preferences., with a focus on :

Alternatives to protein and other animal-derived products using life science solutions including:
 - Plant, fungi and algae-based meat, fish, dairy, egg, wool and leather alternatives
 - Cell-cultured meat, fish and animal derivatives
 - Precision and biomass fermentation for functional ingredients
 - Upcycling of food waste
Replacements for animal testing
Cruelty-free, organic personal care products
Alternative bio-based materials

Beyond Impact offers funds across multiple jurisdictions as well as access to co-investments. Complete this form for more information bit.ly/BeyondImpactInfoRequest

Red River West promotes the international take-off of outstanding Fr/EUTech companies by providing significant financial firepower and game changing hands-on support in EU & the US.

Name: SaxeCap
Description:
SaxeCap is the premier AI transformation platform in the private equity industry, creating the concept of buying out traditional businesses and transforming them with AI in 2019. SaxeCap achieves this through a combination of (1) its private equity investment arm, (2) in-house AI transformation firm, and (3) proprietary generative AI, machine learning, and optimization software products.

In this vein, SaxeCap is the go-to AI transformation partner for 50+ private equity firms globally (including 8 of the top 10 PE funds by AUM) and has transformed 100+ businesses with AI across a wide variety of industries, driving billions of dollars of enterprise value expansion along the way.

Founder success is our top priority. We harness our global network and deep industry expertise to accelerate your growth. Our mission is to empower you with game-changing support through every stage of your journey. With our deep domain expertise and our unparalleled network, we’ll connect you with the whole ecosystem in order to take your company to the next levels.

Funding and Fundraising (from Seed and SeriesA to M&A) - In-Licensing / Out-Licensing of assets - Business strategy / partnerships - Distribution / Commercialization - Healthcare Venture Building - Technology Transfer in Healthcare .  
   
Biotech - Pharma - Biopharma - Medtech - Medical Devices - Diagnostics - eHealth - Digital Health .

Description:
Private equity firm focusing on the mid-market growth segment in India.

Name: Atena Equity Partners
Description:
Our Investment Strategy
Atena invests in high-quality Portuguese companies with ambitious growth, succession or restructuring plans. Atena has substantial experience investing in control-oriented equity and debt instruments, adapting each deal structure to the needs of the seller and the company. Atena’s in-house portfolio development team works closely with the target company’s management team from day one to define and implement transformational projects.

Our businesses
Since its foundation in 2014, Atena invested essentially in three sectors: Industrials, Healthcare and Business Services. Together they represented more than 300M€ in sales, with over half abroad to more than 40 countries, and more than 2 500 people. 

Our Team
Atena was founded on the premise that it is crucial to have in-house operational experience to make sounder investment decisions and to support the portfolio management teams in the design and implementation of truly transformational projects. Above all, we all share the same culture of Independence, Candor and Merit.
  
Our Funds
Atena raised its first Atena I fund in 2014 and is currently investing its third fund raised in 2024. Atena's funds under management have as ultimate beneficiaries its management team and several international (European and US) institutions. Atena Equity Partners and its funds under management are authorised and regulated by the CMVM.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Snowball
Description: Snowball Effect is changing the way that Kiwis invest in private companies. Through a range of capital raising options, Snowball Effect improves access to finance for high growth companies, and provides an easy channel for the public to discover and invest in those companies. We're simplifying online angel investing, venture capital, private equity and equity crowdfunding.

Description: Spero Ventures is an early-stage venture capital firm that invests in companies innovating at the edge of new industries and technologies to create a healthy, sustainable, and fulfilling future for everyone.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Benford Capital Partners
Description:
Benford Capital Partners is a Chicago-based private equity investment firm focused on leveraged buyouts and recapitalizations of lower middle market companies. The BCP team has over 80 years of combined experience buying and scaling businesses.

The BCP Team is a group of committed investment and operating professionals with significant experience acquiring, building, and operating lower middle market companies. The team utilizes its collective experience, background, knowledge base, and networks to help each portfolio company achieve long-term success.

BCP partners with founders, family owners and managers to grow smaller companies over time. As engaged stewards and partners, we seek to build businesses and invest in people while preserving each company’s legacy and culture. We pride ourselves in being straightforward, consistent, forthright and partnership oriented.

We strongly believe in a collaborative approach to building long-term value, with day-to-day decisions left to management. Toward that end, we take an active role at the Board of Directors level, focusing on growth opportunities, acquisitions, recruiting, strategy and financing. In situations involving Owner/Operator transitions, we often will draw upon our relationships with experienced outside managers seeking to take an active full-time role in a company.

Our investment time horizon is flexible and aligned with management’s goals over shorter or longer time-frames. We believe in long-term value creation and have longer average investment periods.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Hyper
Description: Focused more on the venture part of venture capital. Helping modern startups with the things they need to succeed: community, distribution, mentorship, talent, and fundraising.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: ONCAP Management Partners
Description:
ONCAP, in partnership with operating company management teams, invests in and builds value in North American headquartered small and medium sized businesses that are market leaders and possess meaningful growth potential. ONCAP targets significant minority or control equity investments of $20 to $250 million. ONCAP is the mid-market private equity platform of Onex.

Onex is an investor and asset manager that invests capital on behalf of Onex shareholders and clients across the globe. Formed in 1984, we have a long track record of creating value for our clients and shareholders. Onex’ two primary businesses are Private Equity and Credit. In Private Equity, we raise funds from third-party investors, or limited partners, and invest them, along with Onex’ own investing capital, through the funds of our private equity platforms, Onex Partners and ONCAP. Similarly, in Credit, we raise and invest capital across several private credit, public credit and public equity strategies. Our investors include a broad range of global clients, including public and private pension plans, sovereign wealth funds, insurance companies and family offices. In total, Onex has $57.2 billion in assets under management, of which $8.5 billion is Onex’ own investing capital. With offices in Toronto, New York, New Jersey, Boston and London, Onex and its experienced management teams are collectively the largest investors across Onex’ platforms.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: The Hive
Description:
We are looking for entrepreneurs!

The Hive is an AI fund and co-creation studio that collaborates closely with entrepreneurs and corporations to create and launch AI based startups.

We believe that applications that leverage the innovation in generative AI and data infrastructures are changing the world, our lives and every industry.  The Hive's focus is on the enterprise and vertical industries including energy, core engineering, commerce & fintech, health and resources/agritech.

We are a collection of proven company creators, under one roof who work actively with founders to help them go from concept to company. Our in-house strategy, technology, and investment team combined with our extensive network of corporations, universities and AI experts create a perfect opportunity to launch market leading companies in very short order.

The Hive is based in Los Altos, USA and Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia.

BAC PRIVATE INVESTORS, un ecosistema internacional de inversión inmobiliaria conformado por tres unidades clave:
 Consultora Estratégica en Inversiones (CEI)
Brindamos asesoría personalizada para estructurar, financiar y rentabilizar proyectos inmobiliarios. Nuestro enfoque combina análisis financiero, planificación patrimonial y visión global para ayudar a los inversores a tomar decisiones informadas y estratégicas en España y Latinoamérica.
 International Realty
Nuestra unidad de real estate internacional especializada en oportunidades off market del sector lujo. Accede a propiedades y proyectos inmobiliarios fuera del mercado público en 21 países, con alto potencial de revalorización. Ofrecemos venta de activos, desarrollo de promociones y servicios de construcción llave en mano.
 Realty Investor Club
Un club exclusivo para inversores privados que desean formar parte activa de proyectos rentables, recibir asesoramiento continuo y participar en una red internacional de alto nivel. La membresía incluye acceso prioritario a oportunidades, networking y eventos estratégicos.
En BAC PRIVATE INVESTORS combinamos exclusividad, inteligencia financiera y oportunidades globales para crear un entorno sólido y rentable para nuestros socios.

Ultimately, this is in service of providing the pensions of the teachers of Ontario. 

Since 2019, Koru has built and launched 11 new ventures across a variety of industries and geographies including child care, field safety, customer service innovation, financial services, e-commerce logistics, insurance, elder care and climate tech/energy transition.

Name: Canastra Ventures
Description:
A Canastra Ventures desenvolve e investe em startups de inteligência artificial em estágio inicial. Fundada por investidores e empreendedores experientes, oferecemos financiamento, orientação estratégica e uma rede de contatos valiosa para transformar a inovação em IA no Brasil. 

Nosso objetivo é maximizar o retorno sobre o investimentos dos nossos negócios, promovendo o crescimento sustentável e escalável das startups do nosso portfólio. A Canastra Ventures tem como objetivo apoiar empreendedores nos estágios iniciais, incentivando a criação de startups disruptivas por meio de metodologias comprovadas, suporte de profissionais experientes e recursos financeiros. Além de capital, oferecemos programas de residência e matchmaking para conectar e selecionar os melhores empreendedores e gerar parte do nosso deal-flow. 

Se você é um empreendedor em busca de um co-fundador, quer desenvolver sua tese de startup de IA ou está captando seu primeiro investimento, queremos conhecer você! Visite nosso site para saber mais. 

“Guiamos os ousados na trilha da construção de startups inesquecíveis!”

// Canastra Ventures

TCD Capital is a venture capital fund dedicated to daring entrepreneurs in Belgium and Northern France. 

Our mission is to help local growth companies towards their global competitiveness.

In essence, we build alliances with the best local teams looking to reach the next level.

We typically invest between €1m and €5m per company via our latest fund, TCD Capital II. 

Our fund is backed by a strong group of investors from various sectors including +100 private and 3 institutional investors.

For ambitious entrepreneurs seeking to propel their businesses to new heights, we invite you to connect with us! Together, we can explore avenues for collaboration and build alliances for growth.

Name: JLL Partners
Description: JLL Partners is a middle market private equity firm with over three decades of experience transforming businesses in the healthcare, aerospace & defense, and business services sectors. The firm is dedicated to partnering with companies that it can help build into market leaders through a combination of strategic mergers and acquisitions, organic growth initiatives, and operational enhancements. The JLL Partners team is comprised of seasoned investment professionals and operating partners who are focused on driving long-term value creation across its portfolio. Since its founding in 1988, JLL Partners has over $8 billion of equity capital committed and invested across nine private equity funds, with over 59 platform investments and more than 183 add-on acquisitions.

Name: VentureTECH
Description:
About VentureTECH

VentureTECH is principally an investment company established by the Government of Malaysia in 2009 with the national mandate to encourage the participation of local Malaysian companies in high value-added and high technology industries, a key mainstay that will drive Malaysia into a sustainable high-growth economy.

VentureTECH assumes a catalytic role to assist with the transformation of the nation’s economic development trajectory by advancing the capability of local technology-based companies in targeted growth areas of bio-based, green and emerging industries with an aim to provide new opportunities for growth to generate socio-economic benefits to the country and Rakyat. This is achieved by collaborating with key ministries, lead development agencies, and financial institutions.

VentureTECH’s mission is to increase the number of viable, competitive regional and global companies in strategic and high value-added industries, which will be driven by our investment strategies customised to address the existing critical funding gaps within the ecosystem.

VentureTECH is well-positioned to play the strategic role in driving the structural reform in economic policies, needed to accelerate the economy’s upward shift towards advanced and knowledge-based economy. Through our impact investment approach, we will continue to emphasise on the socio-economic multipliers that can be created through our investments which aim to expand the benefits to include the wider community while accelerating productivity growth.

VentureTECH is part of the Global Impact Investing Network (GIIN), the leading organisation dedicated to increasing the scale and effectiveness of impact investing.

VentureTECH was incorporated as a wholly-owned subsidiary of the Malaysian Industry-Government Group for High Technology (MIGHT).
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: BIDAYAT
Description:
Bidayat is a multi-dimensional investment platform empowering creative talent and entrepreneurs from Europe and MENA in fashion, accessories, jewellery, beauty and lifestyle. Founded by Rachid Mohamed Rachid, Bidayat lets talented entrepreneurs and high-growth companies with a strong brand DNA flourish into global success stories by supporting exceptional founders in realising their vision through investments, operational expertise, industry networks, mentorship as well as physical and digital hubs. 

Bidayat is the operational investment arm of Alsara Investment Group, an international private investment company with a focus on creative industries, founded by Rachid Mohamed Rachid.

Investing in life sciences. Investing in life.

Seroba is a European life sciences venture capital firm based in Dublin, Paris and Milan, investing its fourth Fund. We focus on value creation through backing cutting-edge biotech and medtech innovation that will transform the treatment of unmet medical needs. Our team has deep industry and operational experience and an extensive global network. We like to work with entrepreneurs who share our passion for success and for investors who share the same goal of improving human health while driving financial returns.

Our world has no shortage of challenges. Every day, we continue to struggle against illness and disease, a lack of opportunity, homelessness, violence and oppression, climate change, and hunger.

Technology offers powerful solutions to these challenges.

We work with the best founders building the most scalable solutions. Founders compelled by their mission. Founders building Necessary Ventures.

Name: Antares Ventures
Description:
Antares Ventures. Deep Tech. For Asia.
Built to Matter.

Antares Ventures is a purpose-built deep tech venture capital fund with an integrated platform designed to scale breakthrough industrial technologies into complex, high-growth Asian markets.

We invest globally in science-backed innovators shaping the future of energy, industry, transport, cities, and computing, and actively support their commercial scaling across the Asia region.

Antares differentiates itself through deep regional connectivity across Asia and a thesis-driven investment approach. Our proprietary research identifies where structural demand, industrial constraints, and policy tailwinds converge — enabling us to source, underwrite, and scale technologies with clear pathways to real-world adoption.

Beyond capital, we provide hands-on commercialization support through board-level governance, corporate partnerships, pilot execution, localization, and go-to-market structuring. This helps founders navigate regulatory complexity, reduce execution risk, and scale faster — generating durable alpha for our investors.

We invest where deep science-backed innovation meets industrial reality — and scale it where it matters the most.

Name: Black Dragon Capital
Description: Black Dragon Capital LLC (BDC) is a unique growth-oriented private equity firm focused on investing in areas where information technology is enabling the disruption of industries by allowing a faster, better and more economically compelling way to solve industry issues. We seek to benefit from a diverse perspective combined with high performance operating and investment executives. We hire and promote based on merit, without bias, and make a genuine effort to ensure we have a diversified team that aligns with the diversity of our portfolio companies and their clients. We intend to maintain over 65% of our team members as culturally or gender diverse and work hard to foster a supportive and welcoming workplace. Bringing a leadership and advisory group of successful entrepreneurs, former operators and deal making experience, Black Dragon’s team has a track record of building market leading companies, driving above market returns and accelerating growth and profitability through its distribution connections, strategic advice, and active participation within our investments, primarily in financial technologies, eCommerce, and sports and media technology markets.

Name: Lighthouse Labs
Description:
Lighthouse Labs is an 11 week startup accelerator focused on market validation, customer understanding, and venture readiness for launch! Founders receive $20K of equity-free funding and the perfect environment to learn, build, and grow!

We are a member of the Global Accelerator Network/Morrow and a Top 25 seed accelerator. We focus on supporting a broad technology and product portfolio of US-based, seed-stage startups in Virginia and beyond.

The program is founder-led and mentor-driven. This leads to strong results including over $132M+ in venture capital raised, 2500 jobs created and $200M+ in economic stimulus through jobs created over more than a decade.

Visit our website: http://www.lighthouselabsrva.com

WHAT STARTUPS GET
• $20,000 in 0% equity seed capital 
• 11 of the most productive weeks of your life filled with guided workshops and amazing mentor sessions led by industry experts
• 3+ months of free coworking space
• Connections to mentors, investors, and partners

The ideal Lighthouse Labs company…
is a high-tech, high-growth, scalable, early-stage but post-MVP company 
is experiencing positive traction and looking to raise a pre-seed/seed investment round within 6-12 months
should have a validated business model and a proven market need for their product/service evidenced by early sales revenue or beta partnerships
comes from any industry (but we have particular interest in healthcare-related and/or FinTech companies)
is US-based, and we especially like Virginia-based companies!

The ideal Lighthouse Labs founder…
is a full-time solo founder or cofounder
is committed to active and consistent participation within the program and seeks educational, mentoring, and networking opportunities  
should exhibit strong ethics, tenacity, and coachability
may have attended other accelerator programs
We welcome participation from multiple cofounders and strive to select diverse founders, including a significant number of traditionally underrepresented founders.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Northstar Ventures
Description:

Name: MFOUNDERS
Description:
At MFOUNDERS, we're uniting Moroccan Potential with Global Opportunity.
We stand at the forefront of empowering Moroccan entrepreneurs, symbolizing the fusion of our Moroccan heritage and global innovation. Our vision is to create a world where Moroccan startups are synonymous with global success, driven by our mission to connect, nurture, and elevate local talent to the world stage, by leveraging our unique network of successful moroccan diaspora worldwide through a dedicated and visionary Investment Club, co-founded by the renown Ilan Benhaim from Vente-Privée now called "VeePee".

As a member of the successful Moroccan Diaspora, you possess the unique ability to shape the future of Moroccan entrepreneurship. MFOUNDERS invites you to give back to your roots and gain privileged access to meticulously curated and vetted investment opportunities. By joining us, you become part of an elite network of over 40 members, engaging with promising startups that have undergone thorough due diligence. Your involvement is more than investment; it's a commitment to foster innovation and success within the Moroccan entrepreneurial landscape.

For the ambitious Moroccan Startup Founders & Entrepreneurs, MFOUNDERS is your Gateway to scaling new heights and reaching a Global Growth.
We provide a platform not just for funding, but for mentorship, strategic partnerships, and access to a global network. Aligning with us means embracing the opportunity to transform your vision into a global success. We are here to guide, support, and propel your journey from local brilliance to international acclaim. 

Join MFOUNDERS, and let's build a globally recognized Moroccan entrepreneurial ecosystem together.

Name: Blu Ventures
Description:
Blu Venture Investors is a venture capital investment company that supports early stage entrepreneurs in the Mid-Atlantic Region – Maryland, Virginia, Washington, DC and North Carolina. We typically invest $500K to $1.0M in a single round.  When larger financing rounds are needed, we actively look to syndicate deals with other investment groups in our network.  Our goal is an accelerated, successful exit, for both company founders and investors alike.

Our investors are experienced, successful operating executives with experience in a broad range of industries and business models. Each of our investors has successfully launched new companies, products or services.

The Blu Ventures Affiliate Program is a “by invitation only” group of accredited investors. These investors are provided Blu due diligence materials and quarterly/annual reporting of our portfolio companies. They invest alongside the Blu principals and benefit from our close engagement with our portfolio companies.

Affiliates have the opportunity to invest via an opt-in model which mirrors those deals in which Blu members have already agreed to invest. This unique arrangement affords the affiliate members exposure to deal flow they would not see, substantive due diligence, and institutional-quality documentation and governance—all without the time commitment. Twice per year, we invite the affiliates for a Blu meeting and reception to network with principals and one another.

For more information about Blu Ventures or to submit a business plan, please visit us at http://www.bluventureinvestors.com

Name: Somerset Indus Capital Partners
Description:
Somerset Indus Capital Partners is an impact-aligned private equity firm backing healthcare businesses to deliver quality, accessible, and affordable healthcare products and services across India’s underserved markets. Through our portfolio, we have positively impacted more than 67 million lives, including over 17 million patient lives—and the numbers continue to grow.

Co-founded by Avinash Kenkare and Mayur Sirdesai, Somerset is led by a seasoned team, bringing over 100 years of combined experience across private equity, pharma, and healthcare.

Over the past 14 years, we have scaled significantly, with fund sizes increasing from USD 27 million to USD 76 million, and then to USD 250 million. Today, we manage assets under management (AUM) of around USD 500 million, underpinned by a strong track record and deep sector expertise.

Since 2011, we’ve partnered with growth-oriented, resilient, purpose-led promoters building differentiated models across healthcare delivery, pharma, medical devices, diagnostics, and other high-impact sectors. 

Our investment strategy focuses on significant minority positions through growth equity, with typical ticket sizes ranging from USD 15 - 30 million. We are usually the first institutional partner for all our investee companies, supporting them as they scale innovation and operational excellence. 

Somerset’s impact approach is grounded in strong principles and a clear intent to drive measurable, lasting change. Our proprietary Impact & ESG Framework aligns with global standards such as IRIS+, UN SDGs, SASB, and IFC Performance Standards. We are also a member of the Global Impact Investing Network (GIIN). Our membership signifies a commitment to deepening our engagement in the impact investing industry.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Pasadena Angels
Description:
The Pasadena Angels Organization was founded in 2000 and is one of the longest-running angel investing groups in Southern California.  We have invested over $95 million in 240 companies. Pasadena Angels funded companies have gone on to raise over $1 billion from additional funding sources such as venture capital and private equity. Recent notable exits for the Pasadena Angels are Mind Body Software (NASDAQ:MB) reaching $1 billion and Bluebeam Software, acquired by Nemetschek for $100 million. The Pasadena Angels has been consistently ranked as one of the top ten angel investing groups in the country according to Forbes, CB Insights, and Angel Resource Institute. A nonprofit entity, the Pasadena Angels offers early-stage start-ups capital investments; as well as mentoring from the expertise of more than 100 investor members with over 4,000 years of combined business expertise. Our $1.7 million PA Fund 2, formed in 2021 co-invests exclusively in deals subscribed by Pasadena Angels members. 

Our members invest individually and directly, without any legal pooling of financial resources. The Pasadena Angels, a nonprofit 501(c)6 organization, does not invest or act as an investment agent in any manner.

Our purpose is to offer liquid access to venture capital investments, a traditionally illiquid asset class.

Investment policy:

We take equity positions in private companies of a technological nature characterized by-product or process innovation active in the financial, medical, and deep technology industries. Name: Magic USA Inc.
Description:
Investing is hard. Investing globally in Private Equity is even harder. The smartest people often struggle to diversify their assets outside their home countries. Where do I put my money? How do I take it out? How do I get it back? Basic questions seem tricky. At Magic USA Inc. (www.peermagic.com), we make it easy for the ultra rich accredited investors to create a portfolio of global investments. 

Magic USA Inc. is a deal-by-deal global private equity platform for Ultra High Net Worth professionals. We handpick deals in Real Estate, Technology, Operating Companies and offer to our pool of investors to participate. We’ve invested over $100MN in dozens of pre-IPO companies such as AirBnB, Slack, Robinhood and SpaceX. We’ve gotten good at curating deals, systems and are ready to grow our business portfolio further. MaGiC USA is backed by some of the globally renowned entrepreneurs and senior executives and their family offices. It has invested over $100MM in over 90 ventures so far and has delivered upwards of 20% IRR in its exits. MaGiC USA invests in real estate to growth stage technology companies to late stage (pre-ipo) deals across industry. It has also invested in multi-family residential real estate redevelopments which act as a hedge to lumpy returns one gets in technology investments.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Finhouse
Description:
Om de beste niet-beursgenoteerde fondsen toegankelijk te maken voor een breder publiek, richtte Thomas Guenter het Finhouse fonds op. 

In het fonds worden verschillende interessante private equity en venture capital fondsen gebundeld op een kostenefficiënte en fiscaalvriendelijke manier. Het Finhouse fonds garandeert een spreiding qua sectoren, geografieën, enz.

Het Finhouse Global Fund in zeven punten:
1 Fund of funds - Het Finhouse fonds is een fonds dat investeert in andere fondsen.
2 Skin in the game - Thomas Guenter investeert bijna zijn volledige eigen vermogen in het fonds.
3 PE & VC - De fondsen waarin wordt belegd, investeren uw geld in niet-beursgenoteerde bedrijven.
4 Kosten - Finhouse kan de fondskosten laag houden door met een klein, toegewijd team te werken.
5 Belastingen - Wij investeren voor u, en bewaken de gunstige fiscaliteit van alle fondsinvesteringen.
6 Diversificatie - Wij zorgen voor een gediversifieerde mix van fondsen (verschillende sectoren, enz.).
7 Toegang - Finhouse draagt bij aan de democratisering van topfondsen die moeilijk toegankelijk zijn.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: 88 Ventures
Description:
At 88 Ventures, we're driven by the vision of revolutionizing industries through artificial intelligence like no other. Our diverse team of domain experts, first principle problem solvers, and constant real-time skill development helps us to create solutions that drive results!

While many celebrate burn rates, funds raised and the glamour of being in the press, we feel most successful businesses are based on unique customer insights and are often ‘boring’ in nature. For example: mailchimp, audiopen, tweethunter and many more.

Value is created when teams are small and frugal. Our DNA is to incubate and invest in start-ups that are built on AI-first principles. That redefines the cost to build, cost of operations, and experiences that truly delight customers. In fact we are limiting the size of each product to be no more than 7-10 people. We actively discourage use of paid media till we find product market fit. 

The model is not for every idea and every founding team. This best suits ideas which have mid-size TAM, can be built at 10% of the cost it would have taken 3 years back, and are NOT winner-take-all situations.

With this in mind, we are particularly excited about reimagining the sales & marketing tools, fintech, and sports-tech. Industries where we feel AI will have the biggest impact and delightful micro-SaaS solutions can be built. 

If you’re an entrepreneur looking for the perfect tools and guidance that will drive your venture to success, let's connect & explore how we can collaborate to drive meaningful impact & foster a digitally empowered world!
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Software is changing the process of commercializing and discovering breakthroughs for human (bio/health) and planetary (climate) longevity:

* Faster adoption - means commercialization and monetization of breakthroughs using internet tech: Web3, marketplaces, payments/fintech, DAOs, networks, privacy layers, branding, new business models, operators, ...

* Faster innovation - means new platforms and infrastructure: SaaS, analytics, visualization tools, APIs, data as-a-service, OSs, workflow automation, simulations, AI / prediction tools, design and collaboration tools, ...

Investing where Software meets Science.

We believe that the future lies at the convergence of online and offline, and that these worlds should connect in ways that dramatically enhance, expand, and uplift the human experience. As an early-stage venture fund and studio, we seek to inspire beautiful companies, surrounding founders with resources that support their well-being, uncommon and unparalleled perspective, and radical collaboration. 

We believe that voracious curiosity and diverse thinking is fundamental to innovation. Throughout history, the technological breakthroughs that most benefit humanity have been forged by diverse founders living at the intersections of tech, science, engineering, design, and art. We aim for our investments and our community to reflect this conviction.
