Name: Maxis
Description:
İş Bankası Grubu bünyesinde 2017 Kasım ayında kurulan Maxis Girişim Sermayesi Portföy Yönetimi A.Ş (Maxis), çağdaş standartlarda sürdürülebilir ve kurumsal bir iş modeliyle, uzun vadeli perspektife sahip nitelikli yatırımcıları büyüme potansiyeline sahip girişim şirketleri ile bir araya getirerek girişim sermayesi yatırım fonları oluşturmayı ve yönetmeyi amaç edinmiştir. Hem yatırımcılar hem de yatırım gerçekleştirilen şirketler için değer yaratan ve Türkiye’nin en tecrübeli yatırım ekiplerinden birine sahip olan Maxis, farklı temalara sahip erken ve büyüme aşamasındaki 17 fonu kurmuş ve yönetmektedir. 450 milyon ABD dolarının üzerindeki portföy büyüklüğü ile Türkiye ekonomisine katma değer sağlamak için çalışmalarını sürdüren Maxis, kurumsal, bireysel ve Türkiye İş Bankası grup şirketlerinden oluşmak üzere 275’ten fazla saygın yatırımcıya, profesyonel yatırımcı ilişkileri yönetimi sunmaktadır. 

Maxis, girişimcilik ekosisteminde tohum aşamasından büyüme aşamasına kadar yatırım değer zincirinin tamamını kapsayan geniş bir fon ailesini yönetmektedir. Bu kapsamda Yenilikçi GSYF, Temiz Enerji GSYF, Atlas Büyüme Sermayesi GSYF, E-Ticaret GSYF, Founder One GSYF, T-Fon GSYF, Arya GSYF, 100. Yıl GSYF, TSKB GSYF, Maxis Ventures GSYF, Türkiye Yeşil Finans Projesi GSYF, Templeton Türkiye Fonu II GSYF, AStart GSYF, Karma Strateji GSYF, Bioscience Managers GSYF, İTÜ ARI Teknokent GSYF ve ODTÜ 70. Yıl GSYF ile farklı temalar ve sektörlerde erken aşamadan ölçeklenme sürecine kadar uzanan yatırımlarla girişimlerin sürdürülebilir büyümesini desteklemektedir.

Maxis, yatırımcıların aldıkları riske uygun getiri beklentilerine cevap vererek, girişim şirketlerinin sürdürülebilir hızlı büyümesine ve kurumsallaşmasına katkı sağlayarak Türk ekonomisinde kalıcı değer oluşturmayı hedeflemektedir.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Clay Capital
Description:
We have helped to germinate and grow some of the most iconic start-ups that are revolutionising the world of food and agriculture today.

Pioneers in deploying venture capital into high impact agrifood tech since 2014, we back ambitious teams that are reconnecting and strengthening the link between human health and the health of the planet through innovative technology.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Indian VCs
Description:
Indian VCs is a global venture community. A space where founders, venture capitalists, and investors come together to connect, learn, and grow.

We build an ecosystem that accelerates ideas, supports people at every stage, and creates transparency in venture. We see a future where India’s brightest ideas don’t just succeed at home, but make a global impact.

We play the long game. With curiosity, hunger, patience, and a bias for supporting underdogs, we’re here to grow India’s venture ecosystem – from 0 to 1, 1 to 10, and 10 to 100.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Lumen Ventures
Description: We are a team of operators and former founders with a strategic focus on investing in technology companies at the seed stage with a particular affinity for backing second-time founders.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Rainmaking APAC (part of Bain & Company)
Description:
Established in 2017 and part of Bain & Company since 2023, Rainmaking APAC is one of the region's largest venture development companies dedicated to ideating, building, launching and scaling businesses.

Our portfolio focuses on co-founding new startups in partnership with corporate partners and entrepreneurial founders, growing them from pre-seed and beyond. To date, the companies Rainmaking APAC has built and scaled have generated over SGD 880 mil in funding and hold a combined equity value of more than SGD 9bn.

With a truly pan-APAC perspective on venture development, the company has built ventures and scaled startups across key markets in the region, including dedicated offices in Singapore, South Korea, and Japan and a presence in Australia, Malaysia, Thailand and the Philippines. Rainmaking APAC is a branded service line within Bain & Company's Innovation & Design ecosystem.

We are building the future by unleashing the power of entrepreneurship at scale. Are you ready to build with us?
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Morrison Seger Venture Capital Partners
Description:
Morrison Seger Venture Capital Partners is a Texas based venture capital fund, with a focus on emerging companies that deliver real value to our investors. From CPG to SaaS, we employ a generalist approach as our investment and diversification strategy. We partner with industry leaders and influencers whose purpose is to impact others in a meaningful way.

We invest when:
1. We believe in the company.
2. The brand is recognizable. 
3. Price matches value.
4. The brand is exciting.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Pfingsten Partners
Description:
Pfingsten is an operationally oriented private equity firm based in Chicago.  With over 35 years of experience, we invest in entrepreneur-led and family-owned manufacturing, distribution, and business services companies. Our focus is on empowering businesses by investing in people, systems, facilities, equipment, and product and service innovation. We provide each company with strategic operational support, a conservative capital structure, and global resources to accelerate growth and profitability.

Company Size Parameters:
Revenue:  $20 to $150 million
EBITDA:    $3 to $12 million
***Companies can be of any size for add-on investments***

Where We Invest:
Manufacturing    |    Distribution    |    Business Services

Geographic Preference:
North America    |    No geographic preference for add-on acquisitions

Follow us on Twitter:   @_Pfingsten
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: 359 Capital
Description:
At 359 Capital we help founders do the impossible. With $300M under management, we back Seed to Series C consumer and consumer adjacent companies. We help our founders achieve success through our connectivity into the difficult-to-penetrate markets of sports, media and entertainment, as represented by our unique LP base. We’re nimble, acting as a lead, co-lead or syndicate. Primary areas of focus are Next Gen Media, Digital Commerce, Gaming, Social, AI Application, Prosumer Tools and Wellness.

Our ‘One of One’ LP group offers the capital and industry-defining experience of premier global sport, media and entertainment brands, including City Football Group, adidas, AEG, MSG, Sinclair, Bank of Montreal, Pentland Group, Arctos and owners from all major U.S. sports leagues as well as strategically oriented family offices and institutional investors.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Spicehaus
Description: Spicehaus Partners AG is an independent Swiss venture capital investor. We focus on seed and early stage companies in the technology sector in Switzerland. We are hands-on investors and actively accompany our portfolio companies on their road to success.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: MLog S.A.
Description:
MLog is a pure investment company focused on developing operating platforms in different sectors.

We focus on the development and growth of our investees through a combination of strategic and daily management influence.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals
Location: Rio De Janeiro, Rio De Janeiro

Name: Carthona Capital
Description:
Carthona Capital is a hands-on, proactive, and thematic venture capital investor based in Sydney, Australia that invests globally.

Carthona Capital was founded in 2014 when a group of like-minded venture investors came together to invest on a deal-by-deal basis. In 2017, Carthona Capital shifted to a more traditional venture capital model by raising its first fund from a mix of Institutional (Superannuation), Family Office and High Net-worth investors.

Carthona Capital likes to invest very early - their initial investment into a business is usually at the Pre-Seed, Seed, or Series A stages. Carthona then likes to follow-on strongly and continue to deploy larger amounts of capital as the business matures, and in one instance supporting a business by participating in seven different independent financing rounds.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Greater Sum Ventures
Description:
Greater Sum Ventures is a founder-led, founder-first investment firm that excels at partnering with vertical software and tech-enabled service companies in the lower-middle market. 

Unlike most private equity firms, we are backed by our own capital—that means there are no formal funds and no forced finish lines. We have the ultimate flexibility in where we source, what we invest in, how we partner, and when we exit stage left. 

Over the past 10 years, we have partnered with founders to scale 24 tech-enabled platforms—6 of which have grown to over $1B in value—and we have transacted more than 300 times.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Core Innovation Capital
Description:
Core generates outsized returns by investing in the infrastructure that powers wealth and health for the mass market. We have a disciplined focus on technology that can create step-function improvements in cost, access, and outcomes. We stay focused on what’s essential: rebuilding the core systems that shape everyday life—financial services, healthcare, real estate, insurance, and work.

We invest $1-5 million primarily in Seed to Series A companies. We take meaningful positions, offer hands-on partnership, and provide founders with the strategic guidance needed to navigate complex, high-barrier industries.

Investments include NerdWallet, Attain, Healthsherpa, and Ripple, among many others over the past 15 years.

Contact Us: info@corevc.com
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: 6 Degrees Capital
Description: We are an early-stage investor backing companies at Seed & Series A, with substantial follow-on capital available for later rounds. Rooted in Europe yet with a global reach, we've partnered with 70+ founding teams over 3 fund generations, helping them turn bold ambitions into lasting companies.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: BKR Capital
Description: Founded in 2021, BKR Capital (formerly Black Innovation Capital) was built with the objective of investing in promising black founders in the technology space.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Columbia Capital
Description: Columbia Capital is a venture capital firm based in Alexandria, VA. Since 1989, we have been partnering with top executives to help build communications, media and technology companies. Over the years, we have invested in over 150 companies, many of which have redefined or created new industries.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Harkat Aval
Description:
Harkat Aval, the venture capital arm of MCI, is the venture capital firm dealing with investment in innovative ideas in ICT. The venture capital aims to foster innovation by investing in startups and innovative ideas in the industry. Harkat Aval helps the entrepreneurs and creative individuals and teams to pave their way into a successful business and make their future. Our investment focus is on Internet of Things (IoT), healthcare, ecommerce, Transportation & Logistics, Travel, e-Learning, Fintech and Telecommunications.

Name: Fintech Ventures Fund
Description:
Fintech Ventures Fund ("FVF") is an investment firm hyperfocused on supporting founders building businesses with banking/capital markets, lending, and insurance use cases, through providing customized debt and equity financing solutions.

Follow-on strategic investors in FVF's portfolio companies include Amazon, Apollo, Blackstone, Credit Suisse, Ford Motors, Jefferies, and KKR, among others.

Our portfolio companies have also raised venture capital/growth equity from Drive Capital, Edison Partners, Goodwater Capital, Google, M12 (Microsoft's Venture Fund), Montage Ventures, Slow Ventures, and Softbank.

Founded in 2009 and headquartered in Philadelphia, OUP manages over $800 million and has invested in more than 150 life science and technology start-ups. For more information, visit oup.vc.

Description:
Stein Industries, Inc. is a diversified manufacturing company with locations in the USA and Asia. Since 1907, Stein Industries, Inc. has been committed to forging strategic relationships with our partners, our employees and the community.

We are constantly looking for new business opportunities and exciting strategic partnerships. Please contact us if you would like to learn more about our company or any of our divisions.

If you are an experienced, motivated individual looking to work with a progressive company that has an ambitious vision of the future, we encourage you to check our online career opportunities.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Katjes Greenfood
Description:
Katjes Greenfood is Europe's first impact investor in the rapidly growing market for sustainable food brands. Based in Dusseldorf, we are specialists within the consumer-packaged goods segment and focus on Series A funding in order to support disruptive start-ups within Germany and the US.

Katjes Greenfood is part of the Katjes Group and we love to share our industry knowledge with our founder teams for growing strong and impactful food brands.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Tau Ventures
Description: AI-first, seed-first fund in digital health, automation (cars, drones, robots) & enterprise
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Brickyard
Description: We're an odd bird in early stage venture capital.

Name: 4Di Capital
Description:
4Di Capital is a Cape Town-based venture capital fund management firm focused on early-stage technology investments in sub-Saharan Africa.

Launched in 2009 by a group of successful founders and tech entrepreneurs with a vision to help build and scale African start-ups, 4Di Capital was one of the continent’s earliest venture fund managers, and is widely considered one of its most experienced and trusted investors.

Passionately committed to innovation on the continent, 4Di is a staunch advocate for African entrepreneurs, whom they believe are well-placed to quickly and cost-effectively develop solutions to some of the world’s most pressing challenges – from socio-economic inclusion to green technology, health equity, transportation and infrastructure. 

Known for their professional mentoring, partnership-style approach and skill encouraging alignment among investors and board directors, 4Di has become a preferred funder to Africa's best and brightest founders, and a respected voice helping to elevate best-in-class African businesses internationally.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Bull City Venture Partners
Description: Bull City Venture Partners is a Durham, NC-based venture capital firm investing in software and internet companies.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Arāya Ventures
Description:
Empowering Founders to Flourish

The way we experience healthcare, live consciously, work productively, shop experientially and grow our wealth is transforming at rapid pace. We invest in world-positive entrepreneurs re-imagining this future.

We believe in backing founders from all walks of life. And we mean it.
We know there is value beyond capital. And we deliver it.
We feel inspired by the innovations transforming how we live and work. And we are committed to empowering that change.

We invest at the earliest of stages (pre-seed and seed) and build empowering relationships with the founders we fund, providing unparalleled access to expertise, network, support, and capital.

We apply a diversification lens on every investment opportunity, backing daring founders who are closing gaps and addressing underserved needs in bold, unconventional, and creative ways. And we’ve proven the outsized impact this strategy delivers.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Infinity Recycling
Description:
We identify and invest in innovative businesses enabling diverse waste streams 
to be turned into valuable new materials. From breakthrough technologies 
through to first-of-a-kind commercial plants, we create investable propositions 
that unlock the economic potential of circularity.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: VIA EQUITY
Description: VIA equity is a leading Northern European private equity firm with an excellent track record of building and transforming investments into national and international industry leaders. Core investment focus is within a broad definition of Software and IT Services industries but the firm considers investments in a wide range of sectors.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: ARCH Emerging Markets Partners Limited
Description:
ARCH Emerging Markets Partners Limited (ARCH) was founded in March 2018 and is a specialist investment advisor with deep emerging market, private equity, asset management and legal and governance experience. We employ a tier-one governance platform, including finance, legal, compliance, investor relations and ESG functions, to support our funds and deliver added value to our investments. 

Through our advisory themes, ARCH’s investment decisions are based on a commitment to environmental sustainability, social responsibility and ethical behaviour. We measure our success not just by profits, but by impact, as demonstrated by the Development Finance Institutions that have supported our strategies.

ARCH offers funds and strategies to global institutional investors in sectors and geographies that can be difficult to access as offshore investors. ARCH can offer these unique strategies through an experienced structuring and distribution skillset and by establishing strategically focused vehicles to target specific opportunities. ARCH executives have extensive experience managing and investing in high-growth businesses in emerging markets, with strong local networks and a focus on early-life cycle development where they seek to unlock growth and create sustainable returns for investors.

The company has as shareholders JCH & Partners and African Rainbow Capital, the African financial services company established in 2015 by Ubuntu-Botho Investments (the private capital vehicle of Patrice Motsepe). ARCH’s shareholders bring a wealth of experience in emerging markets and private equity, whilst senior executives within ARCH have been founders of numerous asset management start-up businesses, representing international and global operations.

ARCH is currently advising on investments for two emerging markets focused strategies (Renewable Energy and Logistics / Cold Chain Solutions Platforms) and a global strategy (Sustainable Natural Resources).
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Centre for Incubation and Business Acceleration
Description:
Centre for Incubation and Business Acceleration is a Technology Based Incubator (TBI) established to support growth of technology based startup companies in the region and also to inculcate culture of innovation and entrepreneurship in the society. 

CIBA is section 25 company Not for profit organization that is Goa's only premier institute in promoting entrepreneurship and helping innovative ideas by providing incubation, mentoring, networking and seed funding.

CIBA has two incubation centres in Goa  located at Assagao (North Goa) & Verna (south Goa).
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Canadian Women in VC
Description:
Women in VC is a Canadian grassroots organization dedicated to accelerating the next generation of women in venture capital through Professional Development, Networking and Suppport. Our vision is to unify the venture capital community to equip the next generation of leaders, cultivate confidence and enable women to see themselves in a spectrum of diverse leadership for generations to come.

What started as a bi-monthly dinner series between 5 women, has grown into a thriving community with over 100+ active members.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: JAZZ Venture Partners
Description: JAZZ invests in companies that unlock human potential. We seek breakthroughs at the convergence of technology, science, and humanity — improving how we live, work, and experience the world. JAZZ targets early and growth stage companies in enterprise, wellness, healthcare, and consumer markets. We are a team of experienced operators, technologists, scientists, and entrepreneurs who work together to make a positive difference.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: AngelMD
Description:
Based in Denver, Colorado, AngelMD is a healthcare-focused investing platform that connects leading healthcare startups from all over the world with investors, physicians, industry executives and private capital to create a more efficient path from investment to exit while de-risking investments in the process, leading to better outcomes.  

We welcome all healthcare startups to create a profile on our site. Even if you are not currently looking for funding, create a profile to be connected to industry thought leaders and valuable resources as you grow your business.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: idi
Description:
IDI is a listed investment firm – true pioneer of investment in France – that has been focusing for over 45 years on supporting the development of small and mid-sized companies. 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
IDI invests in French and European companies valued between € 10m and € 250m and typically takes majority or significant-minority stakes in LBO and Growth Capital transactions. As an institutional and independent investor benefiting from a robust financial structure – free of structural debt – IDI has greater flexibility in managing the timeframe and structure of its investments. 

IDI is notably a shareholder in Winncare, ORCA (Pennel & Flipo and Fait Plast), Groupe Mériguet, Alkan, HEA Expertise and Dubbing Brothers. 

IDI is listed on Euronext Paris.
ISIN: FR0000051393 - Bloomberg: IDIP FP - Reuters: IDVP.PA

To find out more: www.idi.fr
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: FairCap
Description:
FairCap is a pan-European private equity firm with offices in Munich (DE) and Milan (IT), which acquires companies in special situations (corporate carve-out, turnaround) and transforms them into sustainable, healthy organizations.

In contrast to typical private equity funds, FairCap is a sustainability focused holding company (“evergreen structure”), which is not subject to a fund term and can hold investments over the long term.

Our investment criteria:

Revenues: € 20 million - € 500 million
Situation: Corporate Carve-Out, Transformation 
Geography: Western Europe
Sector agnostic: All sectors
Profitability: negative EBITDA up to € 5 million (positive)
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Dux Capital
Description: Dux Capital is a seed-stage VC firm based in Austin, dedicated to investing in exceptional but underrepresented founders. Our inclusive approach and deep network allow us to discover and scale startups that are often overlooked by traditional investors. By focusing on underserved markets, we help drive innovation and economic growth.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Indogen Capital
Description:
We are a sector agnostic investor in Southeast Asia with deep operating experience in Indonesian market.

We aim to be a value-adding partner for founders looking to grow in or expand into Indonesia. We typically invest in post-seed stage up to series A companies. We have consistently generated above average returns to our investors through value-creation activities leading to strong portfolio exits. We leverage our key members’ extensive networks and operating experience across various functions and sectors.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Version One Ventures

Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Blackbird Ventures
Description: Blackbird Ventures incubates, and invests in, early-stage technology companies, providing operational support along the entire startup trajectory to develop market-transforming businesses. The firm is led by former founders and operators of successful software companies with extensive experience in building and growing innovative businesses. For more information on Blackbird and its portfolio companies, visit https://www.blackbirdventures.com
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Kinect Capital
Description:
Kinect Capital is a 501(c)(3) non-profit educational organization, dedicated to helping entrepreneurs Start. Find Money. and Change the World.  

We are the oldest and most effective non-profit in the country helping companies commercialize technology that results in job creation, economic growth and the fulfillment of dreams.  We do this by transferring knowledge, experience, contacts and capital from the world's leading business and financial organizations to promising companies.

For over 35 years, VentureCapital.org (WBI) has been a premier resource for both entrepreneurs seeking funding and for investors who want to help promising young companies achieve their potential.

The Institute has a history of building the high technology capacity of Utah and is now leading the way in Idaho.   Current VCO Board members co-founded, UV Partners, Olympus Angels, Park City Angels, the Salt Lake Life Science Angels and the MountainWest Capital Network, National Business Incubation Assn. (NBIA), and were the catalyst for the creation of EDCU.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: CLASH
Description:
Everything you need when choosing where smart money comes from. We believe in the entrepreneurial spirit — in the spark, the grit, the relentless ambition of those who dream big and show up every day to build it. We understand it because we’re built from the same substance. The companies in our portfolio aren’t just assets. They’re family. Not as a metaphor — but as partners who share the same hunger and long-term vision.

Clash STO Playbook
Strategic | We lead the way. With vision, direction, and discipline. Not someday. Now.
Technical | We solve what's missing. Less hype, more brain.
Operational | We get our hands dirty — from HR to Marketing to Finance. You name it, we build it.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Obratori
Description:
Founded in 2019, Obratori is the Corporate Venture Capital arm of L'Occitane Group. The CVC invests in early-stage companies, throughout France, Europe and beyond and manage a few fund-of-funds commitments.

As pre-seed and seed specialists, we fully support founders with ambitious game-changing projects across a wide range of sectors (Deeptech, Greentech, Consumer, Well-being, Digital, Healthtech, B2B solutions...).

Our role ? We back them to get started, take risks, create value and reach the first decisive key milestones.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Takeoff Accelerator
Description:
The Takeoff Accelerator is an initiative of CDP Venture Capital Sgr, powered by Plug and Play, together with Fondazione Cassa di Risparmio di Torino and UniCredit as Promoters and Co-Investors, and OGR as Innovation and Networking Partner.

Takeoff is the first Italian accelerator dedicated to the aerospace and advanced hardware sectors, aiming at bringing together financial and industrial players to provide the selected startups with the widest support both in terms of network and professional skills.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: VentureWave Capital
Description:
VentureWave Capital invests in tech for good companies.

We work hard with talented entrepreneurs and teams to build long lasting value, while maximising the benefits of our investments for all stakeholders, in line with the principles of Impact Investing.

We seek to maximise financial potential by applying proven tools and methods to help great entrepreneurs to scale and grow their companies.

The companies in which we invest produce products and services which have a positive social impact, are in vital sectors and address the UN Sustainable Development Goals (SDG’s).

We invest primarily in people, because the best entrepreneurs gather great teams to make incredible things happen. Together.

Our investment strategy is anchored in the belief that enterprise and innovation, when directed properly, can create more equitable and sustainable societies.

We believe that Impact Investing is not a new way of doing business, but rather the right way to do business.

VentureWave Capital exists to help great entrepreneurs build great companies – combining talented teams with the tools and skills necessary to create real lasting value.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: CAOS Focado
Description:
We are experienced entrepreneurs that build deep tech startups from zero to exit market, with our own methodology for an ideal entrepreneur trajectory.

We believe in innovation and entrepreneurship as an engine economic and social.

With a team from the top Universities and Research Centers in Brazil and worldwide and a process of deep understanding the team seeks to achieve new ideas and concepts to their clients in order to create impact for their customers and sustainable results.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Midi Management SA
Description: Midi Management is an investment company based in Switzerland, focused on sport / lifestyle / outdoor goods.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: InSITE
Description:
The InSITE Fellowship is a highly competitive leadership development program comprised of exceptional graduate students at top universities, including Columbia, NYU, Harvard, MIT, Stanford, Georgetown, and several medical research institutions. InSITE Fellows and alumni make up a global network of entrepreneurs and leaders in technology and venture capital.

InSITE was founded in 1999 with a mission to create a community of passionate leaders who share common values and have the desire, ability, and network to support innovative companies and projects around the nation. We identify talented students from a diverse range of backgrounds and connect them with hand-picked, high-potential emerging companies in a variety of industries. Students meet with founders and company leaders, identify key challenges and opportunities, set deliverables, and complete semester-long projects that contribute to real growth.

Each semester, the New York chapter of InSITE receives over 150 applications for eight projects. After careful due diligence, the InSITE community selects those projects it sees as most promising and most viable. Projects vary, depending on the individual company’s most pressing need. In the past, fellows have worked on projects centered around the formation of pitch materials, marketing and brand development, product development, consumer research, and pricing strategy, among others.

To date, InSITE companies have raised more than $300 million of disclosed funding and have enjoyed many successful exits.

Name: Venture Capitalist
Description:
Venture capital is somewhat a continuation of my advertising agency, as a lot of my work with clients went far beyond just basic SEO & marketing services. Many clients considered me as their business development expert because my experience with 100's of companies has included everything from registering companies, setting up offshore bank accounts, filing for trademarks, domain legal issues and even hiring and the subsequent training of staff. Whereas in the past, I didn't venture into it by directly funding the projects, yet my “consultant” role was so critical to their success I should have been more then a consultant.

It's great now working with companies not only to build on what they already have, but to help them fund projects, setup and sometimes even manage sustainable long-term growth plans. I do enjoy being a VC and I love the marketing side aspect that I bring to the projects. This is especially great as many venture capitalists simply bring money to the table; but what I bring is so much more valuable, as money is easy to find, talent and a first hand business acumen that is willing to be shared is in a lot of ways priceless.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Executive Capital
Description:
Executive Capital er et investeringsfællesskab for erfarne erhvervsfolk, der ønsker at investere i små- og mellemstore danske virksomheder. Vi har typisk selv ejet og udviklet et mindre selskab til en større international virksomhed, og har derfor en omfattende erfaringer med SMVers udfordringer.

Vi investerer i sunde, modne virksomheder med en omsætning i intervallet DKK 20-250 millioner.

Vi samler screenings-/investeringsteam af 2-3 partnere, som investerer egne midler (vi har ingen passive investorer). Vi investerer kun i virksomheder, hvor vi har særlige kompetencer, der kan bidrage til virksomhedens værdiskabelse.

Vi investerer typisk som aktive minoritetsaktionær (25%-49%) i samarbejder med andre aktive minoritetsejere, da vi ofte finder det optimalt, at vi er flere forskellige, der skal blive enige om retningen for virksomheden. Normalt er ledelsen en central ejer. Vi investerer også som majoritetsaktionærer, hvor det er hensigtsmæssigt.

Vi er overbeviste om, at en velgennemtænkt sammensætning af ejerkredsen med gensidig respekt og tillid er afgørende for at skabe de bedste forudsætninger for virksomhedens udvikling og vækst.

Vi sparer med ledelsen om organisationsudvikling, med henblik på skalering af forretningsmodellen, internationalisering og reduktion af personafhængigheder samt bistår i prioritering og implementering af de strategiske og operationelle forbedringsområder. Vi bidrager også med et stort netværk.

Vi er tålmodige i forhold til ejerperiode og har ikke krav om exit inden for en bestemt tidsperiode.

Vi prioriterer reel værdiskabelse over cash flow og finansiel kreativitet.

Vi investerer blandt andet i virksomhederne der skal generationsskiftes, salgsmodnes og i vækstvirksomheder, hvor der er behov for både kapital og kompetencer til at bringe virksomheden til det næste niveau.

Vores sekretariat har stor transaktionserfaring fra rådgivningsbranchen. De koordinerer og rådgiver i investeringsfasen.

Name: Hannover Finanz
Description:
Hannover Finanz 
Creating value with responsibility.

Founded in 1979, Hannover Finanz has over 45 years of experience as an equity capital partner for SMEs and is itself a family-run company in its second generation. Here, entrepreneurs talk to entrepreneurs about equity capital. 
We are one of the most traditional and experienced investment companies in Germany. To date, we have successfully supported over 250 companies. The investment portfolio we manage currently comprises around 35 companies with a total of over 15,000 employees and sales of more than 4 billion euros.

Hannover Finanz invests across all sectors. The main reasons for investments are growth financing and succession planning for solid medium-sized companies with annual sales of EUR 20 million or more. In addition to majority shareholdings, Hannover Finanz is one of the few investment companies in Germany that also acquires minority shareholdings. 
For decades, Hannover Finanz has successfully supported well-known companies such as Fielmann, Rossmann, Aixtron and Technotrans in their entrepreneurial growth, in some cases for over 20 years.

In 2024, we gave ourselves a new look and refreshed our corporate design, which is a visible expression of our further development. Our team has become younger and we have added exciting companies from the cleantech and IT industries to our portfolio. Under our umbrella brand Hannover Finanz, we are now differentiating our traditional business with equity solutions, which we will now market under the HF Equity brand, the HF Opportunities brand and our private debt business will continue to operate under HF Debt, rounding off the business segments of Hannover Finanz.

Name: Nederlandse Vereniging van Participatiemaatschappijen (NVP)
Description:
Nederlandse Vereniging van Participatiemaatschappijen (Dutch Private Equity and Venture Capital Association)

We empower investors to offer startups, scaleups, SMEs and entrepreneurs aspiring growth better access to capital. The goal is to build innovative, diverse and sustainable businesses that contribute to a strong economy. This is beneficial for consumers, employees, pensioners and shareholders.

 Do you want to stay up-to-date about latest industry news and upcoming events like seminars or webinars? Follow us!
 Interested in becoming an (associated) member of the NVP? Send us a message on info@nvp.nl and we would love to learn more about your organization. 

Already a member? 

 Take a seat on one of our committees to broaden your impact and have your voice heard in industry matters (for an overview of our active committees: https://nvp.nl/over/nvp-commissies/)
 As a member, you can sign up for our Essentials or Advanced courses. Learning from the best in the field whilst networking with peers!
 Share your expertise, develop yourself and give back to the VC/PE ecosystem by becoming a speaker at our training programs. Get in touch to discuss opportunities through academy@nvp.nl
 Join our events, such as our annual seminar, The Next Lunch or summer drinks and get to know other PE & VC professionals.

The NVP has over 130 private equity and venture capital members and around 100 associated members who are professionally or commercially involved in PE/VC investments. 

Our goals are advocacy, research, academy, disclosures and community. 

The NVP was founded in 1984. We are a member of VNO-NCW, Invest Europe and our training programs are CRKBO registered.

They gain access to a quality deal flow of innovative startups serving the WAEMU markets and help them grow. DNA members are investment professionals and/or industry experts, selected for their ability to contribute to achieving the overall objectives. They are based in all four corners of the world (Africa, Asia, Europe, and America). Members are significantly involved after the investment in helping portfolio companies achieve their goals. Learn more about the DNA opt-in investment model on our website or by reaching out.

The DNA is looking for technology-enabled businesses building solutions to solve important African problems and serving a significant market. We are actively seeking investment opportunities in companies which meet the following criteria:
-	Technology or technology-enabled businesses solving real problems
-	Significant market opportunities in UEMOA
-	Founders working on the product full-time
-	Scalability and ability to expand to at least 2 countries other than the primary market
-	In existence for less than 5 years
-	Ability to reach hyper-growth

Join us in building the future of Africa! Have other questions about the DNA? We'd love to talk to you. Write us here and we'll be in contact shortly.

Name: Ion Pacific
Description:
A Trailblazer in VC Structured Secondaries
 
Ion Pacific is an early mover and global leader in the field of structured secondary opportunities in the venture-stage technology sector. 

Our investment objective is to provide far better return-risk potential than is typically found in venture capital. We provide sophisticated, transparent financing structures that help GPs, LPs and founders meet liquidity needs, while enabling our investors to share in the future upside potential of the assets.

Although structured liquidity solutions have been used in other areas of private markets investing for some time, we are among the first firms to bring this approach to the world of venture capital. This affords us the opportunity to be selective and to access the most compelling opportunities. Our deep relationships in the major tech hubs of North America, Europe, Israel, Southeast Asia and beyond, as well as expertise in financial structuring, give us the ability to unlock value for the ecosystem — creating a compelling opportunity for our investors and deal partners alike.

Name: Qumra Capital
Description:
Qumra Capital is Israel’s leading growth fund, partnering with exceptional technology companies as they scale to global markets.

We invest in late-stage, fast-growing Israeli scale-ups that have already proven product-market fit and reached meaningful revenue scale, typically around the $10–20M ARR stage. 
This is the phase where scaling becomes complex: go-to-market strategy, international expansion, leadership build out, and go-to-market execution, and where durable businesses are built.

Our approach is selective and long-term. We partner closely with founders who build category-defining companies across B2B Saas, cybersecurity, fintech, data/AI, and enterprise software,, and stay closely involved as their organizations mature and expand internationally.

Qumra’s portfolio includes some of Israel’s most successful technology companies, including Fiverr (NYSE: FVRR), JFrog (NASDAQ: FROG), and Riskified (NYSE: RSKD), alongside leading scale-ups such as AppsFlyer, Talkspace, At-Bay, Simply (formerly JoyTunes), Minute Media, Augury, TytoCare, Lightricks, and Connecteam.
Beyond capital, we support founders on global go-to-market, international expansion, executive hiring, and late-stage fundraising – with a clear focus on building companies designed to scale and endure.

We partner with teams that are past the starting line and focused on what comes next.

Name: STRT Akadémia
Description:
Tudást adunk, jövőt adunk. 

Hiszünk abban, hogy a magyar cégekben és vezetőikben hatalmas, kiaknázatlan potenciál rejlik. De azt is tudjuk, hogy egy ponton a tehetség és a jó ötlet már nem elég. A szintlépéshez, a nemzetközi piacra lépéshez modern, magabiztos vezetői tudás kell. Mert egy cég csak addig tud fejlődni, ameddig a vezetője.

A STRT Akadémia küldetése, hogy ezt a tudást a kezedbe adja.

Mi nem a tankönyvekből tanítunk. Szakértőink aktív cégépítők és befektetők, akik a piac frontvonalából hozzák el neked a legfrissebb, gyakorlatban tesztelt eszközöket és stratégiákat. Nincsenek unalmas elméletek, csak az, ami tényleg működik.

Az eredmények magukért beszélnek: az elmúlt években több mint 5000 vezető bízta ránk a fejlődését, Budapest mellett már 8 vidéki városban és több erdélyi helyszínen is. A bizalmat mi sem jelzi jobban, mint a 60+ Season Pass bérletesünk, akik az egész éves közös munkát és fejlődést választották.

De mi több vagyunk, mint egy képzési központ. Egy klub vagyunk. Olyan cégvezetők közössége, mint te, ahol a legjobbaktól és egymástól is tanulhatsz egy inspiráló, támogató közegben.

Miben segítünk?
 Növekedési Stratégia & Skálázódás

 ...és még sok más, ami egy modern cégvezető számára elengedhetetlen.

Name: IndusDC
Description:
Human activity has drastically increased CO2 emissions by 7X since 1950 due to population growth and carbonisation-driven productivity gains. Without intervention, a 2-3X increase in the next 20-30 years is predicted, endangering future generations. Governments worldwide recognise the urgency and are implementing climate-related policies. Fortunately, the decarbonisation space benefits from abundant ideas, entrepreneurs, and capital.
However, translating these ideas into profitable businesses poses a challenge, especially with hardware and manufacturing-focused decarbonisation concepts. While venture capital and private equity funds are available, they require proven businesses to invest in. Enter the venture studio model—an effective solution and an alternate asset class that provides structure and expertise for developing and commercialising decarbonisation technologies. By leveraging venture studios' resources, these firms can overcome barriers and accelerate their path to profitability.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Soundcore Capital Partners
Description:
Soundcore Capital Partners is a lower middle market private investment firm specializing in buy & build investments of private-, family- and founder-owned companies in the United States and Canada.  The firm exclusively focuses on recession-resistant companies in highly-fragmented industries within the business services, specialty manufacturing, and value-added distribution sectors.

Since the firm’s founding in 2015 by Jarrett Turner, Soundcore has remained dedicated to an intentional focus on sound investments and steadfast to its commitment to core principles.

Soundcore was designed with a specific intent: to be the distinctive, sector-focused, lower middle-market private equity firm in the industry. Our track record is rooted in our differentiated investment mandate: a top-down, thesis-driven investor with direct, proactive bottom-up sourcing capabilities and an operationally intensive, buy-and-build investment strategy.

Since inception, Soundcore has acquired 112 businesses (14 platform / 98 add-on), with $1.8 billion total enterprise value (TEV). Of the 112 companies acquired, Soundcore was the first institutional capital 108 times (96%).  Soundcore has completed an average of 8 acquisitions across the 14 buy & build platforms created to date.  Soundcore has sold / exited seven (six to private equity and one to a public strategic) of the 14 platform companies, generating in aggregate $1.8 billion in TEV. Of the companies sold to date, the average (mean) hold / ownership period is 5.0 years.
  
Soundcore's limited partners include some of the world's leading endowments, foundations, pension funds, family offices as well as executives of Soundcore portfolio companies.

For inquiries, please contact us at info@soundcorecap.com, or 212-812-1180.

Our purpose is to build exceptional and enduring businesses, generate world class investment returns, and contribute to elevating the building industry and its workforce through people-focused investment & business principles. 

We help to build exceptional businesses, to realize the entrepreneurial visions of the industry's rising stars, and to increase shared prosperity amongst shareholders, management, and our broader workforce through broad-based employee ownership. 
 
Over the past decade, BIP is proud to have been part of building some of the fastest growing and most dynamic businesses in the U.S. building industry’s middle market, including U.S. LBM Holdings, Kodiak Building Partners, Homewood Holdings, and U.S. Fence Solutions/Binford Supply.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Nclude
Description: Nclude is an investment platform for fintech innovation. Founder-centric in design, it supports early and growth stage entrepreneurs who are tackling financial inclusion and enables their success by offering a full-stack support ecosystem for fintech and fintech-enabled start-ups in Egypt and beyond.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Permanent Equity
Description: Permanent Equity uses 30-year funds to invest in North American companies that care what happens next. The firm's current portfolio includes 16 companies in aerospace, amusement attractions, niche construction, manufacturing & distribution, consumer products, ad tech, recruitment, and niche professional services. The Orbit (https://www.the-orbit.network/) is Permanent Equity's talent portal for driven operators and specialists looking to build meaningful careers in small businesses.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Disruptive
Description: Disruptive, founded in 2012, is a leading global investment firm for best-in-class private technology companies and sophisticated investors around the world. Over the last decade, it has established its reputation as a reliable and flexible source of capital through primary & secondary equity, debt, and structured product investments. Disruptive's capital is sourced from many of the world's largest investors including family offices, international corporations, hedge funds, and the world’s largest sovereign wealth funds.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Elsewhere Partners
Description: Elsewhere Partners, a tech-focused private equity firm, invests in growth-ready lower middle market software companies around the globe. Elsewhere’s team of experienced investors and software operators tailor growth plans for each unique portfolio company and offer complementary support across go-to-market, product, talent, finance, and strategy functions. Based in Austin, TX, Elsewhere has invested in 17 companies throughout North America, Europe and Israel since its inception in 2016. To learn more, visit https://elsewhere.partners
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Strawberry Creek Ventures (an Alumni Ventures Fund)
Description:
Strawberry Creek Ventures is an Alumni Ventures' venture capital fund for alumni of UC Berkeley that invests in companies with a UC Berkeley connection. 

Meet the team:
Matt Caspari, Managing Partner
Carl Choi, Senior Principal
Rupika Brito, Principal

Follow Strawberry Creek Ventures for content at the intersection of our shared alma mater, venture capital, and entrepreneurship.

We are private, for-profit, and not affiliated with or sanctioned by the college.

Offers of securities are made only to eligible investors through formal offering documents, which describe the risks, terms, and other important information that must be considered before investing. Example portfolio company investments shown for illustrative purposes only, do not necessarily reflect investment outcomes that were or would be obtained by any AV fund or investor, and are not available to future investors, except potentially in the case of follow-on investments. Venture capital investing involves substantial risk, including risk of loss of all capital invested. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: HASAN.VC
Description:
HASAN.VC is a people-powered venture capital fund dedicated to a better tomorrow by investing in companies driven by ethics and purpose. By identifying, nurturing, and investing in top companies from its online Accelerator Program, HASAN.VC supports and amplifies ethical business practices. 

Funded by an active Angel Investor group spanning multiple continents, HASAN.VC's mission is to uplift humanity by democratizing venture capital investment and channeling funds to over 40 halal or ethical tech startups from Southeast Asia and the GCC.
 
Positioned for the future, HASAN has transformed into a dynamic venture capital fund, complemented by an innovative accelerator program. 

We invest in early-stage tech-enabled startups with simple, easy-to-understand, and scalable business models.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: eComplete Group
Description:
We are a full service, rapid growth eCommerce agency and private investor who offer best in class expertise to scale brands and deliver commercial impact, at pace.

We provide our partners with access to global scale, industry leading talent and our in-depth proprietary data platform.

Leveraging our in-house data platform we identify and implement eCommerce growth strategies, providing our partners with access to infrastructure solutions and talent which is typically afforded to eCommerce giants.

eComplete’s in house private equity arm, eComplete Capital, also provides investment in high growth potential eCommerce brands.

With teams across every eCommerce discipline and the data to power smarter eCommerce decision making, growing with eComplete becomes more efficient vs traditional agency models.

Partner with eComplete to achieve your eCommerce goals.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Everwood Capital
Description:
With over €700 million in assets under management in Renewable Energy, Private Equity and Real Estate, Everwood Capital is a Spanish investment management company with a strong track record in its target sectors. Everwood is experiencing solid growth by targeting investments in different projects with attractive risk-return profiles.

Everwood Capital offers a differentiated value proposition in the Spanish midmarket, providing investors with an excellent path to gain exposure to the Spanish macro recovery and growth cycle through a proven hands-on GP led by a well aligned, experienced and committed team.

Everwood identifies investment opportunities in those sectors where there is limited liquidity, obtaining attractive risk adjusted returns. Everwood follows the highest standards of professionalization, integrity and industry ethics in its analysis, investment and management processes. Everwood manages several investment vehicles, specializing in three areas:

Renewables.

Everwood specializes in renewable energy funds. With the aim of achieving a high profitability for our investors, adding value both in the search for opportunities and in the subsequent management, consolidation and professionalization of the assets acquired.

Private Equity.

Everwood Capital leverages on the deep experience of its investment team to carry out opportunistic and proprietary investments in companies with great value creation potential. Currently, Everwood’s Private Equity division manages stakes in a total of 5 companies for an aggregate value of over €100 million.

Real Estate.

Everwood Real Estate focuses its strategy on opportunistic investments in the Spanish real estate sector. Currently Everwood manages 2 buildings and an over-ground carpark under rental for an aggregate value of over €30 million.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Siddhi Capital
Description: Siddhi Capital is a growth equity firm that leverages it’s in house operating team, Siddhi Services, to diligence, scale and exit convention-crushing brands and companies tackling a reinvention of the food supply system.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: StageOne Ventures
Description:
StageOne leads investments in exceptional Israel-related early-stage start-ups focused on solving large enterprise challenges utilizing transformative deep technologies.

Over the past two decades, we have built powerful partnerships that propel seed-stage entrepreneurs forward, from the initial innovation concept through additional quality rounds of funding to market leadership and impact. 

Our approach is beyond just funding, we have accumulated a wealth of experience in early-stage seed investments, with the ability to identify early breakthrough technology trends, creating market access that young companies need, connecting them with technical expertise, and empowering their business skills with impactful insights.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Thomvest
Description:
Thomvest is a $750M cross-stage venture capital fund based in Silicon Valley and Toronto. We are investing the capital of one individual, Peter Thomson, whose family owns the majority of Thomson Reuters. Peter started Thomvest in 1996 and has invested in more than 75 private companies since that time.

We primarily invest across three areas: financial and real estate technology, cybersecurity and cloud infrastructure, and sales and marketing technology. As part of our focus on these areas, we are committed to helping our companies become leaders in their fields through our work with them and through our focus on understanding where value can be created in these industries, as can be seen from the research we publish regularly.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: E14 Fund
Description: E14 Fund, born at the MIT Media Lab, supports and invests MIT founded deep tech companies.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Change Ventures
Description:
We back ambitious Baltic founders, both in Estonia, Latvia, or Lithuania, and the diaspora around the globe. Our investments range between €100K and €500K in pre-seed stage technology startups.

Our partners have 45 years of operating experience between them that we bring to bear in supporting our portfolio and we aim to provide a founder-friendly, fast, and efficient investment process.

Post-investment we support founders in getting to product-market fit and scaling the business, especially with our personal network of over 700 follow-on and co-investors around the globe.

The best way to find out whether we, or any other VC investor, provides real value-added to the startups they back, talk to any of the founders we have invested in, and also those whose businesses we have passed on. For anonymous reviews, you can check out our page at https://www.landscape.vc/investors/change-ventures.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: aperture.co
Description:
Aperture is a growth and investment partner for ambitious early-stage companies and forward-thinking corporates, bringing deep expertise in fintech and financial services. 

We accelerate and de-risk growth by embedding senior product, marketing, and strategy expertise directly into our clients’ teams. For early-stage companies, particularly in regulated and complex markets, our hands-on approach delivers an average 8× increase in marketing-qualified leads in year one, helping teams reach product-market fit faster and build scalable, compliant growth engines. 

Our full-stack marketing capability spans positioning and messaging, brand and design, demand generation, content, and go-to-market execution, allowing us to operate as an extension of our clients’ teams rather than a traditional agency. These engagements also enable us to identify and validate high-quality investment opportunities that deliver superior returns. 

For corporate clients, we combine deep fintech and financial services domain knowledge with executional strength - helping leadership teams define and deliver new product and market strategies, sharpen their value proposition, and unlock new growth opportunities. 

What we do 

- Invest: We invest our own capital alongside a trusted network of investors in the most promising early-stage companies, particularly across European B2B fintech, embedded finance, and vertical SaaS. 

- Grow: Our product and marketing experts embed within portfolio companies to accelerate product-market fit and sustainable growth. 

- Strategise: We partner with corporate leaders to turn bold growth ambitions into actionable product, market, growth, and exit strategies.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Symbol
Description:
Symbol invests $500k to $3.5M in the first funding round of exceptional Israeli entrepreneurs from all backgrounds, building pre-consensus companies. We are a generalist, sector-agnostic fund, investing in B2B, consumer, and enterprise tech startups.

We’re excited about meeting founders as early as possible and accompanying them throughout ideation, validation, and team building. Post-investment, we strive to provide personalized support to help them get from zero to one. 

Yuval Ariav, Symbol’s founder and Managing Partner, is an early investor in companies like Fundguard, NextSilicon, Assured Allies, Sightful and Approve (acquired by Tipalty). Priorly, he was co-founder and CTO at Fundbox and led Product at Onavo (acquired by Meta).
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Clearview Capital, L.P.
Description: Founded in 1999, Clearview Capital is a private investment firm specializing in the acquisition and recapitalization of lower-middle market companies in North America. Since inception, the Clearview Capital team has completed more than 150 transactions in a wide variety of industries. The firm is headquartered in Stamford, Connecticut and has additional offices in California, North Carolina and Tennessee.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Warsaw Equity Group
Description:
Warsaw Equity Group (WEG) is an independent Warsaw-based private equity firm focused on market investments between €4 to €15m, targeting companies offering innovative B2B solutions in the High-Tech/Industry 4.0 and ClimateTech space. With a >20-year track record of successfully empowering business ventures, we use our own capital, expertise and network to be a supportive partner to our portfolio companies and maximise growth.

Typically the companies we invest in will be located either in Poland or in the wider CEE region and offer innovative B2B solutions in areas such as: Big Data, IoT, Additive Manufacturing, Cybersecurity, Simulations, Robotics, AR/VR, Environmental Tech and ClimateTech.

The WEG team is passionate about investing and maximising the human capital and operational potential of our portfolio companies. Utilising a combination of our own significant investment, operational and strategic expertise and our network of contacts, we set up the right structure to support value creation activities and facilitate long-term profitable growth. As big believers in teamwork and collaboration we work proactively in partnership with managers to develop their skills and support their business development objectives.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: M80 Partners
Description:
M80 is an investor in companies in Benelux and France. We seek out ambitious companies & entrepreneurs that embrace change and with whom we work closely to realize their full potential - often by making smart or better use of proven & novel technologies.

Our diverse international team of entrepreneurs, former CEOs, private equity professionals and digital pioneers will inspire, challenge and support companies to generate meaningful value for their customers, employees, owners and investors.

We invest in companies with a unique mindset, ready to challenge the status quo, in sectors such as consumer, healthcare, business services and manufacturing.

Across Benelux and France we typically focus on companies that have sales between €25m and €300m, EBITDA between €5m and €30m and an enterprise value between €25m and €250m. Our preferred investment range is 10 – 60 million in equity. We are open to transactions where we can be a significant shareholder or the leading investor, aligning closely with founders or family shareholders and management.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: MediaTech Ventures
Description:
The preeminent global venture development group for the media and technology industries, employing a proprietary framework of global partnerships, connecting capital and people advancing opportunities in modern media.

------

Our economy has for the better part of recent decades seen an evolution of media like never before. Technology led to publishing with the printing press, photography thanks to the camera, and music flourished with the invention of instruments and then the record player, radio, and compact disc.

As the twentieth century wound to a close, we witnessed the impact of computer, software, internet, and smart phone; our experience with media is forever changed and we believe in that future seeing gaming, VR and immersive video, augmented reality, adtech, streaming, and more, changing not just entertainment but every facet of our lives.

MediaTech Ventures works at the heart of the entire industry. We work in support of artists, developers, producers, entrepreneurs, and financiers.

We consider “Media” a horizontal; the broadest set of things with which we work. Then define your work by way of the vertical, context, and consideration:

Vertical: Video/TV, Radio/Podcast, Print/Online, VR/AR, Video Game, Music…

Context: Live, entertainment, information, indie, international…

Consideration: Funding, mobile, development, distribution, recruiting…

We're working to create jobs, fund opportunity, and celebrate innovation in media.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Sprout Agritech
Description:
Sprout is New Zealand's leading startup accelerator and investor, igniting the next wave of technology and innovation in the food value chain.

We specialise in turning ground-breaking innovations into scalable startups that impact how life on Earth is nourished and sustained. We are dedicated to assisting entrepreneurs in building robust teams and scaling their startups globally.

We do this by providing carefully tailored programs, early-stage funding, industry partnerships, connections to key stakeholders, and capability and company building.

Established in 2015, Sprout has 11 companies under our investment portfolio and has developed the capability of 250+ entrepreneurs.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Foundersuite
Description:
Foundersuite.com makes an end-to-end platform for raising capital. Foundersuite includes a database of 187,000 investors to build your target list, a "Get Intro" feature to secure warm intros, a CRM to manage the raise, pitch deck hosting, investor updates and email tools to market your raise, and a Virtual Data Room to get the deal done. 

Foundersuite.com has been used by over 100,000 startups globally to raise $21 Billion in seed and VC. 

Sign up today at www.foundersuite.com/pricing
-----------
In more detail...

Foundersuite.com was one of the first companies to build tools that help startups raise capital... we were the "OG" in the space, and the first to launch an Investor CRM. Since then, numerous clones and copycats have emerged, but FS has helped more startups raise angel and VC funding than all the others... combined.  

Our current product lineup includes: 
1) Database of 187,000 investors (with contact info) for lead gen
2) A new "Get Intro" feature to get warm intros to any investor
3) An Investor CRM to track and manage investor leads, activities, etc.
4) An email marketing tool to send batches of personalized emails
5) A Pitch Deck Hosting tool to share your deck and track who views it
6) An Investor Update tool to send monthly updates and track views
7) A Data Room to upload and confidentially share important docs
8) Automated email marketing campaigns (email sequences) 

Coming soon: a series of AI-enabled tools that automated much of the tedious work of raising capital!  Sign up now at www.foundersuite.com to get early access.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Vectr Ventures
Description: Vectr is a global early-stage venture studio based in Hong Kong. We combine capital, creation and growth to deliver game-changing impact to teams ready to tackle global issues, transform industries and improve the lives of millions.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Yaletown Partners
Description:
Yaletown Partners is dedicated to closing the emerging-growth stage investment gap faced by technology companies.  We invest in technology companies that enhance industry and enterprise productivity and sustainability, to help accelerate their growth, shorten exit timeframes and achieve strong exit premiums. With offices in Vancouver, Calgary, Edmonton, Toronto, Montréal, and San Francisco, Yaletown is led by a team that contributes almost 100 years of technology-industry experience and a network of extensive industry relationships.
 
Our culture is one of deep individual commitment, shared objectives and passionate entrepreneurship – much like the teams we back. When Yaletown invests in a company, every member of our investment team is a material investor alongside the institutional and individual investors in our funds. One partner is dedicated to each portfolio company, while all Yaletown partners contributes unique skills and perspective to every investment behind the scenes. 

If your emerging-growth company feels like a fit, or you are a like-minded investor, we invite you to ask around about us and connect - www.yaletown.com.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: African Private Equity Fellowship
Description: A first-ever executive program to boost your career in PE, VC & Private Debt in Africa
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Techstars Toronto Accelerator
Description: The Toronto regional startup ecosystem is full of innovation, mentors, capital, and talent. Founded in 2006, Techstars began with three simple ideas—entrepreneurs create the future, collaboration drives innovation, and great ideas can come from anywhere. Today our mission is to make innovation accessible to everyone, everywhere. We do this by connecting startups, investors, corporations, and cities to create a more sustainable and inclusive world.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Cofound
Description: Cofound.com
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: PsyMed Ventures
Description: We fund and support ambitious founders elevating brain and mental health through innovative neuroscience and frontier technologies.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Advent Life Sciences
Description:
Advent Life Sciences is one of the leading trans-Atlantic venture investors focused on building innovative Life Sciences businesses in the UK, Europe and the USA. We are a highly experienced team with a long-standing track record of entrepreneurial and investment success through turning break-through science into approved medicines or medical products.

We start and invest in early and mid-stage companies with a first-in-class or best-in-class approach. Our investments are focussed in new drug discovery - small molecules, biologics and new modalities - med tech, enabling technologies and vaccines.

As entrepreneurs and experienced, pragmatic investors, we bring the intellectual capital of our well connected team to support each investment. We work in close alignment with our management teams, and partner with them to realise their vision - achieving superior financial returns by bringing innovation to patients.

The companies in which we have invested since the year 2000 have discovered and developed, fourteen approved medicines and products - to the benefit of patients, physicians and our investors.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: SANTÉ
Description: Founded in 2006, Santé Ventures is a specialized healthcare and life sciences investment firm with roughly $1 billion in capital under management, across five funds. The firm invests in early-stage companies developing innovative new medical technologies, biotechnologies, and digitally enabled healthcare services
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Two Bear Capital
Description: Two Bear Capital is a venture capital firm that invests in entrepreneurs who have breakthrough ideas in life sciences and technology. Two Bear Capital’s vision is to build an ecosystem of support, economic opportunity and innovation that brings the most meaningful ideas to market in the form of enduring high-impact businesses that benefit society as a whole, while delivering for investors. The firm primarily focuses on early, founder-led companies with disruptive innovations in biotechnology, bioinformatics, healthcare IT, machine learning and AI, and information security. Two Bear Capital has offices in Menlo Park, San Diego, Boston, and New York, with its home base in Whitefish, Montana. It was founded in 2019 by Mike Goguen.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Alliance of Angels
Description: Alliance of Angels is the largest and most active angel group in the Pacific Northwest. Each year, we invest $4M+ into 20+ companies. Since 1997, we have invested $100M+ into 200+ companies and celebrated 40+ exits generating more than a billion dollars of returns. Our network of 150+ active angels invest both individually and through a member driven fund.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Parcom
Description:
Wij zijn een Nederlandse investeringsmaatschappij. Wij helpen ondernemers en management teams bij het realiseren van hun ambities. 

Elke dag zetten wij ons in om onze ondernemingen te begeleiden in hun duurzame groei of transformatie. Dat is wat ons drijft. En wat wij al sinds 1982 hebben gedaan voor meer dan 130 (internationale) bedrijven. Veelal doen wij dit in gedeeld aandeelhouderschap en in samenwerking met de betrokken oprichters.

Description: Established in 2018, Phaze Ventures is the first private venture capital firm in the Sultanate of Oman, founded to fund early-stage disruptive technology companies from around the globe, and accelerate the transformation of the region’s economy through early-stage investments and strategic partnerships.
