Name: Taiwania Capital
Description: Taiwania Capital is a venture capital firm founded in August 2017 by the National Development Fund of the Executive Yuan along with private enterprises. As of now, Taiwania Capital manages 8 funds and focuses on investing in early to growth-stage technology and biotech startups in Taiwan, the U.S., Japan, Southeast Asia and Central East Europe. Its mission is to connect Taiwan's robust tech and biotech ecosystems with global innovations, providing resources to its portfolio companies to enhance their growth and market penetration.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Good Growth Capital
Description:
Good Growth Capital is a majority women-owned venture capital firm that invests in early stage life science, green tech, hard science, and data science companies. Good Growth is known for its world-leading expertise in technology commercialization, and for finding, funding and growing superior, defensible technology companies that fill pressing societal needs.  Good Growth Capital and its funds meet both ESG and UNSDG impact goals.

Our Portfolio is hiring! Check out open jobs in our portfolio here: https://numerous-biplane-34e.notion.site/GGC-Portfolio-Job-Board-940759593d7f41ec92e995df08d840d3
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Cadence Growth Capital (CGC)
Description:
Cadence Growth Capital (CGC) supports strong founders and management teams with capital to further accelerate growth. CGC is an investment platform offering access to the growth Private Equity asset class for individual as well as institutional investors.  

Based on the longstanding relationships of CGC’s partners and leveraging its network of its investors, CGC is uniquely positioned to capitalize on its proprietary deal pipeline of tech-enabled growth companies in the DACH region. Since 2020, we have invested in and actively support Sherpany, Everphone, PlusDental, Mitos, Moonfare, ottonova and tink. 

CGC is a growth investor and we bring deep sector expertise, a vast network of relationships and a collaborative approach to support our founders and management teams to scale their companies.

Over +200 HNWIs from the M&A, Private Equity, founder and corporate community as well as family offices and institutional investors are invested with CGC. We currently manage over EUR 200m for institutional and private investors. 

CGC is committed to being a responsible investor and, as such, adheres to the prevailing principles for responsible investment.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Mangusta Capital
Description:
Mangusta is a venture capital and growth equity firm, with its origins in Italy and a global reach. Our mission is to shape the world for future generations by supporting technology innovations that move humanity forward.

We invest in audacious founders building mission-critical capabilities across AI and software. As we reach the tipping point in the advent of AGI, we see the inevitability of unlocking massive productivity gains in complex workflows across all industries.

We invest in the next generation of great consumer brands and technologies enabling delightful consumer experiences. In the past, consumers trusted brands; today, consumers trust influencers. We search for the trendsetters changing the way we eat, play, and live.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Elron Ventures
Description:
Elron Ventures is one of the leading brands in the Israeli VC world since 1962. Our focus is in early-growth investing, where we leverage our expertise across an array of different industries and key strategic partnerships to provide capital and assistance to promising Israeli tech start-ups helping them achieve their goal of becoming true global leaders.

Our group of companies includes companies at various stages of development that are engaged in a variety of technology fields, mainly , cybersecurity, SaaS, deep- tech, defense- tech and healthcare industries

Our team is dedicated to attracting and supporting imaginative and focused entrepreneurs and startups with never-been-done-before ideas. Group companies benefit from our combined technological, strategic, entrepreneurial & business expertise, broad networks, and wide attention span.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Vistara Growth
Description:
At Vistara, we provide flexible growth capital solutions to mid-later-stage technology companies across North America. We are unique in our ability to create tailored investment structures comprised of debt, equity, or any combinations thereof. We solve for a variety of use cases including organic growth, M&A financing, or shareholder liquidity, with our typical cheque size ranging from $10M-$50M for companies that have scaled or are scaling past $10 million+ in revenues.  

Managed and funded by seasoned technology finance and operating executives, our core purpose at "Vistara" (sanskrit for "Expansion"), is to enable growth of the ambitious technology companies we invest in, our investors, our people, and the communities we operate in.

For more information, please visit us at www.vistaragrowth.com
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Coefficient Capital
Description: Coefficient Capital invests in transformational consumer shifts
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Hero Electronix
Description:
Hero Electronix is the Hero Group's venture into the technology space with a vision to create a $1Bn+ connected devices enterprise. 

We believe a massive shift is happening as products gets connected and smarter. There is an opportunity to reimagine every product...be it a camera, set top box, car seat or clothing... and make it more meaningful by adding sensing tech, connectivity and AI. 

We are investing behind businesses that are building innovative businesses to take advantage of this mega trend. Our current portfolio includes Tessolve (http://www.tessolve.com), a global leader in semi-conductor engineering services, Qubo, AI led consumer technology company (https://www.quboworld.com), My Box Technologies (http://www.mybox.net.in), India's largest STB and media devices company and Zenatix (Zenatix.com), a innovative Enterprise IOT company.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: f7 Ventures
Description:
f7 Ventures is a pre-seed and seed fund investing in founders creating the future of work and the consumer utility to shape tomorrow. 

f7 was founded by Kelly Graziadei and Joanna Lee Shevelenko, who met in the trenches in the early days at Facebook, launching break-through products and helping to scale the company to a trillion-dollar valuation. Now, they've built f7 Ventures, fostering a strong ecosystem of best-in-class operators and investing in founders to build the next decade defining companies. 

The f7 team knows firsthand what great 0 to 1 talent looks like, and we're excited to partner with incredible founders to arm them with the tools and partners needed to build successful, evergreen companies. 

Reach out at hello@f7ventures.com
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Innovation Nest
Description:
We believe Europe has a lot to offer. European engineering talent and product intuition are amazing. We back fierce leaders and teams with big ambitions, strong personalities, and thorough market expertise. Our investment ranges from €100k up to €1M and is directed at early to Series A stage B2B technology companies with a global focus.

Innovation Nest is a seed/VC fund focused on investments in Software as a Service (SaaS) companies across Europe. We support high-tech companies to grow faster and scale their business globally.

portfolio: innovationnest.co/companies
profile on index.co: index.co/company/innovationnest
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: LRVHealth
Description: LRVHealth is the “Inside Healthcare” venture capital platform. Through a network of strategic limited partners that includes leading health systems and payers, and touches half of all healthcare consumers in the U.S., LRVHealth applies industry knowledge and operational experience to venture-stage companies focused on innovation. Founded in 2000 by an experienced team of healthcare investors, operators, and advisors, the LRVHealth team provides early stage capital, operating experience, and industry insights to build the next generation of great healthcare companies.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Amboy Street Ventures
Description:
The world’s first venture capital fund focused on Sexual Health & Women’s Health startups.

Amboy Street Ventures invests in the Seed and Series A rounds of Sexual Health & Women’s Health Technology startups that are progressing the industry.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Cervin Ventures
Description: Cervin is an early-stage venture capital firm focused on building enduring enterprise-technology companies. The firm’s partners actively work with founders and product visionaries to design, build and bring disruptive technologies to market in order to change how the world works.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Deeptech Labs
Description:
At Deeptech Labs, we provide a unique blend of intensive, high-quality accelerator programmes and early-stage funding to help commercialise world-leading deep tech research. Our approach pairs financial backing with access to a network of world-class deep tech experts, including exited founders, technical and functional specialists, and over 280 active corporate and venture investors. Our mission is to transform breakthrough scientific discoveries into globally scalable, category-defining companies.

We focus on Seed stage deep tech companies with established technology, extraordinary teams, and strong initial traction. Our support prepares entrepreneurs for their journey to Series A, helping guide them from prototype and proof of concept to scalable products and services creating venture businesses with global ambition.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Tempest Capital
Description:
Tempest Capital is a private equity manager focused on small cap Mexican, and Latin American firms with a value philosophy.

Tempest is founded on the principle that change and uncertainty are to be embraced rather than avoided. We believe in directed, disciplined, resilient, ethical action. We construct concentrated high conviction portfolios in companies with clear competitive advantages and industry leading management teams.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: GapMinder VC
Description:
GapMinder VC is a venture capital firm focused on investing in hiper-growth, early-stage B2B startups in the AI/Deeptech and SaaS sectors, born in Southeast Europe (SEE) and its diaspora. The fund is dedicated to supporting visionary founders and teams developing innovative technologies with global scaling potential.
 
GapMinder’s investment strategy is centered around companies in industries such as Artificial Intelligence (AI), Cybersecurity, Fintech, Machine Learning (ML), Enterprise Automation, Data Analytics, and Developer Tools. The fund typically invests in Seed rounds ranging from €0.5 million to €5 million, with follow-on investments up to €12 million to help portfolio companies scale and expand internationally.
 
What sets GapMinder apart is its hands-on approach. With a team of experienced operators and entrepreneurs, the fund provides not just capital, but also strategic guidance in areas such as scaling operations, sales, marketing, and financial planning. This operational support ensures that companies are well-equipped to thrive in competitive global markets.
 
Through its targeted investments and deep sector expertise, GapMinder aims to foster the growth of disruptive technologies that address critical challenges in the digital age, while helping founders turn their innovative ideas into internationally successful businesses.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: AIN Ventures
Description:
A seed-stage focused venture fund that invests in startups at the intersection of deep tech and dual-use technology, as well as in military veteran-led startups.
Learn more at ainventures.com.

The fund is supplemented by an investment syndicate and community called the Academy Investor Network, built to harness the collective experience and service of graduates from the five publicly-funded U.S. service academies. 
Learn more at academyinvestor.com.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Description:
Now more than ever the world needs the tools and technology to make healthcare faster, easier, smarter. Better.

Jumpstart Foundry has the process, philosophy, and partners to make these new ideas a reality. To make migraines better. To make surgery better. To make Grandma better.

Jumpstart Foundry. Make Something Better.

Description:
Nido is an integrated platform combining venture capital and corporate innovation to accelerate B2B technology adoption across the U.S.–Mexico corridor.

Nido Ventures (Fund): Invests in pre-seed and seed engineering-driven B2B startups transforming industries like manufacturing, logistics, infrastructure, CPG, and financial services. Beyond capital, founders gain strategic guidance, corporate access, and a cross-border network.

Nido Labs (Corporate Innovation): Partners with Mexico’s leading industrial firms to identify tech gaps, design ROI-driven innovation roadmaps, and run venture clienting pilots that connect corporates with startups to deliver measurable impact.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Azur Innovation Management

Name: Capital Angel Network
Description:
Capital Angel Network (CAN) 

An established investor group.  Since 2010 our Members have been flywheels supporting the launch of hundreds of Canadian startups. 

Cumulatively, they have invested close to $100M and provided the confidence and support for portfolio startups to land VC rounds. Investment typically ranges from 4-10 million  dollars annually. 

Our members include Corporate experts providing key insights for founder facing programs, solo angel investors and Venture Members - VCs, Family Offies and Accelerators. 

Our programs include Capital MASHUP - Celebrating Entrepreneurs and Champions, CANLABS - Raising Expectations and Momentum, and investLABS - Early Stage Investment Insights

We partner and support more than 25 community partners building an entrepreneurial culture in Canada. 

CAN primarily invests across the Innovation Corridor, from Montreal to Waterloo, with a keen interest in Gatineau, Ottawa, and Kanata. We also have investments from Coast to Coast. 

CAN investments have led to over $1B in additional investment through grants, syndication with other angel groups, and follow on venture capital funds. 

Membership includes more than 55 investors and champions including new, next gen, and established angels, VCs, family offices and corporate members. 37% of memberships include a woman. 

CAN partners with SheBoot, the Ottawa Bootstrap Awards, uOttawa’s entrepreneurship club, TECDE’s Elle Gala and provides mentorship to universities, colleges and incubators on the regular.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Nordstar
Description: We offer strategic capital and operational expertise to founders embarking on their next stage of growth.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Microtraction
Description:
Microtraction is an early-stage VC firm that provides pre-seed and seed capital to technology entrepreneurs at the earliest stages of their venture.

We have backed companies like 54gene, Helicarrier, Termii, Cowrywise, to mention a few

We believe long-term sustainable socio-economic development in Africa will be driven by entrepreneurs and innovations, and not by politicians or charity aids.

Our mission is to accelerate Africa’s economic growth by enabling innovation and supporting technology entrepreneurs. 

Our principal role is to increase the number of venture bankable startups across the continent, creating the market for venture and growth-stage capital to follow on and ultimately bridging the pre-seed funding gap that currently exists.

Microtraction is backed and advised by top local and global investors including Pave Investments, Chris Shultz, Michael Seibel, Monique and Andy Volk.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

To date, the firm has acquired or invested in over 80 companies in North America. Arbor is headquartered in Palm Beach, FL, with additional offices in Chicago and New York.

Name: Platte River Equity
Description:
Founded in 2006 and based in Denver, CO, Platte River Equity is a private equity firm focused on investments in established lower middle market operating companies in targeted industrial sectors where it has substantial operating and investing experience.  
Platte River utilizes conservative capital structures in order to invest in future growth opportunities and withstand changing economic environments.  The firm also provides significant on-going support to its portfolio companies through dedicated resources across functional areas. 
The firm has raised funds with committed capital in excess of $1.6 billion and is currently investing out of its fifth fund.  Platte River's employees are the largest collective investor across its funds, deeply aligning the firm with its investors and portfolio company management teams.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Legacy Emirates Group
Description:
Legacy Emirates Group has been in business since 2005 in the UAE. The group companies are listed in the table below.
Legacy Smart Employment Services (hereafter referred to as Legacy Smart) started operations in 2015 and is part of the Legacy Emirates Group which has been in business in the UAE since 2006.
The Corporate Objective and Focus of Legacy Smart is to become a pioneer in Training backed Outsourcing & Recruitment Services in the UAE and continually add Value Add services to bring about a paradigm shift in the services sector.
The management and execution team at Legacy Emirates Group has over 100 years of cumulative experience in Services. At the group level, the Legacy Emirates Group has been investing and building a broad spectrum of Services related businesses.
In 2017, the group’s main focus is on introducing VAT compliant IT , Bookkeeping and HR Solutions. Towards this end, the group set up a new company – Valencia Auto Tech (VAT) DMCC and has formed alliances with the Zoho Corporation as well as a number of CA firms based in the region and India.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: LOUD Ventures
Description:
LOUD Ventures is reshaping how healthcare innovation is funded, built, and scaled. As a healthcare-focused manager, we invest in early-stage healthcare and life science companies through a platform that combines capital with embedded leadership, regulatory insight, and operational infrastructure.

LOUD Ventures was created to address what traditional models miss. Capital alone isn’t enough. Our integrated platform, LOUD Collective, offers founders the hands-on support, execution capacity, and strategic depth needed to turn bold ideas into real-world outcomes.

Our flagship strategy, the Catalyst Health Fund, reflects this execution-led approach. We focus on backing companies where scientific promise, operating readiness, and downstream adoption can be aligned early. Capital is deployed with discipline and informed by real operating insight, with the goal of improving capital efficiency and reducing execution risk in complex healthcare businesses.

With a growing ecosystem of operators, founders, and LPs, LOUD Ventures exists to support companies building meaningful, scalable healthcare solutions.

Read our feature in ASA Monitor: https://journals.lww.com/monitor/fulltext/2026/02000/from_anesthesiologist_to_venture_capitalist__a.20.aspx
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Description: ‘87 is an affiliate of Sterling Partners, a multi-strategy investment firm founded over 35 years ago. ‘87 incubates and invests in businesses that are fundamentally focused on building direct relationships with their customers. We help companies reach success through funding, technology, talent, content development, and infrastructure. Our unique, hands-on approach makes us as an extension of the team. We roll up our sleeves and provide strategic insight, direction, and the resources needed to manage rapid growth and prepare for scale.

Owned and operated businesses span a variety of industries including ad tech, publishing, media and hospitality. Our mission is to support strong business ideas while building an ethos that helps improve society and give back to communities. 

Our mission is to support strong business ideas while also building an ethos that helps improve society and gives back to communities. We believe that good ideas and profitable businesses are not enough; to positively impact the world, we need to align all our efforts with the right intentions.

One Planet Group owns and operates Buyerlink, Autoweb, California.com, WestWind Pictures, One Planet Studios, and the non-profit organization, BahaiTeachings.com.

Name: Proeza Ventures
Description:
Proeza (pro'e.sa) from the Latin prodesse, means prowess or feat. 

We are a latam-established venture capital firm exclusively dedicated to mobility.

Our mission is to discover and invest in visionary founders building early stage revolutionary startups transforming the way in which we think about mobility and with whom we can partner to make a more sustainable world.

We are backed by Grupo Proeza, a portfolio management company with two global platforms operating in the mobility and agroindustry sectors. Within its mobility platform Grupo Proeza owns Metalsa, a Tier-1 supplier of structural automotive products for light and commercial vehicles and the current market leader in frames for light trucks in the North American market. Metalsa has over 60 years of deep industry experience with global manufacturing and operating presence.

We have a fully independent mandate to search for and invest in the most innovative and scalable ideas worldwide. 

We back entrepreneurs with an ambitious vision and the grit and operational skills to execute their business plan and transform the sectors they participate in.

Name: Antler Korea
Description:
글로벌 Early-stage VC인 앤틀러는 창업자를 최우선으로 생각하며, 세상을 바꾸는 회사를 만드는 데 모든 노력과 집중을 기울일 수 있도록 전폭적으로 지원하는 스타트업 제너레이터 VC(벤처 캐피탈) 입니다.

*스타트업 제너레이터 프로그램이란?*
엄격하게 선발된 우수한 예비창업자(팀)들이 모여 10주간의 팀빌딩 및 비즈니스검증 단계를 거친 후, 투자심의위원회 통과 시 앤틀러의 투자를 받게 됩니다. 투자치에 성공한 팀들은 이어지는 12주 동안 추가적인 사업화 과정을 거쳐 Antler Investor Day 에 서게 됩니다.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Aarin Capital
Description:
Aarin Capital is a proprietary venture fund that invests in technology-intensive businesses in life-sciences, healthcare, education and other potentially large India-centric or India-first market opportunities.

We seek to create long-term value by partnering with knowledgeable, adept and passionate founder teams who aim to transform business leveraging technology.  We complement their zeal with our experience to facilitate the journey to build large valuable enterprises. Technology and differentiation are key to the businesses that we invest in.  We aim to fund companies that seek to build sustainable and profitable value propositions right from their inception.

Our support typically includes providing strategic advice and extending our networks to investees relating to:
- Validating strategy and developing a customer-centric focus
- Assisting profitable growth – increasing revenue while optimizing costs
- Facilitating scalability across geographies
- Optimizing free cash-flows
- Bolstering governance and compliance

Aarin also invests in entrepreneurial fund managers with investment theses that complement Aarin’s investment areas in terms of sectors and stages at which they engage with founders. The objective is to create and nurture an expansive platform of investment opportunities that broaden the access into the Indian start-up ecosystem.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Silkroad Innovation Hub
Description: Building a community for founders and startups from Central Eurasia at the heart of Silicon Valley.

Description:
iStarter is an Italian financial advisor focused on fundraising for startups, scaleups and innovative SMEs since 2012.

iStarter advises exceptional entrepreneurs in funding and scaling high-potential companies.

iStarter also helps Private Investors, Family Offices and Corporates in the identification and assessment of investment and industrial opportunities according to their objectives and the most disruptive trends in their sectors.

iStarter operates on a vast range of transactions, from early stage capital increases to growth investments,  successfully supporting 40+ scaleups.

Founded by 100 "Equity Partners" (entrepreneurs and C-levels actively involved in evaluating and supporting the selected initiatives), iStarter was acquired in 2020 by ClubDeal SpA.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: THENA Capital
Description:
THENA Capital is supporting MedTech high growth companies that create transformative health experiences. Fund TCX-1 is focused on early stage digital and fast-tracked devices, backing businesses addressing key need spaces across care delivery, patient support, and medical product verticals, from chronic conditions, to women’s health, oncology, and mental health.

THENA Capital aims to change the face of early stage medical technology investment through deep sector and commercialisation expertise.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Almaz Capital
Description:
Almaz Capital was founded in 2008 to invest in early stage startups in the CIS (commonwealth of independent states) and CEE (central and eastern Europe) region with the backing of Cisco Systems and the EBRD (European Bank for Reconstruction and Development). Almaz Capital set out to invest and build a bridge between investee companies from the newly independent countries of the former Soviet Union to resources and connections in Silicon Valley. With that intention the firm opened its first offices in Silicon Valley and Moscow. During that period Almaz supported many startups with origins in Russia, such as QIK (acquired by Skype), Yandex (NASDAQ:YNDX) or Parallels (acquired by Corel).

In March 2014, after Crimea was annexed by Russia, Almaz Capital stopped investing in companies with any ties to Russia. In 2017 Almaz moved its European operations to Berlin and focus shifted from the countries of the CIS to the CEE region (central and eastern Europe). Following the crackdowns in Minsk in 2020 Almaz stopped investing in Belarus, another former Soviet state.

We are helping our Ukraine-based startups survive the war ravaging their country. Not only are we one of the largest investors in Ukraine over the last 5 years, but we are also a long-time supporter actively involved at the governance level at the UVCA (Ukrainian Venture Capital Association). Almaz Capital invested over $50m in over 15 companies with Ukrainian founders or teams including Adjoy, Arcycle, Content Analytics, DMarket, Hover, Jelastic, Mobalytics, Maketime, Petcube, Speedsize, Starwind, and 3Dlook . Startup teams have shown amazing resiliency and despite the war Ukraine remains one of our favorite investment destinations.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Arcadia
Description:
Arcadia is the go-to network for Italian youngsters willing to do startups. 

Are you curious but starting from zero? Get to know startup life through our Job Shadowing Days with startup C-levels.

Do you wanna gain REAL operational experience? Get to work in the best Italian startups via our network and Startup Job tracking.

Are you grinding already with your startup? You can get matched with our navigated startup mentors (experienced founders, no fluff) and join our Italian Youth Founders community.

We crave to overwhelm Italy with outstanding founders.

Learn by doing, lead by building.

Description: Pre-/seed fund investing in Enterprise software in Europe. Investments include Zavvy (acq. Deel), Anterior, Nory, Pivot and Anam

Name: Blue Startups
Description:
Blue Startups is a technology accelerator founded by Henk Rogers, founder of Blue Planet Software (sole agent of Tetris). Blue Startups concentrates on helping scalable-technology companies in SaaS, travel, and sustainability compete on a global scale. 

Blue Startups follows the mentor-driven accelerator model, reaching networks in Hawai‘i, Asia and Silicon Valley. Blue Startups is fast becoming a nexus of entrepreneurial activity between Asia and the Continental U.S.

We focus recruitment on Asia and the U.S. and are particularly interested in companies addressing both markets.

Blue Startups is a member of the Global Accelerator Network, an invite-only community of the world’s most respected organizations that provide startups with the best resources to create and grow their businesses, wherever they are. Startups accepted into a GAN accelerator have access to a variety of exclusive perks including over $1M worth of free services, introductions to a network of investors and access to soft landing spaces worldwide.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Liberta Partners
Description:
Liberta Partners ist eine von Unternehmern gegründete Multi-Family Holding für Unternehmen in Sondersituationen.

Hinter Liberta Partners stehen renommierte Familien und Unternehmer, die uns feste Kapitalzusagen gegeben haben.

Wir investieren branchenunabhängig und helfen bei der Umsetzung von strategischen und operativen Herausforderungen. Wir sind auf Sondersituationen – Abspaltungen aus Konzernstrukturen (Carve-Outs) und Nachfolgesituationen – fokussiert. Dabei investieren wir auch in tiefgreifende Restrukturierungssituationen, soweit diese Unternehmen deutliches Entwicklungspotential aufweisen. Weiterhin sollte das Zielunternehmen folgende Kriterien erfüllen:

- Umsatz zwischen EUR 5 Mio. und EUR 200 Mio.
- Headquarter in der DACH-Region; in Ausnahmesituationen auch in 
   angrenzenden Ländern
- Relevanter Marktteilnehmer in einem stabilen Markt
- Möglichkeit zum Erwerb einer Mehrheit
- Eigenkapitalinvestitionen von bis zu EUR 15 Mio. pro Transaktion
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Description:

Each company in which Jaïna Capital invests, becomes an active member of this social network. Each start-up will benefit from a unique growth environment in order to be helped on strategic issues, share expertise and initiate business opportunities.
Jaïna Capital is able to deal with a stringent process of institutional funds and a flexible decision process of business angels to make sure we do not miss any opportunity.
More than a simple financial support, Jaïna Capital is a leverage for start-ups aiming at being leaders in their sector.

Description:
Based in Austin, Texas, the ESW Capital group specifically focuses on buying, strengthening, then growing mature business software companies. 

By taking advantage of its unique operating platform, ESW revitalizes its acquisitions for sustainable success while making customer satisfaction a top priority. ESW and its affiliated companies have been in the enterprise software space since 1988, and the group includes notable brands such as Aurea, Ignite Technologies, Trilogy, and Versata.

Name: Volpi Capital
Description: Volpi Capital is a specialist private equity investor, founded in January 2016, investing in ambitious businesses that are rapidly growing by disrupting traditional B2B value chains. Through our focus on tech-enabled B2B services, we have a thorough understanding of business models successfully capturing the impact of changing technology and information to challenge the status quo across a wide range of sectors.

Nest operates corporate innovation accelerators, invests in seed to growth-stage startups, and runs an entrepreneurial community called Mettā. Nest has built an innovation ecosystem to connect the fast-growing markets of Asia, Middle East, and Africa.

Nest runs corporate innovation accelerators to connect startups with corporates; to corporate adopt new technologies and startups scale. Nest’s unique positioning: OUTCOME DRIVEN - Our programmes are designed to drive commercial outcome.
 
Since 2015, Over 174 startups have been accelerated with their corporate partners; including Bangkok Bank, INFINITI, FedEx, DBS, Amex, and various governments. 
 
Everything that we do is to empower businesses to achieve the extraordinary and drive positive impact in the world.

Learn more or join us at www.cancerfund.com.

Name: Bpifrance Small Cap
Description:
Bpifrance Small Cap regroupe plusieurs équipes de Bpifrance Investissement dédiés aux PME-ETI françaises. Ce sont 85 investisseurs et 2,5 Mds€ d’actifs sous gestion avec des équipes généralistes  en régions  et des équipes dédiées à des secteurs stratégiques clés : le tourisme  , le bois et les éco-matériaux , l'énergie et l'environnement, la défense .
 
 Accélérer la croissance des PME et ETI 
- Capital-développement et capital-transmission (MBO/MBI, rachat de positions minoritaires) 
- Investissement post-covid en phase de rebond (Fonds de Renforcement des PME et Obligations Relance)   
- Accompagnement sur le long terme et actif à 360° 
- Savoir-faire confirmé dans les primo-ouvertures de capital et auprès des entreprises familiales  
- Soutien au développement à l’international et dans le cadre d’acquisitions à l’étranger   
 
 Une approche alliant proximité régionale et généraliste avec des expertises sectorielles pointues 
- Un fort ancrage dans les écosystèmes régionaux et sectoriels 
- Une équipe de proximité avec 70 professionnels présents en régions dans 24 implantations  
-  Des équipes généralistes avec une forte présence dans l’industrie, les services aux entreprises  
- Une équipe dédiée au secteur du Tourisme 
- Une équipe Impact Environnement dédiée à la filière Bois, aux Eco-Matériaux, à l’Energie et l’Environnement  
- Un fonds dédié à la Défense
 
 Modalité d'intervention
- Prise de participation au capital de l’entreprise, généralement en tant qu’actionnaire minoritaire aux côtés d’autres actionnaires familiaux, industriels ou financiers
- Fonds propres ou quasi-fonds propres (OC ou OBSA par exemple)
- Tickets entre 0,5m€ et 10m€ (jusqu'à 20m€ pour l'Energie et l'Environnement) 
- Détention longue
- Outre du capital, Bpifrance apporte à l’entreprise un accompagnement du management et un réseau de contacts. Généralement Bpifrance est présent dans la gouvernance de la société (CS, CA) ou dans des comités stratégiques
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: ICV Partners, LLC
Description:
ICV is a private equity firm that invests in lower middle market companies in North America through its offices in Miami, FL and Atlanta, GA.  Our focus is on making equity investments in high-margin, market leading businesses in partnership with proven managers who want to grow and improve their company. We have made 30 investments and understand what it takes to build capabilities and to take a company to the next level of performance. 

Companies with revenues of $25 - $300 million are uniquely driven, entrepreneurial and focused. They face special challenges, often with limited resources. They can be more vulnerable to market fluctuations and face many obstacles in executing their plans.  ICV looks at the problems confronting a company and the possible solutions through the lens of a supportive partner. Because we are passionate about helping to build and strengthen smaller, middle-market companies, we are focused on being supportive advisors to our management partners. We provide real support, both operational and financial, so our partner companies are better prepared to achieve their goals.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: ChileGlobal Angels
Description:
En ChileGlobal Angels buscamos trabajar desde el impacto, apoyando emprendimientos que estén dando respuesta a los grandes desafíos que hoy enfrenta el mundo a través de la innovación y las tecnologías. A la fecha, y gracias al compromiso y apoyo de nuestra red de inversionistas, hemos podido contribuir al escalamiento de diversas startups que hoy están cambiado al mundo y están convirtiéndose en referentes a nivel local y global. 

Desde 2009, y bajo el alero de Fundación Chile, hemos venido impulsando una red de inversionistas comprometidos que no solo aportan capital, sino que también apoyo en conocimiento, redes de contacto, experiencia y mentoría para contribuir al desarrollo de empresas innovadoras de escala global.

Name: Venture Capital Trust Fund
Description: Venture Capital Trust Fund (VCTF) is a quasi Public Fund of Funds institution established by the Government of Ghana under the VCTF ACT 680.  VCTF's mandate is to make funds available to SMEs in Ghana and to spearhead the establishment of a vibrant venture capital Industry in Ghana.

Name: Kuwait Life Sciences Company (KLSC)
Description:
Kuwait Life Sciences (KLSC) was established in 2010, with a paid up capital of 15 million Kuwait Dinars (KD) which is equivalent to approximately $53 million US Dollars. KLSC is fully owned by National Technology Enterprises Company. National Technology Enterprises Company (NTEC) was incorporated in November of 2002, by the Kuwait Council of Ministers as a fully owned company by the Kuwait Investment Authority (KIA), the sovereign wealth fund of the State of Kuwait. Capitalized at 100 million Kuwait Dinars (KD) which is equivalent to approximately $350 million US Dollars, NTEC aims to play a vital role in servicing major stakeholders in Kuwait and the Middle East region with their technology requirements.

KLSC focuses on healthcare innovative concepts and demanded services which have a clear and unmet need in the Middle East and North Africa (MENA) region. KLSC has been designed as an integrated healthcare company building unique projects and is considered one of the pioneer venture capitalist and private equity companies in the Middle East that invests globally and operates regionally seeking to advance healthcare services and systems within the region. KLSC supports both public and private sector stakeholders to access emerging technologies, establish unique projects and adapt best practices prevailing in today’s healthcare field. KLSC operates in healthcare investment, life sciences training, medical technology and pharmaceutical distribution.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: ALX Ventures
Description:
ALX (alxafrica.com) is a leading technology training provider that equips young Africans with both the technical and professional skills that enable them to thrive in the digital economy.

ALX Ventures (alx-ventures.com) partners with this African tech talent to tackle the world’s greatest challenges through technology and business. 

Their Founder Academy and Accelerator programs operate across 8 African markets, benefiting from ALX’s world-class hub spaces, dedicated teams, and partner network. 

Their programs have developed thousands of young African entrepreneurs, and alumni include VC-backed startups such as Healthtracka and Kayko.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: StartupXseed Ventures LLP
Description:
StartupXseed Ventures LLP was started with a vision to create a more holistic ecosystem for startups and entrepreneurs in India, at the seed level. The firm offers a very unique programme that not only provides institutional Seed Funding and Strategic Support, but also Market Access, Mentorship and guidance.  

Founded in June 2015 by Mr. B. V. Naidu, Former STPI Director, Mr. Balakrishnan, Former Infosys Board Member and Mr. Ramakrishnan, Ex – CDO & M&A Head HCL & Mr. Ravi Thakur, an Entrepreneur & Mentor himself.

This unique model of incubation and seed investment coupled with strategic support differentiates StartupXseed from any other current seed fund companies, fostering innovation in the technology space in India. 

StartupXseed focuses on startups in deep technology domains such as Cyber Security, Semicon, Embedded Devices, Internet of Things (IOT), Machine Learning and AI Product & Services with emphasis on Innovation, IP creation and disruptive technologies, with ticket sizes ranging from $ 500K - $ 1.5 Mn.

Our portfolio startups are; DarwinBox, Shield Square, Siliconch Systems, Singularity, Cloud SEK, Bellatrix Aerospace, Humalect, Smart Ship, Zenduty, AUS, Analyz, AlphaICs, Steradian Semi, Smarterbiz, Jobiak and SawoLabs.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Swanlaab Venture Factory
Description:
At Swanlaab Venture Factory, our purpose and DNA are deeply rooted in acting like entrepreneurs who drive tech innovation and sustainable growth. We are a venture factory that invests in the best Spanish deep technology & agri-food startups, providing unique funding and a company-building approach to accelerate success while minimizing and controlling risk.

Our investment thesis began by backing early-stage B2B deep tech companies in Spain, providing initial capital and continuing our support through subsequent rounds until a successful exit. As we observed Spain’s ecosystem, we identified a significant opportunity in agrifood technology innovation and applied the same approach—helping to build companies with capital, know-how, and structured methodologies.

Expanding our scope further, we entered the world of search funds, where we don’t invest in startups but rather in exceptional individuals with the right qualifications and leadership skills to acquire and scale mid-sized businesses. These companies often face challenges in growth, digital transformation, and technological adoption, and we help them evolve and reach the next level.

At Swanlaab, our mission is to be the partner of choice for entrepreneurs scaling deep tech and agrifood tech companies. We operate as an international multidisciplinary team, combining deep expertise in software technology, agrifoodtech, and mid-sized business ventures with cross-functional knowledge in finance, talent management, compliance, business development, and go-to-market strategy. Each project is led by one of our dedicated partners, supported by the full breadth of our team’s investment and management expertise.

We don’t just invest—we build, support, and scale companies, creating long-term value for both entrepreneurs and investors.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Singtel Innov8
Description:
Established in 2010, Singtel Innov8 is the corporate venture capital fund of Singtel, Asia’s leading communications technology group. With an evergreen fund of US$350 million, Innov8 invests in and partners start-ups with promising innovations and possible applications for Singtel Group’s diverse business needs.

By leveraging Singtel Group’s presence in across 21 countries in Asia, Australia and Africa with a total combined reach of over 770 million mobile customers and partnerships with local and global stakeholders, Innov8 helps start-ups grow and go beyond their home markets.

Innov8 also connects start-ups with Singtel Group operations and telecommunications partners worldwide via Innov8 Sparks.

Innov8 is managed by its own set of decision-making, approval and investment processes.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Chemical Angel Network
Description:
Chemical Angels is a network of accredited investors.  We invest our own capital into Chemistry enabled companies.

Please see the Chemical Angels Network (LinkedIn Group) for interactive discussions and announcements.

We serve the investor and the entrepreneur by presenting quality investment opportunities to qualified investors. Our mission is to provide financial capital and experienced mentorship to early stage chemical companies.

Companies can submit applications for funding and investors can apply for membership at www.ChemicalAngels.com

Name: Redbud VC
Description:
Redbud VC is a Pre-Seed venture capital firm investing in people strengthened by struggle, building massive tech companies. Redbud is a first check / pre-seed stage firm supporting people across North America with resources from Middle America.

Redbud was founded by the founders of the multi-billion dollar company EquipmentShare, a top 25 YC company. 

Redbud VC brings a team of dedicated operators who have the insights & support from building billion-dollar companies like EquipmentShare to remove unnecessary barriers, so founders can focus on the hard stuff that matters.

Name: Queensbridge Venture Partners, LLC
Description:
QueensBridge Venture Partners ("QBVP") invests in technology companies that transform the way we live, work, and play.

Access.

The partners at QueensBridge have invested heavily in relationships across the world venture investing. Those relationships allow us to cut through the clutter to source the highest-quality investment opportunities. Our access to world-class fund managers and management teams helps us drive returns for our investors.

Strategy.

QueensBridge executes an early-stage venture capital investing strategy. We invest in companies that create products designed to harness the power of technology to enhance productivity, efficiency and connectivity. We invest in companies that disrupt large markets by meeting the ever-evolving needs of consumers and businesses.

Track Record.

Founded in 2014, QueensBridge Venture Partners has invested in over 100 early-stage technology companies. Our partners’ expertise spans technology, financial markets, entertainment and talent management. We bring this vast experience to bear when funding investments, and on behalf our investors to drive category-leading returns across our funds.

Experienced Team.

The QueensBridge team has over 100 years of experience operating at the intersection of technology, financial markets and popular culture. Our unique mix of corporate development and talent management experience enables us to identify business models and management teams that can transform large markets.

Our Philosophy.

We believe powerful technology in the hands of consumers is transforming global markets. We partner with founders and investors who are leading this transformation.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Heartland Ventures
Description:
Heartland Ventures is a venture capital firm that connects high-growth startups with our Midwestern corporate LPs and customer base. We invest in high-growth startups bringing innovative technology to traditional Midwestern industries, including manufacturing, construction, logistics, and real estate.

Our deep network of executives at industry-leading corporations helps validate technologies by serving as pilot customers, often before we invest in the startup.

Heartland Ventures plays an integral role in bridging the gap between traditional technology hubs and the Midwest. This model benefits the Midwest by:

-Helping startups expand into the region and create new employment opportunities
-Creating more technology-related jobs that will continue to attract talent to the region and help retain the existing talent for the long-term 
-Importing high-growth startups that aspiring entrepreneurs can learn from
-Attracting investment dollars from outside the region to strengthen the region’s innovation infrastructure
-Bringing national attention to the region
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Alchimia Investments
Description:
We partner with stellar entrepreneurs to realize their unique intuitions and reach their goals, inspired by values. 

Who We Are
Alchimia is an investment company primarily operating in the Venture Capital Sector. Leveraging the expertise of our team and our advisors, we invest and co-invest in high growth potential opportunities offering capital, as well as dedicated strategic and operational resources. 

What We Look For
We are sector agnostic and target innovative opportunities around the world. We share goals and passion with founders and look to connect them with our wide international network to bridge their expansion domestically as well as overseas.

Investment Criteria
Focus on Early Stage and Growth phases rounds for companies offering innovative products / services operating within a large addressable market. Target investments should ideally have potential for international expansion.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Haus der Bäcker
Description:
Founded in 2019 by blueworld.group in Frankfurt am Main, Haus der Bäcker specifically counteract the succession problem in the traditional bakery industry. Since then Haus der Bäcker is one of the top 10 bakeries in Germany with almost 2750 employees and over 250 stores. 

Haus der Bäcker has made it to its mission to combine the tradition of the bakeries with progress, innovation and digitalization. The competence areas of Haus der Bäcker, which include controlling, marketing, finance, purchasing and many more, are used accordingly in the associated bakeries to pursue a successful and sustainable future. In doing so, the brand and identity of each bakery are consistently preserved and further developed together with the business in a future-oriented manner. The aim is to offer a future perspective through affiliation with Haus der Bäcker in order to enable the sustainable and successful continuation of the businesses.

Riverside typically invests in North American companies with $3-15M of EBITDA that operate across a wide spectrum of the healthcare and technology industries.

As entrepreneurs ourselves, we appreciate the challenges of growing businesses and understand the goals and perspectives of business owners and managers. Name: Reflect Ventures
Description:
Reflect Ventures is a leading emerging markets investor bringing together hundreds of accomplished entrepreneurs, investors, operators and executives in a global venture capital investment group.

Our capital, operations know-how, cross-border expertise and network enable exceptional founders to build the digital future of infrastructure in emerging and developing markets.

Our focus sectors include logistics, supply chain, transportation, commerce, distribution and fintech rails - core infrastructure areas where there are significant barriers to entry, where digitization can enable huge economic gains and widespread positive impact, and where first movers will have strong defenses against later entrants.

Since 2021, we have closed over 25 VC investments across South Asia, SEA, Latin America, Africa and MENA. Our portfolio includes leading companies like Chari (Morocco), Marketforce (Kenya), Dastgyr (Pakistan), Truck It In (Pakistan), Jatri (Bangladesh), Elenas (Colombia) and Moova (Argentina).

To learn more about what we do or to participate in our investments, reach out to us at invest@reflectventures.com.

Our thesis is that advances in compute are allowing us to solve problems never before addressable. Our goal is to help entrepreneurs turn their own ideas and visions into successful, impactful companies.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Alix Ventures
Description:
Alix Ventures: Driving Patient Impact - Supporting early stage Life Science startups engineering biology to drive radical advances in human health

Born from our collective experience as founders, we set out to build the fund we wanted to raise from...

Thesis: Life Sciences is experiencing rapid innovation with the rise of new generation of companies known as “TechBio” (Merging technology & biology), a change we believe is leading to some of the most impactful solutions in decades. Our passion is to help build transformative companies ahead of this revolution to significantly impact the quality & effectiveness of patient care. We aim to partner with passionate, accomplished founders who possess unique insights to solve some of the world’s most daring problems facing us in Life Sciences.

Team: Our entire team is built of Life Science Founders with experience in raising capital, scaling teams, running labs, partnering with Pharma, & the many fires that consist of operating an early stage company. Founders, we’d love to partner with you along the journey & help translate daunting ideas into world shaping innovations - here’s to a better brighter future for patients! 

SAB: Composed of Bioengineering PhDs turned Founders, our Scientific Advisory Board provides deep technical expertise & fluency across a wide variety of Life Science sub-domains from platforms for “Novel Applications” (Therapeutics/Diagnostics) to “Bio-Economy Infrastructure” (Tools/Services/Manufacturing). Let’s talk science!

Support: Helping our founders is our utmost priority. To tackle the many challenges ahead, we’ve curated a full platform of resources to help with customer introductions, fundraising, & team building, amongst others. In addition, dedicated to supporting our portfolio is our extensive network of industry executives spanning Top 25 Pharma, major health systems, & large Payors.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Tanglin Venture Partners
Description:
We started Tanglin Venture Partners with the belief that there is a massive opportunity for entrepreneurs in India to build fast-growing businesses with large profit pools.

With a combined AUM of ~$250M across 2 funds, we primarily invest in the Series A-stage (up to $8M per cheque). Our investment approach is thematic and research-driven, coupled with deep, on-the-ground diligence. We are disciplined in our pace of deployment and have a concentrated portfolio, which enables us to spend quality time helping our companies scale.

Our portfolio companies include: 

Consumer: abCoffee, Good Flippin’ Burgers, Inshorts, Jupiter, Lifelong, PocketFM, Rapidbox, Rupeek, Scapia, Sugar.fit
Enterprise: Credgenics, ExMyB, Houseware, Moglix, Ninjacart, Open, Pepper Content, PingSafe (exited), Plum Benefits, SuperOps, Trusting Social

More about us at www.tanglinvp.com

The firm’s strategy is built around the concept of “Go-To-Market Fit”, developing a structure for thinking about how to build a repeatable, sustainable growth engine that accelerates and propels the growth of SaaS companies.

We invest in Artificial Intelligence (AI) innovations that deliver transformative commercial solutions in Digital Transformation, Green Transition, Longevity, and Dual-Use Defence Technologies.

Description:

Unsere KollegInnen unterstützen unsere Gruppenunternehmen in operativen wie strategischen Herausforderungen, um sie langfristig erfolgreich weiterzuentwickeln. Unsere Philosophie beruht auf einem verantwortungsvollen Handeln und einem partnerschaftlichen Miteinander.


Derzeit erzielen wir mit unseren Gesellschaften in Europa sowie in den USA und China in Summe einen Umsatz von 1 Mrd. Euro und beschäftigten über 4.500 Mitarbeitende. Unser Ziel ist es innerhalb der nächsten Jahre, durch weitere Zukäufe und organisches Wachstum, den Umsatz kontinuierlich zu steigern und nachhaltig Wert zu generieren.

Name: La Maison Partners
Description:
La Maison Partners is a next-generation private equity platform backed by some of Europe’s most prominent entrepreneurial families. We partner with exceptional VC and PE teams as a co-investor and strategically — across Europe, the US and Asia — through a unique ecosystem rooted in long-term alignment, agility, and high-conviction investing.

With over €700M in assets under management and 60+ investments, La Maison Partners combines institutional-grade discipline with a boutique culture shaped by a “Club” of influential families, including the Dassault, David-Weill, Mérieux, Niel, de Benedetti, Cointreau, Lévy and others.

We specialize in:

- GP stakes and minority investments in “rising star” asset managers,
- Thematic and geographic fund selection with a focus on value creation,
- Direct co-investment funds sourcing differentiated deal flow from our GP network,

- Opportunistic strategies built in collaboration with visionary teams.

Led by Amélie Finaz and supported by a renewed shareholder base including the Philippson family (PIC1871), La Maison Partners is entering a new growth phase. Our ambition: to double in size by attracting top investment talent, building long-term partnerships, and offering investors a resilient, high-value platform in a transforming private equity landscape.

Whether you're an ambitious GP looking for a long-term strategic partner, an investor seeking alignment and access, or a talent ready to build the next chapter — La Maison Partners is your home.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Rather than following the conventional venture capital path, we take an active ownership approach, similar to later-stage private equity - focusing not just on selecting winners, but on enhancing the probability of success for the companies we partner with.

Name: Kian Capital Partners
Description:
Proud to be recognized on Inc.’s Founder-Friendly Investors list for six consecutive years, Kian seeks to forge partnerships to ignite growth and build enduring value. Our goal is to provide flexible financial resources and additional operational horsepower to scale middle-market businesses, realize aspirations and deliver long-term investment returns through genuine partnership. Kian is a private investment firm with $1.1 billion of capital under management and 15 current investments. Our team of seasoned investors has over 100 years of collective experience providing transformational capital solutions and board-level strategic and operational guidance to founder/owner operated businesses.

Investment Characteristics:
•  REVENUE: $10 - 100M
•  EBITDA: $2 - 15M
•  INVESTMENT SIZE: $7 - 30M
•  FLEXIBLE APPROACH: We invest both debt and equity in every deal and have the flexibility to be either a control or minority owner
•  TRANSFORMATIONAL CAPITAL: We want to be the first institutional partner for founder/owner operated businesses
•  TRANSACTION TYPES: Includes buyouts, recapitalizations and growth financings
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Siana Capital
Description:
Siana Capital Management LLP (Siana Capital) is a venture fund management company headquartered in Bengaluru (Bangalore), India, the country's nerve-centre for science and technology. Siana Capital also has a presence in Mumbai, to give it easier access to the country's financial services institutions.

With economic activity shifting to the East, India needs to take a seat on the innovation table, alongside China and Israel. Notably, India has a large scientific talent pool and research-based incubators, which have created an opportunity for deep science innovation with government encouragement. However, follow on start-up funding for deep science and technology has been sparse. India’s deep science and technology start-ups, while thriving in their infancy in government sponsored incubators, are grossly underfunded for further growth.

To monetize this gap, Siana Capital Management LLP formed the Deep Science India Fund to invest in start-ups based on path breaking deep science and technology innovations across the life cycle: from start-up to Series A and Series B financing, and then onward to expansion stages. 

The Fund will initially focus on transactions in Healthcare & Biotechnology, Clean Energy & Water, Agriculture & Food Processing and Robotics & Artificial Intelligence. Based on our definitive agreement with the Society of Innovation and Development (SID), an initiative of the Indian Institute of Science (IISc), one of India’s most celebrated science incubators, as well as with other alliances we have forged, we already have access to a large sitting pipeline of transactions – all of which are under evaluation. 

Siana Capital's vision is to become India's leading fund house in deep science and deep technology emanating from India.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Revenue Syndicate
Description:
We are an investment community & syndicate built exclusively for experienced go-to-market operators and professional investors.

Our members are some of the best go-to-market practitioners in Europe and are driving the growth of the fastest-growing companies in the world. 

Founders can raise money from people who understand what it takes to generate revenue. Our members can help them build their revenue engine and scale from zero to exit.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Cadma Capital Partners
Description:
Cadma Capital provides flexible and innovative financing solutions to high-growth companies and financial sponsors. We empower our clients to achieve their goals through our combination of structured credit experience and deep understanding of the venture and growth ecosystems. We also work with specialty finance partners to support companies throughout all stages of their growth – from early stage private to mature public enterprises.

Cadma Capital was formed by entities affiliated with Apollo Global Management, Inc. For more than three decades, Apollo’s investing expertise across a fully integrated platform has served the financial return needs of clients and provided businesses with innovative capital solutions for growth.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Diffusion Capital Partners
Description:
Diffusion Capital Partners (DCP) is a leading Venture Capital fund manager focusing on technology-intensive opportunities. DCP team started operations in 2007, making it one of the market's most experienced deep-tech VC fund managers.

Our Investment Model
We seek opportunities with a deep-technology-driven competitive edge and match their value proposition with the needs in the market to build high-impact companies.

Our Approach
We closely work with founders and leverage our network to hit technical, financial, and product deployment targets. With over 70 years of cumulative experience, we provide our portfolio companies with technology, business development, legal,  financial and operational know-how.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Sadara Ventures
Description:

Sadara aims to produce significant returns for its investors, and to contribute to the development of a vibrant and sustainable knowledge-based economy in Palestine.

Name: Olive Rock Partners
Description:

Olive Rock focuses on strategically and tactically capitalizing on the evolving investment landscape in the Middle East, primarily in the Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC) countries.


Olive Rock is regulated by the ADGM Financial Services Regulatory Authority.

Name: ITI Growth Opportunities Fund
Description:
We believe that Indian startups backed by quality entrepreneurs have the power to create valuable businesses that compete on a global scale. That is why we set out to create ITI Growth Opportunities VCF 1. With a mission statement to identify and invest early in world class founders attacking both Indian & Global markets; solving real problems using technology.
Over the past 7 years, the GP team has invested in 24+ companies generating top decile performance in the Indian VC asset class. The General Partners team has created $1.2Bn+ worth of company value in their personal investments; while the institutional journey is just beginning.

ITIGo is actively investing in 2019. We love passionate founders and team members, if you have a startup idea or would like to join us, please email us on ideas@itigo.in

Name: Homu Health Ventures
Description:
Our mission is to fill in the gaps in the health-care ecosystem so scientists and entrepreneurs could successfully launch their company globally. Southern European countries partially lack the full ecosystem to create viable startups in the health sector. 

We aim to nurture early-stage companies to the next level. We are looking for researchers with ideas or startups in these fields: reproductive medicine, genomics, and medical devices. 

Our vision:
– Creating a leading biotech ecosystem.
– Transforming scientist into entrepreneurs.
– Creating a community of healthcare.
– Together we are improving the quality of life.

Our main objectives:

– Transfering tech from universities to companies.
– Strengthen relations between startups and big companies.
– Improve competitiveness.
– Support innovation.
– Produce successful ventures, create jobs & vitalize society.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Ingeborg Investments
Description: When women are empowered financially, our societies and economies thrive. But today, of the $150 billion invested in venture capital funds, only 2% goes to women-led businesses. We are working to change that. Ingeborg Investments strives to close the funding gap by investing in women-led and women-focused startups and funds.

Name: Inven Capital
Description:
Inven Capital is a venture capital fund investing in climate tech startups across Europe and Israel. It is backed by a major European energy utility ČEZ, a.s. and by the European Investment Bank (EIB), having EUR 500m at its disposal over two fund generations.

We seek investments into climate tech growth stage startups and all areas within decarbonization are close to our heart. 
We target late-stage growth opportunities with business model proven by sales and with significant growth potential.

We focus on creating long term value through active support of the companies and their founders and aim to build strong consortia of friendly investors together with us at the board.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: TIN Capital | European Cybersecurity Investors
Description:
TIN Capital was founded in 1998 and is one of the leading cybersecurity venture capital firms in Europe. TIN stands for 'The Investors Network'. 

In Q4 2023, TIN Capital launched its newest fund: European Cyber Tech Fund V. This €100 million fund will invest in 12 startups with the potential to become a leader in their segment. Portfolio companies such as BreachLock, Eye Security, EGERIE, EclectiqIQ underline the expertise and market reputation of TIN Capital.

TIN Capital (co-)leads funding rounds in European startups and scale-ups in the fields of:
 Cybersecurity
 IoT Security
 Privacy Enhancing Technologies
 National & Economic Security Tech
 Cyber Liability Insurtech

The small and gender-diverse investment team has an entrepreneurial background. We actively support our portfolio companies to become European cybersecurity champions.

For more information, please visit our website: www.tincapital.vc

Specialties: Venture Capital, Private Equity, Fund Management, Wealth Management, Cybersecurity, IoT Security, AI, Security Tech, B2B Software

Hence most of our ventures are active in the field of therapeutics, medical devices and digital health. Not only do we invest, we also take an active role in helping the company to become successful, by leveraging our extensive network and by bringing our own experience to the table.

Name: MPE Partners
Description:
MPE Partners (“MPE” or “Morgenthaler Private Equity”) is a private equity firm with offices in Cleveland, OH and Boston, MA. MPE focuses on lower middle market leveraged buyouts, recapitalizations, and build-up investments. We have a strong track record in working with entrepreneur- and family-owned businesses and corporate divestitures. Our goal is simple: to partner with industry-leading management teams, provide them with the highest possible level of support as they build their companies, and create long-term shareholder value. 

MPE focuses on the lower middle market, specifically on industry-leading companies with EBITDA between $8 million and $40 million. We are most active in two sectors: high-value manufacturing and commercial & industrial services.

Description: Atinum Investment is a top-notch Venture Capital firm established in 1988. Our investment philosophy revolves around the idea of finding the right intrinsic value of venture companies. With the insight of the various industry specialists at hand at Atinum Investment, we have comprehensive expertise in unearthing companies with high growth potential.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Avatech is a startup accelerator that provides entrepreneurs with the necessary ingredients to succeed. We provide aspiring entrepreneurs with mentorship, entrepreneurial training, seed funding and a creative workspace through Avacamp and Accelerator.
Join us: www.avatech.ir

Investing and accelerating energy projects to boost energy transition

Description:
Seen. Heard. Funded.

Excellence knows no skin color, gender, sexual orientation or geography. But 90% of venture capital  goes to people who look alike and live nearby. No more. Sixty8 Capital is shining a light on undercapitalized founders and innovators in the flyover states to even the game, impact the world, and generate massive venture returns. It’s past time – let’s make the change.

Name: ScOp Venture Capital

Name: IDG Ventures Vietnam
Description:
IDG Ventures Vietnam (IDGVV) is the first technology venture capital fund in Vietnam. Since 2004, we’ve been working with entrepreneurs to grow innovative and market-leading companies. IDGVV currently has $100 million under management, with investments in over 40 companies in the technology, media, telecommunications, and consumer sectors. Our offices are located in Ho Chi Minh City, Hanoi, and Singapore.

Our anchor Limited Partner investor is International Data Group (IDG), the world’s largest IT media company. IDG Ventures is a global family of 5 locally-managed funds in China, Vietnam, India, Korea, and the United States totaling over $3.7 billion under management. As one of the truly global venture firms, IDG Ventures has invested in over 350 companies over the last 17 years.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Mount Judi Ventures
Description:
Mount Judi Ventures is a venture capital firm based in Bengaluru, India. It was founded by successful entrepreneurs with a vision of creating wealth through mutually fair and equitable venture capital investments. The firm invests in startups that have ethical businesses, innovative solutions, and large market potential. 
As of FY24, the firm has two funds: Mount Judi India Growth Fund and Mount Judi India Micro Fund. The former is a sector-agnostic fund that invests in Seed/Pre-Series A/Series A rounds of startups, while the latter is an angel fund that allows investors to get deal by deal exposure to emerging startups. The firm follows a hands-on approach and partners with founders to increase their probability of success through an active, mentor-driven model. The firm is also one of the earliest signatories to the United Nations-supported Principles of Responsible Investment.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Pike Street Capital
Description:
Based in Seattle, Pike Street Capital is a private equity firm focused on lower middle market growth buyouts.  Pike Street invests in successful businesses in industrial and other sectors that serve professional customers.  We are especially attracted to investment partnerships where our operational focus, expertise and executive network can assist management to accelerate growth.

We have deep experience partnering with management teams, families, and founders to achieve their objectives from continued growth to business transition.  We have accumulated a set of experiences, tools and relationships that make us a helpful partner and investor.  With our Pike Street Operating system (which we call S2E), we help management teams tackle new sectors of growth, expand geographically, enhance go-to-market systems and accelerate product development.  We believe growth is a process and a team sport.  We are a hands-on resource to help management expand, grow and further professionalize their business.

Our typical investment will have between $4 million and $20 million of EBITDA and revenue between $20 million and $200 million.  We look for majority investment positions.  Since we are growth oriented, we seek to avoid excess financial leverage to ensure our investments can capitalize on growth plans and opportunities.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: DFJ Growth
Description: DFJ Growth invests in growth stage technology companies that are scaling rapidly and poised for market leadership. DFJ Growth is the later stage investing practice of [Draper Fisher Jurvetson (DFJ)](http://www.crunchbase.com/financial-organization/draper-fisher-jurvetson), a global venture capital firm. DFJ Growth partners with extraordinary entrepreneurs who set out to change the world by creating a new generation of iconic technology-driven businesses.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: University Growth Fund
Description: University Growth Fund is the largest education-based private equity fund in the country, giving university students the opportunity to gain real-world experience as they invest alongside top tier investors in many of the best companies in the country.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Alpac Capital
Description:
Alpac Capital invests in Hungarian, Portuguese and neighbouring countries’ SMEs with scale-up potential that develop solutions for the digital transformation of private companies and other institutions. It currently manages an EuVECA (European Venture Capital Fund) regulated by the Portuguese SEC (CMVM) which was founded in 2017.

Alpac Capital takes an hands-on approach, making equity investments with active involvement in business development to support a successful scale-up and ensure the highest standards of professional management. Alpac Capital is looking for experienced teams with products and services which have already been successfully tested in the market.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Iran Venture Capital and Private Equity Exchange
Description:
بورس فرصت های سرمایه گذاری ایران پیش از یک دهه فعالیت خود را در زمینه خدمات رسانی میان سرمایه گذاران و سرمایه پذیران آغاز کرده است. این پایگاه به صورت شخصی و با مدیریت آقای فرشاد روحانی رانکوهی اداره می شود. خدمات ارائه شده در این پایگاه بر اساس تجربه سالیان طولانی فعالیت طراحی و اجرا شده اند.

پایگاه اطلاعات سرمایهگذاری ایران (بورس فرصت های سرمایه گذاری ایران) برای ارائه خدمات به، سه گروه زیر طراحی شده است:

سرمایه گذاران (سرمایه گذاران، شتابندهنده ها و کارگزاران)
صاحبان پروژه ها
گروهها و شرکتهای خصوصی و دولتی مرتبط به امور سرمایه گذاری
براساس نیاز مبرم به روان سازی سیستم سرمایه گذاری و ایجاد یک پل کارآمد میان گروه های سرمایه گذار ایرانی تبار و خارجی در سراسر دنیا با پروژه های مختلف در داخل کشور بر این آمده ایم که با طراحی سیستم بورس بر روی اینترنت به این نیاز پاسخ دهیم.

در این پایگاه، سرمایه گذار به سادگی می تواند بر حسب جغرافیا (استانهای کشور) حجم سرمایه گذاری، نوع سرمایه گذاری (از ایده تا سرمایه گذاری های کلان) و دسته بندی پروژه به جستجو بپردازد.

صاحبان پروژه به آسانی می توانند پروژه یا پروژه های خود را با تفکیک های مشخص در بورس ارائه دهند.

گروه سوم شامل تمامی شرکتهای خصوصی و دولتی، می توانند خدمات خود را به دو گروه حاضر در بورس ارائه دهند.

تمامی این مراحل به حالت User Friendly و کارآمد طراحی شده است و صاحبان پروژه، سرمایه گذاران و شرکتهای مرتبط به راحتی می توانند با یکدیگر ارتباط برقرار کنند.

خدمات پایگاه
ثبت پروژه
حمایت مالی از پروژه
مالکان پروژه ها می توانند با ثبت پروژه خود در سایت در مقابل چشمان سرمایه گذاران قرار بگیرند.
سرمایه گذاران می توانند با انتخاب پروژه دلخواه با صاحب پروژه تماس گرفته و حمایت مالی آن را بر عهده بگیرند.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: EnerTech Capital
Description:
EnerTech is a Venture Capital firm that has been investing and partnering with innovators for over 25 years, empowering entrepreneurs to transform industries. We have pioneered a holistic approach to business building, leveraging strategic collaboration across a diverse stakeholder ecosystem to create value; with a focus on Mobility, Industry 4.0, and Connected Customer. Since our founding in 1996, we have made 72 investments and have managed over $500 million in LP Capital Commitments. We have had an active role in building world class management teams who have created new lasting ways to use energy resources more efficiently and have been a part of building companies that have, and continue to, transform industries. 

We currently have offices in Toronto, Philadelphia, Palm Beach Gardens, Boston, Montreal, and Sacramento.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Santander InnoVentures
Description:
Santander InnoVentures is Banco Santander's $200m corporate venture arm. We invest in fintech startups, globally, across all stages, and help create meaningful, strategic relationships between our portfolio companies and Santander Group. 

Current portfolio companies include iZettle, MyCheck, CYNGN, Ripple, Kabbage, Digital Asset Holdings, Elliptic, SigFig, Socure, Tradeshift, PayKey, Gridspace, Pixoneye, Curve, Payjoy, ePesos, Visible Alpha, Roostify, Autofi and Creditas.

Name: CVL Venture Labs
Description: A venture studio company making change by way of strategic funding, accelerator programs, and mentorship for entrepreneurs - by appointment only.
