Name: Kalys Ventures
Description: Kalys VC is a Moroccan venture fund that invests in early-stage startups, from pre-seed to Series A, with ticket sizes ranging from $50K to $200K. The fund is known for its strong corporate network and its ability to help startups integrate into the Moroccan market. Kalys VC focuses on startups founded by industry experts who are ready to rethink how traditional players operate and drive innovation within their sectors.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Peregrine Ventures
Description:
At Peregrine, we are dedicated to supporting and advancing medical innovation through strategic investments. 

The Peregrine advantage brings together deep industry knowledge and an embedded synergetic strategy. This allows our team of investment professionals to support our portfolio companies in the development of meaningful breakthroughs in healthcare. 

Whether at an early-stage seed or advanced growth stage, Peregrine’s synergetic approach to investing reaches beyond capital. This allows our firm to provide expert, focused, and concrete services throughout the company lifecycle.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Sound Bioventures
Description: Sound Bioventures is a Venture Capital firm that Invests in private clinical stage biotherapeutics companies in Europe and USA. The fund has a geographic footprint on both sides of the Atlantic and will support the clinical development of novel medicines for diseases of high unmet medical need.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Techstart Ventures
Description: Techstart Ventures is a first cheque investor for extraordinary founders who are pursing uncapped global opportunities from a base in Scotland or Northern Ireland. If you're thinking about raising inception to pre-seed capital in the next 12 months then please do talk with us as early as possible in your journey.  www.techstart.vc
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Lime Rock New Energy
Description: Lime Rock New Energy brings our dedicated energy transition focus, deep industry and operating expertise, and true value-added partnership to help leaders in the new energy economy grow profits, operations, and market share.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: WAD Capital
Description:
At WAD Capital, our commitment is unwavering in the quest to empower a new generation of entrepreneurs to navigate the European SME landscape with confidence and innovation. Our mission is to revolutionize the sector by addressing the succession challenges that many established companies face.

Our approach is distinct. We are not just investors; we are pioneers in entrepreneurship through acquisition. Annually, we select an elite group of aspiring CEOs and provide them with substantial resources. With a dedicated fund, we enable these leaders to acquire and enhance SMEs, driving growth and ensuring a sustainable future for businesses across Europe.

WAD Capital stands as a beacon for transformation in the European market. We provide the tools, resources, and support necessary to intertwine entrepreneurial dynamism with the stability of seasoned businesses. This creates a unique and sustainable pathway for success, transcending the mere transaction of business acquisition to truly shape the economies of tomorrow.

Join WAD Capital as we redefine the European business landscape, nurturing leaders poised to make a lasting impact. With us, acquiring a business is just the beginning—you are building a legacy that will stand the test of time.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: VenCap International plc
Description:
VenCap was founded in 1987 by Michael Ashall and we are one of the longest-established investment management and advisory firms active in the VC industry today.  Since inception, VenCap has committed over $3.0 billion into approximately 500 venture capital funds in the US, Europe, China and India.

VenCap is exclusively focused on investing in venture capital funds.  We believe that this focus gives us a competitive advantage when it comes to identifying and accessing the best firms in the industry.

We have been trusted to manage capital by many leading institutions and family offices across the world.  We are proud to have developed strong and lasting relationships with many of these investors based on trust, transparency and authenticity.

We believe that venture capital is a long-term business that is based on strong personal relationships.  We work closely with the venture firms with whom we invest to provide insight and analytics that help inform their own decisions.

The majority of value created by the VC industry comes from a handful of companies founded each year.  Historically, these companies have consistently received early stage funding from a small group of VC firms.  Our mission at VenCap is to build a concentrated portfolio of VC funds focused around the successful “unicorn hunters”.

At VenCap, we value our independence extremely highly.  This independence gives us the freedom to take strategic and investment decisions that are in the best interests of our investors and our funds.  It also gives investors the certainty that our future is in our own hands.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Rose Tech Ventures
Description:
Rose Tech Ventures is an early stage investment fund, incubator, and all-around support infrastructure dedicated to finding, nurturing and launching the next generation of world class ventures. It seeks up and coming entrepreneurs with the integrity, passion, vision, experience, domain expertise and leadership skills to create an enterprise that can potentially change the world, …particularly ones based in New York!

Rose Tech Ventures is led by David S. Rose, an Inc. 500 CEO and serial entrepreneur, who has been described by Crain’s New York Business as “the father of angel investing in New York”, and by Red Herring Magazine as the “patriarch of Silicon Alley”.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: CAPCELLENCE Mittelstandspartner GmbH
Description:
CAPCELLENCE erwirbt und entwickelt seit 2005 mittelständische Unternehmen mit bis ca. 100 Mio. Umsatz, schwerpunktmäßig in den Sektoren: Elektrotechnik - Maschinenbau & Industrietechnik - Intelligente Dienstleistungen & Software. Unsere Profession und Leidenschaft ist es,  unsere Unternehmen zusammen mit dem Management, Mitgesellschaftern und Industriebeiräten strategisch nachhaltig zu entwickeln - wir verstehen uns selbst als mittelständisch geprägte, unternehmerische Investoren. 

Wir investieren aus unserer eigenen Bilanz bzw. aus unserer langfristigen Evergreen-Struktur. Unsere Vermögenswerte betragen ca. € 150 Mio. und unsere freie, für Investments vorgesehene Liquidität beträgt derzeit etwa € 100 Mio.. Unser Portfolio umfasst aktuell 2 Unternehmen mit zusammen ca. € 205 Mio. Umsatz, ca. € 19 Mio. EBIT und ca. 2.200 Mitarbeitern.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: BootstrapLabs, an Ares company
Description:
Founded in 2008, BootstrapLabs, an Ares company, is a leading Venture Capital firm based in Silicon Valley and focused on Applied Artificial Intelligence. BootstrapLabs was one of the first VC firms to build an AI-first investment strategy and seeks to invest in visionary founders who solve some of today’s most important and valuable opportunities by applying Artificial Intelligence.

BootstrapLabs is often the first institutional money and acts as a lead investor in the early stages, with follow-on capital at the growth stages.

Through our Venture Studios and Venture Capital funds, we are investing in Artificial Intelligence applied to The Future of Work (FoW)/Productivity, Mobility, Health, Financial Infrastructure, Digital Infrastructure, Energy/Climate, and AI-enabling technologies.

As entrepreneurs ourselves, we know it takes an experienced team amplified by a nurturing community to build successful companies, so we stand by our founders in good times and bad times, because the road to success is paved with setbacks, challenges, and lessons learned from past failures – and building something big is hard.

Ultimately we believe technology should always be used to create a positive impact on society, and that founders should always place fellow humans at the heart of their vision.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: NFT Ventures
Description:
Founded in 2014, we are the leading fintech investor in Northern Europe and were a founding member of the Swedish FinTech Association in 2017. Our entrepreneur-driven investment company has a long-term perspective on the fintech sector. With years of experience in evaluating business models and fintech company success factors, we invest primarily in unlisted companies, preferably at the earlier stages of growth. Besides investing capital, we work actively with our portfolio companies and help them implement sound business processes. Through our partnership network, we help entrepreneurs grow from local bases into regional and global powerhouses.  

Since inception, we have invested in more than 40 companies in the Nordic and the UK markets. Our portfolio companies cover diverse verticals within fintech, including payment, lending, personal finance and more. In addition to fintech, we are passionate about sectors where fintech is part of the product solution, such as e-commerce, insurtech, proptech and regtech. 

We look for established startups with strong, scalable concepts and dedicated teams. With offices in Stockholm and Helsinki, we are active across Northern European markets. We support entrepreneurs to scale their business and expand further through our partnership network. 

For investment inquiry, please send an email to info@nftventures.com or reach out to one of our team members. Let's talk!

Name: 1315 Capital
Description:

We believe that these investment areas are attractive largely due to numerous niche market sub-segments and business models where high-quality management teams can rapidly grow small platform companies, in a capital efficient way, into large and important businesses.  The firm targets $10-$40 million investments in commercial healthcare entities that we believe have the potential to scale to approximately $100 million of revenue, a level we believe is highly attractive for acquisition or to access the public markets.

In addition to experienced investing partners, 1315 Capital leverages an operating partner model of CEO and “Right Hand” COO Executive, a partnership that works together to navigate diligence, drive decisions, and seeks to achieve premium exits.  Three operating teams contribute their collective experience to 1315 Capital in the areas of medical technologies, healthcare services, and specialty therapeutics.  These three teams have built companies from expansion and growth phases to entities with revenues in excess of $100 million, resulting in almost $5 billion of aggregate exit value.

Name: AKCES NCBR
Description: The goal of the  Akces NVBR is to support the commercialization of projects involving R&D based on innovative research results. The acceleration process includes mentoring as well as non-repayable financing and capital investments. The total support for a single beneficiary amounts to a maximum of PLN 1 million. Who is the NCBR accelerator for? - You represent an existing company or intend to register one soon, and it has not been more than five years since the company was registered. - The project concerns an idea that has passed the Proof of Concept verification or has completed the research and development phase. - The technological readiness level (TRL) of the project indicates support from Akces (e.g. TRL 3). Acceleration stages: 1. MENTORING Specialized consulting services aimed at commercial product/service development, preparation and implementation of a development concept and preparation of the company to raise capital for further development of the project. Financing up to 100,000 PLN. 2. GRANT Co-financing of a company whose project has been qualified for acceleration in the amount of up to 300,000. PLN for its development and adequately to the needs of the project established during mentoring. 3. INVESTMENT Direct investment in a company implementing a project worth up to  600,000 PLN. What makes us stand out?  INTERNATIONAL NETWORKING BASE  FOREIGN MENTORS  OPPORTUNITY TO INVEST IN STARTUPS  COMPREHENSIVE SUPPORT WITH PRODUCT/SERVICE IMPLEMENTATION  COOPERATION WITH THE BEST EXPERTS IN THE FIELD OF INNOVATION

Name: Cambridge Capital LLC
Description:
Cambridge Capital is a private equity firm investing in the applied supply chain. The firm provides private equity to finance the expansion, recapitalization or acquisition of growth companies in our sectors. Our philosophy is to invest in companies where our operating expertise and in-depth supply chain knowledge can help our portfolio companies achieve outstanding value.

Cambridge Capital was founded in 2009 as the investment affiliate of BG Strategic Advisors (www.bgsa.com), the advisor of choice for a large, growing number of supply chain CEOs. Cambridge Capital leverages BGSA’s unique approach to strategy-led investment banking for the supply chain. BGSA is known for its work helping companies achieve outsized returns via targeted acquisitions and premium sales processes, and has worked with category leaders such as UPS, DHL, Agility Logistics, New Breed, NFI, Genco, Nations Express, Raytrans, and others. Our relationship with BGSA gives us deep market expertise, access to outstanding deal flow and people flow, transactional capabilities, additional resources, and a powerful core competency in the supply chain sector.

The Partners and Advisory Board members of Cambridge Capital have diverse backgrounds with complementary technical, operating and financial expertise. The Cambridge Capital team has spent their careers building, growing, and advising outstanding companies in the supply chain sector.  They include former leaders of UPS Logistics, Ryder Logistics, ATC Logistics, APL Logistics, Kuehne + Nagel, and other globally-recognized firms.
Cambridge Capital’s professionals know what it takes to build great companies. In fact, they have had the opportunity to do so throughout their careers. The result is the ability to combine the judgment and value creation capability of a strategic buyer with the execution skills and pattern recognition of an experienced financial investor.

Name: unbundled vc
Description:
unbundled vc is an early-stage venture firm investing in Europe-based software and AI founders laser-focused on winning the US market.

The firm captures the geographic arbitrage between undervalued European talent and the scale of the US market. It backs founders who recognise that the US is 10-20x larger than most domestic European markets and have the ambition to target it from day one.

THE UNBUNDLED MODEL

unbundled vc is built to move at the speed of the best founders:

• Solo GP: High-conviction decision-making and speed of execution, without the friction of traditional investment committees.
• The Bridge: Warm intros to US funds for strategic US presence.
• Investing: unbundled vc invests at Pre-Seed and Seed, mostly alongside VC leads.

TRACK RECORD

The firm is built on a track record of identifying outliers early. Founding Partner Marc Cohen was a Seed investor in Runna, aquired by Strava, and an early backer of Magrathea, YASO, Duel, and Ctrl Alt.

He studied Maths at Trinity Cambridge and AI at Sussex under a mentor of Geoffrey Hinton, co-created the world's best poker AI, pre-DeepMind, and developed successful AI trading systems. Marc understands product edge and risk-reward.

VALUES

• Bar: unbundled vc is indifferent to ethnicity, gender, sexual orientation, and solo founder status. If you're good enough, you're good enough.
• Purpose: To generate wealth for Marc’s family and give his children an unfair advantage.

ANY QUESTIONS?

Name: Fondo de Fondos
Description:
With US$1 billion under management, Fondo de Fondos is the leading Mexican private equity fund of funds and co-investment alternative investment management firm. It holds the dual mandate of generating attractive risk-adjusted returns while promoting the private equity ecosystem in Mexico. FdF operates across 4 verticals; Private Equtiy, Venture Capital, Energy and Mezzanine Debt. 

Fondo de Fondos dates back to 1996, when Nacional Financiera took its first commitment in a private equity fund. In 2006, Fondo de Fondos was created as a spinoff of the privare equity practices of Nacional Financiera, Focir, Bancomext and Banobras. Since inception, Fondo de Fondos has implemented a strategic plan to manage third party capital under international best practices, creating unique benchmarking databases in the industry, recruiting recognized experts, and developing an internationally competitive investment return track record.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: AngelCentral
Description:
AngelCentral is one of the most active and fastest-growing community of angel investors in Southeast Asia. We organize regular curated pitch sessions, angel education workshops, and provide syndication services.

The idea for AngelCentral started in late 2016 as a community initiative by the Partners to share their personal experiences and lessons learned on angel investing. As they meet hundreds of startups annually, they decided to further value add via pitch sessions, where promising startups present and pitch to interested angels.

With the initial success and validation of their efforts in 2017, AngelCentral incorporated officially in February 2018 with the mission to build a community of effective angel investors in Southeast Asia. Since Inception, AngelCentral has trained >300 angels and our members have invested  >S$16m into the startups.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals
Location: Queenstown, Central Singapore Community Development Council

Name: ViewLine Ventures

Description:
VTS Global is a private equity firm dedicated to creating purpose-driven brands that leave a positive impact on humanity. By focusing on transparent supply chains and a customer-centric approach, we ensure our products reach and positively influence communities worldwide. Emphasizing people, processes, products, and profit, we strive for integrity, passion, dedication, and innovation in everything we do. Our commitment to data-driven decision-making and sustainable projects sets us apart, allowing us to build impactful brands with a global reach.

Creating purpose-driven brands on a global scale, each leaving a positive impact on humanity.

1. Integrity: Upholding strong ethics and fostering a culture of trust and accountability.
2. Passion: Surpassing ordinary expectations through commitment and enthusiasm.
3. Dedication: Tackling responsibilities with steadfast perseverance.
4. Innovation: Encouraging innovative ideas and solutions to push industry standards forward.

At VTS Global, we create purpose-driven brands that positively influence humanity through innovation and excellence. Our culture is based on:
• Data-Driven Decision-Making: Using insights to lead smarter strategies and solutions.
• Results-Focused with an Eye on ROI: Ensuring every project pays off in value.
• Proactive Attitude: Anticipating challenges and acting early to lead change.
• Lead by Example: Inspiring and guiding others through actions.
• Team Collaboration and Support: Building strength together, sharing, supporting, and succeeding as one team.

Name: Portola Valley Partners
Description:
At Portola Valley Partners we partner with early-stage and growth-stage companies and execute our BUILD>GROW>FUND>EXIT strategy.

We are actively seeking companies with impact products, hardware, software, and services that benefit people and planet. We are also always on the lookout for companies with women and underrepresented founders. With 98% of venture capital going to one demographic, it's time for a change!

We look forward to hearing from you!

Reach out anytime: venture@portolavalleypartners.com

Name: Doha Venture Capital
Description:
Doha Venture Capital Fund (DVC) is the global venture capital arm of Qatar Free Zones. DVC provides support and strategic long term capital to companies and businesses globally.
 
Our mission is to become a partner of choice for high-growth disruptive companies by providing them capital and access to Qatar’s domestic and global network while ensuring sustainable financial returns.
 
We are focusing on new economy and developing a growing community of companies in Emerging Technology, from AI to Robotics and Big Data. We are open to investing and partnering with companies in a variety of sectors including: Freight and logistics; AgTech; BioTech & HealthTech ; EnergyTech; CleanTech; and Mobility.
 
At Doha Venture Capital Fund, we are always looking to partner with companies which are at the cutting edge of their field, capable of driving new solutions for a sustainable future, with readiness and ambition to tap into the global market, using Qatar as a hub and enabler.

Description:

With offices in London, Luxembourg, and Zurich the firm makes €100-300 million equity investments as a majority shareholder in companies within business services, consumer, education, and healthcare across Europe.

Jacobs Capital has an entrepreneurial approach, a flexible and nimble decision making structure and the flexibility to hold and grow businesses over longer periods than traditional private equity firms.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Pavestone VC
Description:
At Pavestone, we back committed innovators with smart capital to create real world value. 
Our distinctive team brings decades of expertise across technology, venture capital, and strategic growth. We collaboratively employ this expertise to generate foresight and back innovators in growth sectors with smart capital. Using classic, time-tested investing principles – rigorous analysis, strong risk management, and impeccable governance we create real-world value.

The Fund: 
Pavestone Technology Fund is an INR 816 Cr. SEBI registered AIF.

We look to partner with limited early growth-stage (B2B, Sector Agnostic, Enterprise Platforms / Products) companies that solve critical challenges for large public and private enterprises. These companies have validated market traction, established product-market fit, and partnerships with anchor clients.
Additionally, we selectively invest in early-stage (Seed / Early-Stage startups (Sector Agnostic, Cutting Edge scientific or engineering innovation) companies targeting significant breakthroughs in enterprise solutions.

Freestyle was founded in 2009, being one of the first firms to specialize exclusively on seed-stage companies, be composed of founders turned VCs, and proactively work to improve diversity in the industry.

Description:
Genesys Capital is focused on building companies in the high-growth sectors of healthcare and biotechnology. Through its expertise and network, Genesys accelerates the development of commercially viable emerging companies that represent promising life science investment opportunities.

Genesys is one of the largest Canadian-based venture capital firms exclusively focused on the life sciences industry.

Name: Touchstone Partners
Description:
We believe being venture capital investors means more than just funding promising startups. We founded Touchstone Partners in 2021 because we want to invest our time and experience, as well as capital, to help develop Vietnam’s next generation of entrepreneurs. We have a passion for working with founders and helping them realize their visions and actively seek out those who have a strong social purpose and build company cultures that are the most driven, resilient and inspiring. 

After we have done our due diligence, crunched the numbers, and gotten to know the founders, we ultimately ask ourselves a key question before we invest: “if this startup succeeds, what difference will it make to Vietnam or the world?”

Description:
Harnessing the power of IT to have a positive impact on our food system. Better Food Ventures is an early stage venture capital firm that is exclusively focused on investing in scalable technologies to transform and improve the food and agriculture sectors.

We seek technologies that enable the food and agriculture industries to fully embrace changing market demands including: 
+ Mobile and cloud-based computing
+ Sensor technologies and “the internet of things”
+ Robotics, artificial intelligence
+ Location-identification and image recognition
+ Massive and real-time data analytics
+ Collaborative production and consumption and social marketing

Visit our portfolio at http://betterfoodventures.com/portfolio/ and follow us at @betterfoodvc. 

pre-Seed stage investor, Venture Capital, Seed-stage investor, Customer Development, Angel Investor, Product Development, Marketing Strategy, Financing Strategy, Forecasting, Early Enterprise Sales, Contract Negotiations, Networking, and Fundraising

With our proven track record, we have successfully partnered with numerous healthcare entrepreneurs and executives, providing the capital, resources, and strategic guidance needed to accelerate growth and enhance value. Our portfolio includes investments across various healthcare subsectors, ranging from healthcare service providers to technology-driven healthcare solutions.

For more information, please visit https://www.gsquarecapital.com/

Crédito para sua empresa fazer muito mais!

Missão
Contribuir para o desenvolvimento dos nossos parceiros com tecnologia e pessoalidade, zelando pela sua perpetuidade.

Visão
Ser referência pelos benefícios que levamos aos nossos clientes, colaboradores e investidores. Contribuir para o crescimento do Brasil potencializando a capacidade produtiva dos nossos parceiros.

Name: Osage Venture Partners
Description:
At Osage Venture Partners, we invest in early-stage, post-revenue B2B software startups, typically at the Seed and Series A stages. We partner with AI-native teams that combine deep domain expertise, visionary product leadership, and capital-efficient growth strategies. Our sweet spot: vertical AI companies with disruptive product vision and the potential to create a sustainable moat in their category.
With over two decades of experience and five funds under our belt, we take a hands-on approach to help founders scale. Whether leading rounds and taking board seats or co-investing alongside others, we aim to be the first call our CEOs make—whether the news is good or bad. We know success depends not just on market and product, but on the people behind them.

AFG aims to fast-track interoperability across the highly-regulated financial technology (fintech) landscape and move businesses forward through efficient capital provision, embedded finance capabilities, tech and infrastructure support, supplemented with its extensive network of key decision-makers and industry leaders from various industries and expertise.

Description:
Indian economy is predicted to grow 6.9% - 7.1% in 2023-24 & will see continued growth at an avg. rate of 6.3% in this decade. Furthermore, from 452 startups in 2016 to 84,012 in 2022, we will continue to be World’s #1 in adding new startups this decade.

Are you passionate about entrepreneurship just like we are?
We love entrepreneurs with a strong focus on capital-efficient technology, looking to deploy globally. If you are one such, we are here to help you make your move!

What Do We Do?
We foster innovations & bring visions to life by Investing in and building the next wave of iconic companies. We have the ability to accelerate startups across sectors. Our team has witnessed several deal cycles from investments, to scaling up, to exits with significant returns.

Yes, we are stage particular. A startup focused on the consumer - is what we look forward to. We invest primarily in B2B or B2B2C startups  We selectively also invest in opportunities that address the structural challenges across the world to create disruptive impacts or specific opportunities that address the large (eg. Indian Market) market. We've an allocation towards higher risk capital too, where we evaluate innovations & re-starts.

Why July Ventures?
> Our team is highly experienced, has the best-in-industry partner-to-portfolio ratio, proven history of operational & investment excellence.
> We have connections from diverse partner backgrounds and are supported by some of India’s leading institutional investors, equating to extended reach & influence.
> Eminent brand in the market with strong referrals & deal flow.
> We have robust fund governance, review and control mechanisms, Strong & detailed diligence and ongoing portfolio management.

The Indian economy is looking at exponential growth. It is the fastest-growing large economy in the world. We foresee opportunities to double down and consolidate. We want to build global success, starting in India!

Join us in catalyzing India's growth story!

With corporate offices in Buenos Aires and Bogota, Pegasus has developed a regional presence through its portfolio companies that operate in Argentina, Uruguay, Brazil, Chile, Paraguay, Bolivia, Colombia, Mexico, and the United States.

Name: Inclimo Climate Tech Fund
Description:
The global economy must undergo a rapid and profound transformation. To limit global warming to 1.5°C, every major economic sector will need to decarbonize within the next two decades. Climate Tech is no longer optional — it is a critical driver of both climate resilience and long-term economic competitiveness.
Inclimo Climate Tech Fund is a European venture capital fund investing in early-stage Climate Tech companies that deliver measurable climate impact alongside scalable, profitable business models.
We focus on technology-driven solutions across Utility Tech (energy & water), FoodTech, AgroTech, Circular Economy, PropTech and Sustainable Mobility, prioritizing innovations that reduce or substitute CO₂ emissions and accelerate the transition to a low-carbon economy.
Inclimo invests primarily at Pre-Series A and Series A, backing experienced and committed founding teams with the ambition to build category-defining companies. Beyond capital, we actively support our portfolio on strategy, impact measurement, fundraising and scale-up, leveraging our network of top-tier venture capital firms, business angels, corporates and venture builders across Europe.
Our investment approach is grounded in the conviction that climate solutions must be scalable, capital-efficient and capable of delivering venture-scale returns, while contributing to systemic change aligned with global climate goals.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Founder One
Description:
Founder One is a next-generation impact venture capital platform investing in early-stage startups solving the world’s most pressing challenges — from climate and health to education and inclusion.

Our proprietary digital platform (F1 CORE) and Channel Management System give us a unique edge: we source and screen more than thousand startups each year, make IC decisions in under 6 weeks, and back high-impact founders with speed, transparency, and conviction..

FIELDS invests in companies with potential through an entrepreneurial and hands-on approach. With common sense and an eye for detail. This is how we realise transformations and lift companies to the next level. Our attention makes the difference.

FIELDS investiert unternehmerisch und aktiv in Unternehmen mit Potenzial - mit Bodenständigkeit und Auge fürs Detail. Auf diese Weise realisieren wir Transformationen und treiben Unternehmen wirklich voran. Unsere Aufmerksamkeit macht den Unterschied.

Name: Behind Genius
Description:
At Behind Genius Ventures, we believe in the business value of storytelling. We prioritize founders who demonstrate strong storytelling capabilities. We take a people-oriented approach to investing and the evaluation of founders. We maintain a proudly generalist investing thesis in order to stay flexible and adapt as the market changes, allowing us to back the best and brightest founders. As a firm with a solo GP, we want to feel strong conviction in the founder’s problem-solution. We value autonomy in our decision-making process, and hope our investment becomes a signal to other investors. If there’s one X factor the companies we back share in common, it’s that design and beauty are valued alongside functional products.

Paige Finn Doherty is the Managing Partner of Behind Genius Ventures, an early-stage venture capital firm that leans into the power of storytelling to back timeless companies building the future of work and play. Previously, Paige spent time at WorkOS as a Developer Success Engineer and TVC Capital, a B2B software-focused growth equity firm. She has written a children’s book about venture capital called Seed to Harvest, and now hosts a podcast by the same name. One of the youngest female solo GPs in the world, she was the 2022 Forbes Under 30 Standout for Venture Capital.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Description:
Quoi de plus naturel qu’un fonds d’investissement régional pour contribuer au dynamisme de son territoire ?

Doté d’un capital initial de 100 M€, il déploie au total près de 200 M€ notamment via ses différents outils (fonds de dette, fonds littoral, fonds rebond).
Normandie Participations adresse l’ensemble des besoins de financement des entreprises, du capital innovation au capital développement et au capital transmission. 
Fort d’une équipe de 8 personnes mêlant compétences techniques et expérience opérationnelle et composé d’une gouvernance de dirigeants d’entreprise, Normandie Participations a investi auprès de plus de 90 entreprises normandes depuis 2016.
Investisseur régional de référence, Normandie Participations se positionne quotidiennement comme un partenaire bienveillant et de long terme.

Name: Powerhouse Ventures
Description:
PV supports early-stage companies in high-growth sectors, where technology is the driver. PV enables its entrepreneurs to execute in dynamic markets, and, more importantly, places a premium on integrity and accountability. PV’s team works to foster entrepreneurial aptitude by supporting peer-to-peer learning, building enduring partnerships, and by encouraging entrepreneurs to use its network of exceptional business managers and domain experts as sounding boards.

The scale and intensity of Mobile Internet connectivity will not only give rise to start-ups disrupting traditional businesses but also propel the global economy into the next century. PV sees this promise in India and is busy building a portfolio of companies leading this transformation.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Lonsdale Capital Partners LLP
Description:
We raised our first institutional fund of £110 million in 2015. We partner with growing niche businesses in the UK and Europe in the lower mid market. In practice this means investing £5 to £15 million in companies making between £2 and £7 million across all sectors. 

Prior to raising our fund we invested in 7 businesses on a deal by deal basis, some of which we continue to work with. 

We are a hands on private equity house and aim to be true business partners. We do not charge arrangement or monitoring or NED fees, and are wholly incentivised to grow profits and equity value. This means we are totally aligned with management teams and other shareholders. 

We are growth facilitators, investing in and supporting our companies as much as possible. We sit on our companies board with management teams to help shape and refine company strategies. Ultimately we back people, and their teams. The day to day management of businesses will always stay with the team, but ensure we are always available to help, listen and advise where possible.

The idea behind the firm was to take the skills learnt over many years working in larger organisations and to apply them to the smaller end of the mid-market.  A key principal has always been to have professionalism, experience and integrity at the heart of everything we do, and we pride ourselves on our reputation for being honest and straightforward.

We have always focused on the lower mid market. Growth is at the heart of everything we do, and we look to continue investing in our businesses where appropriate. We have assisted companies in executing buy and builds, internationalisation, building out sales functions and many other organic growth strategies in a variety of sectors. 

We pride ourselves on our fluid approach to investing, and approach every deal with a blank piece of paper. Every business is different and every set of vendors have different requirements, we tailor our approach accordingly.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Maelstrom

We encourage founders building tools that enable new decentralized products, services and markets to reach out to us at: info@maelstrom.fund.

We take passionate Northeastern students, faculty, and alumni who have ideas and educate them on the fundamentals of entrepreneurship. Then, we coach them through our self-selecting stage-gate process that focuses on customer validation, business modeling, and financing.
 
As these entrepreneurs achieve specific milestones, they gain access to additional resources, including coaching, workshops, in-kind services, IDEA's Gap Fund, and our network of mentors and investors. Our entire process culminates in launching ventures that are investment-ready or self-sustaining.

CEO: Ashritha Reddy Kallem

Name: Hoffmann Family of Companies
Description:
The Hoffmann Family of Companies (“HF Companies”) is a multi-vertical, family-owned company and a multi-generational family business. We partner with management teams who are like us with an intense focus on customer and employee experiences that creates and sustains value for both stakeholders.

Founded by current chairman David Hoffmann and now led by Geoff and Greg Hoffmann, the enterprise encompasses more than 200 corporate brands with 400+ operations across 30 countries. Its subsidiaries operate across eight key verticals, including Agriculture, Aviation & Transportation, Financial & Professional services, Hospitality & Entertainment, Manufacturing, Marine, Media & Marketing, and Real Estate. 
David Hoffmann began building HF Companies in the 1980s. He founded the conglomerate’s cornerstone business, Chicago-based DHR International (now DHR Global), in 1989. DHR Global has grown to become the world’s largest privately held international executive search firm and has earned a reputation as one of the most effective innovators in the space. 

Through Hoffmann Commercial Real Estate, HF Companies is a major commercial real estate manager and development partner. Hoffmann Commercial Real Estate manages properties cumulatively valued at more than $1 billion.

The mutual attraction between good companies, properties, great people and the Hoffmann Family of Companies comes down to instant chemistry between our values, the appeal of our long view buy and hold approach, and the resources to help existing owners/teams make things tangibly better, quickly. 

Reach out if you think your company is a fit!

Name: THI Investments
Description:
What we do
We invest into European middle-market companies with great management and sustainable long-term growth prospects.
We are active investors with experience of building successful businesses internationally. This strong operational focus enables us to add value to existing leadership teams and companies. Our mission is to support our partners in executing their goals and move their companies from good to great.

Investment Strategy
Foresight + Insight = Conviction  - The world/economy is facing extraordinary technological and economic change. We believe these megatrends will disrupt entire industries beyond expectation.
We observe, research and interpret these trends to inform our sector selection and our value enhancement.
The companies who embrace and invest in these changes have a unique and significant opportunity for sustainable growth.
We target our thesis-based approach to identify investment opportunities where we can add incremental value over a long period of time.

Adding value
We have an experienced strategy and business development team with relevant functional specialities dedicated to support value creation in our partner companies. We can also call upon specialist expertise and consultancy from strategic partners.

We support accomplished leadership teams to build sustainable competitive advantage in four key areas of activity: digital disruption, cost structure and process improvement, international expansion and resource efficiency.

The food industry is responsible for around a third of greenhouse gases - while also being the first sector to feel the effects of climate change. Harvests are deteriorating, soils are depleting and supply chains are breaking down.  
 
To change that we invest in Seed and Series A rounds. If you want to be part of that change – no matter if you are an investor or a startup founder – feel free to contact us.

Name: Redstart
Description:
Vous avez une idée de startup que vous voulez lancer ? 
Vous souhaitez devenir entrepreneur ? 
Vous travaillez depuis plusieurs mois sur un projet et souhaiteriez être accompagné et accélérer ? 
Alors rencontrons-nous !

Redstart est un startup studio généraliste à impact. C'est à dire que nous sommes co-fondateur de startups, au côté des entrepreneurs. 
Nous travaillons avec eux au quotidien en leur apportant une expertise multi-casquette : stratégique, juridique, aide au financement, à la commercialisation, à la stratégie marketing et communication, sur les aspects RH, aide à la décision. 
Avec eux, nous partageons le risque et le succès.
En tant qu'associé cofondateur, nous ne sommes pas rémunérés pour notre accompagnement ; nous investissons du temps et de la compétence contre une partie minoritaire du capital en tant que "operational partner".

L'accompagnement se déroule via un parcours sur mesure en 3 étapes :
-    Une phase d'idéation et de maturation du projet 
-    Une phase de construction 
- acquisition des premiers clients, statuts juridiques, constitution de l'équipe 
-    Une phase de recherche de financement et de levée de fonds

Redstart partage un objectif avec ses entrepreneurs associés : créer de la valeur dans des entreprises pérennes.

Si cela vous intéresse, que vous souhaitez en savoir plus : 
contact@redstart.fr

Name: Ballast Point Ventures
Description:
With $550 million under management, Ballast Point Ventures invests in established but rapidly growing, privately owned companies, with a particular emphasis on companies located in the Southeast and Texas.  This region accounts for 22% of the national GDP and the region's favorable business climate and strong quality of life make an attractive home to thousands of talented entrepreneurs working to build great companies. 

The BPV partners have spent their careers building and investing in outstanding companies throughout the region – partnering with entrepreneurs who prefer to work with high quality partners "in their own backyard" who understand not only their businesses but also the local community.  Our proximity to our portfolio companies and emphasis on long term relationships have allowed us to focus on adding value for our companies in ways that other firms investing across the country find difficult to match.

We are "growth capital" investors and we work with companies that demonstrate proven business models and have strong management teams. We invest in a diversified group of industries that we believe have favorable growth and investment characteristics, and in which both the BPV Partners and our partners at Raymond James Financial have substantial knowledge and experience. These industries include health care, business services, communications, information technology, financial services and consumer/retail.

Our experience shows that by partnering with outstanding entrepreneurs with experience, vision and integrity, we can invest across a broad range of industries and help our entrepreneur partners generate attractive investment returns for both themselves and their investors. We are financial and strategic partners rather than operators, and we prefer minority ownership stakes to control positions.

3)Proven frameworks: Our innovative programs like VisionX and Pilot16 give you a clear roadmap to success.  

Stop Dreaming of robots, start Building them. Let's connect!
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: VenturePath
Description:
VenturePath is the UK's Scaleup Investment Platform.

We help ambitious UK scaleups secure the funding they need to fuel growth and become venture-backed scaleup successes.

Built by entrepreneurs, backed by leading VCs, and trusted by 100+ UK scaleups.

Ready to scale? Join VenturePath today.

Description: IMPACTA is a Venture Catalyst & Innovation Lab with a focus on SpaceTech, Robotics, AI, Meta, and the Next Reality Convergence.

Description:
Lewis & Clark Ventures was founded by former operators with the conviction that innovation and entrepreneurial talent are plentiful outside of traditional capital centers.

We partner with high potential Late Seed and Series A stage B2B software companies.

Our vision for success is to become a trusted partner to every entrepreneur that we back and assist in their journey towards scale and significance.

Portfolio Company Jobs:  https://jobs.lewisandclarkventures.com/
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Brumley Institute for Graduate Entrepreneurship
Description: The Brumley Institute for Graduate Entrepreneurship at The University of Texas at Austin (TVL) is a university-wide award-winning initiative to support technology commercialization, entrepreneurship and innovation, while providing a unique and directly applicable educational experience for participating graduate students and Austin businesses.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Katapult Africa
Description:
We invest in and accelerate impactful agritech, foodtech, and climate tech startups operating in Africa.

So far, Katapult Africa has invested in and accelerated 16 exciting impact startups from all over the continent. The accelerator is a 3-month hands-on, fully digital program focused on growth, investor readiness, and impact management. It includes access to a global network of mentors, experts, and corporate partners.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: PINOVA
Description: PINOVA is an independent private equity firm investing in Industrial Tech companies (High Tech Components, Innovative Materials and Smart Systems) in the German-speaking region. PINOVA focuses on mid-sized companies with revenues between €10 million and €50 million characterised by significant growth potential, sustainable competitive advantages, and a strong market position in their niche.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Missouri Technology Corporation
Description:
Investing directly in early stage ventures through the IDEA funds and supporting the broader entrepreneurial ecosystem through the MOBEC grant program, the Missouri Technology Corporation ("MTC") is a public-private partnership created by the Missouri General Assembly to promote entrepreneurship and foster the growth of new and emerging high-tech companies. 

The Innovation, Development, and Entrepreneurship Advancement (IDEA) Funds are deployed through four programs: Missouri TechLaunch, Seed Capital Co-Investment Program, Venture Capital Co-Investment Program, and the High-Tech Industrial Expansion Program. Companies in the  applied engineering, defense and homeland security, biomedical science, animal health, and plant sciences seeking seed or venture funding are encouraged to apply.

Through the Missouri Building Economic Capacity (MOBEC) program, MTC makes strategic investments that expand the support system for entrepreneurs that are commercializing new technologies or that enhance the capacity of Missouri to grow its innovation economy. Eligible Applicants are public or private non-profit Missouri research institutions and non-profit entrepreneurial support and related organizations. 

More information about each program can be found on the MTC website.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Muse Capital
Description:
Muse Capital is an early-stage venture fund dedicated to redefining how we CARE (women's health, childcare & elderly care), PLAY (gaming, metaverse), and LIVE (wellness and sustainability). By supporting visionary founders, we invest in consumer-tech companies that enhance our daily lives and serve the evolving needs of the future consumer. Muse Capital's superpower is rooted in the team's long-standing relationships with thought leaders and decision-makers in our focus sectors. As a team of global operators with two decades of experience, Muse Capital's specific strengths lie in go-to-market strategies, commercialization, and scaling. 

Led by founding partners Assia Grazioli-Venier and Rachel Springate, Muse Capital leverages its know-how in growth and facilitating strategic partnerships to help entrepreneurs build category-defining companies on a global scale. Their network stems from 20 years of relationships with decision-makers across Fortune 500 companies, major tech firms, investors, sports teams, athletes, and talent agencies. They have the network and execution ability to get deals done, providing real value to the entrepreneurs they back.

Muse Capital takes a conscious capitalism approach, advocating for diversity as a driver of returns with 70% of its 60+ portfolio companies diverse-founded. Notable successes include exits like Clarity Money (acquired by Goldman Sachs), Mahmee (Series A led by Goldman Sachs), Midi (Series A led by Google Ventures), and Eli Health (patented at-home hormone testing). Finally, as a female-led team of conscious capitalists, Muse Capital is a staunch advocate for diversity as a better business, and proud to have a 70% female-founded/diverse portfolio. 

Muse Capital backs sectors redefining how we CARE, PLAY & LIVE, shaping the consumer experience for the next decade.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Good Company VC
Description:
Good Company VC is investing in early-stage companies that leverage deep technologies to solve the world’s biggest problems. The firm is constantly seeking bold entrepreneurs who are building frontier technology solutions. Good Company Fund is generally looking to invest in innovative, hyper scalable, software solutions.
We are especially excited about: Future of Energy, Agriculture, Future of Work, Education, Circular Economy, Mobility and Digital Health. 
However, we are constantly learning and looking for additional opportunities in other verticals. We are aiming to invest in the Operating System of the New, Sustainable World.

Good Company's studio brings together multinational corporations, entrepreneurs and capital, in order to solve the world’s biggest problems. Good Company Studio is a home for entrepreneurs who want to create businesses with a purpose. The Movement is a pre-seed platform that provides entrepreneurs with capital, network, go-to-market, mentoring, and support.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: American Family Insurance Institute for Corporate and Social Impact
Description:
We believe we have a responsibility to make our communities stronger. That's why we focus our work in key areas that address some of society's greatest challenges. 

We invest capital in visionary entrepreneurs who lead early stage, for-profit startups. Our current priority areas for our second fund include advancements that make homes more resilient, enabling them to withstand the increasing environmental challenges that threaten to derail our lives. We also invest in solutions that make housing more affordable, accessible, and sustainable, ensuring more people can achieve long-term stability and success. Additionally, we support innovations that harness ethical AI to drive impact, ensuring its benefits are accessible to everyone while mitigating the risks it poses.

We invest at the Seed and Series A stages.

We understand our investment decisions affect the well-being of the companies in which we invest, the communities where they’re working, and beyond –both today and into the future.

We believe in promoting a culture of inclusion, seeking out diversity of all types, and fostering a sense of belonging among all the people, organizations, and communities with which we interact. To further advance awareness and action, we will participate, to the extent of our abilities, in open discussion and reporting across our industry and encourage our peers to do the same.

We believe our focus at the nexus of social impact and venture capital will allow us to make meaningful, lasting contributions to society.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Brand Foundry Ventures
Description: Brand Foundry Ventures (BFV) is an institutional venture capital fund. We lead Series Seed and Series A financing rounds in innovation-driven companies that serve consumers and merchants.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Monogram Capital Partners
Description: Monogram Capital Partners is a private equity investment firm focused exclusively on consumer and retail companies. The partners have invested more than $1.4 billion of equity capital primarily in consumer and retail businesses. Leveraging best practices and relationships from leading institutions, we bring elite investing and advisory experience to the lower middle market. In partnership with management teams, the firm focuses on developing the next generation of category leaders by providing flexible capital, deep domain knowledge, access to transformative industry relationships, and strategic and operational expertise to our investments.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Fondo Bolsa Social
Description:
The Fondo Bolsa Social is a venture capital fund that invests in young companies that generate a positive social and environmental impact.

The fund's activity focuses on five areas: health and wellness, inclusive and quality education, sustainable production and consumption, climate action, and social integration and development.

Managed by Afi, Inversiones Globales SGIIC.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: GreenSky Ventures
Description: GreenSky Ventures makes investments in early-stage Canadian B2B start-ups led by extraordinary entrepreneurs.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Gruhas Collective Consumer Fund
Description:
We bring together the experience and expertise of Gruhas and Collective Artists Network to align with mission-driven founders and companies. Our philosophy rests on backing entrepreneurs who are creating a virtuous cycle of growth and impact while building category-defining brands from India.

It is an ecosystem to power brands across revenue and brand building, marketing solutions to create a nationwide reach, using the largest influencers and talent roster in the country

This unique collaboration extends beyond the realms of traditional investment, providing not only essential capital but also unparalleled access to enablement and growth.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Pleiade Venture
Description: Pléiade Venture est une Société de Capital Risque française Evergreen(investissement sur le long terme et sans horizon de sortie prédéterminé) basée à Paris. Elle dispose de plus de 100 M€ d’actifs et investit en fonds propres de 0,3 à3 M€par opération. Nous soutenons actuellement plus d’une cinquantaine d’entreprises innovantes,àdifférents stades de développement, de tous secteurs. Pléiade Venture estexclusivement financée par des entrepreneurs qui, forts de leur expérience, désirent contribuer activementàde nouveaux succès.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Tech Maven
Description: Maven is Venture Studio  with a proven 17 years track record building high performance solutions for top tier companies using emerging technologies in the U.S, Japanese and South Pacific markets. Code produced by us is currently in production and has processed billions of dollars in transactions and securities exchange volume.  Today some of the largest banks and organizations in the U.S. rely on software built by us to power millions of users across various applications.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Congress Avenue Ventures (an Alumni Ventures Fund)
Description:
Congress Avenue Ventures is an Alumni Ventures' venture capital fund for alumni of UT Austin that invests in companies with a UT Austin connection. 

Meet the team:
Rob Adams, Managing Partner
Ludwig Pierre Schulze, Managing Partner
Andrew Padilla, Partner
Brook Stroud, Senior Principal
Akshata Bailkeri, Senior Associate

We are part of Alumni Ventures, America’s largest venture firm for individual investors. Founded in 2014, we are the venture investing partner to over 11,000 individuals and institutions.  

Follow Congress Avenue Ventures for content at the intersection of our shared alma mater, venture capital, and entrepreneurship.

We are private, for-profit, and not affiliated with or sanctioned by the college.

Offers of securities are made only to eligible investors through formal offering documents, which describe the risks, terms, and other important information that must be considered before investing. Example portfolio company investments shown for illustrative purposes only, do not necessarily reflect investment outcomes that were or would be obtained by any AV fund or investor, and are not available to future investors, except potentially in the case of follow-on investments. Venture capital investing involves substantial risk, including risk of loss of all capital invested. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Grand Ventures
Description:
Grand Ventures is an early stage venture fund investing in seed stage B2B SaaS companies in emerging regions of the US and Canada focused on Supply Chain, Fintech, DevOps, and Digital Health. We have invested in some of the fastest growing companies in North America alongside some of the most prestigious venture funds. We pride ourselves on supporting great entrepreneurs from inception through rapid growth to maturity and helping out at each stage of the journey.

Our sweetspot is to write $500K-$2MM checks for companies raising their first institutional round of funding. Beyond our capital investment, we help entrepreneurs with refining strategy and focus, talent development, and business development. Our goal is to help entrepreneurs achieve successful follow-on rounds and future exits.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Crossplane Capital
Description: Crossplane Capital is a private equity firm based in Dallas investing control equity in industrial business services, niche manufacturing and value-added distribution businesses. The firm invests in companies with up to $200 million of revenue and significant value creation upside through prudent net working capital management, rigorous cost optimization and thoughtful revenue growth.  Our team has eight decades of collective experience transforming industrial companies as senior executives, operational improvement consultants, strategy consultants, restructuring advisors and private equity investors. As a result, we bring a sophisticated operating model and collaborative culture to lower middle market family owned companies and companies involved in complex situations.  For more information, please visit www.crossplanecapital.com.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Wharton Alumni Angels
Description: Founded in 2016, Wharton Alumni Angels is an active angel investment group composed of University of Pennsylvania alumni and non-Penn alumni who have joined their angel community. Their members are entrepreneurs, senior business executives, and institutional investors with a global reach. Wharton Alumni Angels' over 500 members in 23 countries have invested in more than 50 early-stage companies. Wharton Alumni Angels members seek to add value 'beyond the deal' and actively provide mentoring and assistance to young companies. They are enthusiastic about entrepreneurs and passionate teams pursuing their dreams. Through a global membership and the Wharton alumni community, the organization has a deep network and close relationships with venture capital funds, other angel networks, and innovation ecosystems worldwide to cultivate the growth of start-ups. Wharton Alumni Angels participates most often in seed and Series A investments, and occasionally later-stage rounds and does not focus on specific verticals or industries.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: WP2 Investments
Description:
We provide capital and strategic support to early-stage companies.

In our investments, we focus on innovative companies with scalable business models, representing industries such as: Fintech, Biotechnology, Green Energy, E-commerce and Digitalization/Automation.

Together with visionary Founders, we create companies from scratch, as well as enter the first rounds of funding (pre-seed to A) in companies that already have initial successes, a tested product and sometimes are just taking their first steps.

We invite everyone who has unbridled positive energy, out-of-the-box ideas that "blow the system away," and who excel in their fields and in their lives with passion, thinking against the grain and want to change the world together with us!

We'd love to look at your business ideas for capital support, strategic consulting and building something together, or talk about joining the Dream Teams at our companies.

WP&WP,
Founders of WP Square,
info@wp2.investments
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: zwei.7 Gruppe
Description: Die zwei.7 Gruppe ist ein Inhabergeführtes Unternehmen, welches sich als Family Office mit zwei Bereichen beschäftigt.
