Im Bereich der unternehmerischen Beteiligungen liegt die Fokussierung auf Altersnachfolge und Wachstumskapital.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: 301 INC
Description:
301 INC is the venture capital arm of General Mills.

We invest in driven and passionate founders across the value chain who are transforming the food ecosystem. Our team is purpose-built to partner with founder teams and to help realize their ambitions.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Consilience Ventures
Description:
Our mission is to fast-track the growth of 1000 world-changing deep tech businesses worldwide in 10 years.

Our model identifies new market opportunities where promising start-ups require both funding and building support at critical stages. Our agile financing method ensures capital is raised on demand, and provides decisive business expertise at the right times.

Our greatest strength is our exclusive network of entrepreneurs, hands-on investors and functional experts. Through this community, we accelerate value creation and align incentives, leading to attractive rewards shared equitably among all stakeholders.

Acceleration requires power. Consilience Ventures is turbo-powered venture capital.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Access Venture Partners
Description:
Access Venture Partners is Colorado-based venture capital firm investing in innovative early-stage technology companies in growing venture states.

If you're raising a seed or Series A round, reach out to us!  https://accessvp.com/contact/
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Golden Egg Check
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: FOV Ventures
Description:
FOV Ventures is the go-to fund in Europe for ambitious founders building the next era of compute. One that is more intelligent, more spatial and more human.

If you're in Europe, and at early stages of building at the intersection of Spatial, AI, 3D, and Robotics, we'd love to hear more.

Pitch us at fov.ventures
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Physis Capital
Description:
Physis Capital is a $50 M fund, for investing in select Pre-Series A to Series B startups. While accelerators and incubators help early-stage start-ups, but Growth-Stage startups seldom get structural mentorship and support. Hence, only 2% of the Indian startups are able to go beyond Series-B funding.

Targeting India-focused startups, Physis Capital aims to craft growth stories from seed to success by bridging this gap and improving the success rate of the Growth-Stage startups through an integrated ecosystem consisting of technical, operational, and strategic mentorship along with funding. 

The managers of Physis Capital have built strong processes and delivered stronger results at Inflection Point Ventures, which in close to 4 years has become India’s largest CXO driven Angel Investing Platform. Through exceptional upfront due diligence and strong post investment support, they have been able to keep the failure rate exceptionally low and at the same time already have 1 unicorn and many soonicorns in its portfolio. They now plan to take forward the same investing philosophy as they try to repeat their performance for investors of Physis Capital.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Active Owners Denmark
Description: Active Owners Denmark is the trade association for a wide range of investors in Denmark and concentrates on making Denmark an even more attractive place to invest, both nationally and globally.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Scribble Ventures
Description:
Scribble Ventures is an early-stage venture firm led by operators and investors from OpenAI, Twitter, IG & A16z. 

We invest in Pre-Seed and Seed, and write initial checks of up to $1.5M. This allows Scribble to collaborate and co-invest with other angel investors and early-stage funds, so you can bring the best partners into your round. 

Through our network of operators, executives, and investors, we help accelerate growth, recruiting, and future fundraising for our companies.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: AZ-VC
Description:
AZ-VC was built out of necessity to fill the void that existed in terms of capital sources for post-revenue companies looking to expand beyond seed-level financing. Without local financing options, these companies relied on venture capitalists outside of Arizona in places like Silicon Valley, Salt Lake City, Denver and elsewhere.

Fundraising is always hard – it’s even harder when you are from out-of-town.

In 2020, invisionAZ and its Chairman Jack Selby, made an announcement to lead the charge to create the largest venture capital fund in the state’s history. Anchored with $25M from Pinnacle West Capital Corporation, AZ-VC (formerly invisionAZ Fund) began to take shape.

In collaboration with prominent members of the Arizona community, this historic milestone has been achieved, demonstrating the inertia and conviction behind Arizona’s thriving tech ecosystem.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Navigare Ventures
Description: Navigare Ventures is an early-stage investment company specialized in science-driven companies. Our core investment themes within deep tech are underpinned by our knowledge and network in a number of scientific fields, including AI, quantum technologies, data driven life science, synthetic biology and advanced materials. Navigare Ventures is based in Stockholm and is a wholly-owned subsidiary of Wallenberg Investments AB. With our investments, we support the industrial and societal impact of research by backing innovation for the long-term – while generating returns that strengthen the Wallenberg Foundations capacity to fund new academic research grants.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Innoven Capital SEA
Description:
Innoven Capital is Asia’s leading venture debt and lending platform providing debt capital to high growth innovative ventures primarily backed by venture capital firms. Innoven Capital is a joint venture between Seviora, an asset management group owned by Temasek, and United Overseas Group. Currently, the platform is active across India, China and South East Asia while continuing to expand to other high growth economies in the region. 

For more information, please refer www.innovencapital.com and follow @InnoVenCap_SG.

To find out more about Seviora, please visit https://www.linkedin.com/company/seviora-group/.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Reef
Description:
Reef Capital Partners is a privately held firm creating lasting value through real estate, investment, and lifestyle experiences.

With a vertically integrated platform and deep industry expertise, we operate across three core pillars:

Reef Investments applies institutional rigor and entrepreneurial agility to a diverse portfolio across credit, equity, and opportunistic real estate. We structure creative, risk-adjusted strategies that deliver strong, long-term returns.

Reef Real Estate transforms remarkable locations into distinctive communities. From mountain peaks to desert landscapes, our developments combine thoughtful design and exceptional craftsmanship to create spaces where life and legacy thrive.

Reef Lifestyle brings our destinations to life through luxury resorts, private clubs, and outdoor experiences. We focus on elevated service, meaningful connection, and laidback sophistication—making extraordinary living feel effortless.

Together, these pillars form a unified approach that turns vision into impact across every stage of the real estate lifecycle.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Athena Capital
Description:
The Athena platform deploys opportunistic bridge equity capital to private companies in the process of exiting. 

We are returns focused and invest in pre IPO companies privately before they exit through IPO, M&A or SPAC, providing investors with exposure to attractive tech investolments, yet with a high liquidity profile. 

Athena has a group of 40+ women who have successfully taken a dozen companies to the public market. 

Our platform of Fortune 100 and Fortune 500 board members gives us an edge in sourcing deals, winning deals and delivering returns to our investors.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Innovation Edge
Description:
We support entrepreneurs and social innovators to develop, test and launch innovative solutions to early childhood challenges.

More than 6 out of 10 children in South Africa are at risk of never reaching their full potential.

Over 60% of South Africa’s children live in poverty. Challenging life experiences during their first six years, compounded by systemic failure, reduce their possibility of present-day and future well-being. 

Our investments aim to improve the chances of children’s life-long success by influencing the quality of their first six years of life.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Samsung Catalyst Fund
Description: Samsung Catalyst Fund is Samsung Electronics’ multi-stage evergreen venture capital fund that invests in deep-tech infrastructure and data-enabled platforms. Our sectors of interest span multiple domains including data center and cloud, artificial intelligence, networking and 5G, automotive, sensors, quantum computing and beyond.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: IBLA CAPITAL
Description:
Ibla Capital is an independent investment company, targeting Private Equity investments in small and medium-sized businesses headquartered in Italy.
We have an entrepreneurial and hands-on approach: we actively participate in the management of portfolio companies, to achieve their full potential.
We aim to build long-term value, through and beyond our period of ownership.
Our investors are top European and US institutions: pension funds, insurance companies, universities and foundations, directly or through leading European asset managers.
The managers of Ibla Capital are also investors in the funds, thereby ensuring their interests align with those of external investors and portfolio companies.
Thanks to the broad experience we have gained in business management and operational improvement, we are capable of successfully managing difficult situations of discontinuity in the company life cycle, like successions, turnarounds and carve-outs.
The common thread is our ability to create value by facing operational challenges from three different and complementary perspectives: as an investor, as a manager and as an entrepreneur.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Norte Energia SA
Description: geração, fornecimento e transmissão de energia elétrica
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: MacAndrews & Forbes
Description: MacAndrews & Forbes’ businesses span a wide range of industries, from global leaders in cosmetics to biotechnology and military equipment.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Columna Capital
Description:
We invest in European lower mid-market companies with ambitious growth strategies.

Founded in 2009, Columna Capital is an entrepreneurial investment firm with offices in London, Milan and Luxembourg. Led by four seasoned partners, the Columna team work closely with management teams and entrepreneurs to drive organic growth and execute on strategic consolidation opportunities. Typically, we invest in profitable companies with revenue of €15-100 million. We are a long-term partner and our success is based on our ability to identify unique opportunities where we aim to at least double the size of the business over the investment period.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Azure Capital Partners
Description: Azure Capital Partners is an early-stage venture capital firm, founded in San Francisco in 2000. Our goal is to identify, invest in and help build seed/early stage information technology companies that are at the forefront of a transformative opportunity for growth. Azure team is recognized for industry thought leadership and the combination of a data-guided approach to strategic decisions complemented by a powerful network of impactful relationships for our portfolio.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Tera Ventures
Description:
Tera Ventures is an international investment firm based in Estonia. Tera helps some of Europe’s most disruptive technology companies scale and become global leaders. We back ambitious founders and their compelling visions at pre-seed and seed stage. 

Founded in 2016, Tera Ventures has 12 active investments in its first fund (that we previously managed under SmartCap). 
We are also proud of our previous exits from GrabCAD, Modesat, VitalFields, Startup Wise Guys, and others. The team at Tera Ventures consists of investors and advisors from around the world who have created exceptional value and personally made the journey from founders to acquisition or IPO of several digital tech companies. We believe in and strongly support founders and great teams and possess a very Silicon Valley-approach to helping our companies – we have worked in all weather conditions and life cycles of startups and are there to support our clients’ success. We are tenacious, ambitious and experienced in making it happen. Whatever it takes.

We have a presence in Estonia and Finland, plus global contacts and experience. We leverage and create access to global markets and capital pools, as well as value creation and realization for our portfolio companies. As former global entrepreneurs ourselves, we have walked in the shoes of our clients, and we place the relationships with our founders at the heart of our business.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: State of Mind Ventures (SOMV)
Description: State of Mind Ventures is a seed and early growth stage venture capital fund, focusing on the people that drive our world forward. We are looking for founders that are daring, hungry, and have big ambitions. We look to partner early with innovative teams of over-achievers, and be there with them, as they shape their vision, build their teams and accelerate to hyper-growth. So we believe our role is simple. It is to find and empower the founders of the future.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: CEE Equity Partners Limited
Description:
CEE Equity Partners Ltd is the investment advisor for two Funds with committed capital in the total amount of $1.2bn. The Funds were established in partnership with institutional investors  to capitalise on investment opportunities in CEE. 
The objective of the Funds is to identify and partner with dynamic businesses to contribute to the vibrant growth of the economies whilst providing good returns to the investors. Targeted sectors of the funds include: energy, infrastructure, healthcare, telecommunication, waste management and specialized manufacturing.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Valoris Capital
Description: Valoris Capital is the Private Equity arm of Valoris Group (formerly Capital Gestion Group); the leading independent Investment Management and Financial Advisory firm in Morocco.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Connect Ventures
Description: Connect Ventures is an investment partnership between leading entertainment and sports agency Creative Artists Agency (CAA) and global venture capital firm New Enterprise Associates (NEA). With access to CAA’s unmatched resources, relationships, and expertise spanning the global media, entertainment, and sports landscape, combined with the deep investing and company building expertise of NEA’s world-class technology practice, Connect Ventures identifies and accelerates the growth of early-stage consumer-focused businesses.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: ACT Venture Partners
Description:
ACT Venture Partners is a venture capital firm that invests in early-stage tech startups. ACT catalyzes the efforts of ambitious tech founders and invests in their technology ventures. 

ACT has a proven track record at identifying valuable technologies and teams consisting of excellent technologists and entrepreneurs that translate into high financial returns for its investors. 

ACT’s investment team brings together professionals from diverse and international experience in investment management, entrepreneurship, engineering, and R&D management.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Wangara Green Ventures
Description:
Wangara Green Ventures ("Wangara") is an impact investment company that invests between USD50,000 to USD500,000 in equity and quasi-equity in Small and Growing Businesses (SGBs) in the missing middle that are engaged in renewable energy, energy efficiency, waste management, water management, climate-smart agriculture or generally climate-friendly businesses.

Wangara also supports the growth and sustainability of these SGBs by making available pre-investment and post-investment Technical Assistance Grants to assist their scale and overall Environmental, Social and Governance (ESG) impact.

Wangara is sponsored by Innohub through the Ghana Climate Venture Facility (GCVF) from the World Bank with support from the governments of Denmark and the Netherlands under the InfoDev Climate Technology Program. 

Wangara Green Ventures seeks to promote Ghana’s economic development, job creation and industrial competitiveness through support for clean technology businesses and industries which represent some of the most promising and important sectors of the 21st century. Through the provision of financing and non-financial services, Wangara Green Ventures will support local entrepreneurs that develop innovative technologies and business models in these priority sectors.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Working Capital Fund
Description:
Working Capital Fund is an early-stage venture fund investing in solutions that address inequity and economic injustice for marginalized workers through supply chain transformation.

The Working Capital Fund was established in 2017 with a unique mission and a highly-differentiated thesis about how to support systemic improvements in respect for labor rights. At Working Capital, we identify opportunities to accelerate the development and deployment of innovative, market-based solutions to meet the growing corporate need to protect vulnerable workers and source responsibly. To do this, we invest in early-stage market catalyzing innovations that improve worker outcomes by accelerating greater supply chain accountability and visibility. Working Capital Fund enables businesses to respond and implement operational change with rigor and at scale, initiating a world where supply chains work for everyone.

Description:
Founded in 2010, Piton Capital is a venture capital and growth equity firm headquartered in London and investing in businesses with network effects. We make investments ranging from €200k to €20m and since inception have invested in over 50 businesses, primarily in Europe.

Piton focuses exclusively on network effects businesses as this provide one of the few moats or forms of defensibility to achieve dominance. A commonly used example of this is the telephone network, where the usefulness of the network increases exponentially with the number of users (or nodes) to whom you can connect. Network effects provide an “unfair advantage” that enables a winner in a respective market to achieve dominance and as a result sizeable multiples of relative market share in comparison to its competitors. Examples of this are seen in many established technology businesses such as Google, Amazon (marketplace, data used for recommendations, search data network effects, user generated reviews), Facebook, Apple (iOS operating system), Microsoft (MSDOS and Windows operating systems), Alibaba (B2B marketplace) and Tencent.

Marketplaces is one form of network effects, there are however several other examples of businesses that aren’t marketplaces but include data network effects (including machine learning and AI), businesses that rely on user generated content, as well as SaaS businesses with the potential to layer network effects around it. We evaluate and invest in businesses that exhibit the phenomenon that occurs when a product or service improves with more users.

Learn more about our portfolio companies here: https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/piton-capital

Startup Ecosystem Canada is designed to nurture the next generation of world-changing companies.

We empower visionary entrepreneurs by connecting them with key stakeholders including Solution Providers, Media and Press, Market Leaders, Governments and Funding Organisations.

Startup Ecosystem has meticulously crafted a network that creates value by collaboration through events, resources and partnerships to drive collective success.

Our team understands the challenges of stakeholder engagement in building a venture. We are committed to creating a community that empowers founders to drive transformative change.

Description:
New Incubation Ventures (NIV) is the strategic early-stage investing and incubation arm for The Estée Lauder Companies.
 
NIV partners with forward-thinking founders and entrepreneurs to create, fund and support the best beauty brands and business models that will shape the future of beauty. Through this, it also builds an actionable pipeline of diversified brands and new engines of growth for the Estée Lauder Companies portfolio.
 
The Estée Lauder Companies Inc. is one of the world’s leading manufacturers and marketers of quality skin care, makeup, fragrance and hair care products. The company’s products are sold in approximately 150 countries and territories under brand names including: Estée Lauder, Aramis, Clinique, Lab Series, Origins, M·A·C, La Mer, Bobbi Brown, Aveda, Jo Malone London, Bumble and bumble, Darphin Paris, TOM FORD BEAUTY, Smashbox, AERIN Beauty, Le Labo, Editions de Parfums Frédéric Malle, GLAMGLOW, KILIAN PARIS, Too Faced, Dr.Jart+, and the DECIEM family of brands, including The Ordinary and NIOD.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Founders Capital
Description: FC is home to a community of 500+ talented founders, operators, and investors. Our vetted members have access to a build diverse private market investment portfolio (from Seed to Pre-IPO) and allows them to participate in investment opportunities traditionally reserved for the elite.

Name: IN44 Capital
Description:
IN44 Capital aims to partner with innovative startups disrupting white spaces in the Tech B2B space. These white spaces can be in an existing market segment which is ripe for disruption or an under-explored market segment which is ripe for expansion.

Investors can start their investment journey into this exciting new asset class for as low as INR 2.5L. 

Build your portfolio by backing a curated set of deals where IN44 Capital invests as well. 

Reach out to our team in case of any clarification.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Cybernetix Ventures
Description: Cybernetix Ventures is a venture capital firm leading the way for investment into early-stage robotics, automation, and AI startups. Headquartered in Boston, the world’s epicenter for robotics innovation, Cybernetix connects its portfolio to the national and global robotics ecosystems, bringing unparalleled expertise to companies poised to make major impacts in sectors including advanced manufacturing, logistics/warehousing, architecture, engineering and construction and healthcare/medical devices.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: We Are Jane
Description:
We Are Jane is a European investment fund for & by women founded by 3 ambitious ladies, Muriel Uytterhaegen, Conny Vandendriessche & Eline Talboom.

We believe in the power of interaction and interchange. 

It’s hard to keep track of what’s happening outside the world of your company. That’s why we capture market trends in finance & investing on our social media channels.

Our female entrepreneurs and investors are keen to learn from one another. That’s why we let them share experiences during fun & interactive events. 

And if one of our Janes does well? Then we all celebrate. Because every success – big and small – deserves a thumbs up, kudos or even an award!
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: MindFuture
Description:
At MindFuture, we are passionate about technology, innovation and entrepreneurship. We like to think of ourselves as a future-forward incubator looking for the most innovative startups ready to bring their ideas to market in 18 months. As we always say, we are best idea's best friends 

We take the risks, add the team and together with founders and partners we do the work and go to market. We share the passion & the upside, and together we succeed. 
 
Our experienced cofounding team combines tech development, professional board and resources liked advisory, legal, finance, commercial and HR to make the best ideas come true.

If you have any questions, or would just like to chat and discuss ideas, feel free to reach out at contact@mindfuture.com

Our other socials 
 mindfuture.com
 mindfuturedk
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Golden Triangle Angel Network (GTAN)
Description:
The Golden Triangle Angel Network (GTAN) is a members-only, not-for-profit organization of accredited investors seeking investment opportunities in promising early-stage businesses.

In addition to financial support, GTAN members provide dynamic early-stage companies with valuable mentorship and access to capital networks in order to facilitate learning, networking, and growth. GTAN helps accelerate companies into becoming market leaders in their industry by bringing together investment, experience and knowledge.

The Golden Triangle area, comprising Kitchener-Waterloo, Cambridge, Guelph and Stratford, is one of the top five growth areas in Ontario. Having a strong industrial and agricultural base, Kitchener-Waterloo’s high-tech cluster and four major post-secondary institutions, this area has spawned many early stage companies and academic research, as well as nurtured stable employment and prosperity.

GTAN operates under the Ontario Ministry of Research and Innovation’s Angel Network Program and is a part of the Equation Angels group.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Leonora Ventures
Description: We are a corporate venture: we find good deals and help them to grow and develop. We work side by side with the founders, we are hands on and we are together at all times.

Name: Essling Capital
Description:
Essling Capital is an independent asset management company specialized in unlisted assets.

Wholly owned by its partners, the firm manages and advises over €600m in Europe and North America.

Essling Capital is a Private Equity platform designed to act quickly on the most attractive market opportunities. The company offers its investors opportunities through its strategies: minority co-investments and lead investments.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Deciens Capital
Description:
Deciens Capital supports innovators who are building the next generation of enduring companies in financial services.

Our investment focus is on financial technology, covering a broad spectrum of areas including payments, lending, insurance, regtech, risk management, capital markets, trade finance, personal finance, savings, marketplaces, and beyond.

We seek visionary founders at the earliest stage of their company's life. When something truly remarkable is being built, it takes more than just money to make it happen. That's where we come in — with the energy, passion, and know-how to help turn a vision into a reality.

At Deciens, we don't just provide capital — we offer comprehensive, hands-on support to help guide our founders every step of the way. Whether it's offering advice and expertise, leveraging our extensive network of relationships, or providing strategic guidance, we are committed to helping our portfolio companies reach their full potential.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Description: Palm Ventures was established in 2014 with a vision to become one of the top investors and backers in startups in MENA. The company has already supported more than 40 startups including assisting various government institutions in achieving their innovation-related requirements.

Description: BFG Partners is a venture capital firm that seeks partnerships with early stage businesses across consumer product categories.  Our focus includes food & beverage, personal care, and pet. We work alongside exceptional entrepreneurs to ensure the business is able to deliver sustainable growth and outperform its competitors. In addition to providing our portfolio companies with capital, BFG provides teams with the advice most needed to make critical decisions and maximize opportunities. This advice spans operational strategy, tactical marketing, channel development, organizational design and capital planning.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Prairie Capital
Description: Prairie Capital is a private equity firm focused on guiding high-potential, founder-owned companies on the journey to becoming scalable platforms prepared for accelerated growth.  Since the firm's inception nearly 30 years ago, Prairie has invested over $1.3 billion in more than 100 platform companies.  Prairie provides the experience, framework for value creation, resources, and thought partnership required to scale well positioned, growth focused companies in attractive markets.  Prairie is a multi-sector investor with dedicated teams focusing on growth markets within the following sectors: business services, consumer, education, healthcare, industrial growth, and technology.

Name: Startup Istanbul
Description:
Startup Istanbul is the leading startup event which brings together founders, investors and executives in the region. 

It's a gathering of the leading startups, internet companies, business angels and venture capitalists from Asia and Europe.

Istanbul is the perfect setting for a tech conference for Digital Minded Companies, Ventures and Startups with global ambitions in the region. This event is made of networking. Hours of networking with best founders, executives, entrepreneurs and investors all around the region. 
This year’s event will have more than 100 selected startups and more than 1.000 attendees.

Name: Plug and Play Smart Cities
Description:
The discussion around Smart Cities has been around for a decade, but at Plug and Play Smart Cities, we believe it is the right time to engage now - evolving technology, tangible impact and positive return on investment, as well as purpose driven outcomes demonstrate the urgency and the opportunity to become a driver of urban planning and innovation.

Headquartered in Silicon Valley, with locations in France, Germany, Austria, Thailand, Brazil and more, we bring private and public sector together to work on the challenges of smart cities.

Our focus areas include: Mobility, IoT, Real Estate & Construction, and Energy & Sustainability.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Newton Equity Partners - Search Fund Investments
Description:
We are convinced that there is a better way.

We exist to create value, jobs, growth, impact communities and drive economic development through responsible Small and Medium Enterprise (SME) acquisition, investment, innovation, strategic management and people development.

We seek out leadership potential above all else. We are borderless and the world is our oyster. We see opportunity among the underrepresented. We want to talk to those who hear the true and authentic call of responsible and innovative leadership.

Our advantage comes from our passion for SMEs, passion for technology, passion for global mentality and from decades of leadership selection and development for entrepreneurial ecosystems across the globe. We are highly selective but we are unafraid of calculated risks.

We are inspired by ambitious entrepreneurs who are prepared to innovate in a more responsible way for the whole planet and for society; tech-savvy people with the vision to lead digital transformation; global citizens who bring best-in-world thinking to local contexts. Leaders who yearn to create wealth in a way that earns respect and a reputation for honesty and integrity. These are the Searchers with whom we partner.

We think and partner on a long-term basis. We champion diversity. We lift up, counsel and connect. We are obsessed with leadership development. We seek to live out our values in all we do: integrity, transparency, respect, open-mindedness, continuous learning and having fun.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: LG Technology Ventures
Description: LG Technology Ventures was established in 2018 and its team consists of experienced investors, entrepreneurs, technologists, and industry domain experts. Currently, LG Technology Ventures is managing over $800 million of fund assets and invests in early-stage start-ups in artificial intelligence, mobility, advanced materials, life-sciences, next generation display, mobile, and 5G. We strive to create value to our portfolio companies by helping them develop strategic partnerships with various LG Companies.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Fast Track Malmo
Description:
Helping amazing teams accelerate their growth and raise their first VC round. Once a year we invest €50k in 10 different startups that we believe will change the world.

Based in Malmö, Southern Sweden, our accelerator has been voted the best accelerator program in Sweden and is one of the highest quality accelerator programs in Europe.

Fast Track Malmö offers a 3-month program including €50k of investment as a convertible note. Is your startup ready to scale? We're open for applications! Read more and apply at fasttrackmalmo.com

Fast Track Malmö is a part of Minc, the startup house of Malmö
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: McRock Capital
Description: Venture Capital for Digital Industrial and Industrial SaaS. Co-founded by Scott MacDonald & Whitney Rockley
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: MOVA (Divisão de Inovação & Novos Negócios da Niterra do Brasil)
Description:
A Niterra é uma multinacional Japonesa com mais de 80 anos no mercado global e mais de 60 anos que iniciou sua operação no Brasil.  Durante esses anos tronou-se número 1 no setor automotivo, com suas marcas NGK e NTK. 

Mas o auto foi só o começo, desde 2018 a companhia vem investindo em novos setores e novos negócios e o MOVA é a área dentro da companhia responsável por se conectar com o ecossistema de startups e inovação e construir este futuro junto com a empresa no Brasil. 

Contamos com uma equipe de profissionais multidisciplinares capazes de criar novos negócios através de inovação aberta, cocriação de projetos, parcerias e investimentos junto as mentes criativas e empreendedoras mais brilhantes do Brasil e América do Sul.

Por meio de projetos internos de inovação e parcerias com startups, temos um alcance global através de nosso time de inovação com mais de 300 pessoas apoiados por um fundo de US$ 100 milhões.

Estamos ajudando a transformar a indústria de Energia e Meio Ambiente, Saúde, Comunicação e Agronegócios, visando a construção de um futuro melhor para todos nós.

Nós somos a porta de entrada para você empreendedor, parceiro, startup que está buscando projetos de inovação que melhorarão a qualidade de vida de toda a sociedade.

Acelere seus negócios e evolua para um próximo passo. 

Entre em contato conosco mova@ngkntk.com.br
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: HCS Capital
Description: HCS Capital Partners LLC (HCS) is an investment firm based in Miami, FL, that takes minority and majority positions in companies - in the US, Latin America, Israel - within Fintech, Insurtech and Cyber risk management sectors. As part of this strategy, HCS has invested in companies in Pet Insurance, IoT, Telematics, Crowdfunding, Regtech industries and Cybersecurity.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Nicoya
Description:
WE'RE ALL ABOUT PURPOSE
Business-accelerating investment company focused on food tech, relentlessly driven by creating meaningful impact for people, planet & health. Nicoya is set on step-changing the future of foods. 

OUR AMBITION
Nicoya’s ambition is to become the go-to investor and acceleration partner focused on mission-driven food tech companies in the Nordics and beyond.

WHAT WE DO
We invest for the long-term with the goal of creating sustainable impact within people, planet & health
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Acumen Resilient Agriculture Fund (ARAF)
Description:
ARAF is a $58MM impact Agri VC fund designed to enhance the livelihoods and climate resilience of 10 million people in Africa. 

We invest $300k – $4MM in early and early-growth stage agribusinesses with business models that help smallholders in East and West Africa become more resilient to climate change. 

We look for Agribusinesses backed by passionate world class founder(s) committed to building profitable and scalable enterprises that have smallholder farmers as a critical component of their business models.

The fund is sponsored by Acumen and anchored by GCF, and is supported by FMO, the Soros Economic Development Fund, Proparco, the Children’s Investment Fund Foundation, Global Social Impact, IKEA Foundation, and two family offices in USA and Europe.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Vantage Capital
Description:
Founded in 2001, Vantage Capital is an Africa-focused fund manager that has
raised funds of over $1.6 billion. Since 2006, its Mezzanine division has made 33
investments across four successive funds into 11 African countries, making it the
largest independent mezzanine funder on the continent. In addition, its GreenX
division has made 14 senior debt investments into South African solar and wind
energy projects across two funds. Currently, we are launching our education platform called Vantage Best in Class in Central & Eastern Europe. Our first Maple Bear school is set to open in September 2023.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Sunstone Life Science Ventures
Description:
Sunstone Life Science Ventures’ is a European, early-stage investor based in Copenhagen. We invest in drug development opportunities across the European Life Science sector, and prefer to make our initial investment in companies raising Series A/B rounds based on solid in-vivo preclinical data and a well understood mechanism of action that fits well into the pathology.

We seek opportunities which improve patient outcome. Our team brings together a diverse set of professional experiences: from entrepreneurial ventures to corporate management and financial services. Our background allows us to support our portfolio companies on a breadth of issues, ranging from high strategic level to specific operational issues. 

Sunstone Life Science Ventures is supported by InnovFin Equity, with the financial backing of the European Union under Horizon 2020 Financial Instruments and the European Fund for Strategic Investments (EFSI) set up under the Investment Plan for Europe.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Vortex Capital Partners
Description:
Vortex is an investment company founded in 2012. We invest in growing companies with a profitable core business that use technology as a differentiator. Vortex has applied an active approach since inception combining operating experience with investment know-how. As a result, our team today is a mix of senior executives, business operators and investment professionals. Thus far Vortex has invested in over 25 companies with more than 75 add-on acquisitions.

 

We enjoy to support entrepreneurs and management teams who are committed to building leading companies. We operate as one team to ensure that the right strategy, structure and support are in place. Together with management we invest in the next level of sustainable growth and providing support when needed.

 

Vortex facilitates buyouts and can provide growth capital as part of a buyout transaction. Our focus is on companies with headquarters in Belgium or in the Netherlands.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Arboretum Ventures
Description: Arboretum Ventures is a venture capital firm specializing in the healthcare sector. Headquartered in Ann Arbor, Arboretum invests throughout the United States, but with a preference for Midwest opportunities. Our team targets capital efficient companies that can meaningfully reduce healthcare costs in our areas of expertise: devices, diagnostics, services, and IT.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Cedar Hill Capital (formerly Cedar IBSI Capital)
Description:
We are an early-stage technology venture capital fund backing founders building AI-first enterprise software for the Financial Services industry.

Our investment thesis is built on our deep legacy in the technology research and consulting industry, a platform that brings together over 70 years of global experience in technology consulting and research.

Our GP and Operating Partners are credited with creating the region’s only Financial Services Tech Lab, which, since 2017, has successfully guided and accelerated 60+ FinTechs, helping them scale and expand internationally. 

Not many investors understand enterprise software as deeply as we do. The fund is dedicated to backing Financial Services SaaS companies, powered by the expertise and track record of our wider platform. Our unique edge is in our ability to deliver transformational value to founders, combining the GP's experience with the Cedar legacy platform’s 70+ years of practitioner and domain expertise. We make capital work like no other.

The fund is independently structured, follows a classic LP-GP model, and is backed by leading institutional and family office investors across the region.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: The Big Idea CONNECTpreneur Community
Description:
Founded in 2012 and based in Washington, DC, CONNECTpreneur is a global community of over 25,000 founders, entrepreneurs, private investors, angels, VCs, CXOs and business leaders who celebrate innovation and entrepreneurship. 

We organize the country's leading monthly virtual and live forums featuring meaningful networking, dealmaking, gamechanging speakers, showcases of disruptive early stage companies, and upwards of 700+ business leaders.
 
Previous speakers include some of the most successful entrepreneurs and VCs in the world.

Visit us at connectpreneur.org
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Neurobay
Description:
Neurobay is a startup investment group dedicated to building the titans of tomorrow. 

We work with Venture Capital firms, UHNWI, Family Offices and Institutions to grow businesses through strategic investment and capital raising.

We specialise in AI, Web3, Healthcare, and Technology but work across sectors.

We've raised millions in capital for businesses on a global scale.

Reach out: contact@neurobaystrategy.com
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: AlchemistX
Description: AlchemistX is the corporate innovation and government services division of Alchemist Accelerator. We partner with industry leaders and forward-thinking governments to engage with and support the world’s best entrepreneurs and innovation concepts. AlchemistX’s customized acceleration, market entry, intrapreneurship and venture incubation programs are built on the methods, knowledge, and network that have supported successful Alchemist Accelerator founders for over a decade.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: VEF
Description:
VEF is a listed investment company that invests in fintech businesses across emerging markets. We take minority stakes and are active investors with board representation in the majority of our portfolio companies, always looking to back the best entrepreneurs in our markets of focus. We invest in scale emerging markets across all areas of digital financial services including payments, credit, mobile money and wealth advisors. 

Today we have a portfolio of fintech companies spread across some of the most interesting scale emerging markets in the world, including Brazil, Mexico and India.

VEF is structured as a publicly listed investment company, trading under the ticker VEF AB on Nasdaq Stockholm's Main Market.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Golden Section
Description: Golden Section exists to journey together with B2B software founders to achieve meaningful exits through flourishing communities, effective partnership, and a commitment to balance.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Idealabs
Description:
Idealabs is a vertical accelerator of 4-8 months that boosts tech and media ideas through seed-funding, intensive mentoring, a creative workspace, professional services and leverage of the Telenet network. 

During the first four months you shape, build and launch a working prototype of your idea. If successful and validated by the market, we will provide follow-up funding to explore the growth and internationalization phase of your startup together.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Your VC
Description:
Your VC (formerly Growthdeck) is a UK-based venture capital firm connecting individual investors to fully diligenced, SEIS- and EIS-qualifying innovative companies.

Since 2016, we’ve invested over £50 million across 30+ businesses, delivered four successful exits, and helped shape the next generation of UK innovation.

Your VC combines institutional-quality due diligence with investor choice — and the opportunity to co-invest alongside some of the UK’s leading venture capital firms.

Built on a simple philosophy — Your Capital. Your Control. — we offer a new way to back ambitious UK founders and participate in venture capital with confidence.

The UK has long been a cradle of global innovation — from the steam engine and jet propulsion to fibre optics, the World Wide Web, and the first approved Covid-19 vaccine. Your VC continues this tradition, empowering investors to back the next generation of UK entrepreneurs while supporting long-term wealth creation.

We focus on B2B and B2B2C businesses that leverage technology to unlock new markets and drive meaningful growth.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: 20SALES
Description:
We have mastered Go-To-Market execution over decades. We have scaled companies from pre-revenue to billions. We partner with exceptional founders to do the same. We are the no-brainer $100K+ check for the best B2B founders raising Seed and Series A. Your chances of being successful are significantly higher with us on your cap table. 

20SALES was founded by Jessica Arnold, Kelly Bray, Liat Bycel, Stevie Case, Kim Graves, Renu Gupta, Maggie Hott, and Lauren Schwartz. We have over 150 years of collective experience in building and scaling GTM (Go-To-Market) teams across various areas such as sales development, customer success, renewals, operations, and enablement. We are equipped to guide your organization through every stage of its growth. We are backed by Harvard, Harry Stebbings, Stewart Butterfield, and other strong LPs.

We've invested in incredible founders and companies like : DealOps, Swantide, Outset, Attuned, Momentum, Context and others!
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Next Billion Capital Partners
Description: Next Billion Capital Partners is a global private equity firm investing in growth-stage companies scaling proven, tech-driven business models in emerging markets. Our diversified strategy targets the digital transformation of financial, insurance, healthcare, and business services across Southeast Asia, the Middle East & Africa, and Latin America. Led by former IFC investors, the firm leverages strong local networks and sector expertise, drawing on an extensive track record to accelerate growth and deliver value.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Jaree | جريء
Description:
Jaree is a Saudi-based venture capital matchmaking platform that connects high-potential startups with accredited investors. We make venture capital accessible by bridging the gap between entrepreneurs and investors in a seamless, transparent, and efficient way.

جريء هي منصة استثمار جريء سعودية متخصصة في الربط بين رواد الأعمال والمستثمرين المؤهلين، حيث نسهّل الوصول إلى رأس المال الجريء من خلال ربط الشركات الناشئة ذات الإمكانيات العالية بالمستثمرين الاستراتيجيين.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: CDG Invest Growth
Description:
CDG Invest Growth (CIG) est une société de gestion de fonds de Private Equity basée au Maroc. CIG gère la famille de fonds CAPMEZZANINE dédiés au capital développement.

Depuis 2001, CIG a levé près de 200 M$ auprès de fonds de pensions, d'assureurs et de sociétés internationales de développement. La société se positionne comme partenaire privilégié des entreprises à fort potentiel en les accompagnant dans leur expansion, pour devenir des acteurs économiques régionaux structurés et efficients. 

CIG est un gestionnaire de fonds régulé par l’Autorité Marocaine du Marché de Capitaux (AMMC).
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Kairos Ventures
Description: Kairos invests in groundbreaking startups and research in life sciences, physical sciences, and technology, originating from the top minds of academia and industry.  These technologies have the potential to make the world a better place.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: COONTROL
Description:
A COONTROL é uma empresa focada em tecnologia, inovação, profissionalismo e resultados. Desenvolvemos projetos de automação de caldeiras, queimadores e aquecedores de fluído térmico visando a eficiência térmica.

Identificamos oportunidades de melhoria da relação entre combustível e geração de energia, otimizando a combustão em caldeiras e aquecedores de fluído térmico. Atuamos em sistemas de combustão variados: grelha fixa inclinada, combustor, grelhas rotativas e grelhas móveis.

Com larga experiência em combustão de caldeiras com queima de biomassa, óleo e gás, desenvolvemos equipamentos como analisadores de gases, sistemas de medição e monitoramento instantâneo dos indicadores de processo, todos voltados para a entrega de eficiência energética a indústrias.

Nosso compromisso é auxiliar as indústrias a diminuírem a emissão de gases poluentes, através de soluções tecnológicas e altamente eficientes.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Anti Fund
Description:
Anti Fund is an investment firm that builds and invests in technology companies. Past investments include OpenAI, Anduril, Ramp, Cognition, Physical Intelligence, Flock Safety (via Aerodome), Chronosphere among many others.
****

Anti Fund believes the best founders are rebels, and the “anti” ethos resonates with the best engineers, scientists, and creators. Startups live and die on two levers: capital and attention. While capital is commodity, commanding attention is not. Whether a company sells consumer products or is a foundational research lab, they all must compete on the ability to win mindshare and ultimately customers and revenues.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Unkillable
Description:
We are Unkillable.

Over the last 12 years, we've built startups and businesses around the world. We learned our growth lessons the hard way.

How we help others Startups/Scaleups to meet their growth goals.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Ventures 54
Description:
Ventures 54 is dedicated to building and strengthening international investment corridors between Africa’s tech, startup, and investor ecosystems and the rest of the world. We operate across the venture capital stack, mobilizing capital, facilitating investments, and supporting exits. Our mission is to connect global investors, corporates, and DFIs with high-potential opportunities in Africa’s tech sector.

We work with and sit at the intersection of governments, DFIs, international funding agencies and the private sector to provide technical assistance while establishing key networks that unlock human, financial, and commercial resources. We facilitate conversations, working groups, events and programmes that promote collaboration and access to global markets and investment opportunities, accelerating growth for African founders and investors.

Whether you’re a public or private sector organization looking to deploy technical assistance funding into the African tech ecosystem, an African startup or investor seeking to engage with international markets, or an international investor aiming to access opportunities within Africa, we’re here to help. Get in touch to explore how we can collaborate and create pathways for growth and investment between Africa and the rest of the world.

 hello@ventures54.com
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: AngelSpark
Description:
This one is for the founders. AngelSpark is a community of builders, investors, executives, and other good humans supporting founders around the world. We invest from $100K and lead larger syndicates in exceptional founders at the earliest stages to help them launch new ideas, create new companies, go to market, and win first customers.

Name: Automobility Ltd
Description:
Mobility needs, previously satisfied through product “ownership”, are increasingly being served through mobility services “usership” with profound implications not only for traditional businesses within the value chain, but also for new entrants – as they compete to deliver services.   Connected mobility, which we define as “technology-enabled on-demand mobility services for moving people and goods from point A to B”, has become a disruptive, paradigm-changing development in the automotive industry.   It requires a complete rethinking of the way to deliver value to the market.  To succeed, companies must expand their focus from the product (the automobile) to the utility derived from the product (“automobility”), and create a business model and digital ecosystem optimized to provide digitally enabled solutions for both car owners and mobility services users.
 
Based in China, the experienced professionals at Automobility Limited are building a co-innovation platform to help drive China’s Automobility Revolution.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Description:
Arches Capital is a fast-growing group of business angels that is bridging the gap between Venture Capitalist (VCs) and how angels operate today, by joining the best of both worlds for our members.

We further distinguish ourselves in the way profits are generated and shared, and how our angels interact with their investees (the startups) and with each other. For this we are building the leading platform of actively engaged business angels that know how to operate and manage their investments in a professional and standardized manner.

Operate like a VC, be an Angel
   We source, select and invest like a VC;
   We engage, care and inspire as the angel we are.

We believe that by bundling smart capital (combine funding with real business knowledge and experience) with true engagement (actively working together to achieve rapid growth), we are able to ignite early stage companies on their path to success.

Arches Capital invests in early stage and scaling companies. We differentiate itself from angel syndicates or funds by supporting the next growth stage as well: we aim to lead or contribute to follow-on investments of  our successful portfolio companies.

Copley invests across a broad range of industries, but we are focused solely on small and lower middle market businesses. 

Copley's investment capital can be used for shareholder liquidity, acquisition financing, and growth equity. 

As investors, we devote substantial time and resources towards recruiting talent, identifying and executing acquisitions, building salesforces, and other business development initiatives.

Copley has designed our team, committed capital base, and investment process to exclusively work with and grow small and medium sized companies. We are agnostic to the standard private equity and venture capital fundraising cycle and are committed to sustained long-term growth initiatives.

Name: iSelect Fund
Description:
iSelect recognized the looming crises of diabetes and obesity early on, pinpointing poor nutrition as the root cause. Since 2014, our mission has been to harness the forces of Creative Destruction in agriculture and health technology innovation to address these critical issues. We invest in pioneering companies that are redefining the food and health system, emphasizing yield, taste, nutrition, and sustainability to combat obesity, reduce waste, and tackle metabolic diseases.

Our portfolio boasts over 60 companies, illustrating our commitment and impact. These firms are advancing crop quality, minimizing fertilizer use, and innovating in healthcare to cut costs and fast-track health improvements. 

With time, we have shifted our focus from yield to taste and nutrition, and now to enhancing nutritional density, targeting the root cause in obesity and metabolic—a market with vast untapped potential and significant implications for US GDP growth.

iSelect provides investors with broad exposure to innovators in the AgTech and HealthTech sectors, offering our 500+ investors the chance to increase investments in high-performing companies and deliver insightful market intelligence that influences both venture and public market strategies. Our approach gives investors a unique blend of risk mitigation and opportunity maximization in sectors poised for substantial growth.

Our network of investors, entrepreneurs, and early adopters reshapes the landscape of ag, food and health, creating sustainable impact, driving economic growth, investor returns and building a healthier future for all. With our deep human network of market insight, robust portfolio, and commitment to innovation, we're not just investing in companies; we're investing in a healthier, more sustainable world.

#AgTech #HealthTech#SustainableInvesting #FoodTech #ImpactInvesting #AgricultureInnovation #NutritionTech #Biotech #FutureOfFood

Real Track Record: With a track record spanning over 20 years, delivering an extraordinary 20%+ IRR across 200 projects, our experience underscores our unwavering commitment to excellence.

Name: Khuwaylid Capital
Description:
Khuwaylid Capital is a trailblazer in Islamic finance impact investing, targeting SMEs across Francophone Africa with an initial focus on Senegal. 

Headquartered in Dakar, the fund supports the growth of small and emerging businesses in agribusiness, healthcare, and education value chains.

Guided by Islamic finance, Khuwaylid Capital engages SMEs through equity participations (Mudarabah, Musharakah) and non-interest-bearing quasi-equity instruments (Murabaha, Salam, Istisna, Ijara, IMB, Wakala, etc.). As a non-banking financial intermediary, it advocates for Halal, ethical, socially responsible, and sustainable investment practices.

Khuwaylid Capital’s mission is to generate lasting positive impact for society by aligning investment decisions with the five higher objectives of Shari’ah (Maqasid al-Shari’ah): the preservation of faith, life, intellect, progeny, and wealth. These timeless principles naturally converge with today’s global development priorities, reflected in the UN Sustainable Development Goals (SDG). The fund focuses on tackling poverty (SDG 1), ending hunger (SDG 2), improving health and wellbeing (SDG 3), expanding access to quality education (SDG 4), advancing gender equality (SDG 5), fostering sustainable economic growth and decent employment (SDG 8), reducing inequalities (SDG 10), and supporting climate action (SDG 13).

In essence, Khuwaylid Capital pioneers Islamic finance while catalyzing social and environmental progress. By bridging the values of Islamic Finance with global development goals, and focusing strategically on agribusiness, healthcare, and education, the fund aims to uplift communities and foster sustainable economic development: Profit – People – Planet.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Lenus Capital Partners is a privately-held investment group. Our focus is on Private Equity, Venture Capital, Real Estate and Special Opportunities related to the healthcare sector.

Lenus was founded by a team with a substantial track record in the healthcare, real estate and financial sectors. Due to its experience, the team creates long-term value for its investors and the companies it invests in. We achieve this by working closely with management to enhance company strategies, increase operational efficiencies and drive expansion plans.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Bridgewest Ventures NZ
Description:
Bridgewest Ventures is a New Zealand-based deep tech incubator, searching for ideas with impact. As an approved partner under Callaghan Innovation's 2020 Technology Incubator Programme, we're looking for local ventures ready to commercialise on a global scale.

We're backed by our parent company, Bridgewest Group, a privately held investment company from the United States. With global assets in biotech, wireless communications, IoT, software, and semiconductors, Bridgewest Group brings its extensive global network and tried-and-true incubator approach to our home base in Auckland.

If accepted into our programme, entrepreneurs can expect mentorship and funding to commercialise their technology, improve business capabilities, and facilitate future growth. We're committed to not only building startups into companies but also contributing to the entrepreneurial ecosystem that exists in New Zealand.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: TGFS Technologiegründerfonds Sachsen
Description:
Der TGFS ist Eigenkapitalinvestor für wissensbasierte, technologieorientierte Start-ups in Sachsen. Er ist führender Gründungsfinanzier im Freistaat und begleitet Teams mit Venture Capital und Managementunterstützung sowohl in der Seed- als auch Start-up-Phase. Eine Beteiligung des TGFS erschließt Portfoliounternehmen den Zugang zu weiteren internationalen Investoren.

Der Fonds wurde 2008 vom Freistaat Sachsen (u.a. EFRE-Mittel) und sächsischen Finanzinstituten erstmals aufgelegt und hat seither über 100 Start-ups begleitet. 2023 ist der TGFS in die dritte Fondsgeneration gestartet.

Der TGFS finanziert sächsische Gründerinnen und Gründer sowie Start-ups aus dem Technologiebereich bereits auch in frühen Phasen. Mit dem Kapital werden Produktentwicklungen, Markteinführungen oder der Produktionsaufbau vorangetrieben. Das TGFS-Team unterstützt dabei – beispielsweise in Strategiefragen und bei weiteren Finanzierungsrunden – mit seinem Netzwerk und Know-how. Die Beteiligungshöhen liegen zwischen M€ 0,.2 und M€ 5.

Wir suchen Unternehmen mit starkem Wachstumspotential, einem überzeugenden Team, Technologien mit Alleinstellungsmerkmalen und einer realistischen Chance, zu einem Marktführer in der Branche zu werden.


Impressum: https://www.cfh.de/impressum/
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Alliance Consumer Growth (ACG)
Description: Alliance Consumer Growth (ACG) is one of North America’s leading consumer-focused growth equity investment funds, focusing on fast-growing, “rising star” brands in the food, beverage, personal care, beauty, pet and apparel categories.  Since the firm’s founding in 2011, ACG has invested in many notable emerging consumer brands as a growth equity partner.  Some of ACG’s past and current investments include Babyganics (acquired by SC Johnson), SKIMS,  Shake Shack (completed an IPO as NYSE: SHAK), OUAI Haircare (acquired by Procter & Gamble), barkTHINS (acquired by Hershey), Harry's Inc., Suja Juice (acquired by Coca-Cola), Milk Makeup (acquired by Waldencast), Tata Harper Skincare (acquired by Amorepacific), KRAVE Jerky (acquired by Hershey), The Honest Kitchen (recapitalized by Monarch Capital), Momofuku Goods and Athletic Brewing Company, among others.  www.acgpartners.com

Pelican is currently investing from its fourth fund which is dedicated to supporting and advancing companies that provide critical services to the nuclear power industry; an essential component in maintaining and enhancing the existing nuclear energy infrastructure.

Name: Aceleradora Litoral

La Aceleradora Litoral se enfoca en empresas de origen o base en las ciencias, ya sea que provengan o no del sistema de ciencia y tecnología y cuya misión es transformar dichos avances científicos en productos o servicios que pueden ser incorporados al mercado y aprovechados por la sociedad.

Representa una inmejorable oportunidad para lograr la interacción entre emprendedores, sistema científico-tecnológico, el sector socio-productivo, y el sector público.

Nuestra Aceleradora Litoral fue seleccionada por el Gobierno Nacional en la Convocatoria Fondos de Aceleración como aceleradora de referencia en Argentina.

Name: 블루포인트 (Bluepoint)
Description:
블루포인트는 테크 엣지 액셀러레이터 입니다. 
기술스타트업 생태계가 더욱 활발하고 다양한 모습으로 진화하는 세상을 꿈꿉니다. 기술스타트업 생태계가 발전할수록 우리 인류는 보다 더 나은 세상으로 나아간다고 확신합니다. 그래서 저희는 초기 스타트업, 특히 기술스타트업을 지원하는 데 총력을 기울이고 있습니다.

‘블루포인트’는 블루오션의 출발점이라는 뜻으로,  창업을 꿈꾸는 모든 혁신가의 시작을 함께합니다.

초기 스타트업의 성장을 위해 네트워크 연결, 후속투자치 지원, 홍보 및 채용 지원에 이르기까지 다양한 방식으로 스타트업을 도우며 그들의 다음 단계로의 도약을 이끌어 냅니다. 

노동과 자본이 재배치되는 역동적인 환경 속에서 초기 스타트업들이 각자 있어야 할 곳을 올바르게 찾아갈 수 있도록 도와주어야 합니다. 블루포인트는 벤처 생태계에 집중되고 있는 자원들을 스타트업 생태계 곳곳에 적합하게 배치하는, 모내기판과 같은 역할을 하는 기업입니다.

Name: BVVC
Description:
We hunt founders, not companies.

BVVC is a venture capital fund dedicated to accelerating proven technology while allowing first-look access to Special Operations and the large commercial sectors partners that matter most to National Security. We write first checks at inception/seed-Series A and follow-on. Since our inception, we have been driven to hunt founders, not companies. BVVC invests in mission-first founders with one objective: to reaffirm America’s position as the world’s leader in computer software, hardware, and advanced manufacturing technologies, all to protect our way of life. Our technologies show enormous commercial application and potential to provide Special Operations with cutting-edge, real-time prototypes to leverage for the broader National Security sectors of the United States and our Allies everywhere.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Rhapsody Venture Partners
Description:
Software is eating the world, but we’re eating hard tech

Universities and the surrounding ecosystems are full of brilliant, inspired scientists who are inventing our future. They are graduate students, post-docs, undergrads and professors. And they are grinding. Material science innovations don’t arise from weekend hackathons. Novel biochemical pathways aren’t discovered by instinct. In our space, inventions arise from countless failures and require unrelenting tenacity, deep expertise and fortitude.

When luck, timing and entrepreneurial courage come together, scientific breakthroughs are startup opportunities. Inventions are often born out of years of research (funded by government and industry grants), yet as startups they must start new journeys. 

The importance of innovation in applied science and engineering cannot be overstated. We believe the next decades will be shaped by critical progress in hard tech. Growing populations and natural resource constraints demand it. We are optimistic that our scientists and a culture of entrepreneurship, combined with smart policy, can deliver a prosperous future. 

VC funds are structurally a mismatch for early-stage hard tech startups, and so are angel networks. Understanding and investing in scientific innovations is specialized, time-consuming, expensive, and often requires access to insights in opaque industries. Our aspiration and structure are different from those of other VCs. We are the scientific founder’s partner. 

Our vision is that hard tech innovation can create a sustainable and prosperous world.

Our mission is to help bring about this future by supporting the best scientific founders with capital and co-creation.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Growthdeck
Description:
Growthdeck is a private investor network providing direct, tax-efficient investment opportunities in some of the most exciting UK growth companies.
 
We offer both equity and debt options, focusing on fundraises between £500k and £3m, giving High Net Worth and Sophisticated investors in the UK and overseas the chance to invest from £5,000.

We have raised over £60m for fast-growing SMEs across a wide range of sectors, including hospitality and leisure, technology, biopharmaceuticals, telecoms and fashion.

Name: IMB Partners
Description:

1) Businesses that service the utilities and infrastructure spaces
2) Government contracting (GovCon) companies that support local, state, and/or Federal agencies

We value partnerships and people first and we always maintain an entrepreneurial mindset in our approach to business. Our team has more than 100 years of private equity experience and has invested more than $1 billion in capital in 30+ platforms. We invest for the long-term on behalf of 75+ institutional investors, family offices, and high-net-worth individuals.

Our current company platforms include utility services, IT staffing and services, and food distribution. IMB seeks companies with $2 - $15 million in EBITDA (add-ons as low as $1 million).
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Helvetech Limited
Description:
Where Swiss Discipline Meets UAE Momentum — Bankable by Design

Helvetech Limited is a UAE-based strategic investment platform allocating and structuring proprietary and co-invest capital into high-potential technology ventures, with a focused UAESwiss bridge. We deliver structured financings from seed to growth—preferred equity, KPI-linked convertibles, revenue-linked instruments, and select structured credit—with milestone-linked deployment, reserved follow-on (18–24 months), and syndication with Tier-1 banks and institutional co-investors to calibrate ownership, dilution, and cost of capital.

Institutional governance from day one: board cadence, reserved matters, information rights, ILPA-aligned reporting, KPI dashboards, treasury policy, and audit readiness. Cross-border bankability covers KYC/AML; ESR; data residency and privacy-by-design; and treaty-aware HoldCo/SPV architectures (ADGM/DIFC/CH/LU).

Focus & stage: HealthTech, FinTech/PayTech, and Industrial & Applied Tech (automation, data, edge) — seed to expansion.
Legal form: Helvetech Limited is an investment holding company that operates as an institutional investment platform.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals
Location: Jumeirah Emirates Towers, Sheikh Zayed Road, Dubai

Name: Differential Ventures
Description:
Differential is a NYC-based seed-stage venture capital fund investing in the next generation of enterprise technology that will enable companies to truly transition into the “data age.” Our team is comprised of experienced investors, data scientists and startup executives who have hands-on experience solving problems in the complex AI market. Because we have lived many of the challenges a startup faces along its growth trajectory through a variety of skillsets we support our founders, as a team, across all business functions, from seed to exit.

Our portfolio companies are providing the components critical to the next generation of enterprise technology and are fundamentally changing the way companies do business in sectors like financial services, manufacturing, hiring, government, retail, etc. 

We are constantly seeking startups that will unlock the power of data in a responsible way; ranging from applied AI solutions to Advancing the ML Tech Stack to Advanced Engineering and Infrastructure solutions, including data privacy and cybersecurity. We view our investments starting with the data.  So any tech solution that helps to collect, manage, analyze, and secure data is in thesis for us.

Description:

If you're looking to grow or build a business, we'd love to hear from you.

Name: Remarkable Ventures
Description:
Remarkable Ventures has been investing in startups serving and disrupting New York’s largest industries for more than a decade.  

We are lifecycle investors. We are operators. We take you from the earliest stage and see you through your next round, and your next, to exit and beyond.  

We love helping founders build products and businesses from the ground up—and working with founders who love to build. With our companies and through the hundreds of founders we’ve invested in, we’ve lived the highs and lows of building a company. We’ve seen great success. We’ve seen pivots. We’re there with founders every step of the way.  

We support our founders and portfolio with the help of a unique platform and a big tent. Many funds talk about support for their portfolio, but for us it’s not just our team—it’s our community that’s been supporting the New York tech community since 2011. We have built a platform of more than 1000 mentors, including 500 founders we’ve backed during the last 10 years.

We look for founders seeking to create meaningful change through the businesses they create. We look for companies from anywhere in the world that seek to take full advantage of the NYC opportunity. Together we help remarkable founders take their businesses to remarkable places.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: GetFresh Ventures
Description:
At GetFresh Ventures (GFV), we help founders grow smarter, scale stronger, and exit on their terms—without losing control of what they’ve built.

Most funding models prioritize investor returns. We prioritize founders.

Instead of forcing you into aggressive fundraising cycles, dilution traps, or “grow-or-die” timelines, GFV offers a different path: revenue-first growth, capital-efficient scaling, and founder-aligned exits.

We partner with founders who want to build real businesses with real customers, strong margins, and strategic flexibility—not just chase valuations.

Who we help:
- Founders launching their first GTM strategy and building high-conversion customer acquisition engines.
- Growth-stage teams refining their ICP, scaling ops, and optimizing sales and marketing performance.
- Leaders breaking through growth plateaus by reframing value creation and unlocking new revenue channels.
- Founders preparing for exit who want to maximize valuation, minimize dilution, and stay in control during negotiations.

What makes GFV different:
- A Growth by Design framework rooted in operational discipline, financial clarity, and executional rigor.
- Hands-on support from experienced operators who build alongside you—not just advise from the sidelines.
- Capital strategy and structuring that protects equity and positions you for founder-friendly exits.
- Deep executional focus across go-to-market, org design, financial modeling, and exit readiness.

If you're a founder who wants to scale with confidence, grow with intention, and own the outcome - GetFresh Ventures is your partner.

Let’s build the future, by design.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Martis Capital
Description:
Martis Capital is a middle-market private equity fund focused exclusively on the North American healthcare industry.

Located in San Francisco, CA and Washington, DC, the Martis Capital team leverages more than 125 years of financial and clinical experience, as well as a deep relationship network of healthcare executives and institutions, to help evaluate investment opportunities and support our portfolio companies.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: BAI Capital
Description:
BAI Capital is a leading venture capital fund in China. Since 2008, the team of BAI Capital has invested in more than 200 portfolios, including 18+ IPOs and 40+ unicorns. BAI Capital has two main focuses: China-based global companies and China’s structural transformation. BAI Capital seeks to partner with and empower outstanding Chinese companies and entrepreneurs that can leverage the multiplier effect of China’s technology, talent, and supply chain advantages and to expand globally in consumer retail and services, fintech, media and content innovation, Web3 and metaverse. On the other hand, at the turning point of China’s structural transformation, the fund will also seize major cross-cycle disruption opportunities in frontier and infra tech, electric vehicles and autonomous driving, and industrial upgrade driven by enterprise software development.

The investor base for BAI Capital includes institutional investors such as sovereign wealth funds, large insurance companies, internet giants and fund of funds globally, as well as Bertelsmann. BAI Capital has its background from Bertelsmann Asia Investments, part of the Bertelsmann Group. Bertelsmann is a media, services and education corporation that operates in about 50 countries and has 130,000 employees around the world. It aspires to achieve climate neutrality by 2030. BAI Capital will continue to empower portfolio companies with its China expertise and Bertelsmann's vast European and global network, bringing together global resources and perspectives to assist the development of its portfolios.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Blockrocket
Description: Blockrocket was an angel syndicate that invested in early-stage web3 startups. Portfolio highlights include Venly, Breach, and Scorechain.
