Name: Finaventures
Description:
Founded in 1999, Finaventures is a venture and growth equity firm specializing in building Business Ecosystem Groups. 

Our business model combines capital with transformative innovation and deep managerial and operational involvement. 

We build our Ecosystem Groups of wholly-owned companies into a robust network of interconnected products, services, and partnerships, creating value through integration, network effects, and customer communities.

We optimize our group of companies’ performance through intensive and extensive margin stacking and cost pooling.

We are company operators and Business Ecosystem builders. 
We are neither fee-driven investment managers, securities traders, nor portfolio bettors.

We specialize in two sectors we know well: Tech Infrastructure and Renewable Energy. 
Both sectors address the attractive yet inefficient challenge of solving the ever-evolving “Last Mile” problem.

Visit our latest ecosystem at www.everpower.ai or its page, here on LinkedIn.

Our Values
1. We believe in integrity, transparency, ethics, humility, and most importantly, self-restraint from following the herd.
2. We are Pragmatists focused solely on fundamentals.
3. We build companies with real products, real cash flow and real net income.
4. We do not believe in leverage at the expense of the stability or longevity of the entire group, or the inherent well-being of all our stakeholders.
5. We do not believe in “shuffling investment paper” or investing in “accounting gimmicks”
6. We hold ourselves accountable by having all facets of our group audited by world-class third-party auditors
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

This is a conviction that is embedded in our investment strategy since it necessitates a deeper understanding and reduces risks. Description:
Capitem Partenaires est un fonds entrepreneurial indépendant créé et souscrit par des chefs d'entreprise. 

Capitem Partenaires est agréée par l’AMF sous le N° GP13000017 depuis le 15/5/2013

L’objectif de Capitem Partenaires est d’accompagner les dirigeants de PME dans leurs opérations en fonds propres et le développement de leurs sociétés, afin de leur permettre de franchir un palier.  

Capitem Partenaires intervient sur des opérations de développement, de build-up, de transmission, de spin-off et de reclassement de titres en accompagnant des PME rentables de plus de 5 M€ de chiffre d’affaires, en croissance et contrôlées par une équipe dirigeante efficiente.

Le montant des interventions de Capitem Partenaires est compris entre 1 M€ et 5 M€.

Name: 415 Capital
Description:
415 Capital is a specialist venture capital firm dedicated to investing in breakthrough and life-saving medical innovation. For over 30 years, our team has empowered exceptional entrepreneurs through the provision of capital, expertise, and market access.

We exclusively invest in large unmet patient needs in chronic diseases, with an emphasis on cardio & neurovascular disorders, the worldwide leading causes of death and the largest cost driver in the global healthcare systems. Our mission is to improve patient outcomes and quality of life at lower long-term healthcare costs.

Over the years, the 415 team has introduced over 25 breakthrough technologies to market and realized over 20 successful portfolio exits to-date, including Vesper Medical and Intact Vascular (both acquired by Philips), Claret Medical (acquired by Boston Scientific), ReCor Medical (acquired by Otsuka), CardiAQ Valve Technologies (acquired by Edwards), Atritech (acquired by Boston Scientific), CoreValve (acquired by Medtronic) and many more.

Description:
Welcome to Future Back Ventures by Bain & Company!

We are a venture fund focused on investing in early-stage, promising start-ups founded or led by Bain alumni. We sit within Bain’s Engine 2 venture portfolio and are backed by Bain & Company and its partners who believe that our alumni are building the companies of the future. 

We look for opportunities in a wide range of industries and geographies so if you are a Bain alum building something exciting, we’d love to hear about it.

Have any questions? Feel free to email us at info@futureback.vc.

Description:
Volta is a new model for investing in energy technology.  Volta identifies and works with entrepreneurs and companies to solve their most important technical challenges while providing its strategic investors the opportunity to invest in and acquire the most promising of these technology companies. Volta serves investors from across sectors of the energy system, who have complementary strategic interests in identifying breakthrough energy storage-related technology that will enable ubiquitous adoption of both electric vehicles and renewable power generation.  

Volta works to validate transformative technologies and businesses through collaboration with leading institutions, including through its research agreement with Argonne National Laboratory. Volta’s focus is on technologies and businesses that impact applications in transportation, the electric grid, and portable electronics. Volta is designed to create strategic advantages for our corporate partners’ core businesses and deliver financial returns.

We help New Zealand founders and teams believe bigger.  To dream, act and achieve on a global scale.

Based in Auckland, New Zealand we have connections globally. We invest from seed to scale and provide operational support across product, growth and HR. 

GD1’s deep expertise in venture capital and first-hand international operating knowledge was gained via experience in technology companies across Europe, the US (including Silicon Valley), and New Zealand. This experience, as well as ongoing relationships, ensures that founders and management teams are supported from day one.

Name: Burch Creative Capital
Description:
Burch Creative Capital is a Creative Capital Firm that was founded by Christopher Burch with a decidedly different approach to creating value.

The company’s investment philosophy is an expression of Christophers' entrepreneurial values and his vision for new market opportunities, using a creative skill set along with sound financial practices to create, incubate, support, and scale disruptive brands and businesses.

In his 30-year career as an investor and entrepreneur, Christopher Burch has participated in the rise of more than 50 companies. By combining an intuitive understanding of consumer behavior with international and direct sourcing experience, he has a built a long track record of connecting innovation to impact. Creative Capital represents the evolution of venture capital based on Christophers’ belief that the activity of successful investing also includes creativity.

In the past, we were investors looking for existing opportunities. Today, we are entrepreneurs who invent and attract new ones. We apply more than funding to earn a return. We invest our creativity, passion, and insights to create value.

Burch Creative Capital’s brand portfolio includes the recent introductions of C. Wonder, Poppin, Nihiwatu and MONIKA CHIANG to a list of established brands previously embraced by Christopher including the Faena Hotel + Universe, Jawbone, Next Jump, Powermat, Tory Burch and Voss Water.

The company is currently supporting the development of several lifestyle and consumer products brands ranging from retail, apparel and home furnishings to the hospitality, mobile device and technology industries.

Name: Mosaic General Partnership
Description:
Mosaic means “a work of art made by inlaying small pieces of variously colored material to form pictures or patterns.” 

Mosaic General Partnership is a venture capital firm that leads early stage investments and participates in select growth-access deals in sectors where we have an unfair advantage.

Our promise at Mosaic General Partnership is to be a lot more than capital. Our network includes 100+ of the most impactful public and private company founders and CEOs, the brightest operators with deep technical and industry expertise, a roster of Midas list VCs, and the most progressive athletes and influencers shaping today's world.

We leverage our unique network to bend the risk curve for our companies. We develop partnerships, create distribution advantages, help build people strategies, and provide true rolled-up-sleeves support to help our founders succeed.

And it doesn't end there. We know real leaders look to have profound impact. So do we. Diversity, equity and inclusion is a cornerstone. We are building a unique playbook to ensure access to diverse capital, governance and talent for our portfolio companies from day one.

Our past portfolio includes Zoom, Pager Duty, Datadog, Robinhood, Carta, Coinbase, GOAT, Dapper Labs, Levels Health, Hippo, Madison Reed, Acorns, Papa, Pachama, Nurx, Hims, Shef to name a few. 

If you want to learn more, come talk to us - please reach out at info@mgp.vc.

—

Mosaic General Partnership was formerly MASTRY Ventures, rebranded on October 20th, 2023.

Name: Maple Leaf Angels
Description:
Established in 2007, Maple Leaf Angels (MLA) is a not-for-profit membership organization. Our mandate is to connect accredited investors and the brightest, most passionate entrepreneurs in a stream-lined process within the larger entrepreneurial eco-system.

Maple Leaf Angels’ members are a group of high net worth private individuals who invest in seed and early stage technology companies. While investments are made individually, MLA members enjoy the benefit of best practices and the collective knowledge and networks of the group.

Collectively, our members look to invest between $250,000 AND $1,000,000 in each opportunity.

Maple Leaf Angels Capital Corporation (MLACC), a subsidiary of MLA, is the general partner for Maple Leaf Angels 48 Fund Limited Partnership (MLA48), a limited partnership comprised of several MLA members who wanted to invest collectively in seed and early stage companies. 

After successfully investing MLA48 Fund I, the partnership once again turned to it’s members and closed a second fund, MLA48 Fund II.  MLA48 Fund II will consider investing up to $150,000 per company into great early stage startups that have yet to receive seed funding.  Investment decisions will be made in 48 hours.

MLA48 Fund I has successfully invested all of its funds into 4 startups. It made investments up to $60,000 per company into great early stage startups. Investment decisions were made in 48 hours.

By bringing together investment, experience and a network of partners, MLA enables high potential companies to grow and realize their potential.

Our members enjoy:

- Community of like-minded individuals
- Networking and professional development
- Engagement in the entrepreneurial eco-system

To date, our members have:

- Invested over $30 million in 50+ companies
- Participated in 12 succesful exits

Name: Talent Ladder
Description:
Talent Ladder is an exclusive community of top-tier corporate finance talent, drawn from leading investment banks and strategy consultancies.

For talent, we are an online platform that provides direct access to top-tier exit opportunities at handpicked employers including private equity, private debt, and venture capital funds. The platform will always be 100% confidential and free forever. No one will be able to view your profile.

To ensure we attract and retain world-class corporate finance talent to the TL community, we take our promises to talent very seriously:

1) Free today and forever
2) No cold-calls or unsolicited mass emails
3) Specific roles relevant to your preferences
4) Listings include employer names and salaries where possible
5) Applications are strictly confidential
6) All applications go direct to the hiring manager

Apply in minutes at www.talentladder.com

Members must have 1-10 years' experience across M&A, leveraged finance, transaction services, private markets investing, or consulting.

--

For employers, Talent Ladder is a platform to source top-tier talent from leading investment banks and consultancies without recruitment agencies. Your role will only be seen by our closed community of handpicked talent, screened by former front-office finance professionals. You will be assigned a dedicated account manager to support your search and receive a shortlist of applications straight to your inbox. Our fees are simple and fair, at a fraction of the cost of agencies.

Find out more at www.talentladder.com

E8 Angels is a non-profit angel investing community that exclusively supports and invests in clean technology and sustainability companies. We meld our pursuit of profitable investments with our pursuit of a higher purpose – accelerating the transition to a cleaner future and a better world. Since its founding in 2006, E8 members have invested over $68M into 170+ cleantech ventures.

The E8 member community comprises 130+ accredited investors worldwide. Our members, whether seasoned investors or new angels with a desire to learn, gain access to quality deal flow and the tools for successful investing. Decacorn.VC is a Singapore domiciled cross border tech only Venture Capital Fund crafted by unconstrained managers with a meticulously curated portfolio spread across key startup destinations, namely the USA, Israel, Estonia, Poland, Singapore, China and India. 

At Decacorn, our mission is to democratise venture capital investing for non-institutional accredited investors in technology-led disruptive innovation startups working on complex problems before they become rich in valuation and famous by way of their brand recall. 

We focus on startups that have crossed inflexion points with a clear path to monetisation and back up the winners by participating in their follow-on funding rounds as winners take it all.

1. Cybersecurity startup Kenna Securities was acquired by Cisco in 2021
2. Israeli ML/CV startup Zebra Medical acquired by Nanox in 2021
3. Israeli smart chip maker Celeno was acquired by TSE listed Renesas in 2021
4. Genomics play 23andME merged with Sir Richard Branson’s SPAC in 2021
5. Big Data analytics company Palantir listed in 2020

Description:
𝐄𝐕𝐎𝐋𝐔𝐓𝐈𝐎𝐍 𝐂𝐀𝐏𝐈𝐓𝐀𝐋 𝐏𝐀𝐑𝐓𝐍𝐄𝐑𝐒: 𝐖𝐇𝐎 𝐖𝐄 𝐀𝐑𝐄

◐ Evolution Capital Partners (ECP) is a small business private equity firm investing control growth equity in founder led businesses generating annual EBITDA of at least $1,000,000.

Description:
Frazier Life Sciences invests globally in private and publicly-traded companies that discover, develop, and commercialize innovative biopharmaceuticals. Frazier Life Sciences manages over $3.9 billion in capital, including venture funds focusing on company creation and private companies, and a public fund focused on small and mid-cap public companies. Since 2005, over 60 Frazier Life Sciences portfolio companies, many of which were created or seeded by Frazier, have completed IPOs or M&As. The Frazier Life Sciences team consists of over 40 professionals with deep expertise in biopharmaceuticals, primarily located in
Palo Alto, California (headquarters), San Diego, Seattle, Boston, New York, and London.

For more information about Frazier Life Sciences, please visit www.frazierls.com.

Name: HeBAN - Hellenic Business Angels Network
Description:
The Hellenic Business Angels Network (HeBAN) has been established as a national, non-profit organisation in response to a gap in the Greek entrepreneurial ecosystem of providing sufficient funding and expertise to innovative start-ups in their early stages. While in many countries across the globe it is increasingly Business Angels who can offer this required input when other resources are not available, in Greece there is still a lack of successful and visible angel investing models. With the first initiative and activities undertaken in 2012 HeBAN was fully incorporated in 2015, HeBAN is envisioned to create a national platform for bringing together the stakeholders of the Greek start-up ecosystem and help implement a sustainable Business Angels and early stage investors network in the country. While not being active in funding start-ups by itself, HeBAN aims to support with a wide array of activities the formation and cooperation of local Business Angels groups, clubs and networks and motivate and support potential and active Business Angels and other related stakeholders in Greece to contribute to the creation of a functioning eco-system for early stage investment. Services entail, among others, education and training for private investors, interest lobbying, facilitation of networking and high-quality deal-flow, as well as dissemination of latest research and best practices. For entrepreneurs and start-up facilitators, such as incubators, accelerators and others, HeBAN serves as an access point in their search for private investment.

HeBAN is emphasizing the link to the international early stage investor community. HeBAN is the Greek National Member of EBAN (European Trade Association for Business Angels, Seed Funds, and other Early Stage Market) and the National Lead for Greece of GBAN (Global Business Angels Network).
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Footwork
Description:
We lead and co-lead Series A and Seed rounds, in companies with early signs of product-market fit. We focus on consumer technology and the consumerization of enterprise technology. We're inspired by founders, and wake up every day excited to get to work with teams building the next generation of category-defining companies.

Our equal partnership combines world-class investing and operating experience.

Description:

Applications from interested startups, potential co-founders, mentors and investors who want to join our network are always welcome - fill out 1-minute application on our website: digitalwellventures.com

Reach out and let´s see what we can build together!

Description:
We’re Sputnik ATX VC, a venture capital firm on a mission to accelerate future category defining companies from infancy to product market fit. 

Made by nerds, for nerds, we invest in maker-founders solving real problems, and teach them how to sell and get the exponential growth needed to scale to unicorn status. 

Our only economic relationship with startups is that of an investor — we don't believe in charging fees. 

Sputnik translates to “partner”. Join us, and let’s change the world.

OUR FORMULA: (NERDS + INVESTMENT + TRAINING + MENTORING) X COMMUNITY = SUCCESS
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Staircase Ventures
Description:
Staircase Ventures leads seed-stage rounds into Canada’s highest potential tech companies with unparalleled dedication to accelerating founders’ development and performance.

Staircase offers a 5-pillar Founder Development Platform – a comprehensive offering to advance founders’ personal development and successful leadership of their ventures. 

With the 5-pillar Founder Development Platform, Staircase Ventures founders have access to:  

1.	CEO coaching: An experienced, one-on-one executive coach to support them with their personal development objectives.

2.	Peer support groups: Confidential, facilitated, stage- and function-appropriate peer groups with other founders across North America. 

3.	Health & wellness program: A dedicated Cleveland Clinic Canada health coach to help them enhance their physical and mental health. 

4.	Personal financial advisor: An experienced financial advisor who specializes in supporting early-stage tech founders.

5.	Family stipend: A cash stipend to cover unexpected childcare, elder support, or other family needs. 

In addition, each founder receives carry in the fund so that when the fund does well, all founder benefit.

Staircase Ventures is managed by Janet Bannister, a veteran of the Canadian tech industry with deep experience as a founder, operator, and investor.  Founders also benefit from a set of Advisors, each of whom have launched and scaled $1B+ businesses.

Name: SaaS

SaaS is an investment community that specialises in buying profitable SaaS(Software-as-a-Service) companies. Any working professional can join for free in order to grow and diversify their personal investment portfolio. 

HOW
By pooling capital from all our individual working professionals (community members - like you), we are able to buy SaaS (Software-as-a-Service) companies, enabling you to share in the profits.

WHAT OUR COMMUNITY MEMBERS GET
A more diversified investment portfolio
Full transparency in terms of the utilisation of their investment
To share in the profits of highly profitable SaaS companies

WHO ARE WE? We are a community built to enable SaaS investment access for individual working professionals.

WHAT ARE OUR VALUES?
Honesty
Integrity
Transparency

We hold these above all else and look for them in the management of the SaaS companies we buy on behalf of our community.

We back mission-driven founders whose lived experiences fortify their business prowess. Our investment team has led deals resulting in 19 acquisitions and 20 initial public offerings over the last two decades. We have offices in Boston, Mass., Portola Valley, Calif., and Dublin, Ireland.

For more information, visit www.lightstonevc.com.

Name: Butterfly Ventures
Description:
Butterfly Ventures is one of the leading seed-stage focused VCs in the Nordics. Butterfly Ventures was founded in 2012 and ever since then we've been one of the most active early-stage VCs in the region. We have an office in Helsinki, Oulu, Stockholm, Tallinn, and Copenhagen.

We're known for our co-operative approach. We like to interface with founders directly and work as a team; founders have the full support of all our partners.

We invest in pre-seed & seed stage startups in the Nordics and Baltics, with a focus on deep tech and hardware innovations. We prefer to get involved with companies early on, and 80% of our portfolio companies do not have any revenue at the time of our entry. However, we're very business driven, and typically our portfolio companies start generating revenue in less than six months from the first investment.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: The Turner MIINT (MBA Impact Investing Network & Training)
Description:
The Turner MIINT is co-produced by Bridges Impact Foundation and the Wharton ESG Initiative.

The MBA Impact Investing Network & Training (MIINT) is an experiential lab designed to give students at business and graduate schools a hands-on education in impact investing.

The Turner MIINT aims to:

Train the next generation of impact investors to “think like an impact investor” providing them with the opportunity to source, diligence, and present early stage impact investment ideas to an expert judging committee.

Build meaningful links between innovative mission-driven companies and leading business and graduate schools.

Create a vibrant network of students and practitioners active in the impact investing field.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: NUS Alumni Ventures (NAV)
Description:
We are a societal community created by NUS students and alumni that seeks to strengthen the NUS (National University of Singapore) and Southeast Asia startup community by fostering relationships and support amongst students, entrepreneurs and investors.

In our investment process, we are clear, direct, and agile. We apply the rigor necessary to identify and support exciting business opportunities.

See more details on the Ubiquity Ventures website at http://www.ubiquity.vc.

Through the channelling of resources and an active management model, Inversor seeks to leverage growth stories of companies that generate high social and environmental impact and economic profitability.
We believe that through impact investing, social and environmental challenges can be solved in sustainable and economically profitable business models. For us it is a hybrid between traditional philanthropy and private investment, where we seek a return on invested capital and in turn a positive social and environmental change.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Xplorico
Description:
If you are a startup, scaleup or even an entrepreneur with a great idea, we'd love to hear about it. Digital Transformation is all about people. Technology makes is possible but only people can make it happen. Therefore we look at people and the team first.

We add value by providing proactive business partnerships as active shareholders. As company builders we accompany our ventures throughout the entire developmental value chain, proactively building startups following a clear developmental roadmap throughout the Marmer stages. We are deeply involved in the development of our ventures compared to traditional accelerators or incubators enabling performance by being aware of all key success factors the venture needs to focus on. Our focus is predominantly within emerging technologies and the fields of Digital Transformation, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Big Data, Analytics & The Internet of Things.

Description:

We are crypto-minded investors who believe the evolution of our capital market systems lies in the underlying technology powering it: blockchain. We are not interested in creating an exclusive enclave for the rich and powerful. Instead, we look for opportunities to partner with developers, entrepreneurs, and leaders who share our vision to decentralize finance. Everyone earns a seat at the table in our ecosystem and has an equitable opportunity to participate in building upon a new financial system.

Newtribe Capital is a Dubai-based venture firm with investments in early-stage Blockchain Startups. We also provide advisory support to Blockchain Startups to ensure they have access to the right tools and network to ensure their success.

Please visit the website for more information: https://www.newtribe.capital/

Kineticos invests in companies focused on significant, unmet medical needs across contract services, manufacturing, equipment, and therapeutic companies. In addition to targeting these disease states and sectors, we look for life science companies utilizing disruptive technologies such as cell and gene therapy, gene editing, and mRNA/RNAi, all technologies dramatically changing how medicine is practiced.

For more information on Kineticos and its capabilities, please visit www.kineticos.com.

Wir verwandeln dein Expertenwissen und Netzwerk in ein skalierendes Geschäftsmodell.
Maximale Wirkung. Strategische Freiheit. Sichtbares Vermächtnis.
Als operativer Tech-Experte bringen wir Ideen, Kapital, Ressourcen und Talent zusammen, und schaffen die nächste Generation von Geschäftsmodellen.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Blue Impact
Description:
We believe that the climate and biodiversity crises are the most pressing challenges of our time, accelerating and worsening all other social and environmental issues. Our purpose is to support mission-driven entrepreneurs to realise their visions of a better planet for current and future generations. We believe that transformative ideas beat incremental ones and that the most valuable companies of our time will be solving our biggest problems.

Our current portfolio includes, among others, Tier Mobility (change mobility for good), Planetly (intelligent CO2 management), Klima (climate-conscious living), Fountain9 (AI tackling food waste), Infogrid (smart and energy-efficient buildings), Ahara (sustainable nutrition), Klim (regenerative farming) and 900 Care (refillable products preventing plastic waste).
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: StartupYard
Description: Established in 2011, StartupYard is Central and Eastern Europe’s leading tech accelerator, and the longest-running private accelerator in the region. With a focus on pushing the boundaries of technology, StartupYard has invested in and accelerated over 110 startups to date. StartupYard aims to help startups scale, secure further investment, and connect with a global network of partners and mentors. Alumni companies have raised over €100 million in follow-on investment, and 19 companies have successfully exited through acquisitions.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: OX1 Incubator
Description:
OX1 is Oxford’s first student-run entrepreneurship programme with the main aim of creating a truly connected community of student entrepreneurs to test their ideas. We seek to benefit from the diverse skills of students across Oxford to make innovative ideas a reality. We use business projects, structured workshops and mentoring as a vehicle to educate our participants about entrepreneurship and build strong connections with other universities.

When previously branded as Kickstart, we had branched out from our sister programme in London - Kickstart London, which has run successfully for 3 years with multiple startups entering accelerators and with some alumni joining EF (Entrepreneurs First) afterwards.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Mohr Davidow Ventures
Description: For 30 years the Mohr Davidow Ventures (MDV) team has invested in early stage technology-based startups that redefine or create large new markets. The firm partners with exceptional entrepreneurs to build companies where big data, applied analytics, and the reach and power of the web/mobile cloud can be leveraged to drive emerging opportunities in verticals ranging from social commerce to finance to online marketing to consumer-driven healthcare and cleantech IT. Leading companies funded by MDV include: Agile (ORCL); Aryaka Networks; Brocade; Coupa (NASDAQ: COUP); Genomatica; HealthTap; Infusionsoft; nLight; ONI Systems (CIEN); Proofpoint; Rally Software; Rocket Fuel; Rambus; Shutterfly; Ticketfly; Verinata Health (ILMN); and Visible Measures. The firm has $1.85 billion under management.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Keiretsu Capital
Description:
Keiretsu Capital was established with the express mission of fostering closer ties between Keiretsu Forum angels, the institutional investor community and Keiretsu Forum portfolio companies. Keiretsu Capital provides its investors access to proprietary deal flow by investing alongside the angels, providing additional capital to complete rounds and acting to source follow on capital where appropriate. Keiretsu Capital works to increase the value of investments undertaken by Keiretsu Forum members by assisting in the successful presentation of the portfolio companies to investors including syndicate partners, venture capitalists, corporate investors, and the public markets.

Keiretsu Capital aims to provide significant capital appreciation through investment in high quality emerging companies that have been funded by the world’s largest angel investor network, Keiretsu Forum, as well as other top tier angel groups. Comprised of serious investors, accomplished business leaders and serial entrepreneurs, our mission is to accelerate technology company success and pursue the high upside value potential in these dynamic investment opportunities while promoting the sharing of risk inherent in any early stage venture.

We recognizes the crucial and active role that experienced angel investors can play in nurturing emerging companies, and draws upon the significant knowledge and expertise of our investors, Keiretsu Forum members and Keiretsu Capital managers to actively guide and support portfolio companies. 

We seek opportunities in which a strong management team is in place to guide development of the core technology and the organization needed to realize the company’s market potential. Further, we will continue to seek Keiretsu Members that bring geographic diversity to our membership to enhance the probability of identifying investment opportunities and building a broad base of contacts and functional and technical expertise. www.keiretsucapital.com
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Teuto Seed Club
Description:
Wir sind eine Gemeinschaft von Business Angels aus Ostwestfalen-Lippe, die Startups mit Fachwissen, Netzwerk und Kapital unterstützt.

 Wir sind begeistert von Ideen, die das Potential haben, echte Innovationstreiber zu werden.

Wir sind Unternehmerinnen und Unternehmer, die mit ihrem Wissen und Netzwerk Ihren Beitrag zum regionalen Ökosystem leisten. 

Wir sind der Teuto Seed Club.

Ihr wollt euch bei unseren Angels vorstellen? Bitte bewerbt euch über Dealum: https://app.dealum.com/#/company/application/new/123249/apjmup5rlzx9u6k2xelodszs663lo3ic
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Mentors Fund
Description: Seed fund that invests in and mentors capital efficient startups looking to transform traditional industries.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Luma Group
Description:
Luma Group is a next-generation investment firm focused on the intersection of biology and computation. We back breakthrough science by investing in pioneering life sciences companies driving the future of medicine, biotechnology, and human health, powered by AI and advanced analytics, that has the potential to radically improve human health and longevity.

Our focus is on transformative technologies in biotech:
• Game changing therapies that can redefine treatment paradigms
• AI/ML-driven drug discovery platforms accelerating time from bench to bedside
• Disease detection and monitoring tools that personalize and optimize care
• Smart devices and diagnostics with advanced data capture and real-time analysis capabilities

Led by seasoned investors and biotech operators, Josh Fink, Dr. Themasap Khan, PhD, and Dr. Jamie Kasuboski, PhD, Luma Group brings together deep scientific expertise, strategic insight, and operational know-how. Our advisory network includes former Fortune 500 executives, biotech founders, policy leaders, and healthcare innovators who’ve built and scaled category-defining companies.

At Luma Group, we don’t just fund innovation; we partner with visionary founders to help shape it. We invest in companies with strong intellectual property and differentiated technology that are moving the needle in healthcare and have the potential to solve large, unmet medical needs. Our mission is to support science that matters, unlock untapped markets, and build lasting value for patients, partners, and the future of global health.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Galdamez Equity Partners
Description: Founded in Rockland County, New York, Galdamez Equity Partners is a privately held firm providing capital and strategic partnerships to businesses across all stages of growth. We have executed agreements with organizations ranging from early-stage ventures to enterprises with revenues in the millions, reflecting our commitment to fostering sustainable growth and long-term value creation.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Knowledgex.sa
Description: Knowledgex is dedicated to fueling the next wave of innovation, supporting the transition into a knowledge-based economy. It acts as the bridge between academia and real-world impact by utilizing open-innovation methodology to equip innovations with necessary ecosystem components to thrive in today's competitive landscape.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: RoundTable Healthcare Partners
Description: RoundTable Healthcare Partners, based in Lake Forest, IL, is an operating-oriented private equity firm focused exclusively on the healthcare industry. RoundTable partners with companies that can benefit from its extensive industry relationships and proven operating and transaction expertise. RoundTable has established a successful history of working with owner/founders, family companies, management teams, entrepreneurs and corporate partners who share a vision and believe in the value creation potential of its partnership model. RoundTable has raised $4.25 billion in committed capital, including six equity funds totaling $3.65 billion and three subordinated debt funds totaling $600 million.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Supernode Global
Description: Supernode Global is a venture capital firm investing in early-stage startups that are empowering humans to reach their full potential in the most important aspects of everyday lives - how we live, learn, create and connect. With a focus on the application layer and next generation platforms, Supernode Global backs ambitious founders building transformative businesses serving consumers and the commercial ecosystems that support them.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Sabr Capital
Description: Early-stage investment partner for Shariah Compliant ventures based in Pakistan, Bangladesh, Middle East and Africa.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: SevenGrowth
Description:
SevenGrowth is one of ProSiebenSat.1 Media SE’s investment vehicles and belongs to the Commerce & Ventures segment of the digital group. It takes a focus on established growth companies with proven business models, making strategic minority and majority acquisitions with a combination of cash and media investments.

Our team consists of dedicated specialists to support partnering companies in terms of tech, HR, PR, marketing, financial steering, strategy development, buy-and-build and a lot more fields of knowledge. We have long-time experience in developing consumer-oriented, digital businesses with a proven track record of successful ProSiebenSat.1 investments such as ParshipMeet Group, Zalando, About You and many more. With a founder-focused approach and operational expertise as well as entrepreneurial spirit SevenGrowth masters the playbook of different investment strategies such as support of organic growth, consolidation through buy & built as well as entries of international companies into German speaking markets. We are capable of leading investments or co-investing alongside strong VC or PE partners and offer companies highly flexible, tailor-made deal structures to perfectly match their strategic growth goals.

Within the current SevenGrowth portfolio of marktguru, wetter.com and the minority investment Urban Sports Club there is also an established set of majority shareholdings bundled in the NuCom Group, a joint company of ProSiebenSat.1 and General Atlantic. These consumer internet brands encompass market leaders such as flaconi, Stylight, Jochen Schweizer mydays Group, Verivox, SilverTours and Aroundhome.

In its Commerce & Ventures segment, ProSiebenSat.1 bundles all of the Group’s majority and minority investment areas. Besides SevenGrowth this also includes SevenVentures and SevenAccelerator.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: focal
Description:
We back technical, AI native builders at inception with speed and conviction. We invest up to $1M into your first round, often before you even incorporate.

High bandwidth support built for 0-1 velocity, plus access to 200+ top startup revenue leaders through The GTM Circle.

 pitch us at hello@focal.vc / visit us at focal.vc
 apply for our winter 2026 founder residency in Miami: focal.vc/residency
 listen to our podcast: https://focalpodcast.transistor.fm/
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: AgeTech Capital
Description:
The world is now experiencing the most profound demographic shift in its history. We already have more older adults than young people, and this growing aging population requires new solutions.

AgeTech Capital will deliver outsized financial returns and measurable societal impact by investing in exceptional entrepreneurs scaling disruptive tech solutions to extend health & wealthspan to match lifespan.

Our team has a world-class investing track record and dedicated value creation firepower, which will unlock maximum potential in each investment. We build companies and engage ecosystems and communities. We bring entrepreneurial spirit, deep operational experience and relentless motivation to improve the wellbeing of the older generation, boost their contribution and participation, and deliver greater societal cohesion. We have a culture of integrity, growth, rigor and inclusion.

“We feel very fortunate to build a firm and fund whose purpose is to promote healthier, wealthier, and more fulfilling aging by helping unlock the potential of transformative, entrepreneur-led innovation grounded in the belief that impact and financial returns can be fully aligned to create a virtuous cycle of positive outcomes.”
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: PINC
Description:
PINC stands for Paulig incubator. It is the venture arm of Paulig: a corporate venture capital unit that invests in early stage start-ups in and around the future of food.

The objective of PINC is to help Paulig renew itself and prosper as well as contribute to a tastier, healthier and more sustainable planet.

We aim for strategic, financial and societal impact: the magnitude of each varies with different start-ups in our portfolio.

We are an evergreen fund: we do not have a determined time for exit but always acts in the best joint interest of the start-up and investors.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Eos Ventures
Description:
Eos Ventures invests in companies across the value chain of insurance and related sectors. 

We seek experienced, exceptional founders who are at the forefront of innovation and are looking for a strategic capital partner to accelerate their vision.

Further, we partner with our strategic (re)insurer investors to accelerate their innovation objectives – shaping their strategy, providing insight to global best practice and leading early stage companies, identifying and vetting potential partnerships and creating opportunities for direct investment.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Pruven Capital
Description:
Pruven Capital is an independent venture and growth investing firm set up in partnership with 10 of the leading incumbents in the Insurance and Asset Management spaces, including Prudential Financial (our anchor), TIAA, Lincoln Financial, Willis Towers Watson, Mutual of Omaha, Nippon Life, Generali, Nuveen, and PGIM.

We are a multi-stage investment vehicle, investing from seed through growth with check sizes ranging from $5M - $30M. Our $300M Fund I closed in August 2020 and our $378M Fund II closed in August 2024. We focus on vertical software including Insurance, Financial Services, Real Estate / PropTech, Asset Management, & Digital Healthcare and horizontal software that enable the enterprise, including B2B Software and Enterprise IT.

Our key value add is helping our founders with the evergreen challenge they face around GTM. We help our companies win their first few reference customer relationships through commercial relationships with the businesses of our LPs, turbocharging their GTM trajectory in the process.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Maverick Ventures
Description: Maverick Ventures is an early-stage venture capital firm based in San Francisco. Building on more than two decades of investing through Maverick Capital, a global investment firm, we launched a dedicated venture fund in 2015. Through this integrated approach, we bring founders the depth and focus of an early-stage partner combined with the resources of a $10B+ multi-stage platform. We are a lean partnership that makes only a select number of investments each year, ensuring we can be true partners to the companies we back.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: blq invest
Description:
Building legacy quota
Our mission is to build legacy.
We want to create something lasting, long after we are gone.
We invest in early stage companies,
refining methodically with profitable companies as a result.

Blq, Building legacy quota, invest is a tech fund investing in early-stage tech companies in the valley of death, based in Stockholm, Sweden.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Beacon Venture Capital
Description: Founded in 2016, Beacon VC is a wholly-owned corporate venture capital fund of Kasikornbank PLC (SET: KBANK), a leading commercial bank in Thailand with highest mobile penetration and largest SME base. With initial fund of $30 million, Beacon VC focuses on strategic investments in early to growth-stage technology startups covering not only financial technology (fintech) but also consumer lifestyle and deep technology sectors such as artificial intelligence (AI) and enterprise IT. In 2018, Beacon VC expanded its fund size to $255 million.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Hikma Ventures
Description:
Founded in August 2015, Hikma Ventures operates as the corporate venture capital arm of Hikma Pharmaceuticals.

Our primary focus is to identify and invest in emerging companies in the digital health space, globally, that could enhance Hikma’s value proposition, reputation and market intelligence.

We will also consider investments in other healthcare related areas of current or future strategic interest to Hikma, including drug delivery technologies that have the potential to enhance Hikma's value chain and pipeline.

HV will act as an instrument of strategic growth in broadening Hikma’s offerings; it will allow Hikma to tap into opportunities in the growing digital healthspace.

HV will invest in companies where Hikma's expertise can accelerate revenue growth and enhance value creation by providing ventures with access to the resources of a multinational pharmaceutical company.

We will invest in companies at all stages of development, including start-ups. HV looks at global opportunities.
Our initial investment size is up to $5 million per round. 

We seek to actively partner with the management teams of portfolio companies to realize the potential of their products and technologies.

Hikma Ventures has invested and continues to invest in companies in the digital health space, globally, that have the potential to enhance ours value chain and pipeline.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: ScaleFund
Description:
ScaleFund, is a pan-European VC Fund investing from Seed to Series A with a focus on digital, deeptech and cleantech.

Our strategy is based on an active approach to early-stage investment, we build long term relationships with founders. We invest in those companies we would want to work with and... we do.

Our broad network and partnerships with BeAngels (+ 550 investors ), and other major funds come with privileged knowledge of funding candidates, a pool of expertise to draw from and follow-up / co-investment capacity.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Excubator
Description:
Excubator helps high quality startups, investors and  global organizations discover and engage with each other, combining platforms, processes and people.  Based in Bangalore, we help high-potential start-ups scale and get discovered by a network of customers, investors, industry partners, other entrepreneurs and influencers. 

Since 2013, Excubator has guided hundreds of startups on building products and viable business models, and scale.  And we have assisted large global enterprises, investors, Governments and incubation centers maintain a steady and high quality deal flow by presenting these startups to them.  

At the heart of Excubator is the Excube360 (http://www.excube360.com) environment-scan technology.  Our process for discovery and analysis of startups are reflected in our SAAS platform for investors and global enterprises - ExSeed (https://exseed.excube360.com).  Our people include those who have significant entrepreneurial experience, as well as the experience of guiding large global enterprises, successful start-up founders and academic institutions in setting up entrepreneurship practices.  

Excubator draws its inspiration from the Latin word "Excubo" - "I keep watch".
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: InsurTech Israel
Description:
InsurTech Israel stands at the forefront of the Israeli Insurtech landscape, pioneering innovation across four core domains. Our multifaceted approach encompasses:
1.	Investment: We fuel the growth of Israeli InsurTech startups by providing crucial investment backing.
2.	Accelerator program : Our highly successful Israeli Insurtech accelerator forms global partnerships, propelling Israeli startups to new heights.
3.	Business Development Hub: We are dedicated to fostering collaboration between Israeli startups, insurance companies, and venture capitalists from around the world.
4.	Global Outreach: Through our media division, we orchestrate global roadshows, delegations, and conferences, effectively spotlighting the Israeli InsurTech ecosystem. Our online magazine, InsurTech Israel News, is a valuable resource for those seeking insights into the Israeli Insurtech scene.
With our comprehensive array of activities, InsurTech Israel stands as the unrivaled leader and most active player within the Israeli Insurtech ecosystem. We are your gateway to the future of insurtech technology in Israel.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Serbian Entrepreneurs
Description: Serbian Entrepreneurs is an apolitical, non-governmental, non-profit organization started in September 2016 in Silicon Valley, by successful entrepreneurs of Serbian descent fostering the Serbian startup ecosystem around the globe through comprehensive access to skills, resources, and mentorship. We promote entrepreneurship through empowering the pay-it-forward activities of our members. Our 75 referral-based members are accomplished founders, investors, engineering leaders, and startup executives that together form a deeply vested network. Our monthly meetings provide a learning, operations, networking, and investment platform and take place in our founding city chapters: San Francisco and New York.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Consistent
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

TERTIUM est un fonds de capital-transmission et capital-développement qui intervient en région PACA.

TERTIUM Croissance s’inscrit sur le même modèle mais élargit son périmètre au Grand Sud Est de la France.

TERTIUM et TERTIUM Croissance sont des fonds d'entrepreneurs créés avec les dirigeants des plus grandes entreprises de la région. Leurs principaux sponsors sont la CEPAC, Crédit Mutuel ARKEA et Bpifrance.

TERTIUM accompagne les nouvelles étapes de la croissance des entreprises.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Scarcity Partners
Description:
Scarcity Partners is an independent investment firm seeking to make investments in middle-market asset managers. We invest in traditional asset managers as well as private equity, credit, real estate and infrastructure groups with a view to adding to the success of the founders. We are dedicated to pursuing long-term strategic partnerships with founders who are focused on building and growing multi generational firms.

Scarcity Partners brings together the domain expertise of its founders, who are all seasoned investors and business builders with demonstrable track records, with a view, through partnership and alignment, to help investment firms achieve their long-term business objectives faster and with more certainty.

As a partner, we aim to accelerate the growth of these firms by providing value-added capabilities across a range of areas which include: business strategy, business development, product development, capital formation, executive talent management (including succession), ESG advisory, operational advisory, diversity and inclusion, data sourcing and other relevant services.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Proprietary deal flow, creative structuring and board representation are KEY to our success.

Name: Intellivest Ventures & Accelerators Pvt Ltd
Description: Mentoring, Acceleration and Angel Investment in Startups in India

Name: Dream(dri)ven
Description:
At Dream(dri)ven, we empower entrepreneurial talent and companies to build a better world. We focus on innovations that drive humanity forward, creating real impact for people and the planet.  

Our approach connects entrepreneurial talent with companies, forming and organizing teams to tackle pressing challenges and unlock new potentials, all by leveraging cutting-edge technologies.  

The best entrepreneurs from our ecosystem, trained at Makers Home in Neumarkt, emerge from our programs ready to work on meaningful ventures. We partner exclusively with companies committed to delivering societal and environmental value, ensuring every collaboration contributes to a brighter future.

Name: Trium Limited
Description:
We focus on early-stage venture capital and digital transformation, and we believe in the power of technology to scale African businesses. We also recognize how difficult it is for startups to access the funding they need. That's why we are using our experience to invest in the technology startups that are innovating and reshaping our economy and transform larger corporates through technology.

Trium Limited is registered and regulated by the Securities and Exchange Commission, Nigeria.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Health Catalyst Capital (HCC)
Description: Health Catalyst Capital Management (HCC) invests in privately held healthcare technology and services businesses that aim to enhance care quality, access, and affordability. We leverage relationships with over 300 major healthcare and technology enterprises to identify sustainable investment themes and for mutual value creation. HCC drives value creation by helping portfolio company management teams integrate AI into their operations and build commercial relationships that accelerate growth, including hundreds of direct introductions by HCC to prospective customers and partners.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Secha Capital
Description: Secha Capital is investing execution capital in Africa’s latent dynamism, unlocked by the Operator–Investor model.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Delta-v Capital
Description:
Delta-v Capital (“Delta-v”) partners with visionary leaders of technology companies to accelerate their next phase of growth.  Founded in 2009, Delta-v has been providing flexible growth capital solutions to innovative companies in infrastructure software, cloud services, CxO software, and vertical software for more than a decade.  Delta-v currently manages over $1.1B in assets and maintains offices in Denver, CO and Dallas, TX.


*Delta-v Capital does not approve or endorse any third-party posts*
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: DASH Ventures
Description:
DASH Ventures (”DASH”) is one of the longest-standing venture capital firms in the MENA region, with a 13-year track record of venture investing to get early-stage tech startups off the ground. 

At the core of our ethos is a firm belief in human potential and the promise of a better future. We forge lasting legacies by partnering with founders who are obsessed with redefining paradigms and building companies that will transcend generations.

We are passionate about championing founder-led, purpose-driven businesses that act as catalysts for change. We partner with groundbreaking start-ups that shape the future and challenge the status quo.

We leverage a seasoned team and an evergreen structure that allows us the ultimate flexibility to support our entrepreneurs from seed and scale.

Reach out to us via info@dashventures.com with a pitch deck and a summary of your recent traction.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Act One Ventures
Description:
Act One Ventures invests in extraordinary founders transforming how modern businesses operate and scale in the AI economy. We’re early partners for those rearchitecting the systems behind modern enterprise — across infrastructure, automation, and decision-making.

Founded by two former entrepreneurs, we invest like operators because we’ve been there. That experience — across IPOs, hard pivots, and shutdowns — informs how we help teams navigate the decisions that matter early: pricing, GTM, capital strategy, team design. When that kind of support meets founders who’ve lived the problem, it sets the stage for outsized outcomes like AuditBoard, an early Act One-led Seed investment that became the largest VC-backed software exit in the U.S. in 2024 at $3.15 billion.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: HandsOn Global Management
Description: HGM manages several global buyout funds and has investments in business process services, big data mining, natural resources and waste to energy sectors. Using its proven investment approach from prior funds, the fund's typical strategy is to acquire diversified businesses led by experienced management teams, with strong fundamentals and significant performance improvement potential. Its business process services portfolio companies serve over 50% of the Fortune 100 companies and employ over 15,000 people in the US, Canada, Europe, India, China, Costa Rica, Mexico, and the Philippines.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Calibrate Ventures
Description: Calibrate Ventures is an early-stage venture capital firm that partners with technical  founders putting deep tech to work to transform major industries. Calibrate uses its expertise in AI, computer vision, machine learning and robotics to invest in technologies with applications in food, health, logistics, and manufacturing. The firm focuses its investments on seed rounds, supporting high-growth startups poised to shape a better future. Founded in 2017 and based in Pasadena, California, Calibrate invests across the United States.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Gusher
Description:
The Greatest Startup Engine. Ever.

Gusher is the simple, quick, and easy way to create and build a startup. Without the need for investors. Have a great idea? Need the expertise of others to help bring it to life?  Gusher it and start now!

Gusher helps Entrepreneurs create and launch startups using performance based equity. Everything from technology, media, and health to design, finance, and gaming.

If you have a great idea and need the expertise of others to help bring it to life, Gusher can help. Go to the Gusher site and get started.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Ka Enterprises
Description: Ka Enterprises is the investment entity of Deepika Padukone. We seek investment opportunities across different stages in high growth consumer and consumer-tech companies globally. Ka has invested in companies such as Epigamia, Furlenco, Blu Smart, Bellatrix, Playshifu, Atomberg, Front Row, Mokobara, Supertails, Nua among others.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Expara
Description:
Leading venture creation in Singapore since 2003, Expara takes pride in the ethos embodied in our logo – we help you turn risk into opportunities for success. Douglas Abrams, the company’s founder and CEO is a venture capitalist, entrepreneur, angel investor and educator who has been investing, venturing, and teaching in Singapore since 2000. 

We work alongside entrepreneurs and leaders in public and private organizations to create entrepreneurial successes through innovative high-tech high-growth ventures. We pride ourselves in delivering dedicated web tools, business strategy and technology innovation advisory, experiential training, deep industry expertise and networks to support the growth of the next Silicon Valley in Southeast Asia.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: AUA Private Equity Partners
Description:
AUA Private Equity Partners, LLC (“AUA Private Equity”), based in Florida, is an operationally-focused, lower middle-market private equity firm that makes equity investments in companies in the consumer products and services sectors, with a particular focus on family-owned businesses or companies benefiting from the growth of the U.S. Hispanic population.

The firm is led by Managing Partner Andy Unanue, shareholder and former Chief Operating Officer of Goya Foods, Inc., the largest and most successful Hispanic-owned food company in the United States (founded by the Unanue family). He is complemented by a cohesive team of investment professionals with significant institutional private equity experience.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Innovatech Latam
Description:
Somos un programa virtual financiado por el Fondo Internacional de Desarrollo Agrícola (FIDA) e implementado por Sparkassenstiftung Alemana. 

Buscamos ayudar a las personas con actividades productivas (principalmente de la agricultura) a recuperarse más rápido y con mayor resiliencia de los impactos del COVID. 

El objetivo es vincularlos con empresas de tecnología que les permitan tener un mejor acceso a los mercados y a servicios financieros adecuados a sus actividades económicas.

Los países beneficiados son: Bolivia, El Salvador, Guatemala, Haití, Honduras y México pero cualquier startup de América Latina con operaciones en alguno de estos países o con planes de expandirse puede participar. 

---

Innovatech est un programme virtuel promu par le Fonds International de Développement Agricole (FIDA) et Sparkassenstiftung d'Allemagne. 

Nous cherchons à aider les personnes ayant des activités productives (principalement dans l'agriculture) à se remettre plus rapidement, et de manière plus résiliente, des impacts du COVID. 

L'objectif est de les mettre en relation avec des entreprises technologiques qui leur permettront d'avoir un meilleur accès aux marchés et aux services financiers adaptés à leurs activités économiques.

Les pays bénéficiaires sont : Bolivie, El Salvador, Guatemala, Haïti, Honduras et Mexique, mais toute startup latino-américaine peut postuler tanq qu'elle a des activités dans l'un de ces pays ou ayant pour projet de s'y installer.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: ARIA
Description:

Name: MountTech Growth Fund - Kavachh
Description:
“The speed at which technology is advancing is unprecedented. … India, with its rich potential, must not just catch up but lead in shaping the technological landscape of tomorrow.” - Klaus Schwab, Founder and Executive Chairperson of the World Economic Forum

The growth narrative of India excites us! By 2030, its GDP will have doubled to US$7 trillion thanks to several structural reforms and policy-driven improvements as well as natural demographic advantages. 

The pathways for sustainable growth have already been laid by the rapid growth of the physical and digital infrastructure, the energy transition, the fast “financialization”, and a robust start-up eco-system.

Amid the evolving geopolitical order characterized by supply chain vulnerabilities and other conventional or unconventional strategic challenges, the nation must construct moats to safeguard its aspirations. India will, therefore, need to rapidly shift its dependence towards local innovation and indigenization of critical technologies, products, and services, particularly in areas of strategic and national importance.

A Category II AIF, MGF-Kavachh is committed to nurturing promising start-ups working at the intersection of innovation, deep technology, and India’s “Atmanirbhar” agenda while solving for its strategic needs across multiple sectors like Security, Defence & Aerospace, Digital Communications.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Description:
Supporting Early-Stage Startups from Armenia and Beyond to Scale Globally

STAN is a global network of angel investors with a mission to support early-stage technology startups from Armenia and beyond. While we actively scout startups in Armenia and Los Angeles, STAN welcomes innovative startups from anywhere in the world. STAN angels provide financial capital, network support and entrepreneurial support to help startups scale. While we focus on ecosystems in Armenia and Los Angeles, our reach spans across global startup communities. Currently, over 70% of STAN Angels are based in California, with 20% in Armenia and 10% in Europe.

STAN’s Chapter in Los Angeles

Our Los Angeles chapter is established in partnership with Triple S Ventures, a pre-seed to seed-stage VC firm. We welcome non-Armenian founders and angels to collaborate with the chapter. As part of our international growth, we plan to continue expanding by launching new chapters across key global startup hubs. Stay tuned for more updates!

STAN Expert Council

The STAN Expert Council is a community of domain experts who provide valuable insights, expertise, and global connections to STAN Angels and portfolio startups. This advisory body helps startups validate their technology and business models, while supporting STAN Angels with informed decision-making and domain-specific knowledge.

REACH UK is a real estate technology scale up program created by Second Century Ventures, a strategic technology investment fund backed by the National Association of Realtors. REACH UK is one of the five global programs in addition to the US, Australia and Canada.

Name: Jenson Ventures
Description:
Established in 2012, Jenson Funding Partners, trading as Jenson Ventures, is a premier venture capital firm in the UK, specialising in early-stage growth investment. 

Jenson’s focused, disciplined, and inclusive approach to doing business is the key driver of our ability to deliver attractive and sustainable value to all our stakeholders.

Leveraging longstanding experience and proven commercial instinct, Jenson rigorously applies its defined investment strategy. An investment strategy that not only yields financial value – but also creates meaningful opportunities that make a positive impact on the world today, tomorrow, and beyond.

Throughout our journey, we have launched numerous funds and are currently in our 12th year. We have invested over £26 million in more than 140 dynamic UK-based businesses, positioning them strategically at the crucial juncture of product or service launch, often nearing or surpassing revenue milestones. Our unwavering commitment extends far beyond the initial investment phase, evidenced by our steadfast support for 37 companies receiving follow-on funding rounds, all at premiums to their initial launch valuations, signifying our dedication to fostering sustainable growth. We are FCA authorised and our funds are open for investment.

https://jensonfundingpartners.com/investors/

Name: RISQ Réseau d'investissement social du Québec
Description:
Le Réseau d'investissement social du Québec (RISQ) est un fonds de capital de risque à but non lucratif dédié aux entreprises d’économie sociale. Ayant pour mission de rendre accessible un financement adapté à leur réalité, il vise à soutenir l’essor des entreprises collectives en phase de prédémarrage, démarrage, d’expansion ou de consolidation. Il appuie des projets novateurs, porteurs d’action sociale et structurants pour les communautés de toutes les régions du Québec.   

De l'idée à l'action, le RISQ offre des 5 outils financiers sous forme de prêts pour toutes les étapes de développement des entreprises d'économie sociale.

En soutenant l’émergence, la croissance et la consolidation des entreprises d’économie sociale, le RISQ est un fier partenaire de succès d’affaires reflétant les intérêts et les valeurs des collectivités du Québec.

Pour connaître tous les détails sur nos produits financiers: fonds-risq.qc.ca
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Our interest is in any business that is part of the India Consumption Story which can build Brand and Scale, as well as high Impact Sectors like Agriculture, Health Care, Micro Finance and Education.

Unilazer is promoted by First Generation Entrepreneur - Ronnie Screwvala. As a team, we have immense experience in building and scaling consumer and media businesses over the last three decades.

Name: Melbourne Angels Inc
Description:
Melbourne Angels is located in Melbourne Australia and we are experienced investors and entrepreneurs. We welcome qualified business professionals to join our organisation, and inquiries should be directed to our President Paul Baron, or our Vice-President Jillian Zsidy, or Group Manager, Duncan Jones.  

Our focus is providing Angel investments to young companies, including financial capital and business expertise to help them grow and be successful. 

Today we are 90+ professional members who actively invest in early stage businesses and small companies poised for growth. 

Our investors include an experienced team of business people able to evaluate interesting  and sometimes complex investment opportunities. We evaluate the merits of new and established businesses, and determine their likelihood for success in a competitive business world. 

Businesses who secure investment funding and business support from Melbourne Angels are recognised for their potential to succeed. These businesses have access to a vast range of business expertise, contacts and knowledge from Melbourne Angels.  

Our members vary in age and experience, but share a common passion for seeing businesses succeed.  Our team includes experienced CEOs and GMs, engineers, fund managers, lawyers, business owners, and directors of both public and private companies.  

We invest in both start-ups and established businesses.  Our preferred areas are Information Technology, Digital Media, Greentech, Medical Devices, Internet Enabled Businesses, and related high-tech businesses. However, we also invest in more traditional businesses where "game changing technology" can be applied.  

The core mission of Melbourne Angels is to provide its members with an enjoyable, supportive, collaborative team environment in which to share investments, knowledge and networks, all while contributing to the success of a new generation of entrepreneurs.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Spin Ventures
Description:
Loop 2: Spin Ventures’ Article 9 “Dark Green” Fund

Loop 2, Spin Ventures’ pre-seed to Series A climate-tech fund, targets transformative B2B solutions that drive decarbonization and circularity in the $30 trillion global consumer and retail industry. Leveraging Spin Ventures’ track record and the House of Circularity platform, the fund provides early access to breakthrough technologies, corporate pilot validation, and strategic partnerships for scalable impact.

Investment Focus:
	•	Material Science: Backing bio-based materials like Sparxell, BioFluff, and NFW to replace oil-derived inputs and reduce emissions.
	•	Recycling Technologies: Supporting innovators like ReFresh Global, turning post-consumer waste into valuable resources.
	•	SaaS Platforms: Companies like Illuminem provide environmental data solutions for regulatory compliance and resource efficiency.
	•	ReCommerce: Businesses like The Seam transform product lifecycles through repair, resale, and rental models.

Loop 2 delivers measurable outcomes, including lower emissions, extended product life, and optimized resource use, ensuring both environmental impact and financial returns.

The House of Circularity Advantage:
	•	Unmatched Deal Flow: Access to high-growth startups innovating in circularity.
	•	Pilot Validation: FT500 corporations test and scale startups’ solutions, accelerating adoption.
	•	Risk Mitigation: Data from pilots de-risks early-stage investments.

Market Growth & Liquidity Strategy:
	•	Bio-based Materials: $125B market by 2030 (15.3% CAGR)
	•	Recycling Technologies: $27B by 2027 (5% CAGR)
	•	ReCommerce: $289B by 2027 (16% CAGR)
	•	Liquidity Pathways: Follow-on Growth Fund (Loop 3), strategic exits via corporate M&A, and private equity partners.

Loop 2 capitalizes on regulation, corporate demand, and market expansion to lead the consumer sector’s decarbonization.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Kaiser Permanente Ventures

Kaiser Permanente Ventures makes investments in promising healthcare companies targeting areas of real need. We focus on solutions that provide clear value for patients, providers, healthcare delivery systems and our larger community.

Founded in 1998, Kaiser Permanente Ventures has developed into a national leader in strategic venture investing in healthcare.  In partnership with Kaiser Permanente and our limited partners, the KPV team has invested in and helped support over 70 companies, representing some of the most important innovations in healthcare delivery over this time period.   We’ve achieved these successes through deep engagement within KP and across our investment partners, leveraging the tremendous insights that come from those leading our healthcare systems and care delivery to identify the most pressing needs within healthcare and select the innovations that most effectively address those opportunities.

Together with our partners, KP and KPV represents:
22,000+ clinicians and over 180,000 healthcare employees
38+ acute care hospitals and over 600 other healthcare related facilities
Over $100 billion in annual operating revenue
Largest U.S. single comprehensive electronic medical record system
Leading evidence-based care delivery mode

Health Information Technology (Enterprise Solutions)
Digital Health

Diagnostics and Precision Medicine

Description:
The French Tech Acceleration team within BPI France’s Innovation Division is dedicated to investing in start-up support structures such as accelerators and startup studios. Our current strategy is to primarily focus on supporting start-up studios initiatives, especially those operating in deeptech sectors (Greentech, Medtech, Biotech, Cybersecurity, Quantum systems etc…) which require significant capital needs. Deeptech startup studios aim to create high potential start-up developing disruptive technologies mainly resulting from the research work of public laboratories. In addition, we also support other growth sectors like construction sector, industry 4.0 or e-health.
With 300M€ under management, we co-invest up to 50% of the rounds, with tickets from 1M€ to 10M€. The current portfolio is composed of 7 accelerators: 1Kubator, Axeleo, Héméra, Hook Invest, Schoolab, The Refiners and Wesprint, and 5 startup studios: Alacrité, Imagination Machine, MD Start II, Quatroccento and Technofounders.
*******
L’équipe French Tech Accélération (Direction Innovation de Bpifrance) a vocation d’investir dans des structures d’accélération de types accélérateurs ou startup studios. Notre stratégie actuelle consiste à investir davantage dans des startup studios, notamment ceux Deeptech (Greentech, Biotech, etc), où les besoins capitalistiques sont importants, mais aussi dans d’autres secteurs d’avenir comme l’industrie 4.0 ou bien la e-santé. Les start-up studios deeptech ont pour objectif de créer des jeunes pousses développant des innovations de rupture à fortes barrières technologiques, principalement issues des travaux de recherche des laboratoires publics. 
Avec 300M€ sous gestion, nous co-investisons à hauteur de maximum 50% des tours de table avec des tickets de 1M€ à 10M€. Portefeuille actuel : 1Kubator, Axeleo, Héméra, Hook Invest, Schoolab, The Refiners et WeSprint (7 accélérateurs) et Alacrité, Imagination Machine, MD Start 2, Quattrocento et Technofounders (5 studios)

Our investments generate financial returns for our investors while creating significant social impact. Our success is derived from working with ambitious management teams, providing supportive investment structures and specialist expertise that create high-growth agribusinesses.

Our investments strengthen agricultural sub-sectors and use smallholder farmer network to generate significant income for millions of families across East Africa. The byproduct of this growth is that it creates financial returns for us and our investors.

We administer portfolio management on behalf of Yield Uganda Investment Fund (Yield Fund), a €25 million impact agricultural Fund, the African Agricultural Capital Fund (AACF), a US$25 million agricultural fund, the African Seed Investment Fund (ASIF), a US$12 million seed fund and our original investment company, African Agricultural Capital Ltd (AAC), with US$ 9 million in equity subscriptions.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Mantaro Brands
Description: We are a group of e-commerce veterans who acquire innovative micro-brands and turn them into global, market-leading superstars.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: No Sleep Beverage
Description:
No Sleep Beverage is an alcohol beverage portfolio for emerging brands in the U.S. that are capturing culture through transcendent drinking experiences.
 
We embody a collective ethos of culture and community, and we’re dedicated to championing the entrepreneur while bringing culturally relevant alcohol beverage brands into the hands of consumers.
 
Our team of investors, builders, and operators is driven by a shared purpose: to help people discover culture and create community through transcendent beverages. We do this by partnering with alcohol beverage brands to take their visions from early-stage to high-growth, maximizing their chances for success.
 
As strategic venture partners with 360-degree value-added capabilities, we go beyond the traditional investor role. We work hand in hand with our beverage brands to de-risk the brand-building process by making data-driven decisions, creating portfolio synergies, incubating for growth, scaling exponentially, and optimizing exit values.
 
The seeds of No Sleep Beverage began over a decade ago, when founder and CEO Nick Papanicolaou launched his own brand and experienced the challenges of entrepreneurship in the alcohol beverage industry first-hand. Recognizing the pain points of emerging beverage brands, he knew there had to be a more effective approach.

In April 2023, Papanicolaou’s 14 years of experience in the alcohol beverage industry — including leading Pernod Ricard USA’s mergers and acquisitions team and launching New Brand Ventures for Pernod Ricard — culminated in the fundraising close of No Sleep Beverage. In its first seven months, No Sleep Beverage invested in and partnered with five brands: Barr Hill, Solento, Nine Banded Whiskey, Juliet, and Soley.
 
We believe every sip tells a story, and every moment represents an opportunity to elevate. If you have an emerging alcohol brand or are interested in partnering with us, we’d love to hear from you. Message us to get the conversation started. Eyes open!
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals
