Description:
Welcome to SevenGen Investment Partners, where we're on a mission to make impact mainstream. Based in Northwest Europe, we are an investment firm with a focus on creating a lasting impact for future generations. We believe in building stronger and more sustainable companies to accelerate positive change in the world.

Our Vision
We are firm believers that a sustainable world is achievable through individual choices. Our vision revolves around investing in sectors that have the highest positive lasting impact on climate. We prioritize companies with strong management teams, clear risk profiles, solid governance, and high impact and financial potential. Our goal is to make impactful solutions mainstream.

Our Approach
Our success is built on a rigorous investment approach supported by an extensive network. We identify and support impactful opportunities, catalyzing transformation in various sectors. Through supportive partnerships, strategic growth planning, and disciplined financial management, we add value to our portfolio.

Name: Victoria Capital Partners
Description:
Victoria Capital Partners LP (together with its affiliates, “Victoria Capital Partners” or the “Firm”) is an independent investment firm, wholly owned by its partners. Focused on private equity investments in South America, Victoria Capital Partners was established in 2007 as DLJ South American Partners and was renamed Victoria in 2011. To date, the Firm has raised capital commitments in excess of US$1.7 billion in aggregate. Victoria Capital Partners seeks significant capital appreciation through equity-related investments in leading, growth-oriented companies across its core markets in South America.

Victoria Capital Partners is managed by one of the most experienced private equity teams in South America, members of which have been working together for an average of more than 19 years and have helped pioneer private equity investing in the region beginning in 1995. Victoria Capital Partners’ regional approach provides its investors with broad diversification by country and emphasizes relative value in different cycles across the region. Victoria Capital Partners actively customizes and refines its strategy for each country according to the prevailing trends, opportunities and risks within the relevant market. The Firm generally targets control, joint-control, and significant minority positions with active board participation, value creation involvement and contractual governance tools.

The Firm is active in Argentina, Colombia, Chile, and Peru.

La team ACV

The team’s knowledge, African anchorage and extensive network allow Joliba Capital to have a deep understanding of doing business in Francophone West and Central Africa.

Joliba Capital’s team has deployed more than $500M across Africa, including more than $150M in Francophone West & Central Africa. Our diverse backgrounds combined with our local and international networks allow us to efficiently source proprietary transactions.

The team collectively values integrity, accountability, empathy and resilience. These values underpin our identity and our way of doing business.

Name: Genesis Ventures
Description:
Genesis Ventures is a Venture Capital that seeks to capitalize companies and innovative ventures with high growth potential, capable of satisfying needs and seizing market opportunities of different industries from Chile and other Latam countries to developed economies. In this context, in may 2017 we open branches in London and Miami that joined the current ones in Santiago and Lima.

We have a hands-on philosophy that lead to us to manage different Investment Funds focusing on projects and companies in early stages of development and growth, in multiple industries

We have developed an extensive portfolio of companies, many of which have gone on to become commercial successes at home and abroad. We are proud to have been part of the growth of more 10 up-and-coming companies, helping them to achieve commercial, operational, and financial goals and more.

You will see from the below selection of portfolio companies that we are drawn to passionate entrepreneurs pursuing big ideas. Today, our focus is on early-stage, software, specialty retail, non traditional exports, clean tech and services companies that can scale.

Name: Tercera
Description:
Tercera is a growth equity firm specializing in the $460B cloud professional services market. We invest in people, not products. We look for solid growth, not unicorns. We seek to support, not control. 

We're a team of invested operators who know first-hand what it takes to build and scale a successful cloud services business. Our goal is to identify the firms who will lead the next wave of cloud computing - the Third Wave - and provide them with the capital, counsel and connections to scale faster and take an outsized share of their market.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: ForthInvestment
Description:
Créée en 2015 en France (Colombes),  ForthInvestment dispose également d'une filiale au Burkina Faso (Ouagadougou). 
ForthInvestment est née de la volonté de ses 4 fondateurs de réunir au sein d’une même société, les compétences, les finances et le réseau nécessaires à l’accompagnement de tout projet d’entreprise, du stade de l’idée au stade des premières distributions de dividendes. 

Cette société permettrait alors de donner leurs chances aux startups et entreprise en marge du système bancaire traditionnel, tout en leur fournissant au quotidien des compétences, des expériences et des outils leur assurant une pérennité et une forte création de valeur. 

C'est ainsi que ForthInvestment:
- Identifie les porteurs de projets au sein de startups jeunes ou en phase de création, de PME en phase de consolidation, de diversification ou de restructuration
- Les assiste dans l'optimisation de leur projet (marché, stratégie, prévisions financières, équipe...)
- Finance-Cofinance le lancement du projet grâce à ses fonds propres et à la participation de ses partenaires financiers
- Accompagne au quotidien la société créée (ou restructurée), en lui mettant à disposition les compétences, l'expérience et les outils de sa direction et de son actionnariat.
- Réalise pendant les phases de sous-activité, des études de marchés afin d'améliorer sa connaissance des opportunités entrepreneuriales.

Nous investissons essentiellement dans deux types de structures : 
- Celles basées en Afrique ou dont l'activité s'y déroule
- Celle de la diaspora africaine de France et du Canada. 

Pour parfaire la mission qui est la sienne, ForthInvestment, consacre une partie de ses ressources à la quête de l'indépendance économique des populations locales à travers le financement d'organismes de micro-crédit et l'octroi de dons à des associations locales.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Hult Prize Peru
Description:
The Hult Prize is a start-up accelerator for social entrepreneurship which brings together the brightest college and university students from around the globe to solve the world’s most pressing issues.

The annual initiative is the world’s largest crowdsourcing platform for social good and one of the planet’s leading forces for good.

Participants compete by applying online or pitching at local events organized on campuses around the world. Hult Prize Ivy is an annual competition and conference that brings together the top minds from the eight Ivy League universities to solve the most pressing social issues of our time. 

Well-performing start-ups can move onto the regional finals, held in five international cities around the world, including: Boston, San Francisco, London, Dubai, Shanghai and on-line. Winners from each of these rounds then advance to the Hult Prize Accelerator for the summer before attending the global finals, which are hosted by former President Bill Clinton. Collectively, more than ten thousand students, representing more than 150 countries around the world participate in the Hult Prize and spend over 2 million man-hours on solving the world's most pressing issues.

Through crowdsourcing, training, mentorship and funding, the Hult Prize seeks to build and launch the next wave of social entrepreneurs.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Limerston Capital
Description:
Limerston Capital manages over £500m and has a proven, value-based and operationally focused investment strategy which is delivered by a dedicated team of 12 investing and operating professionals from its headquarters in London. 

The firm manages a concentrated portfolio of control investments in lower mid-market companies headquartered in or with significant operations in the UK, generally with an enterprise value between £50m - £175m. The concentrated portfolio allows Limerston Capital to dedicate significant resources to each portfolio company.

Limerston Capital focuses on six core sectors: Business Services, Consumer and Leisure, Education, Healthcare and Life Sciences, Industrial and Niche Manufacturing and Testing, Inspection and Certification.

Name: August Capital
Description:
August Capital was founded in 1995 by Dave Marquardt and John Johnston. Seasoned veterans of the venture capital industry, Marquardt and Johnston formed August Capital to invest in companies differentiated by technical innovation and entrepreneurial excellence. Today, August Capital's six partners -- Marquardt, Johnston, Andy Rappaport, David Hornik, Vivek Mehra and Howard Hartenbaum -- have more than a century of combined venture and operational experience. Together they manage $1.3 Billion and have invested in more than 75 companies across the technology spectrum.

From its inception, August Capital has funded an extraordinary group of entrepreneurs who have built significant, long-term value across the full range of information technologies. The companies that August Capital's partners have backed represent an aggregate market capitalization of well over $250 billion, generate in excess of $75 billion in annual revenue and employ a quarter of a billion people around the world. This success is a testament to the entrepreneurs themselves, as well as the fundamental technologies they have created. We are proud to have supported these entrepreneurs and their companies as they have grown and prospered.

Serendipity Capital, founded in late 2019, is a permanent capital vehicle. Our permanent capital structure allows us to invest for the long term. 

We are focused on disruptive thematics including AI and ML, climate and sustainability, quantum technologies and security. Financial institutions are at the forefront of adoption of these technologies. 

Our investment model focuses our attention on companies that we see have the potential to change the world by solving tomorrow's challenges today. We see the greatest investment growth opportunity in the solutions that will enhance and secure the critical technologies and infrastructure that society depends on.

Through the expertise within our ecosystem, we facilitate access to strategic partners, provide the capital and offer hands-on practical support to enable our leading portfolio companies to reach fruition.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

RC Capital is a growth equity firm building high-potential healthcare companies by leveraging the unique interplay of our segments of focus: medical device, healthcare services and healthcare IT. We are dedicated to investing on the right side of healthcare, growing companies that enable clinicians to improve the delivery of care and the experiences and outcomes for patients. We seek to be a business partner first and a capital provider second, investing significant human capital to leverage our domain expertise, a network of healthcare thought leaders and deep relationships with health systems assembled over our 30-year history. 

With more than $1 billion of capital raised and a consistent track record, the firm has established itself as a preferred source of growth capital.

Work with us and you’ll have partners who will help you navigate the never-ending complexities companies face while growing in the healthcare arena. We’ve been there and done it ourselves. Let’s build something great together.

Description:
Founded in 1997, Seaport Capital is a lower middle market buyout firm that invests in communication infrastructure and services, business and information services and media companies (the “Focus Sectors”). Seaport’s senior investment team has over 100 years of combined experience investing in the Focus Sectors and the team has worked collectively for over 15 years. Seaport typically invests $10 to $40 million of equity capital in companies generating EBITDA between $3 and $15 million, with the goal of maximizing the return on invested capital.

Seaport’s substantial industry expertise and investing experience enable it to develop successful strategies; its relationships and team help achieve them. Nearly all of Seaport’s platform investments have been owned by founders or entrepreneurs seeking a collaborative institutional partner to provide the financial and operational resources to grow their businesses and execute on a successful strategic plan.

Description:
Airbridge is an Amsterdam-based venture capital investor. Founded by successful entrepreneurs, we take a pragmatic and direct approach to investing in scalable European technology companies. 

Due to our entrepreneurial DNA, we don't rely on a one size fits all approach. Instead, we aim to actively support founders in scaling their business in ways that best fit their needs. 

Overall, Airbridge looks for companies with proven commercial traction, and invests between 1 and 5 million initially.

Currently, we are actively investing out of our second EUR 63mln fund, AEP II, which was launched at the start of 2023. Previously, we have exited companies to large strategics like GoDaddy and Cisco.

Name: Pureos Bioventures
Description:
Pureos Bioventures is a venture capital fund, which invests exclusively in private innovative drug development companies, with a special emphasis on the next generation of biological drugs and drug formats. The fund’s portfolio companies are built on scientific excellence to develop therapies across a broad indication spectrum including oncology, immunology, ophthalmology, rare diseases, and
neuroscience. Pureos has built a team with deep investment, operating and clinical expertise, that strives to impact patients’ lives by advancing innovative treatments for devastating diseases.

Name: Mangrove Equity Partners, LP
Description:
Mangrove Equity Partners, LP is a Tampa, Florida-based lower middle market private equity firm. Mangrove has 100+ years collective reputation as uncommonly effective, fair, flexible and honorable partners to company owners and managers. 

From our captive equity fund, we sponsor owners and operators in management buy-outs, management buy-ins, majority recapitalizations, family succession recaps, and industry consolidations. We have the financial resources and deal experience to efficiently close transactions. We also have substantial operating experience and a collaborative approach to build value at the companies with whom we partner. 

Mangrove is the ideal partner for liquidity and growth for companies in our target size range. 

EBITDA:
Mangrove invests in stable and profitable industrial and business services companies, niche manufacturers, and enthusiast-driven branded consumer businesses headquartered in the U.S. or Canada with $3-$10 million of pre-tax profits.

Revenues:
For new investments, rather than add-on acquisitions, Mangrove typically invests in companies with revenues from $10-$100 million.

Transaction Size:
Mangrove’s transactions are typically from $15-$75 million in deal size.

What makes Mangrove different is the full measure of what we bring to our portfolio partners: character, experience, ability, and the desire to help our portfolio partners prosper.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: JumpStart Ventures
Description: JumpStart Ventures is a top-performing Venture Investor with a 20-year legacy of investing. We empower innovation through multiple funds, managed collectively to provide a continuum of capital from Pre-seed, Seed to Series A and beyond. With more than $140M under management, we have invested in over 180 high-potential, early-stage startups throughout Ohio and the Midwest by providing critical resources, industry connections, and high-impact capital. We back bold start-ups who strive to generate exponential returns and transform the tech ecosystem, focusing in areas such as software, healthcare IT, biotechnology and more.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: CORNEXION
Description:
CorneXion ist ein seit 2019 bestehendes, mehrfach ausgezeichnetes und von der Europäischen Union gefördertes Innovationsnetzwerk, in dem sich über 330 Unternehmen und Partner aus Wirtschaft, Wissenschaft und Gesellschaft aktiv vernetzen.

Mit einem ganzheitlichen 360°-Ansatz begleitet CorneXion den Mittelstand beim erfolgreichen Innovationstransfer – unabhängig davon, ob es sich um Kleinunternehmen oder Weltmarktführer handelt.

Ein besonderer Schwerpunkt liegt auf der strategischen Vernetzung mittelständischer Unternehmen mit innovativen Start-ups, um neue Technologien, Geschäftsmodelle und Partnerschaften gezielt zusammenzubringen. Als regionaler Manager eines europäischen KI-Netzwerkes unterstützt CorneXion Unternehmen bei der gemeinsamen Entwicklung, Erprobung und praxisnahen Anwendung von Künstlicher Intelligenz. 

Um die Vernetzung zu fördern, haben wir u.a. das Projekt „CorneXion-Innovationsnetzwerk: Innovationen für KMUs im ländlichen Raum“ initiiert. Dieses Projekt wird durch Mittel des Europäischen Sozialfonds Plus / Europäischen Fonds für regionale Entwicklung gefördert. Ziel des Vorhabens: Stärkung der Innovationskraft&Wettbewerbsfähigkeit von KMUs im ländlichen Raum, Bündelung der regionalen Kräfte&Entwicklung von Vernetzungsstrukturen

Weitere Informationen unter: www.cornexion.com

Impressum https://cornexion.com/impressum 

Datenschutz https://cornexion.com/datenschutz

Name: FundRx
Description:
FundRx is a venture capital firm that invests in innovative healthcare and life sciences companies. 

Our community of Venture Partners – themselves physicians, scientists, and industry executives – contribute expertise, capital, and time to the FundRx portfolio, providing exceptional guidance to nurture growing companies. 

We take a scientific approach to investing, working with a distributed network of experts to peer-review prospective startups. We are a pioneer in venture capital technology, as our dedicated engineering organization enables advanced analytics and screening 

We are headquartered in New York City, with distributed teammates in Austin and SoCal.

This presents a unique moment to support exceptional Israeli startups, fueling Israel's next tech boom and delivering strong returns.

Flyover Capital is more than local capital. We are an early-stage venture capital firm investing in transformative technology companies across the Flyover states. We back exceptional and often underestimated founders based not on their location but on the transformative potential of what they are building. We firmly believe that the next generation of technology companies will emerge beyond the traditional coastal hubs, and our investments reflect this idea.
We serve as active partners from the initial investment through critical growth periods, helping portfolio companies scale with capital, connections, and steadfast commitment.
Flyover Capital takes pride in catalyzing regional innovation, assembling talent, and delivering strong returns while reshaping the narrative of what is possible in the Midwest and beyond.

Private Equity – Value Investing

Real Estate – Asset Investing

Technology Ventures – Growth Investing

The Doughty Hanson Technology Ventures team targets companies that develop sophisticated and proprietary technologies and focuses on three industry sectors: internet software, mobile communications and clean energy technology.

- Jointly Achieve Peak Performance

1. We say what we do and we Do what we say! 
2. We Underpromise and  Overdeliver! 
3. Our religion is win-win!
4.  We Simplify the complex. We do the right things right!

Name: GTR Ventures
Description:
GTR Ventures is the world’s first venture advisory, venture-building and investment platform specialised in trade and supply chain.

In exclusive partnership with Global Trade Review (GTR), the world’s leader in global trade and trade finance intelligence, publishing, news and events, GTR Ventures enjoys a presence in London and Singapore

GTR has a proprietary network of over 35,000 decision makers in trade finance, treasury and insurance, and organises events annually in over 15 cities across 6 continents, in venues such as Chicago, London, Paris, Cairo, Nairobi, Lagos, Cape Town, Dubai, Mumbai, Singapore, Stockholm, Geneva, and Istanbul

Leveraging this platform innovative companies in trade and trade finance who join GTR Ventures as our partners and portfolio are able to engage the world’s most powerful trade finance community, as well as investors who appreciate trade finance as an asset class.

Our vision: to pioneer investments in fintechs for trade and champion trade finance as an alternative asset class that has been shown to be low risk, stable, and liquid.

With this vision in mind, we have identified four investment areas of focus:

Transaction Banking
Trade Insurance & Risk Management
SME Finance & Supply Chain
Physical Trade

GTR Ventures engages key public and private sector stakeholders in the trade universe. Together we champion trade and trade finance as an asset class and mobilise private capital into trade. Trade just got smarter.

Name: U.S. Urology Partners
Description:
We work with urologists who have achieved success in their communities 
and want to continue providing exceptional patient care and service while maintaining their clinical independence.

Our goal is to partner with growth-oriented urology practices to provide management infrastructure and support services. Practices keep the local brand and identity that they have worked so hard to establish – often for decades.

How do practices benefit operationally?

Practices supported by U.S. Urology Partners receive the benefit of our state-of-the-art IT infrastructure. We also provide assistance in revenue cycle management, legal, reimbursement, marketing, financial reporting and other critical operational areas.

U.S. Urology Partners has access to sophisticated market intelligence, so we can help determine how to best support a practice’s growth strategy given local market dynamics and demographics, as well as healthcare industry trends.

What are the financial benefits?

Partnering with U.S. Urology Partners creates a partial liquidity event and also provides a practice with access to substantial capital for growth and expansion. As a shareholder in U.S. Urology Partners, the practice will benefit from our continued growth and success.

Our financial partner is General Atlantic, a leading global investor with more than four and a half decades of experience providing capital and strategic support for over 830 companies throughout its history. Established in 1980, General Atlantic continues to be a dedicated partner to visionary founders and investors seeking to build dynamic businesses and create long-term value.

We have found the professionals at General Atlantic to be strategic, smart and experienced in understanding and working with specialty physician practice groups. Their knowledge in this area is proving to be a major advantage for our affiliates.

Our business model is designed to tangibly support start-ups by discounting the development cost in lieu of equity. In doing so, all stakeholders have their skin in the game with shared focus on increasing the value of the venture. We empower entrepreneurs with enormous capacity to focus on scaling the venture by taking the Technology burden off the table.

Our Technology stack includes but not limited to AI, IoT & AR on top of mobile and web technologies.

We actively engage with entrepreneurs in shaping business models, valuations, capital rounds, validation partnerships and much more. In a true sense, Globewyze is your shareholder development partner with a vested interest in seeing the venture succeed.

Description:
Invest together with the Danube Angels partners in growth companies: Starting from an investment of just EUR 1,000, you can support innovative companies and their growth. Benefit from the increase in value of your company investment in the long term. 

Investments in interesting and innovative companies are usually reserved for major investors. We would like to change that. We are convinced that everyone with a minimum investment of EUR 1,000 should have the opportunity to invest in these companies in the same way. Danube Angels therefore negotiates each investment contract with the companies personally for our investor network in order to make investments possible for you that would otherwise not be available on the market in this form.

But Danube Angels are more than just a financing platform.
For Danube Angels, companies are just as important as investors. The success of our investors depends on the success of the companies. For this reason, we provide companies not only with investment capital, but also with the entire know-how of our team in the areas of business development, management consulting, legal advice and financing. Or as we say: ”Smart Money”.

Under the brand Business Wings, Danube Angels supports selected companies in the field of business development. Business Wings supports the market entry in Austria, Germany, Czech Republic and Slovakia. We help to segment new markets and address potential customers through our extensive network. The clearly formulated goal of any cooperation is to win customers in new markets and thereby generate additional, profitable sales!

Name: Ventura Capital
Description:
We offer investors opportunities others don’t, because we see deals others can’t.

We don’t follow trends, we follow the road less invested.

We spotted Spotify, we hailed Uber before the traffic, and enrolled with Coursera before it graduated. We see tomorrow’s unicorns today, and we consistently outperform the market.

Over 14 years, we’ve generated a 61% Realised IRR, a 3.5 times return with an average hold period of 3.5 years.

Through its global network and proven technology sector expertise, the firm is able to source and invest in the most elusive private companies which are on a clear trajectory to IPO.

To date, the firm has invested $800m in 23 technology companies including Upgrade, Spotify, Paytm, Delos, Xiaomi, Twitter, Nextdoor, Alibaba, Lookout Mobile Security, Auto1, Coursera, Uber and Lyft, realising industry-beating high returns and building a strong reputation for ‘picking winners’ on behalf of investors.

We believe the private equity experience and complementary skill sets of the Guardian team provide a unique combination of operating and finance capabilities resulting in certainty of execution and meaningful long-term value creation for its portfolio companies. 

Target Sectors:

Consumer | Niche Manufacturing | Specialty Business Services

Investment Criteria: 

Types of Investments: 
- Family-owned businesses or corporate divestiture 
- Control Investments
- LBOs, MBOs, Recaps

Geography: 
- United States or Canada (may have overseas operations)

Deal Solicitation Metrics:
- Revenue: $20 - $150 million 
- EBITDA: $4 - $20 million 
- Equity Check: $10 - $60 million

Company Attributes:
- High quality owner / operator
- Competitive advantage / defensible position 
- History of stability and profitability
- Margin improvement / organic growth opportunity
- Add-on growth strategy



Guardian Capital Partners is a Pennsylvania based investment advisor registered with the Securities and Exchange Commission under the Investment Advisers Act of 1940. Registration with the United States Securities and Exchange Commission does not imply a certain level of skill or training.

Based out of London and Austin, we've played a key part in growing companies.

Name: Seera Investment Bank
Description:
At Seera Investment Bank (formerly United International Bank) we seek to achieve the optimum financial yields in sound businesses and prudent investments. Based in the Kingdom of Bahrain, our operations span the entire GCC region and across global markets. With a paid up capital of over US$291 million, we work to proven processes, internationally recognized standards and are true to Shari’a principles, being licensed and regulated by the Central Bank of Bahrain (CBB).

The Bank was formed in 2006 by a number of prestigious financial, industrial and commercial partners mainly from the GCC region. The core premise for its creation was an ambition to create a distinguished, progressive, global Shari’a compliant investment bank with its principles firmly rooted in the region. 

Today, as the Bank is now established and continues a plan of growth and improvement, its long-term vision is to become not only one of the region's most prestigious investment banks, but also to attain greater recognition and respect within international financial markets.

Description:
Shoreline is a lower middle market private equity firm focused on actively partnering with leading management teams.  Shoreline follows a total stakeholder model, meaning success should be a "win-win" proposition for shareholders, employees, customers, vendors, and the communities within which the Firm's companies operate.  Shoreline professionals believe in honesty, incentive alignment, and creating bigger, better businesses without relying on financial engineering or cost cutting to generate returns.  With over $750 million of committed capital under management, Shoreline seeks to lead equity investments of up to $150 million per transaction in support of buyouts, recapitalizations, and corporate divestitures.  Targeted businesses have enterprise values ranging from $50 million to $350 million and EBITDA of $5 million to $25 million.

Name: Mensch Capital Partners
Description:
We do bold early-stage investing. Mensch Capital Partners is a venture capital firm focused on global Pre-Seed and Seed investments with an Israeli affiliation. 

Managed and backed by serial entrepreneurs, Mensch was founded by cybersecurity entrepreneur Boaz Shedletsky, and counts Assaf Rappaport, co-founder of unicorn Wiz, and Assaf Wand, founder of unicorn Hippo, as LPs and investment committee members.

We access powerhouse founders before they’re on the VC radar; enter on Day Zero as the first money in; and harness our expertise, connections, and firepower to help founders graduate to Seed and Series A rounds in neck-breaking speed.

Our ethos is becoming our founders’ force multiplier:

– Deep in the trenches with you from Day Zero. Think of us as your fairy co-founder: right there with you to ideate, validate, form your founding team, and land the biggest-name investors. 

– Game-changing connections. The people you have in your corner matter. We invite you into a dream network of investors, entrepreneurs and executives whose involvement can, and will, define your trajectory.

– We put our money where our mouth is. We write big Pre-Seed checks of up to $1M, and we make large Seed rounds happen by bringing the world’s leading VC investors to the table. 

– We don’t scare easily. We bullishly capitalize on teams and opportunities we believe in. Yes, we know early-stage can look messy. Yes, we know you don’t have traction yet. Yes, we know your team isn’t fully formed yet. No, we’ll never say: “Come back later."

– We’re Mensches – first, foremost, and always. /Men(t)SH/ a person of integrity and honor.

Learn more at www.menschvc.com, or say hi at mensch@menschvc.com.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Klint Ventures
Description:
Klint Ventures is a tech-focused investment company investing in growth phase companies. Founded and managed by experienced investors and entrepreneurs with a successful track record. 

We offer investment opportunities with high return potential and controlled risk.

The portfolio companies we invest in have highly scalable business models. Investments will primarily focus on Swedish companies, but may include investments in Norway, Denmark and Finland (Nordic countries) and wider Europe. The target companies must have a minimum potential of 8 times the investment within 5 years and they should be focused on disruptive solutions.

Far beyond a traditional board mandate, Klint Ventures supports the development of our portfolio companies by actively using our own resources as well as the resources available within our group; thus contributing to the development of the companies through our own operational activity.

When the time is right, the company plans to be listed on a Swiss stock exchange. We are audited regularly by one of the top-six global auditing firms.

Due to the bundling of different companies as well as the future stock market listing, Klint Ventures provides private- and institutional investors access to professionally analyzed high-potential companies with controlled risk.

Klint Ventures is an effective way to diversify most investment portfolios.

Find out more on https://www.klintventures.com
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Chamaeleon
Description:
TL;DR
======

Name: Streetlife Ventures
Description:
Cities have always been humanity’s greatest engines of opportunity, invention, and community. Home to more than half of humanity today, the world’s cities will add another 2.5 billion people by 2050. Cities are critical to our past, present, and future. 

The rapid growth of cities in an ever-warming world is the biggest challenge we face. From coastal floods in New York, to red skies in San Francisco, to unbearable heat waves in Mumbai, climate change is no longer theoretical. It’s now impacting our streets and neighborhoods, the places we call home.  

As we adapt to and mitigate the consequences of this changing reality, our cities are at the forefront of the race against climate change. Approximately 75% of the urban infrastructure of 2050 is yet to be built, representing a $5 trillion market opportunity. How we design our built environment - our buildings, transportation systems, waste management processes, food chains, power grids, and public spaces - will have a profound influence on the livability of our communities.

At Streetlife Ventures, we are the ultimate optimists and are excited to work with founders and policymakers to build the future we want to live in.

Rubicon enables companies to adapt to the changing requirements of their businesses as they grow and scale using a proven set of proprietary processes, best practices and a portfolio-wide engagement model called RTP Change Management.  Our goal is for our companies to reach their full potential by leveraging our toolkit and the benefit of the collective experiences of other Rubicon portfolio companies through a collaborative portfolio platform.

Rubicon focuses on control investments in platform enterprise software companies with annual recurring revenues between $15M – $75M and add-on enterprise software investments of all sizes. We target equity investments of $50M – $200M, invest in the same class of equity as management, and use conservative capital structures to create alignment and provide businesses with the flexibility to reach their growth potential.

Name: Awethu Project Holdings
Description:
The Awethu Project, now Awethu Project Holdings (APH), was started in 2009 in the belief that there is exceptional, but under-developed entrepreneurial potential in emerging economies, and that with the right support and investment this talent can create profound commercial and social value. 

In 2010 the Awethu Project Incubator (API) received seed capital from Discovery Holdings, and over the next 5 years went on to raise over R100M, primarily from the South African Government’s Jobs Fund. This funding was used to incubate over 2 000 micro entrepreneurs who have created over 3 000 jobs, making API’s high-touch incubation programme the largest in Africa, and one of South Africa’s lowest-cost and most scalable job creation models. API’s “next generation” incubator, currently in pilot phase, will leverage technology and innovation to make our incubation programme available all over the world.

While working with thousands of entrepreneurs in API, our team realised that too many lack access to patient equity capital. This insight spawned what is now Awethu Project Capital (APC), our dedicated SME equity fund management business. APC started in 2014 by partnering with the Small Enterprise Finance Agency (sefa) to form the sefa Awethu Youth Fund, a pioneering SME venture fund for emerging black entrepreneurs. From there, APC developed an innovative supplier development and transformation model, which, since 2016, has been invested in by some of South Africa’s top corporates, including SAB/ AB InBev, Imperial Logistics, and Impala Platinum. APC now manages R350M and 30 SME equity investments, and we aim to scale and to contribute to true, rapid transformation of the South African economy.

Name: aws Gründungsfonds
Description:
Venture Capital for High-Potential Start-ups | Partnering with Visionary Start-ups for Sustainable Growth
At aws Gründungsfonds, we are committed to discovering and investing in innovative Austrian start-ups with the potential to shape the future, particularly in the high-tech sector. As a venture capital firm, our mission is to identify groundbreaking ideas and technologies, providing the necessary capital and strategic support to help these start-ups thrive.
We specialize in early-stage (Seed) and growth-phase (Series A) investments, acting as a long-term partner for founders who are ready to take their ventures to the next level. Our investment approach is not just about providing funding—it's about adding real value through hands-on collaboration and expert guidance.
Our deep industry knowledge and extensive network enable us to support start-ups in navigating the complexities of scaling their business. We believe in the power of co-investments and work closely with other investors to maximize the impact of our contributions.
At aws Gründungsfonds, we are more than investors—we are dedicated partners in your journey, committed to driving innovation and fostering sustainable success in the Austrian start-up ecosystem.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Korea Investment Partners
Description:
Korea Investment Partners (KIP) is a leading venture capital and private equity firm in Korea and a wholly owned subsidiary of Korea Investment Holdings (KIH), one of the largest financial groups in the country. As the venture capital and private equity investment arm of KIH, KIP has built a strong track record across multiple market cycles.

With over 39 years of investment experience, KIP currently manages approximately 69 funds with total assets under management of about US$4 billion. Since 2001, the firm has successfully liquidated 25 funds, achieving an average multiple of 2.0x and an IRR of 14.7%, demonstrating consistent and disciplined investment performance.

KIP operates an extensive global network with offices in China (Beijing, Shanghai), Singapore, and San Francisco(USA). Leveraging its strong domestic foundation and global presence, KIP continues to expand as a globally active venture capital firm with deep local insights and cross-border investment capabilities.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Its activity consists in driving forward the development of investment projects undertaken by Asturian companies (either newly created or already established), or companies that are going to set up in the region, by means of the following instruments:
- Participation in the share capital: temporary and minority participation in the share capital of new corporate initiatives and/or the expansion of already existing projects.
- Financial support for corporate projects: by conceding principally subordinated loans to innovative, and in particular technology-based projects, e, as well as for company internationalisation.

Name: Gardner Standard LLC
Description:
Gardner Standard is a family-owned private equity firm with a strong heritage of investing in complex and challenging situations. We specialize in transactions where legal, financial, or operational challenges deter other buyers—turning obstacles into opportunities through hands-on execution and long-term value creation.

INVESTMENT CRITERIA
We seek investment opportunities with revenues up to $150 million, with no minimum requirement for add-on acquisitions. While we have a strong preference for industries such as aerospace & defense, manufacturing, and engineered products, we remain industry-agnostic for the right opportunity. 

TRANSACTION TYPES
We focus on complex transactions, including special situations involving operational or financial distress, restructurings, and turnarounds. We have extensive experience in businesses with legal challenges, such as on-going litigation, environmental concerns, asbestos exposure, product liability, recalls, and warranty claims. Additionally, we actively pursue corporate carve-outs, acquiring non-core or orphaned business units that can benefit from our operational expertise. 

At Gardner Standard, we excel where others shy away. If you come across a complex transaction that requires speed and a certainty of closing, let’s talk.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: RVS
Description:

We act as professional venture builders and investors, co-investing with corporates to syndicate the investment and sharing in the risk and reward. We're not consultants or a development agency, so we never charge fees but act as true partners.

Name: VentureNursery
Description:
Venture Nursery (VN) is India’s first angel-backed start-up accelerator.  It was established in March 2012 by two like-minded Angel Investors in Residence -Shravan Shroff, Founder and Former MD, Fame India Limited and Ravi Kiran, former CEO-South East & South Asia, Starcom MediaVest Group and Co-Founder, Friends of Ambition. 

Based on the belief that the angel ecosystem must focus primarily on maximising the success potential of start-ups, VentureNursery undertakes an intensive and immersive coaching and mentoring role in the chosen start-ups and helps each with end-to-end infrastructural and learning support.  

VentureNursery intends to conduct a minimum of two boot camps in a year in Mumbai and targets to accommodate up to three start-ups in each program. At the end of each boot camp, each successfully graduating start-up is evaluated for investment by a group of 25 angel investors.

For more information  write to us on poleposition@venturenursery.com or visit our website www.venturenursery.com.

Description:
Our Mission at Silicon Roundabout Ventures (SRV) is to back entrepreneurs who are to shape the next-generation of technology and to provide superior returns to our investors through our Venture Capital funds.

We do this by capturing the explosive growth of early stage Deep Tech startups in the UK.

Artificial Intelligence, Internet of Things, Distributed Ledgers and Cybersecurity are among our key investment themes.

SRV in a Nutshell:
* Founded in 2011, our monthly Silicon Roundabout meetup is now the largest tech community in Europe with 14,000+ tech startup entrepreneurs, engineers and founders
* In 2019 alone our network made us reach 5000+ startups, of which we
reviewed 1000+ and selected to present and/or work with about 100
* We also work with several tech incubators, accelerators, universities
and established corporate sponsors across Europe, including Oracle for Startups, Oxford University Innovation Centre, Cambridge University Accelerator, DataPitch, Founders Institute, Google for Startups, etc.
* Proprietary networks that give us access to a huge selection of Deep Tech talent, software developers, corporate decision makers and companies that are to shape the 4th Industrial Revolution
* Notable Seed / Series A startups selected to present at Silicon Roundabout in recent years: Humanising Autonomy, Medopad, Oxbotica, Fluidly, BlueVision Labs, VividQ, Monzo, Crypto Quantique among others.

Name: The Techshop SGR
Description:
The Techshop è una nuova società di gestione del risparmio dedicata al Venture Capital. Il primo Fondo investirà in innovazioni radicali di tipo B2B, digitali e nello stadio early stage.

The Techshop nasce dal desiderio di amplificare il nostro contributo allo sviluppo tecnologico e imprenditoriale italiano.

Negli ultimi 10 anni abbiamo osservato come le nuove aziende digitali siano diventate i principali vettori di innovazione nel tessuto industriale delle nazioni guida e quanto sia cruciale lo stadio “Early Stage” nel percorso di accelerazione delle startup. Questo ruolo del digitale si è rafforzato durante la crisi economica e sociale causata dalla pandemia e sarà determinante per la ripartenza del sistema produttivo globale.

La nostra ricetta si basa su un’accurata selezione di team di talento, a cui offriremo capitale in quantità crescenti e gli strumenti della nostra “bottega del tech”: mentorship, supporto manageriale e accesso a un vasto pool di esperti.

Nel Digital il successo di una startup è determinato dalla qualità e dalla tenacia dei Founders: il team è il prodotto. Puntiamo a stimolarne il potenziale, sfidandoli a pensare in grande e su scala globale.

IL NOSTRO CREDO

#VISION
Crediamo nella creazione di valore attraverso l’investimento di active money nel talento e nel know-how tecnico

#MISSION
Puntiamo a generare rendimenti finanziari allineati ai migliori fondi europei di Venture Capital

#VALORI
Siamo guidati da Passione, Formazione continua, Rigore, Spirito di squadra e Rispetto delle persone

#ECOSISTEMA
Vogliamo che le startup ci scelgano e che i co-investitori ci seguano: «We won’t let them down!»

#INCLUSIONE
Abbiamo già fatto vari investimenti in startup co-fondate da donne e vogliamo continuare su questa strada

Con l’obiettivo che i fattori ambientali, sociali e di governance (ESG) siano integrati nei nostri processi

Name: MITO Technology
Description: MITO Technology is the advisor to venture capital funds aiming to drive radical transformation in society toward a more sustainable future. We started as a platform to support public-to-private technology transfer, and over the last 15 years we have become an active player in the European innovation ecosystem — collaborating with multinationals, SMEs, universities, research centers, startups, spin-offs, banks, VC and PE funds. With a multidisciplinary team combining expertise in deep tech, technology transfer, innovation finance, and IP management, our model has evolved over time. In 2018, we sponsored and began advising Progress Tech Transfer (now MITO Tech Transfer) — the first VC fund in Italy entirely focused on sustainability technologies. Building on the success of the first, in 2024 we launched a more ambitious initiative: MITO Tech Ventures, one of the first early-stage climate tech funds in Europe compliant with Article 9 of the SFDR regulation. Both funds — MITO Tech Transfer and MITO Tech Ventures — are RAIFs (Reserved Alternative Investment Funds) under the laws of the Grand Duchy of Luxembourg, with an external AIFM.

Terra was formed by its founders on three key pillars: legacy, accountability, and creativity, with the mission to apply these values to scale carbon markets.
We believe there is a clear market need for capital partners who can apply proven forms of alternative finance from other industries parallels to carbon markets and the carbon project development industry.

Terra is a Jersey-based entity (Terra LLP) owned by its founders and Bain Capital Partnership Strategies. For more information, click the button to see our website.

Sector-agnostic, we apply rigorous investment criteria to identify businesses with a profitable track record and the potential to grow strongly with our support.

Flexibility and patience are the bedrock of our philosophy. We think long-term, supporting our portfolio companies and partnering with management teams throughout our ownership to generate lasting, sustainable value. Together, we look to deliver strong capital growth and a running yield throughout the business cycle.

Tom Leader, Head of Caledonia Private Capital

Description:
GreyMatter is a venture capital firm created to support bold founders building the future of mental health and emotional wellness. We believe innovative approaches to mental wellbeing have the power to not only reshape healthcare, but to touch every part of our lives, improving the way we live, work, learn, relate to one another. 

Our team has decades of experience investing in, building, and advising companies at the intersection of mental health and technology. We have built a network of advisors which includes many of the most successful behavioral health company founders alongside world-class clinicians, researchers, technologists, policy advocates, and healthcare executives: this includes the former head of the National Institute of Mental Health, the former CEO of Optum Behavioral Health, and the congressman who co-authored the Mental Health Parity Act.

Through our community of luminary advisors, existing mental health founders, and scientific experts, we help founders identify the most promising areas of research and technological opportunity, provide access to playbooks and data to shape their strategy, support with critical hires, help close deals with customers, and provide specialized guidance and capital along the way. Our platform serves all stakeholders in the innovation space including builders, payors, and funders.

To advance this goal, we are backing the most talented founders in the earliest stages of their journeys in building category defining companies that tackle mental and behavioral health challenges. Our goal is to bring together entrepreneurs, academics, scientists, policy makers and capital partners to collectively drive innovation in our space.

If you are passionate about changing mental health, we are excited to hear from you.

Our Investment Scope:
Our investments typically range from 1 to 5 million euro for minority stakes, building long-term partnerships, ultimately aiming for external exits, not acquisitions.

We invest in series A, B and C rounds of companies offering relevant products for KPN’s B2C and B2B customers or companies working on an important technology in the Telco sector.

- Digital Health
- Converged Hybrid Working
- Data Exchanges
- Mission and business critical services
- Data & AI

B2C & B2B2C:
- Cyber Security

Technology trends & Digital Enterprise:

Name: Epicure Investissement
Description:
Epicure Investissement est une société d’investissement dédiée à l’Hôtellerie haut de gamme, à la Gastronomie et aux Loisirs.Nous visons des produits d’exception qui se caractérisent par leur singularité et leur dimension culturelle.

Nos associés ont créé et dirigé Nova Consulting, cabinet leader en France du conseil dédié au Tourisme (hôtellerie et gastronomie) et aux Loisirs (culture et sport). En particulier, ils ont développé un solide réseau de partenariats avec les grands chefs étoilés, les collectivités territoriales et la globalité de l’écosystème du Tourisme (développeurs, exploitants et investisseurs). Nous bénéficions ainsi d’une expertise de premier plan pour la création, la reconversion et l’exploitation d’hôtels et de restaurants et d’un flux de grande qualité de projets « propriétaires ».

Epicure Investissement est en pleine phase de développement et a l’ambition de devenir un des principaux fonds d’investissement indépendants en France spécialisé sur les domaines de l’Hôtellerie et de la Gastronomie haut de gamme autour d’une quinzaine d’établissements dans les cinq prochaines années. 

En 2018, Epicure Investissement a concrétisé sa première opération autour d’un projet ambitieux à Sète, composé d’un restaurant gastronomique :The Marcel, 1 étoile au guide Michelin avec le chef Denis Martin, d'un hôtel et 2 offres de restauration complémentaire 

Depuis Mai 2022, Epicure Investissement a ouvert 3 établissements au sein de la Cité internationale de la gastronomie et du vin : Les tables et la Cave de la Cité 

Depuis quelques mois , le groupe est également propriétaire d'établissements au coeur des Halle de Lyon Paul Bocuse, le Resto Halle et Les Halles de Toulouse, Le Louchebem.

Epicure Investissement est dirigé par une équipe très expérimentée de trois associés avec plus de 20 ans d’expérience chacun : Julien Bernard et Garance Schelcher, fondateurs de Nova Consulting, et Laurent Roquette, un professionnel du Private Equity.

Since its launch in 2019, FTTF has invested in 39 start-ups pursuing innovative business models based on a wide range of Fraunhofer technologies.

FTTF is backed by the Fraunhofer Gesellschaft and the EIF, wrto EIF in particular by (i) InnovFin Equity, with the financial backing of the European Union from Horizon 2020 financial instruments, (ii) the European Fund for Strategic Investment (“EFSI”), established pursuant to the Investment Plan for Europe launched and established to help support the financing and implementation of productive investments in the European Union and to provide improved access to finance, (iii) the European Recovery Program - EIF Facility (“ERP-EIF Facility”) and (iv) LfA Gesellschaft für Vermögensverwaltung mbH – EiF Facility (“LfA-EIF Facility”).

Name: Direct Capital
Description:
Direct Capital is New Zealand's leading private company investor. Since 1994, we have been at the forefront of developing New Zealand’s private equity industry. We are currently investing Direct Capital VII, a NZ$525 million fund which commenced in April 2025.

Direct Capital has a successful history of investing alongside owners and managers into large, profitable, privately owned, New Zealand and Australian businesses, often when they are considering one or more of the following:

-	succession planning - including a sale to the management team;
-	funding for the next phase of growth;
-	the acquisition of a complementary business; 
-	trans-Tasman expansion; or
-	preparing for an eventual IPO.

We typically invest between $20m - $80m of equity into companies and are comfortable with both minority and majority shareholdings.

These are some of the household names we've invested in: Wet & Forget, Active Refrigeration, Mondiale VGL, Fusion Speciality Insurance, Caci, TR Group, Beca, Qestral Corporation, Exact Radiology, Marvel Packers, AS Colour, Perpetual Guardian, Hiway Stabilisers, Scales Corporation, Debitsuccess, Bayleys Real Estate, Energyworks, Cavalier Wool Scours, PF Olsen, New Zealand King Salmon, Fishpond, GoBus, NZ Pharmaceuticals, Rodd & Gunn, Stratex Group, Max Fashions, Express Logistics, Ryman Healthcare, Nobilo Wines, Airwork, EFTPOS NZ, Tasman Building Products and EziBuy.

Our New Zealand investor base includes sovereign wealth funds, pension funds, community trusts, iwi groups, religious trusts and other institutional investors. We are a signatory to the United Nations Principles of Responsible Investment (UNPRI).

Direct Capital was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Auckland, New Zealand.

Name: Rubicon Centre
Description:
The Rubicon Centre is Ireland’s premier Business Incubation Centre and is located on campus in MTU Cork. Home to 50 knowledge based start-up companies, the Centre is jointly financed by MTU Cork & Enterprise Ireland.  Clients based at the Rubicon are at different stages of development, from concept stage to completing their first customer orders and many are already trading on the International Market.

As an innovation centre for entrepreneurs, the Rubicon Centre is here to help, encourage & give support to people who present a unique idea or highlight a market niche which they believe they can target. 

In July 2010 the Rubicon increased its Capacity by an additional 910m2, which included new laboratory spaces.  This extension brings the total incubation footprint to over 3,000m2. The Centre continues to invest in its IT Infrastructure to afford Companies access to their customers and partners world-wide. Clients enjoy access to a full development path and several have participated in one of the many Programmes on offer in the Centre, including New Frontiers, Exxcel, and Student INC

Companies based here will use the R&D capabilities of MTU Cork and the commercial supports and help from agencies based in the South-West Region of Ireland.. In essence, the Centre’s role as an incubator is to assist the formation and growth of early stage, knowledge intensive businesses.

Name: Alter Capital
Description:
Alter Capital es una sociedad gestora de fondos de capital riesgo, independiente y especializada en el “lower middle market” Español.

Fundada en el año 2000, estamos especializados en la gestión de Fondos Regionales para los que se cuenta con un equipo con dilatada experiencia en Private Equity. Somos la única gestora en el low market español, con tickets de inversión entre 1 – 4 millones de euros. Creemos que en esta fase de desarrollo de las compañías es donde existen mayores posibilidades de aportar valor a las compañías en las que invertimos. Aportamos nuestro conocimiento y experiencia en esta etapa de fuerte crecimiento empresarial.

Consideramos que, en estos importes de inversión bajos, se pueden generar mayores rentabilidades. Ya que, hay mayor número de empresas objetivos y no hay procesos competitivos, son procesos propietarios que permiten un mejor análisis y negociación. Nuestro modelo de negocio se basa en invertir en compañías con una trayectoria probada, que cuenten con ventajas competitivas sostenibles y un plan de negocio ambicioso. Uno de los factores críticos, para decidirnos a invertir, es que el proyecto pueda contar con un equipo gestor profesionalizado y altamente motivado.

Name: Plug and Play China
Description:
Plug and Play, an ultimate innovation platform. We connect the best technology startups and the world’s largest corporations.

Currently, Plug and Play China has 3 regional innovation hubs in Beijing, Shanghai, and Shenzhen. Also, we have industrial innovation centers in Wuhan, Wuxi, and Nanjing where we work with leading corporations to promote urban industrial innovation. Name: Rosewood Private Investments
Description:
Rosewood Private Investments is the private equity arm of The Rosewood Corporation, a family-backed yet institutional firm with diverse worldwide operations and investments. Rosewood is wholly owned by the Caroline Hunt Trust Estate, which was established in 1935 by H.L. Hunt and built upon over generations by developing and acquiring businesses that are leaders in their respective industries.

Our structure and history enable us to be a unique resource and flexible investment partner. As an evergreen entity, we are continually seeking to invest capital in companies that share our commitment to entrepreneurism, integrity, and sound business principles.

We seek to make control investments across a broad set of industries in privately held businesses with the following characteristics:

-U.S. based with $20mm - $150mm in revenue
-EBITDA $5mm - $20mm
-Ability to deploy $10mm -$50mm in equity per investment

THE ROSEWOOD DIFFERENCE
• Rosewood is an evergreen entity, and is therefore not bound by arbitrary timetables imposed by third parties.
• Rosewood possesses an underlying philosophy that value is created over the long-term and as such is committed to making ongoing capital investments to help our companies reach their true potential.
• Rosewood utilizes conservative capital structures that allow companies to focus on the prudent reinvestment of profits for growth.
• Rosewood partners with existing management to provide the resources, incentives, and opportunities to achieve a market-leading growth plan.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Invertimos en empresas con un modelo de negocio sólido y siempre trabajamos en estrecha colaboración con los equipos directivos a quienes ofrecemos, además de capital, más de 50 años de experiencia conjunta de inversión en diversos sectores. 

Dotamos de autonomía a los equipos directivos, apoyándoles en los aspectos más estratégicos, financieros y transaccionales de la implementación del plan de negocio conjuntamente acordado a nuestra entrada.

Nuestro compromiso reside en unir nuestra experiencia con la visión empresarial de nuestros socios, en un proyecto común marcado por la ilusión, para juntos poder forjar un futuro sólido y próspero.

Además, en GPF Partners adoptamos una estrategia y práctica para incorporar factores ambientales, sociales y de gobierno corporativo (ASG) en las decisiones de inversión y el ejercicio activo de la propiedad.

We are partners,

With a presence across key international markets, we bring together capital, expertise, and strategic networks to help companies scale and thrive in an increasingly interconnected world. Let’s build the future together.

The fund's strategy is unique: we don't just invest capital; we actively de-risk the "Valley of Death" by building the crucial scale-up infrastructure, leveraging the Houston industrial ecosystem, and operating under the guidance of Veronica Breckenridge, whose prior venture portfolio delivered over 40 unicorns and multiple public exits, ensuring an unparalleled combination of deal sourcing, strategic de-risking, and proven return generation for our Limited Partners.

SDC’s adaptable investment strategies include control and growth equity, preferred equity and structured debt. From single-asset and platform acquisitions to strategic minority investments, we customize each structure to fit the particular needs of our partners. Flexibility and precision define our approach, enabling us to provide capital that aligns distinctly with each opportunity to drive success. SDC targets investments between $50-1,000+ million of capital commitments. 

For more information, please visit our website at https://sdccapitalpartners.com/. 

(Assets under management includes asset value of existing portfolio and remaining unfunded commitments as of 9/30/25)

Description:
Krystal Ventures Studio brings meticulously curated startups shortlisted based on well-researched thesis, by an independent investment committee to a select group of investors, providing them a ring-side view of investing in startups as an asset class.  The promoters of R&D capital bring world-class experience in wealth management, financial advisory, investment banking, and business management. 
As our motto goes - ‘Success with Clarity’ brings together qualitative and quantitative parameters of an investment outcome, both in terms of exits and returns. Our ‘Studio’ is a platform that connects the startups' needs and investor’s interests. 
Krystal Venture Studio:
Startups that are part of Krystal Ventures Studio cohorts get customized advisory programs along with capital-seeking opportunities.  These startups are early-stage startups that benefit from ‘value capital’ that helps them cross the early stage and be prepared for an institutional (read Venture Capital) fundraise. 
Pre-investment curation includes investment readiness before starting a funding round. Post-investment contributions by Angels Beyond Capital who act as mentors and advisors, gain market access, growth advisory, and insights from experienced and willing investor-advisors. 
Startups that participate in the Krystal Venture Studio get access to investors:
a)	Well structured post investment advisory program
b)	Global Market Access Program 
c)	Downstream Investments

Name: Cure Ventures
Description:
Cure Ventures is a venture capital firm focusing on company formation around groundbreaking curative technologies.

Cure Ventures harnesses our team's skills and decades of company-building experience to create innovative companies that aim to eradicate diseases by focusing on de novo company formation built around bold ideas and visionary entrepreneurs. 

We provide the right level of human and financial capital that is required at each stage of the company's life. We seek to build great companies around pioneering scientific solutions with strong intellectual property positions. The Cure Ventures team focuses on disruptive technologies that target high unmet patient needs.

The optimal company build will exhibit a clear genetic validation, substantiated and rigorously derived scientific data, the provenance of a distinguished scientific laboratory, biology with mechanistic clarity, multiple commercial applications, large uncrowded markets, expedited clinical routes, string partnering interest from large pharmaceutical companies, and an articulable oath to an exit.

Name: Key Capital Partners LLP (Key)
Description:
Our Approach
Partnering with UK founders to accelerate growth across Business Services, EdTech, Healthcare, Tech Enabled businesses. 
We believe the best outcomes come from true alignment. Our team works side by side with founders, applying deep sector insight and hands-on support to unlock growth and create enduring enterprise value.

At Key Capital Partners, we invest in ambitious, entrepreneur-led businesses with the potential for transformative growth. From our offices in Leeds and London, we work in partnership with management teams to help profitable UK companies achieve their next stage of development - combining investment with strategic and operational expertise.

We typically invest £4m–£15m in businesses valued between £5m and £50m, focusing on sectors where we have deep experience and networks: Education and training, e-commerce, Outsourced services, Telcos, Property and Facilities Management, Media, EdTech, Healthcare, Recruitment, Fire & Safety, MSPs and Business Services.
Our partnership model is built on collaboration, alignment, and trust. We bring more than capital - we provide insight, capability, and access to resources that help management teams unlock opportunity and deliver sustainable growth.

How we add value
Our Value Creation Pillars form the foundation of our approach:
•	Talent Acquisition & Development – helping attract and retain exceptional people to scale leadership capability.
•	Systems, Structure & Process – strengthening operational infrastructure to support sustainable growth.
•	Governance – building high-performing boards and frameworks for strategic clarity and accountability.
•	Commercial & Professional Networks – connecting management with our ecosystem of advisors, investors, and sector specialists.
•	Sustainable Growth – delivering long-term value 

Key Capital Partners LLP is authorised and regulated by the Financial Conduct Authority.

Please read our important disclaimers here: https://www.keycapitalpartners.co.uk/privacy

We are also committed to institutionalising venture building in Africa by helping governments, corporations, family business offices, universities, and key partners set up and operate thriving venture studios that produce startups in unique vertical sectors.    
We have in the last three years built a robust community of over 1000 early-stage founders; raised over $3 million for startups; developed and launched 8 portfolio startups; built 3 equity-free startups; worked with over 200 founders to create pathways to funding and advisory and have developed strategic partnerships that support the growth of startups with investors, advisors and venture firms across the world.
We are committed to democratising entrepreneurship in Africa while identifying founders who build startups that serve underrepresented communities and markets.   

Sector Focus For our Venture Studio
We are generally interested in repeatable and scalable B2B2C SaaS and transactional ideas/early MVPs with a strategic focus on the following sectors:
FinTech 
Healthcare/BioTech
Artificial Intelligence

Notus Technologies a été créée par Geoffroy Roux de Bézieux, entrepreneur et actuel président du MEDEF, ayant fondé The Phone House et Virgin Mobile. La société a trois types d’activités :
•	Investissements majoritaires dans des PME au sein de deux secteurs :

Description:
WNT Ventures is deeply invested in NZ breakthrough technology

Our deep tech startup founders are passionate about solving global problems with innovative technologies.
WNT Ventures is a high conviction partner, helping founders build their vision and commercialise it globally.  We connect them to resources, expertise and support.

WNT began through a collaboration of experienced entrepreneurs and institutional capital providers who are passionate about building an environment where emerging companies can achieve success.

Our criteria: 

Pre-Revenue 
Strong Intellectual Property Potential 
Targeting a Global Opportunity 

WNT Ventures invests nationwide and  incubate science-backed, pre-revenue companies in a range of sectors including:  Agritech, Food and Hort tech, cleantech,  marine sciences, software, hardware, engineering, robotics, materials and medical devices and tools.  

We operate three funds with available funds to invest and over $25m under management and are raising Fund 4 targeting $35m to expand our investment pool. 

We receive support from the NZ government's Callaghan Innovation as a technology incubator, in which we gain direct access to the repayable loan scheme.  

We also receive access to the Pre-incubation grant scheme to enable assistance, both funding and advice, to companies and technologies who are still developing their business case.

Description:
Aescuvest is a leading, healthcare dedicated FinTech company, with a special focus on financing digital healthcare solutions. Aescuvest’s mission is to facilitate and enable impactful investments into medical breakthrough innovation to disrupt and improve healthcare delivery models, products, and services. Aescuvest enables its investors to build their very individual portfolio of healthcare start-ups - according to their personal investment focus.

A cooperation with EIT Health, and a growing network of partnerships across Europe, allow Aescuvest to source and evaluate the most promising healthcare investment opportunities, structure their financing rounds, and enable healthcare technology-driven investors, such as Business Angels, HNWIs, Family Offices, and Corporate Investors, to participate in healthcare investment opportunities by direct investments via SPV structures.

The Investment Committee, composed of Aescuvest’s very own investment team and members of the Advisory Board of Aescuvest, both deeply rooted in the healthcare industry and with proven track records, have developed a strong and over the last years well tested, pre-screening and due diligence process, to identify and select healthcare start-ups. Aescuvest’s Management is committing own capital to each company prior introduction to the wider Aescuvest investor base.

The combination of innovative ways for equity capital provision, with healthcare industry and investment expertise, provides the Aescuvest portfolio companies a unique platform to develop their business solution, accelerate their path towards commercialization, and lower market access barriers.

Since inception, Aescuvest has successfully raised 30,5 million Euro for its companies and shows roughly 11 million Euro raised capital in 2021 alone.

The innovative idea was to leverage the brand building power of the Times Group’s advertising properties to build value for emerging start-ups and high growth companies. While companies can acquire funding for growth and working capital, brand building investments rarely attract interest from the funding community. This is especially true for brands which are new category creators – because the brand investment in such cases needs to be large and sustainable, compared to the hard asset investments. Brand Capital now partners with more than 900 investee companies across sectors as wide as Retail, FMCG, Consumer Durables, Realty, Digital and Mobile, Financial & Consumer Services and several more. Since the inception of this business a decade ago, the Company has helped build several iconic brands in India and its invested value today is close to $4.0 billion.

Name: OneSixOne Ventures
Description:
1.61 is known as the golden ratio — naturalists claim it is the most efficient ratio for growth to occur. Inspired by the ratio, we are building a community for startups to grow organically and efficiently.

Pablo Casilimas and Justis Mendez met at the University of Florida in 2016, where they recognized a significant gap in early-stage capital across Florida. Despite UF’s robust talent pool—over 60,000 students and 13,000 engineers—resources for learning how to build startups and secure funding were scarce. Witnessing many talented peers leave the state to pursue their ventures elsewhere, they took action by hosting meetups, workshops, and roundtables to strengthen the local startup ecosystem and support founders.

By 2020, OneSixOne had become the hub for the largest startup events between Orlando and Atlanta. When the pandemic shifted the world to virtual, they adapted by launching a Zoom-based accelerator, helping 40+ startups raise over $13M in just two years, with one startup being acquired.

In February 2022, OneSixOne Ventures launched its flagship fund, focusing on early-stage startups in AI and cloud infrastructure, dual-use technology, and standout founders across industries.

Today, OneSixOne Ventures manages over $4M in assets with a portfolio of 20+ active companies. The firm continues to build communities through curated events, hosting 150+ gatherings across 13 cities and connecting over 10,000 founders, tech leaders, and investors.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Description:
INVESTSUD supports sustainable growth and innovation of SMEs by providing equity and expertise.

Aider chaque jour les entrepreneurs wallons à relever de nouveaux défis, les guider dans un environnement en constante mutation, partager les risques de financement de leurs initiatives , voilà la mission - et l’ambition ! - d’Investsud. 

Investsud, c’est :
- une sensibilité entrepreneuriale qui puise ses racines dans un actionnariat mixte, notamment composé d’entreprises familiales ;
- 40 années d’existence, plus de 500 interventions dans plus de 300 sociétés partenaires, une équipe stable et expérimentée  ;
- une PME à taille humaine, implantée dans les provinces de Luxembourg , Namur et Liège , qui cultive la proximité avec ses partenaires.

Associée, conseillère, confidente, révélatrice de talents… Investsud est bien plus qu’une société d’investissement. C’est d’abord une équipe de terrain, disponible pour vous, et qui s’engage à vos côtés sur le long terme. 

Imaginer, créer, développer, transmettre ou acquérir une entreprise,… Dans tous ces moments-clés de la vie d’un entrepreneur, Investsud met ses compétences à votre service et s’engage par des prises de participations selon le contexte propre à chaque opération.  

Investsud s’inscrit pleinement dans les grands enjeux sociétaux actuels. 

Forte de son expérience acquise dans les secteurs du bio-vivant et du bois, elle développe également ses activités :
-	dans l’innovation technologique, notamment liée aux métiers du numérique, 
-	dans l’innovation durable, en lien avec les énergies renouvelables, l’économie circulaire et plus généralement la promotion d’une prospérité respectueuse de la planète et de ses habitants.

Ensemble, faisons chaque jour le choix d’un investissement humain, innovant, responsable et durable. Pour des entreprises inspirées et inspirantes.

#smartmoneyforsmartcompanies

Our New Zealand investor base includes sovereign wealth funds, pension funds, community trusts, iwi groups, religious trusts and other institutional investors. We are a signatory to the United Nations Principles of Responsible Investment (UNPRI).

Direct Capital was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Auckland, New Zealand.

Name: Geodesic Capital
Description:
Building a global company is never easy. The process of international expansion is still largely unautomated and the farther you are from home, the more useful local connections and know-how become. This is particularly true for growth stage entrepreneurs who typically see many clones of their businesses pop up worldwide, often with a local twist. Timely connected partners who know these markets can help you expand in an intelligent way and greatly improve your speed of execution to win the market.

Geodesic Capital invests in rapidly growing technology companies facing exactly these problems. We help entrepreneurs as they expand into Asia – starting with Japan. Our team has extensive experience in both markets and is uniquely qualified to guide today’s most promising growth-stage companies as they embark on their global journey.

Geodesic Capital is a new type of VC firm. Rooted in both Silicon Valley and Japan, we fund rapidly growing tech companies. We provide unparalleled access to senior-level executives, partners and government officials that our portfolio companies need to thrive abroad.

On the ground, our subsidiary, Geodesic Japan, has a team of experts to provide unique market insights, sophisticated “go to market” strategies, introductions to top talent and key partners that companies need in order to start successfully.
