**If you're interested in applying through funding please apply through our website. https://www.alantecapital.com/apply

Alante Capital is a venture capital fund investing in innovative technologies that address climate change and enable a resilient, sustainable future for the apparel, footwear, home goods, and gear industries. 

Investing across deep tech, clean tech, and enterprise software, Alante Capital pairs a comprehensive investment strategy with deep sector expertise to build a risk-adjusted portfolio with the potential for above market-rate returns alongside transformative social and environmental impact. 

Alante was founded to create a space that would enable investors, entrepreneurs, and business leaders to come together and reimagine the future of industry, find solutions to pressing global problems and do our part in the fight against climate change. 

We believe that by cleaning up the production and consumption patterns of leading industries, we can make substantial headway towards decreasing the negative effects humans have on the environment.  And we decided to get started with an often-overlooked industry that touches everyone on the planet… the apparel industry. 

Brand and consumer demand, alongside supply chain pressures, are rapidly driving a shift towards more sustainable products and practices. Alante partners with brands to understand their sustainability bottlenecks and requirements, informing our process to invest in companies that provide viable solutions.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Persephoni Bio
Description:
Persephoni | Turning scientific breakthroughs into real world therapeutics

At Persephoni, we have assembled the industry's finest to transform breakthrough discoveries into life-changing therapies. Guided by the belief that innovation thrives at the intersection of bold science and strategic execution, we de-risk early-stage biotechnology and therapeutics, enabling rapid advancement from bench to bedside.

Our approached is grounded in the Persephoni BREAKTHROUGH SYSTEM, a hybrid Venture Studio and Private Equity model, and strategic capital deployment mechanisms with Global reach. 

Our unique approach combines company formation, hands-on operational support, and targeted capital deployment to accelerate preclinical & Clinical technologies toward value inflection points. By partnering with top scientific founders, leading research institutions, and strategic investors, we bridge the critical funding gap in life sciences, unlocking value and expediting treatments that matter.

At Persephoni, we’re not just building companies—we’re redefining what's possible in biotech innovation.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Growth Warrior Capital
Description:
We invest in Seed & Series A Enterprise AI companies solving the most complex challenges for business.


Founders interested in working with us, please fill out this form: https://gwc-vc.typeform.com/startup-intro

Sign up for our newsletter: https://gwc-vc.typeform.com/newsletter
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Martin Ventures
Description: Martin Ventures is the family office for healthcare executive, investor, and entrepreneur, Charlie Martin. Martin Ventures consists of a healthcare-focused venture capital firm, a shared service advisory company, and a boutique consulting company. Martin Ventures is also the primary funding source for both ROND Capital, a private equity firm and Medical Properties of America, Inc., a Real Estate Investment Trust (REIT).
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Westwood Ventures (an Alumni Ventures Fund)
Description:
Westwood Ventures is an Alumni Ventures' venture capital fund for alumni of UCLA that invests in companies with a UCLA connection. 

Meet the team:
Ru Wu, Managing Partner
Jack Statza, Senior Principal
Sophia Zhao, Senior Principal

We are part of Alumni Ventures, America’s largest venture firm for individual investors. Founded in 2014, we are the venture investing partner to over 11,000 individuals and institutions.  

Follow Westwood Ventures for content at the intersection of our shared alma mater, venture capital, and entrepreneurship.

We are private, for-profit, and not affiliated with or sanctioned by the university.

Offers of securities are made only to eligible investors through formal offering documents, which describe the risks, terms, and other important information that must be considered before investing.  Example portfolio company investments shown for illustrative purposes only, do not necessarily reflect investment outcomes that were or would be obtained by any AV fund or investor, and are not available to future investors, except potentially in the case of follow-on investments.  Venture capital investing involves substantial risk, including risk of loss of all capital invested.  Past performance does not guarantee future results.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: UNCOVERED FUND
Description: UNCOVERED FUND is a venture capital firm focused on emerging markets, starting with Africa. Our mission is to "uncover" the untapped innovators in the developing world. We back cutting-edge technology that builds industrial and social infrastructure from the ground up, and we empower the innovators shaping a sustainable future.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: TechForGood
Description: TechForGood has been leading the development of the Israeli impact innovation ecosystem since 2015. Based on our extensive open impact innovation work with multinational corporates, NGOs, governments, and leading impact investors, we developed a unique methodology, that has been successfully used to train hundreds of Israeli and international startups. Startups that graduated from our programs are creatively addressing some of the world’s most pressing social and environmental issues.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: BNI Ventures
Description: BNI Ventures (BNV) is the Corporate Venture Capital arm of Bank Negara Indonesia (BNI), the first national bank in Indonesia. BNV is licensed and supervised by OJK
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: M|C Partners
Description: M/C Partners is a private equity firm focused on small and mid-size businesses in the digital infrastructure and technology services sectors. Our sectors are complex, but our strategy is straightforward: we invest in promising companies within dynamic industries. We approach opportunities with a “build it” mindset, applying creative structuring and empowering strong leaders to accelerate growth, optimize operations, and build long-term value. The firm has invested $2.4 billion of capital in over 140 companies and is currently investing its eighth fund.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: French Partners
Description:
French Partners is a club of individual investors and family offices dedicated to supporting French entrepreneurs abroad.

We invest amounts of € 0.5k to € 5m from Seed to Series B in fast growing companies all over the world.

French Partners now has more than 50 portfolio companies, including Infracommerce (BRA, IPO), Invincible Brands (ALL, acq. by Henkel), Lalilo (USA, acq. by Rennaissance) Scalefast, Upfluence, Gardyn (USA), Eyewa (UAE), Revelo (BRA), Kehu (CHI) or Novade (SIN).
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Norland Capital
Description: Norland is a global private equity firm based in San Francisco, Sydney, and London and solely focused on investing in and growing Founder-led tech companies.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Newbury Ventures
Description:
We help entrepreneurs start-up and spin-off new ventures, turning their vision into reality. We value partnership, culture, business discipline, shared vision, and teamwork. We have consistently proven our ability to help build successful ventures in environments of both opportunity and challenge, with dependably high returns to our management teams and our investors.

Decades of venture and operating experience enable us to provide our portfolio companies with much more than just an injection of capital. Having witnessed and successfully navigated through numerous investment cycles, we understand technology, its applications, and the difficulties of penetrating complex markets with new products. We also understand that a true working partnership is for the benefit of all parties involved.

As an active member of the team, we listen as well as advise. Support as well as advocate. Facilitate as well as promote. We take a long-term view of every investment and every relationship, and work hard to earn and nurture mutual trust and respect.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Flying Kiwi Angels
Description:
Flying Kiwi Angels are active investors who bring know-how, connections and funding to NZ startups. Operating via a reverse sidecar model they can complete DD swiftly and will actively support successful applicants to raise all necessary funding by syndication with other angel groups or funds. Once fully funded they continue working with investee companies to ensure success.
See also our newsletter fka.nz/news
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Z Nation Lab
Description:
Z Nation Lab provides an ecosystem to tech entrepreneurs and startups to help them accelerate their growth. We are an early stage accelerator which empowers entrepreneurs with capital, technical expertise and network. We bring together high quality mentors, subject matter experts, experienced professionals, investors and VCs under one roof to curate a community that offers an environment for innovation to thrive. 

Our members benefit from office hours with our network of mentors, participation in programs and events organised by us, present at demo-days, pitch counselling, legal and tech consulting and connect to fortune 500 companies.

With presence in Silicon Valley, USA, we are well connected in the Silicon Valley ecosystem to take your startup to USA and expand globally. Startups can take advantage of some of our programs like Access Silicon Valley, Scale up USA and Startup Bootcamp Silicon Valley. 

We selectively invest seed capital in early stage startups graduating from our startup bootcamp program in addition to thousands of dollars in credit from our ecosystem partners like Amazon, PayTM, Google, Freshdesk, IBM, Mail chimp etc to help our members scale up their entrepreneurial ventures.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: BADGE Business Angels des Grandes Ecoles
Description:
Depuis 2004, les Business Angels des Grandes Ecoles  ont financé plus de 229 entreprises en apportant plus de 55 M€ qui, par effet sur d'autres sources de financement, ont généré plus de 140 M€ d'apport de capitaux dans ces entreprises. 


Ses adhérents, aux expériences professionnelles reconnues, ont participé en 2024 à 29 levées de fonds, apportant 4.1 M € à des entreprises en fort développement.

Notre objectif est de soutenir la création, le développement et le financement de start-up à fort potentiel de croissance dans des domaines technologiques et de services. 

BADGE a professionnalisé le sourcing et l’accompagnement des projets : 80% des start-up financées depuis 2010 poursuivent leur activité.

Bilan 2024 : 29 entreprises ont été soutenues par les apports de capitaux propres de nos adhérents à hauteur de 4.1 M€, soit :  
- 10 projets en 1er tour (1,4 M€)
- 19 projets en tours suivants (2,7 M€)

Dans les secteurs : Santé-Biotech (41%), Industrie (8%), Numérique (25%), Développement durable et services (26%).

Nos adhérents sont pour beaucoup issus d'écoles d'ingénieurs ou de management, nombre d'autres compétences et expériences sont représentées. 
La diversité des profils de nos Business Angels est notre ADN, l’ouverture sur l’innovation notre force. 

A même d’accueillir et comprendre tous types de projets, depuis sa création en 2004, BADGE c’est une équipe de bénévoles au service de l’innovation avec :

Plus de 8.000 projets reçus, plus de 500 retenus, 55 M€ investis, et 239 sociétés financées par plus de 300 membres des Business Angels des Grandes Ecoles.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Audacious Ventures
Description: Partnering with the most ambitious founders in technology and helping them achieve their most audacious goals
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: VenCap International plc
Description:
VenCap International plc is an independent investment advisory firm focused on investing in top-tier venture capital funds in the US, Europe, China and India.

Founded in 1987, VenCap is one of the longest-established investment advisory businesses focused on venture capital active today. It has raised approximately $2.4 billion across multiple funds-of-funds and separate client accounts.

Since its inception in 1987, VenCap has been able to offer investors early exposure to many of the most significant companies that have been formed in the last 30 years.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Change Engine
Description:
Change Engine strives to think about and solve the big problems of today by focusing on fundamental or first-principle thinking. First principle thinking is all about thinking from the fundamentals- getting deep and understanding things at its purest, atomic level- and then building grounds up.

At Change Engine, we follow a similar approach of looking at any problem, not through any lens or bias but objectively at its true cause, and then working through it by coming up with fundamental and novel concepts.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: iSeed
Description: iSeed is India's first micro-fund backed by top global founders and investors.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Schematic Ventures
Description: Schematic Ventures invests in technology that makes & moves the world.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Genoa Ventures
Description:
Genoa Ventures invests in early-stage companies innovating at the convergence of biology and technology. 

Visionary startups developing innovative life science technologies with outsized potential often struggle to raise capital from traditional funders. These companies are typically multi-disciplinary (e.g. genomics + optics + microfluidics + big data) and/or market-making, and don't neatly fit most VC’s patterns and boxes.

Genoa Ventures stands in this gap. Genoa Ventures uniquely combines an appetite for technology-driven, “category-defying” opportunities in life sciences with the domain expertise and operational experience necessary to select and nurture the best bio-based companies early, before most other investors. We take the time to understand the science and technology, applications and markets, and to help these companies achieve their full potential.

We believe in the enormous and relatively untapped possibilities of life science technologies and discoveries applied to realms outside of healthcare, and in the unbounded potential of the entrepreneurial visionaries who will lead us in realizing these possibilities.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Advent Venture Partners
Description:
Advent Venture Partners is one of Europe's most successful growth and venture capital investors in market-leading tech and life sciences businesses.

We have designed our strategy, teams and funds so we can focus on backing a select few companies.

We pride ourselves on establishing true partnerships with entrepreneurs in order to build valuable businesses together.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Mainstage Hub (Not Operational)
Description:
Mainstage Hub was founded with the Vision to help ambitious Entrepreneurs from all over the World to buíld World Changing Startups right in the heart of Europe.

The world has been experiencing a tsunami of innovation in the past decade and a half. Humans are innovating in every sphere of life. Be it Agriculture, Food, Clothing, Power generation, mobility...the list is endless. One key objective of innovation is to "Make the lives of Humans Better". For this we strive to touch every aspect of the universe which is affecting or will affect us in the future. But innovation has been sporadic. The world is divided into pockets of excellence and areas of potential growth. Without networking these areas, the holistic development of this world is not possible.

Mainstage Hub has been built with the idea of creating such "Innovation Bridges between Evolved ecosystems with Evolving ecosystems". Our single point vision is to create such connections where Innovation and Adoption goes hand in hand. Our objective is to identify and support such startups and give them the fuel to grow.

We help with our extensive Industry and Investor Network in a wide range of Industries and with our hands-on Sales and Go to Market Coaching, as well as Fund Raising and Visionary Matchmaking Events and Meetups.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Cultivian Sandbox Ventures
Description:
Cultivian Sandbox is a venture capital firm focused on building next-generation food and agriculture technology companies capable of generating superior returns. As early investors and active board members, we employ a hands-on approach to building companies and are often directly involved in setting company strategy, recruiting key executives, and raising additional capital. Much more than simply a financial resource, we are capable of delivering tremendous value through active collaboration with our strategic partners and network, which are unparalleled in the food and agriculture industries.

As both experienced operating managers and venture investors we add value to portfolio companies through our highly skilled team and extensive industry network. Our expertise in sourcing, evaluating, closing, managing and ultimately exiting successful equity investments positions us not only to build stronger businesses, but to reshape industries.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Pivotal Life Sciences
Description:
At Pivotal Life Sciences, we invest in the brightest minds in life sciences. As a global investment platform dedicated to fostering growth and innovation, we leverage our diverse expertise and the long-term capital commitment from the Nan Fung Group to partner with scientists, entrepreneurs, and thought leaders on drug discovery, development, and growth opportunities.

We believe AI is a transformative tool, particularly in life sciences, where actionable insights can catalyze significant breakthroughs. Our commitment to integrating advanced AI technologies positions us to enhance our investment strategies and drive impactful results.

With a proven track record in company formation, venture capital, and investment growth experience, we are dedicated to identifying opportunities that deliver long-term value for our investors. Our partnership and direct investment relationships through Pivotal bioVenture Partners in both the US and China enable us to cover a comprehensive spectrum of the life sciences industry, including therapeutics, medical devices, and diagnostics across all development stages.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: iGlobe Partners
Description: iGlobe Partners is a premier global venture capital fund manager founded in 1999 in Silicon Valley and headquartered in Singapore today. With an extensive and global network, the firm has a strong track record of enabling startups to scale game-changing innovations. Its unique value to portfolio companies is a hands-on approach in helping startups expand to markets beyond their national boundaries. iGlobe has continually achieved top-quartile fund performance, giving rise to multiple unicorns and successful exits including Unity Software (NYSE: U), Twist Bioscience (NASDAQ: TWST), ACSL (TYO: 6232), Matterport (NASDAQ: MTTR), Hippo Holdings (NYSE: HIPO), Ginkgo Bioworks (NYSE: DNA) and NerdWallet (NASDAQ: NRDS).
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Avante Capital Partners
Description: Avante Capital Partners is a majority-owned women- and diverse-owned private credit and structured equity fund. We invest in the form of unitranche debt, mezzanine debt and minority equity in high-quality, lower middle market businesses generating at least $3 million in cash flow.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Skagerak Capital
Description: We invest time, capital, and effort to build companies that contribute to sustainable, long-term value creation.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Palo Santo
Description:
The future of mental wellness is being built today. Through its diversified investment fund, Palo Santo is positioned to increase the supply of clinically effective, affordable, and accessible mental health and addiction treatment solutions needed in today’s world.

Supported by a rapidly growing body of evidence and strong FDA support, psychedelic-assisted treatments represent a paradigm shift in mental health care. Yet the emerging ecosystem of business opportunities is highly fragmented and, with a lack of institutional capital available, Palo Santo is targeting high growth opportunities within biotech & drug development, health care services, and digital health solutions led by passionate, experienced, and ethical management teams. These businesses are positioned to have a profound impact on treating conditions such as depression, PTSD, anxiety, OCD, drug and alcohol dependence, chronic pain, Alzheimer’s, and a range of inflammatory-related illnesses.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: D3 Venture Capital Firm
Description: D3 is an early-stage fund for defense tech startups. It offers equity investment, extensive mentorship by the world’s leading defense tech professionals, facilitated cooperation with the Armed Forces of Ukraine, as well as fundraising support. We focus on technology-driven startup that work with various defense capabilities across military hardware and software, cyber security, and AI. The fund sources startups from Ukraine and its allied countries.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Pappas Capital
Description:
Founded in 1994, Pappas Capital is a global venture capital and commercial development firm that specializes in investments in next-generation life science, agriculture, and technology companies across the United States and Canada, with select investments in Asia and Europe.

Whether you’re looking for capital or have capital to invest, contact us and learn how we can put our expertise to work for you.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Draper Startup House Accelerator
Description:
We're not your typical accelerator. In fact, we’re anything but typical. Our DSH startup accelerator pushes founders to their limits mentally and physically, only to come out the other end stronger and better prepared to tackle the challenges of creating an extraordinary business.

Startups will be provided housing to live amongst other entrepreneurs. We believe that when entrepreneurs live amongst each other that these collisions foster innovation by opening up the entrepreneurs’ minds to other ways of thinking.
Your success is our success, and our team will act as additional team members to help set your company up for success.

Startups will leave with a tool belt of resources, knowledge, and connections to continue to thrive after a one-of-a-kind experience.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Bay Angels
Description:
We invest in technology companies in seed, angels, pre-A and A stages.

Bay Angels was founded in 1998 by Roger King, and managed by Philip King. We are Bay Area angel organization whose members include both accredited investors and members of the venture capital community.  Over the years we've helped a number of early stage companies acquire funding angel funding and launch their offerings.  One of our earlier success stories was OpenTable.  

For membership and sponsorship information please visit our website -
https://bayangels.com

For application for funding - https://bayangels.com/requirements/
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Circular Innovation Fund
Description: The Circular Innovation Fund (“CIF”) is a global growth-stage venture capital fund led by Cycle Capital and Demeter, leading cleantech capital managers, focused exclusively on circular innovation, striving to positively contribute to climate change mitigation and the circular use of resources.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: InnoQube Switzerland
Description:
At InnoQube Switzerland, we are redefining the future of construction, engineering, and smart infrastructure. As Switzerland’s leading ConstructionTech innovation hub, we unite visionary startups, industry pioneers, and global investors to drive groundbreaking solutions in one of the world’s most impactful industries.

Why ConstructionTech?
The construction sector accounts for 38% of global CO₂ emissions and has seen minimal productivity growth over the past decades. The future demands sustainable, efficient, and tech-driven solutions. That’s where we come in.

At InnoQube, we accelerate innovation in AI, robotics, automation, CleanTech, green materials, IoT, BIM, digital twins, renewable energy, AR & VR, circular economy, mobility, smart buildings, smart cities, modular construction, and 3D printing. These cutting-edge technologies are reshaping the industry, creating CO₂-neutral solutions, reducing waste, and optimizing urban living.

What We Offer
 A world-class startup accelerator – Fast-track your ConstructionTech venture with mentorship, funding, and global exposure.
 A dynamic innovation hub – Connect with thought leaders, corporate partners, and investors.
 A collaborative coworking space – Designed for visionaries driving sustainable change.
 Exclusive events & networking – Engage with key players in the future of construction and smart infrastructure.

Beyond ConstructionTech
While our primary focus is ConstructionTech, we remain open to emerging technologies that shape the future of sustainability, automation, and digital transformation.

 Are you ready to build the future?

Join InnoQube Switzerland and be part of a movement that transforms industries, cities, and lives.

 Let’s connect!
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: IronGate Capital Advisors
Description:
Our mission is to direct capital to the highest-performing ventures in the advanced technology arena, with a specific focus on innovations in aerospace, defense and intelligence, and national security that have dual-use applications in the civilian economy.

IronGate Capital Advisors is managed by a multidisciplinary team of experts in finance, national security, and technology.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Juuri Partners
Description:
Juuri Partners is an independent private equity company investing in Finnish growth focused SMEs with net sales from 5 to 150 mEUR. We are an alternative funding source for SME sector providing active capital and support for development. Our mission is to enhance value creation and growth of Finnish SMEs. 

We are focused on established businesses looking for capital for identified growth opportunities, changes of ownership structure or other type of discontinuation events. We have a distinctive investment approach and flexibility to provide all the funding in a deal including various equity and debt instruments. We have a straight forward partnership style of working with the management teams to enhance the value of their businesses.

For further info and contact details, please visit www.juuripartners.fi
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Specialist VC
Description:
We are a €50m venture capital fund, focusing on investments into promising tech startups from pre-seed to A-rounds. Our main focuses are on B2B, SaaS, fintech and marketplaces. 

Usaldusfond Specialist VC Primary and Secondary Fund II is backed by BIF 2 – an initiative created by cooperation between the Republic of Estonia, the Republic of Latvia, the Republic of Lithuania and EIF.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Palumni VC
Description:
Palumni VC invests in startups founded and led by Palantir alums. 
Our investors comprise a network of more than 600 operators, founders, and angels. 

Our goal is to be the most value add per dollar on the cap table of each of our companies, pairing them with the right support and advice for every step of the long founder’s journey. 

We work with founders from the earliest stages of company formation - often before they have incorporated or chosen a lawyer. We engage with startups before they’re ready to raise - as trusted advisors helping founders find a lead investor and sculpt the round. We invest in high impact opportunities - without being limited by geography or stage. 

We believe working on meaningful problems generates outsize financial returns. 

Our portfolio includes Adyton, AngelList, Kairos, Kolena, Kurtosis, Little Otter, Metaview, and Mural.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Powerhouse Capital
Description:
Powerhouse Capital is a Los Angeles based venture fund exclusively dedicated to global technology investment opportunities in media, entertainment & interactive gaming. We are building "The Gateway to LA", authentically helping to connect this vibrant ecosystem with powerhouse companies, teams & ideas.

Powerhouse invests in direct-to-consumer platforms powered by data, as we believe this is where accelerated value creation will accrue in the coming global investment cycles.
Powerhouse has an investment strategy focused on the four pillars of the media ecosystem: (i) Sight (Visual Content), (ii) Sound (Audio, Music & Podcasting), (iii) Play (Gaming, Sports & Esports), and (iv) Live (The Experience Economy). 

Powerhouse was founded in 2019 by veterans of Evolution Media, a platform investing in partnership with TPG and CAA, to invest in high growth companies. The Powerhouse team has directly relevant operating, investing and Board experience in these sectors, providing for a focused and unique perspective in sourcing opportunities for value creation.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Coulson Capital
Description:
Parallel Economy. Realized.

We are a high growth group of companies that are fighting to make a positive impact on the world. Our portfolio companies span Media, Health, Wellness, BioTech, and Connections. 

We are actively recruiting across the companies.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Asociación Paraguaya de Venture Capital (PARCAPY)
Description: La Asociación Paraguaya de Venture Capital (PARCAPY), es una organización sin fines de lucro con la misión de promover y desarrollar la industria del capital de riesgo en Paraguay como motor dinamizador de la economía.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Creathor Ventures
Description: Creathor Ventures invests in technology-oriented companies that drive the automation of industry and business, and the personalization and digitalization of healthcare. The regional focus is on Germany and Switzerland. From its locations in Bad Homburg and Zurich, the team currently supports over 30 tech and healthcare companies. Over the past 30 years, the management team has financed over 200 companies as lead or co-lead investors. More than 20 companies have been listed on international stock exchanges. Creathor Ventures currently manages a fund volume of over 230 million euros.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Tall Grass Ventures
Description: Tall Grass Ventures is a seed stage venture capital firm based in Calgary, AB, focused on supporting the next generation of early stage agrifood tech solutions.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: Impact Amplifier
Description:
Impact Amplifier is a leading accelerator, asset manager, and impact advisory firm, committed to accelerating the growth of high-impact businesses in Africa.

Founded in 2011 and headquartered in South Africa with offices in Nigeria, Impact Amplifier blends business development services alongside finance, and rigorous impact assessments to build the African impact ecosystem.

Our mission is to address Africa’s socio-economic and environmental challenges, innovative entrepreneurs and business models must emerge. 

Impact Amplifier drives this vision by: assisting impact investors to source and invest into compelling opportunities; providing investment readiness and advisory services to businesses, which combine financial success with positive social and environmental change; and delivering supplier development and sustainability advisory services to corporations and public institutions.

Services include:

PORTFOLIO BUILDING FOR IMPACT INVESTORS

Our core services are designed to assist impact investors build quality business portfolios, which can thrive commercially whilst making a meaningful contribution to social and environmental challenges. 

INVESTMENT READINESS FOR HIGH IMPACT BUSINESSES

“High Impact” businesses are those that have the ability to thrive commercially whilst also addressing social and environmental challenges. We focus on supporting these businesses to become investment ready, raise capital by leveraging our global network of investors, and support their growth post investment through targeted advisory services. 

SUPPLY CHAIN ADVISORY

Impact Amplifier supports larger organisations to enhance and diversify their supply chain in line with South Africa’s B-BBEE codes and sector charters. We develop enterprise development strategies, identify high impact SMME opportunities, provide business development and raise capital for targeted SMMEs.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: DRIVE Catalyst
Description:
Drive Catalyst, the venture capital arm of Far Eastern Group, is committed to propelling innovative technologies that enhance how our world functions, aiming for smarter and sustainable solutions. Since launching in 2019, we have championed numerous groundbreaking startups across Asia, North America, and Europe.

We understand the swift pace of change in today’s world, and we are built for speed and decisive action — it is part of our core. Our vision has always been focused on the long-term: investing in the future and supporting founders who are dedicated to making a tangible impact.

Backed by one of Taiwan’s largest and most diverse conglomerates, we leverage our extensive network to foster valuable interactions with the Far Eastern Group’s leaders. We facilitate strategic introductions to executives across various sectors, including corporate strategy, product development, and research and development.

Our mission is clear: to act as the catalyst for innovation. We form partnerships with founders who share our commitment to crafting a better future. Together, we transform visionary ideas into reality, paving the way for a brighter, more sustainable tomorrow.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals

Name: AMAVI Capital
Description:
AMAVI was born from the collaboration of private equity professionals, real estate experts, and technology entrepreneurs. This unique blend of deep expertise across these three key industries, coupled with our extensive professional network, positions us exceptionally well to uncover and generate distinctive investment opportunities. 

AMAVI is dedicated to consolidating the highly fragmented European 'real assets' industry by identifying top platforms and actively engaging in M&A and cross-border partnerships within carefully selected verticals. 

Our focus is on creating European champions by investing in businesses connected to the built world. We target companies with proven track record, consolidation potential, and driven by strong, passionate management teams. 

With offices in Belgium and Sweden, we are well-positioned to execute our pan-European investment strategy. Our current portfolio spans the entire European continent, with a particular focus on the Benelux, Nordic, France and DACH region.
Primary Industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals
